0 Angakiril a Yesu Kristu
1 ‘Minam mawiy majin ma angakiril a Yesu Kristu, wa a majuku ma David, niyend David wading wa a majuku ma Aburaham.
2 Aburaham wamuvala Isak, Isak wamuvala Jakob, ni Jakob wamuvala Yuda ni anamakwend.
3 Yuda wamuvala Peres ni Zerak, wayivala nend Tamar. Peres wamuvala Hesiron ni Hesiron wamuvala Ram.
4 Ram wamuvala Aminadab, Aminadab wamuvala Nakishon, ni Nakishon wamuvala Solomon.
5 Solomon wamuvala Bowaz, wamuvala nend Rahab. Bowaz wamuvala Obed, wamuvala nend Rut. Obed wamuvala Yese
6 Yese wamuvala Mwant David, David wamuvala Salomon, wamuvala nend mband wa Uria.
7 Salomon wamuvala Robowam, Robowam wamuvala Abija, ni Abija wamuvala Asa.
8 Asa wamuvala Josafat, Josafat wamuvala Joram, ni Joram wamuvala Ozias.
9 Ozias wamuvala Jotam Jotam wamuvala Akaz, ni Akaz wamuvala Ezekias.
10 Ezekias wamuvala Manase, Manase wamuvala Amon, ni Amon wamuvala Yosias.
11 Yosias wamuvala Jekonias ni anamakwend pa chisu chadingau ‘in Isarel mu winkwal ku Babilon.
12 Padiokalau in Isarel mu winkwal ku Babilon, Jekonias wamuvala Sheyalitiel, ni Sheyalitiel wamuvala Zorobabel.
13 Zorobabel wamuvala Abiud, Abiud wamuvala Eliakim, ni Eliakim wamuvala Azor.
14 Azor wamuvala Sadok, Sadok wamuvala Akim, ni Akim wamuvala Eliud.
15 Eliud wamuvala Eleyazar, Eleyazar wamuvala Matan, ni Matan wamuvala Jakob.
16 Jakob wamuvala Josef, ikundj wa Mariy, makwend a Yesu, upidilau anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
17 Chawiy kudiokal ku Aburaham djat ni ku David kwading majuku dikum ni manying. Kudiokal ku David djat ni payitwalau in Isarel mu winkwal ku Babilon, kwading majuku dikum ni manying. Kudiokal pa chirung chadiokalau mu winkwal djat ni kuvadik kwa Kristu Uzizidilau Many. kwading kand majuku dikum ni manying.
0 Kuvadik kwa Yesu Kristu
18 Kuvadik kwa Yesu Kristu kwading mwamu. Makwend Mariy ading amutonda kal kudi Josef. Pakwez padingau kand kal ijikijan, Mariy wading wimishin kal ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila.
19 Josef wading muntu utentamina, kasotap kumukwatish Mariy usany pakach pa antu. Chad ndiy warijeka mutapu wa kumulik ku ujindj.
20 Pachadingay ni kutongijok mulong wa chom chinech, muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej weza kudi ndiy mu chilat, wamwel anch: “Josef, wa a majuku ma David, kangal wov wom wa kumwat mukajey Mariy, mulong ndiy wimisha ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila.
21 Ndiy ukez kuval mwan ikundj, chad ey ukez kumupil anch Yesu, mulong ndiy ukez kuyipandish antwend ku yitil yau.”
22 Chom chinech chamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu ma Chinawej mamulejay muruu wend anch:
23 “Changadim wakad kumwijik ikundj ukez kwimish, chad ukez kuval mwan ikundj ukez kupilau anch, Emanuwel, charumburik anch, Nzamb udi ni yetwetu.”
24 Chalankay Josef pa tul, ndiy wasala mudi mwamulejau kudi muruu wa mwiur, ndiy wamwata mukajend Mariy.
25 Pakwez ndiy kasankanap nend djat ni pavalay mwanend ikundj. Chad Josef wamupila anch, Yesu.
0 In manangu a kwingangel akat kwez ni kumutal Yesu
1 Yesu wavadika mu ul wa Betlehem mwi ngand ya Yudeya, pa chirung chadingay Herod mwant. Pa chisu chinicha in manangu amwing ilejina yom ya atutumbu, adiokala kwingangel, ez ku Yerusalem.
2 Awiy ipula anch: “Ov, kwisu kwavadikinay mwan ukeza kwikal mwant wa in Yuda? Etu twamen katumbu wend udiokil kwingangel, chad twezin mulong wa kumwifukwil.”
3 Chovay Herod rusangu riner, kamanap kand mwakutwadil, pamwing ni antu awonsu a mu Yerusalem.
4 Ndiy wayikumangeja in kupesh ajim awonsu ni alej a Yijil, wayipul anch: “Ov, kwisu kukuvadikay Kristu Uzizidilau Many?”
5 Awiy amwakula anch: “Ukuvadikin mu ul wa Betlehem mwi ngand ya Yudeya, mulong muruu wa Nzamb wafunda anch:
6 ‘Ey, Betlehem, mwi ngand ya Yuda, kiudiap kakemp kupandakanamu misumb yawonsu ya mu Yuda. Mukach mwa antwey nikez kumubudish mwin kutakel wa antwam in Isarel.’ ”
7 Chawiy Herod wayitazuka ku ujindj in manangu adiokala kwingangel, wayipompish ni kushinshik chakwel amuleja kamu chisu chamekanay katumbu.
8 Chad ndiy wayituma ku Betlehem, wayilej anch: “Yangany, ukamusurabany mwan. Anch wamumanany nlejanyamu, chakwel niya kand ni kumwifukwil.”
9 Chadiokalau kudi mwant, awila mwi njil, chad amumana katumbu wamanau kwingangel. Katumbu wayitakela djat ni pimanay pa ndond padingay mwan.
10 Awiy asangara nakash kupandakan pamumanau kand katumbu.
11 Andama mu chikumbu, amuman mwan ni makwend Mariy. Chad asa manungun pansh, amwifukwil mwan. Aburila mu yipau yau, abudish yom ya matangal, utad wa or, ni diseng dia malash, ni malash ma rupwembu ruwamp, chad amwinkish mwan.
12 Chad Nzamb wayibabesha mu chilat chakwel kangal achirik kwa Herod. Awiy asutila mwi njil yikwau, achirik kwol kwau.
0 Akat kuchinyin mu Idjibit
13 Chayau in manangu, muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej wamekana kudi Josef mu chilat. Wamubabesha anch: “Herod ukez kumukimb mwan mulong wa kumujip. Chawiy tumbuk, yangany ni mwan ni makwend, uchinyinany mwi ngand ya Idjibit. Ukashakamany mwinimwa djat ni pinikez kukulejany kudiokalamu.”
14 Uchuku wawiy winiwa, Josef walanka, wamusend mwan ni makwend, aya ku Idjibit.
15 Awiy ashakama kwinikwa djat ni pafilay Herod. Chom chinech chamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Chinawej kudi muruu wend anch: “Namutazuka Mwanam kudiokal ku Idjibit.”
0 Akat kuyijip an
16 Chijikay Herod anch, in manangu adiokala kwingangel, amudimbil kal, ndiy wajimana nakash. Ndiy walejana kuyijip an amakundj awonsu a mu Betlehem ni mu makunku ma piswimp avadika pa chisu chinicha, kushik ni ku an akweta mivu yaad. Ndiy wasala yom yiney mulong wa yom yateshay kudi in manangu, pa chisu chamekanay katumbu.
17 Mwamu mumawanyina mazu malonday Jeremiy, muruu wa Nzamb, anch:
18 “Dipumb diovakana mu Rama, dipumb dia madil makash. Rechel ukat kudil mulong wa anend. Ulikin kumwongoj, mulong anend afa kal.”
0 Akat kudiokal ku Idjibit
19 Pafay Herod, muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej wamekana kudi Josef mu chilat ku Idjibit.
20 Wamuleja anch: “Lank, musenda mwan ni makwend, uchirik nau mwi ngand ya Isarel, mulong adia asotila kumujip mwan afil kwau.”
21 Chad Josef walanka, wamusend mwan ni makwend, wachirik nau mwi ngand ya Isarel.
22 Pakwez Josef, chateshay anch, Arkelaus wamuswan kal tatukwend Herod kwikal mwant wa ngand ya Yudeya, ndiy wova wom wa kuya kwinikwa. Nzamb wamubabesha Josef mu chilat, chad ndiy waya mwi ngand ya Galalia.
23 Ndiy waya wakashakam mu ul wa Nazaret. Mwamu mawanyina mazu malondau aruu a Nzamb anch: “Akez kumupil anch, mwin Nazaret.”
0 Yohan Mubatish ukat kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb
1 Mu machuku minima Yohan Mubatish waya mwi mpay ya Yudeya, chad wasambish kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb.
2 Walondanga anch: “Karumukany, udiokalany ku yitil yen, mulong Want wa Mwiur udi piswimp!”
3 Yohan, ndiy kamu walejanau kudi Isay, muruu wa Chinawej, palonday anch: “Muntu umwing ukat komb rubil mwi mpay anch: ‘Wapishany njil ya Nsalejetu, rijekany salal mukombil wend
4 Yohan wading udjit yidjal ya unyev wa nnam ukweta ndund pa nyim, wading kand udjit nshipu ya chikit mwi mbund. Wading ni kudia atubwol ni woch.
5 Antu adiokalanga ku Yerusalem, ni mwi ngand yawonsu ya Yudeya, ni mwi ngand yawonsu yadinga piswimp ni wit wa Yordan, ezanga kudi ndiy.
6 Awiy itiyina yitil yau patok, chad ndiy wayibatisha mu wit wa Yordan.
7 Yohan, chamanay Afaris nau Asadus avud akat kwez kudi ndiy mulong wa kuyibatish, ndiy wayela anch: “En annak! Ov,
8 nany wakulejanya anch, ukutwish kwiyepany ku kadimu kakuletay Chinawej? Salany yom yikutwisha kumekesh anch, wakarumukinany kal kudiokal ku yitil yen.
9 Kangal walamitinany kulond anch: ‘Aburaham udi nshankur wetu.’ Chakin kamu, nakulejany anch, Nzamb ukutwish kukarumun mayal minam kwikal antu a a majuku ma Aburaham! 
10 Kasok kalel kwishin kwa mitond mulong wa kukatul mij. Chawiy mutond wawonsu wakad kusong mabuj mawamp, akez kuukatul, audjibul mu kasu.
11 Am nakubatishany kal nich mem mulong wa kumekesh anch, wakarumukany kal kudiokal ku yitil yen. Pakwez muntu ukweza kwinyim kwam ukez kukubatishany ni Mwiku Utumbila nich kasu. Ndiy wimpandakenamu am. Am kinidiap muwamp uwanyidina ap kusend yisapat yend.
12 Ndiy ukwet kal ral mu makas mend, chakwel ukutwish kupep mulong wa kwauril mbut ni yipapal. Ukez kukumangej mbut mwi nkil yend, pakwez yipapal ukez kuyosh mu kasu kakad kujimang.”
0 Akat kumubatish Yesu
13 Chad Yesu wadiokala ku Galalia, wez kudi Yohan ku wit wa Yordan chakwel amubatish.
14 Pakwez Yohan wela kumukangesh, wamwel anch: “Am yam nifanyidina kwimbatish kudi ey, ov, ey weza kand kudi am?”
15 Pakwez Yesu wamwakula anch: “Pakwez katat, sal bil kwey mwamu. Mulong mutapu winou tukutwish kuwanyish kutenchik kwawonsu kwa Nzamb.” Chawiy Yohan witiya.
16 Chamubatishau Yesu, ndiy watuntuka mu mem. Pawiy kamu pinipa diur diamwanzurikina ndiy, chad wamana Mwiku wa Nzamb wading mudi iyemb wamushirikina.
17 Chawiy dizu diadiokala mwiur anch: “Ey udi Mwanam unikatila nakash. Am nikat kusangar mulong weyey.”
0 Akat kumwoz Yesu
1 Chad Mwiku Utumbila wamutwala mwi mpay chakwel akutwish kumwoz kudi Sakudimban.
2 Walala mwinimwa machuku makum manying ma muten, ni makum manying ma uchuku wakad kudia, chad Yesu wova nzal.
3 Chawiy Sakudimban weza kudi ndiy, wamulej anch: “Anch ey udi Mwan a Nzamb, idiela bil diyal ed dikarumuka kwikal yakudia.”
4 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Muntu kakutwishap kwikal mwom mulong wa yakudia kusu, pakwez ukwet kuswir kwa mazu mawonsu makat kulonday Nzamb.’ ”
5 Chad Sakudimban wamutwala Yesu ku Yerusalem, Musumb Utumbila, wamukandjik pa musong wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb. 
6 Chad wamwela anch: “Anch ey udi Mwan a Nzamb, idjibula bil pansh, mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Nzamb ukez kuyilej aruu end a mwiur mulong weyey. Awiy akez kukwakil pa makas mau, chakwel mend yey kiyikwipwakalap ku mayal.’ ”
7 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Kangal wamupak Chinawej Nzamb wey.’ ”
8 Chad Sakudimban wamutwala Yesu piur pa mukandu ulemp, wamulej mant mawonsu ma pa mangand ni uyaj wau.
9 Wamuleja anch: “Am nikez kukwinkish yom yiney yawonsu anch ey wangifukwil am.”
10 Chad Yesu wamwakula anch: “Sakudimban, diokal pinap! Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Chifanyidin kumwifukwil Chinawej Nzamb wey, ni kumusadil ndiy kusu!’ ”
11 Chawiy Sakudimban wamusha Yesu, chad aruu a mwiur eza amukwash.
0 Yesu ukat kusambish mudimu wend mu Galalia
12 Chateshay Yesu anch, Yohan amutekin kal mu rukan, ndiy waya kwend mwi ngand ya Galalia.
13 Ndiy kashakamap mu ul wa Nazaret, pakwez waya wakashakam mu Kapernaum, ul udia kuns kwa dijiy dia Galalia, mwi ngand ya Zabulon ni ya Nefitali.
14 Ndiy wasala mwamu mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch:
15 “Ngand ya Zabulon ni ngand ya Nefitali, ngand yidia kuns kwa karung, ngand yidia mutambu wa kwingangel wa wit wa Yordan, ni ngand kand ya Galalia mushichau in michid yikwau! :
16 Antu akata kushakam mu mididim, akez kuman kutok kujim. Antu ashicha mwi ngand ya mididim ya rufu, chimunyik chikez kuyimunyikin.”
17 Kudiokal chisu chinicha Yesu wasambisha kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb anch: “Karumukany, udiokalany ku yitil yen, mulong Want wa Mwiur udi piswimp!”
0 Yesu ukat kutazuk ayibind anying a ansh
18 Pasutay Yesu pa chikumu cha dijiy dia Galalia, wayimana an a kamuntu aad, ayibind a ansh. Umwing wading Simon, upidilau anch, Pita, mukwau wading Andare, ading ni kukwat ansh mu dijiy nich wand.
19 Yesu wayileja anch: “Nlondulany, wikalany in kwilej am. Chad nikez kukwinkishany ukash wa kulet antu kudi am mudi mukat kuletay chibind ansh mu waat.”
20 Pawiy kamu pinipa, awiy asha mand mau, aya nend.
21 Ndiy wenda chintampu chikemp, chad wamana Jakobu ni Yohan, an amakundj a Zebede. Awiy ading mu waat nend tatukwau Zebede, ading ni kurijek mand mau. Yesu wayitazuka,
22 pawiy pinipa asha waat, amusha kand tatukwau, chad amulondula Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kulejan ni kwokan
23 Yesu wendangana mwi ngand yawonsu ya Galalia. Walejananga mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb. Wayoka ayej a misong ya mitapu yawonsu.
24 Rusangu rend rapalangana mwi ngand yawonsu ya Siria, chad amuletodila ayej awonsu ading akweta misong ya mitapu yawonsu. Yesu wayoka kand antu awonsu ading akweta ayilembil, ni ading akweta musong wa kafefu, ni ading akweta musong wa kalip.
25 Chisak chijim cha antu amulondula adiokala mwi ngand ya Galalia, ni mwi ngand ya Misumb Dikum, ni mu Yerusalem, ni mwi ngand ya Yudeya, ni mwi ngand ya ushad wa Yordan.
0 Yesu ukat kulejan pa mukandu
1 Yesu, chamanay chisak chijim nakash cha antu, ndiy wakandama pa mukandu, washakam pansh. In kwilejend amwombamu.
2 Ndiy wasambisha kuyilej anch:
0 Kuyuk kwakin
3 “Ayuk kwau antu ija anch: ‘Tukwet kuswir kwa yom ya Nzamb mu michim yetu.’ Inay awiy adia antu a mu Want wa Nzamb!
4 “Ayuk kwau antu akweta runeng. Nzamb ukez kuyongoj!
5 “Ayuk kwau antu itudishina. Nzamb ukez kuyinkish yom yawonsu yayishilayimu!
6 “Ayuk kwau antu akweta kuswir kwa kusal mudi musotilay Nzamb. Chawiy Nzamb ukez kuyikwash, chakwel akuwanyish kuswir kwau!
7 “ Ayuk kwau antu akata kuyovil akwau riy. Nzamb ukez kuyovil niyau riy!
8 “Ayuk kwau antu adia zwang mu michim. Awiy akeza kumuman Nzamb!
9 “Ayuk kwau ‘akata kuyisankesh akwau mulong wa kulet chisambu. Nzamb ukez kuyel anch: ‘Anam!’
10 “Ayuk kwau antu azengodilau mulong awiy akat kusal mudi musotilay Nzamb. Inay awiy adia antu a mu Want wa Mwiur!
11 “Wayukany kwen pakat kukuswingishanyau, ni kukuzengolany, ni kukutwambilany makasu kudi antu mulong wa kwingambat am.
12 Sangarany kwen ni kuzangijal, mulong akulamidinany difut dijim mwiur. Wawiy kand mutapu wayizengolau aruu a Nzamb pakur.
0 Malejan ma mungu ni chimunyik
13 “En udiany mungu wa mangand. Pakwez mungu anch washadish kutal kwau, kwikil kand mutapu wa kuutadish. Wikal kal uyimp, chawiy akuudjibul, chad antu akuudjatol.
14 “En udiany chimunyik cha mangand. Musumb utungilau pa mukandu kakutwishap kuujindjik. 
15 Kwikil muntu ukata kulimik mwend wa kasu, chad waubwikin mwi nnungu. Pakwez akat kuutek pa ndond ya piur chakwel ukuyimunyikin antu awonsu adia mu chikumbu. 
16 Chawiy chimwing, chifanyidin uman wen ni yisalijok yen yimekan kurutu kwa antu chakwel amushiman Tatukwen udia mwiur.
0 Malejan ma Yijil
17 “Kangal watongany anch, am neza mulong wa kudiosh Yijil ya Moses ni malejan ma aruu a Nzamb. Kinezap mulong wa kuyidiosh, bwat, pakwez neza mulong wa kuwanyish malejan mau.
18 Vurikany anch, anch diur ni divu yishich, kwikil kachikunku ka Chijil ap kusu kakemp kakez kudioshay, djat ni piyikeza kuwanyin yom yawonsu yalondau.
19 Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukata kubwambwil kachijil kakemp kupandakan, chad wayilej antu akwau kusal mwamu, ukez kwikal muntu mukemp kupandakan mu Want wa Mwiur. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kuziyil ku Yijil, chad wayilej antu akwau kusal mwamu, ukez kwikal muntu mujim kupandakan mu Want wa Mwiur.
20 Nakulejany chakin, pa kwandam mu Want wa Mwiur ching anch wikasikeshany kusal mudi musotilay Nzamb kuyipandakanamu alej a Yijil ni Afaris.
0 Malejan mulong wa ujim
21 “En akulejanya kal, angakiriletu ayileja pakur anch: ‘Kangal wajipanany. Muntu mwawonsu ukujipana akumutwal ku dirumburish.’
22 Pakwez katat nakulejany anch, muntu mwawonsu ukumwovila mwanamakwend mu ritiy ujim akez kumutwal ku dirumburish. Muntu mwawonsu ukumuswingisha mwanamakend mu ritiy anch: ‘Ey udi muntu wamwamu!’ akez kumutwal ku dirumburish dijim. Chad muntu mwawonsu ukumupila mwanamakwend mu ritiy anch: ‘Ey udi chisup!’ chifanyidin kumudjibul mu Dijiy dia Kasu.
23 Anch usotil kupan yakupesh yey kudi Nzamb pa chintamb, kwinikwa anch wavurik anch: ‘Mwanamakwam mu ritiy ukwet mulong ni *
24 shang yakupesh yey pa chintamb. Yang swa, kulany nend mwanamakwey wa mu ritiy, chad uchirik lel ni kwpan yakupesh yey kudi Nzamb.
25 “Anch muntu wakufund, chad wakutwal ku dirumburish. swakal kwovijan nend mwi njil piwakad kal kushikany ku dirumburish. Mulong anch washikany kal kwinikwa, ndiy ukukupan kudi ankalansambu, chad ankalansambu akukupan kudi amasalay, chawiy amasalay akukudjibwil mu rukan.
26 Nakulej chakin kamu, ukushakam mwinimwa djat ni piukufutila chikal chend chawonsu.
0 Malejan makangeshina kwimik dis
27 “En akulejanya kal anch: ‘Kangal wimikany dis.’
28 Pakwez katat am nakulejany kal anch, muntu mwawonsu ukumutala mband wamwovil ris ra kulal nend, muntu mwinou wasal kal chitil cha kulal nend mu muchim wend.
29 Anch dis diey dia katatuku diakutwal ku chitil, dibwita, udidjibul! Kushadish chid chimwing cha mujimbu chidi chom chikemp, pakwez chidi chom chiyimp kupandakan anch Nzamb waudjibul mujimbu wey wakabuj mu Dijiy dia Kasu.
30 Anch chikas chey cha katatuku chakutwal ku chitil, chikatula, uchidjibul! Kushadish chid chimwing cha mujimbu chidi chom chikemp, pakwez chidi chom chiyimp kupandakan anch Nzamb wadjibul mujimbu wey wakabuj mu Dijiy dia Kasu.
0 Malejan makangeshina kujip uruu
31 “Alonda kand anch: ‘Muntu mwawonsu ukumulika mukajend chifanyidin kumufundil mukand wa kujip uruu.’
32 Pakwez katat am nakulejany kal anch, ikundj mwawonsu ukumulika mukajend wakad chitil cha kusochik, wamusadish kal chitil anch amwat kudi ikundj mukwau. Niyend ikundj ukumwata mband walikinau kal, ukusal chitil cha kusotan nend mband winiwa.
0 Malejan makangeshina kuchip
33 “En akulejanya kal kand, angakiriletu ayileja pakur anch: ‘Kangal wajip kushilamu kwey, pakwez wanyish yom yiwachipa kumusadil Chinawej.’
34 Pakwez katat am nakulejany kal anch, kangal wez wachipany anch washilanyamu. Kangal wachipilany ku diur, mulong didi ditand dia Nzamb.
35 Ap kangal wachipilany ku divu, mulong didi ndond yikat kwanzukay Nzamb mend. Kangal wachipilany ku Yerusalem, mulong udi musumb wa Mwant mujim.
36 Ap kangal wachipilany ap kusu ku mitu yen, mulong kiukutwishanyap kutekaku ruswich rumwing rutok ap rujal.
37 Londany kusu anch: ‘Mwawiy, nikusal,’ ap ‘Bwat, kinikusalap.” Yom yawonsu yiukuwejanyaku yidiokil kudi Sakudimban, ndiy kamu Muyimp.
0 Malejan makangeshina kufundakesh
38 “En akulejanya kal anch: ‘Dis ku dis, dizeu ku dizeu.’
39 Pakwez katat am nakulejany kal anch, kangal wamufundakeshinany muntu mwawonsu ukukusalanya nayimp. Anch muntu wakubul disu mu ditam dia katatuku, mutila kand ditam dia kamaku, akubulamu.
40 Anch muntu wakutwal ku dirumburish mulong wa kukwamuk chikut chey, mulika kwey akwamuk kand ni kabwik wey.
41 Anch muntu wakushinyin ku usu kumusendil difund diend kutwal chintampu chimwing, ey musendila, umutwadil ku yintampu yaad.
42 Anch muntu wakwit chom, mwinkisha. Anch muntu usotil kukusondam chom, musondjika.
0 Yikatany akankuny
43 “En akulejanya kal anch: ‘Mukata ukukatila ey, mukisa ukukisina ey.’
44 Pakwez katat nakulejany kal anch, yikatany akankuny nen, yilembidilany akata kukuzengolany en.
45 Mwamu ukez kwikalany an a Tatukwen udia mwiur. Mulong ndiy ukat kupan muten watangay kuyimunyikin antu ayimp ni antu awamp kwakad kasolikany. Ukat kunakish kand ruvul kunakin kudi antu in kusal nawamp ni in kusal nayimp.
46 Nzamb kakukuyukishanyap anch en wayikatany ching kusu antu akukatilanya. In kulambwish yitad niyau akat kusal mwamu!
47 Anch en ukat kuyilangwishany ching kusu arund nen, kiusadilanyap chom chijim, mulong antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu niyau akat kusal mwamu!
48 Ikalany awanyidina mudi Tatukwen udia mwiur chidiay uwanyidina!
0 Malejan ma kupan yom ya riy
1 “Babalany! Kangal wasalany midimu yiwamp ya ritiy ren patok chakwel antu akumanany. Anch wasalany mwamu, Tatukwen udia mwiur kakufutanyap.
2 “Chawiy anch wapan chom cha riy kudi kazwendj, kangal wimekesh, mudi mukat kusalau in rubabek mu yikumbu ya kulembil ni mu mikombil. Awiy akat kusal mwamu chakwel antu ayishiman. Nakulejany chakin, awiy atambul kal difut diau diawonsu, kakez kutambulap kand chom chikwau kudi Nzamb.
3 Pakwez ey anch wapan chom cha riy kudi kazwendj, sal chakwel mukwen udia nend piswimp kangal wijik.
4 Chad chom chinech chikala ujindj kudi ey amwiney. Chawiy Tatukwey ukata kuman yom yiusadila mu ujindj ukez kukuyukish.
0 Malejan mulong wa kulembil
5 “Piukulembilanya, kangal wikalany mudi in rubabek! Awiy akatil kwiman piur pa kulembil mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ni pa mansang ma mikombil chakwel antu awonsu ayiman. Nakulejany chakin, awiy atambul kal difut diau diawonsu, kakez kutambulap kand chom chikwau kudi Nzamb.
6 Pakwez ey anch walembil, andam mu kapalakany key, wapat ku chis, chad wamulembil Tatukwey wakad kumekanang ku mes. Chawiy Tatukwey ukata kuman yom yawonsu yiusadila mu ujindj ukez kukuyukish.
7 “Piukulembilanya, kangal walondany mazu mavud mudi mukat kusalau antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu. Awiy akat kutong anch: ‘Nzamb ukez kututesh anch twalond yom yivud.’
8 Kangal wikalany mudi awiy, mulong Tatukwen wij kal yom yiuswiridinany piwakadiany kal kumwipulany. 
9 Chawiy chifanyidin kulembilany mwamu: ‘Tatukwetu udia mwiur, dijin diey aditumbish.
10 Want wey weza. Rusot rey arusala pansh mudi mwiur.
11 Ttwinkisha ilel unou yakudia yetu ya pichuku pichuku.
12 Tulikishina milong yetu, mudi mutukata kuyilikishin akwetu akata kutusal nayimp.
13 Kangal watutwal ku yoziu, pakwez tukamunina ku kuyip [Mulong Want udi iwey, ni ukash, ni uyaj wakad kupwang. Amen.]’
14 “Anch wayilikishinany akwen akusalanya nayimp, Tatukwen udia mwiur ukukulikishinany kand niyen.
15 Pakwez anch en walikany kuyilikishin akwen, Tatukwen kakez kukulikishinanyap kuyip kuwasalanya.
0 Malejan ma kujil yakudia
16 “Piukujilanya yakudia mulong wa kumwifukwil Nzamb, kangal wamekeshany ushon mudi mukat kusalau in rubabek. Awiy akat kufunyangesh mu mes chakwel antu awonsu aman anch, ajilang kal yakudia. Nakulejany chakin, awiy atambul kal difut diau diawonsu. Kakez kutambulap kand chom chikwau kudi Nzamb.
17 Pakwez anch ey wajil yakudia, oyil mu mes, uzangul nswich,
18 chakwel akwen kakwijikap anch, ey wajilang kal yakudia. Ching kusu Tatukwey wakad kumekanang ku mes, ndiy ukwijika. Chad Tatukwey ukata kuman yom yiusadila mu ujindj ukez kukuyukish.
0 Laminany mapit mwiur
19 “Kangal wikumangejinany mapit ma pansh pa mangand, padia musu, ni ankal akat kushesh, ni aij akata kwandam ni kwiy.
20 Pakwez kumangejinany mapit men mwiur mwakad musu ni ankal akata kushesh, ap aij akata kwandam ni kwiy.
21 Mulong kudia mapit mey, kwawiy kand kukwikala muchim wey.
0 Chimunyik cha mujimbu
22 “Mes mey madi mudi mwend wa kasu ukata kumunyik mu mujimbu wey. Anch mes mey mawapil, mu mujimbu wey mwawonsu mukez kwikal chimunyik.
23 Pakwez anch mes mey kimawapilap, mu mujimbu mukez kujal mididim. Chawiy chimunyik chidia mu ey anch chajal, kukez kwikal mididim yikurukina nakash!
0 Malejan mulong wa Nzamb ni mapit
24 “Kwikil muntu ukutwisha kuyisadil ansalejend aad nawamp. Ukumukis umwing, chad wamukat mukwau, ap ukumulimish umwing, chad wamudiul mukwau. Kiukutwishanyap kusadil kapamp kamwing Nzamb ni mapit ma pa mangand.
25 “Mulong wa chom chinech, kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa yakudia ap yakuna ya mujimbu, ap mulong wa yidjal. Mwom ukwet usey nakash kupandakanamu yidjal.
26 Talany atujil a mwisuku. Awiy kakukunangap mbut, kakwangulangap, ap kakutekangap ya kwangul mwi nkil, pakwez Tatukwen udia mwiur ukat kuyilam. Ov, en kiukwetanyap usey kuyipandakanamu atujil?
27 Ov, nany wa pakach pen anch unenganen ukutwisha kuwejaku ku mwom wend ap kusu kachisu kakemp?
28 “Ing mulong wak ukata kwiyakamishany mulong wa yidjal? Talany yisalamb ya mu masuku mutapu uyidia. Yawiy kiyikusalangap mudimu, ap kwichimin yidjal,
29 pakwez nakulejany chakin, Mwant Salomon wakweting miril ya mapit, chad kadingap nich yidjal ya ufun mudi chisalamb chimwing cha mu masuku.
30 Nzamb amwinend ukat kuriyek ufun wa masuku. Masuku minam makat kumekan ilel, chad diamashik akez kumosh kasu. Chakin, en ukwetany ritiy rikemp! Ov, yidjal yikupanay Nzamb kudi en, kiyikupandakanap ufun wa masuku?
31 “Chawiy kangal wiyakamishany anch: ‘Ov, tukudia yom ik? Ov, tukuna yom ik? Ov, tukudjal yom ik?’
32 In mangand akat kukimb yom yiney yisu yawonsu. Pakwez en, Tatukwen udia mwiur wij kal anch, ukwetany kuswir kwa yom yiney yawonsu.
33 Pa ndond pa yom yiney, en kimbany bil Want wa Nzamb ni yom yisotilay, chad ndiy ukukuwejinanyaku yom yiney yawonsu.
34 Chawiy kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa diamashik, mulong diamashik niyau dikwet yakamish yau. Dichuku ni dichuku dikwet kal mar mau mawanyidina.
0 Kangal wayirumburishany akwen
1 “Kangal wayirumburishany akwen, chad Nzamb kakukurumburishanyap niyen.
2 Mulong Nzamb ukez kukurumburishany mutapu umwing mudi muukat kurumburishanya akwen. Ndiy ukez kukwilikinany yilik mudi yiwayilikinanya akwen.
3 Ov, mulong wak ukata kutal kachitaj kadia mu dis dia mukwen, pakwez kiubangilakup kutal mutond udia mu dis diey amwiney?
4 Ing, ukutwish nchik kumulej mukwen anch: ‘El nikudiosh, amboku, kachitaj kadia mu dis diey,’ anch ey amwiney uchikwet kal mutond mu dis diey?
5 Ey mwin rubabek ey! Sambil bil kudiosh mutond udia mu dis diey amwiney, chad ukutwish lel kuman nawamp chakwel udiosha Kachitaj kadia mu dis dia mukwen.
6 “Kangal wapanany yom yitumbila kudi atubu, chamwamu akez kukukarumukinany, akusumany. Kangal wadjibulany usang wen kudi ayibond, chamwamu akez kuudjatol.
0 Itany, surabany, kokalany
7 “Itany kudi Nzamb, ukez kukwinkishany. Surabany, ukez kutanany. Kokalany ku chis, akez kukwanzurilany.
8 Mulong muntu mwawonsu ukata kwit ukez kutambul, ni ukata kusurab ukez kutan, niyend ukata kukokal ku chis-akez kumwanzuril.
9 Ov, kudi umwing wenen, atatuku, anch mwanend wamwit dibot, ndiy ukumwinkish diyal?
10 Ap anch mwanend wamwit ish, ov, ndiy ukumwinkishay nnak?
11 Anch en udianyap nchik ayimp ukat kupanany yom yiwamp kudi anen, chawiy Tatukwen udia mwiur ukez kupandakeshamu kupan yom yiwamp kudi antu awonsu akata kwit.
12 “Sal yom kudi antu akwau mudi. muukatila ing niyau akusadilang ey. Mwamu mulejenau mu Yijil ya Moses ni mu mikand ya aruu a Nzamb.
0 Chis chiwongina
13 “Andaminany mu chis chiwongina, mulong njil yibwabumukina ni njil yiwamp yiyil ku Dijiy dia Kasu, ni antu akata kusutilamu adi avud. 
14 Pakwez chis chiyila ku mwom chiwongin, ni njil yiyila kwinikwa yidi yikash. Antu akemp kusu akata kuyitan.
0 Chishimu cha mutond ni mabuj mau
15 “Yibabelany aruu a makasu. Awiy akat kwez kudi en ameken mudi amikoku. Pakwez mukach adi kamu atwingol isumina.
16 Ukez kuyijikinany ku yisalijok yau. Mutond wa rinzongal kiukutwishap kusong mabuj ma nviny, ap mutond wa muzez kiukutwishap kusong mabuj ma nfung.
17 Mutond uwamp ukat kusong mabuj mawamp, pakwez mutond uyimp ukat kusong mabuj mayimp.
18 Mutond uwamp kiukutwishap kusong mabuj mayimp, ap mutond uyimp kiukutwishap kusong mabuj mawamp.
19 Mutond wawonsu wakad kusong mabuj mawamp, akuukatul ni kuudjibul mu kasu.
20 Chawiy ukez kuyijikinany aruu a makasu ku yisalijok yau.
0 Kinikwijanyap
21 “Kadiap antu awonsu akata kwintazuk anch: ‘Nsalejetu, Nsalejetu’ akeza kwandam mu Want wa Mwiur, pakwez ching antu akata kusal mudi musotilay Tatukwam udia mwiur.
22 Pidikeza kushik Dichuku dikurumburishay Nzamb antu awonsu, antu avud akez kwingel anch: ‘Nsalejetu, Nsalejetu! Twalejana dizu dia Nzamb mu dijin diey, twadiosha ayilembil avud mu dijin diey, twasala kand yilay yivud mu dijin diey!’
23 Chad nikez kuyakul anch; ‘Kwij kwen, kinakwijikanyap. Ndiokalany, udiany antu ayimp!’
0 Chishimu cha in kutung aad
24 “Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukata kutesh mazu mam minam ni kumaziyil, udi mudi muntu ukweta manangu pa diyal watunga chikumbu chend pa diyal.
25 Ruvul wanaka nakash, mawit mizula, chad rinkind watuta nich usu, wibul ku chikumbu. Pakwez kichawap mulong ading achitungil pa diyal.
26 “Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kutesh mazu mam minam, chad walik kumaziyil, udi mudi muntu chisup watunga chikumbu chend pa usukuril.
27 Ruvul wanaka nakash, mawit mizula, rinkind watuta nich usu, wibul ku chikumbu, chad chawa. Kusheshik kwa chikumbu chinicha kwading kujim!”
0 Ulabu wa Yesu
28 Chapwishay Yesu kulond yom yiney, chisak chijim cha antu ashimwoka nakash mulong wa malejan mend.
29 Mulong ndiy kalejanap mudi alej a Yijil, pakwez walejana mudi muntu ukweta ulabu.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej wa mak
1 Chashirikay Yesu pa mukandu, yisak yijim ya antu amulondula.
2 Chawiy kwading muntu ukweta musong wa mak weza kudi ndiy, wamwasin manungun pansh, wamulembijek anch: “Nsalejam, anch ey ukatil, ukutwish kwingok chakwel niwapa.”
3 Yesu wonana chikas, wamukwataku, wamwel anch: “Nikatil kusal mwamu. Katat ey yerik, uwapa!” Pawiy pinipa kamu muntu wayerika.
4 Chad Yesu wamuleja anch: “Tesh nawamp. Kangal wamulejamu muntu. Yang swa kudi mwin kupesh chakwel akutala. Chad upana yakupesh mudi mwalonday Moses, chakwel chijikan kudi antu awonsu anch, ey wayerik kal.”
0 Yesu ukat kumwok kashalapol wa mukurump wa amasalay
5 Chandamay Yesu mu Kapernaum, mukurump umwing wa amasalay a in Rom wamusankana, wamulembijek mulong wa kumukwash. 
6 Chad wamwel anch: “Nsalejam, kashalapol wam uyedil, ulel mu ulal, katwishinap kulank, umen mar nakash.”
7 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Nikwez kumwok.”
8 Mukurump wa amasalay wamwakula anch: “A! Bwat, Nsalejam. Am kiniwanyidinap chakwel ey wandam mu chikumbu cham. Pakwez lond kusu dizu din, chad kashalapol wam ukuyerik kwend.
9 Am nikwet amakurump ajim antakedila, chad niyam nikwet amasalay inatakedila. Anch namwel isalay umwing anch: ‘Yang!’ ndiy ukuya. Ap anch namwel mukwau anch: ‘Ez!’ ndiy ukwez. Anch namulej muswik wam anch ‘Sal chom ech!’ ndiy ukat kuchisal.”
10 Chateshay Yesu mazu minam, washimwoka. Wakarumuka, watal ku chisak cha antu ading amulondwila, wayilej anch: “Nakulejany chakin, am kand kal nimanap ritiy mudi riner, ap mukach mwa in Isarel in!
11 Nakulejany chakin, antu avud a mangand makwau akez kudiokal kwingangel ni kurand. Akez kushakam nend Aburaham, ni Isak, ni Jakob ku musambu wa Want wa Mwiur.
12 Pakwez ading afanyidina ing andamang mu Want wa Mwiur, akez kuyidjibwil pol mu mididim. Kwinikwa akez kudil ni kwidia ku mazeu.”
13 Chad Yesu wamuleja mukurump wa amasalay anch: “Yang kwey nawamp ku chikumbu, yom yawonsu yiwitila akukusadilay.” Pa chisu chinicha kamu, kashalapol wa mukurump wa amasalay wayerika.
0 Yesu ukat kwok ayej avud
14 Yesu waya ku chikumbu cha Pita, kwinikwa wamutana makwend wa mband wa Pita ulel pa ulal, uyedil mashik.
15 Yesu wamukwata ku chikas, chad mayej ma mashik mamudiokala. Ndiy walanka, wasambish kumurijekin yakudia.
16 Chiwazweka urel, amuletila Yesu antu avud ading akweta ayilembil. Yesu wayidiosha ayilembil nich dizu diend, chad wayoka kand ayej awonsu. !
17 Ndiy wasala yom yiney mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: “Ndiy amwinend wadiosha kuziy kwetu, woka kand mayej metu.”
0 Antu ela kumulondul Yesu
18 Chamanay Yesu chisak chijim cha antu chimunyingumukin, wayileja in kwilejend kuya ushad wa dijiy.
19 Mulej umwing wa Yijil weza kudi Yesu, wamwel anch: “Mulej, am nikukulondul ey kwawonsu kuuyila.”
20 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Amiyeu akwet jindond jau ja kulal, niyau atujil akwet yinswal yau, pakwez Mwan a Muntu kakwetap pa kulal ap pa kwiswedishin.”
21 Mwin kwilej wend umwing wamwela anch: “Mwant, pakusambish, nlika bil nichirik, nikamujik tatukwam.”
22 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Chifanyidin antu akad kal kutambul mwom wa chikupu aya akayijik afu au. Pakwez ey, ez tuya.”
0 Yesu ukat kunenetish mambek
23 Yesu wandama mu waat pamwing nau in kwilejend.
24 Kukashimuk, ruvul wa rinkind mukash watuta pa dijiy, chad waat wela kujiy. Pakwez Yesu wading ulel tul.
25 In kwilej eza, amulangwish, amwel anch: “Nsalejetu, tupandisha! Tudi piswimp ni kufa!”
26 Chad Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, mulong wak wovilany wom mwamu? En ukwetany karitiy kakemp!” Chawiy ndiy walanka, wamukand rinkind ni mambek. Chad yawonsu yaneneta, yikuchik kamu zong.
27 Antu awonsu ashimwoka, alond anch: “Ov, muntu mwinou udi nany? Ndiy wamukand kal rinkind ni mambek, chad yawonsu yamuziyil!”
0 Yesu ukat kudiosh antu aad ayilembil
28 Chashikay Yesu mwi ngand ya Gadar ushad wa dijiy dia Galalia, wayisankana antu aad abudikin mu jinzay mwading mushichau. Amakundj inay ading akwet ayilembil, aswejina nakash. Chawiy kwikil muntu wasutilang mwi njil yiniya.
29 Chamumanau Yesu, abarika nich dizu dia wom anch: “Ov, ey, Mwan a Nzamb, mulong ik ukweta ni yetwetu? Ov, ey usotil kutulej kadimu chisu kand kal chiwanyin?”
30 Piswimp ni pinipa, kwading chisak chijim cha ayibond akat kudia.
31 Chawiy ayilembil amulembijeka Yesu anch: “Anch ey usotil kutudiosh, tutuma mu chisak cha ayibond.”
32 Yesu wayileja anch: “Yangany.” Chawiy awiy ayidiokala antu, andam mu ayibond. Chisak chawonsu cha ayibond chadiokala pa chinanginang, chakurumukin mau mu dijiy, chad chajiy chawonsu.
33 Antu ading alamina ayibond achina mau, aya mu ul. Kwinikwa alejana rusangu rawonsu rasuta kudi antu ading akweta ayilembil.
34 Chad in ul awonsu eza ni kumutal Yesu. Chad chamumanau, amulembijek chakwel adiokal mwi ngand yau.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej wa kalip
1 'Yesu wandama mu waat, wauka dijiy, wachirik ku ul wa Kapernaum kwading kushichay. 
2 Antu amwing amuletilay muyej wa kalip. Chad Yesu, chamanay ritiy rau, wamwela muyej wa kalip anch: “Mwanam, ikasikesha! Yitil yey ayilikishin kal!”
3 Alej amwing a Yijil-atonga mu michim anch: “Muntu mwinou ukat kumusaal Nzamb masaal!”
4 Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wayipula anch: “Ov, mulong wak utonginanya yom yiyimp mwamu?
5 Oy, chipipela chisu, kumwel muntu anch: ‘Yitil yey ayilikishin kal,’ ap kumwel anch: ‘Tumbuk, uya kwey’? 
6 Nisotil nikwijikishany anch, Mwan a Muntu ukwet ulabu pansh panap wa kulikishin yitil.” Chad ndiy wamuleja muyej wa kalip anch: “Tumbuk, zambul ulal wey, yang kwol kwey!”
7 Chawiy muntu winiwa watumbuka, waya kwol kwend.
8 Chamanau antu chom chinech, ova wom nakash, amushimana Nzamb mulong ndiy wapana ulabu wa mutapu winou kudi antu.
0 Yesu ukat kumutazuk Mateu
9 Yesu wadiokala kwinikwa. Pendanganangay, wamumana mwin kulambwish yitad, dijin diend Mateu, ushich mwi ndond ya kulambwishin yitad. Chad Yesu wamwela anch: “Ez, tuya, wikala mwin kwilej wam.” Chad Mateu watumbuka, waya nend.
10 Pashakamay Yesu ni kudia mu chikumbu cha Mateu, in kulambwish yitad nau akayitil eza kushakam nend Yesu ku mes, pamwing ni in kwilejend.
11 Afaris amwing, chamanau yom yiney, ayipula in kwilejend anch: “Ov, mulong wak mulej wen chidilay nau antu a mutapu winou?”
12 Yesu wayitesha, chad wayakul anch: “Antu akash kakuswirangap mwingang, ching kusu antu ayedila.
13 Yangany, ukilejany kurumburik kwa mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb ulondila anch: ‘Am, Nzamb, nikatil antu akweta riy kupandakanamu yakupesh yau ya annam.’ Am kinezap kuyitazuk antu atentamina, pakwez neza mulong wa kuyitazuk akayitil.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kujil yakudia
14 Chad in kwilej a Yohan Mubatish eza kudi Yesu, amwipul anch: “Ov, mulong wak etu nau Afaris tukat kujil yakudia tupamp tuvud, pakwez in kwilejey kakujilangap yakudia?”
15 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, utongilany antu atazukinau ku musambu wa uruu akutwish kwov ushon pachidiau nend ngatan pamwing? Bwat, chikasiken! Pakwez dichuku dikez kushik dikez kumudioshau ngatan pakach pau, chad awiy akez kujil yakudia.
16 “Kwikil muntu ukata kuchimin chibel chisu pa chidjal chikur. Anch wasal mwamu, chibel chisu chikwipwit, chapwish chidjal chikur, chad dipan dikupandakan kujimb.
17 Chawiy chimwing kand, kwikil muntu ukuteka maar ma nviny masu mu jinsab jikur ja yikit. Anch wasal mwamu, maar ma nviny masu makubuz jinsab jinej, chawiy maar masu makwichikin pansh, ni yikit yikusheshik. Pakwez maar ma nviny masu mafanyidin kumalong mu jinsab jisu ja yikit.”
0 Mwan wa Yayirus ni mband wamupukuna Yesu ku maswin
18 Padingay Yesu ni kulond mazu minam, mukurump umwing wa in Yuda weza kudi ndiy, wamwasin manungun pansh. Wamuleja anch: “Mwanam mband wafa kal kamu katat, pakwez anch ey wez wamwanzuk makas mey, ndiy ukulank.”
19 Chawiy Yesu watumbuka, wamulondul pamwing nau in kwilejend.
20 Kwading mband wading ukwet musong wa rulong ra mash mivu dikum ni yaad. Ndiy waseja kwinyim kwa Yesu, chad wamupukun ku ruzez ra kabwik wend.
21 Ndiy watonga anch: “Anch namupukun kusu ku maswin mend, nikuyerik kwam.”
22 Yesu wakarumuka, wamuman mband winiwa, chad wamwel anch: “Mwanam mband, ikasikesha! Ey wayerik kal mulong wangitiyij kal am.” Pawiy kamu pinipa mband wayerika.
23 Chad Yesu waya mu chikumbu cha mukurump wa in Yuda. Chamanay in kubul mishiy ya miminy ya rufu, ni antu awonsu akat kwazaz,
24 walonda anch: “Antu awonsu, palanganany! Mwan kafilap, ulel kwend tul!” Chad antu awonsu amusipa.
25 Chapwishau kubudish antu pol, Yesu wandama mu kapalakany mwadingay mwan, wamukwata ku chikas, chad mwan walank.
26 Rusangu riner rapalangana mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu.
0 Yesu ukat kwok amputames aad
27 Yesu wadiokala kwinikwa. Pendanganangay, amakundj aad ading amputames amulondula, asambish kutazwok anch: “Ey, mwan a David, itwovilap, amboku, riy!”
28 Chandamay Yesu mu chikumbu, amputames inay eza kudi ndiy. Chad ndiy wayipula anch: “Ov, en witiyinany anch, am nikutwish kukwokany?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Mwawiy, Nsalejetu!”
29 Chawiy Yesu wayikwata pa mes, walond anch: “Chifanyidin mes men maburik mudi muwitiyanganya!”
30 Chad asambisha kuman. Yesu wayikand anch: “Kangal wamulejanyamu muntu chom chinech!”
31 Pakwez awiy aya, apalangesh rusangu ra Yesu mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok kamam
32 Chayau kal antu inay, antu akwau amuletilay Yesu ikundj umwing wading kamam, mulong wading ukwet chilembil.
33 Yesu chamudioshay chilembil, muntu winiwa wasambisha kulond. Chad antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash, alond anch: “Kand kal tumanangap chom mudi chinech mu Isarel!”
34 Pakwez Afaris alonda anch: “Sakudimban, ndiy kamu mukurump wa ayilembil, ndiy ukata kumwinkish Yesu ukash wa kudiosh ayilembil.”
0 Yesu ukat kuyovil antu riy
35 Yesu wendangana mu misumb ni mal mavud. Walejananga mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb. Wayoka ayej a misong ya mitapu yawonsu.
36 Chamanay yisak ya antu, ndiy wayovila riy, mulong awiy nong awly ading aziyil ni kujilijil mudi amikoku akad kafung. 
37 Chad wayileja in kwilejend anch: "Yakwangul yidi yivud, pakwez in mudimu wa kwangul adi akemp.
38 Mulembilany mwin chir chakwel ukutum in mudimu wa kwangul avud.”
0 Atwimbuy a Yesu dikum ni aad
1 Yesu wayitazuka in kwilejend dikum ni aad. Wayinkisha ukash wa kudiosh ayilembil ni kwok ayej a misong ya mitapu yawonsu.
2 Majin ma atwimbuy end dikum ni aad atonday mawiy minam. Wa kusambish Simon, wapilay anch Pita, ni mwanamakwend Andare, ni Jakobu, pamwing ni mwanamakwend Yohan, awiy kamu an amakundj a Zebede,
3 ni Filip, ni Bartelemi, ni Tomas, ni Mateu, mwin kulambwish yitad, ni Jakobu, mwan ikundj wa Alfe, ni Tadeu,
4 ni Simon, mwin kukankamen yom ya ngand, ni Yudas Isakariot, ndiy wamupana Yesu kudi akankuny.
0 Yesu ukat kuyitum adikum ni aad
5 Yesu wayituma antu inay dikum ni aad, wayikand anch: “Kangal wandamany mwi ngand ya in michid yikwau, ap mu mal ma in Samaria.
6 Pakwez yangany kudi in Isarel, awiy adi mudi amikoku ashadikina.
7 Yangany, ukarumburilany dizu dia Nzamb anch: ‘Want wa Mwiur udi piswimp!’
8 Okany ayej, vumbulany afu, okany antu ayedila musong wa mak, dioshany ayilembil. En watambulanya ukash winou kudi am wakad difut, niyen panany kand wakad kufutishan.
9 Kangal wasendany nfalang ja utad wa or, ap ja utad wa argent, ap ja utad usuzurikina mu mabeng men.
10 Kangal wasendany nsapu ya weny, ap yikut yaad, ap yisapat yaad, ap mukombu. Chifanyidin mwin mudimu amwinkish yakudia yend.
11 “Piukushikany mu musumb ap mu ul, sotany muntu wa kashinsh uwanyidina kukwakany. Shakamany nend djat ni piukudiokilanya kwi ndond yiniya.
12 Piukwandamany mu chikumbu, yilangwishany anch: ‘Chisambu cha Nzamb chikala ni yenen.’
13 Anch in chikumbu chinech akwakany, chad kulangwish kwen kwa chisambu kukwikal kudi awiy. Pakwez anch kakwakinanyap nawamp, chad kulangwish kwen kwa chisambu kukuchirikinany ayinen.
14 Anch kakwakinanyap nawamp mu chikumbu ap mu musumb, ap anch kakuteshilanyap, diokalany mwi ndond yiniya, ukukukumunany rufunfut ra mu yidjatil yen.
15 Nakulejany chakin, Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, ndiy ukez kuyovil in musumb wa Sodom ni wa in Gomor riy kupandakanamu antu a musumb winiwa!
0 Kuzengol kukeza kwez
16 “Teshany! Am nakutumany kal en mudi amikoku mukach mwa atwingol. Chifanyidin en kubabal mudi annak, chad ikalany wakad mulong mudi atwinkudimb.
17 Babalany, mulong antu akez kukukwatany chakwel akurumburishany, akez kukubudilany mu yikumbu ya kulembil.
18 Akez kukutwalany kurutu kwa anyikel ni ant mulong wa kwingambat am. En ukez kulejanany Rusangu Ruwamp kudi awiy ni kudi antu a michid yikwau.
19 Pakukutwalanyau ku dirumburish, kangal wiyakamishany kwen mulong wa mazu miukulondanya ap mutapu wa kumalond. Pa chisu chinicha kamu akez kukwinkishany mazu ma kulond.
20 Mazu miukeza kulondany kimakudiokalap kudi en, makez kudiokal kudi Mwiku wa Tatukwen ukeza kulondil mu en.
21 “An a divumu dimwing, umwing ukez kumupan mukwau mulong wa kumujip. Atatuku akez kusal kand mwamu kudi anau. An niyau akez kuyikarumukin anvajau chakwel ayijipesh.
22 Antu awonsu akez kukukisany mulong wa kwingambat am. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kujijaman djat ni ku rufu rend, Nzamb ukez kumupandish.
23 Anch akuzengolany mu ul umwing, chinyinany mu ul ukwau. Nakulejany chakin, kiukez kupwishanyap midimu yen mu misumb yawonsu ya in Isarel wakad Mwan a Muntu kwez.
24 “Kwikil nsand udia mujim kumupandakanamu mulej wend. Kwikil muswik udia mujim kumupandakanamu nsalejend.
25 Chifanyidin nsand kusangar anch wijik yom mudi mulej wend, niyend muswik ufanyidin kusangar anch wikal muntu mujim mudi nsalejend. Anch mwin kutakel wa dijuku amupil anch Belzebul, ndiy kamu mwant wa ayilembil, chad antu a dijuku diawonsu akez kuyipil majin mayimp kupandakan!
0 Nany ufanyidinau kwov wom
26 “Chawiy kangal wayovany antu wom. Yom yawonsu yijingamina katat yikez kumeken patok, ni ujindj wawonsu ukez kwijikan patok.
27 Yom yawonsu nikulejidinanya mu mididim, en yilondany patok mukach mwa muten. Yom yawonsu yiuteshidilanya mu ujindj, yilejenany pa misong ya yikumbu kudi antu awonsu.
28 Kangal wovany wom wa antu akata kujip mujimbu wakad kutwish kujip mupim. Pakwez mwovany Nzamb wom ukutwisha kujip mujimbu ni kudjibul mupim mu Dijiy dia Kasu.
29 Akat kulandish amiswesu aad ku rufalang rumwing, pakwez kwikil muswesu ukutwisha kuwa pansh wakad Tatukwen kwitiy.
30 Chawiy niyen, Nzamb wachindil kal nswich jawonsu jidia ku mitu yen.
31 Chad en, Amiswesu kangal wovany wom, mulong ukwetany usey uvud kupandakanamu amiswesu avud!
0 Kumwitiyij ap kumulik Yesu Kristu
32 “Muntu mwawonsu ukata kwingitiyij patok pakach pa antu, am’ niyam nikez kumwitiyin patok kurutu kwa Tatukwam udia mwiur.
33 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kwinlik pakach pa antu, am niyam nikez kumulik kurutu kwa Tatukwam udia mwiur.
0 Kwikil chisambu, kudi mpak ya musamun
34 “Kangal watongany anch, am neza ni kulet chisambu mu mangand. Bwat, am kinezap ni kulet chisambu, pakwez mpak ya musamun.
35 Am neza ni kuyisarumun an amakundj chakwel ayipompat atatukwau, ni an amband ayipompat amakwau, ni amband a an amakundj ayipompat amakwau a anfumwau.
36 Akankuny ayimp a muntu akez kwikal ching antu a mu dijuku diend.
37 “Muntu mwawonsu ukumukata tatukwend ap makwend nakash kwimpandakanamu am, kawanyidinap kwikal mwin kwilej wam. Muntu mwawonsu ukumukata mwanend ikundj ap mwanend mband nakash kwimpandakanamu am, kawanyidinap kwikal mwin kwilej wam.
38 Muntu mwawonsu wakad kusend mutond wend uchikakena ni kwinlondul am, kawanyidinap kwikal mwin kwilej wam.
39 Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwipandish amwinend, ukez kufa. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukufa mulong wa kwingambat am, ukez kwipandish.
0 Difut
40 “Muntu mwawonsu ukukwakany en, wangak kal am. Muntu mwawonsu ukwingaka am, wamwak kal Nzamb wantuma am.
41 Muntu mwawonsu ukumwaka muruu wa Nzamb anch mulong udi muruu wa Nzamb, ukez kutambul kand difut mudi muruu wa Nzamb. Muntu mwawonsu ukumwaka muntu muwamp anch mulong udi muwamp, ukez kutambul kand difut mudi muntu muwamp.
42 Nakulejany chakin, muntu mwawonsu ukeza kupan rupas ra mem matalela kudi mwin kwilej wam upandakena kukep, anch mulong udi mwin kwilej wamam, chakin kamu, ukez kutambul difut.”
0 Aruu adiokila kwa Yohan Mubatish
1 Chapwishay Yesu kulejan mazu minam kudi in kwilejend dikum ni aad, ndiy wadiokala kwinikwa, waya ni kulejan ni kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb mu mal makwau madinga piswimp.
2 Padingay Yohan Mubatish mu rukan, watesha yom yasalay Kristu, chad ndiy wamutumina in kwilejend amwing.
3 Awiy amwipula Yesu anch: “Tuleja, ov, ey yey watulejay Yohan anch: ‘Ukat kwez,’ ap tufanyidin kuchingel kand mukwau?”
4 Yesu wayakula anch: “Yangany ukamulejany Yohan yom yiuteshilanya ni yiumenanya.
5 Amputames akat kuman, ayilim akat kwend, in musong wa mak akat kuyerik, atujikamatu akat kutesh, afu akat kuvumbuk, ni Rusangu Ruwamp akat kurulejan kudi atuzwendj.
6 Wayuk kwend muntu wakad kwidjidjek mulong wamam!”
7 Padiokalau aruu atumay Yohan, Yesu wasambisha kuyilej antu mulong wa Yohan anch: “Piwayanya mwi mpay kudi Yohan, ov, wachingejanya kuman yom ik? Ov, wachingejany kuman disuku dianyikeshangau kudi rinkind?
8 Chad wayanya kutal chom ik? Ov, wayanya ni kutal muntu udjita yidjal yiwamp ya ufun? Antu adjita yidjal ya mutapu winou ashich mu yipang ya ant.
9 Nlejany bil, ov, yom ik yiwayanya ni kutal? Ov, wayanya ni kumutal muruu wa Nzamb? Mwawiy, chakin kamu, pakwez wamumananya umupandakenamu muruu wa Nzamb. 
10 Yohan, ndiy kamu ulejenau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Yam, Nzamb, nikeza kutum muruu wam kurutu kwey mulong wa kukurijekin ey njil.’
11 Nakulejany chakin, Yohan Mubatish udi mujim kupandakan antu awonsu a pa mangand. Pakwez muntu upandakena kukep mu Want wa Nzamb, ndiy umupandakenamu Yohan kujimb.
12 Kudiokal pa chirung charumburilangay Yohan mazu ma Nzamb kushik ni ilel unou, Want wa Mwiur akat kuuzengol, ni in chisum akat kupakish kuukwat ku usu.
13 Aruu awonsu a Nzamb ni Yijil ya Moses ading ni kulejan mulong wa Want wa Nzamb, djat ni ku chirung cha Yohan.
14 Anch usotilany kutesh nawamp rusangu riner, Yohan winou ndiy Elija, walondau anch, ukez kwez.
15 Anch ukwetany matu ma kutesh, teshany kamu nawamp!
16 “Ov, katat antu a chirung chinech nikutwish kuyilikej mudi anany? Awiy adi mudi anikanch ashicha mu chiku. Chisak chimwing chikat kubarokin chisak chikwau anch:
17 ‘Etu twakuwangilangany miminy ya kwatijan uruu, pakwez en walikangany kupangan! Etu twawangang miminy ya rufu, pakwez en walikangany kudil.’
18 Pezay Yohan, wajila yakudia, walik kuna maar ma nviny, chad antu awonsu amwelanga anch: ‘Ndiy ukwet chilembil!’
19 Pezay Mwan a Muntu, ndiy wading ni kudia ni kuna, chad antu awonsu alonda anch: ‘Talany muntu mwinou! Ndiy upumbil kudia ni kuna, udi murund wa in kulambwish yitad ni in yitil!’ Pakwez manangu ma Nzamb makat kumekan anch madi makin ku yisalijok yau.”
0 Mal makad kumwitiyij Yesu
20 Chawiy Yesu wasambisha kuyikand antu ading ashicha mu mal mwasadilay yilay yivud, mulong awiy kakarumukap kudiokal ku yitil yau. Wayileja anch:
21 “Riyind kudi en in Korazin! Riyind kand kudi en in Betsaida! Yilay yakusadilanyau en, anch ayisadila in Tir ni in Sidon, antu ina ing ela kudjal yizanizan, ipan maut, mulong wa kumekesh anch, akarumuk kal kudiokal ku yitil yau!
22 Pa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, ndiy ukez kuyovil in Tir ni in Sidon riy kupandakanamu en!
23 Niyen in Kapernaum! Ov, utongilany anch, akez kukuzambulany djat ni mwiur? Bwat, akez kukudjibulany pansh djat ni mu Dijiy dia Kasu! Yilay yakusadilanyau en, anch ayisadila in Sodom, ing adi kwaku ni ilel unou!
24 Nakulejany chakin, pa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, ndiy ukez kuyovil in Sodom riy kupandakanamu en!”
0 Ezany kudi am, wiswedishany
25 Pa chisu chinicha, Yesu walonda anch: “Tatuku, Mwant wa diur ni divu! Nakujikitish mulong ey wamekesha kudi antu akad kwilej yom yiwajindjika kudi in manangu ni antu ilejina.
26 Mwawiy, Tatuku, mulong mwamu muwatonda ey kusal.
27 “Tatukwam wanginkisha yom yawonsu. Kwikil muntu umwija Mwan, ching kusu Tatuku ndiy umwija. Kwikil muntu umwija Tatuku, ching kusu Mwan ndiy umwija, ni antu akwau atonday Mwan kumwijikesh Tatuku.
28 “Ezany kudi am, en awonsu uziyilanya mulong wa yisend yikasikena ya mitapu ni mitapu, chad am nikez kukwambulany.
29 Itwikany mpand yam, wingiyiyany am, chad mwamu mipim yen yikwiswedish, mulong am nishimpishin muchim ni kwitudish.
30 Mulong mpand yam yiswakel kwitwik, ni chisend cham chipipel.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish
1 Chipasuta machuku makemp, Yesu wasutila mu yir ya tidiku pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. In kwilejend ova nzal, chad asambisha kukatwol mitu ya tidiku, adia mabuj.
2 Afaris, chamanau mwamu, amwela Yesu anch: “Tal kwa, in kwilejey akat kujip Chijil chetu pasadilau mwamu pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish!”
3 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, en kand kal utanganyap yom yasalay David ni antu adingay nau pa chisu chovau nzal?
4 Ndiy wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad wadia pamwing ni antu adingay nau mabot matekangau kurutu kwa Chinawej. Pakwez chading chijil kudi awiy kudia mabot minima, ching kusu in kupesh awiy ading akweta usu wa kumadia.
5 Ap, ov, kand kal utanganyap mu Yijil ya Moses anch, Machuku mawonsu ma Kwiswedish in kupesh ajipanga chijil cha Dichuku dia Kwiswedish mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, pakwez kafap nich? 
6 Chawiy nakulejany anch, pinap padi chom chijim kupandakanamu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
7 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Am Nzamb nikatil antu akweta riy, kupandakanamu yakupesh ya annam.’ Anch en wading wijany chakin kurumburik kwa mazu minam, ing kiukufishanyap nich antu akad mulong. 
8 Mulong Mwan a Muntu udi Mwant wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.”
0 Muntu ukweta chikas cha kalip
9 Yesu wadiokala kwinikwa, wandam mu chikumbu cha kulembil.
10 Mwinimwa mwading muntu ukweta chikas cha kalip. Antu amwing adinga mwinimwa, asota mulong wa kumufish nich Yesu. Chad amwipula anch: “Ov, Yijil yetu yikangeshin kwokan pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish?”
11 Yesu wayakula anch: “Anch muntu umwing wa pakach penen ukwet mukoku wawil mu dibuku dilemp pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, ov, ndiy kakutwishap kumudioshamu?
12 Muntu ukwet usey ujim nakash kupandakanamu mukoku! Chawiy Chijil chetu chipanyin usu wa kumukwash muntu pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.”
13 Chad Yesu wamuleja muntu wading ukwet chikas cha kalip anch: “Onan chikas chey.” Ndiy wonana chikas, chayerik, chikal kamu mudi chikas chikwau.
14 Chad Afaris aya, apungan mutapu wa kumujip Yesu.
0 Kashalapol watonday Nzamb
15 Chijikay Yesu kupungan kwaun, ndiy wadiokala kwi ndond yiniya. Chad yisak yijim ya antu yamulondula. Ndiy wayoka ayej awonsu,
16 pakwez ndiy wayikanda anch: “Kangal wamulejanyamu muntu yom yiney.”
17 Ndiy wasala mwamu chakwel mawanyina mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch:
18 “Winou ndiy kashalapol wam unatonda, ndiy unikatila am, nikat kusangar mulong wendendiy. Nikez kumushirishin Mwiku wam. Ndiy ukez kulejan dirumburish diam ku michid yawonsu.
19 Ndiy kakez kutadikijanap ni muntu, ap kakez kubarokap, ap kwombil rubil mu mikombil.
20 Ndiy kakez kuyizengolap antu aziyila ku mujimbu, kakez kuyisuminap antu akad usu. Ndiy ukez kusal mwamu djat ni pakez kuziyilau antu ku yijil ya Nzamb. ;
21 Antu a michid yawonsu, awonsu akez kumuchingej ching kusu ndiy.”
0 Akat kumwel Yesu anch ukwet Belzebul
22 Chawiy antu amwing amuletilay Yesu mputames wading kamam, mulong wading ukwet chilembil. Yesu wamwoka muntu mwinou, chad wasambisha kulond ni kuman.
23 Chad antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash mulong wa yom yasalay Yesu, alond anch: “Ov, winou ukutwish kwikal Mwan a David?”
24 Chateshau Afaris chom chinech, awiy alonda anch: “Ndiy udioshin ayilembil mulong mwant wau Belzebul umwinkishin ukash wa kusal mwamu.”
25 Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wayel anch: “Anch want wauril yisak yivud, chad antu asambish kurish ayinau, want winou kiukez kushakamap machuku mavud. Anch antu a ul umwing ap a dijuku dimwing arish ayinau, antu inay akez kujiy.
26 Chawiy anch chisak chimwing charish ni chisak chikwau mu want wa Sakudimban, charumburik anch, want wend waurik kal mu yisak yivud, chad ukez kujiy swa!
27 Komb anch am nikat kudiosh ayilembil ku ukash wa Belzebul, ing in kukulondulany en akat kuyidiosh ku ukash wa nany? Yisalijok ya in kukulondulany en, yawiy yikukufishanya nich!
28 Kadiap Belzebul, bwat, pakwez Mwiku wa Nzamb ndiy winginkishina ukash wa kudiosh ayilembil. Chinech chikwijikishany anch, Want wa Nzamb washik kal kudi en.
29 “Kwikil muntu ukutwisha kubuz chikumbu cha muntu chifuvu, mulong wa kusend yom yend wakad kal kusambel kumukas chifuyu winou. Pakwez anch wamukas, ukutwish kubuu yom ya mu chikumbu chend.
30 “Muntu mwawonsu wakad kubombakan ni yamam, wimpompatin am. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kwinkwash kuyikumangej antu, ukat kuyipalangesh.
31 Mulong wa chom chinech, nakulejany anch: ‘Yitil yawonsu ya antu ni masaal makat kusaalanau, akez kuyilikishin, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumusaal Mwiku Utumbila masaal, kakez kumulikishinap.
32 Muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumulond Mwan a Muntu nayimp, akez kumulikishin. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumusaal Mwiku Utumbila masaal, kakez kumulikishinap, kudiok katat ni chikupu.’
0 Chishimu cha mutond ni mabuj mau
33 “Anch mutond udi uwamp, mabuj mau makwikal kand mawamp. Anch mutond udi uyimp, mabuj mau makwikal kand * mayimp. Mutond akat kuwijikin ku mabuj mau.
34 En annak! Ov, ukutwishany nchik kulond yom yiwamp anch en ayinen udiany ayimp? Mulong kan ka muntu kakat kubudish yom yizwila mu muchim wend.
35 Muntu muwamp ukat kubudish yom yiwamp mu chipau cha yom yiwamp ya mu muchim wend. Muntu muyimp ukat kubudish yom yiyimp mu chipau chend cha yom yiyimp.
36 “Nakulejany anch, pa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, muntu mwawonsu ukez kurumburil mulong wa mazu mend mawonsu mamwamu malonday.
37 Mazu mey makez kukuyingish, ap kukufish nich.”
0 Akat kumwipul Yesu kusal chilay
38 Chad alej a Yijil amwing ni Afaris amwing amwela Yesu anch: “Mulej, etu tusotil kuman ey usalap chilay.”
39 Yesu wayakula anch: “Antu a chirung chinech adi ayimp akad kumwitiyij Nzamb! En ukat kwitany kukusadilany chilay, pakwez kwikil chilay chikukusadilanyau ching kamu chilay cha Yona, muruu wa Nzamb.
40 Mudi chalalay Yona machuku masatu ma muten ni uchuku mwivumu mwa insh mujim, mwawiy kand mukez kulalay Mwan a Muntu mu divu machuku masatu ma muten ni uchuku.
41 Pidikeza kushik Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, in Ninive akez kwiman piur ni kukufundany en, mulong awiy akarumuka kudiokal ku yitil yau pateshau mazu ma Nzamb marumburilay Yona. Nakulejany chakin, katat pinap padi chom chijim chimupandakenamu Yona!
42 Pidikeza kushik Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, antu a chirung chinech akez kuyifund kudi mwant mband wa ku Seba. Mulong mwant winou wadiokala kulemp kwi ngand yend ya kurul, weza ni kutesh malejan ma manangu ma Mwant Salomon! Chakin nakulejany, pinap padi chom chijim chimupandakenamu Mwant Salomon!”
0 Chilembil ukat kumuchirikin muntu
43 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Pakat kudioshau chilembil mu muntu, chilembil winou ukat kuya ni kutambitamb mwi mpay, mulong wa kusot pa kushakam. Anch kamenap ndond,
44 ukat kutong anch: ‘Nikuchirik kand kwol kwam mu muntu munadia.’ Chawiy ndiy ukuchirik, chad ukutan mu chikumbu chend mwakad chom, chidi cha kukomb, achirijekin.
45 Chawiy ndiy ukubudik, waya wakayisend ayilembil akwau sambwad amupandakenamu ndiy kuyip, chad niyau akez kushakam nend. Katat anch yom yiney yawonsu yapwa, muntu mwinou ukuman mar kupandakan mar ma kusambish. Chinech chawiy chom chikeza kushik kudi antu ayimp a chirung chinech.”
0 Anchend a Yesu ni makwend
46 Padingay Yesu ni kulond nau antu, makwend ni anchend ashika. Awiy imana pol, ipul mulong wa kwambamb nend.
47 Chawiy muntu umwing wamuleja Yesu anch: “Tal, makwey ni anchey iminy pol, asotil kulond ni yeyey.”
48 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, makwam nany? Ov, anamakwam anany?”
49 Chad ndiy wayililika in kwilejend, walond anch: “Talany, makwam ni anamakwam awiy in antu ashicha ay!
50 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yisotilay Tatukwam udia mwiur, ndiy mwinou mwanamakwam, ni nambaz wam, ni makwam.”
0 Chishimu cha mwin kukus
1 Dichuku dinidia Yesu wadiokala ku chikumbu, waya kushakam ku chikumu cha dijiy dia Galalia, mulong wa kulejan.
2 Chisak chijim cha antu chamwombamu, chad ndiy waya washakam mu waat. Antu ashala, iminy pa chikumu.
3 Ndiy wayileja yom yivud mu yishimu anch: “Kwading muntu umwing waya ni kukus mbut.
4 Padingay ni kukus mbut mu chir, jimwing jawila mwi njil, chad atujil eza, ajidia.
5 Mbut jikwau jawila pa mayal makweta divu dikemp. Mbut jabudika swa swa mulong divu diading dikemp.
6 Pakwez piwabudika muten, misil yalipa, yatem mulong mij kiyamanap ndond ya kutandil.
7 Mbut jikwau jawila pa ndond yikweta yifukis ya miy. Yifukis ya miy yakula, yakasa mbut, jafa.
8 Pakwez mbut jikwau jawila pa divu difukina, jakul, jasong mabuj. Jimwing jasonga mabuj chitot, jikwau jasonga mabuj makum musamban, chad jikwau jasonga mabuj makum masatu.”
9 Chad Yesu walonda anch: “Anch ukwetany matu ma kutesh, teshany kamu nawamp!”
0 Mulong walondilangay Yesu mu yishimu
10 Chad in kwilej eza kudi Yesu, amwipul anch: “Oy, mulong wak ukata kuyilejin antu mu yishimu?”
11 Yesu wayakula anch: “En akwinkishanya kal kudi Nzamb ronganyin ra ujindj wa yom ya Want wa Mwiur, pakwez kudi awiy, bwat.
12 Mulong muntu ukweta chom, Nzamb ukez kumuwejinaku yikwau, chawiy ukez kwikal nich yom yivud nakash. Pakwez muntu uburedina, Nzamb ukez kumwamuk kakemp kakwetay.
13 Nikat kuyilejin mu yishimu mulong awiy akat kutal wakad kushinshik nawamp, akat kutesh wakad kwov kurumburik.
14 Mwamu awiy akat kuwanyish mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: ‘Antu inay akutwish kutesh wakad kwov kurumburik. Awiy akutwish kutal wakad kushinshik nawamp.
15 Mulong michim ya antu inay yichinchikin, ni matu mau majikin, ni mes mau mibwikin. Chamwamu mes mau makez kuman, ni matu mau makez kutesh, ni michim yau yikez kwonganyin, chad akez kukarumuk kudi am, chakwel niyoka. Mwamu mulondilay Nzamb.’
16 “Pakwez en wayukany kwen! Mes men makat kuman, ni matu men makat kutesh.
17 Nakulejany chakin, aruu a Nzamb, ni antu avud a Nzamb asota nakash kuman yom yiumenanya en, pakwez kayimanap. Asota kand kutesh yom yiuteshilanya en, pakwez kayiteshap, bwat.
0 Yesu ukat kurumburil chishimu cha mwin kukus
18 “Chawiy, teshany kurumburik kwa chishimu cha mwin kukus.
19 Anch muntu watesh dizu dia Want wa Nzamb wakad kwov kurumburik, Sakudimban ukwez kudiosh dizu diakunyinau mu muchim wend. Mwamu muntu mwinou udi mudi jimbut jakusau mwi njil.
20 Rusangu ra mbut jawila pa mayal makweta divu dikemp, rufanaken mudi muntu ukata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb, chad waditambul swa.
21 Pakwez dizu kidiandaminap mu muchim wend, kidikushakamap chisu chilemp. Chawiy mar ni kuzengol anch yez mulong wa dizu dia Nzamb, muntu mwinou ukuwa swa.
22 Rusangu ra mbut jawila mwi ndond yikweta yifukis ya miy, rufanaken mudi muntu ukata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb, pakwez yakamish ya mwom wa mangand ni rukat ra mapit yikat kushesh dizu dia Nzamb. Chad kakutwishap kusong mabuj.
23 Rusangu ra mbut jawila mu divu difukina rufanaken mudi muntu ukata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb ni kudiov kurumburik. Ndiy ukata kusong mabuj chitot, ap mabuj makum musamban, ap mabuj makum masatu.”
0 Chishimu cha yinfananfan
24 Yesu wayitila chishimu chikwau anch: “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi chishimu ech. Muntu umwing wakusa mbut jiwamp mu chir chend.
25 Padingau antu alel, mukankuny weza uchuku, wakus yinfananfan mu chir cha tidiku, chad waya kwend.
26 Chakulay, tidiku wasambisha kubudish mitu, yinfananfan niyau yamekana.
27 Atushalapol a muntu mwinou eza amulej anch: ‘Mwant, ey wakusa mbut jiwamp mu chir chey, ov, ing yinfananfan yadiokal kal kwisu?’
28 Ndiy wayakula anch: ‘Mukankuny nam, ndiy wasala kal yom yiney.’ Awiy amwipula anch: ‘Ov, ey usotil etu kuya katat tukayibwit yinfananfan?’
29 Ndiy wayakula anch: ‘Bwat, mulong piukubwitanya yinfananfan ap wez wakabwitilanyaku tidiku.
30 Likany tidiku ni yinfananfan yikudila kwau pamwing djat ni pa chirung cha kwangul. Chawiy nikez kuyilej in kwangul anch: Yang, ubwitany bil yinfananfan, uyikasany yit yit, uyoshany. Chad lel ukumangejany tidiku, umutekany mwi nkil yam.’ ”
0 Chishimu cha rubut rukemp
31 Yesu wayitila kand chishimu chikwau anch: “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi rubut rukemp ra mutond, upidilau anch, We mutard, rakunay muntu mu chir chend.
32 Ridi rubut rukemp rupandakena mbut jawonsu, pakwez anch rakul, rikat kwikal mutond ujim kupandakanamu mitond yawonsu yikweta mwom wa muvu umwing. Rikwikal mutond ujim, chawiy atujil akwez kutung yinswal yau ku mitiy.”
0 Chishimu cha chivish
33 Yesu wayitila kand chishimu chikwau anch: “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi chivish cha mabot chanonay mband umwing, wasamp nich wung wa chimpay chakabuj chakwel wung wawonsu ututuk.”
0 Mutapu walondilangay Yesu mu yishimu
34 Yesu wayileja yisak ya antu yom yiney yawonsu mu yishimu. Kayilejap chom wakad kuyitil yishimu.
35 Ndiy wasala mwamu chakwel mawanyina mazu malonday muruu wa Nzamb anch: “Nikez kuyilejin mu yishimu, Nikez kuyilej yom yakad kwijikan kudiokal ku disambishil dia mangand.”
0 Yesu ukat kurumburil chishimu cha yinfananfan
36 Chadiokalay Yesu mu chisak cha antu, waya mu chikumbu. In kwilejend eza kudi ndiy, amwel anch: “Turumburila chishimu cha yinfananfan yadinga mu chir.”
37 Yesu wayakula anch: “Muntu wakusa mbut jiwamp, ndiy kamu Mwan a Muntu.
38 Chir yawiy ngand. Mbut jiwamp awiy antu a mu Want wa Nzamb. Yinfananfan awiy antu a Sakudimban, ndiy kamu Muyimp.
39 Mukankuny wakusa yinfananfan ndiy Sakudimban. Chirung cha kwangul diawiy disudiel dia mangand, chad in kwangul awiy aruu a mwiur.
40 Mudi mukat kukumangejau yinfananfan ni kuyosh mu kasu, mwamu muchikeza kwikal kand kwisudiel kwa mangand.
41 Mwan a Muntu ukez kutum aruu end a mwiur kukumangej antu awonsu akata kuyisadish akwau yitil, ni akata kusal yitil ayinau. Akez kuyidiosh mu Want wend.
42 Chad akez kuyidjibwil mu kasu kakad kujimang, mwinimwa akez kudil ni kwidia ku mazeu.
43 Pakwez antu atentamina akez kuzut mudi muten mu Want wa Tatukwau. Anch ukwetany matu ma kutesh, teshany kamu nawamp!
0 Chishimu cha dipit dijindjikinau
44 Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi dipit diajindjikau mu chir. Muntu mukwau wadibudikina niyend wadijindjik kand. Waya nich musangar nakash, walandish yom yend yawonsu yakwetingay chakwel achirik mulong wa kuland chir chinicha. Chishimu cha usang
45 “Want wa mwiur ufanaken mudi chishimu ech. Muntu mwin kwisak umwing waya ni kukimb usang uvud wa ufun.
46 Chad watana usang umwing wa ufun kupandakan. Ndiy waya, walandish yom yend yawonsu yakwetingay chakwel achirik mulong wa kuland usang winiwa.
0 Chishimu cha wand
47 “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi wand wadjibulau mu karung, chad mwafa ansh a mitapu yawonsu.
48 Wand chiwizula, antu aukakila ku chikumu, chad ashakama mulong ‘wa kwaurol ansh. Ansh awamp ayitek mu misans, pakwez ayimp ayidjibula.
49 Mwamu muchikeza kwikal kand kwisudiel kwa mangand. Aruu a mwiur akez kwez mulong wa kuyauril antu ayimp ni antu atentamina.
50 Chad antu ayimp akez kuyidjibul mu kasu kakad kujimang, mwinimwa akez kudil ni kwidia ku mazeu.”
0 Malejan makur ni malejan masu
51 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, en wovilany kurumburik kwa yishimu yiney?” Awtiy amwakula anch: “Mwaning.”
52 Chawiy ndiy wayileja kand anch: “Mulej wawonsu wa Yijil wileja yom ya Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi mwin chikumbu ukata kudiosh yom yikur ni yom yisu mu chipau chend cha mapit.”
0 In Nazaret akat kumulik Yesu
53 Chapwishay Yesu kuta yishimu yiney, ndiy wadiokala kwi ndond yiniya.
54 Ndiy wachirika ku musumb wakudilay. Ndiy walejana mu chikumbu cha kulembil, chad antu amutesha ashimwok nakash. Ipulijana anch: “Ov, manangu minam wamatanyin kwisu? Ov, ukat kusal yilay yend ku ukash ik?
55 Oy, kindiyap mwan ikundj wa mwin kusong mabay ou? Ov, makwend kadiap Mariy, makwend wa Jakobu, ni Josef, ni Simon, ni Yuda?
56 Ov, ni anambazend awonsu kadiap kunoku? * Ov, yom yiney yawonsu wayitan kwisu?”
57 Chawiy amulika. Yesu wayileja anch: “Muruu wa Nzamb akat kumulimish kwawonsu, pakwez kakumulimishangap mu ul wend wa chivadik, ap ku dijuku diend.”
58 Yesu kasalap yilay yivud kwinikwa mulong awiy kakwetingap ritiy.
0 Rufu ra Yohan Mubatish
1 Pa chisu chinicha, Herod, nyikel wa Galalia, watesha rusangu ra Yesu.
2 Ndiy wayileja atushalapol end anch: “Yesu, ndiy kamu’ Yohan Mubatish wasanguka kal. Chawiy chikwetay ukash wa kusal yilay yiney.”
3 Mulong Herod wamukwata Yohan, wamukas, chad wamutek mu rukan. Ndiy wasala mwamu mulong wa Herodias, mband wa mwanamakwend Filip, warumbulay.
4 Yohan wading ni kumulej Herod anch: “Kichifanyidinap ey kumwat Herodias!”
5 Herod wasota kumujip Yohan, pakwez wova wom wa in Yuda, mulong awiy amuchingejin anch, udi muruu wa Nzamb.
6 Pa dichuku dia musambu wa kuvurik kuvadik kwa Herod, mwan mband wa Herodias waja maj kurutu kwa antu awonsu atazukay. Chad Herod wasangara nakash.
7 Chawiy chamushilayimu anch: “Nachip kal kukwinkish chom chawonsu chiukwingita!”
8 Chad makwend wamubachika mwan kumwit Herod anch: “Nginkisha katat pinap mutu wa Yohan Mubatish pa dilong!”
9 Mwant wova ushon, pakwez mulong wa kushilamu kwashilayimu kurutu kwa antu awonsu atazukay, ndiy walejana kusal mudi mwasotay changadim.
10 Chawiy wamuleja isalay kuya ku rukan kumukatul Yohan mutu.
11 Auleta mutu pa dilong, amwinkishau changadim niyend wautwala kudi makwend.
12 In kwilej a Yohan eza, asend mujimbu wend, akaujik. Chad awiy aya akamulejamu Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kudish chisak chijim cha antu
13 Chateshay Yesu rusangu ra Yohan, wadiokala kwinikwa, wandam mu waat, waya kwi ndond yend amwinend. Chateshau antu mwamu, adiokala mu mal mau, asutil pa mpat, amulondul.
14 Chadiokalay Yesu mu waat, ndiy wamana chisak chijim cha antu. Wayovila riy, chad wayoka antu ading ayedila.
15 Chikwazweka urel, in kwilejend eza kudi ndiy, amwel anch: “Muten waya kal, kunoku kudi kulemp ni ku mal. Yilika antu aya ku mal chakwel akalandap yakudia yau.”
16 Yesu wayakula anch: “Bwat, ashakam kwau kunoku. En iyinkishany yakudia!”
17 Awiy amwakula anch: “Tukwet ching kusu mabot matan ni ansh aad.”
18 Yesu wayileja anch: “Yiletany yom yiney kunoku.”
19 Ndiy wayileja antu anch: “Shakamany pansh.” Chad watambula mabot matan ni ansh aad, watal mwiur, wamujikitish Nzamb. Ndiy wamaumbwol, wamapan kudi in kwilejend, chad in kwilijend ayangena antu.
20 Antu awonsu adia, ikut. Chad in kwilej izwisha yimpay dikum ni yaad ya yikunku yashalap.
21 Antu amakundj adia ading mudi tunan tutan, wakad kuchindilaku amband ni an.
0 Yesu ukat kwend pa mem
22 Yesu wayandjika in kwilejend mu waat, wayitakejaku kuya ushad wa dijiy dia Galalia. Ndiy washala kuyipalangesh antu.
23 Chapwishay kuyipalangesh antu, ndiy waya pa mukandu kulembil. Chikwazweka urel, Yesu wading amwinend kwinikwa.
24 Pa chisu chinicha waat wading washikang kal pakach pa dijiy. Mambek mading ni kwibul ku waat, mulong rinkind watuta nakash.
25 Uchuku, piwashika pa nkunku pa kucha, Yesu weza kudi in kwilej, ukat kwend pa mem.
26 Pamumanau ukat kwend pa mem, awiy ova wom nakash, alond anch: “Talany mutar!” Chad awiy abaroka kudil nich wom.
27 Yesu wayakula swa anch: “Ikasikeshany! Yam, kangal Wovany wom!”
28 Pita wamwela anch: “Nsalejam, anch yey chakin, ngela niyam neza kudi ey, nikwend pa mem.”
29 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ez kwey!” Chawiy Pita wadiokala mu waat, wasambish kwend pa mem kuya kudi Yesu.
30 Pamanay rinkind ukat kutut nich usu, Pita wova wom, chad wasambisha kujiy. Ndiy wadila anch; “Nsalejam, mpandisha!”
31 Pawiy pinipa kamu, Yesu watandjeka chikas, wamukwat, wamwel anch: “Ey ukwet ritiy rikemp! Ov, mulong wak widjidjekina?”
32 Chad awonsu mwaad wau andama mu waat, rinkind wikuehika zong.
33 Chawiy in kwilej adinga mu waat amwifukwila Yesu, alond anch: “Chakin kamu, ey udi Mwan a Nzamb!
0 We Yesu ukat kwok ayej mwi ngand ya Genesaret
34 Awiy auka ushad wa dijiy dia Galalia, ashik mwi ngand ya Genesaret.
35 Kwinikwa amwijika Yesu swa, chad ayitumesha ayej awonsu a mwi ngand yiniya chakwel ayileta kudi ndiy.
36 Awiy amulembijekanga chakwel awiy apukuna ku ruzez ra kabwik wend. Aye awonsu apukuna ku kabwik wend ayerika.
0 Akat kutadikijan mulong wa yaku ya anshankurau
1 Chad Afaris nau alej a Yijil amwing adiokala ku Yerusalem, ez kudi Yesu, amwipul anch:
2 “Ov, mulong wak in kwilejey kalaminap Yijil ya anshankuretu? Awiy kalondwilap nawamp yijil ya koyil ku makas pakadiau kal kudia!”
3 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, mulong wak en ukat kulikany kuziyil yijil ya Nzamb, pakwez ukat kulondulany malejan men ayinen?
4 Mulong Nzamb walonda anch: ‘Mulimisha tatukwey ni makwey,’ walonda kand anch: ‘Mwawonsu ukeza kumushing tatukwend ap makwend, afanyidin kumujip.’
5 Pakwez en ukat kulejanany anch, anch muntu ukwet chom cha kumukwash tatukwend ap makwend, chad walond anch: ‘“Nachipang kal kuchipan chom chinech kudi Nzamb,’
6 muntu mwinou, en wamuyingishany kal kulik kumukwash tatukwend. Mwamu muukata kudiulany yijil ya Nzamb, mulong wa kulondul malejan men ayinen.
7 En in rubabek! Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, wabwaka chakin mulong wenen anch:
8 Nzamb ulondil anch: Antu inay akat kwinlimish nich mazu mamwamu, pakwez michim yau yidi kulemp ni yamam.
9 Akat kwingifukwil, pakwez kwifukwil kwau kudi kwamwamu, mulong awiy akat kulejan yijil yau antu, mudi yawly yijil ya Nzamb!”
0  Yom yikata kumwijondish muntu
10 Chawiy Yesu watazuka chisak cha antu kwez kudi ndiy, wayilej anch: “Nteshany, ushinshikany nawamp!
11 Yom yikat kudiay muntu kiyikutwishap kujondish mupim wend, pakwez yom yikata kudiokal mu muchim wa muntu, yawiy yikata kumwijondish.”
12 Chad in kwilej eza amwipul ndiy anch: “Ov, ey wij anch, mazu mey miwalondang mayitapil Afaris mu muchim?”
13 Yesu wayakula anch: “Mutond wawonsu wakad kukunau kudi Tatukwam udia mwiur akez kuubwit.
14 Yilikany kwau, kangal wiyakamishany! Awiy adi amputames akat kuyitakel amputames akwau. Anch mputames wamutakel mputames mukwau, awonsu mwaad wau akuwa mu dibuku.”
15 Pita wamwela anch: “Turumburila yom yiney.”
16 Yesu wayileja anch: “Ni katat niyen kiwovilanyap yom kupandakanamu antu akwau.
17 Ov, komb kiwijanyap kwen anch yom yikata kwandam mu kan mwa muntu yikat kuya mu ditont, chad wayisutish kand?
18 Pakwez yikata kubudik mu kan yikat kudiokal mu muchim. Yawiy yom yikata kumwijondish muntu.
19 Mulong mu muchim mwa muntu mwawiy mukata kubudik yitongijok yiyimp yikata kumutwal ku kujipan, ni kwimik dis, ni kusal yom yikwau yiyimp, ni kwiy, ni kulond makasu, ni kuyitwambil antu akwau.
20 Yom yiney yawiy yikata kumwijondish muntu. Pakwez kudia wakad koyil ku makas, mudi mukat kulondau Afaris, kichikutwishap kumwijondish muntu.”
0 Mband mweny ukat kumwitiyij Yesu
21 Chawiy Yesu wadiokala kwinikwa. Waya kwi ngand yidia piswimp ni musumb wa Tir ni wa Sidon.
22 Mband umwing mwin Kanan wading ushicha mwi ngand yiniya weza kudi ndiy, wamwilembil anch: “Mwan a David, ngovilap, amboku, riy! Mwanam mband ukwet chilembil ukat kumumeshang mar nakash.”
23 Pakwez Yesu kamwakulap dizu. Chad in kwilejend eza kudi ndiy, amulembijek anch: “Mwopata, aya! Mulong ndiy utulondwil etu nich masok nakash!”
24 Yesu wakula anch: “Am antuma kuya kudi amikoku ashadikina, awiy kamu in Isarel.”
25 Mband winou, chateshay mwamu, weza wiyas pansh ku mend ma Yesu, wamwel anch: “Mwant, nkwashap, amboku!”
26 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Kichifanyidinap kunon yakudia ya an kuyidjibwil atubu.”
27 Mband wamwakul anch: “Mwawiy, Nsalejam. Pakwez, ap mwamwap nchik, atubu niyau akat kudia yipuchipuch yikat kupaloshau mwishin mwa mes ma ansalejau.”
28 Chawiy Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ey udi mband ukweta ritiy rijim! Chikala kwau mudi muusotila.” Pa chisu chinicha kamu, mwanend mband wayerika.
0 Yesu ukat kuyok ayej avud
29 Yesu wadiokala kwinikwa, wasutil kuns kwa dijiy dia Galalia. Wakandama pa mukandu, washakam pansh.
30 Yisak yivud ya antu eza kudi ndiy. Aleta ayishet, ni amputames, ni ayilim, ni atumam, ni ayej akwau avud, ayitul ku mend ma Yesu, chad ndiy wayoka.
31 Antu ashimwoka nakash pamanau atumam akat kulond, ni ayilim akat kuyerik, ni ayishet akat kwend, ni amputames akat kuman. Chad awiy amushimana Nzamb wa in Isarel.
0 Yesu ukat kuyidish antu avud
32 Yesu wayitazuka in kwilejend, wayilej anch: “Niyovidil antu inay riy mulong tudi nau kunoku machuku masatu, katat kakwetap kand yakudia. Kinisotilap kuyipalangesh wakad kuyidish, chamwamu akufa chipuku mwi njil pakuyau kwol kwau.”
33 In kwilej amwipula anch: “Mwinomu tudi mwi mpay, ov, kwisu tukumana yakudia yiwanyidina ya kuyidish antu inay awonsu?”
34 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, ukwetany mabot minch?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Tukwet mabot sambwad ni tuinsh tukemp tukemp twakad kuvul.”
35 Chawiy Yesu wayileja antu kushakam pansh.
36 Chad watambula mabot sambwad ni tuinsh tukemp, wamujikitish Nzamb, waumbwola mabot, wakatwol tuinsh, wapan yawonsu kudi in kwilej. Niyau in kwilejend ayinkisha antu.
37 Awonsu adia, ikut. Chad in kwilejend izwisha yimpay sambwad ya yikunku yashalap.
38 Kuvul kwa amakundj adia ading tunan tunying, wakad kuchind amband ni anikanch.
39 Chad Yesu wayipalangesha antu, wandam mu waat, waya kwi ngand ya Magadan.
0 Akat kwipul kuyisadil chilay
1 Afaris amwing nau Asadus eza kudi Yesu mulong wa kumupak pa kan. Amwipula chakwel ayisadila chilay mulong wa kumekesh anch ulabu wend udiokil kudi Nzamb.
2 Pakwez Yesu wayakula anch: “Piukata kwandam muten, en ukat kulondany anch: ‘Diamashik kukucha nawamp, mulong diur disuzil.’
3 Chad pamanch pafe ukat kulondany anch: ‘Ilel ruvul ukunak, mulong madj masuz masambish kal kwikal majal.” En ukutwish kubwakany mulong wa ruvul piukat kutalany yijingidij ya mwiur. Pakwez ukangenany kubwak yom yikweza kurutu mulong wa yijingidij yiumenanya mu chirung chinech!
4 Antu a chirung chinech adi ayimp, akad kumwitiyij Nzamb! En ukat kwitany kukusadilany chilay, pakwez kwikil chilay chikukusadilanyau, ching kamu chilay cha Yona.” Chawiy ndiy wayisha, waya kwend.
0 Chivish chiyimp cha Afaris nau Asadus
5 Paukau in kwilej ushad wa dijiy dia Galalia, awiy avuramena kusend mabot. 
6 Yesu wayileja anch: “Talany nawamp! Babalany, mulong wa chivish chiyimp cha Afaris nau Asadus.”
7 In kwilejend atadikijana ayinau anch: “Ndiy ulondil mwamu mulong kitwasendangap mabot.”
8 Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, wayipul anch: “Ov, mulong wak utadikijadinany mulong wa kuburen mabot? En ukwetany ritiy rikemp!
9 Ov, kiwovilanyap kwen ni katat? Ov, kiuvurikinanyap pinaumbwola mabot matan kuyidish antu tunan tutan? Ov, wanonanya yikunku yashalap yimpay yinch?
10 Ov, kiuvurikinanyap kand pinaumbwola mabot sambwad kuyidish antu tunan tunying? Ov, wanonanya yikunku yashalap yimpay yinch?
11 Ing, mulong wak kiwovilanyap anch, kinalondangap mulong wa mabot? Babalany, mulong wa chivish chiyimp cha Afaris nau Asadus!”
12 Chad in kwilej ova nawamp anch, Yesu kayibabeshap mulong wa chivish chikat kusalau nich mabot. Pakwez wayibabesha mulong wa malejan ma Afaris nau Asadus.
0 Ritiy ra Pita
13 Yesu waya mwi ngand yidia piswimp ni musumb wa Sezarey Filip. Ndiy wayipula in kwilejend anch: “Ov, antu akat kumwel Mwan a Muntu anch ndiy nany?”
14 Awiy amwakula anch: “Antu amwing akat kumwel anch, ndiy Yohan Mubatish. Antu akwau anch, udi Elija, chad akwau akat kumwel anch, Jeremiy, ap anch udi muruu mukwau wa Nzamb.”
15 Yesu wayipula awiy anch: “Ing, en ukat kwingelany anch yam nany?”
16 Chawiy Pita wamwakula anch: “Ey udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many, Mwan a Nzamb mwom.”
17 Yesu wamwela anch: “Wayuk kwey, Simon, mwan wa Yona. Uyakin walonda kal ou kiudiokilap ku ronganyin ra wuntu, pakwez akwinkishangau kudi Tatukwam udia mwiur.
18 Chawiy nakulej ey-anch, yey Pita, charumburik anch, diyal. Am nikez kusambish kukumangan kwa in kwingitiyij am pa dishin dia diyal dined. Chawiy ukash wa rufu kiukez kutwishap kukupandakan kukumangan kwinoku.
19 Nikez kukwinkish anfungul a Want wa Mwiur. Yom yiukeza kujidik pansh, ni mwiur akez kuyijidik. Chad yom yiukeza kwitiy pansh, ni mwiur akez kuyitiy kand.”
20 Chad Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Kangal wayilejanyamu antu anch, am nidi Kristu Uzizidilau Many,”
0 Yesu ukat kulond ya rufu ni ya kuvumbuk kwend
21 Kudiokal chisu chinicha Yesu wasambisha kuyilej in kwilejend patok anch: “Chifanyidin am kuya ku Yerusalem. Kwinikwa amakurump, ni in kupesh ajim, ni alej a Yijil akez kwinmesh mar nakash. Akez kwinjip, pakwez anch kwasut machuku masatu nikez kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom.”
22 Pita wamutazuka, waya nend kuns, wasambish kumukand anch: “Nsalejam, chakapul chaya mwa! Yom yiney kangal yashik kudi en, mwan!”
23 Yesu wakarumuka, wamwel Pita anch: “Sakudimban, ndiokala! Ey usotil kwinkangesh am kuwanyish rusot ra Nzamb, mulong yitongijok yey kiyidiokilap kudi Nzamb, yidiokil kudi muntu.”
24 Chad Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwibomb ni yamam, chifanyidin ndiy kwidiul amwinend, asend mutond wend uchikakena, anlondul am.
25 Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwipandish amwinend ukez kufa, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukufa mulong wa kwingambat am ukez kwipandish. 
26 Ov, muntu ukutanamu ik anch wapitap nchik yom ya ngand yakabuj, chad ndiy washadish mwom wend wa chikupu. Kwikil chom chikutwish kupanay muntu mulong wa kukwol mwom wend wa chikupu.
27 Mulong Mwan a Muntu ukushik nich uyaj wa Tatukwend pamwing nau aruu end a mwiur. Chad ukez kumufut muntu ni muntu mudi mudia yisalijok yend.
28 Nakulejany chakin kamu anch, antu amwing adia pinap ay kakufap kal, ching kamu amuman Mwan a Muntu ukat kwez mudi Mwant.”
0 Yesu ukat kumekan mutapu ukwau
1 Chipasuta machuku musamban, Yesu waya nend Pita, ni Jakobu, ni Yohan, mwanamakwend a Jakobu, wayitwala piur pa mukandu ulemp, ading ayinau kwinikwa.
2 Yesu wamekana mutapu ukwau kudi awiy. Chifu chend chapaya mudi muten, ni maswin mend mazuta, matok too.
3 Chad in kwilej asatu amumana Moses ni Elija akat kulond nend Yesu.
4 Pita wabasuka, wamwel Yesu anch: “Nsalejam, chidi chiwamp pituchidia kunoku! Anch ey ukatil, am nikutung tufumbifumb tusatu, kamwing keyey, kamwing ka Moses, kakwau ka Elija.”
5 Padingay Pita ukat kulond, didj dizutila dieza, diayibwik, chad dizu dia Nzamb diovakena mu didj anch: “Winou udi mwanam unikatila, nikat kusanger mwi ndiy, muteshany!”
6 Pateshau in kwilej dizu dined, awiy ova wom nakash, chad awa pansh kabwikam.
7 Yesu weza kudi awiy, wayikwataku, wayel anch: “Tumbukany, kangal wovany wom!”
8 Chad awiy atalijola, kamanap muntu mukwau, ching kusu Yesu.
9 Chashirikau ku mukandu, Yesu wayikoja in kwilejend anch: “Kangal wamulejanyamu muntu chishimushimu chiwamananganya, ching pakez kuvumbukay Mwan a Muntu kwikal kand mwom.” ;
10 Chawiy in kwilej amwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, mulong wak alej a Yijil akat kulond anch, Elija ndiy ukeza kusambel kwez?”
11 Yesu wayakula anch: “Chakin kamu, Elija ufanyidin kusambel kwez mulong wa kurijek yom yawonsu.
12 Chawiy nakulejany anch, Elija wezil kal, pakwez antu kamwijikap, chad amupompata mudi mukatilau. Mwamu kand mukez kumumeshau Mwan a Muntu mar.”
13 Chad in kwilej ova nawamp anch, ulondil mulong wa Yohan Mubatish.
0 Yesu ukat kumudiosh mwan ikundj chilembil
14 Pachirikay Yesu ni in kwilejend ku chisak cha antu adinga kwinikwa, muntu umwing weza kudi Yesu, wamwasin manungun pansh.
15 Ndiy wamwela anch: “Mwant, mwovilap, amboku, mwanam ikundj riy! Ndiy uyedil kafefu, ukat kuzal nakash, chad yisu yivud ukat kuwil mu kasu ap mu mem.
16 Namuletil kudi in kwilejey, pakwez awiy akanganyang kumwok.”
17 Yesu wayela anch; “Yowo, en antu akad ritiy! Ov, machuku minch minifanyidina kushakam ni yenen? Ov, chifanyidin am kukulamany kwen mwamu? Muletany mwan kudi am!”
18 Yesu wamubarikina chilembil, chad wamudiokal mwan. Pawiy pinipa mwan wayerika.
19 In kwilej eza ku ujindj, amwipul Yesu anch: “Ov, mulong wak etu twakanganyang kumudiosh chilembil?”
20 Yesu wayakula anch: “Wakanganyangany mulong kiukwetanyap ritiy ruwanyidina. Nakulejany chakin, anch ukwetany ritiy rujim mudi karubut ka mutond, upidilau anch, mutard, ukutwish kuwelany mukandu ou anch: ‘Diokal pinap, yang kwa!’ Chad mukandu ukuya. Ukutwish kusalany yom yawonsu!” [
21 Chilembil wa mutapu winou akat kumudiosh ching kusu nich kulembil ni kujil yakudia.]
0 Yesu ukat kulond kand mulong wa rufu ni kuvumbuk kwend
22 Dichuku dimwing in kwilej akumangana pamwing mwi ngand ya Galalia, chad Yesu wayileja anch: “Mwan a Muntu akez kumupan mu makas ma antu,
23 akeza kumujip. Anch wafa, chad kusut kwa machuku masatu ukez kuvumbuk.” In kwilej ova ushon nakash.
0 Yesu ukat kulambul chitad cha Chikumbu cha Nzamb
24 Chashikay Yesu ni in kwilejend ku Kapernaum, in kulambwish yitad ya Chikumbu cha Nzamb eza kudi Pita, amwipul anch: “Ov, mulej wen ukat kulambul chitad cha Chikumbu cha Nzamb?”
