25 Pita wakula anch: “Mwaning, ukat kulambul.” Pandamay kamu Pita mu chikumbu, Yesu wasambelaku kumwipul anch: “Ov, Simon, ey utongil nchik? Ov, anany akata kufut yitad kudi ant a mangand? Ov, adi an angand anch aeny?”
26 Pita wakula anch: “Aeny, awiy akata kulambul.” Chad Yesu wamwakula anch: “Chiwamp, komb anch mwamu, an a ngand kakutwishap kulambul.
27 Pakwez kitusotilap kuyovish antu inay ujim, chawiy yang ku dijiy ni kulau. Chad insh ukulawa wa kusambish, winiwa ukwikal nich rufalang mu kan mwend, ruwanyidina kulambul chitad cheyey ni chamam. Runona, ulambul yitad yetwetu kudi antu inay.”
0 Ov, nany upandakena kujimb?
1 Pa chisu chinicha in kwilej eza kudi Yesu, amwipul anch: “Ov, nany upandakena kujimb mu Want wa Mwiur?”
2 Chawiy Yesu wamutazuka mwanikanch, wamwimik kurutu kwau,
3 walond anch: “Nakulejany chakin, chifanyidin kukarumun yaku kwikal mudi ya anikanch, chamwamu kiukwandamanyap mu Want wa Mwiur.
4 Muntu udia mujim kupandakan mu Want wa Mwiur udi muntu ukata kwishikumwish amwinend wikal mudi mwanikanch winou.
5 Muntu mwawonsu ukumwaka mwanikanch mudi winou mu dijin diam, wangak kal am.
0 Yoziu ya kutwalan ku yitil
6 “Chad chifanyidin kumukasin muntu diyal dijim mwi nshing, amudjibul nich mu karung, kupandakanamu kumusadikish mwanikanch mukemp wingitiyijina am chitil.
7 Chidi chom chiyimp kudi antu awonsu, mulong mu mangand mudi yom yikata kuyitwal antu mu yitil! Yom yiney yikat kumekan yisu yawonsu, pakwez riyind kudi muntu ukata kuyilet yom yiney.
8 “Anch chikas chey, ap mwend wey yakusadikish chitil, yikatula, uyidjibul kulemp! Chifanyidin kwandam mu mwom wa chikupu nich chikas chimwing ap nich mwend umwing, kupandakan kuya nich makas maad ap mend maad mu kasu kakad kujimang.
9 Anch dis diey diakusadikish chitil, dizakula, udidjibul kulemp! Chifanyidin kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb nich dis dimwing, kupandakan kukudjibul nich mes maad mu kasu kakad kujimang.
0 Chishimu cha mukoku washadika, amutan kand
10 “Chom chijim, kangal wapipejany umwing wa anikanch inay. Nakulejany chakin, aruu au a mwiur adi yisu yawonsu kurutu kwa Tatukwam udia mwiur. [
11 Mulong Mwan a Muntu weza mulong wa kusot ashadikina ni kuyipandish.]
12 “Ov, utongilany muntu ukusal nchik anch ukwet amikoku chitot, chad mukoku umwing washadik? Ndiy ukusha amikoku akwau makum chidivu ni chidivu pa chinanginang pakat kudilau. Chad ukuya ni kumukimb mukoku ushadikina.
13 Nakulejany chakin, pakumutanay ukusangar nakash mulong wa mukoku winou umwing, kupandakanamu kusangar mulong wa amikoku makum chidivu ni chidivu akad kushadik.
14 Chawiy chimwing kand, Tatukwen udia mwiur kasotilap umwing wa anikanch inay kushadik.
0 Mutapu wa kumukwash mwanamakwey mu ritiy
15 “Anch mukwen mu ritiy wakurumbukin, yang kudi ndiy, umulej kurumbuk kwend. Pakwez londilany ku ujindj, en antu aad. Anch wakutesh, divar dien dia mu ritiy diachirik kal kand.
16 Pakwez anch ndiy kakuteshilap, sendap muntu umwing ap aad uya nau, mulong ukutwish kumufund ching anch ukwet atuman aad ap asatu.
17 Chad anch kayiteshilap awiy, lejanany yom yiney yawonsu kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Chom cha kwisudiel, anch ndiy kayiteshilap in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, muchinda mudi kadiap kand mwanamakwey mu ritiy ap muchinda mudi mwin kulambwish yitad. Kujidik ni kwitiy
18 “Nakulejany en awonsu anch, yom yawonsu yiukujidikany pansh, ni mwiur akez kuyijidik. Chad yom yawonsu yiukez kwitiyany pansh, ni mwiur akez kuyitiy kand.
19 “Nakulejany kand kakwau anch, yisu yawonsu anch antu aad a pakach pen ovijan mulong wa chom mu kulembil, akez kukusadilanyach kudi Tatukwam udia mwiur.
20 Mulong kwawonsu kukukumanganau antu aad ap asatu mu dijin diam, am nikwikal nau pamwing.”
0 Chishimu cha kashalapol wakad dilikishin
21 Chad Pita weza kudi Yesu, wamwipul anch: “Nsalejam, anch mwanamakwam mu ritiy udandamedin kwinrumbukin, ov, chifanyidin am kumulikishin tupamp twinch? Ov, tupamp sambwad?”
22 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Tupamp sambwad, bwat, pakwez tupamp makum sambwad kapamp sambwad.
23 Mulong Want wa Mwiur udi mudi chishimu chinech. Kwading mwant umwing wasota kuchind dipit diend diading dilaminau kudi atushalapol end.
24 Chasambishay kuchind, amuletilay kashalapol umwing wading ukweta chikal cha nfalang tutikit.
25 Kashalapol kadingap ukwet nfalang jiwanyidina kufut chikal chend. Chawiy mwant walejana kumulandish mu uswik, pamwing ni mukajend, ni anend, ni yom yawonsu yikwetay chakwel afuta chikal.
26 Kashalapol wasa manungun kurutu kwa mwant, wamulembijek anch: ‘Ngovilap, amboku, riy, nikez kukufut chikal chey chawonsu!’
27 Mwant wamwovila riy, wamulikishin chikal, chad wamulikishaku kashalapol waya kwend.
28 “Chad kashalapol wabudika, waya wamusankan kashalapol mukwau wasalangay nend wading ukwet chikal chend cha nfalang jikemp. Ndiy wamudadamijana, wamukwat mwi nshing, wamwel anch: ‘Nfuta kamu chikal cham katat!?
29 Kashalapol winou wawa pansh, wamulembijek anch: ‘Ngovilap, amboku, riy, nikez kukufut chikal chey chawonsu!’
30 Chad ndiy kamwovilap riy, pakwez waya wamutwal mu rukan, wamwel anch ‘Kiukutwishap kubudik ching kamu wanfut chikal cham chawonsu.’
31 Atushalapol akwau, chamanau mwamu, ova ushon nakash, chad aya akamulejamu mwant wau yom yawonsu.
32 Chawiy mwant wamutazuka kashalapol winou, wamwel anch: ‘Ey udi muswik muyimp! Am nakulikishina ey chikal chawonsu mulong ey wangilembila.
33 Niyey, chad chifanyidin kumwovil mukwen kashalapol riy, mudi nakwovidila ey riy.’
34 Mwant wajimana nakash, chad wamutwal kashalapol winou mu rukan, mulong wa kumulej kadimu djat ni pakufutilay chikal chawonsu.”
35 Chad Yesu walonda kand anch: “Mwamu kand mukez kukusalanyau kudi Tatukwam udia mwiur, anch muntu ni muntu wa pakach penen kamulikishidinap mwanamakwend mu ritiy nich muchim wend wawonsu, mulong wa yom yamurumbukinay.”
0 Yesu ukat kulejan mulong wa kukangesh kujip uruu
1 Chapwishay Yesu kulond yom yiney, ndiy wadiokala mwi ngand ya Galalia, waya kwi ngand ya Yudeya ushad wa wit wa Yordan. 
2 Yisak yijim ya antu amulondula, chad ndiy wayoka kwinikwa.
3 Afaris amwing eza kudi ndiy, asota kumupak pa kan, amwipul anch: “Ov, mu Yijil yetu kudi chom ap chimwing chikutwishay ikundj kumulik mukajend?”
4 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, kand kal utanganyap Mukand wa Nzamb ulondila anch: ‘Pakusambish Sakatang watanga antu ikundj ni mband?’
5 Chad Nzamb walonda kand anch: “Pa chinech ikundj ukez kudiokal kudi tatukwend ni makwend, ni kulamat kudi mukajend, chad awiy aad akwikal mujimbu umwing.’
6 Chad awiy kadiap kand antu aad, pakwez ikal kal muntu umwing. Muntu kafanyidinap kwauril antu abombakeshay Nzamb.”
7 Afaris amwipula anch: “Moses watwinkisha chijil chakwel ikundj ukutwish kumufundil mukajend mukand wa kujip uruu, chad wamwopat. Ov, mulong wak Moses chasalay mwamu?”
8 Yesu wayakula anch: “Moses wakwitiyanya kujip uruu nau akajen mulong wa kuchinchik kwa michim yen. Pakwez patangay Nzamb antu kichadingap mwamu.
9 Nakulejany anch: ‘Ikundj mwawonsu ukumulika mukajend wakad chitil cha kusochik, chad wat mband windj, wasal kal chitil cha kusotan.’ ”
10 In kwilejend amwela anch: “Anch mwamu muchidia kudi ikundj ni mukajend, komb kichifanyidinap kwau kwatan.”
11 Yesu wayakula anch: “Malejan minam kakutwishap kumitiy kudi antu awonsu, pakwez ching kusu kudi antu inkishau kal usu kudi Nzamb.
12 Mulong kudi yom yivud yikutwisha kuyikangesh amakundj kwatan. Amwing kakat kwatanap mulong avadika akad usu. Akwau kakat kwatanap mulong ayitunguna kudi antu akwau. Akwau kand kakat kwatanap mulong wa kwipan ku Want wa Mwiur. Muntu mwawonsu ukutwisha kwitiy malejan minam, amitiya kwend.”
0 Yesu ukat kuyukish anikanch
13 Antu amwing aletanga anikanch kudi Yesu, chakwel ayanzwok makas ni kuyilembil, pakwez in kwilej ayikangesha. !
14 Chad Yesu walonda anch: “Chifanyidin anikanch eza kwau kudi am, kangal wayikangeshany, mulong Want wa Mwiur udi wa antu adia mudi anikanch inay.”
15 Ndiy wayanzwoka makas, chad waya kwend.
0 Muntu mpich
16 Muntu umwing weza kudi Yesu, wamwipul anch: “Nsalejam, ov yom ik yiwamp yinifanyidina kusal chakwel nikal nich mwom wa chikupu?”
17 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, mulong wak wangipula kal mulong wa yom yiwamp? Kudi kusu Umwing udia muwamp. Anch usotil kutambul mwom wa chikupu, lam kwey yijil.”
18 Ndiy wamwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, yijil ik?” Yesu wamwakula anch: “Kangal wajipan. Kangal wimik dis. Kangal wiy. Kangal wamutwambil mukwen makasu.
19 Mulimisha tatukwey ni makwey. Mukata kand mukwen mudi ey amwiney.”
20 Nsangarum winou wamwakula anch: “Am naziyidil kal yijil yiney yawonsu. Ov, yom ik yikwau yinifanyidina kand kusal?”
21 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Anch usotil kwikal muntu uwanyidina, yang ukalandish yom yawonsu yiukweta, upan nfalang jinej kudi atuzwendj, chawiy ey ukez kwikal nich mapit ma mwiur. Chad wez wikal mwin kwilej wam.”
22 Pateshay nsangarum winou mazu minam, wafunyangesh mu mes, waya nich ushon mulong wading mpich nakash.
23 Chad Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Nakulejany chakin, chikez kwikal chom chikash nakash kudi ampich kwandam mu Want wa Mwiur.
24 Nakulejany kand anch, chikasiken kudi nnam ukweta ndund pa nyim kusut mu dipan dia katumu, pakwez chipandaken kukasikan kudi mpich kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb.”
25 In kwilej, pateshau mazu minam, ashimwoka nakash, amwipul anch: “Ov, ing nany lel ukeza kupand?”
26 Yesu wayitala neeng, wayakul anch: “Chom chinech chikasiken kudi antu, pakwez anch chakasikanap nchik Nzamb ukutwish kusal.”
27 Chad Pita wamwela anch: “Tal kwa, etu twashil kal yom yawonsu, twakulondula ey, ov, yom ik yitukeza kwikal nich?”
28 Yesu wayileja anch: “Nakulejany chakin, pakwezay Mwan a Muntu kushakam pa ditand diend dia uyaj mwi ngand yisu yikeza kwez, niyen dikum ni aad, in kwinlondul am, ukez kushakamany pa matand ma kuyikel michid dikum ni yaad ya in Isarel.
29 Chawiy muntu mwawonsu washila kal yikumbu yend, ap anamakwend amakundj ni amband, ap tatukwend, ap makwend, ap anend, ap yir yend, mulong wa kwingambat am, ukez kutambul yom yiney kupandakan tupamp chitot. Ukez kutambul kand mwom wa chikupu.
30 Pakwez antu avud adia a kusambish katat, akez kwikal a kwisudiel, chad antu adia a kwisudiel katat akez kwikal a kusambish.
0 Chishimu cha in kusal mudimu mu chir cha mitond ya nviny
1 “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi chishimu chinech. Kwading muntu umwing walanka pamanch nakash, waya ni kukimb antu in kusal mudimu mu chir chend cha mitond ya nviny.
2 Wovijana nau kuyifut mudi mwading difut dia dichuku diakabuj. Chad ndiy wayituma kusal mudimu mu chir chend cha mitond ya nviny.
3 Pamanch, muten wa chidivu, waya kand mu chiku, waman antu akat kwimanijan wakad mudimu.
4 Chad wayileja anch: ‘Niyen, yangany kand kusal mudimu mu chir cham, chad nikez kukufutany difut diwamp.’
5 Chad awiy aya. Mwin chir waya kand muten pakach ni muten wa yisatu wa urel, watazuk kand antu akwau.
6 Muten wa yitan wa urel, wachirika kand mu chiku, wayitan amakundj akwau, iminy kwau chamwamu. Wayipula anch: ‘Ov, mulong wak ushichanya pinap dichuku diakabuj wakad kusal chom?’
7 Awiy amwakula anch: ‘Kwikil muntu watwinkishanga mudimu.’ Ndiy wayakula anch: ‘Chiwamp, niyen yangany kand, usalany mudimu mu chir cham cha mitond ya nviny.’
8 “Chikwazweka urel, mwin chir wamuleja mukurump wa mudimu anch: ‘Yitazuka in mudimu, uyifut difut diau. Usambelang kuyifut antu aswinkananga kukwat mudimu, chad uyifuta lel antu asambelanga kukwat mudimu.’
9 Antu asudielaku asambisha kusal mudimu pa muten wa yitan wa urel eza, wayifuta mudi mwadinga difut dia dichuku diakabuj.
10 Chawiy pezau antu asambela kukwat mudimu pamanch mulong wa kutambul difut diau, awiy atonga anch, akutambul difut dijim kupandakan. Pakwez niyau ayifuta kand mudi mwadinga difut dia dichuku diakabuj.
11 Patambulau difut diau, awiy asambisha kumununganijan mwin chir.
12 Amwela anch: ‘Antu asudielangaku asalang mudimu chisu chimwing kwau. Pakwez etu twasalang mudimu dichuku diakabuj pa muten uswanyina. Chad ey wayifutang awiy difut dimwing ni yetwetu!’
13 “Mwin chir wamwakula muntu umwing wa pakach pa in mudimu inay anch: ‘Tesh, murund nam, ey kinakudimbangap. Ey witiyang kusal mudimu mulong wa kukufut mudi mudia difut dia dichuku diakabuj. Ov, kimwawiyap?
14 Katat kwat difut diey, yang kwol kwey. Am nisotil kumufut muntu winou wasalanga mudimu kwisudiel mudi munakufutanga ey.
15 Am nikutwish kusal nich nfalang jam mudi munikatila. Ey wov kal mukau mulong am nidi kwam muntu mwin kupanol.’ ”
16 Chad Yesu walonda kand anch: “Antu adia a kwisudiel akez kwikal a kusambish, chad antu adia a kusambish akez kwikal a kwisudiel.”
0 Yesu ulondil kapamp ka chisatu mulong wa rufu rend ni divumbuk
17 Padingay Yesu uyil ku Yerusalem, wayitazukina in kwilejend dikum ni aad kuns, chad wayilej pau ayinau padingau ayil anch:
18 “Teshany, tuyilany katat ku Yerusalem. Kwinikwa akez kumupan Mwan a Muntu mu makas ma in kupesh ajim, ni ma alej a Yijil. Awiy akez kumufish nich kwa kumujip.
19 Chad akez kumupan mu makas ma antu a michid yikwau. Awiy akez kumuswingish, ni kumubul nfimbu, chad akez kumupamp pa mutond uchikakena. Pakwez pa dichuku dia chisatu ukez kuvumbuk.”
0 Makwend a Jakobu ni Yohan ukat kwit
20 Mband wa Zebede weza kudi Yesu pamwing nau anend amakundj aad, Jakobu ni Yohan. Mband winou wazengama kurutu kwa Yesu mulong wa kumwit chom.
21 Yesu wamwipula anch: “Ov, usotil ik?” Ndiy wamwakula anch: “Nshilamu chakwel anam amakundj aad ay akez kushakam ou ku chikas chey cha katatuku, ou ku chikas chey cha kamaku piukwikala Mwant.”
22 Yesu wayakula an anch: “Kiwijanyap kwen chom chiwitilanya. Ov, ukutwish kunany rupas ra mar minikumana am?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Etu tukutwish.”
23 Yesu wayileja kand anch: “Chakin kamu, ukez kunany rupas ra mar minikumana am. Pakwez am kinikwetap ulabu wa kutond nany ukushakama ku chikas cham cha katatuku, ap cha kamaku. Tatukwam ulamin jindond jinej mulong wa antu atonday kal.”
24 Pateshau in kwilej akwau dikum yom yiney, amujimena Jakobu ni mwanamakwend Yohan.
25 Chad Yesu wayitazuka in kwilejend awonsu pamwing, wayilej anch: “En wijany kal in kutakel au antu a michid yikwau akat kwizambwish, chad antau ajim akat kuyiyikel ku ulabu.
26 Pakwez kichifanyidinap kwikal mwamu pakach pen. Anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen usotil kwikal muntu mujim kukupandakananyamu en awonsu, chifanyidin ndiy kwikal kashalapol wen.
27 Ap anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen usotil kwikal muntu wa kusambish, chifanyidin ndiy kwikal muswik wenen.
28 Mwamu kand Mwan a Muntu kezap mulong wa kwisadil, pakwez weza mulong wa kuyisadil antu akwau, ni kupan kand mwom wend mulong wa kuyikwol antu avud.”
0 Yesu ukat kuyok amputames aad
29 Chadiokalay Yesu nau in kwilejend ku Yeriko, chisak chijim cha antu amulondula.
30 Amputames aad ading ashich kuns kwa njil. Chateshau anch, Yesu ukat kusut, asambisha kutazwok anch: “Mwant! Mwan a David! Itwovilap, amboku, riy!”
31 Antu avud ayibarokina anch: ““Nenetany zong!” Pakwez awiy apandakesha kutazwok anch: “Mwant! Mwan a David! Itwovilap, amboku, riy!”
32 Yesu wimana, wayitazuk, wayipul anch: “Ov, usotilany nikusadilany yom ik?”
33 Awiy amwakula anch: “Nsalejetu, itwoka mes chakwel tumana!”
34 Yesu wayovila riy, wayikwat makas pa mes mau. Pawiy kamu pinipa mes mau mayerika, aman, chad awiy amulondula.
0 Yesu ukat kwandam mu Yerusalem nich katumb
1 Chasejay Yesu ni in kwilejend piswimp ni ku Yerusalem, ashika ku ul wa Betefaj ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach. Chad Yesu wayitakejaku in kwilejend aad kurutu, 
2 wayilej anch: “Yangany ku ul udia kurutu kwen. Piukushikanya kwinikwa, ukutanany chimbur amukasin udi ni mwanend. Yisurilany, uyinletilany.
3 Anch muntu walond chom, mulejany anch: ‘Mwant uyiswiridin,’ chad ndiy ukuyipan swa.”
4 Yom yiney yamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Zakariy, muruu wa Nzamb, anch:
5 “Yilejany in musumb wa Sion anch: ‘Talany, mwant wen ukat kwez kudi en! Pakwez witudishin, wezidin pa chimbur, wezidin pa musamb wa chimbur.’ ” :
6 Chawiy in kwilej aya, asal yawonsu mudi mwayilejau kudi Yesu.
7 Awiy amutwala chimbur ni mwanend kudi Yesu. Ayanzuka annam inay maswin pa nyim. Chad Yesu wakandamap.
8 Chisak chijim cha antu ala tubwik twau mwi njil, akwau akatula yifukis ya mitond, ayala kand mwi njil.
9 Antu ading atakedil kurutu kwa Yesu, ni akwau ading amulondwila panyim, asambisha kutoy anch: “Mushimanany Mwan a David! Chifanyidin Nzamb amuyukish ndiy wezidila mu dijin dia Chinawej! Mushimanany Nzamb!”
10 Pandamay Yesu mu Yerusalem, musumb wawonsu warumbangana. Antu ipulijana anch: “Ov, winou nany?”
11 Yisak ya antu avud ayakula anch: “Udi Yesu, muruu wa Nzamb, ndiy udiokil ku Nazaret mwi ngand ya Galalia.”
0 Yesu ukat kwandam mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
12 Yesu wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad wayopat in kuland ni in kulandish. Wabumburola mes ma in kuswimpish nfalang, ni yipwan ya in kulandish atwinkudimb.
13 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Afundil mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Chikumbu chamam akez kuchitazuk anch, chikumbu cha kulembil.’ Pakwez en wachikarumwinany kal kwikal mandam mau ambwitan!”
14 Amputames ni ayilim eza kudi Yesu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad ndiy wayoka.
15 In kupesh ajim ni alej a Yijil ajimana pamanau yom yikwamushena yasalay, ni pateshau an akemp akat kubarok mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb anch: “Mushimanany Mwan a David!”
16 Chad awiy amwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, ey kiwovilap kwey yom yilondilau?” Yesu wayakula anch: “Mwawiy, novil. Ov, en kand kal utanganyap mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Ey wayileja kal anikanch ni an a ku mayel kukushiman ey.’ ”
17 Chawiy Yesu wayisha, wadiokal mu Yerusalem, waya ku ul wa Betaniy, chad ndiy walala kwinikwa.
0 Yesu ukat kuyindamish mutond wa nfung
18 Padingay Yesu ukat kuchirik ku Yerusalem pamanch, ndiy wova nzal.
19 Ndiy wamana mutond wa nfung kuns kwa njil, wayaku, pakwez katanakup chom, ching kusu mayij. Chad wawela mutond wa nfung anch: “Kukez kusongap kand dibuj ap dimwing!” Pawiy kamu pinipa mutond wa nfung wauma.
20 Chamanau in kwilej chom chinech, awiy ashimwoka nakash, amwipul anch: “Ov, mutapu ik mutond wa nfung winou chiwauma kal swa?”
21 Yesu wayakula anch: “Nakulejany chakin, anch ukwetany ritiy rakad kwidjidjek, kiukez kusalanyap ching kusu yinasala kal am ku mutond wa nfung winou, pakwez ukutwishany kand kuwel mukandu anch: ‘Diokal pinap, yang ukiyas mu karung,’ chad mukandu ukuya.
22 Anch ukwetany ritiy, ukez kutambulany yom yawonsu ukwitanya mu kulembil.”
0 Akat kwipul kwisu kudiokila ulabu wa Yesu
23 Yesu wandama kand mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wasambish kulejan. Chawiy in kupesh ajim, ni amakurump au in Yuda eza amwipul anch? “Ov, ulabu usadila nich yom yiney udiokil kwisu? Ov, nany ukwinkishina ulabu winou?”
24 Yesu wayakula anch: “Nisotil kukwipulany chom chimwing kusu, anch en wangakulany, niyam nikukulejany kwisu kudiokila ulabu unisadila nich yom yiney. 
25 Ov, nany wamutuma Yohan kubatishan, Nzamb anch antu?” Awiy asambisha kununganijan ayinau anch: “Anch twamwakul anch: ‘Nzamb ndiy wamutuma,’ ndiy ukutwel anch: ‘Ing, mulong wak walikany kwitiy mazu ma Yohan?’
26 Pakwez anch twamwakul anch: ‘Antu awiy amutuma,’ etu twovil wom wa antu, mulong awonsu atongin anch, Yohan wading chakin muruu wa Nzamb.”
27 Chawiy amwakula Yesu anch: “Kitwijap kwetu.” Chad Yesu wayakula anch: “Niyam lel kinikukulejanyap nany wintumina kusal yom yiney.
0 Chishimu cha an amakundj aad
28 “Ov, katat utongilany nchik? Kwading muntu umwing wading ukwet an amakundj aad. Ndiy waya, wamulej mwan wa kusambish anch: ‘Mwanam, yang ukasala mudimu ilel mu chir cha mitond ya nviny.’
29 Mwan winou wakula anch: ‘Kinikuyap kwam, bwat.’ Pakwez kwinyim wakarumuna muchim, waya.
30 Chad tatukwend waya, wamulej mwan mukwau anch: ‘Mwanam, yang ukasala mudimu ilel mu chir cha mitond ya nviny.’ Ndiy wakula anch: ‘Mwawiy, mwan.’ Pakwez ndiy kayap.
31 Ov, mwan ik wasala mudi mwading rusot ra tatukwend?” Awiy amwakula Yesu anch: “Mwan wa kusambish.” Chad Yesu wayileja anch: “Nakulejany chakin, in kulambwish yitad ni in kwimik dis akez kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb kurutu kwenen.
32 Mulong Yohan Mubatish weza kudi en mulong wa kukulejany njil yitentamina, chad en kiwitiyanyap. Pakwez in kulambwish yitad ni in kwimik dis amwitiya. Ap anch wamananyap nchik chom chinech, en kiwakarumukanyap kudiokal ku yitil yen mulong wa kumwitiy ndiy.”
0 Chishimu cha in kulam chir cha mitond ya nviny
33 Yesu walonda anch: “Teshany chishimu chikwau. Kwading muntu umwing wadima chir chend cha mitond ya nviny. Wachiteka mu chipang, wapunda dibuku dia kutatil maar ma nviny, watungamu ndond ya kalam. Wovijana nau antu mulong wa kumulamin chir, chad ndiy waya mwi ngand yikwau.
34 Pichashika chirung cha kupol mabuj, ndiy wayituma aswikend kudi antu ovijanay nau kulam chir, chakwel amutambwil chikunku chend cha mabuj mapolau.
35 Antu ina ayikwata aswikend. Umwing amubul, mukwau amujip, chad mukwau amwas mayal.
36 Mwin chir wayituma aswik akwau avud kupandakan a kusambish. In kulam chir ayisala kand chawiy chimwing.
37 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney yawonsu, ndiy wayituminay mwanend, watong anch: ‘Awiy akumulimish mwanam.’
38 Pakwez ovijanay nau kulam chir anunganijana anch: ‘Winou ndiy ukeza kuswan chir. Tumujipany chakwel uswan winou ukez kwikal wetwetu!’
39 Chawiy amukwata, amudjibul pol pa chir cha mitond ya nviny, amujip.”
40 Chad Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, mwin chir anch wez, ukez kuyisal nchik in kulam chir chend?”
41 Awiy amwakula anch: “Chakin, ndiy ukez kuyijip antu ina ayimp wakad riy. Chad ukez kwovijan nau antu akwau, in kuchilam akeza kumwinkishang chikunku chend cha mabuj pa chirung chau.”
42 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, kand kal utanganyap mazu minam mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Diyal dialikau in kutung, diawiy kamu dinidia dikala dijim diatekau pa dikonk. Chinawej ndiy. wasala yom yiney, yikwamushena ku mes metu!’ ”
43 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Chawiy nakulejany, akez kukwamukany Want wa Nzamb, akez kuupan kudi antu a muchid ukwau akata kusal mudi musotilay Nzamb.
44 Muntu mwawonsu ukeza kuwil pa diyal dined, ukez kubukok. Chad anch diyal diamuwil muntu, dikez kumupuchol, washal mudi rufunfut.”
45 In kupesh ajim nau Afaris atesha yishimu yatay Yesu, awiy ijika anch: “Ndiy utulondil etu.”
46 Chawiy apakisha kumukwat, pakwez awiy ova wom wa yisak ya antu ading amwitiyijin Yesu anch, udi muruu wa Nzamb.
0 Chishimu cha musambu wa kwatijan
1 Yesu wayitila kand antu yishimu yikwau, walond anch: 
2 “Want wa Mwiur ufanaken mudi chishimu chinech. Kwading mwant umwing wamurijekina mwanend ikundj musambu wa kwatan.
3 Ndiy wayituma atushalapol end kuyilej antu aladikijay anch: ‘Ezany katat ku musambu.’ Pakwez awiy alika kwau kwez.
4 Chawiy ndiy wayituma atushalapol end akwau kuyilej antu aladikijay anch: ‘Musambu wam katat wawanyin kal. Najipang kal amakwal a angomb awamp, ni annam akwau akweta many, yom yawonsu katat yawanyinang kal. Ezany ku musambu wa kwatan!’
5 Pakwez antu aladikijay kabangakup, ayawola kwau ku midimu yau. Umwing waya ku chir chend, mukwau waya mu kwisak,
6 akwau ayikwata atushalapol a mwant, ayibul, chad ayijip.
7 Mwant wajimana nakash, wayitum amasalay end mulong wa kuyijip in kujipan inay, ni kuyoshil musumb wau.
8 Chad ndiy wayitazuka atushalapol end, wayilej anch: ‘Musambu wam wa kwatan wawanyinang kal, pakwez antu inaladikijina kawanyidinap kwau kwez.
9 Katat yangany mu mikombil, utazukany antu awonsu ukumananya eza ku musambu.’
10 Chawiy atushalapol aya mu mikombil, ayikumangej antu awonsu amanau, ayimp ni awamp. Chad chikumbu cha musambu chizula sens nich antu.
11 “Mwant wandama mu chikumbu mulong wa kutal antu atazukau, chad wamumana muntu umwing kadjadilap maswin ma musambu wa kwatan.
12 Mwant wamwipula anch: ‘Murund nam, ov, mutapu ik wandamanga wakad kudjal maswin ma musambu wa kwatan?’ Pakwez muntu mwinou kalondap chom.
13 Chad mwant wayileja atushalapol end anch: ‘Mukasany ku makas ni ku mend, umudjibulany pol pajadila. Kwinikwa ndiy ukez kudil ni kwidia ku mazeu.’ ”
14 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Antu avud atazukau, pakwez akemp kusu atondau.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kulambul chitad
15 Afaris aya amupungan Yesu mutapu wa kumutent pa kan.
16 Awiy amutumina in kwilejau amwing, ni in ku mutambu wa Herod amwing, amwel anch: “Nsalejetu, etu twij anch ey udi mwin yakin. Ey kiukwetap kasolikany pakach pa
17 Tuleja bil, ov, utongil nchik? Ov, mu Yijil yetu chifanyidin kulambul chitad cha mwant wa in Rom, anch bwat?”
18 Pakwez Yesu wijika mpung yau yiyimp, wayel anch: “En in rubabek! Ov, mulong wak wintentinany pa kan?
19 Nletilany rufalang rin rikat kulambulau nich chitad!” Awiy amuletila rufalang rumwing,
20 chad ndiy wayipula anch: “Ov, chifu chinech ni dijin dined yidia pa rufalang riner yidi ya nany?”
21 Awiy amwakula anch: “Yidi ya mwant wa in Rom.” Chawiy Yesu wayileja anch: “Chiwamp, lambulany yom ya mwant wa in Rom kudi mwant wa in Rom, pakwez lambulany kand yom ya Nzamb kudi Nzamb.”
22 Awiy, chateshau yom yiney, ashimwoka nakash. Aya amusha Yesu.
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa afu
23 Dichuku dinidia kand Asadus amwing, awiy kamu akata kulondang anch, divumbuk dia afu kwikil, awiy eza kudi Yesu.
24 Awiy amwipula anch: “Nsalejetu, Moses walonda anch: ‘Anch ikundj wafa, wamusha mband wakad kuval nend, chifanyidin mwanchend kumuswan mwadiamufu chakwel ez amusakuril yayend muchid.’
25 Kunoku kwading an a kamuntu sambwad. Mukurump wamwata mband, chad ikundj wafa wakad kuval nend an. Wamusha mwadiamufu kudi mwanchend.
26 Chawiy chimwing, mwan wa kaad niyend wafa, ni wa kasatu, djat kamu ni mwan wa sambwad.
27 Chad kwinyim niyend mband wafa.
28 Katat, pa dichuku dikez kuvumbukau afu, ov, mband winou ukez kwikal wa nany anch an awonsu sambwad amwata?”
29 Yesu wayakula anch: “En urumbukinany! Chidi mulong kiwijanyap Mukand wa Nzamb ap ukash wend.
30 Pakez kuvumbukau afu, akez kwikal mudi aruu a mwiur, chad kakez kwatijanap kand, bwat.
31 Anch katat en wipulany mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa afu, ov, kand kal utanganyap yom yakulejanyay Nzamb? Ndiy walonda anch:
32 Yam Nzamb wa Aburaham, Nzamb wa Isak, yam kand Nzamb wa Jakob.’ Chawiy Nzamb kadiap Nzamb wa afu afila chikupu, mudi muukata kutongany en, pakwez udi Nzamb wa aom, ap anch afap nchik.”
33 Piyatesha yisak ya antu mwamu, ashimwoka nakash ku malejan mend.
0 Dilejan dipandakena kujimb
34 Afaris akumangana pamwingpateshau anch, Yesu wayakula Asadus akangany kuman mwakulondil.
35 Chad umwing wa Afaris wadinga mulej wa Yijil wamutenta Yesu pa kan anch:
36 “Nsalejam, ov, dilejan ik dipandakenamu malejan mawonsu kujimb?”
37 Yesu wamwakula anch: “ ‘Mukata Chinawej Nzamb wey nich muchim wey wawonsu, ni mupim wey wawonsu, ni manangu mey mawonsu.’
38 Dined diawiy dilejan dijim dipandakenamu malejan mawonsu.
39 Dilejan dia: kaad dipandakena kujimb diawiy ed: ‘Mukata mukwen mudi muwikatila ey amwiney.’
40 Yijil yawonsu ya Moses ni malejan mawonsu ma aruu a Nzamb yiminy pa yijil yiney yaad.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa Kristu Uzizidilau Many
41 Pakumanganau Afaris amwing, Yesu wayipula anch:
42 “Ov, en utongilany nchik mulong wa Kristu Uzizidilau Many? Ov, ndiy udi wa dijuku ik?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Ndiy udi wa dijiuku dia David.”
43 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, mulong wak Mwiku Utumbila wamuleja David manangu ma kumupil anch: ‘Nsalejam’? David walonda anch:
44 ‘Chinawej wamuleja Nsalejam anch: Shakam kwey ku chikas cham cha katatuku, kushik ni pinikuyiteka akankuny ney mwishin mwa yidjatil yey.’
45 Anch David amwinend wamupila Kristu Uzizidilau Many anch: Nsalejam,’ ing, mutapu ik ukwikalay ching kusu mwan wa dijuku diend?”
46 Kwikil muntu watwisha kumwakul Yesu, chad kudiokal dichuku dinidia kwikil muntu wapakamu kumwipul.
0 Yesu ukat kuyibabesh antu mulong wa alej a Yijil, ni Afaris
1 Chawiy Yesu wayileja yisak ya antu ni in kwilejend anch:
2 “Alej a Yijil nau Afaris akwet ulabu wa kurumburil Yijil ya Moses.
3 En ufanyidinany kuziyil ni kulondul yom yawonsu yikulejinanyau kusal. Pakwez kangal wayilakejany ku yom yisadilau, mulong awiy ayinau kakat kusalap yom yilejenau.
4 Awiy akat kuyitwik antu akwau yisend yilimina, pakwez kitiyinap kupukunaku ap kusu muny mulong wa kuyikwashaku kusend.
5 Awiy akat kusal yom yawonsu chakwel antu ayiman. Akat kudjal pa mpal ni ku makas tumafund tukweta yikunku ya mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb, chad akat kwijimbish mulong wa kwimekesh! Akat kulepish kand nzez ja yidjal yau.
6 Awiy akatil kushakam pa yipwan yiwamp ya katumb mu yikumbu ya kulembil.
7 Akatil antu kuyilangwish nich kalimish mu yiku, akatil kand antu kuyitazuk anch: ‘Mulej.’
8 Pakwez kichifanyidinap kukutazukany en anch: ‘Mulej,’ mulong en awonsu udiany akadivar mu ritily, umwing ni mukwau. En ukwetany Mulej ching kusu umwing.
9 Kichifanyidinap en kumutazuk muntu wa pa mangand anch: ‘Tatuku,’ mulong ukwetany Tatukwen ching kusu umwing udia mwiur.
10 Ap kichifanyidinap kukutazukany en anch: ‘Mwin Kutakel,’ mulong ukwetany Mwin Kutakel ching kusu umwing, ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
11 Muntu upandakena kujimb pakach pen ufanyidin kwikal kashalapol wen.
12 Muntu mwawonsu ukeza kwijimbish amwinend, akez kumushikumwish, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kwishikumwish amwinend, akez kumujimbish.
0 Yesu ukat kuyifish nich in rubabek
13 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! En ukat kuyipatilany antu chis cha Want wa Mwiur mulong wa kuyikangesh kwandam, pakwez en ayinen kiusotilanyap kwandam. Ukat kuyikangeshany kand antu akwau apakishina kwandam!
14 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! Ukat kwamukany yikumbu ya adiaafu, ukat kulondany mazu mavud mamwamu mu kulembil kwen mulong wa kwimekesh! Mulong wa yom yiney akez kukulejany kadimu kupandakan!
15 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! Ukat kwendanganany mu mangand mawonsu ni kwawok aturung, mulong wa kumukarumun muntu umwing kwikal mwin chisak chen. Chad anch wakarumuk en ukat kumuyipishany nakash kupandakanamu en ayinen, chakwel ndiy ufanyidin kwandam mu Dijiy dia Kasu mudi en ayinen.
16 “Riyind kudi en in kutakel udianya amputames! En ukat kuyilejany antu anch: ‘Anch muntu washilamu kupan chom kudi Nzamb ap kumusadil, chad wachipil mu dijin dia Chikumbu cha Nzamb, kakumushindilap muntu mwinou kuwanyish kushilamu kwend. Pakwez anch washilamu kusal mwamu, chad wachipil mu dijin dia yom ya utad wa or yidia mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, akumushindil muntu mwinou kuwanyish kushilamu kwend.’
17 En ayisup amputames! Chikumbu cha Nzamb chikata kutumbish yom ya utad wa or, chawiy chidia chijim kupandakanamu yom ya utad wa or yidiamu.
18 En ukat kulejanany kand anch: ‘Anch muntu washilamu kupan chom kudi Nzamb ap kumusadil, chad wachipil mu dijin dia chintamb, kakumushindilap muntu mwinou kuwanyish kushilamu kwend. Pakwez anch washilamu kusal mwamu, chad wachipil mu dijin dia yakupesh yidia pa chintamb, akumushindil muntu mwinou kuwanyish kushilamu kwend.’
19 En udiany amputames! Chintamb chikata kutumbish yakupesh, chawiy chidia chijim kupandakanamu yakupesh.
20 Chawiy pakat kuchipilay muntu mu dijin dia chintamb, ukat kuchipil ku chintamb ni ku yakupesh yawonsu yidiap.
21 Chawiy pakat kuchipilay muntu mu dijin dia Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ukat kuchipil ku Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ni kudi Nzamb amwinend ushichamu.
22 Chawiy pakat kuchipilay kand muntu mu dijin dia mwiur, ukat kuchipil ku ditand dia Nzamb ni kudi ndiy ushichap.
23 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! En ukat kupanany chadikum kudi Nzamb cha yom yikata kuwapish yakudia mudi ndung, ni tumayij, ni tuyom tukwau tukata kulet res ku yakudia. Pakwez ukat kulikany kuziyil ku malejan mapandakena kujimb ma Yijil mudi dirumburish ditentamina, ni riy, ni uyakin. Yawiy yom yiney yifanyidina kusal wakad kudiul yom yikwau.
24 En in kutakel udianya amputames! En ukat kulamany tuyijil tukemp mudi ukat kutatany yom yen ya kuna mulong wa kudiosh kapwapu, pakwez ukat kujipany Yijil yipandakena kujimb ya Nzamb!
25 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! En ukat kwoyishany piur pa rupas ni pa dilong, pakwez mukach mwizwil sens nich yom yiwapitanya ku chisum ni ku ris.
26 En Afaris amputames! Oyishany bil pakusambish mukach mwa rupas, chad lel piur niyau pakwikal patok!
27 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in tubabek! Udiany mudi jinzay jitokishinau piur nich mpemb, jimeken jiwamp piur, pakwez mukach mwizwil nich mafup ma afu ni mijimbu yivundila.
28 Chawiy chimwing, umekenany antu awamp piur, pakwez mukach mwizwil nich rubabek ni yitil. Nzamb ukez kuyilej alej a Yijil ni Afaris kadimu
29 “Riyind kudi en alej a Yijil ni Afaris! En udiany in rubabek! Ukat kutungany jinzay jiwamp ja aruu a Nzamb, ukat kuriyekany yivurikish ya antu adinga atentamina.
30 En ukat kufany mu kan anch: ‘Anch twading aom pa chirung cha anshankuretu, ing, kitwasalap yom mudi yasalau awiy kuyijip aruu a Nzamb.’
31 Mwamu, chakin, ukat kwitiyany anch, udiany a majuku ma antu ayijipanga aruu a Nzamb!
32 Dandamenany, uwanyishany yom yasambishau anshankuren kusdl!
33 En annak! Udiany mudi chisak cha annak! Ov, en ukutwishany nchik kwiyep kwandam mu Dijiy dia Kasu?
34 Chawiy nakulejany, mulong wa chom chinech nikez kukutuminany aruu a Nzamb, ni in manangu, ni alej. Amwing ukez kuyijipany, akwau ukez kuyipampilany ku mitond yichikakena, akwau ukez kuyibudilany nfimbu mu yikumbu ya kulembil, chad ukez kuyipompatany mu musumb ni musumb.
35 Chawiy akez kukulejany kadimu mulong wa antu awonsu akad mulong wajipanya, kudiokal ku rufu ra Abel wajipanya wakad mulong, djat ni ku rufu ra Zakariy, mwan wa Berekia wajipinanya pakach pa Ndond Yitumbila ni chintamb.
36 Nakulejany chakin, antu a chirung chinech akez kuyilej kadimu mulong wa rufu ra antu inay awonsu!
0 Yesu ukatil Yerusalem!
37 “A! En in Yerusalem, in Yerusalem! Wajipinany kal aruu a Nzamb, wayasinany mayal aruu akutuminanyay Nzamb! Tupamp tuvud am nasota kukukumangejinany pamwing mudi mukat kukumangejay nzol anend mu jimpur. Pakwez en walikanya!
38 Chawiy katat Chikumbu chen cha Nzamb chikez kushal chamwamu mwakad antu.
39 Nakulejany chakin, kudiokal katat kiukez kwinmananyap kand djat ni ku chisu chiukeza kulondany anch: ‘Nzamb amuyukish wezidila mu dijin dia Chinawej.’
0 Yesu ukat kulejan mulong wa kusheshik kwa Chikumbu cha Nzamb
1 Chadiokalay Yesu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, in kwilejend eza kudi ndiy, amulej kutal mutapu utunginau Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni yikumbu yikwau yidiaku.
2 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Mwaning, en umenany yom yiney yawonsu. Nakulejany chakin, kwikil diyal dimwing dikeza kushal piur pa dikwau, mawonsu akez kumabumwon.”
0 Mar ni kuzengol yikeza kwez
3 Pashakamay Yesu pa mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach, in kwilejend eza kudi ndiy ku ujindj, amwipul anch: “Ov, chisu ik chikeza kushik yom yiney, ap chijingidij ik chikeza kulejan chisu cha kushik kwey, ni cha disudiel dia mangand.”
4 Yesu wayakula anch: “Babalany, chakwel kangal muntu wakudimbany.
5 Antu avud akez kufa mu kan, akez kulondil mu dijin diam anch: ‘Am yam Kristu Uzizidilau Many!’ Chad akez kuyidimb antu avud.
6 Ukez kuteshany jinsangu ja njit ja piswimp ap ja kulemp, pakwez kangal wakamany. Yom yiney yifanyidin kumekan, pakwez kidiawiyap kal disudiel dia mangand.
7 Muchid ukez kurish ni muchid ukwau, want ukez kurish ni want ukwau. Kukez kwikal kamungun ni kunyikek kwa ngand ku jindond jivud.
8 Yom yiney yawonsu yidi disambishil dia mar.
9 “Pa chisu chinicha akez kukukwatany ni kukupanany mulong wa kukumeshany mar, ni kukujipany. Antu awonsu akez kukukisany mulong wa kwingambat am.
10 Pa chisu chinicha, antu avud akez kulik ritiy rau, muntu ni muntu ukez kumutungun mukwau ni kukisijan.
11 Aruu a makasu akez kumekan, akez kuyidimb antu avud.
12 Kuyip kukez kuvulijan, chad rukat ra antu avud rukez kukep.
13 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kujijaman mu ritiy djat ni ku rufu rend, Nzamb ukez kumupandish.
14 Chifanyidin Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb ez arulejan bil ku mangand mawonsu ni kwikal uman kudi antu a michid yawonsu, chad lel disudiel dia mangand dieza.
0 Mukish Utakanena wa Kusheshan
15 “En ukez kumanany Mukish Utakanena wa Kusheshan walonday Daniel, muruu wa Nzamb. Akez kumwimik mwi Ndond Yitumbila.” (Chifanyidin mwin kutang mazu minam atesha yom yiney nawamp!)
16 “Pa chisu chinicha chifanyidin antu awonsu adia mu Yudeya achinyin ku mikandu.
17 Muntu ushicha pa nsiny yalalela ya chikumbu chend, kangal washirik kwandam mu chikumbu mulong wa kunon yom yend.
18 Niyend muntu udia mu chir, kangal wachirik ku chikumbu mulong wa kunon kabwik wend.
19 Mu machuku minima kukez kwikal mar makash kudi amband imishina, ni kudi amband akweta an a ku mayel!
20 Mulembilany Nzamb, chakwel yom yiney kangal yez yishiken pa chirung cha mashik ap pa Dichuku dia K wiswedish!
21 Mulong mar ma machuku minima makez kwikal mayimp, kupandakan mar mamanau antu kudiokal ku disambishil dia mangand kushik ni katat. Kukez kwikalap kand mar ma mutapu winou chikupu.
22 Pakwez Nzamb watonda kal kukepish kuvul kwa machuku minam. Anch ndiy kasalap mwamu, ing kwikil muntu wela kupand. Pakwez Nzamb ukez kukepish kuvul kwa machuku minam mulong wa antwend atonday.
23 “Chad anch muntu wakulejany anch: ‘Talany, Kristu Uzizidilau Many ndiy ou!’ ap anch: ‘Ndiy wa!’ kangal
24 Kukez kumekan antu a makasu akeza kufa mu kan anch, adi Kristu Uzizidilau Many, ap akeza kufa mu kan anch, adi aruu a Nzamb. Antu inay akez kusal yilay ni yom yikwamushena mulong wa kupakish kuyidimb antu atonday Nzamb.
25 Babalany! Nakulejangany kal yom yawonsu piyakadia kal kumekan.
26 “Ap anch antu akulejany anch: ‘Talany, udi mwi mpay!’ Kangal wayanyaku. Ap anch akulejany anch: ‘Talany, ndiy ujingamin kunoku!’ Kangal witiyany.
27 Mulong kushik kwa Mwan a Muntu kukez kwikal mudi mulayilay ukata kusut mwiur ni kutokish mutambu wa kwingangel, djat ni mutambu wa kurand.
28 “Kwawonsu kudia chom chifila, kwawiy kukez kukumangenau amakub.”
0 Mwan a Muntu ukeza kwez
29 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Pakwez anch machuku minima ma mar mapwa, muten ukez kujal, ni ngond kakez kumunyikap kand. Atutumbu akez kudiokal mwiur, apalik, ni ukash ulamina yom ya piur ukez kunyikek.
30 Chijingidij cha Mwan a Muntu chikez kumekan mwiur. Chad antu awonsu a pa mangand akez kudil pakez kumumanau Mwan a Muntu ukat kwez mu madj ma mwiur nich ukash ni uyaj ujim.
31 Akez kubul mpuny yijim, chad ukez kuyitum aruu a mwiur kuya ku mitambu ni mitambu ya ngand, mulong wa kuyikumangej antu atonday Nzamb adia ku mitambu yawonsu ya ngand.
0 Malejan ma chilikej cha mutond wa nfung
32 “Ilejany malejan milikejinau nich mutond wa nfung. Anch mitiy yau yasambish kufufumwok, chad yasapuk mayij, en ukat kwijikany anch, chirung cha ruvul chidi piswimp.
33 Chawiy chimwing kand, anch wamanany yom yiney yawonsu yikat kushik, ukez kwijikany anch, Mwan a Muntu udi piswimp, udi kamu ku chis.
34 Chakin kamu, nakulejany anch, antu adia aom ay kakufap awonsu wakad yom yiney yawonsu kumekan.
35 Diur ni divu yikez kujiy, pakwez mazu mam kimakez kujiyap.
0 Kwikil wija dichuku ap chisu
36 “Kwikil muntu wija kushik kwa dichuku dinidia ap kwa chisu chinicha. Aruu a mwiur kijap, ap Mwan, ching kusu Tatuku ndiy wija amwinend.
37 Yom yasuta pa chirung cha Nowa. yawiy kand yikeza kusut pa chirung cha Mwan a Muntu.
38 Mu machuku mading mabeb kand kal mashika, antu ading ni kudiang ni kuna, amakundj ni amband atijananga djat ni-ku dichuku diandamay Nowa mu waat.
39 Awiy kijikap chom chikushika djat ni pezina mabeb mayijiyish awonsu shutit. Yom yiney yikez kwikal kand mwamu pa dichuku dikez kwezay Mwan a Muntu.
40 Pa chisu chinicha antu aad akez kusal mudimu mu chir. Umwing akez kumusend kudi Nzamb, pakwez mukwau ukez kushal.
41 Amband aad akez kutwa pamwing, chad akez kumusend mband umwing kudi Nzamb, pakwez mukwau ukez kushal.
42 Chawiy, babalany, mulong kiwijanyap dichuku dikez kushikay Nsalejen.
43 Anch mwin chikumbu wadi wij chisu chikwezay mwij, ing ndiy wakera tul mulong wa kumukangesh mwij kubuz chikumbu ni kwandam.
44 Chawiy chifanyidin kand niyen kwirijek yisu yawonsu, mulong Mwan a Muntu ukwez pa chisu chiwakadiany en kwijik.
0 Atushalapol akin ni akad akin
45 “Ov, nany kashalapol wakin ukweta manangu? Ndiy kamu ukwinkishau mudimu wa kulam atushalapol akwau ni kuyangen yakudia pa chisu chiwanyidina.
46 Wayuk kwend kashalapol pakuchirikay mwant wend, anch wamutan ukat kusal mudimu winou!
47 Nakulejany chakin kamu, mwant ukumwinkish kashalapol winou ukurump wa kulam yom yend yawonsu.
48 Pakwez anch ndiy udi kashalapol muyimp, ukutong anch: ‘Mwant wam kakuchirikap kwend swa.’
49 Chad ukusambish kuyibul atushalapol akwau, wasambish kudia ni kuna nau in kukwachik maar.
50 Chawiy mwant wend ukez kumukashimwish chisu chakadiay ndiy kwijik.
51 Chad mwant wend ukez kumufish nich kwa kumujip, ukez kumutek ku mutambu umwing nau antu in rubabek. Kwinikwa ndiy ukez kudil ni kwidia ku mazeu.
0 Chishimu cha ayangadim dikum akad kal kwachik
1 “Pa chisu chikez kushikay Mwan a Muntu, Want wa Mwiur ukez kufanakan mudi chishimu ech. Kwading ayangadim dikum akad kal kwachik. Anona mend yau ya kasu, aya ni kumusankan ngatan.
2 Ayangadim atan ading ayisup, pakwez atan akwau ading ababel.
3 Ayangadim ayisup anona mend yau ya kasu, pakwez kasendap many makwau ma kuwejaku.
4 Ayangadim ababela asenda kand many makwau mu milond ma kuwejaku.
5 Ngatan walaba kushik, chawiy ayangadim awonsu asambisha kuzel, alal tul. Mend ya kasu ya kutek many
6 “Chimwikala mwidingding mwa uchuku, omba rubil anch: ‘Ngatan ukat kwez! Ezany, umusankanany!’
7 Ayangadim dikum alanka, arijek mend yau ya kasu.
8 Chad ayangadim ayisup ayita ayangadim akwau atan ababela anch: ‘Itwinkishanyap many men, mulong mend yetu ya kasu yisotil kujim.’
9 Ayangadim ababela ayakula anch: “‘Bwat, kwamwamu many mawanyidina kudi en ni kudi etu kand. Yangany kudi in kwisak, ukalandany.’
10 Chawiy ayangadim ayisup aya ni kuland many. Payau ni kuland, ngatan washika. Ayangadim atan ababela ading irijekina andama nend ku musambu wa kwatan, chad apata ku chis.
11 “Chipasuta chisu, niyau ayangadim ayisup ashika. Awiy atazuka anch: ‘Mwant! Mwant! Itwanzurila ku chis!’
12 Ngatan wayakula anch: ‘Nakulejany chakin, kinikwijanyap kwam.’
13 Chad Yesu walonda kand anch: “Chawiy, babalany, mulong kiwijanyap dichuku ap chisu chikwezay Mwan a Muntu.
0 Chishimu cha atushalapol asatu
14 “Pa chisu chikez kushikay Mwan:a Muntu, Want wa Mwiur ukez kufanakan mudi chishimu ech. Kwading muntu wasota kudiokal kwol kwend, kuya mu weny. Ndiy wayitazuka atushalapol end, wayinkish mudimu wa kulam yom yend yawonsu.
15 Wayangena nfalang ja kumwisakil nich, muntu ni muntu mudi mwading manangu mend.» Umwing watambula nfalang tunan tutan ja utad wa or, mukwau watambula nfalang tunan twaad, chad mukwau watambula nfalang kanan. Chad muntu mwinou waya mu weny wend.
16 Kashalapol watambula nfalang tunan tutan, waya swa, wakisak nich, chad wisakilap nfalang jikwau tunan tutan. !
17 Chawiy chimwing, niyend kashalapol watambula nfalang tunan twaad, waya wakisak nich, chad wisakilap nfalang jikwau tunan twaad.
18 Pakwez kashalapol watambula nfalang kanan kamwing, waya wakapund dibuku pansh, wajindjikap nfalang ja nsalejend.
19 “Chipasuta chisu chilemp, mwant wa atushalapol inay wachirika, chad wasambish kuchind nau nfalang jayinkishay ja kumwisakil nich.
20 Kashalapol watambula nfalang tunan tutan weza, wamwinkisha nfalang jikwau tunan tutan. Wamuleja anch: ‘Mwant, ey wanginkisha nfalang tunan tutan, katat nisak kal jikwau tunan tutan.’
21 Mwant wend wamwela anch: ‘Chiwamp, ey udi kashalapol muwamp, mwin yakin! Ey wadi mwin yakin mu yom yikemp, chawiy am nikukutek ey kwikal mwin kulam yom yivud. Ez wandam, tusangar pamwing ni yamam!’
22 “Chad niyend kashalapol watambula nfalang tunan twaad wandama, walond anch: ‘Mwant, ey wanginkisha nfalang tunan twaad, katat nisak kal jikwau tunan twaad.’
23 Mwant wend wamwela anch: ‘Chiwamp, ey udi kashalapol muwamp, mwin yakin! Ey wadi mwin yakin mu yom yikemp, chawiy am nikukutek ey kwikal mwin kulam yom yivud. Ez wandam, tusangar pamwing ni yamam!’
24 “Chad niyend kashalapol watambula nfalang kanan wandama, walond anch: ‘Mwant, am nadi nij anch, ey udi muntu mukash, ey ukat kwangul yom yiwakad kudim, ukat kukumangej yom yiwakad ey kukus mbut.
25 Nova wom, naya, najindjik nfalang jey pansh. Tal! Nfalang jey ej kamu gj.’
26 Mwant wend wamwela anch: ‘Ey udi kashalapol muyimp, ukwet usweral! Ey wadi wij anch, nikat kwangul yom yinakad kudim, nikat kukumangej kand yom yinakad kukus mbut.
27 Anch mwamu, ing mulong wak walika kuyinkish in kwisak nich? Ing pineza kal ap, nelang kutambul nich diyanzukesh.
28 Katat mutambulany nfalang kanan, chad jipanany kudi kashalapol ukweta nfalang tunan dikum.
29 Mulong muntu mwawonsu ukweta chom, Nzamb ukez kumuwejinaku yikwau, chawiy ukez kwikal nich yom yivud nakash. Pakwe uburedina, Nzamb ukez kumwamuk kakemp kakwetay.
30 Chawj kashalapol winou muyimp, mudjibulany pol mu mididj Kwinikwa ukudil, ni kwidia ku mazeu.’ ”
0 Dirumburish dia kwisudiel
31 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Pakwezay Mwan/ mudi Mwant pamwing nau aruu end awonsu a m kushakam pa ditand diend dia uyaj.
32 Antu a mic akez kukumangan kurutu kwend. Chad ukez kuyauri yaad, mudi mukat kwaurilay kafung amikoku ni ampemb.
33 Ukez kutek antu adia mudi amikoku ku chikas chend cha katatuku, pakwez antu adia mudi ampemb ukez kuyitek ku chikas chend cha kamaku.
34 Chad ndiy Mwant ukez kuyilej antu adia ku chikas chend cha katatuku anch: ‘Ezany, en antu ayukishau kal kudi Tatukwam! Ezany, uswanany Want wakurijekinanyau kudiokal ku disambishil dia mangand.
35 Am nading novil nzal, en wanginkishanya yakudia, nading mweny, en wangakanya kwol kwen.
36 Nading ni mudj, en wanginkishanya ya kudjal. Nading muyej, en wanlamanya, nading mu rukan, en wezany ni kwintal.’
37 “Antu atentamina akez kumwakul anch: ‘Nsalejetu, ov, chisu ik twakumana ey wovil nzal, chad etu twakwinkish yakudia, ap chisu ik chiwadinga ey wovil impu, chad etu twakwinkish yakuna?
38 Ov, chisu ik chiwadinga ey mweny, chad etu twakwak kwol kwetu, ap chisu ik chiwadinga ey nich mudj, chad etu twakudjik?
39 Ov, chisu ik chiwadinga ey uyedil, ap chiwadinga ey mu rukan, chad etu twez twakutal?’
40 Chad Mwant ukez kuyakul anch: ‘Nakulejany chakin, tupamp twawonsu tuwasalanya yom yiney kudi umwing wa antu amwamu adia mudi anamakwam, wasalanya yom yiney kudi am!’
41 “Chad ndiy ukez kuyilej antu adia ku chikas chend cha kamaku anch: ‘Ndiokalany, yangany kulemp, en akufishilany kal nich kudi Nzamb! Yangany mu kasu kakad kujimang kamurijekinau Sakudimban pamwing ni aruu end!
42 Nading novil nzal, pakwez en kiwanginkishanyap yakudia. Nading novil impu, pakwez en kiwanginkishanyap yakuna.
43 Nading mweny, pakwez en kiwangakanyap kwol kwen. Nading nich mudj, pakwez en kiwandjikanyap maswin. Nading niyedil, nading kand mu rukan, pakwez en kiwantalanyap.’
44 “Chad awiy akez kumwakul anch: ‘Nsalejetu, ov, chisu ik twakumana ey wovil nzal, ap wovil impu, ap udi mweny, ap ukwet mudj, ap uyedil, ap udi mu rukan, chad etu twalik kukukwash?’
45 Mwant ukez kuyakul anch: ‘Nakulejany chakin, tupamp twawonsu tuwalikanya kumukwash umwing wa antu amwamu, walikanya kwinkwash am.’
46 Antu inay adia ku chikas chend cha kamaku, akez kuyitwal mulong wa kuyilej kadimu ka chikupu, pakwez antu atentamina adia ku chikas chend cha katatuku, akez kwandam mu mwom wa chikupu.”
0 Akat kumupungan Yesu
1 Chapwishay Yesu kulejan yom yiney yawonsu, wayilej in kwilejend anch:
2 “En wijany kal nawamp anch, kwashal kal machuku maad ni kushika ku musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej. Chad Mwan a Muntu akumupan mulong wa kumupamp ku mutond uchikakena.”
3 Chad in kupesh ajim ni amakurump au in Yuda akumangana pamwing mu chikumbu cha Kaifas, mwin kupesh mujim.
4 Awiy apungana mulong wa kumukwat Yesu ku ujindj chakwel amujip.
5 Awiy alondanga anch: “Kichifanyidinap kumukwat pa chisu cha musambu, chamwamu antu akez kulet kanvundangesh.”
0 Mband ukat kumuzizil Yesu malash pa mutu
6 Yesu wading mu ul wa Betaniy mu chikumbu cha Simon mwin musong wa mak.
7 Padingay Yesu ukat kudia, mband umwing wandama nich kasab ka diyal dia alibater kizwil nich malash ma usey ukash, wamuzizila Yesu malash minam pa mutu.
8 In kwilej, chamanau yom yiney, ova ujim, alond anch: “Ov, mulong wak chasheshay kal malash minam?
9 Chad chifanyidin kumalandish ku usey ujim chakwel nfalang jinej ayinkisha atuzwendj!”
10 Yesu wijika yom yalondangau, chad wayela anch: “Ov, mulong wak umumeshinanya mband winou mar? Chom chasalangay kudi am chidi chom chiwamp cha ufun.
11 En ushichany nau atuzwendj machuku mawonsu, pakwez kiukushakamanyap ni yamam machuku mawonsu.
12 Ndiy wawichil kal mujimbu wam malash, waurijek kal pakadiau kal kuujik.
13 Nakulejany chakin anch, ku mangand mawonsu kukez kulejanau Rusangu Ruwamp, chom chasalay mband winou akez kuchilejan kwikal chivurikish chend.”
0 Yudas ukat kwitiy kumutungun Yesu matungu
14 Chad umwing wa in kwilej dikum ni aad, dijin diend Yudas Isakariot, waya kudi in kupesh ajim.
15 Ndiy wayipula anch: “Ov, anch nakwinkishanyay Yesu, en ukwinfutany yom ik?” Awiy amuchindila nfalang makum masatu ja utad wa argent, chad amwinkish.
16 Kudiokal pa chisu chinicha, Yudas wasambisha kukimb chisu chiwamp cha kumupan Yesu kudi awiy.
0 Yesu nau in kwilejend adi ku musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej
17 Pa dichuku dia kusambish dia musambu wa mabot makad chivish, in kwilej amwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, kwisu usotila etu tuya tukakurijekin musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej?”
18 Yesu wayakula anch: “Yangany mu musumb kn! muntu umwing, umulejany anch: ‘Nsalejetu ulondil anch Chisu cham chawanyin kal. Am ni in kwilejam tukez kudil musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej kwol kwey.’ ”
19 In kwilej asala mudi mwayilejau kudi Yesu, arijeka musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
20 Chikwazweka urel, Yesu nau in kwilejend ashakama ku mes mulong wa kudia.
21 Padingau ni kudia, Yesu walonda anch: “Nakulejany chakin anch, umwing wa pakach penen ukez kwintungun.”
22 In kwilejend ova ushon nakash. Umwing ni umwing wasambisha kumwipul anch: “Ov, Nsalejam, am nikutwish kusal mwamu?”
23 Yesu wakula anch: “Umwing ubandila dibot mu dilong pamwing ni yamam, ndiy ukwintunguna.
24 Mwan a Muntu ukez kufa mudi mwafundau yendendiy mu Mukand wa Nzamb. Pakwez riyind kudi muntu ukumutunguna Mwan a Muntu! Chading chifanyidin ing muntu mwinou kavadikap kwend!”
25 Yudas, mwin kumutungun Yesu, wipula anch: “Ov, Nsalejam, am nikutwish kusal mwamu?” Yesu wamwakula anch: “Yey walondamu kal.”
0 Chivurikish cha Mes ma Mwant
26 Padingau ni kudia, Yesu wanona dibot, walembil mulong wa kumujikitish Nzamb, chad wadiumbwol, wayinkish in kwilejend. Wayileja anch: “Tambulany, diangany dibot dined, wawiy mujimbu wam.”
27 Chad wanona kand rupas, wamujikitish Nzamb, warupan kudi awiy, wayilej anch: “Nangany en awonsu.
28 Minam mawiy mash mam ma kukasikesh nich manswik ma Nzamb. Mash minam mawiy madjishilau mulong wa antu avud chakwel Nzamb ukuyilikishin yitil.
29 Nakulejany chakin anch, kinikez kunap kand maar ma nviny minam, djat ni ku dichuku dinikeza kuna pamwing ni yenen maar ma nviny masu mu Want wa Tatukwam.”
30 Chawiy awanga muminy, chad abudik, aya ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach.
0 Yesu ukat kulond anch, Pita ukez kumutun
31 Chad Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Uchuku winou kamu en awonsu ukez kwinchinany, wanshany amwinam, mudi mwafundau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Nzamb ukez kumujip kafung, chad amikoku awonsu a chisak akez kupalangan.’
32 Pakwez pinikeza kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom, nikez kutakelaku kuya ku Galalia.”
33 Pita wamwakula Yesu anch: “Ap anch akwetu awonsu akuchin, am kinikutwishap kusal mwamu, bwat!”
34 Yesu wamwela Pita anch: “Nakulej chakin kamu anch, uchuku winou pakadiay kal chikalambol kutend, ey ukez kwintun tupamp tusatu.”
35 Pita wamwakula anch: “Ap kufa, nikufa ni yeyey pamwing, pakwez kinikukutunap, bwat!” Niyau in kwilej akwau awonsu alonda kand mwamu.
0 Yesu ukat kulembil mu chir cha Getiseman
36 Chad Yesu waya nau in kwilejend kwi ndond yipidilau anch Getiseman, wayilej anch: “En shakamany pinap piniyila kwa mulong wa kulembil.”
37 Ndiy wamusenda Pita ni an amakundj aad a Zebede, awiy kamu Jakobu ni Yohan. WwW asambisha kwov ushon ni kunenganan nakash.
38 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Muchim wam wizwil sens nich ushon wa rufu. Shalany pinap, uchishangany ku mes pamwing ni yamam.”
39 Ndiy wendaku chintampu, wabwikam pansh, walembila anch: “A! Tatukwam, anch ukutwish, ndoshila rupas ra kwikonk, rutwala kulemp! Ap mwamwap nchik, kangal chikala mudi munisotila am, pakwez chikala kwau mudi muusotila ey.
40 Yesu, chachirikay, wayitana in kwilej asatu alalang kal tul. Chad wamwela Pita anch: “Ov, en kiwatwishanganyap kuchish ku mes pamwing ni yamam ap chisu chimwing kusu?
41 Chishany ku mes, chad lembilany chakwel kangal wawany mu yoziu. Muchim wa muntu usotil kusal nawamp, pakwez ndiy kakwetap usu.”
42 Yesu waya kand kapamp kakwau, walembil anch: “A! Tatukwam, anch chikasiken kudiosh rupas riner ra kwikonk anch ching kamu kurunang, chifanyidin rusot rey rusadik.”
43 Ndiy wachirika kapamp kakwau, wayitan in kwilejend alalang kal tul. Awiy katwishap kuchish ku mes.
44 Yesu wayisha kand, waya ni kulembil kapamp ka chisatu, walonda mazu mawiy mamwing.
45 Chad ndiy wachirika kand kudi in kwilejend, wayel anch: “Ov, ni katat uchilelany, ukat kwiswedishany kwen? Talany, chisu chashik kal cha kumupan Mwan a Muntu mu makas ma in yitil.
46 Tumbukany, tuyany. Talany, mwin kwintungun ou kamu ou!”
0 Akat kumukwat Yesu a
47 Padingay Yesu ni kulond, Yudas, ndiy umwing wa in kwilej dikum ni aad, washika. Ndiy weza pamwing ni chisak chijim cha antu atumau kudi in kupesh ajim, ni amakurump au in Yuda. Ading akwet jimpak ja misamun ni tubul.
48 Yudas, mwin kumutungun Yesu, wading wayilejang kal antu chijingidij anch: “Ikundj mwawonsu unikubwikatijana nend ni kumususu, ndiy kamu winiwa usotilanya. Mukwatany!”
49 Yudas waya kamu kudi Yesu, wamwel anch: “Muley, vudie vudie, mwan.” Chad wamubwikata, wamususu.
50 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Murund nam, sal kwey yom yiwezilang kusal!” Chad awiy amukwata Yesu, amulam ku makas.
51 Umwing wa antu adingay nend Yesu wapurila mpak yend ya musamun, wakatul ditu dia muswik wa mwin kupesh mujim.
52 Chawiy Yesu wamuleja anch: “Chirish mpak yey mu chilal, mulong muntu mwawonsu ukata kurish nich mpak ya musamun, akez kumujip kand kwi mpak ya musamun.
53 Oy, ey kiwijap anch, nikutwish kumutazuk Tatukwam mulong wa kwinkwash, chad pawiy pinap kamu, ing welang kwintumin tunan ni tunan twa aruu end a mwiur?
54 Pakwez anch namwit Tatukwam kwinkwash, ing mutapu ik nikuwanyisha mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb malondila anch, yom yiney yifanyidin kumekan?”
55 Yesu wayipula chisak chijim cha antu adinga kwinikwa anch: “Ov, komb en wezangany kwen nich jimpak ja misamun ni tubul mulong wa kwinkwat am mudi nidi mpongirik? Machuku mawonsu nading ni yenen, nalejananga mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, en kiwankwatanyap, bwat.
56 Pakwez yom yiney yawonsu yamekan kal mulong wa kuwanyish mazu mafundau aruu a Nzamb mu Mukand wend.” Chad in kwilejend awonsu amuchina, aya mau.
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu ku dirumburish dijim
57 Antu amukwata Yesu, amutwal ku chikumbu cha Kaifas. mwin kupesh mujim. Alej a Yijil ni amakurump ading akumanganang kal kwinikwa.
58 Pita washala chintampu, wamulondula Yesu djat ni ku chipang cha chikumbu cha mwin kupesh mujim. Ndiy wandama mu chipang, washakam nau atulam mulong wa kutal yom yikusutaku.
59 In kupesh ajim ni ankalansambu awonsu apakisha kuman uman wa makasu mulong wa kumufish nich Yesu kwa kumujip.
60 Pakwez kamanap chom, ap anch antu avud ezap nchik kumutwambil Yesu makasu. Chad antu aad imana,
61 alond anch: “Muntu mwinou walonda anch: ‘Am nikutwish kubumwon Chikumbu che Nzamb. chad nikuchitungiril kand mu machuku masatu.’ ”
62 Chad mwin kupesh mujim wimana, wamwipul Yesu anch: “Ov. kiukwetap kwey dizu diakwakul ku yom yawonsu yikwfundilau?”
63 Pakwez Yesu waneneta zong. Mwin kupesh omjim wamwela kand anch: “Nakuchipil kal mu dijin dia Nzamb mwom, tuleja anch yey Kristu Uzizidilau Many, Mwan a Nzamb.”
64 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Yey walondamu kal. Pakwez nakulejany en awonsu anch, kudiokal chisu chinech en ukez kewmumanany Mwan a Muntu ushich ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb Mwin Dikand. Ukez kumumanany ukat kwez mu madj!”
65 Mwin kupesh, chateshay mwamu, wapola yidjal yend, walond anch: “Wamusaal. kal Nzamb masaal! Kitukwetap kuswir kwa uman ukwau! En awonsu wateshany kal masaal mamusaalay kal Nzamb!
66 Ov, utongilany nchik?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Ndiy ufil nich, ufanyidin kufa.”
67 Chad awiy amuchila mat mu mes, amubul yinkany. Amwing amubula masu,
68 amwel anch: “Ey Kristu Uzizidilau Many, bwak bil, nany wakubulanga!”
0 Pita ukat kumutun Yesu
69 Padingay Pita ushich mu chipang, mwilomb umwing wa mwin kupesh mujim weza kudi ndiy, wamwel anch: “Niyey kand wadinga nend Yesu wa ku Galalia.”
70 Pakwez Pita watuna mukach mwa antu awonsu, walond anch: “Kinijap yom yiulondila.”
71 Chad ndiy watumbuka, waya ku chis cha chipang. Mwilomb mukwau wamumana, wayilej antu ading kwinikwa anch: “Muntu mwinou wading nend Yesu wa ku Nazaret.”
72 Pita watuna kapamp kakwau anch: “Nashilamu kal, kinimwijap muntu mwinou!”
73 Chipasuta chisu chikemp, antu ading iminy kwinikwa eza kudi Pita, amwel anch: “Chakin kamu, niyey udi umwing wa antu inay. Kulond kwey kwovaken anch, udi kamu wa mu chisak cha Yesu!”
74 Chad Pita wachipa anch: “Am nilondil yom yakin! Kinimwijap kwam muntu mwinou! Anch nidimben, Nzamb wam anlej kadimu!” Pa chisu chinicha kamu, chikalambol watenda.
75 Chad Pita wavurika yom yamulejau kudi Yesu anch: “Pakadiay kal chikalambol kutend, ey ukez kwintun tupamp tusatu.” Chad ndiy wabudika, wasambish kudil mansoj nakash.
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu kwa Pilat
1 Chikwacha pamanch pafe, in kupesh ajim ni amakurump amupungana Yesu mulong wa kumujip.
2 Amukasa jimbwambu, amutwal kwa Pilat, nyikel wa in Rom.
0 Rufu ra Yudas
3 Chad Yudas, ndiy kamu wamutunguna Yesu, chijikay anch, Yesu amufish kal nich kwa kumujip, wova ushon nakash. Ndiy wachirisha nfalang makum masatu ja utad wa argent kudi in kupesh ajim ni amakurump.
4 Ndiy walonda anch: “Nasadil kal chitil cha kumutungun muntu wakad mulong chakwel amujip!” Awiy amwakula anch: “Ov, etu twela kand nchik? Kwij kwey, winau udi mulong wey!”
5 Yudas wadjibula nfalang jinija mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad waya wakizezidik.
6 In kupesh ajim anona nfalang, alond anch: “Nfalang jinej jidi ja mash. Mulong wa Chijil chetu kichifanyidinap kujitek mu chipau cha Chikumbu cha Nzamb.”
7 Chapwishau kwovijan mulong wa chom chinech, awiy alanda chir cha muumb a mannung kwikal majamu ma aeny.
8 Wawiy mulong wapidilau chir chinech anch: “Chir cha Mash,” djat ni ilel unou.
9 Yom yiney yamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Jeremiy, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: “Awiy anona nfalang makum masatu ja utad wa argent, wawiy usey wovijanau in Isarel mulong wa kumulandish.
10 Chad anona nfalang jinej, aland nich chir cha muumb a mannung mudi mwanlejay Chinawej.”
0 Pilat ukat kumwipul Yesu
11 Yesu amwimika kurutu kwa Pilat, nyikel wa in Rom, chad wamwipul Yesu anch: “Ov, ey udi mwant wa in Yuda?” Yesu wamwakula anch: “Yey walondamu kal.”
12 Pakwez ndiy kakulap dizu ku yom yamufundau kudi in kupesh ajim ni amakurump.
13 Chawiy Pilat wamwipula anch: “Ov, kiwovilap kwey yom yawonsu yikufundilau?”
14 Pakwez Yesu walika kand kulond dizu, chad Pilat washimwoka nakash.
0 Akat kumufish nich Yesu kwa kumujip
15 Pa musambu ni musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej, Pilat wading ukwet chaku cha kumulikishaku muntu wa rukan mwawonsu ukutondau kudi antu.
16 Pa chisu chinicha mu rukan mwading mwin kubwambul wijikena nakash kudi antu, dijin diend Yesu Barabas.
17 Chad chakumanganau antu, Pilat wayipula anch: “Ov, en usotilany am nikulikishinanyay Yesu Barabas anch Yesu upidilau anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many?”
18 Pilat wading wij nawamp anch, amakurump a in Yuda amupana Yesu kudi ndiy mulong ading amwovidin mukau.
19 Padingay Pilat ushich mu chikumbu cha kurumburishin, mukajend wamutumina dizu anch: “Kangal wasalap chom kudi muntu mwinau, kakwetap mulong. Uchuku winou wawonsu namanang mar nakash mu chilat mulong wendendiy.”
20 In kupesh ajim ni amakurump ayibachika antu kumwit Pilat chakwel ayilikishinayiku Barabas, chad amujipa Yesu.
21 Pakwez Pilat wayipula antu anch: “Pakach pa antu inay aad, ov, usotilany am nikulikishinanyaku nany?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Barabas!”
22 Pilat wayakula anch: “Anch chidi mwamu, ing, am nikumusal nchik Yesu upidilau anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many?” Antu awonsu akula anch: “Mupampila ku mutond uchikakena.”
23 Pakwez Pilat wayipula anch: “Ov, chom ik chiyimp chasadilay?” Awiy abaroka nakash anch: “Mupampila ku mutond uchikakena!”
24 Chamanay Pilat anch, kakwetap kand chom chikwau cha kusal, mulong kanvundangesh kasotil kusambish, ndiy wanona mem, woyil ku makas kurutu kwa antu awonsu, chad walond anch: “Am kinidiap mu mulong wa rufu ra muntu mwinou! Kwij kwen, udi mulong wen!”
25 Chisak cha antu awonsu akula anch: “Chifanyidin mash ma muntu mwinou mikala pa mitu yetu, ni pa mitu ya anetu!”
26 Chawiy Pilat wayilikishinayiku Barabas. Chad amubul Yesu nfimbu, wamupan kudi in kumupamp.
0 Amasalay akat kumuswingish Yesu
27 Amasalay a Pilat amwandjika Yesu mu chikumbu cha nyikel, chad akwau ashalap amukumangena.
28 Awiy amudjola yidjal yend, chad amudjik nkandj mulemp usuz.
29 Awiy atunga chibangul cha miy, amudjik ku mutu, amwinkish mutond mu chikas cha katatuku, chad amwasin manungun pansh, amuswingish anch: “Kalombo, mwant wa in Yuda!™
30 Awiy amuchila mat, chad amutambula mutond, amubul nich mu mutu.
31 Chapwishau kumuswingish, amudjola nkandj mulemp usuz, amudjik kand maswin mend. Chad amubudisha. amutwal mulong wa kumupamp.
0 Akat kumupamp Yesu ku mutond uchikakena
32 Padingau ayil mwi njil, amusankana muntu umwing wa ku Siren, dijin diend Simon. Amasalay amukwata mulong wa kumusendilaku Yesu mutond uchikakena.
33 Awiy ashika kwi ndond yipidilau anch, Goligota, chirumburikin anch, Ndond ya Kawokal.
34 Kwinikwa amwinkisha Yesu maar ma nviny makubombakesh nich yom yiridila. Pakwez chamapakay, walika kuna.
35 Awiy amupampila ku mutond uchikakena, chad anganijana maswin mend patau ubal.
36 Chapwishau kal, ashakama kwinikwa mulong wa kumulam.
37 Piur pa mutu wend ku mutond afundaku mulong wamujipinau anch: “Winou ndiy Yesu, Mwant wa in Yuda.”
38 Amupampa Yesu nau ampongirik aad, umwing ku chikas cha katatuku, mukwau ku chikas cha kamaku.
39 Antu adinga ni kusut mwi njil amuzwiya Yesu mitu ni kumukonkurol anch:
40 “Ey welanga anch: ‘Nikuumbwol Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad nikuchitung kand mu machuku masatu!’ Anch udi Mwan a Nzamb, shirik bil pa mutond uchikakena, wipandish amwiney!”
41 Chawiy chimwing, in kupesh ajim, ni alej a Yijil, ni amakurump amuswingisha Yesu anch:
42 “Ndiy wapandisha antu akwau, pakwez katat kakutwishap kwipandish amwinend! Ov, kindiyap mwant wa in Isarel? Katat anch washirik ku mutond uchikakena, niyetu tukumwitiyij!
43 Ndiy ukungamedin kudi Nzamb, chad wadi ni kufa mu kan anch: ‘Nidi Mwan a Nzamb.’ Chiwamp, iman, tutal katat anch Nzamb ukatil kumupandish!”
44 Niyau ampongirik amupampau nend amuswingisha kand mutapu umwing.
0 Rufu ra Yesu
45 Kwakurika mididim mwi ngand yawonsu kudiokal muten pakach djat ni ku muten wa yisatu urel.
46 Pa muten winiwa wa yisatu Yesu wabarika nich dizu dikash anch: “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakatani?” Chirumburikin anch: “Nzamb wam, Nzamb wam, ov, mulong wak wanlika am?”
47 Antu amwing adinga kwinikwa amutesha, chad alond anch: “Teshany, ukat kumutazuk Elija!”
48 Muntu umwing weza mau nich mwimpalambay, wauuchik mu maar ma nviny masasina, chad waukasin ku mutond. Chawiy wamwinkisha Yesu mulong wa kuna.
49 Pakwez antu akwau alonda anch: “Iman, tutal anch Elija ukwez kumupandish!”
50 Yesu wabarika nich dizu dikash, chad wakatuk mupim.
51 Diswin diadinga diliminau pakach mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, diapuka yibar yaad, kudiokal piur djat ni pansh. Divu dianyikeka, ni mayal mabaroka yibar.
52 Jinzay janzuroka, chad antu avud a Nzamb ading afa kal avumbuka. ikal kand aom.
53 Adiokala mu jinzay, chad pavumbukay Yesu, aya mu Yerusalem, wawiy musumb utumbila, mwinimwa antu avud ayimana.
54 Mukurump wa amasalay ni amasalay adingay nau amulamin Yesu, pamanau kunyikek kwa divu ni yom yikwau yawonsu yasuta, awiy ova wom nakash, alond anch: “Chakin kamu, muntu mwinou wadi Mwan a Nzamb!”
55 Kwinikwa kwading amband avud atadidil kulemp, awiy kamu amband amulondula Yesu kudiokal ku Galalia mulong wa kumukwash.
56 Pakach pa amband inay pading Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala, ni Mariy, makwend wa Jakobu ni Josef, ni makwau wa an amakundj a Zebede.
0 Akat kumujik Yesu
57 Chikwazweka urel, muntu umwing mpich wa ku ul wa Arimatey washika. Dijin diend wading Josef, niyend wading kand mwin kwilej wa Yesu.
58 Ndiy waya kudi Pilat, wamwit mujimbu wa Yesu. Chad Pilat walejana kumwinkish Josef mujimbu wa Yesu.
59 Josef wausenda, Wauvung mu diswin disu dia ndand muwamp.
60 Chad waujika mwi nzay yend amwinend yatotay mu diyal mu machuku minima. Chawiy ndiy wabumburila diyal dijim, wadipat kwi nzay, waya kwend.
61 Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala, ni Mariy mukwau ading ashich kwinikwa, atadil kwi nzay.
0 Akat kutek atulam kwi nzay ya Yesu
62 Chikwacha pamanch, diawiy kamu Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, in kupesh ajim ni Afaris akumangana pamwing nend Pilat.
63 Awiy amuleja anch: “Mwant, tuvurikin anch mwin makasu ou padingay mwom walondanga anch: ‘Anch nafa, kwasut machuku masatu nikez kuvumbuk.’
64 Chawiy ey lejan chakwel amasalay alama nzay djat ni dichuku dia chisatu. Mwamu in kwilejend kakutwishap kuya kwiy mujimbu wend chakwel ayilej antu anch: ‘Ndiy wavumbukang kal, wikal kand mwom!’ Chad makasu minam ma kwisudiel makwikal mayimp kupandakanamu makasu ma kusambish.”
65 Pilat wayileja anch: “Amasalay ay kamu ay, yangany nau, ukalamany nzay nawamp.”
66 Chad awiy aya, atek chijingidij ku diyal dia ku chis cha nzay chakwel kangal adidiosh. Chawiy asha amasalay mulong wa kulam nzay.
0 Kuvumbuk kwa Yesu ak
1 Chidiasuta Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, chikwacha pamanch Dichuku dia Kusambish dia rubing ra in Yuda, Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala, ni Mariy mukwau, aya ni kutal kwi nzay.
2 Kukashimuk, divu dianyikek nakash. Muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej washirika, wabumburil diyal, washakamap.
3 Ndiy wamekana mudi mulayilay, ni maswin mend mazuta, matok too.
4 Atulam ova wom nakash, asambish kuzalizal. Ikala mudi antu afanga kal.
5 Muruu wa mwiur wayileja amband anch: “Kangal wovany wom. Am nij anch umusotilany Yesu wapampilau ku mutond uchikakena.
6 Ndiy kadiap kunoku, wavumbukang kal kwikal kand mwom, mudi mwakulejanyay. Ezany, utalany ndond yadiau amutekil.
7 Katat yangany swa, ukayilejany in kwilejend anch: ‘Ndiy wavumbukang kal, wikal kand mwom, watakelangaku kal kuya ku Galalia. Kwinikwa kwawiy kuukumenanya!’ Vurikany yom yinakulejanya kal.”
8 Awiy adiokala kwi nzay swa, ading ovil wom, oku ovil kand musangar. Aya mau mulong wa kuyilejamu in kwilej a Yesu.
9 Kukashimuk, Yesu wayisankan, wayilangwish anch: “Chisambu chikala kudi en.” Awiy aseja piswimp, amukwat ku mend, chad amwifukwil.
10 Yesu wayela anch: “Kangal wovany wom. Yangany, ukayilejany anamakwam in kwilej aya ku Galalia, chad kwinikwa kwawiy tukumanijana nau.”
0 Rusangu ralondau atulam
11 Padingau amband inay ayil mwi njil, amasalay amwing adinga alamin nzay achirika mu Yerusalem, ayilej amakurump au in kupesh yom yawonsu yamanau.
12 In kupesh ajim akumangana pamwing nau amakurump. Chapwishau kwovijan, ayinkisha amasalay nfalang jivud,
13 ayilej anch: “Yilejany antu anch: ‘In kwilejend ezang uchuku, iy mujimbu wend pitwadia etu tulel tul.’
14 Anch Pilat watesh rusangu riner, etu tukumurumburil nawamp anch, en kiukwetanyap kwen mulong, chakwel kangal akumeshany mar.”
15 Atulam atambula nfalang, asal mudi mwayilejau. Chawiy rusangu riner rapalangana pakach pa in Yuda kushik ni ilel unou.
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi in kwilejend
16 In kwilej dikum ni umwing aya ku mukandu mwi ngand ya Galalia, mudi mwayilejau kudi Yesu.
17 Chamumanau, awiy amwifukwila, ap anch amwing idjidjekap nchik.
18 Yesu waseja piswimp, wayilej anch: “Anginkishin kal ulabu wawonsu wa mwiur ni wa pansh.
19 Yangany kudi antu a michid yawonsu, yikarumunany kwikal in kwilejam. Yibatishany mu dijin dia Tatuku, ni dia Mwan, ni dia Mwiku Utumbila.
20 Yilejany kuziyil ku yom yawonsu yinakulejanya. Chawiy am nikez kwikal ni yenen machuku mawonsu, djat ni kwisudiel kwa mangand.”
0 Yohan Mubatish ukat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb
1 Dined diawiy disambishil dia Rusangu Ruwamp rilondila mulong wa Yesu Kristu, Mwan a Nzamb. 
2 Rasambisha mudi mwafunday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: “Nzamb walonda anch: ‘Tal kwa, nikez kumutum muruu wam kurutu kwey, mulong wa kukurijekin ey njil.’
3 Muntu umwing ukat komb rubil mwi mpay anch: ‘Wapishany njil ya Nsalejetu. Rijekany salal mukombil wend!’ ”
4 Pa chisu chinicha Yohan washika mwi mpay, wading ni kubatish antu ni kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb, mulong wa dibatish. Walonda anch: “Karumukany, diokalany ku yitil yen, chakwel Nzamb ez akulikishinany yitil yen.”
5 Antu a ngand yawonsu ya Yudeya ni a musumb wa Yerusalem ayanganga ni kutesh mazu ma Yohan. Chad anch awiy itiyil yitil yau, ndiy wayibatishina mu wit wa Yordan.
6 Yohan wading udjit yidjal ya unyev wa nnam ukweta ndund pa nyim, wading kand udjit nshipu ya chikit mwi mbund. Wading ni kudia atubwol ni woch.
7 Ndiy wayirumburilanga anch: “Kwinyim kwam kukat kwez muntu umwing udia piur pam, winsutilamu am ulabu. Am kiniwanyidinap ap kusuril moj ya yisapat yend.
8 Am nakubatishany kal nich mem, pakwez ndiy ukez kukubatishany ni Mwiku Utumbila.”
0 Akat kumubatish Yesu
9 Mu machuku minima Yesu wadiokala ku Nazaret mwi ngand ya Galalia, chad Yohan wamubatishina mu mem ma wit wa Yordan. 
10 Patuntukay Yesu mu mem, pawiy kamu pinipa pamanay diur dianzurik, chad Mwiku Utumbila wadinga mudi iyemb wamushirikina ndiy.
11 Chawiy dizu diadiokala mwiur anch: “Ey udi mwanam unikatila nakash. Am nikat kusangar mulong weyey.” Akat kumwoz Yesu
12 Pawiy kamu pinipa Mwiku Utumbila wamutwala mwi mpay.
13 Ndiy washakama mwinimwa machuku makum manying. Mu machuku minima, Sakudimban wading ni kumwoz. Mwi mpay mwadinga annam a mwisuku, pakwez aruu a mwiur amukwasha Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kutazuk ayibind anying a ansh
14 Chamukwatau kal Yohan mu rukan, Yesu waya ku Galalia ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp rudiokila kudi Nzamb.
15 Ndiy walondanga anch: “Chisu chatenchikau chashik kal, chawiy chisu cha Want wa Nzamb! Karumukany, udiokalany ku yitil yen, chad witiyijany Rusangu Ruwamp!”
16 Pasutay Yesu pa chikumu cha dijiy dia Galalia, ndiy wayimana ayibind aad a ansh, Simon ni mwanamakwend Andare. Awiy ading ni kuta ansh nich wand.
17 Yesu wayileja anch: “Nlondulany, wikalany in kwilejam. Chad nikez kukwinkishany ukash wa kulet antu kudi am mudi mukat kuletay chibind ansh mu waat.”
18 Pawiy kamu pinipa, awiy asha mand mau, aya nend.
19 Ndiy wenda chintampu chikemp, chad wamumana Jakobu ni Yohan, an amakundj a Zebede. Awiy ading ni kurijek mand mau mu waat.
20 Yesu, chayimanay awiy, pawiy pinipa wayitazuka chakwel amulondul. Amusha tatukwau Zebede, pamwing ni in mudimu mu waat, chad awiy aya nend Yesu.
0 Muntu ukweta chilembil muyimp
21 Yesu ni in kwilejend aya ku ul wa Kapernaum. Pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish dia in Yuda, Yesu wandama mu chikumbu cha kulembil, chad wasambish kulejan.
22 Antu amutesha ashimwoka mutapu walejanay. Ndiy kalejanap mudi mwalejanangau alej a Yijil, pakwez ndiy walejana nich ulabu mudi mwant.
23 Pa chisu chinicha muntu wading ukweta chilembil ~ muyimp wandama mu chikumbu cha kulembil, chad wabarika anch:
24 “Ov, ey Yesu wa ku Nazaret, usotil kutusal yom ik? Ov, ey wezang mulong wa kutushesh etu? Nij kamu nawamp anch, ey udi muruu utumbila wa Nzamb!”
25 Yesu wamuswejina chilembil muyimp, wamwel anch: “Nenet zong, mudiokala kamu muntu mwinou!”
26 Muntu wasambisha kwikwany mulong wa chilembil. Chawiy chilembil wabaroka nich dizu dikash, chad wamudiokal muntu.
27 Antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash, chad asambisha kwipulijan anch: “Ov, chom ik chinech? Minam madi kamu malejan masu, umalejen nich ulabu mudi mwant! Muntu mwinou ukat kuyilej ayilembil, niyau akat kumuziyil!”
28 Katumb ka rusangu fa Yesu kapalangana swa mwi ngand yawonsu ya Galalia.
0 Yesu ukat kwok ayej avud
29 Pabudikau mu chikumbu cha kulembil, Yesu waya swa nend Jakobu ni Yohan ku chikumbu cha Simon ni Andare.
30 Makwend wa mband wa Simon wading ulel, mulong wading uyedil mashik. Chashikay Yesu, awly amulejamu mayej minam.
31 Yesu waseja piswimp kudi muyej, wamukwata ku chikas, wamulangwish, wamushichik. Mashik mamupwa, chad wasambisha kuyirijekin yakudia.
32 Urel winiwa, chimwela mwis bwi, amuletila Yesu ayej awonsu ni antu ading akweta ayilembil.
33 Antu awonsu a mu musumb akumangena ku chis cha chikumbu.
34 Yesu wayoka antu avud akwetinga misong ya mitapu ni mitapu, wayopata kand ayilembil. Kitiyap ayilembil kulond mazu, mulong ading amwij.
0 Yesu ukat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb mu Galalia
35 Pamanch pa nkunku pa kucha, Yesu walanka, wabudik, waya kwi ndond yend amwinend, chad kwinikwa wasambisha kulembil.
36 Simon, pamwing ni akwau adingay nend, aya ni kumukimb.
37 Pamutanau, amwela anch: “Antu awonsu akat kukukimb.”
38 Pakwez Yesu wayileja anch: “Tufanyidin kuya ku mal makwau ma piswimp, chakwel nikayirumburil kand niyau mazu ma Nzamb. Wawiy mulong unezila.”
39 Ndiy wendangana mwi ngand yawonsu ya Galalia. Wayirumburila antu mazu ma Nzamb mu yikumbu ya kulembil, wayopata kand ayilembil. Yesu ukat kumwok muyej a mak
40 Muyej a mak weza kudi Yesu, wamwasin manungun pansh, wamulembijek anch: “Anch ey ukatil, ukutwish kwingok.”
41 Chad Yesu wamwovila riy nakash, watandjeka chikas, wamukwat, wamwel anch: “Nikatil kukok, chawiy katat yerik!”
42 Pawiy kamu pinipa musong wa mak wamupwa, wikala zwang.
43 Yesu wamwela anch: “Yang swa!” Chad wamubabesha anch:
44 “Kangal wamulejamu muntu chom chinech. Yang mau ukimekesh kudi mwin kupesh. Chad ukulambul mulambu wa kuyerik mudi mwalonday Moses. Chom chinech chikez kwikal uman pakach pa antu.”
45 Pakwez muntu mwinou wapalangesha rusangu rend kudi antu awonsu. Chom chinech chamukangesha Yesu kuya mu mal, chad washakama ku masuku kwakad ul wa muntu. Chawiy antu adiokalanga ku mitambu yawonsu ezanga kudi ndiy.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej a kalip
1 Chipasuta machuku makemp, Yesu wachirika ku musumb wa Kapernaum, chad rusangu rapalangana anch ndiy wachirik kal kwol kwend. 
2 Chawiy antu avud akumangena kwinikwa, kikwashalap ndond mu chikumbu ap pol mu chis. Yesu wading ni kuyirumburilang mazu ma Nzamb.
3 Chad kweza kand antu akwau anying ading amusendil muyej a kalip, awiy amuleta kudi Yesu.
4 Akanganya kumusej muyej piswimp kudi ndiy mulong wa runtu, chad’ akandama pa nsiny, abuz dipan pantaliken padingay Yesu. Amushirishinap muyej ni ulal wend.
5 Pamanay Yesu ritiy ra antu inay, ndiy wamwela muyej anch: “Mwanam, akulikishin kal yitil yey.”
6 Alej amwing a Yijil ading ashicha mwinimwa, atonga mu michim anch:
7 “Ov, mulong wak muntu mwinou chilondilay mwamu? Ndiy ukat kumusaal Nzamb masaal! Ching kamu Nzamb amwinend, ndiy ukutwisha kulikishin yitil!”
8 Pawiy kamu pinipa Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wayipula anch: “Ov, mulong wak utonginanya mwamu?
9 Ov, chipipela chisu kumwel muyej a kalip ou anch: ‘Akulikishin kal yitil yey,’ ap kumwel anch: ‘Tumbuk, zambul ulal wey, uya kwey?’
10 Pakwez nisotil nikwijikishany anch, Mwan a Muntu ukwet ulabu pansh panap wa kulikishin yitil.” Chad ndiy wamuleja muyej a kalip anch:
11 “Nakwel kal anch: ‘Tumbuk, zambul ulal wey, yang kwol kwey!’ ”
12 Antu awonsu amumana muyej a kalip palankay, wanon ulal wend, wabudik, waya. Chad awiy awonsu ashimwoka nakash, amushiman Nzamb anch: “Etu kand kal tumanap chom mudi chinech!”
0 Yesu ukat kumutazuk Levi
13 Yesu wachirika kand ku dijiy dia Galalia. Chisak chijim cha antu chamukumangena, chad ndiy wading ni kuyilejang.
14 Chad pendanganangay, wamumana Levi, mwan ikundj wa Alfe, ushich mu chikumbu cha kulambwishin yitad. Yesu wamuleja anch: “Ez, tuya.” Chad Levi watumbuka waya nend.
15 Pashakamay Yesu ni kudia mu chikumbu cha Levi; chisak cha in kulambwish yitad nau akayitil eza kushakam nend Yesu ku mes, pamwing ni in kwilejend. Kwading kand a> antu avud amulondula.
16 In kulejan Yijil amwing a pakach pa Afaris amumana Yesu ukat kudia nau akayitil ni in kulambwish yitad. Chad Afaris ayipula in kwilejend anch: “Ov, mulong wak chidilay nau antu a mutapu winou?”
17 Pateshay Yesu mwamu, ndiy wayakula anch: “Antu akash kaswiridinap mwingang, ching kusu ayedina, awiy akata kumuswir mwingang. Am kinezap kuyitazuk antu atentamina, pakwez neza mulong wa kuyitazuk akayitil.”
0 Akat kumwipul Yesu mulong wa kujil yakudia
18 Dichuku dimwing in kwilej a Yohan Mubatish, pamwing ni Afaris, ajila yakudia. Chad antu amwing eza, amwipul Yesu anch: “Ov, mulong wak in kwilej a Yohan Mubatish ni in kwilej au Afaris akat kujil yakudia, pakwez in kwilejey, bwat.”
19 Chawiy Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, arund nend a ngatan akutwish kujil yakudia ya musambu pachidiau nend ngatan? Bwat, pachidiau nend ngatan kakutwishap kujil yakudia.
20 Pakwez dichuku dikeza kwez dikez kumudioshau ngatan pakach pau, chad pawiy pakez kujilau yakudia.
21 “Kwikil muntu ukata kuchimin chibel chisu pa chidjal chikur. Anch wasal mwamu, chibel chisu chikez kwipwit chapwish chidjal chikur, chad dipan dikupandakan.
22 Kwikil kand muntu ukata kulong maar ma nviny masu mu jinsab jikur ja yikit. Anch wasal mwamu, maar ma nviny masu makez kubaril jinsab ja yikit, chad mwamu maar ni jinsab yikez kusheshik. Pakwez maar ma nviny masu mafanyidin kumalong mu jinsab jisu ja yikit.”
0 Akat kumwipul Yesu mulong wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish
23 Dichuku dimwing dia Kwiswedish Yesu ni in kwilejend asutila mwi njil ya kuya ku chir cha tidiku. Chad in kwilejend apurola tidiku.
24 Chawiy Afaris amwela Yesu anch: “Tal kwa, in kwilejey akat kujip Yijil yetu. Ov, mulong wak chisadilau chom chinech pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish?”
25 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, kand kal utanganyap rusangu ra David ni antu adingay nau pa chisu chafau nzal wakad kuman yakudia? 
26 Pa chisu chadingay Abiatar mwin kupesh mujim, David wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wadia mabot matekangau kurutu kwa Nzamb. Yijil yetu yilondil anch, ching kusu in kupesh, awiy akutwisha kudia mabot minam, pakwez David wamadia, wayinkishap kand antu adingay nau.”
27 Yesu wayileja kand anch: “Dichuku dia Kwiswedish aditeka mulong wa kuyikwash antu, pakwez kayitangap antu mulong wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, bwat.
28 Chawiy Mwan a Muntu, ndiy Mwant wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.”
0 Yesu ukat kumwok mwin chikas chikwanyatina
1 Dichuku dikwau Yesu wandama kand mu chikumbu cha kulembil, mwinimwa mwading muntu wakwetinga chikas chikwanyatina.
2 Antu adinga mwinimwa amutala, amana anch ukumwok muntu winiwa pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish chakwel amufunda.
3 Yesu wamwela muntu anch: “Tumbuk, sut kurutu.”
4 Chad Yesu wayipula antu anch: “Ov, Yijil yetu yikutwish kwitiy kusal yom yiwamp anch yom yiyimp pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, kumupandish muntu anch kumujip?” Pakwez awiy aneneta zong.
5 Yesu wayitala antu ina, wayovila ujim. Wova kand ushon nakash mulong michim yau yichinchikin. Chad wamwela muntu anch: “Tandjek chikas chey.” Muntu watandjeka chikas chend, chikala chiwamp mudi muchadinga. 
6 Chawiy Afaris abudika, aya akasankan nau in chisak cha Herod, awonsu pamwing amupungana Yesu mulong wa kumujip.
0 Antu avud eza ku dijiy
7 Yesu ni in kwilejend aya ku dijiy dia Galalia, chad chisak chijim cha antu amulondula. Antu inay adiokala kwi ngand ya Galalia, ni ya Yudeya,
8 ni ku musumb wa Yerusalem, ni kwi ngand ya Idumey, ni ya kwingangel ushad wa Yordan, ni ngand yidia piswimp ni misumb ya Tir ni Sidon. Antu inay awonsu eza kudi Yesu mulong atesha yom yasalangay.
9 Chisak chading chijim nakash, chad Yesu wayilej in kwilejend kumurijekin waat chakwel antu kakutwishap kumushinyesh.
10 Ndiy woka antu avud, chad ayej akwau abachikijana chakwel amupukonaku.
11 Ayilembil, chamumanau Yesu, awiy awa pansh ku mend yend, abarok anch: “Ey udi Mwan a Nzamb!”
12 Chad Yesu wayikanda chakwel kangal amujingunin.
0 Yesu ukat kutond atwimbuy dikum ni aad
13 Yesu wakandama pa mukandu, watazuka antu atonday kwez kudi ndiy, chad awiy eza.
14 Ndiy watondap antu dikum ni aad, wayipila anch, atwimbuy end. Wayitonda mulong wa kushakam nend ni mulong wa kuyitum kand kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb.
15 Ndiy wayinkisha ulabu wa kuyopat ayilembil.
16 Majin ma antu dikum ni aad atonday mawiy minam, Simon, wapilay anch, Pita,
17 ni Jakobu pamwing ni mwanamwakwend Yohan, awiy kamu an amakundj a Zebede, apilay Yesu anch, Bowanerijes, charumburik anch: “Antu akweta usu mudi chidjimin cha nzaj.”
