8 Dichuku dimwing Zakariy wading ni kusal mudimu wa win kupesh mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, mulong diading diok dia chisak chau. 
9 Mudi mwadinga chaku cha in kupesh, ata ubal, amutond ndiy kuya kwosh diseng dia malash pa chintamb. Chawiy ndiy wandama mu Chikumbu cha Chinawej,
10 padingau antu avud pol akat kulembil pa chisu choshangau diseng dia malash. 
11 Muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej wamekana kudi Zakariy, wading wiminy ku mutambu wa chikas cha katatuku cha chintamb choshinangau diseng dia malash.
12 Zakariy, chamumanay, wakama, wov wom nakash.
13 Pakwez muruu wa mwiur wamuleja anch: “Zakariy, kangal wov wom! Nzamb watesha kal kulembil kwey. Mukajey, Elizabet, ukez kuval mwan ikundj. Ey ukez kumupil dijin anch, Yohan.
14 Ey ukez kusangar nakash, ni antu akwau avud akez kwov musangar kand mulong wa kuvadik kwa mwan winou!
15 Ndiy ukez kwikal muntu mujim kurutu kwa Chinawej. Kakez kunap maar ma nviny ap maar makwau maswejina. Kudiokal ku kuvadik kwend ukez kwizul nich Mwiku Utumbila.
16 Ndiy ukez kuyichirish in Isarel avud kudi Chinawej Nzamb wau.
17 Ndiy ukez kuya kurutu ku mes ma Chinawej mu Mwiku Utumbila, ni mu ukash mudi mwadingay nich Elija, mutuu wa Nzamb. Ndiy, Yohan, ukez kukarumun Dijiy dia Nazaret michim ya atatuku chakwel ayikata kand anau. Ukez kuyikarumun kand michim ya in kubwambul chakwel ikala nich yitongijok yitentamina. Ndiy ukez kuyitenchik antu a Chinawej chakwel akez kumwak.”
18 Zakariy wamwipula muruu wa mwiur anch: “Ov, am nikez kwijik nchik anch chom chinech chidi chakin? Mulong am ni mukajam tudi kwetu amapal.”
19 Muruu wa mwiur wamwakula anch: “Yam Gaburiel. Nikata kwiman kurutu kwa Chinawej mulong wa kumusadil. Ndiy wantumanga am mulong wa kukulej ey rusangu riner ruwamp.
20 Pakwez ey kiwitiyinap mazu mam makeza kuwanyin anch chisu chau chashik. Ey ukez kwikal kamam mulong walik kal kwitiy. Kiukez kulondap kand djat kamu ni ku dichuku dikeza kuwanyin yom yiney yinakuleja.”
21 Pa chisu chinicha antu adinga amuchingedin Zakariy asambisha kwipulijan anch: “Ov, mulong wak chalabay kal mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb?”
22 Chabudikay, katwishap kand kulond nau, chawiy awiy ijika anch, ndiy waman kal chishimushimu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Ndiy wasambisha kuyililokin nich miny, mulong katwishap kulond dizu.
23 Papwishay diok diend dia mudimu wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb, Zakariy wachirika kwol kwend.
24 Chipasuta machuku makemp, mukajend, Elizabet, wimisha divumu, chad wajinginanga mu chikumbu angond atan. Walondanga anch:
25 “Katat Chinawej wankwash kal, wandiosh kal usany pakach pa antu!”
0 Rusangu ra kuvadik kwa Yesu
26 Pikalay kal Elizabet nich divumu dia angond musamban, Nzamb wamutuma muruu wa mwiur, dijin diend Gaburiel, ku ul wa Nazaret mwi ngand ya Galalia.
27 Ndiy waya kudi avawa a LLJ changadim wakad kumwijik ikundj. Changadim winou, dijin diend Mariy, ading amutondil kudi Josef wa mu a majuku ma Mwant David.
28 Muruu wa mwiur washika kudi Mariy, wamwel anch: “Walank! Chinawej Nzamb wakuyukish kal, ndiy udi ni yeyey!”
29 Mariy wakama nakash mulong wa mazu malonday muruu wa mwiur, wasambisha kutong kurumburik kwa mazu minam.
30 Chawiy muruu wa mwiur walonda anch: “Mariy, kangal wov kwey wom. Nzamb wakwanaken kal.
31 Ey ukez kwimish divumu, chad ukumuval mwan ikundj, ukez kumupil anch, Yesu.
32 Ndiy ukez kwikal muntu mujim, chad Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu ukez kumupil anch: ‘Mwanam.’ Chinawej Nzamb ukez kumuswanish pa ditand dia want diading dia ngakiril wend David.
33 Ndiy ukez kwikal Mwant wa in Isarel chikupu, Want wend kiukez kupwap!”
34 Mariy wamwipula muruu wa mwiur anch: “Ov, yom yiney yikwikal nchik, mulong am kinimwijap kal ikundj?”
35 Muruu wa mwiur wamwakula anch: “Mwiku Utumbila ukez kukushirikin ey, mwamu ukash wa Nzamb ukez kwikal ni yeyey. Mulong wa chom chinech, mwan winou utumbila akez kumupil anch, Mwan a Nzamb.
36 Tal Elizabet, mwanamakwend wa makwey, welangau anch kakutwishap kuval, pakwez katat ukwet divumu dia angond musamban. Kutal, ndiy wikadil kal ipal nakash,
37 mulong kwikil chom chikukanganyay Nzamb kusal.”
38 Chad Mariy walonda anch: “Am nidi mwilomb wa Chinawej. Chifanyidin yom yawonsu yisadika kudi am mudi muwalondanga.” Chawiy muruu wa mwiur waya, wamusha Mariy.
0 Mariy ukat kuya ni kumulangwish Elizabet
39 Mu machuku minima Mariy waya swa ku ul wa mwi ngand ya mikandu ya Yudeya.
40 Wandama mu chikumbu cha Zakariy, wamulangwish Elizabet.
41 Pateshay Elizabet kulangwish kwa Mariy, mwan wadinga mwivumu mwend winyikesha nich usu nakash. Chad Elizabet wizula nich Mwiku Utumbila,
42 walonda dizu piur anch: “Ey Mariy, Nzamb wakuyukishin kal kupandakanamu amband awonsu. Chiyukish chend chikwikal kand kudi mwan ukuvala!
43 Ov, am nidi nany,ing, makwend wa Nsalejam eza ni kwinlangwish?
44 Katat kamu pinatesha kulangwish kwey, mwan udia mwivumu mwam winyikeshang nich musangar nakash.
45 Wayuk kwey piwitiya mazu ma Chinawej mashika kudi ey anch, makez kuwanyin kamu!”
0 Muminy wa Mariy wakumushiman Nzamb
46 Mariy walonda anch: “Muchim wam ukat kushiman kujimb kwa Chinawej.
47 Muchim wam ukat kusangar nakash mulong wa Nzamb Mupandish wam.
48 Ndiy wanvurik kal am, mwilomb wend wikempishina! Chakin kamu, kudiokal ilel antu awonsu akez kwingelang anch: ‘Uyukila,’
49 mulong wa yom yijim yansadilay Nzamb Mwin Dikand. Dijin diend ditumbil.
50 Ukat kuyovil riy antu a majuku ni majuku akata kumulimish ndiy.
51 Ndiy wasala yom yikwamushena ku usu wa chikas chend. Ndiy wayipalangesha in kwibaz.
52 Wayimwanga ant, wayidiosh pa matand mau, chad wayizambwish in kwikepish.
53 Wapana yom yiwamp kudi aburedina, chad ampich wayopata, aya mu makas mwamwamu.
54 Wawanyisha kushilamu kwashilayimu nau anshankuretu, chad weza mulong wa kuyikwash atushalapol end in Isarel.
55 Wavurika kumwovil Aburaham riy, chad wayovila kand a majuku mend mawonsu riy chikupu!”
56 Mariy washakama nend Elizabet angond asatu, chad wachirika kand kwol kwend.
0 Kuvadik kwa Yohan Mubatish
57 Machuku ma kuval chimawanyina, Elizabet wavala mwan ikungj. 
58 Akwau atungilau nau ni anamakwend, pateshau chom chiwamp chikwamushena chamusadilau kudi Nsalejend, awonsu asangara nend.
59 Pawanyishay mwan rubing rumwing, amutwala ku mukand, chad ela kumupil dijin dia tatukwend Zakariy.
60 Pakwez makwend walonda anch: “Bwat! Dijin diend ndiy Yohan.”
61 Awiy amwela anch: “Pakwez mu chisak chen kwikiling dijin dined!”
62 Chad awiy asambisha kumwilokin tatukwend nich miny mulong wa kumwipul dijin dia kumupil mwanend.
63 Zakariy wayipula dipapel dia kufundap, chad wafundap anch: “Dijin diend ndiy Yohan.” Awiy awonsu ashimwoka nakash.
64 Pa chisu chinicha kamu, Zakariy wajikuka dizu, chad wasambisha kumushiman Nzamb. 
65 Akwau atungilay nau ova wom nakash. Chad rusangu ra yom yiney rapalangana mwi ngand yawonsu ya mikandu ya Yudeya.
66 Antu awonsu atesha rusangu riner, arulama mu michim, chad ipulijana anch: “Mwan winou ukwikal mutapu ik?” Mulong, chakin, ukash wa Nsalejend wading nend.
0 Zakariy ukat kubwak
67 Zakariy, ndiy kamu tatukwend wa Yohan, wizula nich Mwiku Utumbila, chad alejana dizu dia Nzamb anch:
68 “Chifanyidin etu kumushiman Nsalejetu, Nzamb wa in Isarel! Ndiy wez kal mulong wa kuyikwash antwend, chad wayikamunin.
69 Ndiy watwinkishay Mupandish wa dikand wa mu a majuku ma kashalapol wend David.
70 Watupanyina kushilamu kwend kudi aruu end atumbila a pakur.
71 Watushilamu anch, ukez kutukamunin kudi akankuny netu, ni kutudiosh mu makas ma antu atukisina.
72 Walonda anch, ukez kwiyovil anshankuretu riy, ni kuvurik manswik mend matumbila.
73 Ndiy wamuchipina ngakiril wetu Aburaham machip.
74 Washilamu kutukamunin mu makas ma akankuny, chad watwitiya etu kumusadil wakad wom.
75 Wasala mwamu chakwel etu twikal antu atumbila ni kutentam kurutu kwend machuku mawonsu mitudia aom.
76 «Ry, mwanam, akez kukupil anch: ‘Muruu wa Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu.’ Ey ukez kutakelaku kurutu kwa Nsalejetu mulong wa kurijek njil yend.
77 By ukez kuyilej antwend akez kupand anch wayilikishin yitil yau,
78 mulong Nzamb wetu udi mwin riy ni ranaken. Ndiy ukez kututumin dipandish, mudi muten ukata kusasumuk pamanch.
79 Dipandish didi dia mwiur dikez kuyimunyikin antu awonsu ashicha mu mididim ya rufu. Dikez kututakel chakwel tukwendil mwi njil ya chisambu.”
80 Mwan winou wakula ku mujimbu ni ku mwom. Ndiy washakama mwi mpay, djat ni pa dichuku diamekanay kudi in Isarel.
0 Kuvadik kwa Yesu
1 Mu machuku minima, Ogust, mwant mujim wa in Rom, walejana mulong wa kuchind antu awonsu a mu mangand mend.
2 Kwinoku kwading kuchind kwa kusambish, kwadinga pa chisu chamutekau Kirinius kwikal nyikel mwi ngand ya Siria.
3 Chawiy muntu ni muntu waya amwinend ni kwifundish ku ul wend wa chivadik.
4 Josef wadiokala mu ul wa Nazaret mwi ngand ya Galalia, waya ku ul wa Betlehem mwi ngand ya Yudeya, wawiy ul wa chivadik wa Mwant David.
5 Ndiy waya ni kwifundish pamwing ni Mariy, mband watonday wa kwat. Mariy wading nich madikaj.
6 Padingau ku Betlehem, chisu cha kuval chawanyina.
7 Ndiy wamuvala mwan ikundj wa kusambish. Wamuvunga mu yibel ya maswin, chad wamuladik mwi ndond yikat kudilangau annam, mulong mu chikumbu cha aeny kimwadingap ndond.
0 Aruu a mwiur akat kwez kudi atufung
8 Ku mutambu wa ngand yiniya kwading atufung alalanga mwisuku mulong wa kulam amikoku. 
9 Muruu umwing wa Chinawej washika kudi awiy kwa kukashimuk. Uyaj wa Chinawej wayimunyikina, chad awiy akama, ov wom. 
10 Pakwez muruu wa mwiur wayileja anch: “Kangal wovany wom! Nakuletilangany rusangu ruwamp rikeza kulet musangar ujim kudi antu awonsu. 
11 Ilel unou kamu, mu ul wa David, mwavadikang kal Mupandish wen, ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
12 Talany mutapu ukumwijikanya. Ukumutanany mwan uvungilau mu yibel ya maswin, amuladikin mwi ndond yikat kudilangau annam.”
13 Kukashimuk, chisak chijim cha aruu a mwiur chabombakana pamwing ni muruu wa kusambish, awanga muminy wa kumushiman Nzamb anch:
14 “Chifanyidin apana uyaj kudi Nzamb mwiur, ni chisambu chikala pansh kudi antu akatilay!”
15 Chadiokalau aruu a mwiur ayisha atufung, achirika mwiur. Chad atufung anunganijana anch: “Chifanyidin tuyany ku Betlehem, tutalany chom chashika kal chatulejangau kudi Nsalejetu.”
16 Chawiy awiy aya swa, amutan Mariy ni Josef, amumana kand mwan ulel mwi ndond yikat kudilangau annam.
17 Atufung, chamumanau mwan, ayileja anvaj mulong wa mwan, mudi. mwayilejau kudi muruu wa mwiur.
18 Antu awonsu atesha, ashimwoka yom yalondau atufung.
19 Mariy wavurika ni kutongijok yom yiney yawonsu nakash mu muchim wend.
20 Chad atufung achirika ni kuwang miminy ya kumushiman i enn ee Nzamb, mulong wa yom yateshau ni yamanau. Yawouse yading yakin, mudi mwayilejau kudi muruu wa mwiur.
0 Mwan akat kumupil anch, Yesu
21 Chipasuta rubing rumwing, diashikena dichuku dia kumutwal mwan ku mukand, amupila dijin anch, Yesu. Dined diawiy dijin dialejanay muruu wa mwiur padingay Mariy kand kal imisha.
0 Akat kumushikij Yesu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
22 Chisu chawanyina kudi Josef ni Mariy cha kusal yom yawonsu, chakwel ishitwisha mudi mwading Yijil ya Moses. Chad awiy amutwala mwan ku Yerusalem mulong wa kumushikij kudi Nsalejau.
23 Asala mwamu mudi mwafundau mu yijil ya Chinawej anch: “Mwan ikundj mwawonsu wa kusambish akez kumushikij kudi Nsalejau.”
24 Aya kand mulong wa kupesh an a amayemb aad ap an a atwinkudimb aad mudi mwadinga chijil cha Chinawej.
25 Mu Yerusalem mwading muntu umwing, dijin diend Simeyon. Muntu mwinou wading muwamp, wading umulimishin Nzamb, wading kand uchingedil muntu ufanyidina kuyipandish in Isarel. Mwiku Utumbila wading nend,
26 wamwijikisha Simeyon anch: “Kiukufap kwakad kumuman Kristu Uzizidilau Many kudi Nsalejend.”
27 Mwiku Utumbila wamutwala Simeyon mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Anvaj amutwala mwanau Yesu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb kumusal mudi mwading chijil cha Nzamb.
28 Simeyon wamutambula mwan, wamutek mwi nkond mwend, chad wamujikitisha Nzamb anch:
29 “Katat, Nsalejam, ey wawanyish kal kushilamu kwey, ukutwish kumulik kashalapol wey kuya nich chisambu. ;
30 Mes mam maman kal dipandish diey,
31 diwarijeka chakwel antu awonsu adimana.
32 Dipandish dined didi mudi chimunyik chikeza kwijikish rusot rey kudi antu a michid yikwau, ni kulet uyaj kudi antwey in Isarel."
0 Simeyon ukat kubwak
33 Tatukwend ni makwend a Yesu ashimwoka nakash mulong wa mazu ma Yesu malonday Simeyon.
34 Chawiy Simeyon wayiyukisha, wamulej Mariy, makwend wa Yesu, anch: “Nzamb wamutonda mwan winou mulong wa kwikal mwin kuyifish nich ni mwin kuyingish nich in Isarel avud. Ndiy ukez kwikal chijingidij chidiokila kwa Nzamb, chikez kudiwolau kudi antu avud.
35 Chad mwamu ndiy ukez kumekesh patok yitongijok ya ujindj ya antu avud. Pakwez ey, Mariy, ushon ukez kukutap mu muchim wey mudi mpak ya musamun.”
0 Ana udi muruu wa Nzamb
36 Kwading mband umwing wading muruu wa Nzamb, dijin diend Ana. Wading mwan mband wa Fanuwel wa muchid wa Azer. Wading ipal, walala ku uruu ching mivu sambwad,
37 chad washala mwadiamufu. Mivu ya mwom wend yading makum chinan ni yinying. Wading ni kuya mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni kwifukwil muten ni uchuku, wading ni kulembilang ni kujil yakudia.
38 Pa chisu chinicha, padingau anvaj a Yesu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, Ana niyend washika, wamujikitish Nzamb, chad walonda yom ya mwan winou kudi antu awonsu adinga achingedil Nzamb kukwol Yerusalem.
0 Weny wa kuchirik ku Nazaret
39 Chawanyishau Josef ni Mariy kusal yom yawonsu mudi mwading chijil cha Chinawej, awiy achirika kwol kwau ku ul wa Nazaret mwi ngand ya Galalia.
40 Yesu wakula, wikal mukash. Wading ukwet manangu nakash, ni chiyukish cha Nzamb chading nend.
0 Yesu udi mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
41 Pa muvu ni muvu ayanga ku Yerusalem ku musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
42 Pikalay Yesu mivu ya kuvadik dikum ni yaad, awiy aya kand ku musambu mudi mwading chaku chau.
43 Musambu chiwapwa kal, awiy atumbuka, achirik kwol kwau, pakwez mwanau Yesu washala mu Yerusalem. Anvajend kijikap chom chinech.
44 Awiy atonga anch, udi kwend mu chisak cha akwau. Chad pendau kal dichuku diakabuj, asambisha kumukimb mwan pakach pa anamakwau ni arund nau.
45 Awiy kamumanap, bwat, chad achirik ku Yerusalem kuya ni kumukimb.
46 Pa dichuku dia chisatu amutan mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ushich nau alej a in Yuda, ukat kuyitesh, chad ukat kuyipul kand.
47 Antu awonsu amutesha ashimwoka nakash, mulong wakulanga kwa manangu.
48 Anvajend ashimwoka nakash pamumanau. Chad makwend wamwipula anch: “Ov, mwanam, mulong wak watusala mwamu? Am ni tatukwey twakama nakash mulong wa kukukimb ey.”
49 Ndiy wayakula anch: “Ov, mulong wak wankimbangany? Ov, kiwadianyap wijany anch, nifanyidin kwikal mu Chikumbu cha Tatukwam?”
50 Pakwez kovap kurumburik kwa yom yakulay.
51 Pakwez Yesu wachirika nau pamwing ku Nazaret, kwinikwa ndiy wayiziyila. Makwend wavurikanga yom yiney yawonsu mu muchim wend.
52 Yesu wakula ku mujimbe ai ke manangu, watapa dilau kudi Nzamb ni kudi antu.
0 Yohan Mubatish ukat kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb
1 Mu muvu wa dikum ni yitan wa kuyikel kwa Tiber, mwant mujim wa in Rom, pinipa Pons Pilat wading nyikel wa ngand ya Yudeya. Herod wading mwin kutakel wa ngand ya Galalia, chad mwanamakwend, Filip, wading mwin kutakel wa ngand ya Iturey ni ya Trakonit. Niyend Lisanias wading mwin kutakel wa ngand ya Abilen.
2 Anas nend Kaifas ading in kupesh ajim. Pa chisu chinicha dizu dia Nzamb diashika kudi Yohan, mwan a Zakariy, padingay mwi mpay.
3 Chawiy Yohan wendangana mwi ngand yawonsu yadinga piswimp ni wit wa Yordan. Warumburila dizu dia Nzamb anch: “Karumukany, udiokalany ku yitil yen chakwel akubatishany, chad Nzamb ukez kukulikishinany yitil yen.”
4 Chawiy yom yiney yawonsu yamekana mudi mwafundau mu mukand wa Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: “Muntu umwing ukat komb rubil mwi mpay anch: ‘Wapishany njil ya Nsalejetu, rijekany salal mukombil wend!
5 Shidilany jinwengil jawonsu, alaleshany mikandu ni yinanginang yawonsu. Jinjil jipengamina chifanyidin kujitentamish, ni jinjil ja mabuku akez kujishidil.
6 Antu awonsu akez kuman dipandish dikuletay Nzamb!’ ”
7 Yisak ya antu yeza kudi Yohan mulong wa kuyibatish. Chad ndiy wayela anch: “En annak! Ov, nany wakulejanya anch, ukutwish kwiyepany ku kadimu kakuletay Chinawej?
8 Salany yom yikutwisha kumekesh anch, wakarumukinany kal kudiokal ku yitil yen. Kangal walamatinany kulond anch, ‘Aburaham udi ngakiril wetu.’ Chakin kamu, nakulejany anch, Nzamb ukutwish kukarumun mayal minam kwikal antu a a majuku ma Aburaham!
9 Kasok kalel kwishin kwa mitond mulong wa kukatul mij. Chawiy mutond wawonsu wakad kusong mabuj mawamp, akez kuukatul, audjibul mu kasu.”
10 Antu amwipula anch: “Ov, chad etu tukusal nchik?”
11 Ndiy wayakula anch: “Muntu mwawonsu ukweta yikut yaad, amwinkishap mukwau uburedina, ni muntu mwawonsu ukweta yakudia, ayanganijan nau akwau.”
12 In kulambwish amwing eza kuyibatish, chad amwipula anch: “Mulej, ov, etu tukusal nchik?”
13 Ndiy wayakula anch: “Kangal walambwishany yitad yipandakena pa chijil.”
14 Amasalay amwing niyau eza, amwipul anch: “Ov, ing etu, tufanyidin kusal nchik?” Ndiy wayakula anch: “Kangal wamwamukany muntu nfalang ku ukash, ap kumufundany muntu kwa makasu. Sangarany ching kusu nich difut dien.”
15 Antu asambisha kwikal nich ruchingej, asambisha kutongijok mu michim yau anch, ap Yohan winou ndiy Kristu. Uzizidilan Many.
16 Chawiy Yohan wayileja antu awonsu anch: “Am nikubatishinany nich mem. Pakwez kwezil muntu umwing mwin dikand kwimpandakanamu am. Am kinidiap muwamp uwanyidina ap kusuril moj ya yisapat yend. Ndiy ukez kukubatishany en ni Mwiku Utumbila, ukez kukubatishany kand nich kasu.
17 Ndiy ukwet kal ral mu makas mend, chakwel ukutwish kupep mulong wa kwauril mbut ni yipapal. Ukez kukumangej mbut mwi nkil yend, pakwez yipapal ukez kuyosh mu kasu kakad kujimang.”
18 Yohan wayikasikesha antu mu mitapu yivud, chad wayirumburila Rusangu Ruwamp.
19 Pakwez Yohan wamukand Herod, nyikel wa ngand, mulong ndiy wamwata Herodias, mband wa mwanamakwend. Chikwau kand, Herod wasala yom yikwau yivud yiyimp.
20 Chad Herod wasala chom chikwau chipandakena kuyip, mulong wamuteka Yohan mu rukan.
0 Akat kumubatish Yesu
21 Chapwishay Yohan kuyibatish antu awonsu, wamubatisha kand niyend Yesu. Palembilangay Yesu, diur dianzurika,
22 chad Mwiku Utumbila weza wamuwil, wading ufanakena mudi iyemb. Chawiy dizu diadiokala mwiur anch: “Ey udi Mwanam unikatila nakash. Am nikat kusangar mulong weyey.”
0 Angakiril a Yesu
23 Pasambishay Yesu mudimu, wading ukwet mivu ya kuvadik mudi makum masatu. Antu atonganga anch, Yesu wading mwan wa Josef, Josef wading mwan wa Heli,
24 Heli wading mwan wa Matat, Matat wading mwan wa Levi, Levi wading mwan wa Meleki, Meleki wading mwan wa Janay, Janay wading mwan wa Josef,
25 Josef wading mwan wa Matatias, Matatias wading mwan wa Amos, Amos wading mwan wa Nahum, Nahum wading mwan wa Eseli, Eseli wading mwan wa Nagay,
26 Nagay wading mwan wa Maat, Maat wading mwan wa Matatias, Matatias wading mwan wa Semeyin, Semeyin wading mwan wa Josek, Josek wading mwan wa Joda,
27 Joda wading mwan wa Jowanan, Jowanan wading mwan wa Resa, Resa wading mwan wa Zorobabel. Zorobabel wading mwan wa Sheyalitiel, Sheyalitiel wading mwan wa Neri,
28 Neri wading mwan wa Meleki, Meleki wading mwan wa Adi, Adi wading mwan wa Kosam, Kosam wading mwan wa Elimadam, Elimadam wading mwan wa Er,
29 wading mwan wa Joshua, Joshua wading mwan wa Eliezer, Eliezer wading mwan wa Jorim, Jorim wading mwan wa Matat, Matat wading mwan wa Levi,
30 Levi wading mwan wa Simeyon, Simeyon wading mwan wa Yuda, Yuda wading mwan wa Josef, Josef wading mwan wa Jonam, Jonam wading mwan wa Eliyakim,
31 Eliyakim wading mwan wa Meleya, Meleya wading mwan wa Mena, Mena wading mwan wa Matata, Matata wading mwan wa Natan, Natan wading mwan wa David,
32 David wading mwan wa Yese, Yese wading mwan wa Obed, Obed wading mwan wa Bowaz, Bowaz wading. mwan wa Solomon, Solomon wading mwan wa Nakishon,
33 Nakishon wading mwan wa Aminadab, Aminadab wading mwan wa Adimin, Adimin wading mwan wa Arini, Arini wading mwan wa Hesiron, Hesiron wading mwan wa Peres, Peres wading mwan wa Yuda,
34 Yuda wading mwan wa Jakob, Jakob wading mwan wa Isak, Isak wading mwan wa Aburaham, Aburaham wading mwan wa Terak, Terak wading mwan wa Nakor,
35 Nakor wading mwan wa Serug, Serug wading mwan wa Rehu, Rehu wading mwan wa Peleg, Peleg wading mwan wa Eber, Eber wading mwan wa Shela,
36 Shela wading mwan wa Kayinan, Kayinan wading mwan wa Aripakishad, Aripakishad wading mwan wa Sem, Sem wading mwan wa Nowa, Nowa wading mwan wa Lamek,
37 Lamek wading mwan wa Metushela, Metushela wading mwan wa Enok, Enok wading mwan wa Jered, Jered wading mwan wa Mahalalel, Mahalalel wading mwan wa Kayinan,
38 Kayinan wading mwan wa Enosh, Enosh wading mwan wa Set, Set wading mwan wa Adam, Adam wading mwan a Nzamb.
0 Akat kumwoz Yesu
1 Padiokalay Yesu mwi ngand ya piswimp ni wit wa Yordan, ndiy wading wizwil nich Mwiku Utumbila. Chawiy Mwiku Utumbila wamutwala mwi mpay.
2 Mwinimwa mwawiy mwamwozilau machuku makum manying kudi Sakudimban. Mu machuku minima mawonsu, Yesu kadiap chom. Chimapwa machuku minima, ndiy wova nzal.
3 Chad Sakudimban wamuleja anch: “Anch ey udi Mwan a Nzamb idiela bil diyal ed dikarumuka kwikal yakudia.”
4 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Muntu kakutwishap kwikal mwom mulong wa yakudia kusu.” ”
5 Sakudimban wamutwala pa ndond ya piur, chad pa kapamp kamwing kamu wamuleja mant mawonsu ma pa mangand.
6 Chawiy wamwela anch: “Am nikukwinkish ey ukash wawonsu, ni mapit ma mant ma mangand mawonsu. Yom yiney yawonsu ayinginkisha kal am, nikutwish kuyipan kudi muntu mwawonsu mudi nisotila.
7 Chawiy anch ey wangifukwil, yom yiney yawonsu yikez kwikal yeyey.”
8 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Chifanyidin kumwifukwil Chinawej Nzamb wey, ni kumusadil ndiy kusu!’ ”
9 Chad Sakudimban wamutwala kand ku Yerusalem, wamukandjik pa musong wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wamwel anch: “Anch ey udi Mwan a Nzamb, idjibula bil pansh.
10 Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Nzamb ukez kuyilej aruu end a mwiur kukulam ey nawamp.’
11 Ulondil kand anch: ‘Awiy akez kukwakil pa makas mau chakwel kangal mend yey yikwipwakalap ku mayal.’ ~
12 Pakwez Yesu wamwakula anch: “Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: ‘Kangal wamupak Chinawej Nzamb wey.’ ”
13 Chapwishay Sakudimban kumwoz Yesu mitapu yawonsu, wamusha, waya kuchingel chisu chikwau.
0 Yesu ukat kusambish mudimu mu Galalia
14 Chawiy Yesu wachirika mwi ngand ya Galalia, wading wizwil sens nich ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila. Katumb kend kwovakana mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu.
15 Ndiy wasambisha kulejan mu yikumbu ya kulembil, chawiy antu awonsu amushimana.
0 In Nazaret akat kumulik Yesu
16 Chawiy Yesu waya ku Nazaret kwakudilay, chad pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish ndiy wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb mudi mwadinga chaku chend. Ndiy wimana piur mulong wa kutang Mukand wa Nzamb, 
17 chad amwinkisha mukand wa Isay, muruu wa Nzamb. Ndiy wautangurila, chad wabudikin pa ndond yifundilau anch:
18 “Mwiku wa Chinawej udi ni yamam, mulong wantonda kal kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi atuzwendj. Mukand wa kuvung Ndiy wantuma kuyilej ankwal rusangu ra kuyikwol, ni kuyilej amputames rusangu ra kuyerik, ni kuyikwol azengodilau.
19 Wantuma kand kulejan chisu chiwamp cha ranaken ra Chinawej chikupandishay antwend.”
20 Yesu wavunga kand mukand, wauchirish kudi kalam wa chikumbu cha kulembil. Antu awonsu ading mwinimwa amwichila mes,
21 chad wayileja anch: “Yom yiwateshangany pinatanganga mu Mukand wa Nzamb yawanyin kal ilel unou.”
22 Antu awonsu itiya mazu mend, ashimwoka nakash mulong wa yom yiwamp yalonday. Chad alonda anch: “Ov, kindiyap winou mwan wa Josef?”
23 Yesu wayileja anch: “Chakin kamu, nij en ukwinlejany chishimu anch: ‘Mwingang, iyoka bil amwiney.’ Ukwinlejany kand anch: ‘Twateshil kal yom yawonsu yiwasadila ku Kapernaum, katat yisala kand kunoku mu ul wey wa chivadik.’ ”
24 Yesu wayileja kand anch: “Nakulejany anch, muruu wa Nzamb kakumulimishangap mu ul wend wa chivadik.
25 Chakin kamu, nakulejany anch, mu Isarel mwading adiaafu pa chirung cha Elija. Pa chirung chinicha kikwadingap ruvul mivu yisatu ni chikunku, kwikala kamungun nakash mwi ngand yawonsu.
26 Ap mwamwap nchik, Nzamb kamutumap Elija kudi mwin Isarel ap umwing, pakwez amutuma ching kusu kudi mwadiamufu wading ushich mu ul wa Sarepita, mwi ngand ya Sidon.
27 Mu Isarel mwading kand ayej a musong wa mak avud pa chirung cha Elisha, pakwez kwikil umwing wayerika, wawap, ching kusu Naman mwin Siria.”w
28 Antu awonsu ading mu chikumbu cha kulembil chovau mwamu, ajimana nakash.
29 Awiy atumboka, chad amudadamijan Yesu, amubudish pol pa ul, amutwal piur pa musong wa mukandu padinga ul wau. Awiy atonga kumubachikin mu ruwengil,
30 pakwez ndiy wayisuta mukach, waya kwend.
0 Muntu ukweta chilembil
31 Yesu waya mu ul wa Kapernaum mwi ngand ya Galalia, kwinikwa wayileja antu pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.
32 Awiy awonsu ashimwoka ku malejan mend, mulong walondanga mazu ma ulabu.
33 Mu chikumbu cha kulembil mwading muntu umwing wakweting chilembil muyimp. Wabarika dizu dikash anch:
34 “A! Yesu wa ku Nazaret, ov, usotil kutusal yom ik? Ov, ey wezang mulong wa kutushesh etu? Nij kamu nawamp anch, ey udi Utumbila wa Nzamb!”
35 Yesu wamuswejina chilembil muyimp, wamwel anch: “Nenet zong, mudiokala kamu muntu mwinou!” Chilembil wamwasa ikundj winou pansh kurutu kwa antu awonsu, chad wamudiokala wakad kumusal chom chiyimp.
36 Antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash, ipulijana anch: “Ov, mazu ma mutapu ik minam? Muntu mwinou ukat kulond nich ulabu ni ukash, ukat kuyilej ayilembil kudiokal, chad awiy adiokal!”
37 Katumb ka Yesu kapalangana mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu.
0 Yesu ukat kwok ayej avud
38 Yesu wadiokala mu chikumbu cha kulembil, waya ku chikumbu cha Simon. Makwend wa mband wa Simon wading uyedil mashik, chad amwipula Yesu mulong wa kumwok.
39 Yesu waya, wimanyin ku ulal, waubarikin musong wa mashik. Musong wamudiokala mband winou, walanka swa, chad wasambish kuyirijekin yakudia.
40 Chikwazweka urel, antu awonsu ading akweta ayej, ayiletola kudi Yesu. Ndiy wamwanzuka muntu ni muntu makas, chad wayok awonsu.
41 Ayilembil ayidiokala kand antu avud, abarokanga anch: “Ey udi Mwan a Nzamb!” Pakwez Yesu wayikanda ayilembil chakwel kangal alondamu, mulong awiy adi ij anch, ndiy udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
0 Yesu ukat kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb mu yikumbu ya kulembil
42 Chikwacha pamanch, Yesu wadiokala mu ul, waya kwi ndond yend amwinend. Antu amukimba, pamutanau, apakish Mwin kukwat ansh nich wand kumukangesh ndiy kuya.
43 Pakwez ndiy wayileja anch: “Chifanyidin am kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb mu mal makwau kand, wawiy mulong wantuminay Nzamb.”
44 Chad ndiy warumburilang mazu ma Nzamb mu yikumbu ya kulembil mwi ngand ya Yudeya yawonsu.
0 Yesu ukat kuyitazuk in kwilejend a kusambish
1 Dichuku dimwing, padingay Yesu wiminy ku chikumu cha dijiy dia Genesaret, antu avud ashinyijana chakwel aseja piswimp, mulong wa kutesh dizu dia Nzamb. 
2 Ndiy wamana maat maad amakakilang kal ku chikumu. Ayibind a ansh amasha, chad aya, asambish koyish mand mau.
3 Yesu wandama mu waat wa Simon, wamwel anch: “Mbachikaku pakemp pa mem.” Chawiy Yesu washakama mu waat, wasambish kuyilej antu. .
4 Chapwishay Yesu kuyilej antu, ndiy wamwela Simon anch: “Twal waat ku mem makurikina, chad ey nau arund ney, djibulany mand men mu mem chakwel ukwatany ansh.”
5 Simon wamwakula anch: “Nsalejam, twarishang kal nich uchuku wawonsu, kitukwatilap chom. Pakwez mulong wa dizu diey tukupakish bil kand kudjibul mand mu mem.”
6 Chapwishau kuta mand, akwata ansh avud nakash, chad mand mela kwapwok.
7 Chawiy ayitazuka arund nau adinga mu waat ukwau mulong wa kuyikwash. Awiy eza, izwish maat mawonsu maad nich ansh, chawiy maat mela kujiy.
8 Chamanay Simon Pita yom yiney, ndiy wamwasina Yesu manungun pansh, wamwel anch: “Nsalejam, sejany, mwan, kulemp, mulong am nidi mwin yitil!”
9 Simon ni arund nend ashimwoka nakash mulong wa ansh avud akwatau.
10 Jakobu ni Yohan, an a Zebede, awiy kamu arund nend a Simon, niyau ashimwoka kand mulong wa yom yiney. Chad Yesu wamuleja Simon anch: “Kangal wov kwey wom. Kudiokal katat, ey ukez kwikal mwin kulet antu kudi am mudi mukata kuletay chibind ansh mu waat.”
11 Awiy atuntwisha waat kwimpat, asha yom yawonsu, aya nend Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej wa mak
12 Padingay Yesu mu ul umwing, muyej wa mak umwing weza kudi ndiy. Pamumanay Yesu, wamuwila pansh, wamulembijek anch: “Nsalejam, anch ey ukatil, ukutwish kwingok chakwel niwapa.”
13 Yesu wonana chikas, wamukwataku, wamwel anch: “Nikatil kusal mwamu. Katat ey, yerik, uwapa!” Pawiy pinipa kamu musong wa mak wamudiokala.
14 Yesu wamukoja anch: “Kangal wamulejamu muntu. Yang swa kudi mwin kupesh chakwel akutala. Chad upana yakupesh mudi mwalonday Moses, chakwel chijikan kudi antu awonsu anch, ey wayerik kal.”
15 Pakwez katumb ka Yesu kapalangana kamu kwawonsu. Chad yisak ya antu yeza kudi ndiy mulong wa kumutesh ni kwiyokish.
16 Pakwez Yesu wayanga mwi mpay mulong wa kulembil.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej wa kalip
17 Dichuku dimwing Yesu wading ni kulejan. Kwading Afaris amwing ni alej a Yijil adiokala mu mal mawonsu ma mu Galalia, ni ma mu Yudeya, ni mu Yerusalem ading ashich kwinikwa. Yesu wading nich ukash wa Chinawej wa kuyok ayej.
18 Antu amwing eza nend muyej wa kalip, amusendil pa ulal. Apakisha kumwandjik mu chikumbu chakwel amutula kurutu kwa Yesu.
19 Pakwez kamanap kwa kumusutishin mulong wa runtu. Awiy amutwala piur pa chikumbu, ajikul dipan. Chad amushirishinap ni ulal wend, amutul mukach mwa.antu kurutu kwa Yesu.
20 Chamanay Yesu ritiy rau rujim, wamwela muyej anch: “Murund nam, akulikishin kal yitil yey.”
21 Alej a Yijil nau Afaris anunganijana anch: “Ov, winou muntu ik usaalena masaal mwamu? Ching Nzamb kusu ndiy ukutwisha kulikishin yitil!”
22 Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wayela anch: “Ov. mulong wak utongilanya mwamu?
23 Ov, chipipela chisu. kulond anch: ‘Akulikishin kal yitil yey,’ ap kulond anch: “Tumbuk, uya kwey’?
24 Nisotil kukwijikishany anch, Mwan a Muntu ukwet ulabu pansh panap wa kulikishin yitil.” Chawiy Yesu wamwela muyej wa kalip anch: “Nakulej anch, lank, non ulal wey, yang kwol kwey!”
25 Pawiy pinipa kamu, muntu mwinou walanka mukach mwa antu awonsu, wanon ulal wading ulelay. Chad waya kwol kwend ni kumushiman Nzamb.
26 Antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash! Ova wom nakash, amushiman Nzamb anch: “Ilel unou twaman kal yom yiwamp yikwamushena! ”
0 Yesu ukat kumutazuk Levi
27 Chiyasuta yom yiney, Yesu wabudika, wamuman mwin kulambwish yitad, dijin diend Levi, ushich mwi ndond ya kulambwishin yitad. Chad Yesu wamwel anch: “Ez tuya, wikal mwin kwilej wam.”
28 Chawiy Levi watumbuka, washa yom yawonsu, waya nend Yesu.
29 Levi wamusadila Yesu musambu ujim kwol kwend. Wayitazuka kand in kulambwish yitad avud pamwing ni antu akwau.
30 Afaris amwing ni alej a Yijil amwing adinga mu chisak cha Afaris, anunganijana, chad ayel in kwilej a Yesu anch: “Ov, mulong wak udilanya ni kuna pamwing ni in kulambwish yitad ni in yitil?”
31 Yesu wayakula anch: “Antu akash kakuswirangap mwingang, ching kusu antu ayedila.
32 Am kinezap kuyitazuk antu atentamina kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau, ching kusu in yitil.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kujil yakudia
33 Antu amwing amwipula Yesu anch: “In kwilej a Yohan akat kulembilang ni kujil yakudia, chawiy chimwing kand ni in kwilej au Afaris, pakwez in kwilejeyey akat kudia ni kuna.
34 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, ukutwishany kuyikangesh arund a ngatan kudia kwa musambu pachidiay kal ngatan pamwing nau awiy? Bwat, chikasiken!
35 Pakwez dichuku dikez kushik dikez kumudioshau ngatan pakach pau, chad awiy akez kujil yakudia.” i
36 Yesu wayitila kand chishimu chinech: “Kwikil muntu ukwapula chibel cha chidjal chisu mulong wa kuchichimin pa chidjal chikur. Anch ndiy wasal mwamu, ukushesh chidjal chisu, chad kand chibel chisu kichikwilikanap nich chidjal >chikur.
37 Chawiy chimwing kand, kwikil muntu ukuteka maar ma nviny masu mu jinsab jikur ja yikit. Anch wasal mwamu, maar ma nviny masu makubuz jinsab jinej. chawiy maar masu makwichikin pansh, ni yikit yikusheshik.
38 Pakwez chifanyidin kutek maar ma nviny masu mu jinsab jisu ja yikit!
39 Chawiy, kwikil muntu ukukata maar ma nviny masu anch wasambelang kal kuna maar ma nviny makur. Ndiy ukulond anch. ‘Maar makur mapandaken kuwap.’ ”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish
1 Yesu wasutila mu yir ya tidiku pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. In kwilejend asambisha kukatwol mitu ya tidiku, chad ayinyikis mu makas, adjibul yipapal, awiy adia tumabuj.
2 Afaris amwing ayipula anch: “Ov, mulong wak usadilanya yom yiney pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish? Yijil yetu yilikishin kusal mwamu!”
3 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, en kand kal utanganyap yom yasalay David ni antu adingay nau pa chisu chovau nzal?
4 Ndiy wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wanon mabot matekangau kurutu kwa Chinawej, wamadia, chad wayinkishap antu adingay nau. Pakwez Yijil yetu yilondil anch, ching kusu in kupesh awiy akudia mabot minima.” .
5 Chad Yesu walonda kand anch: “Mwan a Muntu, ndiy Mwant wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.”
0 Muntu ukweta chikas cha kalip
6 Pa Dichuku dikwau dia Kwiswedish, Yesu wandama mu chikumbu cha kulembil, chad wasambisha kulejan. Mwinimwa mwading muntu uyedina kalip chikas cha katatuku.
7 Alej a Yijil amwing, ni Afaris amwing asota mulong wa kumufund nich Yesu. Chawiy ashinshika kumutal anch ukwokan pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. 
8 Pakwez Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wamwel muyej anch: “Tumbuk, ez kunoku.” Muyej watumbuka, waya wiman kwinikwa.
9 Chad Yesu wayileja anch: “Nikwipulany bil anch, ov, Yijil yetu yilondil kusal yom ik pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish? Kukwash anch kusal nayimp? Kumupandish muntu anch kumujip?”
10 Yesu wayitala awonsu, chad wamwel muyej wa kalip anch. “Onan chikas chey.” Muyej wasala mwamu, chad chikas chend chayerika.
11 Awiy ajimana nakash, asambish kutadikijan ayinau anch: “Ov, chom ik tukumusala Yesu?”
0 Yesu ukat kutond atwimbuy end dikum ni aad
12 Pa chisu chinicha, Yesu waya ku mukandu mulong wa kulembil. Ndiy washakama kwinikwa uchuku wawonsu mulong wa kumulembil Nzamb. 
13 Chikwacha pamanch, wayitazuka in kwilejend, chad watondap dikum ni aad, apilay anch, atwimbuy end.
14 Majin mau mading Simon, wapilay anch, Pita, ni mwanamakwend Andare, ni Jakobu, ni Yohan, ni Filip, ni Bartelemi,
15 ni Mateu, ni Tomas, ni Jakobu, mwan ikundj wa Alfe, ni Simon mwin kukankamen yom ya ngand, 
16 ni Yuda, mwan ikundj wa Jakobu, ni Yudas Isakariot, wikala mwin matungu.
0 Yesu ukat kulejan ni kwokan
17 Padiokalay Yesu ku mukandu nau atwimbuy end, weza wiman pa ndond yalalela padingau in kwilejend akwau avud. Kwinikwa kwading chisak chijim cha antu adiokala mwi ngand yawonsu ya Yudeya, ni mu Yerusalem, ni mu musumb wa Tir ni wa Sidon yidia piswimp ni ku karung.
18 Awiy eza mulong wa kumutesh ni kwiyokish ku mayej mau. Niyau antu ading akweta ayilembil eza ni kwiyokish.
19 Antu awonsu apakisha kumupukun mulong ukash wamubudikanga, chad wayokanga awonsu.
0 Kuyuk ni kuyindam
20 Yesu wayitala in kwilejend, wayilej anch: “Wayukany kwen en udianya atuzwendj, mulong Want wa Nzamb udi wenen!
21 “Wayukany kwen en wovilanya nzal katat, mulong ukez kumanany yakudia yivud! “Wayukany kwen en udidilanya katat, mulong ukez kusangarany!
22 “Wayukany kwen pakukukisanyau kudi antu ni pakukulikanyau, ni pakukudiwolanyau, ni pakukukwelanyau anch, udiany antu ayimp mulong udiany in kwilej a Mwan a Muntu!
23 Anch yom yiney yamekan, en sangarany kwen, sangarany kamu nakash, mulong akulamidinany difut dijim mwiur. Mulong anshankurau niyau ayisala aruu a Nzamb nayimp.
24 “Pakwez riyind kudi en udianya ampich katat, mulong mapit men makusangarishinany kwen!
25 “Riyind kudi en ukwetanya yakudia yivud katat, mulong ukez kwovany nzal! “Riyind kudi en ukwetanya musangar katat, mulong ukez kutekany ntand ni kudil!
26 “Riyind kudi en anch antu awonsu akat kukushimanany. Mulong anshankurau niyau alondanga yom yiwamp kudi aruu a makasu.
0 Yikatany akankuny
27 “Pakwez nikulejinany en winteshilany anch, yikatany akankuny nen, salany yom yiwamp kudi akukisinanya.
28 Yiyukishany akata kukushingany, yilembilany akata kukuzengolany.
29 Anch muntu wakubul mu ditam, mulika akubul kand mu ditam dikwau. Anch muntu wakwamuk kabwik wey, mulika atambul kand chikut chey.
30 Mwinkisha muntu mwawonsu ukwitila chom, chad anch muntu wakwamuk chom chey, kangal wamwipul kuchichirish. 
31 Sal yom kudi antu akwau, mudi muukatila ing niyau akusadilang ey.
32 “Anch wayikatany ching kusu antu akukatilany en, ing, ukutwishany nchik kutambul chiyukish? In yitil niyau akat kuyikat anm ayikatila!
33 Anch wasalany yom yiwamp kudi antu akata kukusalany niyen yom yiwamp, ing, ukutwishany nchik kutambul chiyukish? In yitil niyau akat kusal mwamu!
34 Anch wayisondjikany ching kusu antu uchingejinany anch akukuchirishinany, ing, ukutwishany nchik kutambul chiyukish? In yitil niyau akat kuyisondjik in yitil, chakwel akutwish kuyichirishin kand yom yasondamau!
35 Pakwez yikatany akankuny nen, yisadilany yom yiwamp. Yisondjikany wakad kuchingej anch akukuchirishinany. Mwamu ukez kutambulany difut dijim, chad ukez kwikalany an a Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu. Mulong ndiy ukat kumekesh kuwap kwend kudi antu akad kumujikitish, ni kudi antu ayimp.
36 Ikalany in riy mudi mudiay Tatukwen mwin riy.
0 Kangal wayirumburishany akwen
37 “Kangal wayirumburishany akwen, chad Nzamb kakukurumburishanyap niyen. Kangal wayifishany nich akwen, chad Nzamb kakukufishanyap nich niyen. Yilikishinany akwen, chad Nzamb ukukulikishinany niyen.
38 Yinkishany akwen, chad Nzamb ukukwinkishany niyen. Ndiy ukukwinkishany chilik chiwamp, cha kunyikumun, achiband, chizwil sens, yikwau yapalok pansh. Chilik chiukata kuyilikinany nich akwen, chawiy chikez kukwilikinanyau nich niyen kudi Nzamb.”
39 Yesu wayitila chishimu anch: “Mputames kakutwishap kumutakel mputames mukwau. Anch wasal mwamu, awonsu mwaad wau akuwil mu mwinkubu.
40 Kwikil nsand udia mujim kumupandakanamu mulej wend. Pakwez nsand mwawonsu, pakupwishay malejan mend, ukez kwikal mudi mulej wend.
41 “Ov, mulong wak ukata kutal kachitaj kadia mu dis dia mukwen, pakwez kiubangilakup kutal mutond udia mu dis diey amwiney?
42 Ov, ukutwish nchik kumulej mukwen anch: ‘Mukwetu, amboku, el nikudiosh kachitaj kadia mu dis diey,’ anch ey kiumenap mutond udia mu dis diey amwiney? Ey, mwin rubabek, ey! Sambel bil kudiosh mutond udia mu dis diey amwiney, chad ukutwish lel kuman nawamp chakwel udiosha kachitaj kadia mu dis dia mukwen.
0 Chishimu cha mutond ni mabuj mau
43 “Mutond uwamp ukutwishap kusong mabuj mayimp, ap mutond uyimp ukutwishap kusong mabuj mawamp.
44 Mutond wawonsu akat kuwijikin ku mabuj mau. Kakat kupolangap mabuj ma nfung ku mitond ya miy, ap kand kakat kupolangap mabuj ma nviny ku yifukis ya miy.
45 Muntu muwamp ukat kubudish yom yiwamp mu chipau cha yom yiwamp ya mu muchim wend. Muntu muyimp ukat kubudish yom yiyimp mu chipau chend cha yom yiyimp, mulong kan ka muntu kakat kubudish yom yizwila mu muchim wend.
0 Chishimu cha in kutung aad
46 “Ov, mulong wak ukata kwintazukany anch: ‘Nsalejetu, Nsalejetu,’ chad en kiukusalanganyap yom yinikulejinanya?
47 Nisotil kukulejany mutapu udiay muntu ukata kwez kudi am, ni kutesh mazu mam, chad wamasadil.
48 Ndiy udi mudi muntu ukata kutung chikumbu chend, wapund mufulandal ulemp, chad watung dishin dia chikumbu pa diyal. Chawiy pizulay wit, mambek mibula ku chikumbu chinech, pakwez kichanyikekap, mulong achitunga nawamp.
49 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kutesh mazu mam wakad kumasadil, udi mudi muntu watunga chikumbu chend pansh, wakad kutung dishin. Chawiy chimeza mabeb mibul ku chikumbu, chawa kapamp kamwing. Kusheshik kwa chikumbu chinicha kwading kujim!”
0 Yesu ukat kumwok kashalapol wa mukurump wa amasalay
1 Chapwishay Yesu kuyilej antu yom yiney yawonsu, ndiy waya ku ul wa Kapernaum. 
2 Kwinikwa kwading mukurump wa amasalay a in Rom wading ukwet kashalapol ukatilay nakash. Kashalapol winou wading uyedil, piswimp ni kufa.
3 Mukurump wa amasalay, chateshay rusangu ra Yesu, wayituma amakurump amwing a in Yuda, mulong wa kumutazuk Yesu chakwel eza kumwok kashalapol wend.
4 Awiy ashika kudi Yesu, amulembijek nakash anch: "Chifanyidin ey kumukwash muntu mwinou.
5 Ndiy utukatil etu in Yuda nakash, chad watutungidil kand chikumbu cha kulembil."
6 Chawiy Yesu waya nau pamwing. Chad padingay kand kal ashika kulemp, mukurump wa amasalay watuma arund nend kumulej Yesu anch: "Nsalejam, kangal wiswil kwey. Am kiniwanyidinap chakwel ey wandam mu chikumbu cham.
7 Chawiy chimwing kand, niyam kiniwanyidinap kwez kudi ey. Pakwez lond kusu dizu din, chad kashalapol wam ukuyerik kwend.
8 Am nikwet amakurump ajim antakedila, chad niyam nikwet amasalay initakedila. Anch namwel isalay umwing anch: 'Yang!' ndiy ukuya. Ap anch namwel mukwau anch: 'Ez!' ndiy ukwez. Anch namulej muswik wam anch: 'Sal chom ech!' ndiy ukat kuchisal.
9 Chateshay Yesu mazu minam, washimwoka. Wakarumuka, watal ku chisak cha antu ading amulondwila, wayilej anch: "Nakulejany chakin, am kand kal nimanap ritiy mudi riner, ap mukach mwa in Isarel in!"
10 Aruu atumau achirika ku chikumbu cha mukurump wa amasalay, chad amutan kashalapol wayerikang kal.
0 Yesu ukat kumulangwish mwan wa mwadiamufu mu rufu
11 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, Yesu waya ku ul wa Nayin, pamwing ni in kwilejend ni chisak chijim cha antu.
12 Pashikau ku chis cha ul, asankana antu asendil chital cha mufu, ayil ni kumujik. Mufu win wading mwan kapwokal wa mwadiamufu. Chisak chijim cha antu adiokala mu ul, ayil nend mwadiamufu pamwing. 
13 Nsalejetu, chamumanay mwadiamufu winou wamwovila riy, chad wamwela anch: “Lik kudil.”
14 Ndiy waseja piswimp, wakwat ku chital, chad antu ading achisendila imana. Chawiy Yesu walonda anch: "Murund nam! Nakulej anch, lank!"
15 Mufu walanka, washakam, wasambish kulond, chad Yesu wamupana kudi makwend.
16 Wom wayikwata antu awonsu, chad amushimana Nzamb anch: "Muruu mujim wa Nzamb wameken kal pakach petu! Nzamb wez kal mulong wa kuyipandish antwend!"
17 Katumb ka Yesu kapalangana mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu, ni mu mangand makwau ma piswimp.
0 Aruu adiokila kwa Yohan Mubatish
18 Pamulejau Yohan yom yiney yawonsu kudi in kwilejend, ndiy watazukap aad,
19 wayitum kudi Nsalejetu mulong wa kumwipul anch: "Ov, ey yey twadia tuchingedila kwez, ap anch tufanyidin kuchingel mukwau?"
20 Chashikau kudi Yesu, amuleja anch: “Yohan Mubatish watutumang kukwipul anch, yey twadia tuchingedila kwez, ap anch tufanyidin kuchingel mukwau?”
21 Pa chisu chinicha kamu, Yesu woka antu avud akweting misong ya mitapu ni mitapu, wadiosha kand ayilembil, ni kuyok amputames avud.
22 Chad Yesu wayakula aruu_atumay Yohan anch: “Yangany ukamulejany Yohan yom yiwamenanya ni yiwateshilanya. Amputames akat kuman, ayilim akat kwend, in musong wa mak akat kuyerik, atujikamatu akat kutesh, afu akat kuvumbuk ikal kand aom, ni Rusangu Ruwamp akat kurulejan kudi atuzwendj.
23 Wayuk kwend muntu mwawonsu wakad kwidjidjek mulong wamam!”
24 Padiokalau aruu atumay Yohan, Yesu wasambisha kuyilej antu mulong wa Yohan anch: “Piwayany. mwi mpay kudi Yohan, ov, wachingejanya kuman yom ik? Ov, wachingejanya kuman disuku dianyikeshangau kudi rinkind?
25 Ov, wayanya ni kutal chom ik? Ov, wayanya ni kutal muntu udjita yidjal ya ufun? Antu akata kudjal yidjal yiwamp ya ufun akweta mwom wa wimpich ashich ching mu yipang ya ant!
26 Nlejany bil, ov, yom ik yiwayanya ni kutal? Ov, wayanya ni kumutal muruu wa Nzamb? Mwawiy, chakin kamu, pakwez wamananya umupandakena muruu wa Nzamb.
27 Yohan ndiy kamu ulejenau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Yam Nzamb nikeza kutum muruu wam kurutu kwey mulong wa kukurijekin ey njil.”
28 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Yohan udi mujim kupandakan antu awonsu a pa mangand. Pakwez upandakena kukep mu Want wa Nzamb, ndiy umupandakenamu Yohan kujimb.”
29 Antu awonsu amutesha. In kulambwish yitad, pamwing ni antu amwing ading aziyidil ku kutentam kwa Nzamb, itiya kuyibatish kudi Yohan.
30 Pakwez Afaris, pamwing ni alej a Yijil, kitiyap kutenchik kwa Nzamb, chad alika kuyibatish kudi Yohan.
31 Yesu wadandamena kulond anch: “Ov, katat antu a chirung chinech nikutwish kuyilikej mudi anany? Ov, ayifanyin anany?
32 Adi mudi anikanch ashicha mu chiku. Chisak chimwing chikat kubarokin chisak chikwau anch: ‘Etu twakuwangilangany miminy ya kwatijan uruu, pakwez en walikangany kupangan! Etu twawangang miminy ya rufu, pakwez en walikangany kudil!’
33 Yohan Mubatish weza, wajil yakudia, walik kuna maar ma nviny, chad en walondangany anch: ‘Ndiy ukwet chilembil!’
34 Chawiy Mwan a Muntu niyend weza. Wading ni kudia ni kuna, chad en walondangany anch: ‘Talany muntu mwinou! Ndiy upumbil kudia ni kuna, udi murund wa in kulambwish yitad ni in yitil!’
35 Pakwez manangu ma Nzamb makat kumekesh win yakin wau kudi muntu mwawonsu ukata kumitiy.”
0 Yesu adi mu chikumbu cha Simon, Mufaris
36 Mufaris umwing wamutazuka Yesu kuya kudia kwol kwend. Chad Yesu waya, wandam mu chikumbu, washakam ku mes mulong wa kudia.
37 Mu ul winiwa mwading mband mwin yitil. Chateshay anch Yesu ukat kudia mu chikumbu cha Mufaris, mband winiwa weza nich kasab ka diyal dia alibater kizwil malash sens.
38 Ndiy wimana kwinyim ku mend ma Yesu, chad wadila, watalesh yidjatil ya Yesu nich mansoj, wakuswola yidjatil nich nswich jend ja ku mutu. Chad wasuswa yidjatil yend mulong wa kumulimish, wamwichilaku malash.
39 Chamanay Mufaris chom chinech, watong mu muchim wend anch: “Chakin, muntu mwinou anch wadi muruu wa Nzamb, ing wamwijikang mband wamukwata ou. Ing wijikang mutapu wa mwom wend wa yitil!”
40 Yesu wamwel anch: “Simon, nikwet dizu dia kukulej.” Ndiy wakula anch: “Mulej, lond kwey.”
41 Yesu wamuleja anch: “Kwading muntu umwing wayisondjika antu aad nfalang. Umwing wading ukwet chikal cha nfalang ja utad wa argent yitot yitan, mukwau wading ukwet chikal cha nfalang ja utad wa argent makum matan.
42 Awonsu mwaad wau kwikil umwing watwisha kumuchirishin, chawiy ndiy wayilikishina awonsu yikal yau. Ov, nany wa pakach pau ukumukata ndiy kupandakan?”
43 Simon wamwakula anch: “Am natong anch muntu ’ walikishinau chikal chijim.” Yesu wamwela anch: “Ey walond kal nawamp.”
44 Ndiy wakarumuka, wamutal mband, chad wamwel Simon anch: “Ov, ey umen winou? Pinandamanga mu chikumbu chey, ey kiwanginkishangap mem ma kowish yidjatil yam. Pakwez mband winou woyishang kal yidjatil yam nich mansoj mend, wayikuswol kand nich nswich jend ja ku mutu.
45 Ey wangakang wakad kwinsusu, pakwez kudiokal pinandaminanga ndiy kalikinap kususu yidjatil yam.
46 Ey kiwanzizilangap many pa mutu wam. Pakwez ndiy wanzizilang kal malash ku yidjatil yam.
47 Chawiy nakulej kal anch, rukat rend rujim ramekesh kal anch, yitil yend yivud ayilikishin kal. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu walikishidinau yom yikemp, ukat kumekesh kand rukat rukemp.”
48 Chawiy Yesu wamwela mband anch: “Yitil ayilikishin kal.”
49 Antu ading ashichay nau ku mes anunganijana anch: “Ov, muntu mwinou nany ukutwisha kulikishin yitil?”
50 Pakwez Yesu wamwela mband anch: “Ey wapand kal mulong wangitiyij kal am. Yang kwey nich chisambu.
0 Amband amutwalaku Yesu
1 Chiyasuta yom yiney, Yesu wendangana mu misumb ni mu mal mulong wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb. In kwilejend dikum ni aad amutwalaku,
2 pamwing ni amband amwing okay, ni adioshay ayilembil. Majin mau mading Mariy, wapilau anch, Mariy wa ku ul bai Magadala, ndiy kamu wadioshau ayilembil sambwad,
3 ni Yohana, mband wa Kuza, kalam wa chikumbu cha Herod, ni Suzan, ni amband akwau avud apananga yom yau mulong wa kumukwash Yesu ni in kwilejend.
0 Chishimu cha mwin kukus mbut
4 Antu adiokalanga ku ul ni ul, eza kudiYesu, chad chakumanganau chisak chijim, Yesu wayitila chishimu anch:
5 “Muntu umwing waya ni kukus mbut. Padingay ni kukus mbut mu chir, jimwing jawila mwi njil. Antu ajidjatola, chad atujil ajidia bwi.
6 Jimbut jikwau jawila pa mayal makweta divu dikemp. Pijasapuka, jauma swa, mulong divu kidiakwetingap chitalosh.
7 Mbut jikwau jawila mu yifukis ya miy. anus yakula pamwing ni mbut, chad yakas, mbut jafa.
8 Chad mbut jikwau jawila pa divu diwamp, jakul, jasong mabuj chitot chitot.” Yesu walonda dizu piur anch: “Anch ukwetany matu, teshany kamu nawamp!”
0 Mulong walondilangay Yesu mu yishimu
9 In kwilej a Yesu amwipula kurumburik kwa chishimu chinech.
10 Ndiy wayakula anch: “En akwinkishanya kal kudi Nzamb ronganyin ra ujindj wa yom ya Want wa Nzamb. Pakwez kudi antu akwau, ching kuyirumburil mu yishimu chakwel awiy akutwish kutal wakad kushinshik nawamp, akutwish kutesh wakad kwov kurumburik.
0 Yesu ukat kurumburil chishimu cha mwin kukus Bide
11 “Chishimu chinech chirumburikin anch, mbut diawiy dizu dia Nzamb.
12 Mbut jawila mwi njil jidi mudi antu akata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb, pakwez Sakudimban ukat kwez kudiosh dizu mu michim yau mulong alika kwitiyij kupand.
13 Mbut jawila pa mayal makweta divu dikemp jidi mudi antu akata kutesh dizu mcg orien Se  Yifukis ya miy dia Nzamb ni kwitiy swa. Pakwez kidikat kuyandamap nakash. Akat kwitiy chisu chikemp, pakwez anch chisu cha mar chashik, akat kuwa.
14 Mbut jawila mu yifukis ya miy jidi mudi antu akata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb, pakwez yakamish, ni mapit, ni misangar ya mangand yikat kuyikangesh kukul. Chad kakat kusongap mabuj.
15 Mbut jawila pa divu diwamp jidi mudi antu akata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb, chad adilam mu muchim uwamp wa kuziyil. Akat kudandamen djat ni pakusongilau mabuj.
0 Chishimu cha mwend wa kasu ubwikinau
16 “Kwikil muntu ukata kulimik mwend wa kasu, chad waubwikin mwi nnung, ap kuutek mwishin mwa ulal. Pakwez akat kuutek pa ndond ya piur, chakwel ukuyimunyikin antu awonsu adia mu chikumbu.
17 “Yom yawonsu yijingamina yikez kumeken_patok. Ujindj wawonsu akez kuujingunin ni kuumekesh patok.
18 “Chawiy, babalany, mutapu ukata kuteshany, mulong muntu mwawonsu ukweta kal chom, Nzamb ukez kumuwejinaku yikwau. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu uburedina, Nzamb ukez kumwamuk kakemp katongilay anch: “Nikwet.’ ”
0 Anchend a Yesu ni makwend
19 Anchend a Yesu ni makwend eza kudi ndiy, pakwez katwishap kumusej piswimp mulong wa runtu.
20 Muntu umwing wamuleja Yesu anch: “Makwey ni anchey iminy pol. asotil kukuman.”
21 Yesu wayileja antu awonsu anch: “Makwam ni ancham. awiy kamu antu akata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb ni kudiziyil.”
0 Yesu ukat kunenetish mambek
22 Dichuku dimwing Yesu wandama mu waat pamwing ni in kwilejend, wayileja anch: “Chifanyidin tuyany ushad wa dijiy.” Chad atumbuka, aya.
23 Padingau ayil mu waat, Yesu walala tul. Kukashimuk, rinkind mukash wasambisha kutut pa dijiy, chad waat wasambisha kwizul mem, chawiy awonsu ading mu rufu.
24 In kwilej aseja piswimp, amulangwish Yesu. Amwela anch: “Mwant, Mwant! Tusotil kufa!” Yesu walanka, wamukand rinkind ni mambek. Chad yawonsu yaneneta, yikuchik kamu zong.
25 Chawiy Yesu wayela in kwilejend anch: “Oy, ritiy ren ridi kwisu?” Pakwez awiy ashimwoka nakash, ov wom, anunganijan anch: “Ov, muntu mwinou udi nany? Ndiy wamukanda kal rinkind ni mambek, chad yawonsu yamuziyil!”
0 Yesu ukat kumudiosh muntu ayilembil
26 Yesu ni in kwilejend ashika ushad wa dijiy dia Galalia, mwi ngand ya in Gerasen.
27 Patuntukay Yesu kwimpat, wamusankana muntu umwing ukweta ayilembil udiokil mu ul. Muntu mwinou washakama chisu chilemp wakad kudjal maswin ap kushakam kwol kwend, pakwez yisu yawonsu wading ushich mu jinzay.
28 Pamumanay Yesu, ndiy wabarika nich dizu dikash, wawa ku mend ma Yesu, watoy anch: “Yesu, Mwan a Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu! Ov, mulong ik ukweta ni yamam? Nilemb, amboku, kangal wanmesh mar!”
29 Ndiy walonda mwamu mulong Yesu wading wamulejang kal chilembil kumudiokal muntu. Tupamp tuvud chilembil wamuwilanga muntu mwinou. Ap anch amukasangap kal nchik jimbwambu ku mend ni ku makas mulong wa kumulam, muntu mwinou wakatwolanga jimbwambu. Chad chilembil wamudadamijananga, wamutwal mwi mpay.
30 Yesu wamwipula muntu anch: “Dijin diey yey nany?” Ndiy wakula anch: “Dijin diam yam Muril.” Ndiy walonda mwamu mulong ayilembil avud ading amuwila kal.
31 Chawiy ayilembil amulembijeka Yesu chakwel kangal ayibachikin mu ruwengil.
32 Kwinikwa kwading chisak chijim cha ayibond ading ni kudiang pa chinanginang. Chawiy ayilembil amulembijeka Yesu chakwel ndiy ayitiy kwandam mu ayibond, chad ndiy wayitiya.
33 Awiy adiokala mu muntu, andam mu ayibond. Chisak chawonsu cha ayibond chadiokala pa chinanginang, chakurumukin mu dijiy, chad chajiy chawonsu.
34 Atufung a ayibond, chamanau yom yiney, achina mau, apalangesh rusangu mu ul ni mu makunku.
35 Antu adiokala mu ul, aya ni kutal yom yasuta kwinikwa. Chashikau kudi Yesu, amutana muntu wadiokalau kudi ayilembil, washakamang kal ku mend ma Yesu. Wading wadjalang kal maswin, ni manangu mend machirikang kal. Antu awonsu ova wom nakash.
36 Antu amana chom chinech, ayileja antu akwau eza mutapu wamwokau.
37 Chawiy antu awonsu a ngand ya Gerasen amwela Yesu kudiokal mwi ngand yau, mulong ading ovil wom nakash. Chad Yesu wandama mu waat, waya kwend.
38 Muntu wadiokalau kudi ayilembil wamulembijeka Yesu anch: “Chifanyidin am kuya ni yeyey.” Pakwez Yesu kitiyap kuya nend, wamwel anch:
39 “Chirik kwol kwen, ukalejan yom yakusadilay kal Nzamb.” Chawiy muntu mwinou waya, wendangan mu ul wawonsu mulong wa kulejan yom yawonsu yamusadilau kudi Yesu.
0 Mwan wa Yayirus ni mband wamupukuna ku maswin
40 Pachirikay Yesu ushad wa dijiy, antu amwaka nawamp mulong awonsu ading amuchingedil.
41 Muntu umwing, dijin diend Yayirus, washika. Ndiy wading mwin kutakel wa chikumbu cha kulembil. Wawa ku mend ma Yesu, wamulembijek mulong wa kuya nend kwol kwend,
42 mulong mwanend mband kapwokal wa mivu ya kuvadik dikum ni yaad wading piswimp ni kufa. Padingay Yesu uyil mwi njil, chisak cha antu chamushinyesha mutambu ni mutambu.
43 Mu chisak chinech mwading mband wading ukwet musong wa rulong ra mash mivu dikum ni yaad. Ndiy washesha nfalang jend jawonsu kudi amingang, pakwez kwikil umwing watwisha kumwok.
44 Ndiy wasuta mukach mwa chisak, wasej kwinyim kwa Yesu, chad wamupukun ku ruzez ra kabwik wend. Kukashimuk, musong wend wa rulong ra mash wapwa kapamp kamwing.
45 Chawiy Yesu wipula anch: “Ov, nany wampukunangaku?” Antu awonsu atadika kwau, chad Pita wamwela anch: “Mwant, antu akushinyeshin mutambu ni mutambu.”
46 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Nij nawamp muntu umwing wampukunangaku, mulong novang ukash wandiokal.”
47 Mband wamana anch: “Anjingunin kal.” Chawiy wazalizala, wez wawa ku mend ma Yesu. Chad wamuleja Yesu kurutu kwa antu awonsu mulong wamupukwinangay, ni mutapu wayerikay kal kapamp kamwing.
48 Yesu wamwela anch: “Mwanam mband, pe peta kal radars wangitiyij kal am. Yang kwey nich chisambu.” aa
49 Padingay Yesu ni kulond, muruu weza, udiokil ku chikumbu cha Yayirus, wamulej anch: “Mwaney mband wafang kal, kangal wamuswidiosh kand kwey Mulej.”
50 Pakwez Yesu, chateshay chom chinech, wamuleja Yayirus anch: “Kangal wov wom, itiyij kwey. Mwaney mband ukuyerik kwend.”
51 Chashikay Yesu ku chikumbu, kasotap muntu mukwau kwandam, ching kusu Pita, ni Yohan, ni Jakobu, pamwing ni tatukwend ni makwend wa mwan.
52 Antu awonsu ading kwinikwa ading ni kudil ni kunenganan mulong wa mwan. Chad Yesu wayela anch: “Likany kudil. Mwan kafilap kwend, ulel kwend tul!” re
53 Antu awonsu amusipa mulong ading ij anch, mwan wafang kal.
54 Pakwez Yesu wamukwata mwan ku chikas, wamwel anch: “Mwanam, lank!”
55 Chawiy mupim wa mwan wachirika, walank kapamp kamwing, chad Yesu wayileja kumwinkish mwan yakudia.
56 Anvajend ashimwoka nakash, pakwez Yesu wayikanda chakwel kangal amulejap muntu ap umwing chom chamekana kal.
0 Yesu ukat kuyitum in kwilejend dikum ni aad
1 Yesu wayikumangeja in kwilejend dikum ni aad,
2 wayinkish ukash ni ulabu wa kudiosh ayilembil awonsu, ni kwok ayej. Chad wayituma kuya kurumburil yom ya Want wa Nzamb, ni kwok ayej.
3 Wayileja anch: Kangal wasendany chom cha weny ap chimwing, ap mpkOrAyy ap nsapu, ap yakudia, ap nfalang, ap yikut yaad.
4 Kwawonsu kukukwakanyau nawamp, shakamany mu pts og chinicha djat ni piukudiokalanya mu ul winiwa.
5 Kwawonsu kukukwakanyau nayimp, diokalany mu ul winiwa, chad yikukumwinany rufunfut ra mu yidjatil yen chakwel chikal chijingidij cha kuyibabesh nich.
6 In kwilej aya, chad endangana mu mal mawonsu mulong wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, ni kwok ayej ku jindond jawonsu.
0 Herod ukat kwakam
7 Herod mwin kutakel wa ngand ya Galalia watesha yom yiney yawonsu. Ndiy kamanap mwa kutwadil, mulong watesha antu akat kulond anch: “Yohan Mubatish wavumbuk Kal.”
8 Antu akwau ading ni kulond anch: “Elij kal.” Akwau akat kulond kand anch: “Muruu Ka pra Nzamb, ndiy wavumbuka kal.”
9 Chad Herod watonga anch: "Yohan namukatula kal mutu pakur. Ing, chad win novila rusangu, ou nany?" Chad wadandamena kusot mutapu wa kumanijan nend Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kuyidish amakundj tunan tutan
10 Chad atwimbuy a Yesu achirika, amulej yom yawonsu yasalau. Ndiy waya nau kwi ndond yau ayinau ku ul upidilau anch, Betsaida.
11 Yisak ya antu chiyatesha mwamu, awiy amulondula. Ndiy wayaka nawamp, wayilej yom ya Want wa Nzamb, chad wayok ayej awonsu.
12 Chikwazweka urel, in kwilej dikum ni aad amuleja anch: "Yipalangesha antu aya mu mal ni mu makunku ma piswimp chakwel akakimb yakudia ni ndond ya kulal, mulong kunoku kudi kulemp."
13 Pakwez Yesu wayileja anch: "En iyinkishany yakudia. Awiy amwakula anch: "Tukwet ching kusu mabot matan ni ansh aad. Ov, usotil etu tuya tukalanda yakudia ya antu inay awonsu?"
14 Kwading amakundj mudi tunan tutan! Chad Yesu wayilej in kwilejend anch: “Yishichikany antu mu yisak, chisak ni chisak antu makum matan."
15 Chapwishau in kwilej kusal mwamu,
16 Yesu watambula mabot matan ni ansh aad, watal mwiur, wamujikitish Nzamb. Chad wamaumbwola, wamapan kudi in kwilej mulong wa kuyangen antu.
17 Chawiy antu awonsu adia, ikut, chad in kwilej izwisha yimpay dikum ni yaad ya yikunku yashalap.
0 Ritiy ra Pita
18 Dichuku dimwing padingay Yesu kulembil amwinend, in kwilejend eza kudi ndiy. Ndiy wayipula anch: "Ov, antu akat kwingel am anch nany?"
19 Awiy amwakula anch: “Amwing akat kukwel anch, yey Yohan Mubatish. Antu akwau anch, yey Elija, chad akwau akat kukwel anch, yey muruu wa pakur wa Nzamb wavumbuka kal wikal kand mwom."
20 Ndiy wayipula awiy anch: "Ing, en ukat kwingelany anch, yam nany?" Chawiy Pita wamwakula anch: "Ey udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many kudi Nzamb."
0 Yesu ukat kulond ya rufu ni kuvumbuk kwend
21 Yesu wayikanda nakash in kwilejend, chakwel kangal amulejamu muntu yom yiney. »
22 Ndiy wayileja kand anch: “Chifanyidin Mwan a Muntu kuman mar nakash. Akez kumulik kudi amakurump, ni kudi in kupesh ajim, ni kudi alej a Yijil. Akez kumujip, pakwez anch kwasut machuku masatu ukez kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom.” 
23 Chad ndiy wayileja antu awonsu anch: “Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwibomb ni yamam, chifanyidin ndiy kwidiul amwinend, asend pichuku pichuku mutond wend uchikakena, anlondul am.
24 Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwipandish amwinend ukez kufa. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukufa mulong wa kwingambat am, ukez kwipandish.
25 Ov, muntu ukutanamu ik anch wapitap nchik yom ya ngand yakabuj, chad ndiy wishesh, washadish mwom wend wa chikupu? 
26 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kwov usany mulong wamam ap mulong wa mazu mam, niyend Mwan a Muntu ukez kwov usany mulong wa muntu mwinou pakez kwezay mu uyaj wend, ni mu uyaj wa Tatuku, pamwing ni aruu a mwiur atumbila.
27 Nakulejany chakin kamu, antu amwing adia pinap ay kakufap kal, ching kamu aman Want wa Nzamb ukat kwez.”
0 Yesu ukat kumekan mutapu ukwau
28 Kudiokal palonday yom yiney, kwasuta mudi rubing rumwing, chad Yesu wamusenda Pita, ni Yohan, ni Jakobu, waya nau pa mukandu mulong wa kulembil.
29 Padingay: ni kulembil, chifu chend chakarumuka, chamekan mutapu ukwau, ni maswin mend mazuta matok too.
30 Kukashimuk, antu aad akat kulond nend. Antu inay ading Moses nend Elija.
31 Amekana nich uyaj wa mwiur. Ambambanga nend Yesu mulong wa mutapu ukuwanyishay kutenchik kwa Nzamb pakufay Yesu ku Yerusalem.
32 Pita ni akwau adingay nau ading alalang kal tul, pakwez alanka, aman uyaj wa Yesu ni antu aad ading iminyay nau.
33 Pelau antu inay kuya amusha Yesu, Pita wamwela anch: “Mulej, chidi chiwamp pituchidia kunoku! Chifanyidin tutunga tufumbifumb tusatu, kamwing keyey, kamwing ka Moses, kakwau ka Elija.” Pita kijikap yom yalonday.
34 Padingay ni kylond, didj dieza diayibwik mu urel wad. Chad in kwilej ova wom pamanau didj diayibwik.
35 Chad dizu dia Nzamb diovakena mu didj anch: “Winou udi Mwanam unatonda, muteshany!” aaa acme ean
36 Chidiapwa dizu, Yesu washala amwinend. In kwilej aneneta zong. Pa chisu chinicha, kamulejamup muntu yom yamanau.
0 Yesu ukat kumudiosh mwan ikundj chilembil
37 Chikwacha, Yesu ni in kwilejend asatu ashirika kudiokal pa mukandu, chad chisak chijim cha antu chamusankana Yesu.
38 Muntu umwing wading mu chisak wabarika anch: “Mulej! Nakwilembil, amboku, mutalap mwanam ikundj kapwokal! 
39 Chilembil ukat kumuwil kwa kumukashimwish, chad wabarik dizu dikash, ukat kumuzadish nakash chakwel atupul mafuril ku kan. Ukat kudandamen kumumesh mar, wakad kumudiokal swa!
40 Nayilembijekang in kwilejey chakwel amudiosh, pakwez katwishangap kwau.”
41 Yesu wakula anch: “En udiany antu ayimp akad ritiy! Ov, machuku minch minifanyidina kushakam ni yenen? Ov, chifanyidin am kukulamany kwen mwamu?” Chad Yesu wamwela muntu winiwa anch: “Muleta mwaney kunoku.”
42 Padingay mwan ukat kwez, chilembil wamwasa pansh, wamuzadish nakash. Chad Yesu wamuswejina chilembil, wamwok mwan, wamupan kudi tatukwend.
43 Antu awonsu ashimwoka nakash mulong wa ukash ujim wa Nzamb.
0 Yesu ukat kulond kand ya rufu rend
0 Antu ading ni kushimwok nakash mulong wa yom yawonsu yasalangay Yesu, chad ndiy wayileja in kwilejend anch:
44 “Kangal wavuramenany yom yinikulejinanya katat! Mwan a Muntu akez kumupan mu makas ma antu.”
45 Pakwez in kwilejend kovap kurumburik kwa yom yalonday. Yom yiney yading yijingamin kudi awiy chakwel kakutwishap kov kurumburik. Chad ova wom wa kumwipul Yesu mulong wa yom yiney.
0 Oy, nany upandakena kujimb?
46 In kwilej asambisha kutadikijan mulong wa kwijik nany wa pakach pau upandakena kujimb.
47 Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chawiy wamutambula mwan, wamwimik piswimp nend ndiy.
48 Wayileja anch: “Muntu mwawonsu ukumwaka mwan winou nawamp mu dijin diam, wangak kal am. Muntu mwawonsu ukwingaka am nawamp, wamwak kal kand wantuma am. Mulong muntu upandakenamu kukep pakach penen, ndiy upandakenamu kujimb.”
0 Anch muntu kakupompatinanyap en, udi ku mutambu wen
49 Yohan wamuleja Yesu anch: “Mwant, etu twamumanang muntu ukat kudiosh ayilembil mu dijin diey. Twapakishang kumukangesh mulong kadiap wa chisak chetu.”
50 Pakwez Yesu wamwakula anch: “Kangal wamukangeshany, mulong anch muntu kakupompatinanyap en, udi ku mutambu wen.”
0 Ul umwing wa mwi ngand ya Samaria ukat kumulik Yesu
51 Chisu cha Yesu chakumusend kuya mwiur chashika piswimp. Yesu wisuma muchim anch: “Naya kal kamu ku Yerusalem.”
52 Ndiy watuma aruu kurutu kuya ku ul wa Samaria, mulong wa kumurijekin yom yawonsu.
53 Pakwez antu a ul winiwa alika kumwak, mulong ading ij patok anch, uyil ku Yerusalem.
54 In kwilej a Yesu, Jakobu ni Yohan, chateshau chom chinech, awiy kamu amwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, Nsalejetu, ey usotil etu kutazuk kasu ka mwiur chakwel kayishesh?” 
55 Yesu wakarumuka, wayikand.
56 Chawiy Yesu ni in kwilejend aya ku ul ukwau.
0 Antu ela kumulondul Yesu
57 Padingau ayil mwi njil, muntu umwing wamwela Yesu anch: “Am nikukulondul ey kwawonsu kuuyila.” 
58 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Amiyeu akwet ndond jau ja kulal, niyau atujil akwet yinswal yau, pakwez Mwan a Muntu kakwetap pa kulal ap pa kwiswedishin.”
59 Yesu wamuleja kand muntu mukwau anch: “Ez, tuya pamwing ni yamam.” Pakwez muntu mwinou wamwakula anch: “Mwant, pakusambish chifanyidin nichirik bil, nikamujik tatukwam.”
60 Yesu wamwela anch: “Chifanyidin antu akad kal kutambul mwom wa chikupu aya akayijik afu au. Pakwez ey yang urumburil Rusangu ra Want wa Nzamb.”
61 Muntu mukwau wamwela Yesu anch: “Mwant, nikukulondul ey. Pakwez pakusambish nlika bil niya nikakanijan nau anamakwam.”
62 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Muntu mwawonsu anch wakwat rukasu mu chikas, wasambish kudim, chad ndiy ukat kutal kwinyim, mwinou kawanyidinap kwikal mu Want wa Nzamb.”
0 Yesu ukat kutum in kwilej makum sambwad ni aad
1 Kwinyim kwa chom chinech, Nsalejetu Yesu watonda kand in kwilej akwau makum sambwad ni aad. Chad wayituma aad aad kutakelaku. mu mal makuyay.
2 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Yakwangul yidi yivud, pakwez in mudimu wa kwangul adi akemp. Mulembijekany mwin chir chakwel ukutum in mudimu wa kwangul avud. 
3 Yangany! Am nakutumany kal en mudi an a amikoku mukach mwa atwingol.
4 Kangal wasendany ntuk ya nfalang, ap nsapu, ap yisapat. Kangal wimanany mwi njil kulangwishijan nau antu.
5 Mu chikumbu chawonsu chiukwandamanya, sambelany kulond anch: ‘Chisambu cha Nzamb chikal kudi in chikumbu chinech.’
6 Anch mu chikumbu chinicha mudi muntu uchingejina chisambu, kulangwish kwen kwa chisambu kukez kumuyukish. Anch mwamwamu, kulangwish kwen kwa chisambu kukuchirikinany ayinen.
7 Ushakamangany kamu mu chikumbu chinicha. Ukudiany, ukunany yom yawonsu yikukwinkishanyau, mulong mwin mudimu ufanyidin kutambul difut diend. Kangal washemunokany kuya kulal ku yikumbu yikwau.
8 Yisu yawonsu yikukwakanyau nawamp mu ul, diangany yom yawonsu yikukwinkishanyau.
9 Okany ayej a mu ul winiwa, yilejany in ul anch: ‘Want wa Nzamb washik kal kudi en.’
10 Pakwez yisu yawonsu yakad kukwakany nawamp mu ul, budikany, uyany mu mikombil ni kulond anch:
11 'Tukat kukukumun ni rufunfut rin ra mu ul wen ralamatanga mu yidjatil yetu, chakwel chikal chijingidij cha kukubabeshany nich. Pakwez vurikany anch, Want wa Nzamb wezang kal piswimp!'
12 Chakin nakulejany anch, pa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb akez kuwovil musumb wa Sodom riy kupandakan ul winiwa! Mal makad kumwitiyij Yesu
13 "Riyind kudi en in Korazin! Riyind kand kudi en in Betsaida! Yilay yakusadilanyau en, anch ayisadila in Tir ni in Sidon, antu ina ing ela kushakam pansh wakad kulab, adjal yizanizan, chad ipan maut mulong wa kumekesh anch, akarumuk kal kudiokal ku yitil yau! 
14 Pa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, ndiy ukez kuyovil in Tir ni in Sidon riy kupandakanamu en.
15 Niyen in Kapernaum! Ov, utongilany akez kukuzambulany djat ni mwiur? Bwat, akez kukudjibulany pansh djat ni mu Dijiy dia Kasu!”
16 Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Muntu mwawonsu ukukuteshany en, wantesh kal am. Muntu mwawonsu ukukulikany en, wanlik kal am. Muntu mwawonsu ukwinlika am, wamulik kal kand wantuma am.”
0 In kwilej makum sambwad ni aad akat kuchirik
17 In kwilej makum sambwad ni aad achirik nich musangar ujim: Awiy alonda anch: “Nsalejetu, niyau ayilembil adi ni kutuziyil anch twajimbul dijin diey!”
18 Yesu wayakula anch: “Namumen Sakudimban udiokil mwiur, wawa mudi mulayilay.
19 Teshany! Nakwinkishinany en ulabu wa kuyidjat annak, ni atupambamb, ni wa kupandakan nich ukash wa Mukankuny, chakwel kwikil chom chiyimp chikutwisha kukumeshany mar.
20 Chawiy kangal wasangarany mulong ayilembil akuziyidilany, pakwez sangarany mulong majin men amafundil kal mwiur.”
0 Yesu ukat kusangar
21 Pa chisu chinicha Yesu amwovisha musangar nakash kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Ndiy walonda anch: “Tatuku, Mwant wa diur ni divu! Nakujikitish mulong wamekesha kudi antu akad kwilej yom yiwajindjika kudi in manangu ni antu ilejina. Mwawiy, Tatuku, mulong mwamu muwatonda ey kusal.
22 “Tatukwam wanginkisha yom yawonsu. Kwikil muntu umwija Mwan, ching kusu Tatuku ndiy umwija. Kwikil muntu umwija Tatuku, ching kusu Mwan ndiy umwija, ni antu akwau atonday Mwan kumwijikesh Tatuku.”
23 Chad Yesu wakarumuka kudi in kwilejend, wayilejin kuns anch: “Wayukany en umenanya yom yiney.
24 Nakulejany chakin, aruu avud a Nzamb ni ant avud asota kuman yom yiumenanya en, pakwez kayimanap. Asota kand kutesh yom yiuteshilanya en, pakwez kayiteshap, bwat.”
0 Chishimu cha mwin Samaria muwamp
25 Mulej wa Yijil umwing weza kumupak Yesu pa kan. Wamwipula anch: “Mulej, ov, chifanyidin am nisala nchik chakwel nikala nich mwom wa chikupu?”
26 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, afundil nchik mu Mukand wa Nzamb? Ov, piukata kuutang, ukat kwov nchik?”
27 Mulej wa Yijil wakula anch: “ ‘Chifanyidin kumukat Chinawej Nzamb wey nich muchim wey wawonsu, nich mupim wey wawonsu, nich usu wey wawonsu, nich kand manangu mey mawonsu.’ Chad kand, ‘Chifanyidin kumukat mukwen mudi muwikatila ey amwiney.’ ”
28 Chawiy Yesu wamwela anch: “Ey wakul kal nawamp. Sal mwamu chakwel ukwikal mwom.”
29 Pakwez mulej wa Yijil wasota kwiyingish amwinend, chad wamwipula kand Yesu anch: “Ov, mukwetu win nany?”
30 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Kwading muntu umwing wadiokala ku Yerusalem uyil ku Yeriko. Aij amukwata, amwamuka yom yend yawonsu, amubul, amusha ukat kulengumwok.
31 Pq chisu chinicha, mwin kupesh umwing wasuta mwi njil yiniya. Pakwez pamumanay muntu mwinou ulel, ndiy wasengurila kuns.
32 Kweza kand mwin Levi umwing mwi njil yiniya, ndiy waseja piswimp, wamutal muntu, chad niyend wamusenguril.
33 Pakwez mwin Samaria niyend wasuta mwi njil yiniya, chad chamumanay muntu mwinou, wamwovila riy nakash.
34 Wamuseja piswimp, wamupan many pa yitat, chad wamwichilap maar ma nviny, wamukasap. Wamusendila pa nnam wend, wamutwal ku chikumbu cha kulal aeny, kwinikwa kwawiy kwamulaminay.
35 Chikwacha pamanch, mwin Samaria wanona nfalang jaad ja utad wa argent, wamwinkish mwin chikumbu cha aeny, chad wamulej anch: ‘Mulama muyej ou. Pinikuchirika, nikez kukufut yom yawonsu yiukumukwasha.’ ”
36 Chad Yesu wamwipula kand mulej wa Yijil anch: “Pakach pa antu inay asatu, ov, cy utongil nany wading mukwau wakin wa muntu mwinou wabulau kudi aij?”
37 Mulej wa Yijil wamwakula anch: “Mukwau, ndiy kamu wamwovila riy wa.” Yesu wamwela anch: “Niyey, yang, ukasala kand mwamu.”
0 Yesu uyil kumulangwish Mart ni Mariy
38 Yesu ni in kwilejend ading ayil, chad ashik mu ul umwing mwadingay mband umwing, dijin diend Mart. Ndity wamwaka Yesu nawamp kwol kwend.
39 Mart wading ukwet mwanamakwend mband, dijin diend Mariy. Wading ushich ku mend ma Yesu mulong wa kutesh yom yalonday.
40 Mart wading wiyakamishin nakash mulong wa midimu yivud, chawiy ndiy weza walond anch: “Nsalejam, ov, ey umenap kwey anch, mwanamakwam wanlikinang kal midimu yawonsu amwinam? Muleja, eza ankwash!”
41 Nsalejetu wamwakula anch: “Mart, Mart! Ey unenganen ni kwiyakamish mulong wa midimu_yivud.
42 Pakwez ey ukwet kusu kuswir kwa chom chimwing. Mariy watondang kal chom chiwamp, chakad kwez kumutambul.”
0 Yesu ukat kulejan mutapu wa kulembil
1 Dichuku dimwing Yesu wading ni kulembil kwi ndond yimwing. Chapwishay, mwin kwilej wend umwing wamwipula anch: “Nsalejetu, tulejap niyetu mutapu wa kulembil, mudi Yohan mwayilejay in kwilejend.”
2 Yesu wayileja anch: “Piukulembilany, londany mwamu: ‘Tatuku, dijin diey aditumbish. Chifanyidin Want wey weza.
3 Itwinkisha yakudia yiwanyidina pichuku pichuku.
4 Tulikishina yitil yetu, mulong niyetu tukat kuyilikishinang antu awonsu akata kutusalang nayimp. Kangal witiy atwoza.’ ”
5 Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Tongany bil, ap umwing wa pakach penen waya ku chikumbu cha murund nend mukach mwa uchuku, wamwel anch: ‘Murund nam, nsondjikap mabot masatu.
6 Murund nam mukwau wezil mu weny washik kal katat kwol kwam. Kinikwetap yakudia ya kumwinkish!’
7 Ap murund nend wamwakwil mukach mwa chikumbu anch: ‘Kangal wanswidiosh! Natekang kal mukwadiak ku chis, am ni anam twalalang kal. Kinikutwishap kulank mulong wa kukwinkish ey mabot, bwat!’ 
8 Nakulejany chakin, anch walikap nchik kulank kumwinkish yakudia mulong wa urund, ndiy ukulank kumwinkish yom yawonsu yikwetay nich kuswir mulong wadandamen kal kwit.
9 Chawiy nikulejinany anch: ‘Itany mu kulembil, Nzamb ukez kukwinkishany. Surabany, ukez kutanany. Kokalany ku chis, akez kukwanzurilany.’
10 Mulong muntu mwawonsu ukata kwit, ukat kutambul kamu, tree encasement niyend ukata kusurab, ukat kutan, niyend kand ukata kukokal ku chis, akat kumwanzuril.
11 Ov, kudi umwing wenen atatuku, anch mwanend wamwit insh, ndiy ukumwinkish nnak?
12 Ap anch mwanend wamwit diy, ov, ndiy ukumwinkishay kapambamb?
13 Anch en udianyap nchik ayimp, ukat kupanany yom yiwamp kudi anen. Chawiy Tatukwen udia mwiur ukez kupandakeshamu kupan Mwiku Utumbila kudi awonsu akata kwit.”
0 Akat kumwel Yesu anch ukwet Belzebul
14 Chisu chimwing Yesu wading ni kumudiosh chilembil wamukangeshang muntu kulond. Chadiokalay chilembil, muntu wasambisha kulond, chad yisak ya antu avud ashimwoka nakash.
15 Pakwez antu amwing alonda anch: “Udi Belzebul, mwant wa ayilembil, ndiy ukata kumwinkish Yesu ukash wa kuyidiosh ayilembil.”
16 Antu akwau asota kumupak Yesu pa kan, amwipul chakwel ayisadil chilay chimekeshina anch, ukash wend udiokil kudi Nzamb.
17 Pakwez Yesu wijika yitongijok yau, chad wayileja anch: “Anch want wiyauril yisak yivud, chad antu asambish kurish ayinau, want winou kiukez kushakamap machuku mavud. Anch antu a dijuku dimwing arish ayinau, dijuku dined dikez kujiy.
18 Chawiy chimwing, anch want wa Sakudimban waurik yisak yivud, chad chisak chimwing charish nich chikwau, ov, want wend ukutwish kushakam? En ulondilany anch, am nikat kudiosh ayilembil nich ukash winginkishinay Belzebul. 
19 Komb anch am nikat kudiosh ayilembil ku ukash wa Belzebul, ing, in kukulondulany en akat kuyidiosh nich ukash wa nany? In kukulondulany en inay, awiy akeza kukufishany nich!
20 Pakwez am nikat kudioshang ayilembil nich ukash wa Nzamb. Chinech chikwijikishany anch Want wa Nzamb washik kal kudi en.
21 “Anch muntu mukash ukwet yom yend ya njit, chad ukat kulam chikumbu chend, yom yend yawonsu yikushakam nawamp.
22 Pakwez anch kwez muntu umupandakenamu usu wamurishikish, chad wamukwat, ndiy ukumwamuk yom yend yawonsu ya njit, ni kwangan yibuu.
23 “Muntu mwawonsu wakad kubombakan ni yamam, Wimpompatin am. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kwinkwash kuyikumangej antu, ukat kuyipalangesh.”
0 Chilembil ukat kumuchirikin muntu
24 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Pakat kudioshau chilembil mu muntu, chilembil winou ukat kuya ni kutambitamb mwi mpay mulong wa kusot pa kushakam. Anch kamenap ndond. ukat kutong anch: ‘Nikuchirik kwol kwam mu muntu munedia.’
25 Chawiy ndiy ukuchirik, chad ukutan chikumbu chend cha kukomb, achirijekin.
26 Chawiy ndiy ukubudik, waya wayisend ayilembil akwau sambwad amupandakenamu ndiy kuyip, chad niyau akwez kushakam nend. Katat anch yom yiney yawonsu yapwa, muntu mwinou ukuman mar kupandakan mar ma kusambish.”
0 Musangar wa kashinsh
27 Chapwishay Yesu kulond yom yiney, mband umwing wading mu chisak cha antu wabarika anch: “Wayuk mband wakuvala ni kukwamwish ey!”
28 Pakwez Yesu wamwakula anch: “Chakin kamu, pakwez ayuk kwau antu akata kutesh dizu dia Nzamb ni kudisadil!”
0 Akat kwipul Yesu kusal chilay
29 Chashinyijanau antu kuya mulong wa kusej kudi Yesu, ndiy wayileja kand anch: “Antu a chirung chinech adi ayimp! Awiy akat kwipul chakwel ayisadil chilay, pakwez kakuyisadilap kand chilay chikwau, ching kusu chilay cha Yona.
30 Yisalijok ya Yona, muruu wa Nzamb, yading chijingidij kudi in Ninive, chawiy chimwing kand, yisalijok ya Mwan a Muntu yikez kwikal chijingidij kudi antu a chirung chinech.
31 Pidikeza kushik Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, antu a chirung chinech akez kuyifund kudi mwant mband wa ku Seba. Mulong mwant winou wadiokala kulemp kwi ngand yend ya kurul, weza ni kutesh malejan ma manangu ma Mwant Salomon. Chakin, nakulejany, pinap padi chom chijim chimupandakenamu Salomon!
32 Pidikeza kushik Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, in Ninive akez kwiman piur ni kukufundany en, mulong awiy akarumuka kudiokal ku yitil yau pateshau mazu ma Nzamb marumburilay Yona. Talany, katat pinap kudi chom chijim chimupandakenamu Yona!
0 Chimunyik cha mujimbu
33 “Kwikil muntu ukata kulimik mwend wa kasu, chad waubwikin mwi nnung, ap kuutek mwishin mwa ulal. Pakwez ukat kuutek pa ndond ya piur chakwel ukuyimunyikin antu awonsu adia mu chikumbu.
34 Mes mey madi mudi mwend wa kasu ukata kumunyik mu mujimbu wey. Anch mes mey mawapil, mu mujimbu wey mwawonsu mukez kwikal chimunyik. Pakwez anch mes mey kimawapilap, chad mu mujimbu mukez kujal mididim.
35 Chawiy, babal, chakwel chimunyik ni ku Zakariy, wajipinau pakach pa chintamb ni Néome chidia mukach mwey, kangal chikal mididim.
36 Anch mu mujimbu wey wawonsu mudi chimunyik chiwanyidina, kwikil ndond ap yimwing yikushala mididim. Chawiy mujimbu wey wawonsu ukumunyik too, mudi chitokish cha mwend wa kasu chikata kukumunyikin."
0 Yesu ukat kuyifund Afaris nau alej a Yijil
37 Chapwishay Yesu kulond, Mufaris umwing wamutazuka kuya kudia kwol kwend. Chawiy Yesu waya, wandam mu chikumbu, washakam ku mes mulong wa kudia.
38 Mufaris washimwoka pamanay anch, Yesu wadia kal wakad koyil makas.
39 Chawiy Nsalejetu wijika yitongijok yend, wamwakul anch: "En, Afaris, ukat koyishany piur pa rupas ni pa dilong, pakwez en wizwilany nich ris ni chisum.
40 En udiany ayisup! Nzamb wasala pol, ov, kindiyap wasala kand mukach?
41 Panany yom yidia mu jimpas ni pa malong men kudi atuzwendj, chad yom yawonsu yikez kwikal zwang kudi en.
42 "Riyind kudi en Afaris! En ukat kupanany chadikum kudi Nzamb cha yom yikata kuwapish yakudia mudi ndung, ni tumayij, ni tuyom tukwau tukata kulet res ku yakudia, pakwez en ukat kudiulany dirumburish ditentamina ni rukat ra Nzamb. Yawiy yom yiney yifanyidina kusal, wakad kudiul yom yikwau.
43 "Riyind kudi en Afaris! En ukatilany kushakam pa yipwan ya katumb yidia mu yikumbu ya kulembil. Ukatilany kand antu kukulangwishany nich kalimish mu yiku.
44 Riyind kudi en! En udiany mudi jinzay jakad kumekan, jikat kudjatolau antu wakad kwijik."
45 Mulej umwing wa Yijil wamwela Yesu anch: "Mulej, piulondila yom yiney, ukat kutuswingish kand niyetu!"
46 Yesu wamwakula anch: "Niyen, alej a Yijil, riyind ren kand! En ukat kuyitwikany antu akwau yisend yilimina, pakwez en ayinen kiwitiyinanyap kupukunaku ap kusu muny wen mulong wa kuyikwashaku kusend.
47 Riyind kudi en! En ukat kutungany yikumbu kwikal yivurikish pa jinzay jau aruu a Nzamb ajipau kudi angakirilen.
48 Chawiy en ukat kwitiyany anch yom yasalau anshankuren yading yiwamp, mulong awiy ayijipa aruu a Nzamb, chad en ukat kutungany yivurikish yau.
49 Mulong wa chom chinech mukand upidilau anch: 'Manangu ma Nzamb,' aufundil anch: 'Am nikez kuyitum aruu am ni aruu akwau. Awiy akez kuyijipap amwing, chad akwau akez kuyizengol.'
50 Chawiy antu a chirung chinech akez kuyilej kadimu, mulong wa aruu a Nzamb awonsu kudiokal ku disambishil dia mangand.
51 Kusambishil pamujipau Abel djat ni ku Zakariy, wajipinau pakach pa chintamb ni Ndond Yitumbila, nakulejany chakin kamu, antu a chirung chinech akez kuyilej kadimu mulong wa antu awonsu ajipau!
52 "Riyind kudi en, alej a Yijil! Yen ulaminanya nfungul ya kwanzuril nich chis cha chikumbu cha ronganyin. En ayinen kiusotilanyap kwandam, chad ukat kuyikangeshany antu akwau asotila kwandam!"
53 Padiokalay Yesu mwi ndond yiniya, alej a Yijil nau Afaris asambisha kumulondol nayimp ni kumwipol yom yivud.
54 Awiy apakisha kumupak pa kan chakwel ap ukulond chom chiyimp.
0 Yesu ukat kuyibabesh antu mulong wa rubabek
1 Chiyasuta yom yiney, chisak chijim cha antu chakumangana. Kwadinga tunan twa antu, ashinyijana ni kudjatijan, Yesu wasambela kuyilej in kwilejend anch: "Babalany ku rubabek ra Afaris ridia mudi chivish chiyimp.
2 Yom yawonsu yijingamina yikez kumekan patok, ujindj wawonsu akez kuujingunin.
3 Chawiy yom yawonsu yiwalondilanya mu mididim yikez kwovakan mukach mwa muten. Chikwau kand, yom yawonsu yiwalondilanya mu tuyauyau ku ujindj mu kapalakany ka kupat, akez kuyilondil pa misong ya yikumbu kudi antu awonsu.
0 Nany ufanyidinau kwov wom
4 "Nikulejinany en, arund nam, kangal wovany wom wa antu akata kujip mujimbu, chad anch ey wafa kal kakutwishap kand kusal chom chikwau chiyimp.
5 Nisotil kukulejany en nany ufanyidinanya kwov wom. Umwovany Nzamb wom, mulong anch ndiy wajipan, ukwet kand ulabu wa kukudjibwilany mu Dijiy dia Kasu. Chakin kamu, ndiy winou ufanyidinanya kwov wom ni kumulimish!
6 "Ov, kakat kulandishap amiswesu atan kwi nfalang jaad? Pakwez Nzamb kakuvuramenap muswesu ap umwing.
7 Nswich ja ku mitu yen, niyau ajichindil kamu jawonsu. Chawiy kangal wovany wom. En ukwetany usey uvud kuyipandakanamu amiswesu avud!
0 Kumwitiyij ap kumulik Yesu Kristu
8 "Nakulejany chakin, anch muntu mwawonsu ukata kwingitiyij patok pakach pa antu, niyend Mwan a Muntu ukez kumwitiyin patok kudi aruu a mwiur a Nzamb.
9 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kwinlik pakach pa antu, niyend Mwan a Muntu ukez kumulikin patok kudi aruu a mwiur a Nzamb.
10 “Muntu: mwawonsu ukeza kumulond Mwan a Nzamb nayimp, akez kumulikishin. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumusaal Mwiku Utumbila masaal, kakez kumulikishinap.
