11 “Pakukutwalanyau ku dirumburish mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ap kudi anyikel, ap kudi in kutakel akwau, kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa kwilondilap ayinen, ap mulong wa mazu miukeza kulondany.
12 Mulong Mwiku Utumbila ukez kukulejany pa chisu chinicha yom yiukulondanya.”
0 Chishimu cha mpich chisup
13 Muntu umwing wading mu chisak wamwela Yesu anch: “Mulej, muleja mwanamakwam chakwel twangan nend dipit diatushilay tatukwetu.”
14 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, muntwey, nany wanteka am kwikal nkalansambu wa milong yen, ap mwin kukwangenany dipit dien?”
15 Yesu wayileja antu awonsu anch: “Babalany, ichidijany ayinen, likany ris ra mitapu yawonsu, mulong mwom wakin wa muntu kiudiap mu yom yikwetay, ap anch ukwetap nchik mapit mavud.”
16 Chad Yesu wayitila chishimu anch: “Kwading mpich umwing wakweting yingand yifukina, yasonga yom ya kudia yivud.
17 Wasambisha kutong anch: ‘Kinikwetap jinkil jiwanyidina ja kulamin yakudia yawonsu. Ov, nikusal nchik?’
18 Chad watonga anch: ‘Komb nisala mwamu. Nikez kumwangon jinkil jam chakwel nez nitung jinkil jipandakena kujimb, mwa kulamin yakudia ni yom yam yikwau yawonsu.
19 Nikez kuulej mupim wam anch, Mupim wam, ey watap kal dilau! Ey ukwet yom yiwanyidina ya mivu yivud. Katat iswedisha kwey, diang ni kuna, isangarisha kwey amwiney!’
20 Pakwez Nzamb wamuleja anch: ‘Chisup ey! Uchuku winou kamu ey ukukatuk mupim. Ov, nany ukeza kutambul yom yiney yawonsu yiwakumangejina kal?’.”
21 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Mwamu muchikwikala kudi antu akata kwikumangejin mapit ayinau, pakwez aburedin mapit makin ku mes kwa Nzamb.”
0 Kukungamen kudi Nzamb
22 Chad Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa yakudia ya mujimbu ap mulong wa yidjal.
23 Mwom wa muntu ukwet usey uvud kupandakanamu yakudia, chawiy kand chimwing, mujimbu wa muntu ukwet usey uvud kupandakanamu yidjal.
24 Talany ankwaj. Kakukunangap mbut, ap kwangul. Awiy kakwetap jinkil ap yikumbu ya kulamin yom, pakwez Nzamb ukat kuyidish! En ukwetany usey ujim kupandakanamu atujil!
25 Ov, nany wa pakach penen anch unenganen ukutwisha kuwejaku ku mwom wend kachisu kakemp?
26 Anch kiukutwishanyap kusal kachom kakemp mudi kinak, ov, mulong wak ukunenganenanya mulong wa yom yikwau?
27 Talany, yisalamb ya mu masuku mutapu uyidia. Yawiy kiyikusalangap mudimu, ap kwichimin yidjal, pakwez nakulejinany chakin, Mwant Salomon wakweting miril ya mapit, chad kadingap nich yidjal ya ufun mudi chisalamb chimwing cha mu masuku.
28 Nzamb amwinend ukata kuriyek ufun wa masuku. Masuku minam makat kumekan ilel, chad diamashik akez kumosh kasu. Chakin, en ukwetany ritiy rikemp! Ov, yidjal yikupanay Nzamb kudi en, kiyikupandakanap ufun wa masuku?
29 “Chawiy kangal wanengananany mulong wa kukimb yakudia ni yakuna.
30 Jn mangand akat kukimb yom yiney yisu yawonsu. Pakwez en, Tatukwen wij kal anch, ukwetany kuswir kwa yom yiney.
31 Pa ndond pa yom yiney, en kimbany Want wa Nzamb, chad ndiy ukukuwejinanyaku kand yom yiney.
0 Laminany mapit mwiur
32 “Kangal wovany wom, ap anch udianyap nchik chisak chikemp, mulong Tatukwen usanger kukwinkishany Want wend.
33 Landishany yom yen yawonsu yiukwetanya, chad upanany nfalang kudi atuzwendj. Rijekany yipau yakad kufang, laminany mapit men mwiur. Mwinimwa makutwishap kushadik, mulong aij kakutwishap kumiy, ap musu kakutwishap kumashesh.
34 Mulong kudia mapit mey, kwawiy kand kukwikala muchim wey.
0 Atulam ababela
35 “Irijekany, kasikeshany may, limikany mend yen ya kasu.
36 Chifanyidin en wikalany mudi atushalapol ababela akata kumuchingel nsalejau kuchirik kudiokal ku musambu wa kwatan kwayay. Pakushikay, wakokal ku chis, chad awiy akez kumwanzuril.
37 Ayuk kwau atushalapol akutanau kud: nsalejau atadil! Chakin nakulejany, anch ndiy ukez kuyitazukir yakudia, chad ukez kudjal maswin ma mudimu mulong wi kuyinkish yakudia.
38 Ayuk kwau anch ndiy wez mukach mwi uchuku wayitan irijekang kal, ap anch wezap nchik pa nkunk pa kucha!
39 En wijany, anch mwin chikumbu wadi wij chist chikwezay mwij, ing wamukangesha mwij kubuz chikumbi ni kwandam.
40 Chifanyidin niyen wirijekany kand, mulon: Mwan a Muntu ukwez kwa kukashimuk pa chisu chiwakadiany en kwijik.”
0 Atushalapol akin ni akad akin
41 Pita wamwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, chishimu chinech ututidil etu kusu, anch uyitidil kand ni antu awonsu?”
42 Nsalejetu wamwakula anch: “Ov, nany kashalapol wakin ukweta manangu? Ndiy kamu ukwinkishau mudimu kudi mwant wend, wa kulam chikumbu ni kuyangen atushalapol akwau yakudia yau pa chisu chiwanyidina.
43 Wayuk kwend kashalapol pakuchirikay mwant wend, anch wamutan ukat kusal mudimu winou!
44 Nakulejany chakin\ kamu, mwant ukumwinkish kashalapol winou ukurump wa kulam yom yend yawonsu.
45 Pakwez anch kashalapol watonga kuyibul atushalapol akwau ni amilomb, wasambish kwifund kudia ni kuna ni kukwachik.
46 Chad mwamu, dichuku dimwing mwant wend ukez kumukashimwish chisu chakadiay ndiy kwijik. Chawiy Mwant wend ukez kumufish nich kwa kumujip, ukez kumutek ku mutambu umwing nau antu akad kumwitiyij Nzamb.
47 “Kashalapol wija yom yisotilay mwant wend, chad ndiy kirijekinap mulong wa kuyisal, akez kumubul nfimbu nakash mulong wa kumulej kadimu.
48 Pakwez kashalapol wakad kwijik yom yisotilay mwant wend, anch wasal yom yifanyidina kumubudilau, akez kumubul nfimbu jikemp mulong wa kumulej kadimu. Muntu winkishau yom yivud, Nzamb ukez kumwipul kand yom yivud. Muntu winkishau yom yipandakena kuvul, Nzamb ukez kumwipul kand yom yipandakena kuvul.
0 Yesu ukat kulet kwaurok
49 “Am neza mulong wa kulet kasu mu mangand, nisotil ing kasu kinak kokang kal.
50 Am nifanyidin kwandam mu mar mudi muntu ukata kwandam mu dibatish dia mem. Nikat kunenganan kamu djat ni pinikuwanyishina yom yiney!
51 Ov, utongilany anch am neza ni kulet chisambu mu mangand? Bwat, kinezap kulet chisambu, pakwez neza kulet kwaurok.
52 Kudiokal katat antu atan ashicha mu chikumbu chimwing, akez kwaurik. Antu asatu akez kuyipompat antu aad, niyau antu aad akez kuyipompat antu asatu.
53 Atatuku akez kuyipompat anau amakundj, niyau an amakundj akez kuyipompat atatukwau. Amaku akez kuyipompat anau amband, niyau an amband akez kuyipompat amakwau: Makwend wa ikundj ukez kumupompat mband wa mwanend, niyend mband wa mwan ukez kumupompat makwend wa nfumwend.”
0 Kwonganyin yijingidij ya chirung
54 Yesu wayileja kand antu avud anch: “Piukat kumanany didj didiokil mutambu wa kurand, ukat kulondany swa anch: ‘Ruvul usotil kunak.’ Chakin kamu, ukat kunak.
55 Chad piukat kumanany rinkind watut kudiokal mutambu wa kurul, ukat kulondany anch: ‘Ilel kukwez marungul nakash.’ Chakin kamu, makat kwez.
56 En, in rubabek, ukwetany manangu ma kujingunin yom yikumekana pansh ap mwiur, ov, ing, mulong wak ukangenanya kwov kurumburik kwa chirung chinech?
0 Chifanyidin kwovijan nend mukankuny
57 “Ov, mulong wak kiukat kutondanyap chom chitentamina chifanyidina kusal?
58 Anch muntu wakufund, chad wakutwal ku dirumburish, sal usu wa kwovijan nend mwi njil piwakad kal kushikany ku dirumburish. Chamwamu ukukudadamijan wa kutwal kudi ankalansambu, akukupan kudi amasalay, chawiy amasalay akukudjibwil mu rukan.
59 Nakulej chakin kamu, ukushakam mwinimwa djat ni piukufutila chikal chend chawonsu.”
0 Karumun muchim, chamwamu ukufa
1 Pa chisu chinicha antu amwing eza, amulej Yesu mulong wa in Galalia ajipau kudi Pilat padingau ni kulambul yakupesh yau kudi Nzamb.
2 Yesu wayakula anch: “Ov, utongilany anch, in Galalia ina afa mwamu mulong ading in yitil kupandakanamu in Galalia akwau?
3 Bwat! Nakulejany chakin, anch en kiukarumukinanyap kudiokal ku yitil yen, ukez kufany en awonsu mudi awiy.
4 Ov,‘utongilany nchik mulong wa antu dikum ni chinan awilau kudi dinguj dia ku Silowe? Ov, antu inay ading ayimp nakash kupandakanamu antu awonsu ashicha mu Yerusalem?
5 Bwat! Nakulejany chakin, anch en kiukarumukinanyap kudiokal ku yitil yen, ukez kufany en awonsu mudi awiy.”
0 Chishimu cha mutond wa nfung wakad kusongang mabuj
6 Chawiy Yesu wayitila chishimu anch: “Muntu umwing wading ukwet mutond wa nfung mu chir chend cha nviny. Ndiy wayaku mulong wa kupol mabuj, pakwez katanakup chom.
7 Chad wamuleja mwin kulam chir anch: ‘Tal kwa, nez kal kunoku mivu yisatu mulong wa kupol mabuj ma nfung ku mutond winou, pakwez kinitanyinakup chom. Ukatula! Ov, mulong wak mutond winou usheshina divu chamwamu?’
8 Chad mwin kulam chir wamwakula anch: ‘Mwant, ulika bil kand mutond winou muvu umwing. Am nikuupundil ni kutek yiyimp ya annam kwishin.
9 Chawiy anch wasong mabuj muvu ukwezap ou, chiwamp nakash. Pakwez anch kiusonginap mabuj, chad ey ukutwish kuukatul kwey’ ”
0 Yesu ukat kumwok mband chilim pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish
10 Pa Dichuku dimwing dia Kwiswedish, Yesu wading ni kulejan mu chikumbu cha kulembil. 
11 Mwinimwa mwading mband uyedila, wading ukwet chilembil mivu dikum ni chinan. Chilembil winou wading wamufumba kal nyim wakad kutwish kwonak.
12 Yesu, chamumanay mband winou, wamutazuka, wamwel anch: “Mband ey, mayej mey mapwa kal!”
13 Yesu wamwanzuka makas, pawiy pinipa kamu, mband wonaka, wasambish kumutumbish Nzamb.
14 Mukurump wa chikumbu cha kulembil wajimana, mulong Yesu wokana pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. Chad wayileja antu anch: “Ukwetany machuku musamban ma kusal mudimu. Ezany machuku minam chakwel akokany, pakwez kangal wezany pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish!” ‘
15 Nsalejetu wamwakula anch: “En, in rubabek en! Oku, en ukat kusurilany ngomb ap chimbur mulong wa kumutwal kuya kuna mem pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish.'
16 Katat mband winou udi wa a majuku ma Aburaham. Sakudimban wamukasa kal ku mayej mivu dikum ni chinan, ov, kinifanyidinap kumusuril ku mayej pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish?”
17 Mazu ma Yesu minam mayikwatisha akankuny nend usany. Pakwez antu akwau awonsu asangara mulong wa yom yiwamp yasalay Yesu.
0 Chishimu cha rubut rukemp
18 Yesu wipula anch: “Ov, Want wa Nzamb udi mudi chom ik? Ov, nikutwish kuufanakesh nich ik?
19 Ufanaken mudi rubut ra mutond upidilau anch, mutard. Muntu warunona, warukun mu chir chend. Pirakula, rikal mutond ujim, chad atujil atunga yinswal yau ku mitiy.”
0 Chishimu cha chivish
20 Yesu wipula kand anch: “Ov, nikutwish kufanakesh Want wa Nzamb nich ik?
21 Ufanaken mudi chivish cha mabot chanonay mband, wasamp nich wung wa chimpay chakabuj, chakwel wung wawonsu ututuk.”
0 Kachis kiwongina
22 Yesu wendangana mu misumb ni mu mal, mulong wa kuyilej antu. Ndiy wading mu weny wa kuya ku Yerusalem.
23 Chad muntu umwing wamwipula anch: “Ov, Mwant, kukez kupand kwau ching antu akemp kusu?” Yesu wayileja antu anch:
24 “Ikasikeshany, chakwel wandamany mu kachis kiwongina. Chakin, nakulejany anch, antu avud akupakish kwandaminamu, pakwez kakutwishap.
25 Mwant wa chikumbu ukez kulank, wapat ku chis. Chad anch en wimenany pol, wasambishany kukokal ku chis anch: ‘Mwant, itwanzurilaku!’ Ndiy ukez kukwakulany anch: ‘Am kinijap kuudiokilanya!’
26 Chad en ukez kumwakulany anch: ‘Etu twadia ney ni kuna ney. Yey kand wading ni kulejan mu ul wetu!’
27 Pakwez ndiy ukez kukwakulany kand anch: ‘Kinijap kuudiokilany. Ndiokalany, en antu ayimp!’
28 Kwinikwa kwawiy kuukeza kudilany mansoj ni kwidia ku mazeu piukeza kumumanany Aburaham, ni Isak, ni Jakob, ni aruu a Nzamb awonsu mu Want wa Nzamb, chad en akukudjibwilany kwa!
29 Antu akez kudiokal kwingangel, ni kurand, ni kwiyand, ni kurul, chad akez kushakam ku musambu mu Want wa Nzamb.
30 Chawiy antu adia a kwisudiel katat, akez kwikal a kusambish, chad antu adia a kusambish katat, akez kwikal a kwisudiel.”
0 Yesu ukatil Yerusalem
31 Pa chisu chinicha Afaris amwing eza kudi Yesu, amwel anch: “Ufanyidin kudiokal kunoku, mulong Herod usotil kukujip.”
32 Yesu wayakula anch: “Yangany, ukamulejany katwiy winiwa anch: ‘Am nikat kuyidiosh ayilembil ni kwok ayej ilel ni diamashik, dichadia nikupwish mudimu wam.’
33 Pakwez chifanyidin am kudandamen mu weny wam ilel ni diamashik ni dichadia, mulong kichifanyidinap muruu wa Nzamb kufil ndond yindj, ching kamu mu Yerusalem.
34 “A! En, in Yerusalem, in Yerusalem! Wajipinany kal aruu a Nzamb, wayasinany kal mayal aruu akutuminanyay Nzamb! Tupamp tuvud am nasota kukukumangejinany pamwing, mudi mukat kukumangejay nzol anend mu jimpur. Pakwez en walikanya!
35 Chawiy katat Chikumbu chen cha Nzamb chikez kushal chamwamu. Nakulejany chakin, kiukez kwinmananyap kand djat ni ku chisu chiukeza kulondany anch: ‘Nzamb amuyukish wezidila mu dijin dia Chinawej.’ 
0 Yesu ukat kumwok muyej
1 Pa Dichuku dimwing dia Kwiswedish, Yesu waya mu kudia kwa mukurump umwing wa Afaris. Antu adinga mwinimwa amutala Yesu neeng.
2 Kwading muntu unanyin mend ni makas mudi musong wa chizavu weza kudi Yesu.
3 Chad Yesu wayipula alej a Yijil nau Afaris anch: “Ov, Yijil yetu yilejen kwokan pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, anch bwat?”
4 Pakwez awiy alika kumwakul. Yesu wamukwataku muyej, wamwok, wamwel anch: “Yang kwol kwey.”
5 Chad Yesu wayipula anch: “Anch muntu umwing wa pakach penen ukwet mwan ikundj ap ngomb wawil mu dijiy pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, ap anch didiap nchik Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, ov, kakumudioshap swa?”
6 Pakwez awiy kamanap mwa kumwakwil.
0 Kwitudish ni mutapu wa kuyak antu
7 Yesu wamana anch, antu atazukau ading ni kutond jindond ja katumb. Chawiy Yesu wayitila chishimu anch:
8 “Anch muntu wakutazuk ku musambu wa kwatan, kangal witondil kushakam ndond ya katumb. Ap amutazukang kal muntu mujim kukupandakanamu ey.
9 Chad muntu wakutazukanganya en awonsu ukwez kudi ey, wakwel anch: ‘Mushila muntu mujim ndond yiney.’ Chad ukwov usany pa kuya kushakam pa ndond yikemp.
10 Pakwez anch akutazuk kudia, yang ukashakam pa ndond yikemp, chad wakutazukanga ukwez, wakwel anch: ‘Murund nam, ez ushakama ndond yiwamp.’ Chom chinech chikez kukuletin katumb kudi antu awonsu atazukangau.
11 Mulong muntu mwawonsu ukeza kwijimbish amwinend, akez kumushikumwish, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kwishikumwish amwinend, akez kumujimbish.”
12 Chad Yesu wamuleja mwin musambu anch: “Piukutazuka antu kudia kwol kwey muten pakach ap urel, kangal wayitazuk arund ney, ap anamakwey, ap akwen ampich, mulong niyau akez kukutazuk. Mwamu mu mutapu winou ey ukez kutambul difut dia yisalijok yey.
13 Pakwez anch wasal musambu, yitazuka atuzwendj ni ayilim, ni amputames.
14 Chawiy ey ukez kuyuk, mulong awiy kakutwishap kukutazuk ey. Pakwez Nzamb ukez kukuchirishin pa dichuku dikez kuvumbukau antu atentamina.”
0 Chishimu cha musambu ujim
15 Pateshay muntu umwing wading ushicha nau ku mes yom yiney, ndiy wamuleja Yesu anch: “Wayuk kwend muntu ukutazukau kudia nau ku musambu wa Want wa Nzamb!”
16 Yesu wamuleja anch: “Kwading muntu umwing wasala musambu ujim, watazuka antu avud.
17 Pichawanyina chisu cha musambu, ndiy wamuleja kashalapol wend kuya kuyilej antu atazukay anch: ‘Ezany, yom yawonsu yawanyinang kal!’
18 Pakwez antu awonsu, muntu ni muntu, asambisha kuman pa kwiyingishin nich. Wa kusambish wamuleja kashalapol anch: ‘Nlikishinany, amboku, am_nalandil chir, chinfanyidin am kuya kuchital’
19 Mukwau walonda anch: ‘Am nalandil angomb dikum a kudim nich, niyil katat kuyital, nlikishinany, amboku.’
20 Niyend mukwau walonda anch: ‘Namushikijang kal kamu mband, chawiy kinikutwishap kwez, amboku.’
21 Kashalapol wachirika, wamulej mwant wend yom yiney yawonsu. Mwant wajimana, wamulej kashalapol wend anch: “Yang swa mu mikombil ni mu jinjil jikemp ja mu musumb, uyitazuka atuzwendj, ni ayilim, ni amputames.’
22 Chipasuta chisu chikemp, kashalapol wachirika, wamulej mwant wend anch: ‘Mwant, mazu mey mawonsu mawanyin kal, pakwez kushil kand ndond jikwau.’
23 Chad mwant wamuleja kashalapol wend anch: ‘Yang mu jinjil jikemp ni mu jinjil jiyila ku makunku, yibachika antu eza chakwel chikumbu cham chizula antu sens.
24 Chakin, nakulejany anch, kwikil muntu ap umwing wa pakach pa antu inatazuka pakusambish ukeza kupak yakudia ya musambu wam.’ ”
0 Mutapu wa kwikal mwin kwilej wa Yesu :
25 Dichuku dimwing chisak chijim cha antu aya nend Yesu mwi njil, ndiy wayitala, wayilej anch:
26 “Muntu mwawonsu ukweza kudi am usotila kwikal mwin kwilej wam, chifanyidin ndiy kwinkat am kupandakanamu mutapu umukatilay tatukwend ni makwend, ni mukajend ni anend, ni anamakwend amakundj ni amband, ni amwinend kand.
27 Muntu mwawonsu wakad kusend mutond wend uchikakena amwinend ni kwinlondul am, kakutwishap kwikal mwin kwilej wam.
28 Anch muntu umwing wa pakach penen ukatil kutung dinguj dilemp, ukat kushakam pansh pakusambish mulong wa kurijek usey wa yom yawonsu, chakwel ijik anch ukwet nfalang jiwanyidina ja kupwish nich mudimu wawonsu.
29 Anch kakwetap nfalang jiwanyidina, ndiy kakutwishap kupwish dinguj piur, mulong nfalang jawonsu jikupwa pakutungay dishin dia dinguj. Chad antu awonsu pakumanau yom yiniya, akez kumuswingish.
30 Awiy akez kulond anch: ‘Muntu mwinou wasambisha kutung, pakwez wakangany kal kupwish mudimu wend!’
31 Chikwau kand, anch mwant ukwet amasalay tunan dikum usotil kurish nend mwant mukwau ukweta amasalay Mukoku ushadikina tunan twaad, pakusambish ndiy ukushakam mulong wa kushinshik anch ukwet usu uwanyidina wa kurish ni mwant mukwau.
32 Anch kakwetap usu uwanyidina, ukez kutum aruu end kuya kumusankan mwant mukwau pachidiay kulemp mulong wa kumwit, chakwel akutwish kwovijan nend nich chisambu.”
33 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Chawiy chimwing kand, kwikil umwing wenen ukutwisha kwikal mwin kwilej wam wakad kusha yom yawonsu yikwetay.
0 Mungu wakad kutal
34 “Mungu udi chom chiwamp, pakwez anch washadish kutal kwau, kwikil kand mutapu wa kuutadish.
35 Kakutwishap kuutek ku divu, ap ku muril wa yiyimp ya annam. Akuudjibul kwa. Anch ukwetany matu, teshany kamu nawamp!”
0 Chishimu cha mukoku washadika, amutan kand
1 Dichuku dimwing in kulambwish yitad avud, ni in yitil akwau eza ni kumutesh Yesu.
2 Afaris nau alej a Yijil asambisha kununganijan anch: “Muntu mwinou ukat kuyak in yitil ni kudia nau!”
3 Chawiy Yesu wayitila chishimu anch:
4 “Anch muntu umwing wa pakach penen ukwet amikoku chitot, chad pashadik umwing, ov, ndiy ukusal nchik? Ndiy ukusha akwau makum chidivu ni chidivu mu madil, ukuya ni kukimb umwing ushadikina, djat ni pakumutanyinay.
5 Pakumutanay, ukusangar nakash, ukumusend pa makij,
6 chad ukumutwal pol. Chawiy ndiy ukuyitazuk arund nend, ni akwau atunginay nau, ukuyilej anch: “Am nikwet musangar nakach mulong namutan kal mukoku wam washadikina. Chifanyidin tusangarany!’
7 Chawiy chimwing, nikulejinany, kukez kwikal musangar mwiur anch mwin yitil umwing wakarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yend. Musangar ukwovau mwiur mulong wa mwin yitil winou ukupandakanamu ukwovau mulong wa antu makum chidivu ni chidivu atonga anch: ‘Kitukwetap kuswir kwa kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yetu.’
0 Chishimu cha rufalang rashadika, arutan kand
8 “Ap anch mband umwing ukwet nfalang ja utad wa argent dikum, chad pashadik rumwing, ov, ndiy ukusal nchik? Ndiy ukulimik mwend wa kasu, ukukomb mu chikumbu chend, kusurab kwawonsu djat ni pakurutanyinay.
9 Anch warutan kand, ukuyitazuk arund nend, ni akwau atunginay nau, ukuyilej anch: ‘Am nikwet musangar nakash, mulong narutan kal rufalang ram. Chifanyidin tusangarany!’ 
10 Chawiy chimwing, nikulejinanya, aruu a mwiur akez kusangar nakash anch mwin yitil umwing wakarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yend.”
0 Chishimu cha mwan washadika, wamekan kand
11 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Kwading muntu umwing wakweting an amakundj aad.
12 Mwanikanch wamwela tatukwend anch: ‘Tatuku, nginkisha yom ya uswan wam katat.’ Chawiy muntu mwinou wayangena anend amakundj aad yom ya uswan wau.
13 Chipasuta machuku makemp, mwanikanch walandisha yom ya uswan wend, wasend nfalang jend, waya kwend. Ndiy waya kwi ngand ya kulemp, kushik kwinikwa washesha nfalang jend ku yom yiyimp.
14 Ndiy wapwisha nfalang jawonsu bwi. Chad kamungun weza mwi ngand yiniya, pakwez ndiy wading washala kal wamwamu.
15 Chawiy ndiy waya, wakwat mudimu kudi muntu umwing wa ngand yiniya. Muntu mwinou wamutuma ku chingand chend mulong wa kulam ayibond.
16 Mwan winou wakata kudia yom yadiangau ayibond, pakwez kwikil muntu wamwinkisha chom.
17 Chishikijayuku amwinend, watonga anch: ‘Antu a mudimu awonsu a tatukwam akwet yakudia yivud kupandakan, pakwez am kunoku nikat kufang nzal!
18 Nikutumbuk, niya kudi tatukwam, nikamwel anch: Tatuku, nasadil kal chitil kudi Nzamb ni kudi ey.
19 Am kiniwanyidinap kand kwintazuk anch, nidi mwaney. Nteka kwam mudi muntwey a mudimu.’
20 Chawiy ndiy watumbuka mulong wa kuchirik kuya kudi tatukwend. “Pachadingay kulemp ni kwol kwau, tatukwend wamumana, wamwovila riy nakash. Ndiy waya mau, wamubwikat mwanend, wamulangwisha nich kususu ku kan.
21 Mwanend wamwela anch: 'Tatuku, am nasadil kal chitil kudi Nzamb pi kudi ey kand. Am kiniwanyidinap kand kwintazuk anch, nidi mwaney.'
22 Pakwez tatukwend wayitazuka atushalapol end wayileja anch: 'Swakalany, yangany, uletany nkandj upandakena kuwap, umudjikany. Mudjikany kaziy ku muny wend. mudjikany kand yisapat.
23 Yangany kand, ukwatany musamb a ngomb upandakena kuwap, mujipany, chakwel tusala musambu, tusangarany!
24 Mulong mwanam winou wading wafil kal, pakwez katat udi mwom. Wading washadikin kal, pakwez katat wamekan kal.' Chad asambisha kusal musambu.
25 "Pa chisu chinicha mwan mukurump wading mu chir. Pezay pol waseja piswimp ni ku chikumbu, watesha miminy ni maj.
26 Chawiy wamutazuka kashalapol umwing, wamwipula anch: 'Ov, yom ik yiniya?'
27 Kashalapol wamwakula anch: 'Mwanchey wachirikang kal. Tatukwey wajipang kal musamb a ngomb upandakena kuwap, mulong wachirikang kal mwom.'
28 Yayend wajimana nakash, walik kwandam mu chikumbu. Chawiy tatukwend wabudika, wamulembijek chakwel andam.
29 Chad ndiy wamwakula tatukwend anch: 'Tal, am nakusadidil kal mudimu mivu yiney yawonsu mudi muswik, naziyila kand mazu mey mawonsu wanlejanga. Pakwez ey kand kal winginkishap ap kusu mwan a mpemb chakwel nikutwish kusal musambu nau arund nam!
30 Chawiy mwaney winou washeshina dipit diey diawonsu kudi amband a kusochik, pachirikangay kunoku ey wamujipinang musamb a ngomb upandakena kuwap!'
31 Tatukwend wamwakula anch: 'Mwanam, ey uding kal ni yamam machuku mawonsu. Yom yawonsu yamam yidi yeyey.
32 Pakwez chifanyidin etu kusal musambu ni kusangar, mulong mwanamakwey winou wadi wafil kal, pakwez katat udi mwom, wadi washadikin kal, pakwez katat wamekan kal.'"
0 Kashalapol ubabela nayimp
1 Yesu wayilej in kwilejend anch: "Kwading mpich umwing wading ukwet kashalapol wamulaminanga yom. Amuleja mpich anch: 'Kashalapol wey winou ukat kushesh dipit.'
2 Chawiy ndiy wamutazuka kashalapol wend, wamwipul anch: 'Ov, yom ik yiniteshila yiusadila ey? Fund yawonsu chakwel winleja mutapu ulamina dipit diam, mulong kiukwikalap kand kashalapol wam.'
3 Kashalapol watonga anch: 'Mwant wam ukwindiosh ku mudimu, ov, nikusal nchik? Am kinikwetap usu wa kutap pansh, chad nikwov usany pa kwitol.
4 A! Katat nijik kal chom cha kusal chakwel anch andiosh ku mudimu, nikez kuman arund akeza kwingak!"
5 Chawiy ndiy wayitazuka antu awonsu ading akweta yikal ya mwant wend. Ndiy wamwipula muntu wa kusambish anch: 'Ov, chikal ik chiukweta cha mwant wam?'
6 Ndiy wamwakula anch: Nikwet chikal cha ansab ajim chitot a many ma mpach.' Kashalapol wamuleja anch: 'Shakam pinap, fund kwey ansab makum matan.'
7 Chad wamwipula kand muntu mukwau anch: 'Ov, ey niyey, chikal ik chiukweta?' Ndiy wamwakula anch: Nikwet chikal cha antuku yitot yitan a tidiku.' Kashalapol wamuleja anch: 'Kwat mukand wey, fund kwey antuku yitot vinying.'
8 Mwant wamushimana kashalapol ubabela nayimp, mulong ndiy watonga yom ya kurutu. Mulong antu a mangand minam ababel pakwovijan nau akwau kupandakanamu antu endidila mu kutok."
9 Yesu walonda kand anch: "Chawiy nakulejany anch, sadilany mapit mayimp ma ngand yiney mulong wa kwikal nich arund, chakwel pimakeza kukupwany mapit minam, arund inay akez kukwakany mwi ndond ya kushakam chikupu.
10 Muntu mwawonsu udia mwin yakin mu yom yikemp, ndiy ukwikal kand mwin yakin mu yom yijim. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu wakad win yakin mu yom yikemp, kakwikalap kand nich win yakin mu yom yijim.
11 Chad anch ey kiwadiap mwin yakin mulong wa mapit ma pa mangand minam, ov, akutwish nchik kukwinkish mapit makin? 
12 Anch ey kiwadiap mwin yakin mulong wa kulam yom ya antu akwau, ov, nany ukeza kukwinkish ey dipit diey?
13 "Kwikil kashalapol ukutwisha kuyisadil ansalejend aad. Ukumukis umwing, chad wamukat mukwau, ap ukumulimish umwing, chad wamudiul mukwau. Kiukutwishanyap kusadil kapamp kamwing Nzamb ni mapit ma pa mangand.'
0 Yom yikwau yalonday Yesu
14 Afaris, pateshau yom yiney yawonsu, amudiwola Yesu, mulong ading akatin nfalang.
15 Yesu wayileja anch: "En ukat kwiyingishany ayinen ku mes kwa antu, pakwez Nzamb wij michim yen. Mulong yom yawonsu yimenau antu anch yikwet usey ujim, yidi kwau yom yitakanena ku mes kwa Nzamb.
16 "Yijil ya Moses ni mikand yafundau aruu a Nzamb yading yikwet ulabu, djat ni ku chirung cha Yohan Mubatish. Kudiokal pa chisu chinicha, akat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb, chad antu awonsu akat kuril kwandamamu.
17 Pakwez chiswapel diur ni divu kufa kupandakan kadizu kakemp ka Yijil yiney kujimangan.
18 "Muntu mwawonsu ukumulika mukajend, chad wat mband mukwau, wasal kal chitil cha kusotan. Ap ikundj mwawonsu ukumwata mband walikinau kal, niyend wasal kal chitil cha kusotan."
0 Chishimu cha mpich nend Lazar
19 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Kwading muntu umwing mpich wading udjit maswin ma ufun ma usey ukash, wading ni kwisangarish nich misambu pichuku pichuku.
20 Kwading kand muntu umwing kazwendj, dijin diend Lazar, wading ukwet mujimbu wa yitat lap. Amuletanga ku chis cha chikumbu cha mpich winiwa.
21 Wasotanga kudia jinkuku japalokanga mwishin mwa mes ma mpich. Chad kand atubu ezanga ni kumulash pa yitat.
22 Kazwendj winou wafa, chad aruu a mwiur amutwala mwiur, washakam nend Aburaham. Niyend mpich wafa kand, amujik.
23 Mu Dijiy dia Kasu mwayay wamana mar ni kwov kusansan nakash. Ndiy wazambula mes, wamana Aburaham kulemp, ushich nend Lazar.
24 Chad wabarika kutazuk anch: “Tatuku Aburaham! Ngovilap, amboku, riy, mutuma Lazar abanda ris ra muny mu mem, chakwel ez antaleshap pa muminy, mulong am novil kusansan nakash mu kasu kinak!’
25 Pakwez Aburaham wamwakula anch: ‘Mwanam, vurik mwom wey wading nich pa mangand. Ey watambula yom yiwamp yivud, pakwez Lazar watambula ching kusu yom yiyimp yivud. Chawiy katat, ndiy ukat kusangar kunoku piumena ey mar ni kwov kusansan.
26 Chikwau kand, pakach peyey ni yetwetu padi ruwengil rulemp. Chawiy antu adia kwinaku kakutwishap kwauk kwez kunoku, ap antu adia kunoku kakutwishap kwauk kwez kwinaku.’
27 Chad mpich walonda anch: ‘Chawiy nakwilembil, . amboku, tatuku Aburaham, mutuma Lazar aya ku chikumbu cha tatukwam.
28 Kwinikwa nikwet anamakwam atan. Chifanyidin kuya kuyibabesh chakwel kangal niyau eza kunoku kwi ndond ya mar ni kusansan.’
29 Aburaham wamwakula anch: ‘Anamakwey akwet kal yom yafunday Moses ni aruu a Nzamb mulong wa kuyibabesh. Chifanyidin anamakwey atesha mazu minam.’
30 Mpich wamwakula anch: ‘Tatuku Aburaham, yom. yiney kiyiwanyidinap! Pakwez anch muntu wavumbuk mu kufa, waya wakayilej, awiy akukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau.’
31 Pakwez Aburaham wamuleja anch: ‘Anch kateshinap yom yafunday Moses ni aruu a Nzamb, awiy kakez kumwitiyap muntu ukuvumbuka mu rufu.’ ”
0 Kangal wayishany antu mu yitil
1 Yesu wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Yisu yawonsu antu akat kuman yom yikata kuyandjik mu yitil, pakwez riyind kudi muntu ukata kuyilet yom yiney!
2 Chad chifanyidin kumukasin muntu mwinou diyal dijim mwi nshing, amudjibul nich mu karung kupandakanamu kumusadikish mwanikanch mukemp wingitiyijina am chitil.
3 Chawiy. babalany ku yisalijok yen! a “Anch Senne wasal chitil, mukanda, chad anch ndiy wakarumuk kudiokal ku chitil, ey mulikishina.
4 Anch ndiy wakusal nayimp tupamp sambwad pa dichuku dimwing. chad anch wez kudi ey tupamp twawonsu sambwad, wakwel anch: ‘Nakarumuk kal kudiokal ku chitil chinech,’ chifanyidin ey kumulikishin.” Malejan mulong wa ritiy
5 Atwimbuy a Yesu amwipul anch: “Tuwejinaku ritiy.” i
6 Nsalejetu wakula anch: “Anch ukwetany ritiy rim mudi rubut ra mutond upidilau anch, mutard, ing ukutwishany kuwel mutond ujim winou anch: ‘Ivumbula, uya ukikun mu karung!’ Ing ukutwish kukuziyilany.”
0 Mudimu wa kashalapol
7 Yesu walonda kand anch: “Anch umwing wenen ukwet kashalapol wend ukata kumudimin ap kumulamin yivam, ov, ukutwish kumulej pakwezay ku chir anch: “Yang swa, udia?
8 Bwat! Pakwez ukumulej anch: ‘Yang, winrijekin yakudia, chad djal maswin ma mudimu wa mu chikumbu chakwel winletina yakudia ni yakuna. Chawiy anch wapwish, niyey ukutwish kudia ni kuna.’
9 Ov, mwant ukutwish kumujikitish kashalapol wend mulong waziyidil ku mazu mend mawonsu? Bwat!
10 Chawiy chimwing, niyen, anch wasalany yom yawonsu yinakulejanya, londany kwen anch: ‘Tudi kwetu atushalapol amwamu, twasalang ching kusu mudimu wetu.
0 Yesu ukat kuyok antu dikum, in musong wa mak 
11 Padingay Yesu uyil ku Yerusalem, wasutila pa mwimbu wa Len iinet pt Galalia.
12 Pashikay mu ul umwing, wasankanijana nau antu dikum ayedila musong wa mak. ae: imanyina kulemp,
13 abarik anch: “Mwant Yesu! Itwovila riy!
14 Yesu wayimana, wayilej anch: “Yangany, akutalany kudi in kupesh.” Awiy niece padingau ayil mwi njil.
15 Umwing wa pakach pau, chamanay anch wayerik kal, wachirika, wamushiman Nzamb nich dizu piur.
16 Ndiy weza, was manungun pansh ku mend ma Yesu, wamujikitish. Muntu mwinou wading mwin Samaria.
17 Chad Yesu wipula anch: “Ov, kinayokangap antu awonsu dikum? Ing, akwau chidivu adi kwisu?
18 Ov, kwikil kand muntu mukwau watonganga kuchirik mulong wa kumujikitish Nzamb, ching kusu kwau mweny ou?”
19 Chawiy Yesu wamuleja anch: “Tumbuk, yang kwey. Ey wapand kal mulong wangitiyij kal am.”
0 Want wa Nzamb ukat kwez
20 Afaris amwipula Yesu anch: “Want wa Nzamb ukwez chisu ik?” Ndiy wayakula anch “Want wa Nzamb kiukwezap mu mutapu ukutwishau kuuman.
21 Kwikil muntu ukeza kulond anch: ‘Ou kamu, ou!’ ap anch ‘Iwa kamu, wa!’ Mulong talany, Want wa Nzamb udi kamu mukach mwen.”
22 Chawiy ndiy wayileja in kwilejend anch: “Chisu chikez kwez chiukeza kuswirany kuman dichuku dimwing dia machuku ma Mwan a Muntu, pakwez kiukez kudimananyap.
23 Antu amwing akez kukulejany anch: ‘Talany kwa!’ Ap anch: ‘Talany kunoku!’ Pakwez en kangal wayanyaku, ap kangal wayilondulany.
24 Mudi mulayilay ukata kusut mwiur kudiokal mutambu umwing djat ni ku mutambu ukwau, mwamu kand mukez kwikalay Mwan a Muntu mu dichuku diend.
25 Pakwez pakusambish ndiy ukez kuman mar nakash ni kumulik kudi antu a chirung chinech.
26 Yom yasuta pa chirung cha Nowa, yawiy kand yikeza kusut pa chirung cha Mwan a Muntu.
27 Mu machuku ma Nowa, antu awonsu ading ni kudiang ni kuna, ading ni kwatijanang djat ni pa dichuku diandamay Nowa mu waat, chad mabeb ma mem meza mayijip awonsu.
28 Chikez kwikal kand mudi mu chirung cha Lot. Antu awonsu ading ni kudiang ni kuna, ading ni kulandang ni kulandish, ading ni kukunol mu yir ni kutung.
29 Pakwez dichuku diadiokalay Lot mu Sodom, kasu ni diseng dia diyal dipidilau anch, ‘Soufre’ yadiokala mwiur, yayijip antu awonsu.
30 Yom yiney yikez kwikal kand mwamu pa dichuku dikwezay Mwan a Muntu.
31 “Pa dichuku dinidia, muntu ushicha pa nsiny yalalela ya chikumbu chend, kangal washirik kwandam mu chikumbu mulong wa kunon yom yend yidiamu. Niyend muntu udia mu chir, kangal wachirik ku chikumbu chend.
32 Vurikany rusangu ra mband wa Lot.
33 Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwipandish amwinend, ukez kufa. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukushadisha mwom wend, ukez kuupandish.
34 Nikulejinany anch, uchuku winiwa antu aad akez kulal tul pa ulal umwing, chad akez kusend muntu umwing kudi Nzamb, pakwez mukwau ukez kushal.
35 Amband aad akez kutwa pamwing, chad akez kumusend mband umwing kudi Nzamb, pakwez mukwau ukez kushal. [
36 Antu aad akez kudim pamwing mu chir, chad akez kumusend muntu umwing kudi Nzamb, pakwez mukwau ukez kushal.]”
37 In kwilejend amwipula anch: “Ov, Nsalejetu, yom yiney yikez kumeken kwisu?” © Yesu wayakula anch: “Kwawonsu kudia chom chifila, kwawiy kukez kukumangenau amakub.”
0 Chishimu cha mwadiamufu nend nkalansambu
1 Chawiy Yesu wayitila in kwilejend chishimu, mulong wa kuyilej chakwel alembilang yisu yawonsu wakad kushadish ruchingej.
2 Walonda anch: “Mu ul umwing mwading nkalansambu umwing kamulimishangap Nzamb ap muntu.
3 Mu ul winiwa mwading kand mwadiamufu wezanga ni kumulembijek nkalansambu winou mulong wa kuman dirumburish ditentamina. Wamulejanga anch: ‘Nyingisha kudi mukwetu wanfundila!’
4 Chisu chilemp kamu, nkalansambu walika kusal chom. Pakwez chipasuta chisu, ndiy watonga anch: ‘Anch am kinimulimishinap nchik Nzamb ap muntu,
5 am nikez kumukwash mwadiamufu mwinou kuman dirumburish ditentamina, mulong ndiy ukat kwinswidioshang. Anch nalik, ndiy ukudandamen kwez ni kwinswidiosh!’ ”
6 Chad Nsalejetu walonda kand ‘anch: “Teshany yom yalonday nkalansambu muyimp winou.
7 Ov, Nzamb kakez kuyiyingishap antwend akata kumulembijek muten nl uchuku? Ov, ukez kulab pa kuyikwash?
8 Nakulejany, ndiy ukez kuyiyingish swa. Pakwez pakez kwezay Mwan a Muntu, ov, ukez kutan in ritiy mu mangand?”
0 Chishimu cha Mufaris ni mwin kulambwish yitad
9 Yesu wata kand chishimu kudi antu ading achingejin kuwap kwau ayinau, chad ayidiwol antu akwau.
10 Ndiy walonda anch: “Kwading antu aad akananika kuya ku Chikumbu cha Nzamb mulong wa kulembil. Umwing wading Mufaris, mukwau wading mwin kulambwish yitad.
11 Mufaris wimana pa amwinend, walembila anch: ‘A! Nzamb, nakujikitish mulong am kinikwetap ris, kinikwetap makasu, ap kwimik dis mudi antu akwau. Nakujikitish kand mulong am kinidiap mudi mwin kulambwish yitad winou.
12 Nikat kujilang yakudia tupamp twaad pa rubing, nikat kukwinkish ey chadikum cha mapit mam mawonsu.’
13 Pakwez mwin kulambwish yitad wimana kulemp ni Mufaris, katwishap kuzambul mes kutal mwiur. Pakwez wibula pa ntul, walembil anch: ‘A! Nzamb, ngovilap am mwin yitil riy!’ ”
14 Chawiy Yesu walonda anch: “Nakulejany anch, mwin kulambwish yitad winou wayinga nich kurutu kwa Nzamb, chad waya kwol kwend, pakwez Mufaris, bwat. Muntu mwawonsu ukata kwijimbish amwinend, akez kumushikumwish, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kwishikumwish amwinend, akez kumujimbish.”
0 Yesu ukat kuyiyukish an akemp
15 Antu amwing aletanga an a mu makas kudi Yesu chakwel ayanzok makas. Chad in kwilejend, chamanau mwamu, ayikangesha.
16 Pakwez Yesu wayitazuka an, walond anch: “Chifanyidin anikanch eza kwau kudi am, kangal wayikangeshany, mulong Want wa Nzamb udi wa antu adia mudi anikanch inay.
17 Nakulejany chakin kamu, muntu mwawonsu wakad kuziyil ku Want wa Nzamb mudi mwanikanch, kakez kwandamamup.”
0 Muntu mpich
18 Mwin kutakel wa in Yuda wamwipula Yesu anch: “Mulej wam Muwamp, ov, chifanyidin nisala nchik chakwel nikala nich mwom wa chikupu?”
19 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, mulong wak wingedila am anch, muwamp? Kwikil muntu udia muwamp, ching kusu Nzamb amwinend.
20 Ey wij kal yijil yilondila anch: ‘Kangal wimik dis. Kangal wajipan. Kangal wiy. Kangal wamutwambil mukwen makasu. Mulimisha tatukwey ni makwey.’ ”
21 Muntu winiwa wamwakula anch: “Nalama kal yijil * yiney yawonsu kudiokal ku usand wam.”
22 Yesu, chateshay mwamu, wamuleja anch: “Kukushadil chom chimwing cha kusal. Yang ulandish yom yawonsu yiukweta, upan nfalang jinej kudi atuzwendj, chawiy ey ukez kwikal nich mapit mwiur. Chad wez wikal mwin kwilej wam.”
23 Pakwez muntu winiwa, chateshay mwamu, wova ushon nakash, mulong wading mpich mujim.
24 Yesu, chamanay anch, muntu winiwa wov kal ushon, walonda anch: “Chikez kwikal chom chikash nakash kudi ampich kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb!
25 Chikasiken kudi nnam ukweta ndund pa nyim kusut mu dipan dia ndong, pakwez chipandaken kukasikan kudi mpich kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb.”
26 Antu atesha mazu minam amwipula anch: “Ov, ing, nany lel ukeza kupand?”
27 Yesu wayakula anch: “Yom yikasikena kudi antu, kiyikasikenap kudi Nzamb.”
28 Chad Pita walonda anch: “Tal kwa! Etu twashil kal ‘yikumbu yetu mulong wa kukulondul ey.”
29 Yesu wayakula anch: “Nakulejany chakin, muntu uketwish kusha chikumbu chend, ap mukajend, ap anamakwend. ap anvajend, ap anend mulong wa kwambat Want wa Nzamb,
30 anch muntu wasal mwamu, ukez kutambul yom yivud kupandakan mu chirung chinech, chad kurutu ukez kutambul mwom wa chikupu.” 
0 Yesu ukat kulond kapamp ka chisatu mulong wa rufu rend
31 Yesu wayitazukina in kwilejend dikum ni aad kuns, wayilej anch: “Teshany! Tuyilany ku Yerusalem. Kwinikwa yom yawonsu yafundau aruu a Nzamb.mulong wa Mwan a Muntu yikez kuwanyin.
32 Akez kumupan mu makas ma in mangand, akez kumuswingish, akez kumusaal masaal, akez ie kumuchil mat. 
33 Awiy akez kand kumubul nfimbu, chad akez kumujip. Pakwez pa dichuku dia chisatu ukez kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom.”
34 Pakwez in kwilejend kovap chom ap chimwing chalonday. Kurumburik kwa mazu mend ading akujindjikin, chakwel kakutwishap kwijik yom yalondilay Yesu.
0 Yesu ukat kumwok mputames mwin kwit
35 Pasejay Yesu piswimp ni Yeriko, kwading mputames ushicha kuns kwa njil, ukat kwit.
36 Mputames, chateshay chisak cha antu chikat kusut, ndiy wipula anch: “Ov, yom ik yinay?”
37 Amwakula anch: “Yesu wa ku Nazaret usutila.”
38 Chad ndiy wabarika anch: “Yesu! Mwan a David, ngovilap, amboku, riy!” “
39 Antu adinga kurutu amukangesha, amulej anch: “Nenet! Pakwez ndiy wapandakesha kubarik anch: “Mwan a David! Ngovilap, amboku, riy!” Hos
40 Yesu wimana, chad walejan kumulet mputames piswimpChashikay piswimp, Yesu wamwipula anch:
41 “Ov, usotil nikusadil yom ik?” Ndiy wakula anch: “Nsalejam, ngoka mes chakwel nimana.”
42 Yesu wamwela anch: “Man kwey! Ey wapand kal mulong wangitiyij kal am.”
43 Pawiy kamu pinipa ndiy wasambisha kuman, chad waya nend Yesu pamwing, wading ni kumujikitish Nzamb. Chisak cha antu, pichamana yom yiney, niyau amushimana Nzamb.
0 Yesu nend Zakeu
1 Yesu wasutila mu musumb wa Yeriko.
2 Mwinimwa mwading mukurump wa in kulambwish yitad, dijin diend Zakeu, ndiy wading mpich. 
3 Ndiy wasota mutapu wa kumwijik Yesu, pakwez katwishap kumuman mulong wa runtu, chikwau kand, ndiy wading muntu mwiswimp. 
4 Chawiy ndiy waya mau kurutu, wakandam ku mutond mudi wa nfung chakwel ukutwish kumuman Yesu pakusutay. 
5 Pashikay Yesu pinipa, ndiy watala kwiur, chad wamwel Zakeu anch: “Zakeu shirik swa, chinfanyidin am kulal kwol kwey ilel.” ‘ ;
6 Zakeu washirika swa, wamwak nich musangar nakash.
7 Antu awonsu amana chom chinech anunganijana anch: “Muntu mwinou waya kal akalangal ku chikumbu cha mwin yitil!”
8 Zakeu Wimana, wamulej Yesu anch: “Mwant, teshany! Am nikez kupan chikunku cha dipit diam kudi atuzwendj. Chad kand, anch namudimba muntu, nikez kumuchirishin yom yend tupamp tunying.”
9 Yesu wamuleja anch: “Dipandish diashik kal mu chikumbu chinech ilel unou, mulong muntu mwinou niyend udi wa a majuku ma Aburaham.
10 Mwan a Muntu weza mulong wa kusot ashadikina ni kuyipandish.”
0 Chishimu cha nfalang ja utad wa or 
11 Yesu wata kand chishimu mulong wa antu atesha yom yiney. Awiy atonga anch, Want wa Nzamb udi piswimp ni kumekan, mulong Yesu wading piswimp ni ku Yerusalem. 
12 Chawiy ndiy walonda anch: “Kwading muntu umwing mujim wasota kuya kwi ngand ya kulemp chakwel akamudish want, chad wading uchingejin anch, ukuchirik kand kwol A kwend.
13 Chashikay pa kuya, ndiy wayitazuka atushalapol end dikum, wayangen rufalang rumwing rumwing ra utad wa or. Chad wayileja anch: ‘Isakany nich nfalang jinej djat ni pinikeza kuchirikin.’
14 Katat antu a ngand yend ading amukisin. Atuma aruu mwi ngand yiniya mulong wa kulejan anch: ‘Etu kitusotilap muntu mwinou kwikal mwant wetu.’
15 “Ndiy amudisha want, chad wachirika kwol kwend. Chawiy wayitazuka atushalapol end ashilay nfalang, chakwel ijika nfalang jisakilau kal.
16 Kashalapol wa kusambish weza, walond anch: ‘Mwant, rufalang rumwing ruwanginkisha, am nisakidilap nfalang jikwau dikum ja utad wa or.’
17 Mwant wamwela anch: ‘Chiwamp, ey udi kashalapol muwamp! Mulong ey wamekesh kal win yakin mu yom yikemp, am nikez kukutek ey kwikal mwin kutakel wa misumb dikum.’
18 Kashalapol wa kaad weza, walond anch: ‘Mwant, rufalang rumwing ruwanginkisha, am nisakidilap nfalang jikwau jitan ja utad wa or.’ 
19 Mwant wamuleja kashalapol winou anch: “Am nikez kukutek ey kwikal mwin kutakel wa misumb yitan.’
20 Kashalapol mukwau weza, walond anch: ‘Mwant, rufalang rey ra or, er kamu er. Narukasa mu_chibel, narujindjik.
21 Am nakwova ey wom mulong ukwet muchim ukash. Ey ukat kutambul yom yakad iyey, ukat kwangul yom yiwakad ey kukun.’ 
22 Mwant wamwela anch: ‘Ey udi kashalapol muyimp! Nikukufish nich mudi mudia mazu mey! Ey wij kal anch, am nikwet muchim ukash, chad nikat kutambulang yom yakad iyam, ni kwangul kand yom yinakad kukun.
23 Anch mwamu, ing, mulong wak walika kuyinkish in kwisak nich? Ing pineza kal ap, nelang kutambul nich diyanzukesh.’
24 Chad mwant wayileja antu ading iminya pinipa anch: ‘Mutambulany rufalang ra utad wa or, chad urupanany kudi kashalapol ukweta nfalang dikum.’
25 Pakwez awiy amwakula anch: ‘Mwant, ndiy ukwet kal nfalang dikum!’
26 Mwant wayakula anch: ‘Muntu mwawonsu ukweta kal chom, akez kumuwejinaku yikwau. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu uburedina, akez kumwamuk kakemp kakwetay.
27 Chawiy katat, mulong wa akankuny nam anlika am kwikal mwant wau, yiletany kunoku, yijipinany mu mes mwam!’ ”
0 Yesu ukat kuya ku Yerusalem nich katumb
28 Chapwishay Yesu kulond yom yiney, ndiy watakelaku kuya ku Yerusalem.
29 Chashikay piswimp ni ku Betefaj ni ku Betaniy, piswimp ni ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach, adiy watakejaku in kwilejend aad.
30 Wayileja anch: “Yangany ku ul udia kurutu kwen. Piukushikanya kwinikwa ukutanany mwan wa chimbur ukasilau, kand kal amukandamangap kudi muntu. Musurilany, wezany nend kunoku.
31 Anch muntu wakwipulany anch: 'Ov, mulong wak wamusurilanya kal?' En ukumwakulany anch: 'Nsalejetu umuswiridin.
32 Awiy aya, atan yom yawonsu mudi mwayilejau kudi Yesu.
33 Pamusurilangau mwan wa chimbur, ansalejend ayipula anch: "Ov, mulong wak umusurilanya?"
34 Awiy akula anch: "Mwant umuswiridin."
35 Chad amutwala mwan wa chimbur kudi Yesu. Ala yidjal yau pa nyim pа nnam winou, chawiy amukandjikap Yesu.
36 Padingay ni kuya, antu ala yidjal yau mwi njil.
37 Chasejay piswimp ni ku Yerusalem, pakurumukina njil ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach, chisak chijim cha in kwilejend chasambisha kumujikitish Nzamb, ni kumushiman nich mazu ma piur, mulong wa yom yijim yikwamushena yamanau.
38 Alondanga anch: "Chifanyidin Nzamb amuyukisha Mwant wezidina mu dijin dia Chinawej! Chisambu chikala mwiur, ni uyaj wikala kudi Nzamb!"
39 Chad Afaris amwing ading mu chisak cha antu amwela Yesu anch: "Mulej, yileja in kwilejey anenet!"
40 Yesu wayakula anch: "Nakulejany chakin, anch in kwilej anenet, mayal makez kubarik kwau dizu piur!"
0 Yesu ukat kudil mulong wa in Yerusalem
41 Yesu waseja piswimp ni ku musumb, chaumanay, ndiy wasambisha kuudil. 
42 Walonda anch: "Chad chiwamp anch en in Yerusalem wadi wijany yom yikata kulet chisambu. Pakwez katat kiukutwishanyap kuyiman!
43 Chisu chikat kwez chikez kutungau akankuny nen chinanginang cha mavu kunyingumwish musumb wen bwalakan. Akez kukombanyamu, ni kukuwilany mitambu yawonsu.
44 Akez kushesh musumb wen pamwing ni ayinen shutit. Kukez kushalap diyal ap dimwing pa ndond paditungilau, mulong en kiwijikanyap chisu chezay Nzamb kukupandishany!"
0 Yesu ukat kwandam mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
45 Yesu wandama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wasambish kuyopat in kwisak.
46 Wayileja anch: “Mu Mukand wa Nzamb afundil anch: 'Chikumbu cham chikez kwikal chikumbu cha kulembil.' Pakwez wachikarumwinany kal kwikal mandam ma ambwitan!"
47 Yesu walejananga mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb machuku mawonsu. Chad amakurump a in kupesh, ni alej a Yijil, ni in kutakel au antu, asota kumujip.
48 Pakwez awiy akanganya kuman mutapu wa kumujip, mulong antu awonsu amuteshanga nakash.
0 Akat kwipul kwisu kudiokila ulabu wa Yesu
1 Dichuku dimwing Yesu wading mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ukat kuyilej antu ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp. Chad amakurump a in kupesh, ni alej a Yijil, pamwing nau amakurump akwau, ¢za kumwipul Yesu.
2 Alonda anch: “Tuleja, ov, ulabu ik ukweta wa kusal yom yiney? Ov, nany wakulejina kusal mwamu?”
3 Yesu wayakula anch: “Niyam nisotil kukwipulany. Nlejany,
4 ov, nany wamutuma Yohan kubatish antu, Nzamb anch antu?” 
5 Awiy asambisha kununganijan ayinau anch: “Anch twamwakul anch: ‘Nzamb ndiy wamutuma,’ ndiy ukutwel anch: ‘Ing, mulong wak walikany kumwitiy Yohan?’
6 Pakwez anch twamwakul anch: ‘Antu awiy amutuma,’ antu awonsu akez kutwas mayal ni kutujip, mulong awiy ading ij anch, Yohan wading muruu wa Nzamb.”
7 Chawiy akula anch: “Etu kitwijap nany wamutumina Yohan kubatish antu.”
8 Chad Yesu wayileja anch: “Niyam kinikukulejanyap nany wintumina kusal yom yiney.”
0 Chishimu cha in kulam chir cha mitond ya nviny
9 Chawiy Yesu wayitila antu chishimu chinech anch: “Kwading muntu umwing wadima chir chend cha mitond ya nviny. Wovijana nau antu mulong wa kumulamin chir, chad waya mu weny chisu chilemp.
10 Pichashika chirung cha kupol mabuj, ndiy watuma muswik wend umwing kudi antu ovijanay nau kulam chir, chakwel amutambwila chikunku cha mabuj mapolau. Pakwez antu ina amukwata muswik, amubul, amuchirish makas mamwamu.
11 Chad mwin chir wayitumina muswik mukwau. Pakwez awiy amukwata, amubul kand, amukwatish usany nakash. Amuchirisha makas mamwamu.
12 Chad ndiy wayitumina muswik wa kasatu. Ndiy amutapola, amudjibul pol.
13 Mwin chir watonga anch: ‘Ov, nikusal nehik? Nikuyitumin mwanam unikatila, ap awiy akez kumulimish ndiy!’
14 In kulam chir, chamumanau, anunganijana anch: ‘Winou ndiy ukeza kuswan chir. Tumujipany, chakwel uswan winou ukez kwikal wetwetu!’ 
15 Awiy amutwala pol pa chir cha mitond ya nviny, chad amujip.” Chad Yesu wayipula anch “Ov, mwin chir ukez kuyisal in kulam chir chend nchik?
16 Ndiy ukwez mulong wa kuyijip, chad ukez kwovijan nau antu akwau in kuchilam.” Antu, chateshau mazu minam, alonda anch: “Chakapul chaya mwa!”
17 Yesu wayitala neeng, wayipul anch: “Ov, dizu dia Nzamb dined dirumburikin anch nchik? ‘Diyal dialikau in kutung, diawiy kamu dinidia dikala diyal dijim diatekau pa dikonk.’
18 Muntu mwawonsu ukeza kuwil pa diyal dined, ukez kubukok. Chad anch diyal diamuwil muntu, dikez kumupuchol, washal mudi rufunfut.”
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kulambul chitad
19 Alej a Yijil ni amakurump au in kupesh apakisha kumukwat Yesu, mulong ijika anch, wayitila chishimu chinech mulong wa kuyifish nich. Pakwez awiy ova wom mulong wa antu.
20 Chawiy achingela chisu chiwamp chikutwishau kusal chom. Awiy ayifuta antu in kwimekesh mudi in yakin, chad ayituma kuya kudi Yesu mulong wa kumupak pa kan. Asala mwamu chakwel akutwish kumupan mu makas ma nyikel wa in Rom.
21 Jn kutentish inay amwela Yesu anch: “Mulej, twij anch, yiukata kulond ni kulejan yitentamin. Twij anch, kiukwetap kasolikany pakach pa antu. Kiukat kwaurilap muntu mujim ap muntu mukemp, pakwez ukat kulejan chakin yom yisotilay Nzamb.
22 Tuleja bil, ov, mu yijil yetu chifanyidin kulambul chitad cha Sezar, mwant wa in Rom, anch bwat?”
23 Pakwez Yesu wijika kubabek kwau, wayel anch:
24 “Nlejany bil rufalang ra utad wa argent, ov, chifu chinech ni dijin yidia pa rufalang riner yidi ya nany?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Yidi ya Sezar, mwant wa in Rom.”
25 Chawiy Yesu wayileja anch: “Lambulany yom ya mwant wa in Rom kudi mwant wa in Rom, pakwez lambulany kand yom ya Nzamb kudi Nzamb.”
26 Awiy akanganya kumufish nich pakach pa antu, chawiy aneneta zong. Awiy ashimwoka mulong wa kwakul kwend.
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa afu
27 Chad Asadus amwing, awiy kamu akata kulondang anch, kwikiling divumbuk dia afu, eza kudi Yesu, amwipul anch:
28 “Mulej, Moses watufundina chijil anch: ‘Anch ikundj wafa, wamusha mband wakad kuval nend, chifanyidin mwanchend kumuswan mwadiamufu, chakwel ez amusakuril yayend muchid.’
29 Chawiy kwading an amakundj sambwad a divumu dimwing. Mwan wa kusambish wamwata mband, chad ndiy wafa, wamusha mwadiamufu wakad kuval nend. 
30 Mwanchend wamuswana mwadiamufu,
31 niyend mwan ikundj wa kasatu wamuswana kand. Yom yiney yashika kudi an amakundj awonsu sambwad, afa wakad kuval an.
32 Chad kwinyim niyend mband wafa.
33 Katat pa dichuku dikez kuvumbukau afu awonsu, ov, mband winou ukez kwikal wa nany anch an awonsu sambwad amwata?”
34 Yesu wayakula anch: “Amakundj ni amband a chirung chinech akwatijan kwau.
35 Pakwez amakundj ni amband achindilau anch awanyidin kuvumbuk kwikal aom mu chirung chikeza kwez, kakez kwatijanap.
36 Awiy akwez kwikal mudi aruu a mwiur, kakutwishap kufa. Awiy adi an a Nzamb mulong avumbukang kal mu rufu.
37 Moses watushinshika patok anch, afu akat kuvumbuk kwikal aom. Pafunday rusangu ra kasu ku yifukis yakad kutem, ndiy wamiujimbula Chinawej anch: ‘Nzamb wa Aburaham, Nzamb wa Isak, Nzamb wa Jakob.’
38 Nzamb kadiap Nzamb wa afu afila chikupu mudi muukata kutongany en, pakwez udi Nzamb wa aom, ap anch afap nchik, mulong kudi ndiy awonsu adi aom.”
39 Alej a Yijil amwing amwela anch: “Mulej, ey wakul kal nawamp!”
40 Awiy ova wom wa kumwipul kand yipul yikwau.
0 Akat kwipul mulong wa Kristu Uzizidilau Many 
41 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, akutwish nchik kulond anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many udi ching kusu mwan wa dijuku dia David?
42 Mulong David amwinend ulondil mu mukand wa Kuseng anch: “Chinawej walonda kudi Nsalejam anch: Shakam kwey ku chikas cham cha katatuku,
43 kushik ni pinikuyiteka akankuny ney mwishin mwa yidjatil yey.’
44 David amwinend wamutazuka Kristu Uzizidilau Many anch: ‘Nsalejam,” ing, mutapu ik ukwikalay ching kusu mwan wa dijuku diend?”
0 Yesu ukat kuyibabesh antu mulong wa alej a Yijil
45 Pamuteshangau Yesu kudi antu awonsu, ndiy wayileja in kwilejend anch:
46 “Yibabelany alej a Yijil mulong awiy akatil kwendangan adjit ankandj alemp, akatil ching antu ayilangwishang awiy mu jindond mudia antu avud. Akatil kushakam mu jindond ja uyaj mu yikumbu ya kulembil, akatil kand kushakam jindond ja katumb ku misambu.
47 Awiy akat kwamuk yikumbu yau adiaafu, akat kulond mazu mavud mamwamu mu kulembil kwau mulong wa kwimekesh. Akez kuyilej kadimu kupandakan!”
0 Mulambu walambulay mwadiamufu
1 Yesu watala neeng, chad wamana ampich akat kulambui mulambu wau mu chipau cha Chikumbu cha Nzamb. 
2 Chawiy wamana kand mwadiamufu kazwendj nakash, niyend watekamu nfalang jaad ja utad usuz.
3 Yesu walonda anch: “Nakulejany chakin, mwadiamufu winou kazwendj watekamu kal yom yivud kupandakan antu akwau awonsu.
4 Antu akwau alambula nfalang jivud mulong akwet kand jikwau jivud. Pakwez ndiy kazwendj mudiay omu, watekangamu yawonsu yikwetay yelangay kudia nich.”
0 Yesu ukat kulejan mulong wa kusheshik kwa Chikumbu cha Nzamb
5 Antu amwing alonda anch: “Talany ufun wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ni mayal mau kuwap, ni yom ya matangal yapanangau kudi Nzamb.” Yesu walonda anch:
6 “Umenany yom yiney yawonsu. Chisu chikat kwez, kwikil diyal dimwing dikeza kushal piur pa dikwau, mawonsu akez kumabumwon.”
0 Mar ni kuzengol yikeza kwez
7 Awiy amwipula anch: “Mulej, ov, chisu ik chikeza kushik yom yiney? Ov, chijingidij ik chikeza kulejan chirung cha kushik kwa yom yiney?”
8 Yesu walonda anch: “Babalany, chakwel kangal muntu wakudimbany. Antu avud akez kufa mu kan, akez kulondil mu dijin diam anch: ‘Am yam Kristu!’ ap anch: ‘Chisu chashik kal!’ Pakwez kangal wayilondulany.
9 Kangal wovany wom piukuteshany jinsangu ja njit ja ngand ni ngand yikwau, ap jinsangu ja njit ja antu ayinau mwi ngand yau. Yom yiney yifanyidin kumekan, pakwez disudiel kand kal diseja piswimp.” 
10 Ndiy walonda kand anch: “Muchid ukez kurish ni muchid ukwau, want ukez kurish ni want ukwau.
11 Kukez kwikal kunyikek kwa ngand kuyimp, ni kamungun, ni yipupu kwawonsu. Mwiur mukez kudiokal yom yikwamushena yikwatishena wom. 
12 Pakwez piyakad kal kushik yom yiney, akez kukukwatany ni kukuzengolany. Akez kukupanany mu makas ma amakurump a yikumbu ya kulembil. Akez kukutekany mu rukan, chad akez kukutwalany kudi ant ni anyikel mulong wa kwingambat am. 
13 Chinech chikez kwikal chisu chiwamp kudi en cha kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp.
14 Shimpishany michim piyakad kal kushik yom yiney. Kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa mazu ma kwilondilap ayinen,
15 mulong am yam nikeza kukwinkishany mazu ni manangu mawanyidina. Kwikil mukankuny ap umwing ukutwisha kukutadikany ap kukumanany makasu.
16 Anvaj en, ni anamakwen, ni arund nen akez kukupanany mu makas ma akankuny. Chad amwing pakach pen akez kuyijip.
17 Antu awonsu akez kukukisany mulong wa kwingambat am. 
18 Pakwez kwikil ruswich ap rumwing ra ku mitu yen rikeza kushadik.
19 Imanany dang, chad ukez kwipandishany ayinen.”
0 Yesu ukat kulejan mulong wa kusheshik kwa Yerusalem
20 Yesu walejana anch: “Piukumananya amasalay awombamu musumb wa Yerusalem, chad ukez kwijikany anch, udi piswimp ni kusheshik.
21 Pa chisu chinicha chifanyidin antu awonsu adia mu Yudeya achinyin ku mikandu. Antu awonsu adia mu musumb chifanyidin kudiokalamu, chawiy antu awonsu adia mu makunku kangal aya mu musumb.
22 Machuku minima makez kwikal ma kuyilej in Isarel kadimu, chakwel mazu mawonsu ma Mukand wa Nzamb mez mawanyin.
23 Mu machuku minima kukez kwikal mar makash kudi amband imishina, ni kudi amband akweta an a ku mayel! Mar makash makez kwikal mwi ngand yiney, mulong Nzamb ukez kuyilej antu inay kadimu.
24 Amwing akez kuyijip nich mpak ya musamun, akwau akez kuyitwal mu winkwal mu mangand makwau. In michid yikwau akez kushesh musumb wa Yerusalem shutit, djat ni pakuwanyina chisu chau.
0 Mwan a Muntu ukez kwez kand
25 “Kukez kwikal yijingidij ku muten, ni kwi ngond, ni ku atutumbu. Chad panap pansh antu awonsu a mangand mamwing akez kukatuk mong, mulong wa wom wa kwon kwa karung ni mambek makash.
26 Antu akez kufa mutentu pakuchingelau yom yikeza kushik pa mangand mawonsu, mulong atutumbu akez kudiokal mwiur, apalik, ni ukash ulamina yom ya piur ukez kunyikek.
27 Chad Mwan a Muntu ukez kumekan, ukez kwezil mu madj nich ukash ujim ni uyaj.
28 Piyikusambisha kumekan yom yiney, imanany piur, zambulany mes, mulong dipandish dien diez kal piswimp!”
0 Malejan ma chilakej cha mutond wa nfung 
29 Chawiy Yesu wayitila chishimu chinech anch: “Tongilany ku mutond wa nfung, ni ku mitond yikwau yawonsu. 
30 Anch yasapuk mayij, en ukat kwijikany anch, chirung cha ruvul chidi piswimp. 
31 Chawiy chimwing kand, anch wamanany yom yikat kushik, ukez kwijikany anch, Want wa Nzamb udi piswimp ni kushik. 
32 “Chakin kamu, nakulejany anch, antu adia aom ay kakufap awonsu wakad yom yiney yawonsu kumekan. 
33 Diur ni divu yikez kujiy, pakwez mazu mam kimakez kujiyap.
0 Chifanyidin antu kubabal
34 “Babalany, kangal michim yen yachinchik mulong wa kwifund kudia, ap kukwachik maar, ap mulong wa yakamish ya mwom wa ngand yiney, chamwamu, dichuku dinidia dikez kukukashimwishany mudi mupit.
35 Mulong dichuku dined dikat kwez kudi antu awonsu a pa mangand. 
36 Chishany ku mes, lembilany yisu yawonsu chakwel wez urezikanyaku ku yom yiney yawonsu piyikumekana, chad wez wimanany kurutu kwa Mwan a Muntu.”
37 Mu machuku minima, Yesu wading ni kulejan mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Chikwazwekanga urel, ndiy wading ni kuyang kushakam ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach.
38 Chikwachanga pamanch, antu awonsu ading ni kwandamang mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb mulong wa kumutesh.
0 Akat kumupungan Yesu
1 Chisu cha musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej, mawiy kamu mabot makad chivish chashika piswimp.
2 Amakurump a in kupesh nau alej a Yijil ova wom wa antu, chad amupungana Yesu ku ujindj mulong wa kumujip.
0 Yudas ukat kwitiy kumutungun Yesu matungu
3 Chad Sakudimban wandama mu muchim wa Yudas, upidilau anch, Isakariot, wading umwing wa in kwilej dikum ni aad.
4 Chawiy Yudas waya wakovijan nau amakurump a in kupesh nau in kutakel au atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb mutapu wa ukumutungunay Yesu matungu.
5 Awiy asangara nakash, itiy kumufut nfalang.
6 Niyend Yudas witiya mwamu, chad wasambisha kukimb mutapu uwamp wa kumupan Yesu kudi awiy, wakad antu akwau kwijik.
0 Yesu ukat kurijek kwa kudil musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej
7 Dichuku dia musambu wa mabot makad chivish diashika, diawiy dikat kujipau an a amikoku a musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
8 Yesu wamutuma Pita nend Yohan, wayilej anch: “Yangany, urijekany musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej chakwel twez tudiany.”
9 Awiy amwipula anch: “Ov, usotil etu tukarijekina kwisu?”
10 Ndiy wayakula anch: “Yangany mu musumb wa Yerusalem, ukumusankanany ikundj umwing usendil nsab ya mem. En umulondulangany djat ni ku chikumbu kukwandamay.
11 Chad wamulejany mwin chikumbu anch: ‘Mulej watulejang etu kukwipul ey anch: Ov, kapalakany nikudila nau in kwilejam musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej kadi kwisu?’
12 Chad ndiy ukukulejany kapalakany kajim ka piur kakweta yom yawonsu yituwanyidina. Kwawly kwinikwa kuukurijekinanya musambu.”
13 Chad aya, atana yom yawonsu mudi mwayilejau kudi Yesu. Awiy arijeka musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
0 Mes ma Mwant
14 Pichawanyina chisu, Yesu washakama ku mes pamwing nau atwimbuy end.
15 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Am nikatil kudia musambu winou wa Kusut kwa Chinawej pamwing ni yenen pinakad kal kuman mar!
16 Kinikudiap kand musambu winou djat ni pakuwanyina kurumburik kwau mu Want wa Nzamb.”
17 Chad wanona rupas, wamujikitish Nzamb, walond anch: “Tambulany, nangany en awonsu.
18 Chakin kamu nakulejany, kudiokal katat kinikez kunap kand maar minam djat ni piukushika Want wa Nzamb
19 Chawiy ndiy wanona kand dibot, wamujikitish Nzamb, chad wadiumbwol, wayinkish, walond anch: “Winou wawiy mujimbu wam [wapanau kal mulong wenen. Ukez kusalangany mwamu mulong wa kwinvurik am.”
20 Chawiy chimwing kand, chapwishau yakudia, ndiy wayinkisha rupas, walond anch: “Rupas riner rawiy manswik masu ma Nzamb, makasikeshinau nich mash mam, madjishau mulong wenen.]
21 “Pakwez talany! Muntu ukwintunguna am matungu tushich nend pinap ku mes!
22 Mwan a Muntu ukez kufa mudi mwarijekay Nzamb, pakwez riyind kudi muntu ukumutunguna!”
23 Chad awiy asambisha kununganijan ayinau anch: “Ov, nany wa pakach petu ukusala chom chinech?”
0 Akat kutadik mulong wa muntu mujim
24 Kwalanka ntad pakach pa in kwilej, mulong wa kwijik nany wa pakach pau ukutongau antu anch, upandakenamu kujimb.
25 Yesu wayileja anch: “Ant a michid yikwau akat kuyikel antu ku ukash, niyau in kutakel ipidil ayinau anch: ‘In kukwash antu.’
26 Kichidiap mwamu kudi en. Pakwez muntu mujim wa pakach pen ufanyidin ikala mukemp kupandakanamu en awonsu. Mwin kutakel wenen ikala mudi kashalapol.
27 Ov, nany upandakenamu kujimb, ushicha ku mes ni kudia, anch ukata kumuletil yakudia? Chakin, ushicha ku mes ni kudia, ndiy mujim. Pakwez am nidi pakach pen mudi mwin kulet yakudia.
28 “En washakaminany kal ni yamam mu mar mam mawonsu.
29 Am nakwinkishany kal en ulabu wa kuyikel, mudi mwanginkishau am kudi Tatuku.
30 En ukez kudiany ni kuna ku mes mam mu Want wam. Chad en ukez kushakamany pa matand ma kuyikel michid dikum ni yaad ya in Isarel”
0 Pita ukez kumutun Yesu
31 Yesu walonda anch: “Simon, Simon! Tesh! Sakudimban watambulang ulabu kudi Nzamb wa kukupakishany en awonsu, mulong wa kukwaurilany awamp ni ayimp, mudi mukat kupepau yipapal kuyidiosh ku tidiku.
32 Pakwez am nakulembidilang ey Simon, chakwel kangal ritiy rey rafa. Chad piukuchirika kudi am, chifanyidin ey kuyikasikesh anamakwey.”
33 Pita wamwakula anch: “Nsalejam, am nitiy kal kuya ni yeyey mu rukan, nikufa kand ni yeyey!”
34 Yesu wamuleja anch: “Pita, nakulej chakin, uchuku winou pakadiay kal chikalambol kutend, ey ukez kwintun tupamp tusatu.”
0 Ntuk ya nfalang, nsapu, ni mpak ya musamun
35 Chad Yesu wayipula in kwilejend anch: “Pinakutumanya en kuya wakad ntuk ya nfalang, ap nsapu, ap yisapat, ov, waburenany chom?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Bwat, kitwaburenap chom.”
36 Yesu wayileja anch: “Pakwez katat, muntu mwawonsu ukweta ntuk ya nfalang, ap nsapu ya weny, chifanyidin kuya nich. Muntu mwawonsu wakad mpak ya musamun, ufanyidin kulandish kabwik wend mulong wa kuland nich mpak ya musamun.
37 Nakulejany chakin, mazu mafundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Amuchindila pamwing nau in chisum,’ mafanyidin kuwanyin mulong wamam. Yom yifundilau mulong wamam yifanyidin kuwanyin.”
38 In kwilej amuleja Yesu anch: "Nsalejetu, tal, kunoku kudi jimpak ja misamun jaad!" Ndiy wayakula anch: "Jiwanyidin kwau!"
0 Yesu ukat kulembil pa mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach
39 Yesu wadiokala mu musumb, waya ku mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach mudi mwading chaku chend. In kwilej aya nend pamwing.
40 Chashikay pa ndond yiniya, ndiy wayileja anch: "Lembilany chakwel kangal wawany mu yoziu."
41 Ndiy wayisha chintampu chiswimp, mudi chakwas diyal diashik, chad was manungun pansh, walembila anch:
42 "A! Tatuku! Anch ey usotil, ndoshila rupas ra kwikonk, rutwala kulemp. Kangal chikala mudi munisotila am, pakwez chikala mudi muusotila ey."
43 Muruu wa mwiur washika kudi ndiy, wamukasikesh.
44 Muchim wend wanenganana nakash, chad wakasikesha kulembil. Masuril mamubudika mudi manas ma mash, mawila pansh.]
45 Chapwishay kulembil, wachirika kudi in kwilejend, wayitan alel tul, mulong ading aziyang kal nich ushon.
46 Ndiy wayipula anch: "Ov, mulong wak ulelany tul? Lankany, lembilany chakwel kangal wawany mu yoziu."
0 Akat kumukwat Yesu
47 Padingay Yesu ni kulond, Yudas, ndiy kamu umwing wa in kwilej dikum ni aad, washika ni chisak cha antu. Wamuseja Yesu piswimp, wamususu.
48 Pakwez Yesu wamwela anch: "Ov, Yudas, kususu kwinoku kwawiy wamutunguna kal nich Mwan a Muntu?"
49 Chijikau in kwilej adingay nend Yesu chom chikushika, awiy amwipula Yesu anch: "Nsalejetu, ov, chifanyidin etu kurish nau nich jimpak jetu ja misamun?"
50 Chad umwing wau wakatula ditu dia mutambu wa katatuku dia muswik wa mwin kupesh mujim.
51 Pakwez Yesu walonda anch: "Likany, chawanyin kal!" Chad wamukwata muswik ku chitat, wamwok ditu.
52 Chad Yesu wayileja in kupesh ajim, ni in kutakel au atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ni amakurump akwau eza kumukwat anch: "Komb en wezangany kwen nich jimpak ja misamun ni tubul mulong wa kwinkwat am mudi nidi mpongarik?
53 Machuku mawonsu nading ni yenen mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, en kiwapakishanyap kwinkwat. Pakwez chinech chidi chisu chenen cha kusal yom yen, yom ya Sakudimban ya kuyikel kwa mididim."
0 Pita ukat kumutun Yesu
54 Awiy amukwata Yesu, amutwal ku chikumbu cha mwin kupesh mujim. Pita washala chintampu, ukat kulondul.
55 Ading apepang kal kasu mukach mwa chipang cha chikumbu cha mwin kupesh mujim. Pita wez washakam nau antu ading ni kwot kasu.
56 Mwilomb umwing wamumama Pita ukat kwot kasu, chad washinshik kumutal, walond anch: "Muntu mwinou kand wading nend Yesu!"
57 Pakwez Pita watuna, wamwakul anch: "Mband ey, am kinimwijap kwam!"
58 Chipasuta chisu chikemp, muntu ikundj wamwela Pita anch: "Ey udi wa mu chisak chau!" Pakwez Pita wamwakula anch: "Ikundj ey, am bwat kwam!"
59 Chipasuta chisu chimwing, ikundj mukwau wakasikesha kamu anch: "Chakin kamu, muntu ou wading nend Yesu, mulong niyend udi kand mwin Galalia!"
60 Pakwez Pita wakula anch: "Ikundj ey, am kinijap yom ulondila!" Pawiy kamu pinipa Pita uchidi kulond, kutesh, chikalambol watend.
61 Chad Nsalejetu Yesu wakarumuka, wamutal Pita neeng. Chawiy Pita wavurika mazu mamulejau kudi Nsalejetu Yesu anch: "Uchuku winou pakadiay kal chikalambol kutend, ey ukez kwintun tupamp tusatu."
62 Chad Pita wabudika, waya ni kushikok kudil.
0 Akat kumuswingish Yesu ni kumubul
63 Antu ading amulamina Yesu amuswingisha, amubul.
64 Amukasa chibel pa mes, amwela anch: "Bwak muntu wakubulang!"
65 Awiy amulonda yom yikwau yivud ya masaal.
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu ku dirumburish dijim
66 Chikwacha pamanch, amakurump, ni in kupesh ajim, ni alej a Yijil akumangana pamwing, chad amulet Yesu ku dirumburish diau dijim.
67 Awiy amwipula anch: "Ov, yey Kristu Uzizidilau Many?" Yesu wayakula anch: "Anch nakulejanyap nchik, en kiukwitiyanyap kwen.
68 Ap anch nakwipulanyap nchik chom, en kiukwakulanyap kwen.
69 Pakwez kudiokal katat, Mwan a Muntu ukez kushakam ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb Mwin Dikand."
70 Awiy awonsu amwipula anch; “Ov, komb, ey udi Mwan a Nzamb?” Ndiy walonda anch: “En ulondilany kamu mudi munidia.”
71 Awiy alonda anch: “Kitukwetap kand kuswir kwa atuman akwau. Etu ayinetu twiteshilap kal yilondilay!”
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu kudi Pilat
1 Chisak chawonsu atumbuka piur, chad amutwal Yesu kudi Pilat.
2 Kwinikwa asambisha kumufund. anch: “Twamukwatang muntu mwinou ukat kuyilej antwetu kubwambul, ukat kuyilej kand antu kulik kulambul chitad cha Sezar, mwant wa in Rom. Ukat kufa mu kan anch, ndiy Kristu Uzizidilau Many, charumburik anch, mwant.”
3 Pilat wamwipula Yesu anch: “Ov, ey udi mwant wa in Yuda?” Yesu wamwakula anch: “Yey walondamu kal.”
4 Chad Pilat wayileja in kupesh ajim ni chisak cha antu anch: “Am kinimenap mulong wa kumufish nich muntu ou.”
5 Pakwez awiy akasikesha nakash anch: “Ndiy ukat kulet kanvundangesh nich malejan mend mu Yudeya mwawonsu. Wasambishina mu Galalia, katat washik kal kand ni kunoku.”
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu kwa Herod
6 Pateshay Pilat chom chinech, ndiy wayipula anch: “Ov, muntu mwinou udi mwin Galalia?”
7 Chijikay anch, Yesu udiokil mwi ngand yiyikedilay Herod, ndiy wamutwala kudi Herod, niyend wadinga kand chisu chinicha mu Yerusalem.
8 Herod wasangara nakash pamumanay Yesu, mulong watesha kal rusangu rend, chad wading wachingeja kal chisu chilemp kumanijan nend. Wading ukatil kumuman Yesu pakusadilay chilay.
9 Chawiy Herod wamwipula Yesu yipul yivud, pakwez ndiy kamwakulap.
10 In kupesh ajim nau alej a Yijil aseja piswimp kudi Herod chakwel amufunda kand Yesu nakash.
11 Herod ni amasalay end amudiwol Yesu ni kumuswingish. Chad amudjika nkandj mulemp muwamp, chawiy amuchirisha kwa Pilat.
12 Pa dichuku dinidia kamu, Herod nend Pilat ovijana, mulong kwinyim ading akankuny.
0 Akat kumufish nich Yesu kwa kumujip
13 Pilat wayikumangeja kand in kupesh ajim; ni in kutakel, ni antu akwau.
14 Ndiy wayileja anch: “En wamuletilany muntu mwinou kudi am anch: ‘Ndiy ukat kuyilej antwetu kubwambul!’ Katat am natal kal kurutu kwenen ayinen, kinimenap kufa nich ku yom yawonsu wamufundilanya.
15 Niyend Herod kamenap kufa nich, chawiy chamuchirishay kal kand kudi etu. Muntu mwinou kasadilap chom cha kumujipin, bwat.
16 Chawiy am nikumubul, nimulikishaku kwend, aya.” [
17 Pilat wading ukwet chaku cha kuyilikishinayuku muntu wa rukan umwing.]
18 Chisak chawonsu cha antu abaroka anch: “Mujipa Yesu! Tulikishinayuku Barabas!”
19 Barabas wading mu rukan mulong wa kanvundangesh kaletay mu musumb, ni mulong wa kujipan.
20 Pilat wasota kumulikishaku Yesu, chawiy wayipula kand antu kapamp kakwau.
21 Pakwez awiy abaroka anch: “Mupampa! Mupampila pa mutond uchikakena!”
22 Pilat wayileja antu kapamp ka chisatu anch: “Mulong wak, ov, chom ik chiyimp chasadilay? Am nimen anch, muntu mwinou kasadilap chom cha kumujipin! Chawiy am nikumubul, nimulikishaku kwend, aya.”
23 Pakwez awiy adandamena kubarok mazu piur anch: “Chifanyidin kumupamp Yesu ku mutond uchikakena.” Chawiy masok mau mapandakana.
24 Chad Pilat witiya kumusal Yesu mudi mwitau.
25 Ndiy wamulikishaku Barabas wasotau kudi antu. Ndiy wading mu rukan mulong wa kanvundangesh ni mulong wa kujipan. Chawiy ndiy wamupana Yesu mu makas mau chakwel amusala mudi musotilau.
0 Akat kumupamp Yesu ku mutond uchikakena
26 Amasalay, pamutwalau Yesu, amusakana muntu umwing wa ngand ya Siren, dijin diend Simon. Ndiy wading udiokil ku makunku, uyil ku Yerusalem. Awiy amukwata, amutwik mutond uchikakena chakwel amukwashaku Yesu kuusend.
27 Chisak chijim cha antu amulondula. Kwading amband ading ni kudil ni kunenganan mulong wendendiy.
28 Yesu wakarumuka, wayital, wayel anch: “Amband a mu Yerusalem! Kangal wandilany am, pakwez idilany ayinen ni anen.
29 Mulong machuku makeza kwez makez kulondau antu anch: ‘Ayuk amband aumb, ap akad kal kuvalap, ap akad kwamwish!’
30 Pa chisu chinicha, antu akez kulond anch: ‘Chifanyidin kwau ing mikandu yatuwilang, ap ing yinanginang yatushidilang!’
31 Ov, anch ansalaku am mutond utalela mwamu, ing en lel, mutond uumina akukusalany nchik?”
32 Amasalay ayitwala ampongarik aad mulong wa kuyijip pamwing nend Yesu.
33 Chashikau kwi ndond yipidilau anch, Goligota, amupampa Yesu ku mutond uchikakena. Ayipampa kand ampongarik aad, umwing ku chikas cha katatuku, mukwau ku chikas cha kamaku cha Yesu.
34 Yesu walonda anch: “Tatuku, yilikishina! Mulong awiy kijap yom yisadilau.” Amasalay ata ubal, mulong wa kwanganijan maswin mend.
35 Antu ading atadil neeng padingau amakurump a in Yuda kumukonkurol anch: “Ndiy wading ni kupandish antu akwau, chifanyidin ndiy ipandisha amwinend anch udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many kudi Nzamb!”
36 Niyau amasalay amuswingisha kand. Awiy apakisha kumwinkish maar ma nviny masasina.
37 Amwela anch: “Ipandisha bil amwiney anch udi mwant wa in Yuda!”
38 Piur pa mutond wend uchikakena afundap anch: ““Winou udi Mwant wa in Yuda.”
39 Mpongarik umwing wamupampau nend, niyend wamusaala Yesu masaal anch: “Ov, yey Kristu Uzizidilau Many? Ipandisha amwiney, utupandish kand niyetu!”
40 Pakwez mpongarik mukwau wamukangesha kulond, wamwel anch: “Ov, kiumwovilap Nzamb wom? Ey akufishil nich mudi mwamufishilau nich ndiy.
41 Pakwez ey niyamam atufishil nich kamu mulong wa yisalijok yetu yiyimp, ndiy kasadilap chom chiyimp.”
42 Chad wamuleja Yesu anch: “Yesu, nvurika piukeza kwez mudi Mwant!”
43 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Nakushilamu kal, ilel unou ukwikal ni yamam mwi ndond ya musangar mwiur.”
0 Rufu ra Yesu
44 Muten wading piswimp ni pakach, pawiy piwalika kumunyik, chawiy mididim yakurika mwi ngand yakabuj djat ni ku muten wa yisatu.
45 Diswin diadinga diliminau pakach pa Chikumbu \cha Nzamb, diapuka yibar yaad.
46 Yesu wabarika dizu piur anch: “Tatuku! Natek kal mwiku wam mu makas mey!” Chalonday mwamu, ndiy wakatuka mupim.
47 Mukurump wa amasalay a in Rom, chamanay yom yasuta, wamushimana Nzamb anch: “Chakin kamu, muntu ou wadi muntu muyingila!”
48 Chisak cha antu avud akumangana kwinikwa mulong wa kutal. Chamanau yom yiney, awiy achiroka kwol kwau, akat kwibul pa jintul mulong wa ushon.
49 Arund awonsu a Yesu, pamwing ni amband amulondula kudiokal ku Galalia, ading iminy kulemp mulong wa kutal.
0 Akat kumujik Yesu
50 Kwading muntu umwing, dijin diend Josef, wa ku Arimatey, ul wa in Yuda. Ndiy wading umwing wa ankalansambu a dirumburish dijim, wading kand muntu muwamp utentamina.
51 Ndiy kitiyap mutapu wakatulau akwau mulong, kitiyap yom yasalau. Ndiy wading uchingedin kushik kwa Want wa Nzamb.
52 Ndiy waya kudi Pilat, wamwit mujimbu wa Yesu.
53 Waushirisha, wauvung mu diswin dia ndand muwamp. Ndiy waujika mwi nzay yisu yatotau mu mayal.
54 Diading dichuku dia kwirijekinamu mulong Dichuku dia Kwiswedish diading piswimp ni kusambish.
55 Amband amulondula Yesu kudiokal ku Galalia, aya nend Josef pamwing. Awiy amana nzay ni mutapu watekaumu mujimbu wa Yesu.
56 Awiy achirika mu Yerusalem, chad arijeka many ma res ni malash, mulong wa kuya kuupan mujimbu wa mufu. Pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, awiy apima mudi mwading Chijil.
0 Kuvumbuk kwa Yesu
1 Chidiapwa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, chikwacha pamanch dichuku dia kusambish dia rubing ra in Yuda, amband inay aya kwi nzay nich many ma res ruwamp marijekau. 
2 Awiy atana diyal adibumburilang kal, kudidiosh ku chis cha nzay.
3 Chad awiy andama mukach, pakwez kaumanap mujimbu wa Nsalejau Yesu.
4 Awiy kamanap mwa kutwadil, chad kukashimuk, antu aad adjit maswin mazutina iminy piswimp kudi awiy.
5 Amband ova wom nakash, abwik jimpal jau pansh, chad amakundj inay ayileja anch: “Ov, mulong wak umukimbilanya muntu mwom pakach pa afu?
6 Ndiy kadiap kunoku, wavumbukang kal, udi mwom! Vurikany mudi mwakulejanyay padingay ku Galalia anch:
7 ‘Chifanyidin kumupan Mwan a Muntu mu makas ma in yitil. Awiy akez kumupampil ku mutond uchikakena, chad mu dichuku dia chisatu ukez kuvumbuk.’ ”
8 Chad amband avurika mazu minima.
9 Awiy adiokala kwi nzay, aya akalejan yom yiney yawonsu kudi in kwilej dikum ni umwing, pamwing ni antu akwau awonsu.
10 Amband inay ading Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala, ni Yohana, ni Marty, makwend wa Jakobu, pamwing ni amband akwau, ayileja atwimbuy a Yesu yom yiney.
11 Pakwez atwimbuy a Yesu kitiyap kwau, atonga anch, yom yalondau amband yading yamwamu yakad kwovakan.
12 Pakwez Pita watumbuka, waya mau kwi nzay. Wazengama, watal mwi nzay, waman diswin dia ndand muwamp diamuvungau, pakwez kamanap chom chikwau. Chad wachirika mu musumb ni kushimwok nakash mulong wa yom yasuta kwinikwa.
0 Akat kumuman Yesu mwi njil ya ku Emaus
13 Pa dichuku dinidia kamu antu aad adinga in kumulondul Yesu aya ku ul umwing, upidilau anch, Emaus, padi mudi akilometre dikum ni umwing kudiokal ku Yerusalem.
14 Awiy ading ayil ni kwambamb mulong wa yom yawonsu yasuta.
15 Padingau akat kwambamb ni kutadikijan, Yesu amwinend waseja piswimp, chad waya nau pamwing.
16 Awiy amumana, akwez kamwijikap, mulong mes mau mading mudi mibwikin.
17 Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, yom ik yiuyilany ni kwambamb?” Awiy imana nich yifu ya ushon.
18 Umwing wading Kleyopas, ndiy wamwipula anch: “Ov, ey, yey kwey mweny umwing wa mu Yerusalem wakad kwijik yom yasutila mu machuku minam?”
19 Ndiy wayipula anch: “Yom ik?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Yom yamusadilau Yesu wa ku Nazaret. Muntu mwinou wading muruu wa Nzamb. Yisalijok yend ni mazu mend yading nich dikand kurutu kwa Nzamb ni kwa antu awonsu.
20 In kupesh ajim ni amakurump etu amupanyin mulong wa kumufish nich kwa kumujip, chad amupampil ku mutond uchikakena.
21 Twadi tuchingejin anch, winou ndiy watondau kudi Nzamb mulong wa kuyikwol in Isarel! Chikwau kand, ilel unou didi dichuku dia chisatu kudiokal kwasadikina yom yiney.
22 Amband amwing a mu chisak chetu atushimwokishang. Ayang pamanch pafe kwi nzay,
23 pakwez katanangap mujimbu wa mufu. Achirikang, ez alond anch: “Twamanang chishimushimu cha aruu a mwiur, atulejang anch, katat udi mwom.’
24 Antu akwau a mu chisak chetu niyau ayang kwi nzay, aman, chakin, mudi mwalondangau amband, pakwez niyau kamumanangap ndiy.”
25 Chad Yesu wayela anch: “Ayisup en, ukwetany michim yichinchikina pa kwitiy yom yawonsu yalejanau aruu a Nzamb!
26 Ov kichadiap chifanyidin Kristu Uzizidilau Many kuman mar minam mawonsu chakwel andama mu uyaj wend?”
27 Chawiy Yesu wayirumburila yom yawonsu yalondau mulong wendendiy mu Mikand ya Nzamb, kudiokal ku mikand ya Moses, djat ni ku mikand yafundau aruu awonsu a Nzamb.
28 Chashikau piswimp ni ku ul kwayau, Yesu wela mudi usotil kuyisut aya.
29 Pakwez awiy amwimika, amwel anch: “Shakam ni yetwetu, mulong muten wandam kal, kusotil kujal.” Chawiy ndiy wandama kushakam nau.
30 Ndiy waseja ku mes mulong wa kudia nau, wanona dibot, wamujikitish Nzamb, wadiumbwol, wayinkisha awiy. 
31 Chad pa mes payitaurika chakwel amwijik nawamp, pakwez wayishadika.
32 Awiy anunganijana anch: “Ov, michim yetu kiyaswanangap mwivumu padingay ni kuturumburil mwi njil mazu ma Mikand ya Nzamb?”
33 Awiy atumbuka swa, achirik ku Yerusalem, ayitan in kwilej dikum ni umwing akumangen pamwing nau antu akwau,
34 adinga ni kulondang anch: “Chakin kamu, Nsalejetu wavumbukin, Simon wamumen!”
35 Niyau antu inay aad asambisha kuyirumburil yom yasutanga mwi njil, ni mutapu wamwijikangau Nsalejau Yesu paumbwolangay mabot.
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi in kwilejend
36 Padingau antu inay aad akat kulond yom yiney, kukashimuk Nsalejau Yesu amwinend wimanang kal mukach mwau, wayel anch: “Chisambu cha Nzamb chikala ni yenen.”
37 Awiy ova wom nakash, atong anch, amuman kal mutar.
38 Pakwez ndiy wayileja anch: “Ov, mulong wak wovilanya wom? Ov, mulong wak widjidjekinanya mu michim yen?
39 Talany makas mam ni mend mam, shinshikany, yam kamu. Nkwatany, wijikany, mulong mutar kakwetap mujimbu ni mafup mudi muwinmenanya am.”
40 Chalonday mwamu, ndiy wayileja makas mend ni mend mend.
41 Padingau kand kal itiyij, mulong musangar wayipandakena ni kushimwok, Yesu wayipula anch: “Ov, ukwetanyap chom cha kudia?”
42 Awiy amwinkisha chikunku cha insh cha kukang.
43 Ndiy wachitambula, wachidia kurutu kwau.
44 Chad ndiy wayileja anch: “Yawiy yiney yom yinading ni kukulejany pinadinga ni yenen. Yom yawonsu yafundau mulong wamam mu Yijil ya Moses ni mikand ya aruu a Nzamb, ni mu Kuseng chifanyidin kuwanyin.”
45 Chad ndiy wayiburila manangu mau kwov Mikand ya Nzamb.
46 Ndiy wayileja anch: “Mu Mukand wa Nzamb afundil anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many ufanyidin kuman mar, ufanyidin kand kuvumbuk kusut kwa machuku masatu.
47 Chad chifanyidin kurumburil mu dijin diend kudi antu a michid yawonsu rusangu ra kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil, ni ra dilikishin dia yitil. Chifanyidin kusambishin mu Yerusalem.
48 En udiany atuman a yom yiney.
49 Am amwinam nikez kukutuminany yom mudi mwashilayinfi Nzamb Tatuku kukwinkishany. Pakwez chifanyidin en kuchingel mu musumb, djat ni piukukushirikinanya ukash udiokila mwiur.”
0 Nzamb ukat kumutwal Yesu mwiur
50 Chad wayidiosha mu musumb, waya nau piswimp ni ku Betaniy. Kwinikwa, ndiy wazambula makas, wayiyukish.
51 Padingay ni kuyiyukish, amusenda, wandam mwiur.
52 Chad awiy amwifukwila, achirik ku Yerusalem nich musangar ujim nakash.
53 Ashakamanga yisu yawonsu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb mulong wa kumushiman Nzamb.
0 Dizu diletila mwom ni chimunyik
1 Pakusambish padingay Nzamb kand kal atanga ngand, kwading umwing upidilau anch, Dizu, ndiy wading nend Nzamb, ndiy wading kamu Nzamb.
2 Kudiokal kamu ku disambishil, ndiy upidilau anch, Dizu, uding nend Nzamb.
3 Nzamb watangila yom yawonsu mwi ndiy. Kwikil chom ap chimwing chidiaku chalikau kutangil mwi ndiy.
4 Mwi ndiy upidilau anch, Dizu, mwadinga mwom wakin, mwom winou waleta chimunyik mu michim ya antu.
5 Chimunyik chikat kuzut mu mididim, chad mididim kiyatwishap kuchijimish.
6 Nzamb wamutuma muruu wend, dijin diend wading Yohan.
7 Ndiy wading kaman weza mulong wa kuyilej antu rusangu ra chimunyik, chakwel antu awonsu amwitiyija Yesu mulong wa uman wend.
8 Yohan amwinend kadingap chimunyik, ndiy wading kusu kaman weza kurumburil rusangu ra chimunyik.
9 Chimunyik chinech chading chimunyik chakin, chimunyik chikat kwez mu mangand kuyimunyikin antu awonsu.
10 Ndiy upidilau anch, Dizu, wading mu mangand. Ap anch Nzamb watangilap nchik mangand mwi ndiy, antu a mu mangand kamwijikap.
11 Ndiy weza mwi ngand yend amwinend, pakwez in muchid wend kamwakap.
12 Chawiy amwing amwaka, amwitiyij, chad ndiy wayinkisha ukash wa kwikal an a Nzamb.
13 Awiy kavadikap kwikal an a Nzamb mudi mudia mutapu wa muntu, ap kavadikap ku maku ma mujimbu, ap ku rusot ra muntu, pakwez avadika ku rusot ra Nzamb.
14 Ndiy upidilau anch, Dizu, wikala muntu, washakama pamwing ni yetwetu. Wading ukwet ranaken ni uyakin kupandakan. Twamana uyaj wend, wawly uyaj wa Mwan kapwokal watambulay kudi Tatukwend Nzamb.
15 Yohan wayileja antu mulong wendendiy. Wombanga rubil anch: “Winou ndiy muntu unakulejanganya anch: ‘Ukat kwez kwinyim kwam. Pakwez winsutilamu am ulabu, mulong ndiy wading kal kwaku pinading am kand kal nivadik.’ ”
16 Ndiy watuyukisha etu awonsu mulong wa ranaken rend rujim. Watwinkisha yiyukish ya mitapu ni mitapu.
17 Nzamb watupanyina Yijil kudi Moses, pakwez watupanyina ranaken ni uyakin kudi Yesu Kristu.
18 Kwikil muntu ap umwing wamumanap kal Nzamb. Pakwez Mwan kapwokal, ndiy kamu Nzamb, ushicha pamwing ni Tatuku, ndiy umulejena Nzamb patok kudi antu.
0 Mazu malonday Yohan Mubatish
19 Amakurump au in Yuda a mu Yerusalem atuma in kupesh amwing, ni in Levi kudi Yohan, mulong wa kumwipul anch: “Ov, ey udi nany?”
20 Yohan kalikap kuyakul. Ndiy witiya, wayilej. patok anch: “Am kinidiap Kristu Uzizidilau Many, bwat."
21 Awiy amwipula kand anch: “Chad lel, ey udi nany? Ov, ey udi Elija wasanguka kal?” Yohan wayakula anch: “Bwat, kiyamap kwam.” Awiy amwipula kand anch: “Ov, yey Muruu utuchingedila wa Nzamb?”. Ndiy wayakula anch: “Bwat.”
22 Awiy amwela anch: “Chad tuleja lel, ey udi nany? Chifanyidin etu tukayilej antu atutumanga. Ov, ey lel amwiney ulondil anch udi nany?”
23 Yohan wayakula nich mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch: “ “Am nidi dizu dia muntu ukata kombil rubil mwi mpay anch: Rijekany salal mukombil wa Nsalejetu!’ ”
24 Pakach pa aruu atumau kumwipul Yohan pading A faris.
25 Chad amwipula anch: “Anch ey kiudiap Kristu Uzizidilau Many, ap Elija, ap Muruu utuchingedila wa Nzamb, ing, mulong wak ubatishina?”
26 Yohan wayakula anch: “Am nikat kubatish nich mem, pakwez pakach pen padi muntu umwing wakadiany en kwijik mudi mudiay.
27 Ndiy ukat kwez kwinyim kwam, pakwez am kinidiap muwamp uwanyidina ap kusuril yisapat yend.”
28 Mambamb minam amambambila ku Betaniy, mutambu wa kwingangel kwa wit wa Yordan, kwabatishinangay Yohan antu.
0 Yesu, ndiy Mwan a Mukoku wa Nzamb
29 Chikwacha, Yohan wamumana Yesu ukat kwez kudi ndiy. Yohan walonda anch: “Talany kwa, Mwan a Mukoku wa Nzamb ukata kudiosh yitil ya antu!
