27 "Nakushilany kal chisambu, nikwinkishinany chisambu mudi chidia mu muchim wam amwinam. Kinichipanyinap mudi chisambu chikat kupanau in mangand. Kangal wovany ushon ni kunenganan nakash. Kangal wovany wom.
28 En wateshanya mazu minakulejanya anch: 'Niyil, pakwez nikez kuchirik kand kudi en.' Anch en wankatanya chakin, ing usangerany piukwijikany anch niyil kudi Tatuku, mulong ndiy udi mujim kwimpandakanamu am.
29 Nikulejinany yom yiney katat piyakad kal kumekan, chakwel piyikumekana, en ukez kwitiyijany.
30 Kinikwetap kand chisu chijim cha kwambamb ni yenen, mulong mwin kutakel wa mangand minam, ndiy kamu Sakudimban, ukat kwez. Kakwetap kwend ukash wa kwinsal am chom,
31 pakwez chifanyidin antu a mangand minam ijik anch, am nimukatil Tatuku. Mulong wa chom chinech, nikat kusal yom yawonsu mudi mwinlejinay. "Tumbukany, tudiokalany ndond yiney.
0 Yesu udi mutond wa mabuj ma nviny wakin
1 “Am yam mutond wa mabuj ma nviny wakin, Tatukwam ndiy nfachingand.
2 Ndiy ukat kukatul mitiy kumutambul mu michim yau, mulong kakutwishap kumuman mulong ndiy ushich ni smam yawonsu yakad kusong mabuj, chakwel mutond wikala ap kumwijik. Pakwez en umwijany, swang, usong mabuj mavud kupandakan.
3 En wikadilany kal yenen, chad ukez kwikal kand mu michim yen. wa zwang mulong wa malejan minakulejanya.
4 Dandamenany kwikal mu umwing ni yamam, niyam nikudandamen kwikal mu umwing ni yenen. Mutiy kiukutwishap kusong mabuj iwinau wakad kudandamen kwikal mu umwing ni mutond. Chawiy chimwing niyen kiukutwishanyap kusong mabuj, ching wikalany mu umwing ni yamam. .
5 “Am nidi mutond wa mabuj ma nviny, en udiany mitly. Muntu mwawonsu ukudandamena kwikal mu umwing nl yamam, niyam nadandamen kwikal mu umwing nend ndiy, ukez kusong mabuj mavud. Mulong kiukutwishanyap kusal chom wakad am. 
6 Muntu mwawonsu wakad: kudandamen kwikal mu umwing ni yamam akez kumudjibul mudi mutly wakatulau, audjibul, waum. Mitiy yiney akat kuyikumange}, ayidjibul mu kasu, yatem.
7 TAnch en wadandamenany mu umwing ni yamam, ni mazu mam niyau madandamen mu umwing ni yenen, chad ukwitany yom yawonsu yiusotilany, ukuyitambulany.
8 Anch en wasongany mabuj mavud, akumutumbish Tatukwam, mwamu ukwikalany in kwilejam chakin.
9 Am nikukatilany en mudi mwinkatilay Tatuku. Dandamenany mu rukat ramam.
10 Anch en waziyilany ku malejan mam, am nikudandamen kukukatany mudi am chinaziyila ku malejan ma Tatukwam, niyend wadandamena kwinkat am.
11 “Nakulejany yom yiney chakwel wikalany nich musangar wam mu michim yen, chakwel kand musangar wen wikal uwanyidina.
12 Chijil cham chawiy ech, katijanany muntu ni mukwau, mudi am chinikukatilanya en.
13 Kwikil rukat rupandakena kujimb mudi muntu kufa mulong wa arund nend.
14 En udiany arund nam anch ukat kusalany mudi nikulejinany.
15 Am kinikupidilanyap kand anch, atushalapol am, mulong kashalapol kijap yitongijok ya nsalejend. Pakwez am nikupidilany anch, arund nam, mulong nakulejany kal yom yawonsu yanlejay Tatukwam.
16 En kiwantondanyap am, am yam nakutondanya en ni kukwinkishany mudimu, chakwel uyany, wikalany mudi mutond ukusonga mabuj. Mabuj min makudandamen chikupu. Chad Tatuku ukez kukwinkishany yom yawonsu yiukeza kwitany mu dijin diam.
17 Chinech chawiy chijil chinikulejinanya anch, katijanany muntu ni mukwau.
0 In mangand akez kuyikis in kwilej a Yesu
18 “Anch in mangand akukisany, chifanyidin kwijik anch, awiy asambela kwinkis am.
19 Anch en wadiany mu umwing nau in mangand, ing, awiy akukukatany en mudi anamakwau. Pakwez nakutondanya en kukudioshany mukach mwa in mangand, chawiy kiudianyap kand nau mu umwing. Wawiy mulong ukukisidilanyau.
20 Vurikany, nakulejanya kal anch: ‘Kwikil muswik umupandakena nsalejend kujimb.” Anch awiy anzengola am, akez kukuzengolany kand niyen. Anch awiy aziyila ku malejan mam, akez kuziyil kand ku malejan men.
21 Pakwez akez kukusalany yom yiney yawonsu mulong en udiany amam. Akukusalany mwamu mulong kamwijap wantuma am.
22 Anch am kinezap ni kulond nau, ing kakwetap kwau yitil. Pakwez katat kakutwishap kwiyep anch: ‘Kitukwetap yitil.’.
23 Muntu mwawonsu winkisina am, umukisin kand Tatukwam.
24 Anch am kinasalap yom mukach mwau yakad kal kusalangap kudi muntu mukwau, ing kakwetap kwau chitil. Pakwez katat awiy amen kal yisalijok yam, chad ankis kal am ni Tatukwam.
25 Pakwez yom yiney yamekana mulong wa kuwanyish yom yafundau mu Yijil yau anch: ‘Awiy ankisa am wakad mulong.’
26 “Mwin Kukwash ukwez, ndiy kamu Mwiku Utumbila umekeshina uyakin, ukudiokal kudi Tatuku. Am_ nikez kukutuminanyay, ndiy udiokila kudi Tatukwam, chawiy ndiy ukez kukulejany yamam.
27 Niyen ukez kulondany kand yamam, mulong en wadingany ni yamam kudiokal kunasambishina kulejan.
1 “Nakulejany kal yom yiney chakwel kangal washadishany ritiy ren. 
2 Akez kukwopatany mu yikumbu ya kulembil. Chakin, chisu chikeza kwez antu akez kukujipany, chad pakusalau mwamu, akutongijok anch, akat kumusadil Nzamb.
3 Antu akez kukusalany yom yiney mulong kamwijap Tatukwam ap am.
4 Pakwez nakulejany yom yiney chakwel chisu anch chashik chikusalau yom yiney, en ukez kuvurikany yom yinakulejanya.
0 Mudimu wa Mwiku Utumbila
0 “Am kinakulejanyap yom yiney pinasambisha kukulejany, mulong nading ni yenen.
5 Chawiy katat am niyil kwam kudi Tatukwam wantuma, pakwez kwikil umwing wenen wangipulap anch: ‘Ov, uyil kwisu?’ 
6 Katat wovilany ushon nakash mulong nakulejany kal yom yiney.
7 Pakwez nakulejany, chidi chom chiwamp kudi en anch am naya, mulong anch am kiniyilap, Mwin Kukwash kakwezap kudi en. Pakwez anch am naya, chad nikez kukutuminanyay.
8 Pakwezay ndiy, ukez kuyijingunin antu a pa mangand kurumbuk kwau, mulong kijap kurumburik kwa yitil, kijap kurumburik kwa kutentam, ap kwa dirumburish dia Nzamb.
9 Awiy akat kurumbuk mutapu ukat kurumburilau mulong wa yitil, chidi mulong awiy kangitiyijinap am.
10 Awiy akat kurumbuk mutapu ukat kurumburilau mulong wa kutentam, chidi mulong am niyil kudi Tatuku, chad en kiukez kwinmananganyap kand.
11 Awiy akat kurumbuk kand mutapu ukat kurumburishau, mulong Nzamb wamurumburishin kal mwin kutakel wa mangand minam, ndiy kamu Sakudimban.
12 “Am nikwet yom yikwau yivud ya kukulejany, pakwez katat nikulik, chamwamu yikukuvudilany.
13 Pakushikay, Mwiku Utumbila umekeshina uyakin, ndiy ukukulejany uyakin wawonsu udiokila kudi Nzamb. Ndiy kakez kulondap ku ulabu wend amwinend, pakwez ukez kulond yom yawonsu yikuteshay kudi Tatuku, ukez kulond kand yom yikweza kurutu.
14 Ndiy ukez kutambul mazu mam, chad wakulejanyam, mwamu mukez kwintumbishay am.
15 Yom yawonsu yikwetay Tatuku yidi yamam. Chawiy chinilondidila anch: ‘Mwiku Utumbila ukez kutesh yom kudi am, chad wakulejany en.’
0 Ushon ukusambelaku, pakwez musangar ukwez
16 “Mu chisu chikemp kiukez kwinmananyap, pakwez mu chisu chikwau chikemp ukez kwinmanany.”
17 In kwilejend amwing ipulijana anch: “Ov, chinech charumburik nchik? Ndiy utulejin anch: ‘Mu chisu chikemp ‘kitukumumanap, pakwez mu chisu chikwau chikemp tukez kumuman.’ Ndiy ulondil kand anch: ‘Chidi mulong niyil kudi Tatukwam.’
18 Ov, chisu chikemp chirumburikin nchik? Etu kitwijap yom yilondilay.”
19 Yesu wijika anch, awiy asotil kumwipol, chad wayileja anch: “Nalondang anch: ‘Mu chisu chikemp kiukez kwinmananyap, pakwez mu chisu chikwau chikemp ukez kwinmanany.’ Ov, chawiy chom chiwipulijadinanya en?
20 Nakulejany chakin, en ukez kudilany ni kushikok, pakwez in mangand akez kwov musangar. En ukez kwovany ushon, pakwez ushon wen ukez kukarumuk musangar. 
21 Mband anch udi pa ruching:ra “w ° kuval ukwet ushon mulong chisu cha kuman mar chashik kal. Pakwez anch mwan wavadik ukat kuvuramen mar mend, mulong wov kal musangar wa mwan wavadika kal. ?
22 Mwamu muchidia kand kudi en. Katat wovilany ushon, pakwez nikez kukumanany kand, chad michim yen yikez kwov musangar nakash, musangat wakad kutwish kukupwishanyau kudi muntu.
23 “Pa dichuku dinidia kiukez kwingitanyap chom. Nakulejany chakin, Tatuku ukez kukwinkishany yom yawonsu yiukez kumwitany mu dijin diam.
24 Kushik ni katat, en kand kal witanyap chom mu dijin diam. Itany, ukez kutambulany, chakwel musangar wen ukuwanyin.
0 Yesu ukat kupandakan kuyip kwa mangand
25 “Nakulejanya yom yiney mu yishimu. Pakwez chisu chikez kushik kinikez kukulejinanyap mu yishimu, chad nikez kukurumburilany yom ya Tatuku patok.
26 Pidikushika dichuku dinidia, en ukez kumwitany Tatuku. mu dijin diam. Kinilondilap anch, nikez kukwitilany kudi Tatuku,
27 mulong tatuku amwinend ukukatilany. Ndiy ukukatilany en mulong en winkatilany am, witiyinany kand anch, am nadiokala kudi Nzamb.
28 Nadiokala kudi Tatuku, nez mu mangand. ‘Katat nadiokal kal mu mangand, naya kal kudi Tatuku.”
29 Chad in kwilejend amwela anch: "Katat ey walond kal patok wakad kulondil mu yishimu.
30 Katat etu twij anch, ey wij yom yawonsu. Kiuswiridinap kand muntu akwipul chom. Mulong wa chom chinech twitiy kal anch, ey wadiokala kudi Nzamb."
31 Yesu wayakula anch: "Ov, katat en witiyijany kal?
32 Chisu chikat kwez, ni katat chidi kal kwaku, chikez kukupalangeshanyau, muntu ni muntu waya kwol kwend. Chad am nikez kushal amwinam, pakwez kinidiap kusu amwinam, mulong Tatuku udi ni yamam.
33 Nakulejany kal yom yiney chakwel ukutwishany kwikal nich chisambu, mulong wikadilany kal mu umwing ni yamam. Ukez kumanany mar mu mangand, pakwez jamishany! Am napandakan kal kuyip kwa mangand!"
0 Yesu ukat kuyilembidil in kwilejend
1 Chapwishay Yesu kulond yom yiney, naly watara mes mwiur, walembil anch: "Tatuku, chisu chawanyin kal. Mekesh uyaj wa Mwaney, chakwel amekesh uyaj weyey.
2 Mulong ey wamwinkisha ulabu wa kuyikel antu awonsu, chakwel apana mwom wa chikupu kudi antu awonsu iwamwinkisha.
3 Antu akwikal nich mwom wa chikupu anch akwijik ey Nzamb wakin, ni kumwijik Yesu Kristu watuma ey.
4 Am namekeshin kal uyaj wey pa mangand mulong nawanyishin kal mudimu wanginkisha kusal.
5 Tatuku! Katat nginkisha uyaj kurutu kwey, wawiy kamu uyaj unadinga nich piyading ngand kand kal uyitang.
6 “Am nakwijikishin kal kudi antu iwanginkisha. Ey wayitonda pakach pa in mangand, ading eyey, pakwez ey wanginkishau am. Awiy aziyidil kal ku mazu mey.
7 Katat awiy ij anch, yom yawonsu yiwanginkisha yidiokil kudi ey.
8 Nayilejin kal mazu wanleja ey, niyau amatambwil. Katat awiy ij chakin anch, am nadiokala kudi ey, itiyin kand anch, yey wantuma am.
9 “Nikat kuyilembidil awiy. Kinikat kuyilembidilap in mangand, pakwez nikat kuyilembidil antu iwanginkisha ey, mulong awiy adi eyey.
10 Antu awonsu inikweta am adi eyey, ni antu awonsu iukweta ey adi amam. Awiy akat kumekesh uyaj wam wakin.
11 Katat nikat kwez kudi ey. Kinikwikalap kand mu mangand, pakwez awiy adi mu mangand. Tatuku Utumbila! Yichidija nich ukash wa dijin diey, diawiy dijin diwanginkisha, chakwel awiy akwikal mu umwing mudi mutudia etu mu umwing.
12 Pinadinga nau nayichidija nich ukash wa dijin diey, diawiy dijin diwanginkisha am. Nayilama, kwikil umwing wau washadika, ching kusu umwing wading ufanyidin kushadik chakwel mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb mawanyin.
13 Katat am nikat kwez kudi ey. Nilondil yom yiney pinichidia mu mangand, chakwel awiy akutwish kwikal nich musangar wam mu michim yau, wawiy musangar uwanyidina kamu sens.
14 Nayileja mazu mey, chad in mangand ayikisin kal, mulong awiy kadiap mu umwing nau in mangand, mudi kand niyam kinidiap mu umwing nau in mangand.
15 Am kinikulembidilap ey kuyidiosh mu mangand, nikulembidil uyichidij kudi Sakudimban, ndiy kamu Muyimp.
16 Am kinidiap mu umwing nau in mangand, chawiy chimwing, niyau kadiap mu umwing nau in mangand.
17 Ku uyakin wey, yikadisha antwey. Dizu diey diawiy uyakin.
18 Mudi chiwantuma ey kudi in mangand, chawiy niyam nayitum kal awiy kudi in mangand.
19 Am nipan kal amwinam kukusadil ey mulong wa awiy, chakwel niyau akutwish kwipan ayinau kukusadil ey.
20 “Kinilembidilap kusu mulong wa awiy ayinau, pakwez nilembidil kand antu akwau akeza kwingitiyija am mulong wa mazu mau.
21 Niyilembidil chakwel awonsu ikal mu umwing. A! Tatuku! Chifanyidin ikal mu umwing ni yetwetu, mudi muudia ey mu umwing ni yamam, niyam mu umwing ni yeyey. Nilembidil awiy ikal mu umwing, chakwel in mangand akwitiy anch, yey wantuma am.
22 Nayinkishin kal uyaj, wawiy kamu uyaj wanginkisha, chakwel awiy akwikal mu umwing mudi mutudia etu mu umwing.
23 Am nidi mu umwing ere nau awiy, niyey udi mu umwing ni yamam, chakwel awiy akutwish kwibomb mu umwing uwanyidina kamu. Mwamu in mangand akez kwijik anch, ey uyikatil antu iwanginkisha mudi muwinkatila am.
24 “A! Tatuku! Ey wanginkishau awiy, chad am nisotil awiy ikala ni yamam kunikeza kwikal, chakwel akutwish kuman uyaj wam, wawiy uyaj wanginkisha am, mulong ey wankata am piyading ngand kand kal ayitanga.
25 A! Tatuku! Yey utentamina! In mangand kakwijap ey, pakwez am nikwij ey. Antu iwanginkisha ij anch, yey wantuma.
26 Am nakwijikishin kal ey kudi awiy, chad nikudandamen kusal mwamu, chakwel awiy akuyikat antu akwau mudi ey chiwinkatila am, chakwel kand am nikwikal mu umwing nau awiy.”
0 Akat kumukwat Yesu
1 Chapwishay Yesu kulembil, ndiy wadiokala kwinikwa nau in kwilejend, aya ushad wa kawit kapidilau anch, Sederon. Yesu ni in kwilejend aya mu chir chadinga kwinikwa.
2 Yudas, ndiy kamu mwin kumutungun matungu, wading wij ndond yiniya, mulong Yesu wading ni kuyang kwinikwa yisu yawonsu pamwing nau in kwilejend.
3 Chawiy Yudas wayisenda amasalay au in Rom, ni atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb atumau kudi in kupesh ajim ni Afaris. Ading asendil yom ya njit, ni mend ya kasu, ni jinsak ja kasu, aya, amulondul Yesu mu chir.
4 Yesu wading wij yom yawonsu yikumushikena, chad ndiy waseja piswimp, wayipul anch: “Ov, umukimbilany nany?”
5 Awiy amwakula anch “Tumukimbil Yesu wa ku Nazaret.” Yesu wakula anch: “Yam unou.” Yudas, ndiy kamu wamutunguna matungu, wading wiminy nau pamwing. 
6 Chayakulay Yesu anch: “Yam unou,” awiy achirika chinshikanyim, awa pansh.
7 Yesu wayipula kand anch; “Ov, umukimbilany nany?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Tumukimbil Yesu wa ku Nazaret.”
8 Yesu wayakula anch: “Oku nakulejangany kal anch: ‘Yam unou.’ Chawiy am yam ukimbilanya, yilikany antu akwau ay aya kwau.”
9 Yesu walonda mwamu chakwel mazu malonday mawanyina anch: “Tatuku, kinashadishap muntu ap kusu umwing wa antu iwanginkisha.”
10 Simon Pita wading ukwet mpak ya musamun, wayipurila, wakatul ditu dia chikas cha katatuku dia muswik wa mwin kupesh mujim. Muswik winou, dijin diend wading Malikus.
11 Pakwez Yesu wamwela Pita anch: "Chirish mpak yey mu chilal! Ov, utongil anch kinikunap rupas ra kuman mar minikumana ranginkishay Tatuku?"
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu kwa Anas
12 Chad amasalay au in Rom ni mukurump wau, pamwing ni atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb, amukwata Yesu, amukas.
13 Pakusambish amutwala kwa Anas, ndiy kamu wading ukweta mwanend watau kudi Kaifas. Kaifas ndiy wading mwin kupesh mujim mu muvu winiwa.
14 Ndiy kand wayiyula amakurump au in Yuda anch: “Chidi chiwamp muntu umwing kuyifil antu awonsu.”
0 Pita ukat kumutun Yesu
15 Simon Pita ni mwin kwilej mukwau amulondula Yesu. Mwin kwilej mukwau winiwa ading amwij kudi mwin kupesh  mujim, wawiy mutapu wandamay ndiy pamwing nend Yesu mu chipang cha chikumbu cha mwin kupesh mujim.
16 Pakwez Pita washala pol ku chis cha chipang. Chad mwin kwilej mukwau winiwa wabudika pol, wamulej mwilomb wading ulamina ku chis chakwel amwandjik Pita.
17 Mwilomb wadinga ku chis wamwipula Pita anch: “Ov, niyey kiudiap mwin kwilej wa muntu mwinou?” Pita wakula anch: “Bwat, am kinidiap kwam mwin kwilej wend.”
18 Atushalapol ni atulam apepa kasu ka makal mulong kwadinga mashik nakash. Awiy ading iminy, akat kwot kasu.
0 Mwin kupesh mujim ukat kumwipul Yesu
19 Chawiy mwin kupesh mujim wamwipula Yesu mulong wa in kwilejend ni mulong wa malejan mend.
20 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Nading ni kulond patok kudi antu. Nading ni kulejan machuku mawonsu mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ni mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb mwadingau ni kukumangen antu awonsu. Kwikil chom ap chimwing chinalondila mu ujindj.
21 Ing, mulong wak wingipwila? lyipula antu adinga ni kutesh yom yinalondanga. Awiy ij nawamp yom yinalondanga.”
22 Chalonday Yesu mwamu, kalam umwing wadinga piswimp nend wamubul disu, wamwel anch: “Ov, wawiy winou mutapu ufanyidina kumwakul mwin kupesh mujim?”
23 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Anch nalondang nayimp, lejan kamu patok yom yinalonda kal. Pakwez anch yom yinalondang yidi yakin, ing mulong wak wambula kal?”
24 Chawiy Anas wamutwala wa kukas kwa Kaifas mwin kupesh mujim.
0 Pita ukat kumutun kand Yesu
25 Pita wachading kwinikwa ni kwot kasu. Chawiy antu akwau amwipula anch: “Ov, niyey kiudiap mwin kwilej wa muntu mwinou?” Pakwez Pita watuna anch: “Bwat, am kinidiap mwin kwilej wend.”
26 Mwin kupesh mujim wading ukwet muswik mukwau ukweta mwanamakwend wakatulau ditu kudi Pita. Muswik mwinou wamwipula Pita anch: “Ov, kinakumanangap ey nend muntu mwinou mu chir?”
27 Pita watuna kand anch: “Bwat, kimwawiyap.” Pawiy kamu pinipa chikalambol watenda.
0 Akat kumutwal Yesu kwa Pilat
28 Pamanch pafe, amudiosha Yesu ku chikumbu cha Kaifas, amutwal ku chikumbu cha nyikel. Amakurump au in Yuda kandamap mu chikumbu mulong asota kwilam ishitwila mudi mudia yijil yau, chakwel akutwish kudia musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
29 Chawiy nyikel Pilat wabudika, waya kudi awiy, wayipul anch: “Ov, mulong ik wamufundilangau muntu mwinou?”
30 Awiy amwakula anch: “Anch muntu mwinou kasadilap chom chiyimp, ing kitwamuletangap kwetu kudi ey.”
31 Pilat wayileja anch: “Mutambulany ayinen, uyany nend ukamurumburishany mudi mudia Yijil yen.” Awiy amwakula anch: “Etu kitukwetap ulabu wa kumujip muntu.”
32 Yom yiney yamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu malonday Yesu palejanay mutapu ukufay.
33 Pilat wachirika kand mu chikumbu chend, wamutazuk Yesu, wamwipul anch: “Ov, ey udi mwant wa in Yuda?”
34 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ov, yey amwiney wipwila chipul chinech, anch kudi antu akwau akulejanga mulong wamam?”
35 Pilat wamwakula anch: “Ov, ey utongil anch, am nidi mwin Yuda? In muchid wey amwiney, pamwing nau in kupesh ajim, awiy akupanyina ey kudi am. Ov yom ik yiwasadila?”
36 Yesu wamuleja anch: “Want wamam kiudiap wa mangand minam. Anch Want wam wading wa mangand minam, ing, in kwilejam elang kurish chakwel kangal ampana mu makas mau amakurump a in Yuda. Bwat, Want wam kiudiap wa mangand minam!”
37 Chad Pilat wamwipula anch: “Ov, komb ey udi mwant?” Yesu wamwakula anch: “Yey ulondila anch, am_ nidi mwant. Chom chimwing kusu chinezila kuvadik pa mangand minam, chading mulong wa kulejan uyakin. Muntu mwawonsu mwin yakin ukat kutesh yom yinilondila.”
38 Pilat wamwipula anch: “Ov, uyakin chom ik?”
0 Akat kumufish nich Yesu kwa kumujip
0 Chapwishay Pilat kulond mazu minam, wabudika kand, waya kudi antu, wayilej anch: “Am kinimenap kwam mulong wa kumufish nich muntu mwinou.
39 Mudi mudia chaku chen, am nikat kukulikishinanyaku muntu wa rukan umwing pa chisu cha musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej. Ov, usotilany am nikulikishinanyay mwant wa in Yuda?”
40 Awiy abaroka nich mazu piur anch: "Ndiy, bwat! Tusotil umulikishaku Barabas!" Barabas winou wading mpongarik.
1 Chad Pilat wamupana Yesu chakwel amubul.
2 Amasalay atunga chibangul cha tumitiy twa miy, amudjik ku mutu. Chad amudjik nkandj mulemp usuzurikina kwa kujal.
3 Awiy asejaku, amwela anch: "Kalombo, mwant wa in Yuda!" Chad amubul masu.
4 Pilat wabudika kand pol, wayilej eG had : j antu anch: “Teshany, nisotil kumubudish Yesu pol, nimulet kudi en chakwel Mien am kinimenap kwam chom cha kumufish nich ndiy.”
5 Chad amubudisha Yesu. Ading amudjikin chibangul cha miy ni nkandj mulemp usuzurikin kwa kujal. Pilat wayileja anch: Talany, muntu mwin ou kamu ou!”
6 In mined we ni atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb pamumanau Yesu, abaroka anch: “Mu ! i mutond uchikakena!” Abit lepine Pilat wayela anch: “Anch mwamu, mutambulany ayinen, umupampany. Am kinimenap kwam mulong wa kumufish nich.”
7 In Yuda niyau amwakula anch: “Etu tukwet chijil chilondil anch, chifanyidin ndiy kufa, mulong wading ni kufa mu kan anch, udi Mwan a Nzamb.”
8 Chateshay Pilat mazu minam, wova wom nakash.
9 Ndiy wandama kand mu chikumbu, wamwipul Yesu anch: "Ov, ey udiokil kwisu?" Pakwez Yesu kamwakulap dizu.
10 Pilat wamwela anch: "Ov, kiusotilap kwey kwingakul? Ov, kiwijap kwey anch am nikwet ulabu wa kukulikishaku, ap wa kukupampil ku mutond uchikakena?"
11 Yesu wamwakula anch: “Ey kiukwetap ulabu wa kwinsal am chom, ulabu wey ching anch akwinkishau kudi Nzamb. Chawiy muntu wampananga kudi ey ukwet chitil chipandakena kuyip.”
12 Chateshay Pilat mazu minam, wakimba mutapu wa kumulikishaku Yesu. Pakwez chisak cha antu abaroka anch: “Anch ey wamulikishaku, charumburik anch, ey kiudiap murund wa Sezar, mwant wa in Rom! Muntu mwawonsu ukata kufa mu kan anch: ‘Am nidi mwant,’ muntu mwinou udi mwin kumubwambwil Sezar!”
13 Chateshay Pilat mazu minam, amubudisha Yesu pol, chad ndiy washakam mu ditand dia kurumburishin dia ndond yatungau mayal, yipidilan mu Hebereu anch: “Gabata.”
14 K wading kwashalang kal dichuku dimwing ni kusambish musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej. Muten wading usotil kushik piswimp ni pakach. Pilat wayela antu anch: “Mwant wen, ou kamu ou!”
15 Awiy asambisha kubarok anch: “Mujipa! Mujipa! Mupampila ku mutond uchikakena!” Pilat wayipula anch: “Ov, en usotilany am nimupampila mwant wen ku mutond uchikakena?” In kupesh ajim amwakula anch: “Etu kitukwetap mwant mukwau, ching kusu Mwant Sezar wa in Rom!”
16 Chad Pilat wayinkishay Yesu, awiy amutwala mulong wa kumupamp.
0 Akat kumupamp Yesu ku mutond uchikakena
0 Chad amusenda Yesu.
17 Yesu wabudika mu musumb, wading usendil mutond uchikakena amwinend djat ni kwi ndond ya Kawokal, yipidilau mu Hebereu anch: “Goligota.”
18 Kwinikwa kwawiy kwamupampilau. Apampilaku kand antu akwau aad ku mitond yichikakena, ou mutambu, ou mutambu, Yesu pakach.
19 Pilat walejana kufund piur pa mutond uchikakena anch: “Yesu wa ku Nazaret, Mwant wa in Yuda.”
20 In Yuda avud atanga mazu minam, mulong ndond yamupampilau Yesu kiyadingap kulemp ni musumb. Mazu minam amafunda mu jindim jisatu, mu Hebereu, ni mu Latin, ni mu Grek.
21 In kupesh ajim amuleja Pilat anch: “Kangal kufund anch: ‘Mwant wa in Yuda,’ pakwez fund anch: ‘Muntu mwinou walondanga anch: Am yam Mwant wa in Yuda.’ ” 
22 Pilat wayakula anch: “Mwin munafundanga kal omu mwawiy kamu.”
23 Chapwishau amasalay kumupampil Yesu ku mutond uchikakena, awiy anona yidjal yend yinying, ayanganijan. Isalay ni isalay wasenda chidjal chimwing. Awiy anona kand nkandj wend mulemp wa diswin dimwing diakad muchimin.
24 Amasalay ovijana anch: “Kangal twapwolany nkandj winou, pakwez tutany ubal chakwel twijikany muntu ukumutambula.” Chom chinech chamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu mafundilau anch: “Awiy anganijana yidjal yam, ata ubal mulong wa kutambul nkandj wam mulemp.” Mwamu mwasalau amasalay.
25 Piswimp ni mutond uchikakena wamupampilau Yesu, kwading kwiminy makwend, ni nambaz wa makwend, ni Mariy, mband wa Klopas, ni Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala.
26 Yesu wamumana makwend ni mwin kwilej wading ukatilay iminy kwinikwa. Chad Yesu wamuleja makwend anch: “Mwin kwilej ou, katat udi mudi mwaney.”
27 Chad wamuleja kand mwin kwilej anch: “Mband ou, katat udi mudi makwey.” Kudiokal pa chisu chinicha, mwin kwilej winou wamusenda makwend a Yesu kushakam nend kwol kwend.
0 Rufu ra Yesu
28 Yesu wadi wij anch: “Katat yom yawonsu yawanyin kal.” Ndiy walonda anch: “Nov kal impu.” Walonda mwamu mulong wa kuwanyish mazu mafundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb.
29 Kwinikwa kwading nsab ya maar ma nviny masasina. Awiy auuchika mwimpalambay mu maar minima, chad aukasin ku mutond upidilau anch, hisop. Auzambula, amutekau Yesu ku kan.
30 Chanay Yesu maar minam, ndiy walonda anch: “Katat yom yawonsu yawanyin kal!” Chad ndiy wazendjika mutu, wafa.
0 Akat kumupamp Yesu murumbu
31 Diading dichuku dia katan, diawiy kamu dichuku dia kwirijek mulong wa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. Dichuku dined dia Kwiswedish diading dichuku dijim ditumbila. Chawiy amakurump au in Yuda kasotap mijimbu ya antu apampau yishakam ku mitond pa Dichuku dia Kwiswedish. Chad awiy amwita Pilat usu wa kubukwon mend mau antu apampau, chakwel adiosha mijimbu yau ku mitond.
32 Chad amasalay aya, abukwon mend ma muntu wa kusambish ni ma muntu wa ww bs kaad, awiy kamu antu apampau pamwing nend Yesu.
33 Pakwez amasalay, pashikau kudi Yesu, amutan wafang kal, kamubukwonap mend.
34 Pakwez isalay umwing wamupampa Yesu murumbu mwi mbavu, pawiy kamu pinipa mash ni mem ejana uman wend, mabudika.
35 Muntu wamana yom yiney wal uman wend udi wakin. Ndiy wij nawamp anch, ulondil yom yakin chakwel niyen ukwitiyijany kand.
36 Yom yiney yamekana mulong wa kuwanyish mazu mafundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb_ anch: “Kwikil difup dikez kubukunau.”
37 Mazu makwau ma Mukand wa Nzamb malondil anch: “Antu akez kumutal ndiy wapampau murumbu.”
0 Akat kumujik Yesu
38 Chiyasuta yom yiney, Josef, wa ku ul wa Arimatey, wamwita Pilat usu wa kusend mujimbu wa Yesu. Josef wading mwin kwilej wa Yesu mu ujindj, mulong wading uyovil chad Josef amakurump au in Yuda wom. Pilat wamwitiya, waya, wadiosh mujimbu wa Yesu.
39 Nikodem, ndiy kamu muntu waya ni kumanijan nend Yesu uchuku, waya nend J osef. Ndiy wasenda diseng dia rupwembu, ni many ya kupan ku mujimbu wa Yesu. Yawonsu yading ya akilo makum masatu.
40 Antu inay aad asenda mujimbu wa Yesu, auvung mu diswin dia ndand muwamp, pamwing ni yom ya kupan mujimbu mudi mwading chaku cha in Yuda cha kurijek mujimbu pa kuujik.
41 Kwi ndond kwamupampilau Yesu kwading chir. Mu chir chinech mwading nzay yisu kand kal ajikamup muntu.
42 Awly amujika Yesu kwinikwa, mulong kwading kwashalang kal dichuku dimwing kusu ni kushik ku Dichuku dia Kwiswedish, ni chikwau kand, nzay yading piswimp.
0 Kuvumbuk kwa Yesu
1 Dichuku dia kusambish dia rubing fa in Yuda pamanch pafe pikwading kuchijadil, Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala waya kwi nzay. Watana diyal adidioshang kal ku chis cha nzay.
2 Ndiy waya mau, wamutan Simon Pita, ni mwin kwilej wading ukatilay Yesu, wayilej anch: “ Amudioshang kal Nsalejetu mwi nzay, kitwijap kwisu kwamutekangau kal!”
3 Chad Pita ni mwin kwilej mukwau aya kwi nzay.
4 Awonsu mwaad wau aya mau, pakwez mwin kwilej mukwau waya mau kumupandakanamu Pita, ndiy wasambelaku kushik kwi nzay.
5 Wazengama, watal mwi nzay, waman maswin ma ndand muwamp amatudil, pakwez kandamap mukach.
6 Chad Simon Pita weza kwinyim, wapandaken kamu mwi nzay. Ndiy wamana maswin ma ndand muwamp am i ini mwa.
7 Wamana_ kand diswin iimmgikeati nessdarn sll Diswin dined kidadingap pamwing ni maswin ma ndand muwamp, pakwez ading adivungil, aditudil pa idinad. 
8 Chad mwin kwilej mukwau wasambela kushik kwi nzay niyend wandama mukach, waman yom yiney, chad witiyij.
9 Awi ading kand kal ova kurumburik kwa mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb malondila anch: “Yesu ufanyidin kuvumbuk kwikal mwom.”
10 Chad in kwilej inay achirika pol.
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala
11 Mariy wading wiminy kwi nzay, ukat kudil. Pachadingay ni kudil, wazengama, watal mwi nzay.
12 Ndiy wayimana aruu a mwiur aad adjit maswin matok. Ading ashich pa ndond paladikau mujimbu wa Yesu, umwing ushich mutambu wa ku mutu, mukwau ushich mutambu wa ku mend.
13 Awiy amwipula anch: "Ov, mband ey, udidil yom ik?" Ndiy wayakula anch: "Awiy amudioshang kal Nsalejam, kinijap kwamutekangau kal!"
14 Chad ndiy wakarumuka, wamuman Yesu wiminy. Pakwez ndiy kijikap anch udi Yesu, bwat.
15 Yesu wamwipula anch: "Ov, mband ey, udidil yom ik? Ov, umusotil nany?" Mariy watonga anch udi mwin kulam chir, chawiy wamwela anch: "Mwant, anch yey wadioshanga mujimbu wa Yesu, nleja kuwamutekanga chakwel niya ni kamusend."
16 Yesu wamuleja anch: "Mariy!" Mariy wakarumuka, wamwel mu win Hebereu anch: "Raboni!" Charumburik anch, Mulej.
17 Yesu wamwela anch: "Kangal wankwataku, kand kal nichirika kudi Tatuku. Pakwez yang bil ukayilej in kwilejam anch, am nachirik kal kudi Tatukwam, ndiy kamu Tatukwau, ndiy Nzamb wam, udi kand Nzamb wau."
18 Chawiy Mariy wa ku ul wa Magadala waya, wayilej in kwilej anch: "Namumanang kal Nsalejetu." Wayirumburila kand yom yamulejau ndiy.
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi in kwilejend
19 Dichuku diawiy dinidia kamu dia kusambish dia rubing ra in Yuda, chikwazweka urel, in kwilej ading akumangedin pamwing mu chikumbu. Awiy apata yis nich atufur, mulong ova wom wa amakurump au in Yuda. Chad Yesu weza wiman mukach mwau, wayela anch: "Chisambu cha Nzamb chikala ni yenen."
20 Chapwishay kulond mwamu, ndiy wayileja mu makas mend, ni mwi mbavu mwend. In kwilej izula kamu sens nich musangar nakash pamumanau Nsalejau.
21 Yesu wayela kand anch: "Chisambu cha Nzamb chikala ni yenen. Mudi mwantumau am kudi Tatuku, niyam nakutumany kal en."
22 Chapwishay kulond mwamu, ndiy wayipepila, wayel anch: "Tambulany Mwiku Utumbila.
23 Anch en wayilikishinany antu yitil yau, Nzamb ukat kuyilikishinang kand chikupu. Anch en kiuyilikishidinanyap antu yitil yau, Nzamb kakuyilikishinap kand chikupu."
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi Tomas
24 Mwin kwilej umwing, dijin diend Tomas, upidilau anch, Mpamb, kadingap pamwing nau akwau pezay Yesu.
25 Chad in kwilej akwau amuleja anch: "Etu twamumanang kal Nsalejetu!" Tomas wayakul anch: "Anch kinimenap yidur ya misumad mu makas mend, ni kutek muny wam pa ndond papampau misumad, ni kwandjik chikas cham mwi mbavu mwend, am kinikwitiyijap."
26 Chipasuta rubing rumwing, in kwilej ading akumangedin kand mu chikumbu, Tomas wading nau pamwing. Yis yading yakupat nich atufur, pakwez Yesu weza wiman mukach mwau, wayel anch: "Chisambu cha Nzamb chikala ni yenen."
27 Chad Yesu wamwela Tomas anch: "Tek muny wey omu, tal makas mam, chad andjik chikas chey mwi mbavu mwam. Lik ntad jey, itiyij kwey!"
28 Tomas wamwakula anch: "Ey udi Nsalejam, Nzamb wam!"
29 Yesu wamwela anch: "Ov, ey witiyij kal chiwanmana kal? Ayuk kwau antu akata kwitiyij wakad kwinman!"
0 Mulong wafundilau mukand winou
30 Yesu wasala kand yilay yivud kurutu kwa in kwilejend yakad kufund mu mukand winou.
31 Pakwez yom yin yidiamu ey, am nayifunda chakwel en ukwitiyijany anch, Yesu udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many, ndiy kamu Mwan a Nzamb. Nayifunda kand chakwel ukwikalany nich mwom wakin, mulong wa ritiy ren mwi ndiy.
0 Yesu ukat kumekan kudi in kwilejend sambwad
1 Chipasuta chisu, Yesu wamekana kand kudi in kwilejend ku dijiy dia Tiberiad. Ndiy wimekesha mwamu kudi awiy.
2 Simon Pita, ni Tomas, upidilau anch, Mpamb, ni Natanyel, wa ku ul wa Kana mwi ngand ya Galalia, ni an amakundj aad a Zebede, ni in kwilej akwau aad a Yesu, awonsu ading pamwing.
3 Simon Pita wayileja akwau anch: "Am naya kal ni kuta ansh." Awiy amwakula anch: "Niyetu tusotil tuya ney." Awiy aya, andam mu waat, ata uchuku wawonsu, pakwez kakwatap chom.
4 Chikwacha pamanch, Yesu weza, wiman pa chikumu cha dijiy, pakwez in kwilejend kamwijikap anch, ndiy Yesu.
5 Chad ndiy wayipula anch: "Ov, anen, wakwatanganyap kal chom?" Awiy amwakula anch: "Bwat, kitukwatilap chom."
6 Ndiy wayela anch: "Tangany wand wen mutambu wa katatuku wa waat, chad ukukwatany ansh." Awiy ata wand, chad katwishap kuukak, mulong mwafa ansh avud.
7 Mwin kwilej wading ukatilay Yesu wamwela Pita anch: "Komb, Nsalejetu!" Chateshay Pita anch Nsalejend, ndiy wikasa kabwik mulong wading wadjolang kal maswin, chad wamatikin mu mem.
8 In kwilej akwau eza mu waat ku chikumu, akat kupwit wand wading wizulang kal nich ansh. Awiy kadingap kulemp ni ku chikumu, ading ku chintampu mudi cha ametre chitot.
9 Chadiokalau mu waat, awiy amana kasu ka makal padi insh, amana kand dibot.
10 Yesu wayela anch: "Letanyap ansh amwing wakwatanya kal."
11 Simon Pita wandama mu waat, wakakil wand ku chikumu, wading wizwila sens nich ansh ajim chitot ni makum matan ni asatu. Ap anch ansh adingap nchik avud, wand kiwapukap.
12 Yesu wayela anch: "Ezany, udiany." Kwikil mwin kwilej wend umwing wapakamu kumwipul anch: "Ov, yey nany?" Mulong awonsu ading ij anch Nsalejau.
13 Chawiy Yesu waya, wanon dibot, wayangen, wanona kand insh, wayangen.
14 Kinak kading kapamp ka chisatu kamekanay Yesu kudi in kwilejend kudiokal kwavumbukinay kwikal mwom.
0 Yesu ukat kwambamb nend Pita
15 Chapwishau kudia, Yesu wamwipula Simon Pita anch: "Ov, Pita, mwan a Yohan, ey winkatil am kupandakan mwinkatilau akwen inay?" Pita wamwakula anch: "Mwaning, Nsalejam, wijany anch nikukatilany." Yesu wamwela anch: "Lam an a amikoku am."
16 Yesu wamwipula kand kapamp ka chaad anch: "Ov, Simon, mwan a Yohan, ey winkatil am?" Pita wamwakula anch: "Mwaning, Nsalejam, wijany anch nikukatilany." Yesu wamwela anch: "Lam amikoku am."
17 Chad Yesu wamwipula kand kapamp ka chisatu anch: "Ov, Simon, mwan a Yohan, ey winkatil am?" Pita wova ushon mulong Yesu wamwipula kapamp ka chisatu anch: "Ov, ey winkatil am?" Chawiy ndiy wamwela Yesu anch: "Nsalejam, en yen wijanya yom yawonsu. En wijany kal anch, am nikukatilany!" Yesu wamwela anch: "Lam amikoku am.
18 Nakulej chakin, piwading nsangarum, wading ni kudjal amwiney, ni kuya kwawonsu kuusotila. Pakwez piukunanapa, ukez kwonan makas, chad muntu mukwau ukez kukukas ni kukutwal kuwakad ey kukat."
19 Yesu walonda mwamu mulong wa kurumburil mutapu ukez kufay Pita, ni mutapu ukez kupanay uyaj kudi Nzamb. Chapwishay Yesu kulond mwamu, wamwela Pita anch: "Nlondula!"
0 Yesu ukat kulond ya mwin kwilej ukatilay
20 Pita wakarumuka kwinyim, wamuman mwin kwilej ukatilay Yesu ukat kwez, ndiy kamu mwin kwilej waseja piswimp kudi Yesu padingau ni kudia pamwing mulong wa kumwipul anch: "Ov, Nsalejam, nany ukukutunguna matungu?"
21 Pita, chamumanay mwin kwilej winou, wamwipula Yesu anch: "Ov, Nsalejam, ing winou, chom ik chikumushikena?"
22 Yesu wamwakula anch: "Anch nisotil anch ndiy ashakam mwom djat ni pinikuchirikina, ov, chikwikal nchik kudi ey? Ey nlondula am!"
23 Chawiy rusangu rapalangana pakach pa in kumulondul Yesu anch, mwin kwilej winou kakufap kwend. Pakwez Yesu kalondap kwend anch, mwin kwilej winou kakufap. Ndiy walonda anch: "Anch nisotil anch ndiy ashakam mwom djat ni pinikuchirikina, chikwikal nchik kudi ey?"
24 Mwin kwilej waleta uman wa yom yiney, ndiy kand wayifunda. Twij anch, yom yawonsu yalonday yidi yakin.
0 Mazu ma kupwish nich
25 Yesu wasala kand yom yikwau yivud. Anch ayifunda chom pa chom, nitongil anch, ing, mwi ngand yawonsu kimwelap kumekan ndond ya kutek mikand yelau kufund.
0 Nzamb washilamu kutum Mwiku Utumbila
1 Mukarukat nam, Teyofil, mu mukand wam wa kusambish nafunda yom yasalay Yesu ni yalejanay kudi antu kudiokal pasambishinay mudimu wend,
2 djat ni dichuku diamusenday mwiur kudi Nzamb. Padingay kand kal amusenda mwiur, Yesu wayileja antu atonday kwikal atwimbuy end. Ndiy wayilejina malejan mend ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila.
3 Chafay kal Yesu, wimekesha tupamp tuvud kudi awiy ni kwiyijikesh patok anch, ndiy wavumbukin kal, udi mwom. Amumananga mwom mu machuku makum manying, wading ni kulond nau yom ya Want wa Nzamb.
4 Pachadingay nau pamwing, ndiy wayishinshika dizu anch: “Kangal wadiokalany mu Yerusalem, pakwez chingelany chom chashilayimu Tatukwam kupan mudi munakulejanya.
5 Yohan wabatisha antu nich mem, pakwez mu machuku makemp Nzamb ukukubatishany en ni Mwiku Utumbila.”
0 Yesu amusend kal mwiur
6 Atwimbuy a Yesu akumangana nend pamwing, chad amwipula anch: “Ov, Nsalejetu, chisu chinech chawiy chiusotila kuyichirishin in Isarel want wau?”
7 Yesu wayakula anch: “Kichidiap kudi en kujingunin yisu ap yirung yikumekana yom, mulong Tatuku watenchika kal yom yiney ku ulabu wend amwinend.
8 Anch Mwiku Utumbila wakushirikinany en, ukez kwikalany nich ukash. Chad ukez kwikalany atuman amam mu Yerusalem, ni mu Yudeya mwawonsu, ni mu Samaria, djat ni kusudiedila mangand,”
9 Chapwishay kulond mwamu, Nzamb wamusenda mwiur. Padingau amutadil, didj diamujika, awiy kamumanap kand.
10 Pachadingau atadil mwiur neeng, kukashimuk, amakundj aad iminy nau, adjit maswin matok.
11 Chad amakundj inay ayipula anch: “Ov, en in Galalia, mulong wak wiminyanya_ pinap, utadilany mwiur neeng? Yesu winou wasendau kal mwiur ukez kuchirik kand mutapu umwing mudi muumenanya uyil mwiur.”
0 Akat kutond mwin kumuswinkan Yudas
12 Chad atwimbuy a Yesu adiokala ku Mukandu wa Mitond mudi ya Mpach, achirik ku Yerusalem. Mukandu winou wading ku chintampu mudi cha kilometre umwing.
13 Chashikau mu Yerusalem, andama kapalakany ka piur mwakumangenangau Awiy ading Pita, ni Yohan, ni Jakobu, ni Andare, ni Filip, ni lous, ni Bartelemi, ni Mateu, ni Jakobu, mwan wa Alfe, ni ‘ion mwin kukankamen yom ya ngand, ni Yuda, mwan wa lukobu,
14 Awiy akumangananga yisu. yivud pamwing nau aimband, ni Mariy, makwend wa Yesu, ni anamakwend a Yesu, Mulong wa kulembil.
15 Mu machuku minima kwading kukumangan kwa in kwitlyij, antu awonsu ading mudi chitot ni makum maad. chad Pita watumbuka, walond anch:
16 “Akadivar nam mu Kristu, chifanyidin mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb mawanyin ialondilay Mwiku Utumbila mwi ngakiril wetu David. Ndiy Wabwaka mulong wa Yudas, ndiy kamu wayitakela antu wmukwata Yesu.
17 Yudas wadinga mu chisak chetu, mulong wmutonda kusal mudimu pamwing ni yetwetu.”
18 (Nfalang jamufishau nich Yudas mulong wa chom chiyimp chasalay, lidiy walanda nich chir. Mu chir chinech mwawiy mwawilay, watakejaku mutu, chad wabarika, yom yawonsu ya mwivumu yapalangana dumu.
19 Antu awonsu ading ashicha mu Yerusalem atesha mulong wa rufu ra Yudas, chad chir chinech wehipila mu rudim rau anch, Akelidama, charumburik anch, Chir chadjila mash.)
20 Pita walonda kand anch: “Afundil mu mukand wa Kuseng anch: ‘Chifanyidin chikumbu chend chishala chamwamu, kichifanyidinap kushakamamu.’ Afundil kand anch: ‘Chifanyidin muntu mukwau atambul ndond yend ya mudimu.’
21 “Yisu yawonsu yadingay Yesu ni yetwetu, antu akwau ading kand pamwing ni yetwetu,
22 kudiokal pa chisu chamubatishau Yesu kudi Yohan, djat ni pa dichuku diamusendau Yesu mwiur kudi Nzamb. Chifanyidin muntu umwing wa pakach pa antu inay ikala kaman wa divumbuk dia Yesu pamwing ni yetwetu.” Poul
23 Chawiy aleta majin ma antu aad, Josef, upidilau anch, Barisabas, dikwau diend Justus, ni Matias.
24 Chad antu awonsu alembila anch: “A! Nzamb, ey wij muchim wa muntu il muntu, chawiy tuleja nany watonda kal pakach pa antu inay aad
25 chakwel ikala kambuy wa Yesu, asala mudimu pa ndond padiokalay Yudas waya kwi ndond yend amwinend,”
26 Chad awiy ata ubal mulong wa kutondap muntu umwing pakach pa amakundj inay aad. Amutondap Matias, amuwej ku chisak cha atwimbuy a Yesu dikum ni umwing.
0 Kushik kwa Mwiku Utummbila
1 Chidiashika dichuku uku dia mmusambu wa Pentekot, in kwitiyij awonsu akuumangena nddond yimwing. 
2 Kukash muk, weza chidjimin ch ukas hadiokala mwiur. chovakana mudi chonyin chcha nakash. hdits zwila chikikumbu chawonsu mwadingh. Chidjimin chinech chi chom mudi mizv lingau ashich.
3 Chad amana mizwizu ya kasu. Mizw mudi jindim, jauroka zwizu yiney yading yifanaken roka, chad rudimim ni rudim yading yifanaken ni muntu, chawiy antu rawila pa muntu awonsu aw awonsu aw ni Mwiku Utumbila, awanyina.
4 Awiy awonsu izula chad asamambisha kulond michid yikwau, mudi mwayilondishau kudi M mu jindim ja Utumbila.
5 Kwading in Yuda adiokala ur MWiku ku ashien mu Yerusa ashich Yerususalem. AwiyV adinmangand mawonsu ading iy ading antu akata kumwifukwil Nzamb.
6 Chatesl a Kumwifukwil Cfateshau chidjimin ch akumangand chinech, chisak chijim cha antu ana pamwing, awiy awo g, awiy awonsu ashimwoa antu nakash. In kwitiyij ading ni kulor lond, chad muntu ni muntu wayitesha akat waviteshaat kulond mu rudim ra kwol kwau.
7 Awiy akwamwoka ni ra kushimwok nakash, alond anch: “Antu in alondila jindim jine ay adi in Galalia!
8 Ing, etu awonsu tuyiteshil nchik awiy akat kulond mu rudim ra muntu ni muntu?
9 Etu amwing tudiokil kwi ngand ya Part, amwing kwi ngand ya Mediy, amwing kwi ngand ya Elam, amwing kwi ngand ya Mesopotamiy, amwing kwi ngand ya Yudeya, amwing kwi ngand ya Kapados, amwing kwi ngand ya Pont, amwing kwi ngand ya Aziy.
10 Akwau adiokil kwi ngand ya Frigi, amwing kwi ngand ya Pamfiliy, amwing kwi ngand ya Idjibit, ni kwi ngand ya Libi yidia piswimp ni musumb wa Siren. Akwau tudiokil ku musumb wa Rom,
11 tudi in Yuda, ni antu a michid yikwau akarumukina kal kwikal in Yuda, amwing adi in Kret, akwau adi in Arabi. Ap anch mwamwap nchik, etu awonsu tuyiteshil akat kulejan mu jindim jetu midimu yijim yasalay Nzamb!"

13 Pakwez antu akwau ayisipa in kwitiyij, alond anch: "Antu inay, maar m mayikwatang kal!"
0 Malejan ma Pita
14 Pita ading pamwing nau atwimbuy akwau a Yesu dikum ni umwing, chad ndiy antu nich dizu dikash anchwatumbuka, "En wasambish kuyilej niyenen, antu awonsu ushichanyn anamakwam in Yuda. mu Yerusalem, tangany matu, nikurumburilany chom chinech,
15 Antu inay kakwachikInap mudi muutongilanya, katat muten udi wa chidivu, pamanch.
16 Chakin, kichidiap mwamu, pakwez anch: mawanyin kal mazu malonday Jowel, muruu wa Nzamb,
17 Nzamb nikez kupan ulondil anch: Machuku piswimp ni kwisudiel, k Mwiku wam kudi antu awonsu. nikez kupan Anen amakundj ni anen amband akez kupalangesh rusangu ram. Ansangarum enen akez akez kuman kuman yishimushimu, ni y amapal en akez kulat.yilat.
18 Mwawiy, mu machuku minima minima nikez kupan Mwiku wam kudi atushalapol kudi am ni kudi amilomb am. Awiy akez kupalangesh kupalangesh rusan rusangu ram.bnolaw
19 Nikez kusal yom yikwamushena mwiur, ni yijingidij pansh. Kukez kwikal mash, ni kasu, ni madj ma mish.
20 Muten viuten ukez ukez kujal kujal bwi bwi, ni ngond ukez kusuz mudi mash, idiakad kal kushik dichuku dikurumburishay dijim KARCE 
21 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumutazuk Chinawej mwawonsim dia uyaj. mulong wa kumukwash, ukez kupand. 
22 "En, anamakwam in Isarel teshanypand. wamekesha ulabu wa Yesu wa ku Nazarny, nikulejany! Nzamb anamakwam in Isarel, teshany, patok pasalay yilay, ni yom yikwamushena, ni yijingidij, mudi muwijany en awonsu nawamp.
23 Yesuu onsu nyimp chakwel amupamen wamupananya mu makas ma antu ymp ehakwel amupampa ku mutond uchikakena, mudi еa, mudi mwading kutenchik kwa Nzamb, mulong ndiy wijika yom yiney piyading yakad kal kumekan.
24 Pakwez Nzamb wamuvumbul kwikal mwom, wamukamunin ku ukash ku ukash wa rufu, chawiy rufu mudimuu ukasn wa rufu, kiratwishap kumulam mudi muntu wa rukan.
25 David walonda mulong ong wa Yesu anch: wa resu anch: 'Am namumananga Nsalejam kurutu kwam yisu yawonsu, mulong ndiy udi piswimp ni yamam chakwel kinikwakamap.
26 Muchim wam ukwet musangar nakash, ni mazu mam mawonsu madi mama musangar. mus Ap nikalapaр nchik mwin mwin kufa, nikez wa
27 mulong ey kiukdish nawamp mulong wa ruchingej ram. Ey kiukez kwitiyap Kashalapol wey Utumbila d ya afu. kuvundil mwi nzay.
28 Ey ey wanlejin kal jinjil jiyila ku mwom wakin, ey ukez kwinsangarish namsangarish nakash pinikushakama ni yeyey pamwing.'"
29 Pita walonda kand anch: “Anamakwam, chifanyidin am nikulejany patok wakad wom mulong wa ngakiril wetu mujim Mwant David. Ndiy wafa, amujik, nzay yend yidi kwaku ni ilel unou,
30 Ndiy wading muruu wa Nzamb, wading wij nawamp yom yamushilaumu kudi Nzamb. Nzamb wamuchipila anch: ‘Am nikez kumuswanish umwing wa a majuku mey makeza kwez kushakam pa ditand diey.’
31 David wading wij yom yikez kusalay Nzamb kurutu. Chawiy ndiy walonda ya kuvumbuk kwa Kristu Uzizidilau Many anch: ‘Kamulikinap mwi ndond ya afu. Mujimbu wend kiwavundilap mwi nzay.’
32 Pita walonda kand anch: “Yesu winou, Nzamb wamuvumbula kwikal mwom, chad etu aruu end tudi atuman a chom chinech.
33 Nzamb wamuzambula, wamutek mwi ndond ya katumb ku chikas chend cha katatuku. Ndiy watambula Mwiku Utumbila kudi Tatuku mudi mwashilayimu. Yesu ndiy waleta yom yiumenany ni yiuteshilany katat.
34 Mulong kadiap David waya mwiur. Pakwez ndiy walonda anch: ‘Chinawej wamuleja Nsalejam anch: Ez ushakam ku chikas cham cha katatuku,
35 djat ni pinikuyiteka akankuny ney kwishin kwa yidjatil yey.’
36 “En in Isarel awonsu, shinshikany, Wijikany nawamp anch, Yesu winou Wapampanya ku mutond uchikakena, ndiy kamu winou watekay Nzamb kwikal Nsalejetu ni Kristy Uzizidilau Many!”
37 Chateshau antu mazu ma Pita, mayitapa ku michim, chad amwipula Pita ni atwimbuy akwau a Yesu anch: "Anamakwetu, ov, tufanyidin kusal nchik?"
38 Pita wayakula anch: "Chifanyidin muntu ni muntu akarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yend, ni kutambul dibatish mu dijin dia Yesu Kristu chakwel akukulikishinany yitil yen. Chad ukez kutambulany Mwiku Utumbila, ndiy kamu upanyinay Nzamb kwa riy.
39 Mulong kushilamu kwa Nzamb kwading kudi en, ni kudi anen, ni kudi antu awonsu adia kulemp, awiy kamu awonsu akeza kutazukau kudi amwinend Chinawej Nzamb wetu."
40 Pita walonda mazu mavud ma uman wend, wayibachika antu anch: “TIpandishany ayinen, wiyepany kadimu kezila ku muchid winou wa in kumubwambwil Nzamb!”
41 Antu avud a pakach pau itiya mazy ma Pita, chad ayibatisha. Ading mudi antu tunan tusatu iweja dichuku dinidia ku chisak cha in kwitiyij.
0 Kubombakan kwa in kwitiyij
42 Awiy ipana mulong wa kutesh malejan malejanau atwimbuy a Yesu, ibomba pamwing nau in kwitiyij akwau, adianga nau ni kulembil nau pamwing.
43 Antu awonsu akwamwoka mulong atwimbuy a Yesu asala yilay yivud ni yom yikwamushena ku ukash wa Nzamb,
44 In kwitiyij awonsu abombakana pamwing, ading ni kwanganijan yom yakwetingau.
45 Awiy alandishanga mapit mau, chad anganijan nfalang kudi muntu ni muntu mudi mwading kuswir kwend.
46 Pichuku pichuku akumangenanga mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad ayanga ni kudia pamwing ku yikumbu yau, adianga nich musangar ni muchim wa kwikepish.
47 Amushimananga Nzamb, chad antu awonsu ayikata. Chad pichuku pichuku Nsalejau Yesu wawejanga ku chisak chinech antu apandishangay Nzamb. Pita ni Yohan akat kumwok chishet
1 Dichuku dimwing Pita nend Yohan aya ku Chikumbu cha Nzamb kulembil pa chisu cha yisatu urel.
2 Kwading muntu wavadika chishet, amuletanga ku Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku chis chipidilau anc , Ufun. Amuletanga pichuku pichuku mulong wa kwit nfalang kudi antu andamanga mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
3 Chamumanay Pita nend Yohan akat kwandam, wayita niyau chakwel amwinkishap chom.
4 Awiy amutala neeng, chad Pita wamwela anch: “Tutala kamu.”
5 Chad ndiy wayishinshika kutal, mulong wachingeja kutambul chom kudi awiy.
6 Pakwez Pita wamwela anch: "Kinikwetap nfalang ja utad wa argent, ap wa or, pakwez nakwinkish kal chinikweta. Mu dijin dia Yesu Kristu wa ku Nazaret, nakulej anch: 'Tumbuk, wenda!' "
7 Chad Pita wamukwataku ku chikas cha katatuku, wamutumbwish. Pawiy pinipa kamu yidjatil yend ni mu tubwokas yakasikana.
8 Chishet watumbuka swa, wiman, wasambish kwendangan. Chad wandama nau pamwing mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wading ni kwend, ni kumatok, ni kumushiman Nzamb.
9 Antu adinga mwinimwa amumana ukat kwend ni kumushiman Nzamb.
10 Chamushinshikau kutal, amwijika anch, ndiy kamu wadia ni kwit ku Chis cha Ufun. Chad awonsu ashimwoka ni kukwamwok mulong wa chom chashika kudi ndiy.
0 Mazu malonday Pita mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
11 Muntu mwinou Wamulamata Pita nend Yohan mwi nzezil yipidilau anch, Nzezil ya Salomon. Antu ashimwoka nakash, ez mau kudi awiy.
12 Pita, chayimanay antu, wayel anch: “Akadivar in Isarel, ov, mulong wak ututadilanya neeng ni kushimwok? Ov, utongilany anch chidi ku ukash wetu ayinetu, kal muntu mwinou?
13 Nzamb wa Aburaham, ni wa Isak, ni wa Jakob, ndiy kamu Nzamb wa angakiriletu, wapana uyaj kudi Kashalapol wend Yesu. Pakwez en wamupananya mu makas ma amakurump. Ap anch Pilat wachelap nchik kumulikishaku, en wamutunany Yesu kurutu kwa Pilat.
14 Ndiy wading muntu muwamp utumbila, pakwez wamulikanya ndiy, chad wamwitany Pilat kukulikishinanyay mwin kujipan,
15 En wamujipany muntu mwin kulet mwom wakin, pakwez Nzamb wamuvumbula kwikal mwom. Etu tudi atuman a chom chinech.
16 Ukash wa dijin dia Yesu ni ritiy mu dijin diend, yawiy yamwoka kal muntu umenanya ou, ndiy kand Wijanya kal. Ritiy mu Yesu rawiy ramwokanga kamu mudi mutapu umumenanya.
17 “Chawiy katat, anamakwam, nij nawamp anch, en ni amakurump en wasalanya chom chinech kudi Yesu mulong kiwyikanyap chom chiwasalanya.
18 Nzamb walondila pakur mu aruu end awonsu anch: ‘Kristu wam ukez kuman mar.’ Chawiy katat wawanyish kal yom yashilayimu.
19 Chad karumukany, udiokalany ku yitil, wezany kudi Nzamb chakwel akulikishinany yitil yen. Chawiy anch wasalany mwamu,
20 Nzamb ukukwinkishany yirung ya kupizurish michim yen, ukukutuminanyay kand Yesu, ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many wakutondilanyay en.
21 Pakwez katat Yesu Kristu ufanyidin kushakam mwiur, djat ni pakushika chisu chikez kukarumunau yom yawonsu kwikal yisu. Mwamu mwalondilay Nzamb pakur mu aruu end atumbila.
22 Mulong Moses walonda anch: ‘Chinawej Nzamb wen ukez kukutuminany muruu mukwau mudi am, ndiy ukez kwikal umwing wa muchid wen. Chifanyidin kuziyil yom yawonsu yikukulejanyay kusal.
23 Muntu mwawonsu ukeza kulik kumutesh muruu winiwa, akez kumudiosh mukach mwa antu a Nzamb ni kumushesh.’
24 Aruu awonsu a Nzamb, kudiokal ku Samwel djat ni kudi akwau amwambakena, alondanga mulong wa yom yimekena mu machuku minam.
25 En udiany an amakundj au aruu inay, udiany kand answan a manswik masukay nau anshankuren pamulejay Aburaham anch: ‘Am nikez kuyiyukishin antu awonsu pa mangand mu a majuku men makeza kwez.’
26 Chawiy Nzamb wamutonda Kashalapol wend, chad wamutuma pakusambish kudi en. Ndiy wamutuma mulong wa kukuyukishany en ni kukukarumunany umwing ni umwing kudiokal ku yisalijok yen yiyimp.”
0 Akat kumufish nich Pita ni Yohan ku dirumburish dijim
1 Pachadingay Pita nend Yohan akat kulond nau antu, in kupesh amwing, ni mukurump wa atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb, pamwing nau Asadus amwing eza.
2 Awiy ajimana, mulong Pita ni Yohan adi ni kuyilej antu anch: “Yesu wavumbuka wikal mwom, charumburik anch, afu awonsu— akez kuvumbuk kwikal aom.”
3 Chad awiy ayikwata, ayitek mu rukan chakwel alalamu, mulong muten wading wasutany kal.
4 Pakwez antu avud atesha mazu malejanau, itiyija. Chad in kwitiyij avula ikal amakundj mudi tunan tutan.
5 Chikwacha, in kutakel au in Yuda, ni amakurump, ni alej a Yijil, akumangena ku Yerusalem.
6 Awiy akumangana nend mwin kupesh mujim Anas, ni Kaifas, ni Yohan, ni Alekizandre, pamwing ni antu awonsu a dijuku dia mwin kupesh mujim.
7 Ayileta atwimbuy a Yesu, ayimik kurutu kwau, chad ayipula anch: “Ov, ku ukash ik, ap mu dijin dia nany diwamwokidinanya muntu winiwa?”
8 Chawiy Pita wizula nich Mwiku Utumbila, chad wayakula anch: “En, in kutakel au antu, niyenen amakurump,
9 en watwipulany kal ilel unou mulong wa chom chiwamp twasadila kudi chishet, ni mutapu wayerikinay.
10 Chawiy chifanyidin en awonsu kwijik, niyau in Isarel awonsu afanyidin kwijik anch, muntu mwinou wiminya kurutu kwen wayerikin kamu zwang mulong wa ukash wa dijin dia Yesu Kristu wa ku Nazaret. Ndiy kamu Yesu wapampilanya ku mutond uchikakena, ndiy kand wavumbulau kudi Nzamb kwikal mwom.
11 Yesu ndiy ulejenau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Diyal diwadiulanya en in kutung, diawiy dikala diyal dia usey upandakena mayal mawonsu.’ ”
12 Pita walonda kand anch: “Dipandish dikat kumeken mwi ndiy kusu. Mwi ngand yawonsu mwikil mukwau wapanay Nzamb mulong wa kutupandish..”
13 Chisak cha in dirumburish dijim ashimwoka nakash pamanau anch, Pita ni Yohan adi kwau antu amwamu akad kwilej, chad akat kulond wakad wom. Chad ajingunina anch, komb antu inay ading pamwing nend Yesu.
14 Pakwez awiy kamanap mwa kulondil, mulong muntu wokau kudi Pita ni Yohan wading wiminy nau pamwing.
15 Chad ayopata mu kapalakany ka dirumburish dijim. Chawiy in chisak cha dirumburish dijim ashala ayinau, asambish kutadikijan.
16 Awiy ipulijana anch: “Ov, tukusalany nchik antu inay? Muntu mwawonsu ushicha mu Yerusalem wij nawamp anch, chilay chinech chijim achisadil kudi antu inay, ing, etu tukutunany nchik?
17 Pakwez mulong wa kuyikangesh kupalangesh rusangu riner kudi anf awonsu, chifanyidin etu tuyibabeshany chakwel kangal alondap kand kudi muntu ap umwing mu dijin dia Yesu.”
18 Chawiy amuchirisha Pita nend Yohan mu kapalakany ka dirumburish dijim, ayilej anch: “Kangal walondany ap kulejan kand mu dijin dia Yesu.”
19 Pakwey Pita nend Yohan ayakula anch: “Tongany ayinen anel chitentamin kurutu kwa Nzamb kukuziyilany en kupandakanamu kumuziyil Nzamb.
20 Mulong etu kitukutwishap kulik kulond yom yitwamana ni yitwatesha ayinetu.”
21 Chawiy in chisak cha dirumburish dijim ayibabesha kand kakwau nich usu nakash, chad ayilikishaku. Awiy amana anch chikasiken kuyilej kadimu, mulong antu awonsu ading ni kumushiman Nzamb mulong wa chom chashika.
22 Muntu wokau nich chilay chinech wading ukwet mivu ya kuvadik makum manying ni kusuta. In kwitiyij akat kumwit Nzamb ayinkish kujijaman
23 Chamulikishauku Pita nend Yohan, awiy achirika ku chisak chau, chad ayilej in kwitiyij yom yawonsu yalondau in kupesh ajim ni amakurump.
24 Chateshau in kwitiyij yom yiney, awiy abombakana pamwing, amulembil Nzamb anch: “Mwant, Sakatang wa diur, ni divu, ni karung, ni yom yawonsu yidiamu!
25 Ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila ey wamwinkisha ngakiril wetu David, ndiy kamu kashalapol wey, mazu malonday anch: ‘Ov, mulong wak in michid yikwau akat kujiman? Ov, mulong wak antu akat kumupungan Nzamb chamwamu?
26 Ant a mangand irijeka mulong wa kurish, ni in kutakel akumangana pamwing, mulong wa kumurishikish Chinawej ni Kristu wend Uzizidilau Many.’ ”
27 Adandamena kand kulembil anch: “Mulong chakin Herod ni Pons Pilat akumangena mu musumb winou, pamwing ni in michid yikwau, ni in Isarel, mulong wa kumupompat Yesu, ndiy kamu Kashalapol utumbila wateka ey kwikal Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
28 Awiy akumangana mulong wa kusal yom yawonsu yiwatenchika ey kurutu, ku ukash wey ni ku rusot rey.
29 Chawiy katat Chinawej, tal, mutapu utubabeshinau nich ujim, itwinkisha etu atushalapol ey ukash wa kulond dizu diey wakad wom.
30 Onan chikas chey mulong wa kwokan, pan ukash chakwel yilay ni yom yikwamushena yisadik mu dijin dia Yesu Kashalapol wey utumbila.”
31 Chapwishau kulembil, ndond yakumangenau yanyikeka. Awiy awonsu izula ni Mwiku Utumbila, chad asambisha kulejan mazu ma Nzamb wakad wom.
0 In kwitiyij akat kwanganijan mapit mau
32 Chisak cha in kwitiyij ading mu umwing mu manangu nj mu michim. Kwikil muntu walonda anch: “Yom yinipitina yidi yamam amwinam ya pa kampwil,” pakwez awonsu anganijananga yom yadingau akwet.
33 Atwimbuy a You alejananga nich ukash ujim uman wa kuvumbuk kwa Nsalejau Yesu, chad Nzamb wayiyukisha awonsu nakash.
34 Kwikil muntu wa pakach pau wading uburedin chom. Antu awonsu a chisak chinech akweta yir ap yikumbu ading ni kuyilandish, chad aleta nfalang jalandishau yom yiney
35 kudi atwimbuy a Yesu. Nfalang jinej ajanganijananga kudi muntu ni muntu mudi mudia kuswir kwend.
36 Mwamu mwasalay Josef mwin Levi wavadikina mu ditung dia Shipre. Atwimbuy a Yesu amupila anch, Barnabas, charumburik anch, mwin kukasikesh in kwitiyij.
37 Ndiy walandisha chir chend, waleta nfalang kudi atwimbuy a Yesu.
0 Ananias nend Safira
1 Kwading muntu umwing dijin diend Ananias, ni mukajend Safira, alandisha chir chau.
2 Pakwez ndiy wovijana ni mukajend, chad wajindjik chikunku cha nfalang, chad jashalaku ndiy wajitwala kudi atwimbuy a Yesu.
3 Pita wamwela anch: “Ananias, ov, mulong wak witiyanga Sakudimban kwandam mu muchim wey, chakwel ulonda yom ya makasu kudi Mwiku Utumbila piwajindjikanga nfalang jiwalandishanga chir chey?
4 Piwadia kand kal ulandish chir chad ichey, ni piwachilandishina, nfalang jadi kand ijey. Ing, mulong wak watongila kusal chom chiyimp mwamu? Kiwalondilap yom ya makasu kudi muntu, pakwez ey walondil yom ‘ya makasu kudi Nzamb!”
5 Chateshay Ananias mazu minam, pawiy pinipa kamu wawa, wafa. Antu awonsu atesha rusangu riner ova wom nakash.
6 Chad ansangarum eza, auvung mujimbu wend mu maswin, amubudish pol, aya akamujik.
7 Chipasuta mudi yisu yisatu, mband wa Ananias wandama wakad kwijik yom yasutanga kal.
8 Pita wamwipula niyend anch: “Nleja bil, ov, jinej jawiy nfalang jawonsu jiwalandishinanya chir nend nfumwey?” Ndiy wamwakula anch: “Mwaning, jawiy jinej jawonsu.”
9 Chawiy Pita wamwela anch: “Ov, mulong wak cy ni nfumwey watonginanya kumupak Mwiku Utumbila? Ansangarum amujikanga nfumwey adi ku chis oku, akukutwal niyey!”
10 Pawiy kamu pinipa, ndiy wawila ku mend ma Pita, wala, Ansangarum andama, amutan wafang kal, awiy amusenda, amubudish pol, aya akamujik piswimp ni nfumwend,
11 In Chikumbu cha Nzamb awonsu, ni antu akwau awonsu chateshau rusangu riner, ova wom nakash.
0 Atwimbuy Yesu akat kusal yilay ni yom yivud yikwamushena
12 Atwimbuy a Yesu asala yilay ni yom yivud yikwamushena pakach pa antu. In kwitiyij awonsu akumangenanga mwi nzevil ya Salomon.
13 Ap anch antu akwau alondangap nchik anch in kwitiyij adi antu awamp, kwikil muntu mukwau wakad kwitiyij watonga kubombakan nau.
14 Amakundj ni amband avud nakash amwitiyija Nsalejetu, chad iwejaku ku chisak cha in kwitiyij.
15 Mulong wa yilay yasalangau atwimbuy a Yesu, antu ayiletanga ayej mu mikombil, ayiladik pa maulal ni pa yikang chakwel pakusutay Pita mwizuzwimb wend ukutwish kuyipukunaku ayej amwing.
16 Kwading kand antu avud adiokala mu mal manyingumukina musumb wa Yerusalem, ayileta ayej ni antu akweta ayilembil. Chawiy awonsu ayerika.
0 Akat kuyizengol atwimbuy a Yesu
17 Chad mwin kupesh mujim ni antu awonsu adingay nend ading ching a chisak cha Asadus. Awiy ayovila atwimbuy a Yesu mukau, chad atonga kuyisal chom chiyimp.
18 Awiy ayikwata atwimbuy a Yesu, ayitek mu rukan.
19 Pakwez dichuku dinidia uchuku, muruu wa mwiur wa Chinawej wizurila yis ya rukan, wayibudish atwimbuy a Yesu, chad wayileja anch:
20 “Yangany, wimanany mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, uyilejany antu awonsu rusangu riner ra mwom usu.”
21 Atwimbuy a Yesu aziyila, chikwacha pamanch andama mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, asambish kulejan. Mwin kupesh mujim, pamwing ni antu adingay nend, ayitumesha amakurump awonsu au in Yuda chakwel akumangan awonsu ku dirumburish dijim. Chad awiy atumana ku rukan mulong wa kuyilet atwimbuy a Yesu.
22 Pakwez chashikau atulam mu rukan, ayitana atwimbuy a Yesu mwamwamu, chad awiy achirika ku dirumburish dijim, alejan anch:
23 “Pitwashikanga ku rukan, twatanang yis ya kupat nawamp nich atufur, ni atulam awonsu adi alamin yis. Pakwez pitwanzurilanga yis, kitwamutanangamup muntu ap umwing!”
24 Chateshau_ in kupesh ajim ni mukurump wa atulam a Chikumbu cha Nzamb yom yiney, awiy kamanap mwa kulondil, chad asambisha kutong mulong wa yom yasuta kudi atwimbuy a Yesu.
25 Chawiy kweza muntu umwing, wandam, wayilej anch: “Teshany! Antu watekinanya mu rukan adi mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, akat kuyilej antu!”
26 Chawiy mukurump wa atulam waya pamwing ni atulam end, ayilet atwimbuy a Yesu. Atulam kayikwatap ku usu mulong ova wom anch: “Ap antu ez atwas etu mayal.”
27 Awiy ayileta atwimbuy a Yesu ku dirumburish dijim, chad mwin kupesh mujim wayileja anch:
28 “Etu twakujidikanya nakash anch: ‘Kangal kand walejanany mu dijin dia muntu mwinou.’ Pakwez katat talany yom yiwasalanya kal! ln wapalangeshinany kal malejan men mu musumb wawonsu wi Yerusalem, chad usotilany kututwik etu chisend cha rufu rend!”
29 Pita nau atwimbuy akwau a Yesu akula anch: “Tufanyidin kumuziyil Nzamb kupandakan kuyiziyil antu.
30 Yesu wajipanya en, wamupampilany ku mutond uchikakena, Nzamb wa angakiriletu wamuvumbula kwikal mwom.
31 Nzamb wamuzambula, wamutek mwi ndond ya katumb ku chikas chend cha katatuk, chakwel ukwikal Mwin Kutakel ni Mupandish mulong wa kuyikwash in Isarel kuman mutapu wa kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau, ni kutambul dilikishin dia yitil.
32 Etu, pamwing ni Mwiku Utumbila, tudi atuman a yom yiney. Mwiku winou ndiy ukat kupanay Nzamb kudi antu amuziyidila.”
33 Chateshau in dirumburish dijim mazu minam, ajimana nakash. Awiy asota kuyijip atwimbuy a Yesu.
34 Pakwez mukach mwau mwading Mufaris umwing, dijin diend Gamaliel, wading mulej wa Yiil, wading kand muntu ulimishinau kudi antu awonsu. Ndiy wimana mukach mwa in dirumburish dijim, wayilej kuyibudish atwimbuy a Yesu pol chisu chikemp.
35 Chad wayileja in dirumburish dijim anch: “Anamakwam in Isarel, babalany ku yom yiusotilanya kuyisal antu inay.
36 Vurikany anch, kwadi muntu umwing, dijin diend Teudas. Ndiy wading mwin kufa mu kan anch: ‘Nidi muntu mujim,’ chad antu mudi yitot yinying ibomba nend. Pakwez amwing amujipa, chad antu awonsu ibombay nau apalangana djimu, kwashalap kand chom.
37 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, niyend Yudas mwin Galalia wamekana pa chisu chachindau antu. Ndiy watazuka chisak cha antu kubombakan nend, pakwez niyend amujipa kand kudi antu amwing, chad antu awonsu abombakanay nau apalangana djimu.
38 Chawiy katat nakulejany anch, kangal wayipompatany antu inay. Yilikishanyaku aya kwau! Anch yom yirijekinau ni yasadilau yidiokil kudi antu, yikez kujiy.
39 Pakwez anch yidiokil chakin kudi Nzamb, kiukutwishanyap kuyikangesh, Palemp ap wez warishany nend Nzamb!” In chisak cha dirumburish dijim itiya chiyul cha Gamaliel.,
40 Ayandjika. kand atwimbuy a Yesu, chad ayibul nfimbu, ayikand chakwel kangal akalond kand mu dijin dia Yesu, Chad ayilikishaku.
41 Atwimbuy a Yesu adiokala ku dirumburish dijim. Awiy asangara nakash mulong Nzamb witiya awiy kuman mar mulong wa kumwambat Yesu.
42 Awiy adandamena pichuku pichuku kulejan mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni mu yikumbu ya antu. Ading ni kulejan ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Yesu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
0 Akat kuyitond antu sambwad in kukwashan
1 Mu machuku minima chisak cha in kwilej a Yesu ehajimba, chad kwading kutadikijan pakach pa in Yuda alondanga rudim ra in Grek nau in Yuda alondanga rudim ra muchid wau. In Yuda alondanga rudim ra in Grek inananga aneh; “Adiaafu etwetu ayidiuwil nakash pakat kwanganangau yom pichuku pichuku.”
2 Chawiy atwimbuy a Yesu dikum ni aad akumangeja chisak chawonsu cha in kwitiyij, ayilej anch: “Etu kitufanyidinap kulik kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb mulong wa kwangan kwau yakudia.
3 Komb mwamu, akadivar, tondany antu sambwad a pakach pen adia antu akin, izwila sens ni Mwiku Utumbila ni manangu chakwel asala mudimu winou.
4 Chad etu tukulembil ni kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb yisu yawonsu.”
5 Yitongijok yiney ya atwimbuy a Yesu yasangarisha chisak chawonsu cha in kwitiyij. Chad amutonda Stefan, muntu wading nich ritiy nakash, wading kand wizwil ni Mwiku Utumbila. Amutonda kand Filip, ni Prokor, ni Nikanor, ni Timon, ni Parmenas, ni Nikola wa ku Antiosh, ndiy wading muntu wa muchid windj, wakarumuka kwikal mwin Yuda.
6 Chisak cha in kwitiyij ayileta antu inay kudi atwimbuy a Yesu, chad ayilembidil ni kuyanzuk makas pa mitu.
7 Chad dizu dia Nzamb diapalangana kwawonsu. Chawiy chisak cha in kwilej chajimba nakash mu Yerusalem, ni in kupesh avud itiyija.
0 Akat kumukwat Stefan
8 Stefan wading wizwil sens nich ranaken ra Nzamb ni ukash. Ndiy wasala yilay yijim ni yom yikwamushena pakach pa antu.
9 Pakwez antu amwing amupompata. Awiy adinga in chikumbu cha kulembil chipidilau anch, Aswik Akwolau Kal. Antu inay ading in Yuda a ku Siren ni a ku Alekizandria. Awiy ibomba ni in Yuda akwau adiokala ku Silisia, ni a mwi ngand ya Aziy. Awonsu pamwing asambisha kutadikijan nend Stefan.
10 Pakwez Mwiku Utumbila wamwinkisha Stefan manangu chakwel anch ndiy walond awiy kakumanap mwa kumwakwil.
11 Chawiy ayifuta antu amwing chakwel amudimben anch: “Twamuteshang muntu mwinou ukat kumulond Moses ni Nzamb nayimp!”
12 Mwamu mwayisarumunau antu, ni amakurump, ni alej a Yijil. Awiy amukwata Stefan, amutwala ku dirumburish dijim.
13 Chad aleta kand antu amwing mulong wa kumutwambil makasu anch: “Muntu mwinou ukat kulond nayimp mulong wa Chikumbu chetu cha Nzamb chitumbila, ni mulong wa Yijil ya Moses.
14 Twamutesha ukat kulond anch: “Win Yesu wa ku Nazaret ou ukez kushesh Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni kukarumun yaku yawonsu yitwatambula kudi Moses!’ ”
15 Antu awonsu adinga ashich mu dirumburish dijim amwichila Stefan mes, chad amana mpal yend yifanaken mudi ya muruu wa mwiur.
0 Mazu malonday Stefan
1 Mwin kupesh mujim wamwipula Stefan anch: “Ov, yom yikufundilau yidi yakin?”
2 Stefan wakula anch: “Anamakwam ni atatuku, nteshany. Pakur padingay nshankur wetu Aburaham kand kal aya ni kushakam ku musumb wa Haran, Nzamb wa uyaj wamekana kudi ndiy mwi ngand ya Mesopotamiy.
3 Nzamb wamuleja anch: ‘Shang dijuku diey ni ngand yey, chad uya kwi ngand yinikukuleja.”
4 Chawiy ndiy washa ngand yend, waya ni kushakam ku musumb wa Haran. Pa chisu chafay tatukwend, chad Nzamb wamushemunina Aburaham, wamulet mwi ngand yiushichanya en katat ey.
5 Nzamb kamwinkishap Aburaham pa chisu chinicha ngand yend amwinend, ap kusu kachibar kakemp, bwat. Pakwez Nzamb wamushilamu kupan ngand yiney kudi ndiy ni kudi a majuku mend makeza kwez. Pa chisu chamushilaumu kudi Nzamb, pinipa Aburaham wading kand kal avala mwan.
6 Nzamb wamuleja anch: ‘A majuku mey makeza kwez makez kushakam mwi ngand yau aeny, mwinimwa awiy akez kwikal aswik, akez kuyizengol kudi antu akwau mivu yitot yinying.
7 Pakwez am nikez kuyirumburish antu akeza kuyimesh awiy mar. Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, awiy akez kudiokal mwi ngand yiniya, chad akez kwingifukwil am mwi ndond yiney.’
8 Nzamb wamuleja Aburaham chaku cha kuya ku mukand kwikal chijingidij cha manswik masukay nend. Chawiy Aburaham wamutwala Isak ku mukand pawanyishay machuku chinan, niyend Isak wasala mwamu kudi mwanend Jakob, chad Jakob niyend wasala mwamu kudi anend dikum ni aad, awiy kamu angakiril a michid yetu.
9 “An amakundj a Jakob amwovila mwanchau Josef mukau, chad amulandish kudi antu, awiy amutwala mu Idjibit mudi muswik. Pakwez Nzamb wading nend,
10 wamuchidija mu mar mend mawonsu. Nzamb wamutapisha Josef dilau, wamwinkish kand manangu kurutu kwa mwant wa in Idjibit, chad mwant wamuteka nyikel wa ngand, ni kwikal kand mwin kutakel wa chikumbu cha mwant.
11 Chawiy mwi ngand ya Idjibit, ni ya Kanan, mwashika kamungun mukash, wayimesh antu mar nakash. Angakiriletu kamanap kwa kulandil yakudia,
12 Chad Jakob chovay anch mwi ngand ya Idjibit mudi yakudia, ndiy wayituma anend amakundj kuya weny wau wa kusambish kwinikwa, awiy kamu angakiriletu.
13 Weny wau wa kaad Josef wiyijikisha kudi anamakwend, chad mwant wa in Idjibit niyend wijika rusangu ra dijuku dia Josef.
14 Chawiy Josef watuma dizu kumutazuk tatukwend chakwel eza mu Idjibit, pamwing ni dijuku diawonsu. Awly ading makum sambwad ni antu atan.
15 Chad Jakob waya mwi ngand ya Idjibit, kwawiy kwinikwa kwafilay ndiy ni anend amakundj.
16 Yital yau ayitwala ku Sikem, kwawiy kwinikwa kwayijikau mwi nzay yalanday Aburaham nich nfalang kudi in dijuku dia Hamor.
17 “Pichashikena chisu chawanyishay Nzamb kushilamu kwamushilayimu Aburaham, in muchid wetu avulijana nakash mu Idjibit,
18 djat ni paswanay mwant mukwau mwinimwa wakad kumulimish Josef.
19 Ndiy wayidimba angakiriletu, wayizengol nakash, wayibachika nich usu kuyiladik anau pol chakwel afa.
20 Pa chisu chinicha chawiy chavadikay Moses, wading mwan wa ufun nakash ku mes kwa Nzamb. Amulila mu chikumbu cha tatukwend angond asatu.
21 Chamudioshau mu chikumbu, mwan mband wa mwant wamunona, chad wamulil kwikal mudi mwanend wa pa kampwil.
22 Amuleja manangu mawonsu ma in Idjibit, ndiy wikala muntu mujim mu yom yawonsu yalondangay ni yom yawonsu yasalangay.
23 “Pawanyishay Moses mivu ya kuvadik makum manying, ndiy watonga kuya kwijik mutapu ushichau anamakwend in Isarel.
24 Ndiy wamana mwanamakwend umwing akat kumubul kwa kumujip kudi mwin Idjibit. Chawiy Moses waya wamukwash mwin Isarel, wamujip mwin Idjibit mulong wa kumufundakeshin.
25 Ndiy watongijoka anch, anamakwend in Isarel akwijik anch, Nzamb ukez kuyikamunin ku usu wendendiy Moses, pakwez awiy kovap kwau.
26 Chikwacha, ndiy wayimana in Isarel aad akat kurish, ndiy wapakisha kuyamburil. Ndiy wayela anch: ‘Teshany, en uvarakenany, Ov, mulong wak urishinany mwamu?’
27 Pakwez umwing wading ni kumumesh mukwau mar wamubachika Moses, wamwel anch: ‘Ov, nany wakuteka ey kwikal nkalansambu ni mwin kutakel wetwetu?
28 Ov, ey usotil kwinjip am mudi muwamujipina mwin Idjibit nangalosh?’
29 Pateshay Moses yom yiney, ndiy wachina, wadiokal mu Idjibit, waya wakashakam mwi ngand ya Madian. Kwinikwa wavadilaku an amakundj aad.
30 “Chipasuta mivu makum manying, muruu wa mwiur wamekana kudi Moses mu mizwizu ya kasu kading ni kulabuk mu chifukis. Yom yiney yamekana mwi mpay piswimp ni mukandu wa Sinay.
31 Moses washimwoka nakash pamanay yom yiney, chad waseja piswimp ni ku chifukis mulong wa kuman nawamp. Pakwez watesha dizu dia Chinawej anch:
32 ‘Am yam Nzamb wa angakiriley, am yam Nzamb wa Aburaham, ni wa Isak, ni wa Jakob.’ Moses wazala wom, katwishap kand kutalaku.
33 Chinawej wamweltt anch: ‘Diosh yisapat ku mend yey, mulong ndond yiwiminya yidi ya divu ditumbila.
34 Am namen kal mar ma antwam adia mu Idjibit. Nateshil kal kudil kwau, katat nez kal pansh mulong wa kuyikamunin. Chifanyidin katat am nikutum ey kuya ku Idjibit.’
35 “Moses winou ndiy walikau kudi anamakwend in Isarel. Ndiy wipulau anch: ‘Ov, nany wakuteka ey kwikal nkalansambu ni mwin kutakel wetwetu?’ Ndiy kamu winou watumay Nzamb kuyiyikel in Isarel, ni kuyikamunin nich ukwash wa muruu wa mwiur wamekana kudi ndiy mu mizwizu ya kasu kading kulabuk mu chifukis.
36 Ndiy wayidiosha in Isarel mwi ngand ya Idjibit. Wasala yilay ni yom yikwamushena mu Idjibit, ni ku Karung Usuz, ni mwi mpay mivu makum manying.
37 Ndiy kamu Moses winou wayileja in Isarel anch: ‘Nzamb ukez kukutuminany muruu wend mudi mwantumay kand am, ndiy ukez kwikal umwing wa muchid wen.’
38 Ndiy kamu Moses winou wakumangananga nau in Isarel mwi mpay. Ndiy wading nau angakiriletu pamwing, wading kand pamwing ni muruu wa mwiur wamulejanga ku mukandu wa Sinay. Ndiy watambula mazu ma mwom ma Nzamb mulong wa kumapan kudi etu.
39 “Pakwez angakiriletu alika kwau kumuziyil. Awiy amubachikina kuns, asota kand kuchirik mwi ngand ya Idjibit.
40 Chawiy amuleja Aron anch: “Tusadila akish akututakela. Kitwijap chom ik chashika kal kudi muntu ou Moses watudiosha mwi ngand ya Idjibit.’
41 Pa chisu chinicha asala chirumbidij cha mukish chifanakena mudi ikwal a ngomb. Awiy amupesha, asal musambu wa kutumbish chom chasalau ayinau.
42 Chawiy Nzamb wayomba nyim, wayilik kwifukwil atutumbu a mwiur, mudi mwafundau mu mukand wa aruu a Nzamb anch: ‘En in Isarel! Kiyamap wajipolanganya annam ni kwimpesh miva makum manying mwi mpay, bwat.
43 Pakwez en wasendanganya mwinkand wa mukish Molok, ni chirumbidij cha mukish wa katumbu, upidilau anch, Refan. Yawiy yirumbidij yiwasalanya ya kwifukwil. Winou wawiy mulong unikeza kukutwadilany mu winkwal ushad wa ngand ya Babilon wa.’ ”
44 Stefan wadandamena kulond anch: “Angakiriletu ading akwet mwinkand mwalaminangau yom ya manswik mwi mpay. Ausala mudi mwamulejau Moses kudi Nzamb, ausala mudi kamu chilikej chamulejau Moses kudi Nzamb.
45 Kwinyi kwa yom yiney, angakiril autambula_ kudi atatukwau, Ausenda chisu chayitakelau kudi Joshua payau ni kukwat ngand ya in michid yikwau yayopatinau kudi Nzamb. Mwinkand washakama mwi ngand yiniya djat ni pa chiruny cha David.
46 Ndiy watapa dilau kudi Nzamb, chad wamwit usu wa kumutungil ndiy chikumbu, ndiy kamu Nzamb wa Jakob.
47 Pakwez wading Salomon, ndiy wamutungila chikumbu.
48 "Pakwez Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu kakushakamangap mu yikumbu yitungilau kudi antu, mudi mulondilay muruu wa Nzamb anch:
49 'Chinawej ulondil anch: Diur diawiy ditand diam, chad ngand yawiy chipwan cha kwanzuk mend. Ov, chikumbu cha mutapu ik chiukwintungilanya am? Ov, ndond ik yinikutwisha am kwiswedishin?
50 Ov, kiyamap natanga yom yiney yawonsu?’ ”
51 Chad Stefan wadandamena kand kulond anch: “En udiany antutichinchikinanya, michim yen yidi mudi ya antu akad kumwijik Nzamb, ujikinany matu wakad kuteshany dizu dia Nzamb! Udiany kamu mudi angakirilen, mulong niyen ukat kumulikany Mwiku Utumbila machuku mawonsu!
52 Ov, kwading muruu wa Nzamb ap umwing walikau kuzengol kudi angakirilen? Awiy ayijipa aruu’a Nzamb alondanga pakur anch: ‘Kashalapol wend utentamina ukez kwez.’ Chawiy katat en wamutungunany matungu, wamujipany.
53 En yen kamu watambulanya yijil ya Nzamb yalejanau kudi aruu a mwiur, ap mwamwap nchik en walikany kuyiziyil!”
0 Akat kumujip Stefan nich mayal
54 Chateshau in dirumburish dijim mazu ma Stefan, ajimana nakash, chad amwisumodila pa mazeu nich ujim.
55 Pakwez Stefan wizula ni Mwiku Utumbila, watal mes mwiur, waman uyaj wa Nzamb ni Yesu wiminy ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb.
56 Ndiy walonda anch: “Talany! Nimen diur dianzurikin, chad Mwan a Muntu wiminy ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb!”
57 In dirumburish dijim abaroka nakash, ajika matu mau nich makas. Chad awonsu amuwila pamwing,
58 amubachok, amutwal pol pa musumb, amwas mayal. Atuman asha atubwik au kudi nsand umwing, dijin diend Saul, mulong wa kuyilam.
59 Awiy adandamena ni kumwas Stefan mayal palembilay anch: “Nsalejam Yesu, tambul mupim wam!”
60 Stefan wasa manungun pansh, wabarik nich dizu dikash anch: “Nsalejam! Yilikishina chitil chinech!” Chapwishay kulond mwamu, chad wafa.
1 Saul wittya anch, chawap chamujipau.
0 Saul ukat kuyimesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb mar
0 Pa dichuku dinidia kamu, asambisha kuyimesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a mu Yerusalem mar nakash. Ayipalangesha in kwitiyij awonsu, achinyina djimu mu makunku ma ngand ya Yudeya ni ya Samaria. Ching kusu atwimbuy a Yesu, awiy ashala.
2 Antu amwing akin amujika Stefan, amwadila ntand, amudil nakash.
3 Pakwez Saul wikasikesha, wapakish kushesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Wandamanga chikumbu ni chikumbu, mulong wa kuyidadamijan in kwitiyij, amakundj ni amband, kuyibudish pol, chad wayidjibwil mu rukan.
0 Filip ukat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp mwi ngand ya Samaria
4 Kwawonsu kwayipalangeshinau in kwitiyij, awiy ading ni kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb.
5 Filip waya mu musumb ujim wa ngand ya Samaria, kwinikwa ndiy wayirumburila antu rusangu ra Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
6 Yisak ya antu ata matu ni kumutesh Filip nawamp pamanau yilay yasalay.
7 Ayilembil avud adiokola mu antu ni kubarok nich mazu makash. A yej a tulip ni ayilim avud ayeroka.
8 Chawiy mu musumb winou mwading musangar ujim.
9 Mu musumb winou mwading kand muntu, dijin diend Simon, ndiy wading ni kuyishimwokish in Samaria nich yip yend yasalangay. Ndiy wafanga mu kan anch udi mujim.
10 Antu awonsu, amakurump ni anikanch, atanga matu ni kumutesh. Awiy alondanga anch: “Muntu mwinou ukwet ukash wa Nzamb upidilau anch, Ukash Ujim.”
11 Awiy atanga matu ni kumutesh, mulong wading ni kuyikashimwish machuku mavud nich yip yend.
12 Pakwez amakundj ni amband pitiyijau Rusangu Ruwamp ra Want wa Nzamb ni ra Yesu Kristu ralonday Filip, ayibatisha.
13 Niyend Simon witiyija, amubatish. Chad wamulamata Filip, ndiy wading ni kushimwok pamanangay yom yijim ya kushimwok ni yilay yasalangay Filip.
14 Atwimbuy a Yesu adinga mu Yerusalem atesha anch, in Samaria itiyij kal mazu ma Nzamb, chad amutuma Pita ni Yohan kuya kwinikwa.
15 Chashikau kwinikwa, ayilembidila in kwitiyij chakwel Mwiku Utumbila ayishirikin.
16 Ading ayibatiaha kal mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu, pakwez Mwiku Utumbila kand kal ayishirikin.
17 Chawiy Pita ni Yohan ayanzwoka makas, chad Mwiku Utumbila wayishirikina.
18 Simon wamana anch, Nzamb wapan kal Mwiku Utumbila kudi in kwitiyij payanzwokau makas kudi atwimbuy a Yesu. Chamanay mwamu, ndiy wasota kupan nfalang kudi Pita ni Yohan,
19 walonda anch: “Nginkishany niyam ukash winou chakwel muntu mwawonsu unikwanzuka makas, Mwiku Utumbila ukez kumushirikin.”
20 Pakwez Pita wamwakula anch: “Chifanyidin ey kujiy ni nfalang jey pamwing, mulong ey utongil anch ukutwish kuland chiyukish cha kusal nich chinech cha Nzamb nich nfalang!
21 Ey Kiukwetap ndond ap usu wa kusal mudimu winou pamwing ni yetwetu, mulong muchim wey kiutentaminap kurutu kwa Nzamb.
22 Karumuk, diokal ku kuyip kwey kwinoku, chad mulembila Nsalejetu ap ukukulikishin yitongijok yey ya kusal chom chinech.
23 Mulong nimen anch, muchim wey wizwil sens nich ris ruyimp, ey udi kamu muswik wa yitil.”
24 Simon wamwela Pita ni Yohan anch: “Nlembilany, amboku, kudi Nsalejen, chakwel kangal chom ap kusu chimwing cha yom yiwajimbulanganya chishika kudi am.”
25 Chapwishau kumekesh uman wau, ni kurumburil mazu ma Nsalejetu Yesu, Pita ni Yohan achirika ku Yerusalem. Payau mwi njil, arumburilanga Rusangu Ruwamp mu mal mavud ma in Samaria.
0 Filip nend mukurump wa ku Etiopi
26 Muruu wa mwiur wamuleja Filip anch: “Tumbuk, yang ku mutambu wa kurul kwi njil yidiokila ku Yerusalem yiyila ku Gaza.” Nijil yiney yisutil mwi mpay.
27 Chawiy Filip watumbuka, waya. Mwi njil yiniya mwading mwin Etiopi mwant mband wa in Etiopi. Ntung winou waya ku Yerusalem mulong wa kumwifukwil Nzamb.
28 Katat wading uchirikin kwol kwend. Wading ushich mu ditemb diend, ukat kutang mukand wa Isay, muruu wa Nzamb.
29 Chad Mwiku Utumbila wamuleja Filip anch: “Yang ni kwend kwiswimp ni ditemb dinidia.”
30 Filip waya mau, wamutesh ntung ukat kutang mukand wa Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, chad Wamwipula anch: “Ov, wovil kurumburik kwa yom yiutangina?”
31 Ntung wamwakula anch: “Ov, nikutwish nchik kwov anch kwikil muntu mwin kwinrumburil?” Chad ndiy wamuleja Filip kukandam mu ditemb chakwel ashakam nend pamwing.
32 Wading ni kutang mazu ma Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Ndiy wading mudi mukoku utwadilau mulong wa kumujip, wading mudi mwan a mukoku ukatwilau mavuj wakad kudil. Ndiy kalondap dizu ap dimwing.
33 Amukwatisha usany, alik kumurumburish nich kutentam. Kwikil muntu mukwau ukeza kulond ya a majuku mendendiy makeza kwez kurutu, mulong mwom wend audiosh kal pa mangand.”
34 Ntung wamwipula anch: “Nleja bil, ov, muruu wa Nzamb ulondil ya nany? Ov, ulondil yend amwinend anch ya muntu mukwau?”
35 Chawiy Filip wasambishila pa chikunku chinech cha Mukand wa Nzamb, wamulej djat ni ku Rusangu Ruwamp ra Yesu.
36 Padingau ni kuya mwi njil, ashika pa ndond padinga mem. Chad ntung wamwela anch: “Pinap padi mem, ov, kudi chom chikutwisha kwinkangesh am kutambul dibatish?”
37 [Fjlip wamwela anch: “Ey ukutwish kutambul dibatish anch witiyij nich muchim wey wawonsu.” Ntung wamwela anch: “Nitiyij kal anch, Yesu Kristu ndiy Mwan a Nzamb.”]
38 Ntung walejana kwimik ditemb, chad ndiy ni Filip ashirika, andam mu mem, chawiy Filip wamubatisha.
39 Chatuntukau mu mem, Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb wamusenda Filip. Ntung kamumanap kand kakwau, pakwez wadandamena mu weny wend nich musangar nakash.
40 Filip wamana anch: “Nashikang kal ku musumb wa Azot.” Chad walejana Rusangu Ruwamp mu mal mawonsu masutay pa kuya ku Sezarey.
0 Kukarumuk kwa Saul
1 Pa chisu chinicha Saul wadandamena kuyifunyin in kwilej a Nsalejetu Yesu mulong wa kuyijip. Ndiy waya kudi mwin kupesh mujim,
2 wamwipul mikand ya kuya nich ku yikumbu ya kulembil ya ku musumb wa Damas. Wasala mwamu mulong wa kuyikimb amakundj ni amband alondwila njil ya Nsalejetu Yesu chakwel ukuyikwat, wayikas, chad wayilet ku Yerusalem.
3 Chasejay Saul piswimp ni ku musumb wa Damas, kukashimuk, mulayilay wadiokala mwiur, wamwombamu.
4 Ndiy wawa pansh, chad watesha dizu diamwel anch: “Saul, Saul! Ov, mulong wak ey ukat kwinzengol am?”
5 Ndiy wakula anch: “Nsalejam, ov, yey nany?” Dizu diamwakula anch: “Yam Yesu ukata kuzengol ey
6 Katat tumbuk, yang mu musumb, mwinimwa mudi muntu ukeza kukulej ey yom yiufanyidina kusal.”
7 Antu ading ayilay nend imana djik wakad kulond divu Awiy atesha dizu, pakwez kamumanap muntu.
8 Saul wa lanka, waburil ku mes, pakwez katwishap kuman, Awiy amukwata ku chikas, amutwal mu Damas.
9 Walala machuku masat Wakad kutwish kuman. Mu machuku minima kadiap chom ap kuna, bwat.
10 Mu Damas mwading muntu umwing, dijin diend Ananias, wading mwin kumwitiyij Yesu. Nsalejetu Yesu wamuleja mu chishimushimu anch: “Ananias!” Ndiy wamwakula anch: “Nsalejam, yam unou.”
11 Nsalejetu wamuleja anch: “Tumbuk, uya mu mukombil upidilau anch, Mukombil Utentamina, uyang ku chikumbu cha Yuda, ukamwipul muntu umwing wa ku musumb wa Taris, dijin diend Saul, ukumutan ukat kulembil.
12 Saul wading wamanang kal muntu mu chishimushimu, dijin diend Ananias, ukat kwez kudi ndiy mulong wa kumwanzuk makas chakwel amana kand.”
13 Ananias wamwakula Yesu anch: “Nsalejam, antu avud anlejin kal mulong wa muntu mwinou, ndiy wasadil kal yom yiyimp kudi antwey adia mu Yerusalem.
14 Chawiy ndiy wezil mu musumb winou nich ulabu umwinkishinau kudi in kupesh ajim, mulong wa kuyikwat antu awonsu akata kukwifukwil ey.
15 Nsalejetu wamuleja anch: “Yang, mulong am namutond kal ndiy kwinsadil am chakwel ukutwish kwijikish dijin diam kudi in michid yikwau, ni kudi ant, ni kudi in Isarel.
16 Am amwinam nikez kumulej mar mawonsu makumanay mulong wa kwingambat am.”
17 Chawiy Ananias waya, wandam mu chikumbu mwadingay Saul, chad wamwanzuka makas, wamwel anch: “Mwanamakwam Saul, Nsalejam wantumang, ndiy kamu Yesu amwinend wamekana kudi ey mwi njil piwadia wezil kunoku. Ndiy wantumanga am chakwel ey ukutwish kuman kand, chakwel kand Mwiku Utumbila ukukushirikin.”
18 Pawiy pinipa kamu yom yifanakena mudi makakal yadiokala pa mes ma Saul, ndiy wamana kand. Walanka, chad amubatisha.
19 Chapwishay kudia, usu wachirika kand.
0 Saul ukat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb mu Damas
