0 Saul washakama machuku makemp nau in kwitiyij a mu Damas.
20 Pawiy pinipa kamu ndiy waya mu yikumbu ya j kulembil, wasambisha kurumburil anch, Yesu wading kamu Mwan a Nzamb.
21 Antu awonsu amutesha ading ni kwipulijan anch: “Ov, kindiyap muntu wa mu Yerusalem wadia ni kuyiparol antu in kumwifukwil Yesu? Ov, kezangap kunoku kuyikwat kand antu akata kumwifukwil Yesu mulong wa kuyitwal kudi in kupesh ajim?”
22 Pakwez ukash wa Saul wa kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb wajimba nakash. Warumburila uyakin kudi in Yuda ading Akat kumushi ashicha mu Damas, wawejaku kwidjidjek kwau payilejay anch, Yesu ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
23 Chipasuta machuku mavud, in Yuda akumangana mulong wa kutenchik mutapu wa kumujip Saul,
24 pakwez Saul wova rusangu ra mpung yamupunganau. Ading achingedil ku yis ya musumb muten ni uchuku mulong wa kumujip.
25 Pakwez dichuku dimwing uchuku, in kwilej a Saul amuteka mu musans, amusutishin pa rubumbu ra mpwembu, chad amushirishin pol pa musumb.
0 Saul ukat kuchirik ku Yerusalem
26 Chashikay Saul mu Yerusalem, wapakisha kwibomb nau in kwilej-a Yesu. Pakwez awly kitiyap anch niyend udi mwin kwilej. Awiy awonsu amwova wom.
27 Pakwez Barnabas ndiy wamukwasha, wamutwal kudi atwimbuy a Yesu, wayirumburil anch: “Saul wamumana Nsalejetu mwi_ njil, chad Nsalejetu wambamba nend. Chikwau kand, Saul wading ni kurumburil dijin dia Yesu mu musumb wa Damas wakad wom.”
28 Chawiy Saul washakama nau, chad wading ni kwendangan mu Yerusalem mwawonsu, warumburilanga mazu ma Nzamb mu dijin dia Nsalejend wakad kwov wom.
29 Ndiy wambambanga ni kutadikijan nau in Yuda ading ni kulond rudim ra win Grek, pakwez niyau amupungananga mulong wa kumujip.
30 Chateshau in kwitiyij chom chinech, awiy aya nend ku musumb wa Sezarey, chad amutum kuya ku musurnb wa Taris.
31 Chawiy mwamu pa chirung chinicha in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a kwi ngand ya Yudeya, ni ya Galalia, ni ya Samaria ashakama mu chisambu. In Chikumbu cha Nzamb amulimisha Nsalejau, chad Mwiku Utumbila wayikasikesha ni kuyikwash kuvulijan.
0 Pita ukat kusal yilay mu ul wa Lid ni mu musumb wa Yopa
32 Pita watambitamba kwawonsu, chad dichuku dimwing ndiy waya ni kuyital in kwitiyij adinga mu ul wa Lid.
33 Kwinikwa wamutanaku muntu umwing, dijin diend Eneye, wading uyedil musong wa kalip mivu chinan wakad kulank pa ulal.
34 Pita wamwela anch: “Eneye, katat Yesu Kristu wakwok kal. Lank, urijek ulal wey.” Pawiy pinipa kamu Eneye walanka.
35 Antu awonsu ading ashicha mu ul wa Lid, ni ashicha mu chan cha Saron, amumana, chad awiy akarumuka, amwitiyij Nsalejetu.
36 Mu musumb wa Yopa mwading mband umwing mwin kwitiyij, dijin diend Tabita. Mu win Grek ading amupidil anch, Dorkas, charumburik anch, nkay. Ndiy wading ni kusal midimu yiwamp yisu yawonsu, wading kand ni kuyikwash atuzwendj.
37 Pa chisu chinicha ndiy wayela, chad wafa. Ading amwoyishang kal, chad amuladika mu kapalakany ka piur.
38 Musumb wa Yopa kwadingap kulemp ni ul wa Lid. Chateshau in kwitiyij a ku Yopa anch Pita udi ku Lid, awiy amutumina antu aad kumulej anch: “Twilemb, amboku, ez kamu swa.”
39 Chawiy Pita watumbuka, waya nau. Chashikay kwinikwa, amutwala mu kapalakany ka piur. Adiaafu awonsu amwombamu, oku akat kudil, chad amulejola yikut ni tubwik yachimangay Dorkas pachadingay mwom.
40 Pita wayibudisha awonsu mu kapalakany, chad wasap manungun, walembil. Chawiy wakarumuk, watal ku chital, walond anch: “Tabita, lank!” Tabita waburila ku mes, chad chamumanay Pita, walank, washakam.
41 Pita wamukwataku, wamutumbwish, chad wayitazuk in kwitiyij awonsu, pamwing nau adiaafu, wayilejay Tabita anch udi mwom.
42 Rusangu riner rapalangana mu Yopa mwawonsu, chad antu avud amwitiyija Nsalejetu.
43 Pita washakama machuku mavud mu Yopa ku chikumbu cha Simon mwin kurijek yikit.
0 Pita uyil kwambamb nend Korney
1 Mu Sezarey mwading muntu umwing, dijin diend Korney, wading kalal wa amasalay chitot au in Rom. Chisak cha amasalay chinech chading chidiokil kwi ngand ya Itali.
2 Korney wading muntu muwamp, mwin kumwifukwil Nzamb pamwing ni dijuku diend diawonsu. Ndiy wasalanga Misong ya yikumbu yalalela ya mu Palestin mudimu nakash wa kuyikwash atuzwendj au in Yuda, chad wading ni kumulembil Nzamb yisu yawonsu.
3 Dichuku dimwing pa muten wa yisatu wa urel ndiy wamumana muruu wa mwiur patok mu chishimushimu. Chad muruu wa mwiur wandama, wamwel anch: “Korney!”
4 Ndiy wamutala muruu wa mwiur neeng nich wom, wamwipul anch: “Ov, chom ik chinech, Nsalejam?” Muruu wa mwiur wamwakula anch: “Nzamb ukwet musangar mulong wa kulembil kwey ni midimu ya rukat, chawiy katat usotil kukwakul.
5 Katat tum antu ku Yopa, akamutazuk muntu umwing upidilau anch, Simon Pita.
6 Ndiy udi mweny utudidil ku chikumbu cha Simon mwin kurijek yikit, ushicha ku chikumu cha karung.”
7 Chawiy muruu wa mwiur wadiokala, chad Korney wayitazuka atushalapol aad a mu chikumbu chend, pamwing ni isalay umwing wading muntu muwamp uchingejinay nakash.
8 Korney wayileja yom yawonsu yamushikena, chad wayituma kuya ku Yopa.
9 Chikwacha pamanch, awiy aya. Chashikau piswimp ni ku Yopa, pa chisu chinicha muten wading piswimp ni pakach, chad Pita wandama piur pa chikumbu chalalela mulong wa kulembil.
10 Ndiy wova nzal, wasota chom cha kudia. Pachadingau ni kurijek yakudia, Pita wamana chishimushimu.
11 Ndiy wamana diur dianzurik, chad chom chifanakena mudi diswin dijim dikat kushirik pansh mudi adikwatin ku makonk manying,
12 Mu diswin dinidia mwading annam a mitapu yawonsu, ni yom yawonsu yikata kwikak pansh, ni atujil.
13 Nzamb wamuleja anch: “Pita, lank, ujipa annam inay, uyidia!”
14 Pakwez Pita wamwakula anch; “Nsalejam, bwat kwana! Am kand kal nidiap yom yitakanena ap yijondila mwamu,”
15 Chad Nzamb wamuleja kand anch: “Kangal ey watong anch, yom yiney yitakanen, anch Nzamb walond anch, yom yiney yidi yakudia yishitwila.”
16 Yom yiney yamekana tupamp tusatu, chad chom chifanakena mudi diswin achichirisha kand mwiur.
17 Pachadingay Pita kutongijok mulong wa kurumburik kwa chishimushimu chinech, antu atumay Korney ading ni kwipwol mulong wa kwijik chikumbu cha Simon, chad chashikau ku ehikumbu imana ku chis.
18 Awiy atazuka, ipul anch: “Ov, kunoku kudi mweny umwing, dijin diend Simon Pita?”
19 Pita wachading ni kutongijok mulong wa kurumburik kwa chishimushimu chinech, chad Mwiku Utumbila wamuleja anch: “Tesh! Antu asatu akat kukukimb ey.
20 Chawiy tumbuk, ushirik pansh, kangal wov wom wa kuya nau mulong yam nayituma.’
21 Chawiy Pita washirika pansh, wayilej antu ina anch: Am, yam muntu ukimbilanya. Ov, wezangany mulong wak?
22 Awiy amwakula anch: “Kalal Korney ndiy watutumang. Ndiy udi muntu muwamp, ukat kumwifukwil Nzamb, udi muntu ulimishinau in Yuda awonsu. Muruu wa mwiur wamulejin mulong wa kukutazuk ey kuya kwol kwend chakwel ndiy ukutwish kutesh yom yiukulonda ey.”
23 Pita wayela anch: “Andamany, ulalany kunoku.” Chikwacha pamanch, ndiy watumbuka, waya nau. Chad in kwitiyij amwing a mu Yopa aya nend Pita.
24 Alal mwi njil, chikwacha, ashik ku Sezarey. Kwinikwa Korney wading uyichingedil, pamwing ni anamakwend ni arund nend atazukay.
25 Pelay Pita kwandam, Korney wamusankana, wawa ku mend yend, wamwifukwil.
26 Pakwez Pita wamutumbwisha, wamwel anch: "Iman piur, niyam nidi kwam muntu."
27 Pita wadandamena kwisamb nend Korney pandamay mu chikumbu, mwinimwa watanamu antu avud akumangen.
28 Ndiy wayileja anch: “En ayinen wijany nawamp anch, chidi chijidik kudi mwin Yuda kuya kwambamb, ap kwibomb nau antu a. michid yikwau. Pakwez Nzamb wanlejin am anch, kinifanyidinap kumutong muntu mukwau anch wijondil ap anch utakanen.
29 Chawiy piwantumeshang am, nezil wakad kwidjijek. Chad nikwipul, amboku, ov, mulong wak wantumeshanga?”
30 Korney wakula anch: “Kwasut kal machuku masatu ilel dia chinying, am nading ni kulembil mu chikumbu cham muten wa yisatu urel. Kukashimuk, ikundj udjit maswin mazutina wangimanyinang kal kurutu,
31 chad wangel anch: ‘Korney! Nzamb watesh kal kulembil kwey, waman kal kand midimu yey ya rukat,
32 chawiy mutuma muntu ku Yopa, akamutazuk muntu umwing, dijin diend Simon Pita, eza. Ndiy udi mweny ushich ku chikumbu cha Simon mwin kurijek yikit, ushicha ku chikumu cha karung.’
33 Chawiy chinakutumeshina ey swa, katat wasal kal nawamp chiweza. Katat etu awonsil tudi kurutu kwa Nzamb, tukat kuchingel yom yawonnil yikulejinay Nsalejetu ya kutulej etu.”
0 Mazu malonday Pita mu chikumbu cha Korney
34 Pita wasambisha kulond anch: “Katat am nijik kal anch, Nzamb kakwetap kasolikany pakach pa antu, bwat.
35 Ku michid yawonsu, muntu mwawonsu ukata kumulimish ni kusal yom yitentamina, Nzamb ukat kumwitiy.
36 En wijany rusangu ratumay Nzamb kudi in Isarel, ra kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra chisambu ratuminay mu Yesu Kristu, ndiy kamu udia Nsalejetu wa antu awonsu.
37 En wijany chom chijim chashika pakusambish mwi ngand ya Galalia, chad chapalangan mwi ngand yawonsu ya Yudeya. Chom chinech chamekana papwishay Yohan kurumburil mazu mend ma dibatish.
38 En wijany kand mutapu wamwinkishau Yesu wa ku Nazaret ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila kudi Nzamb. Yesu watambitamba mulong wa kusal midimu yiwamp ni kwok ayej awonsu adinga mu ukash wa Sakudimban, mulong Nzamb wading nend Yesu pamwing.
39 Etu tudi atuman a yom yawonsu yasalay mwi ngand ya in Yuda ni mu musumb wa Yerusalem. Chad awiy amupampila ku mutond ‘uchikakena, amujip.
40 Pakwez chipasuta machuku masatu, Nzamb wamuvumbula, wikal kand mwom. Chad wamekana,
41 pakwez kamekanap kudi antu awonsu, ching kusu kudi atuman atonday kal Nzamb. Charumburik anch, wamekana kudi etu twadinga ni kudia ni kuna nend pa chisu chavumbukay kwikal kand mwom.
42 Ndiy watuleja etu kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi antu, ni kumekesh uman wetu anch, ndiy, kamu winou watondau kudi Nzamb, mulong wa kuyirumburish antu aom ni afu.
43 Aruu a Nzamb awonsu alonda mulong wendendiy, ading ni kulond anch, muntu mwawonsu ukumwitiyija ndiy akez kumulikishin yitil yend ku ukash wa dijin diend.”
0 In michid yikwau akat kutambul Mwiku Utumbila
44 Pachadingay Pita ni kulond, Mwiku Utumbila weza, wayishirikin antu awonsu adinga ni kutesh mazu mend,
45 In Yuda, awiy kamu in kwitiyij eza nend Pita kudiokal ku Yopa, ashimwoka nakash mulong Nzamb wapana chariy chend, ndiy kamu Mwiku Utumbila, kudi antu a michid yikwau.
46 Mulong awiy ayova akat kulond mu jindim jakad kwovakan, chad akiat kushiman kujimb kwa Nzamb. Pita walonda anch:
47 “Antu iniy atambul kal Mwiku Utumbila mudi mutwatambula etu. Ov, nany ukutwisha kuyikangesh kuyibatish nich mem?”
48 Chawiy ndiy walejana chakwel ayibatish mu dijin dia Yesu Krista Chad awiy amwilembila Pita ashakamaku nau machuku
0 Pita ukat kutwal rusangu kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ku Yerusalem
1 Atwimbuy a Yesu ni in kwitiyij akwau a mu Yudeya wtesha anch, antu a michid yikwau amwing niyau atambul kal dizu dia Nzamb.
2 Payay Pita ku Yerusalem, antu adinga ni kutong anch, chifanyidin kuyitwal antu a michid yikwau ku mukand, asambisha kutadikijan nend anch:
3 “Ey wading mweny ushich mu chikumbu cha antu a michid yikwau akad kuya ku mukand, ey wadi ni kudia kand nau.”
4 Chawiy Pita wayirumburila yom yawonsu yasuta kudiokal kwisambishil anch:
5 “Pinadinga ni kulembil mu musumb wa Yopa, namana chishimushimu. Namana chom chikat kudiokal mwiur chifanaken mudi diswin dijim. Dikat kushirik pansh mudi adikwatin ku makonk manying, chad dieza piswimp ni yamam.
6 Natala mukach neeng, namana annam a pol ni annam a mwisuku, ni yom yikata kwikak pansh, ni atujil.
7 Chad Nzamb wanleja anch: ‘Pita, lank, uyijip annam inay, uyidia!’
8 Pakwez namwakula anch: ‘Nsalejam, bwat kwam! Am kand kal nipakap yakudia yijondila ap yitakanena.’
9 Natesha kand dizu dia Nzamb didiokil mwiur anch: ‘Kangal ey watong anch, yom yiney yitakanen anch Nzamb walond anch, yom yiney yidi yakudia yishitwila.’
10 Yom yiney yamekana tupamp tusatu, chad chom chifanakena mudi diswin achichirisha kand mwiur ni yom yawonsu.
11 Pa chisu chinicha kamu antu asatu antuminau kudiokal ku Sezarey ashika ku chikumbu kunading nishich.
12 Mwiku Utumbila wanleja kuya nau pamwing wakad wom. In kwitiyij musamban inay a ku Yopa antwalaku ku Sezarey, chad etu awonsu twandama mu chikumbu cha Korney.
13 Ndiy watuleja mutapu wamumanay muruu wa mwiur wiminy mu chikumbu chend, wamulej anch: ‘Tum muntu ku Yopa, akamutazuk muntu umwing, dijin diend Simon Pita.
14 Ndiy ukukulej mazu ma kukupandish ey, ni dijuku diey, ni antu awonsu udia nau.’
15 Pinasambisha kulond, Mwiku Utumbila wayishirikina awiy, mudi kand mwatushirikinay etu pakusambish.
16 Chad navurika mazu malonday Nsalejetu anch: “Yohan wabatisha antu nich mem, pakwez en akukubatishany ni Mwiku Utumbila.’
17 Chakin kamu, Nzamb wayinkisha antu ina in michid yikwau chariy chend, ndiy kamu Mwiku Utumbila, mudi mwatwinkishay kand etu pitwamwitiyija Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. Ov, am nachadi nany nikutwisha kumukangesh Nzamb kusal mudi musotilay?”
18 Pateshau mazu minam malonday Pita, awiy alika kutadikijan nend, chad amushimana Nzamb, alond anch: “Komb Nzamb wayinkish kal kand in michid yikwau mutapu wa kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau chakwel apand!”
0 In Chikumbu cha Nzamb a kusambish ku Antiosh
19 In kwitiyij azengolau pa chisu chamujipau Stefan apalangana, aya djat ni ku Fenisiy, ni ku ditung dia Shipre, ni ku musumb wa Antiosh. Ading ni kurumburil rusangu ra Yesu Kristu ching kusu kudi in Yuda.
20 Pakwez in kwitiyij akwau, adiokala ku Shipre ni ku musumb wa Siren, niyau aya ku Antiosh, ayileja kand in michid yikwau, ayirumburila Rusangu Ruwamp ra Nsalejetu Yesu.
21 Ukash wa Nzamb wading nau, chad chisak chijim cha antu ipana kudi Nsalejetu, amwitiyij.
22 Rusangu riner rashika kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ku Yerusalem, chad awiy amutuma Barnabas kuya ku Antiosh.
23 Pashikay kwinikwa, ndiy wamana mutapu wayiyukishau antu kudi Nzamb, wasangara nakash, chad wayikasikesha antu awonsu kudandamen nich michim yau yawonsu ni kwikasin kudi Nsalejetu.
24 Barnabas wading muntu utentamina, wizwila sens ni Mwiku Utumbila ni ritiy. Antu avud amwitiyija Nsalejetu.
25 Chad Barnabas waya ku Taris ni kumukimb Saul.
26 Chamutanay, ndiy wamusenda, waya nend ku Antiosh, chad awly awonsu mwaad wau ashakama kwinikwa muvu wakabuj, Akumangananga nau in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ayileja antu avud. Ku Antiosh kwawiy kwinikwa kwasambishinau kuyipil in kwitiyij dijin anch, in Kristu.
27 Mu machuku minima, aruu amwing a Nzamb adiokala ku Yerusalem, aya ku Antiosh.
28 Umwing wau wading Agabus, ndiy wimana, chad ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila wabwaka anch: “Kurutu kukwez kamungun mukash mwi ngand yawonsu.” (Kamungun winou washika pa chirung chadingay Kulod mwant wa in Rom.)
29 Chawiy in kwitiyij a ku Antiosh atonda muntu fi muntu kutum chom mudi mukutwishay kusal, mulong wa kuyikwash anamakwau mu ritiy ashicha mwi ngand ya Yudeyi.
30 Awiy asala mwamu, chad atuma nfalang jau kudi Barnabas nend Saul chakwel ajitwala kudi amakurump a Chikumbu cha Nzamb cha kwinikwa.
0 Akat kupandakesh kuyizengol in kwitiyij
1 Mu machuku minima Herod, mwant wa in Palestin, wasambisha kuyizengol in Chikumbu cha Nzamb amwing.
2 Ndiy wamujipesha Jakobu, yayend a Yohan, kwi mpak ya musamun.
3 Chamanay anch chom chinech chayisangarish kal in Yuda, ndiy waya kand wamukwat Pita. Ndiy wasala chom chinech pa chisu cha musambu wa mabot makad chivish.
4 Chamukwatay Pita, wamuteka mu rukan. Mwinimwa amupana kumulam kudi amasalay a yisak yinying akweta pa chisak chimwing amasalay anying. Herod warijeka mutapu wa kumurumburishin mukach mwa antu pakupwishau musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
5 Chawiy Pita ading amulamidin mu rukan, pakwez in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ading ni kumulembidil nakash kudi Nzamb.
0 Akat kumudiosh Pita mu rukan
6 Uchuku wa dichuku dielay Herod kumubudish mu rukan chakwel amurumburishin mukach mwa antu, Pita wading ulel tul pakach pa atulam aad. Ading amukasin nich jimbwambu jaad, kwading kand amasalay alamina ku chis cha rukan.
7 Kukashimuk, muruu wa mwiur wamekana mwinimwa, chad chimunyik chatokisha mu kapalakany. Muruu wa mwiur wamunyikesha Pita mwi mbavu, wamulangwish, chad wamwel anch: “Swakal! Lank!” Pawiy kamu pinipa jimbwambu jamukasau jasubwoka ku makas mend.
8 Chad muruu wa mwiur wamuleja anch: “Kas nshipu, udjala yisapat yey.” Pita wasala mwamu, chawiy muruu wa mwiur wamuleja kand anch: “Djal kabwik wey, nlondula.”
9 Pita wamulondula, abudik mu rukan, pakwez Pita kijikap anch, chom chisadilay muruu wa mwiur chidi chakin. Ndiy watongijoka anch umen kwend chishimushimu.
10 Awiy asuta chisak cha amasalay cha kusambish, asut kand chisak cha kaad, chad ashika ku chis cha utad chitadila mu musumb. Chis chanzurika ichinach, chad awiy abudik. Padingau ayil mu mukombil, kukashimuk, muruu wa mwiur waya, wamusha Pita amwinend.
11 Pajinguninay Pita yom yamushikena, ndiy walonda anch: “Katat nijik kal anch, komb yom yanshikenanga yadi yakin! Nzamb ndiy watuma muruu wend wa mwiur mulong wa kwinkamunin mu makas ma Herod, ni ku yom ya yedilau kwinsal kudi in Yuda.” ea frase
12 Pijikay yom yamushikena, ndiy waya ku chikumbu eli Marty, makwend wa Yohan, upidilau kand anch, Marko Kwinikwa kwawiy kwakumangenau antu avud mulong wa kulembil.
13 Pita wakokala ku chis cha pol, chad mwilomb umwing, dijin diend Rod, waya ku chis,
14 Ndiy wajingunina anch, didi dizu dia Pita, chad wasangara nakash, wachirik mu chikumbu wakad kumwanzuril chis. Ndiy wayileja antu awonsu anch: “Pita wiminy pol ku chis oku!”
15 Awiy amwela anch: “Ey changadim, ey uyedil rangul!” Pakwez ndiy wakasikesha anch: “Nilondil kamu chakin.” Chad awiy amwakula anch: “Winou udi muruu wend wa mwiur.”
16 Padingau ni kulond yom yiney, Pita wadandamena kukokal ku chis. Chad kwinyim, amwanzurila ku chis. Chamanau anch ndiy kamu, awiy ashimwoka nakash.
17 Pita wayinenetisha nich chikas chakwel ikuchik bil zong, chad ndiy wayirumburila mutapu wamubudishangau mu rukan kudi Nzamb. Wayileja anch: “Mulejanyamu niyend Jakobu ni_ in kwitiyij akwau.” Chawiy ndiy wayisha, waya kwi ndond yikwau.
18 Chikwacha pamanch, kwading mulong ujim kudi amasalay ading amulamina Pita. Awiy ipulijana anch: “Ov, Pita udi kwisu?”
19 Herod walejana mulong wa kumukimb Pita, pakwez kamumanap. Chawiy ayirumburisha amasalay, chad Herod walejana kuyijip. Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, Herod wadiokala mwi ngand ya Yudeya, waya ku musumb wa Sezarey, wakashakamaku.
0 Rufu ra Herod
20 Herod wayijimena in Tir ni in Sidon nakash, chawiy antu inay ovijana chisak mulong wa kuya kumanijan nend. Pakusambish amulembijeka Blastus, kashalapol wa mu chikumbu cha kulal cha mwant chakwel ayikwasha. Chad aya kudi Herod ni kumwit chakwel kwikala chisambu, mulong yakudia yau yadiokalanga mwi ngand ya mwant.
21 Pa dichuku diatonday Herod, ndiy wadjala maswin ma want, washakam pa ditand diend. Chad wasambisha kulond kudi antu.
22 Chad niyau antu asambisha kubarok anch: “Dined kididiap dizu dia muntu, au mukwen mukish au!”
23 Pawiy kamu pinipa, muruu wa mwiur wamubula Herod, mulong ndiy kamutumbishap Nzamb. Chad atupwapu a mwivumu amudia, wafa.
24 Pa chisu chinicha dizu dia Nzamb diapalangana, diaya ni kujimb pakach pa antu.
25 Barnabas nend Saul apwisha midimu yau mu Yerusalem, chad adiokula kwinikwa. Amusend Yohan upidilau anch, Marko, aya nend.
0 Mwiku Utumbila ukat kumutond Barnabas nend Saul mulong wa kuyitum
1 Mukach mwa in Chikumbu cha Nzamb cha ku Antiosh mwading aruu a Nzamb amwing ni alej. Majin mau mading, Barnabas, ni Simeyon, upidilau anch, muntu mujal, ni Lusius wa ku Siren, ni Manaken, wakula pamwing nend nyikel Herod, ni Saul.
2 Padingau ni kwifukwil ni kujil yakudia, Mwiku Utumbila wayileja anch: “Mupanany Barnabas nend Saul kudi am chakwel asala mudimu wim unayitazukina kusal.
3 Chawiy ajila yakudia ni kulembil, ayanzuk makas, chad ayitum aya.
0 Barnabas nend Saul akat kuya ku Shipre
4 Mwiku Utumbila wayituma Barnabas nend Saul aya ku musumb wa Selesiy. Kwinikwa andama mu waat wa mu karung, aya ku ditung dia Shipre.
5 Chashikau ku musumb wa Salamin, awiy arumburila mazu ma Nzamb mu yikumbu ya kulembil ya in Yuda. Awiy amusenda Yohan Marko mulong wa kusal nend mudimu.
6 Auka ditung diawonsu, ashik ku musumb wa Pafos. Kwinikwa amutanaku mwin Yuda umwing, dijin diend Bar Yesu, wading mwin kusal yip. Ndiy wafanga mu kan anch: “Nidi muruu wa Nzamb.”
7 Wading murund nend wa nyikel wa ditung, mwin manangu nakash, dijin diend Serigius Paulus. Chad nyikel wayitazuka Barnabas nend Saul kwez mulong wa kumurumburil mazu ma Nzamb.
8 Pakwez ayikangesha kudi mwin kusal yip winiwa, ndiy kamu Bar Yesu, upidilau mu win Grek anch, Elimas. Ndiy wapakisha kumurumbul nyikel chakwel alik kwitiyij mulong wa mazu ma Nzamb.
9 Chad Saul, upidilau kand anch, Paul, wizula ni Mwiku Utumbila, washinshika kumutal mwin kusal yip neeng,
10 wamwel anch: “Ey wizwil sens nich kudimban ni chisum Ey udi kamu muntu wa Sakudimban. Ey udi mukankuny wa yom yawonsu yiwamp. Ey ukat kuyipish yom yakin ya Nzamb kuyikarumun kwikal yom ya makasu!
11 Katat Nzamb ukez kukufish nich. Ti Ey ukwikal mputames, kiukumanap chimunyik cha muten, ching chisu chatenchikay Nzamb anch chawanyin. Pawiy kamu pinipa mididim yamubwika, mes mend majal bwi, wasambish kupuput mutambu ni mutambu, mulong wa kukimb muntu wa kumukwataku ku chikas chakwel amwendish.
12 Chamanay nyikel chom chinech chashika, ndiy wamwillyij Yesu, mulong washimwoka nakash ku malejan ma Nsalejetu.
0 Barnabas ni Saul akat kuya ku Antiosh wa ku Pisidiy
13 Paul ni akwau adingay nend adiokala ku Pafos, aya ku musumb wa Perij mwi ngand ya Pamfiliy. Kwawiy kwinikwa kwayishau kudi Yohan Marko, chad ndiy wachirika ku Yerusalem.
14 Awiy adiokala ku Perij, aya ku Antiosh wa ku Pisidiy, chad Dichuku dia Kwiswedish andama mu chikumbu cha kulembil, ashakam.
15 Chapwishay mwin kutakel kutang mazu ma Yijil ya Moses ni ma yom yafundau aruu a Nzamb, amakurump a mu chikumbu cha kulembil ayileja dizu anch: “Anamakwetu in Yuda, etu tusotil uyilejanyap antu anch ukwetany mazu ma kuyikasikesh.”
16 Paul wimana, wayinenetish nich chikas, chad walond anch: “Anamakwam in Isarel, niyen antu a michid yikwau awonsu umwifukwidilanya Nzamb kunoku, nteshany!
17 Nzamb wa in Isarel wayitonda anshankuretwetu, wayikadisha muchid ujim pashakamau mwi ngand ya aeny mu Idjibit. Nzamb wayidiosha mwi ngand ya Idjibit nich ukash wend ujim.
18 Ndiy wadandamena nau mwi mpay ap anch awiy amubwambwilap nchik.
19 Chad washesha michid sambwad ya mwi ngand ya Kanan, chawiy wapana ngand yiniya kudi antwend.
20 Yom yiney yasadika mu mivu yitot yinying ni makum matan. “Chad kwinyim kwa yom yiney ndiy wayinkisha ankalansambu kuyitakel djat ni ku chirung cha Samwel, muruu wa Nzamb.
21 Chad pipulau mulong wa kuyinkish mwant, Nzamb wayinkisha Saul, mwan ikundj wa Kis, wa muchid_ wa Benjamin. Ndiy wayiyikela mivu makum manying.
22 Pamudioshau ndiy, Nzamb wamutonda kand David kwikal mwant wau. Pawiy palonday Nzamb anch: ‘Am naman kal David udi muntu wa mutapu unikatila am. Ndiy udi muntu ukeza kusal yom yawonsu mudi mudia rusot ram.’
23 Nzamb wamupana Yesu wa mu a majuku ma David kudi in Isarel kwikal Mupandish wau, mudi mwashilayimu.
24 Padingay Yesu kand kal asambish mudimu wend, Yohan wayirumburila in Isarel awonsu mazu ma Nzamb chakwel akarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau, ayibatish.
25 Padingay Yohan piswimp ni kuwanyish midimu yend, ndiy wayipula antu anch: ‘Ov, en wintongilany anch, am yam nany? Am kinidiap ndiy uchingedilany, Pakwez teshany! Ndiy ukat kwez kwinyim kwam, am kinidiap muwamp uwanyidina kudiosh yisapat yend ku mend yend,'
26 “Anamakwam in Isarel, udiany a a majuku ma Aburaham, niyen antu a michid yikwau awonsu umwifukwidilanya Nzamb kunoku, mazu minam ma dipandish amatumin kudi etu!
27 Mulong ant ashicha mu Yerusalem ni in kutakel au ilsdikcap Daeu anch ndiy Mupandish. Ap konganyinangap mazu ma aruu a Nzamb matangangau mu Machuku mawonsu ma Kwiswedish. Ap mwamwap nchik, awiy awanyisha mazu ma aru Nzamb pamufishau nich Yesu.
28 Ap anch awiy akanganyap nchik kuman mulong wa univer nich kwa kKumujip, awiy amulembijeka Pilat chakwel amujip.
29 Chawanyishau mazu mawonsu mafundau mu Mukand wa Nzamb mulong wendendiy, awiy amudiosha ku mutond uchikakena, amujik mwi nzay.
30 Pakwez Nzamb wamuvumbula kwikal kand mwom.
31 Chad mu machuku mavud ndiy wamekananga kudi antu endangay nau kudiokal mwi ngand ya Galalia, djat ni ku Yerusalem. Katat etu tudi atuman end kudi in Isarel.
32 Tukuletidilany Rusangu riner Ruwamp rashilayimu Nzamb kudi anshankuretu.
33 Pamuvumbulay Yesu kwikal kand mwom, wawiy mutapu wawanyishay Nzamb kushilamu kwend kudi etu a majuku mau. Mwamu mufundilau mu mukand wa Kuseng wa kaad anch: “Ey udi Mwanam ikundj, kudiokal ilel am nidi Tatukwey.’
34 Nzamb walonda anch, ukez kumuvumbul kwikal kand mwom, chad kakez kufap kand ni kuvundil mwi nzay. Ndiy walonda anch: ‘tne ‘Am nikez kukwinkishany yiyukish yakin yitumbila yinashilamu kumwinkish David.’
35 Alonda kand mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: ‘Ey kiukez kwitiyap Kashalapol wey Utumbila kuvundil mwi nzay.’ ” ;
36 Paul wadandamena kulond anch: “David, mu chirung chend, wamusadila Nzamb, chad wafa mudi mwading kutenchik kwa Nzamb, amujika ku jinzay ja angakirilend. Chawiy mujimbu wend wavundila mwi nzay.
37 Pakwez kichadingap mwamu kudi ndiy wavumbulay Nzamb kwikal kand mwom, ndiy kavundilap mwi nzay.
38 Anamakwam, ijikany anch, chidi mulong wa yom yasalay Yesu winou kwawiy tukulejidinany rusangu ra dilikishin dia yitil.
39 Mulong wendendiy, muntu mwawonsu ukwitiyija akez kumukwol ku yitil, yawonsu yakanganyau kukwol ku Yyil ya Moses.
40 Babalany, chamwamu yom yikukushikenany mudi mwalondau aruu a Nzamb anch:
41 “Teshany, en in kudiwolany yom ya Nzamb! Shimwokany kwen, ujiyany! Mulong chom chinisadila ilel kiukutwishanyap kuchitiy, ap anch muntu wakurumburilanyap nchik!’ ”
42 Chabudikay Paul nend Barnabas mu chikumbu eha kulembil, antu ayileja kand kwez Dichuku dikwau dia Kwi. swedish dia kurutu, mulong wa kuyirumburil kand yom yikwau ya rusangu riner.
43 Chapalanganau antu, in Yuda avud, ni antu a michid yikwau avud ading akarumuka kal kwikal in Yuda, amulondula Paul nend Barnabas. Atwimbuy inay a Yesu ambamba nau antu, ayikasikesh chakwel akudandamen mu mwom wa ranaken ra Nzamb.
44 Chidiashikena Dichuku dikwau dia Kwiswedish, antu awonsu a mu musumb winiwa eza mulong wa kutesh mazu ma Nzamb.
45 Chamanau in Yuda yisak yijim ya antu, awiy ova mukau nakash. Atadika mazu malonday Paul, chad amuswingish.
46 Pakwez Paul nend Barnabas akasikesha nakash kulond patok wakad wom anch: “Chifanyidin dizu dia Nzamb adilonda pakusambish kudi en. Pakwez en ukat kudilikany, ukat kwitongany ayinen anch, kiuwanyidinanyap kutambul mwom wa chikupu. Mulong wa chom chinech, etu twakushany kal, twaya kal kwetu kudi antu a michid yikwau.
47 Mulong dizu dia Nsalejetu diatulejay diawiy dined anch: “Nakutonda kal ey kwikal chimunyik kudi antu a michid yikwau, chakwel antu awonsu a pa mangand apanda.’ ”
48 Chateshau antu a michid yikwau mazu minam, awiy ova musangar nakash, ashimana mazu ma Nzamb. Chad antu awonsu atondau mulong wa kutambul mwom wa chikupu, ikala in kwitiyij.
49 Dizu dia Nzamb diapalangana mwi ngand yiniya yawonsu.
50 Pakwez in Yuda ayisarumuna amakundj ajim a mu musumb, pamwing ni amband ajim a michid yikwau ijikena, awiy kamu amband inay adinga ni kumwifukwil Nzamb. Awiy asambisha kuyizengol Paul nend Barnabas, chad ayopata mwi ngand yau.
51 Chawiy Paul nend Barnabas ayikukumwina rufunfut ra mu yidjatil yau mulong wa kuyifish nich, chad aya kwau ku Ikon.
52 In kwitiyij a mu Antiosh ading izwil nich musangar ni Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Paul nend Barnabas akat kuya ku Ikon
1 Ku Ikon Paul nend Barnabas amana kand yom yawiy ya mutapu umwing. Awiy andama mu chikumbu cha kulembil, chad arumburila mazu mawamp chakwel in Yuda avud, ni antu a michid yikwau avud, ikala in kwitiyij.
2 Pakwey in Yuda amwing alika kwitiyij, awiy ayisarumuna antu a michid yikwau chakwel ayikisa in kwitiyij.
3 Paul nend Barnabas ashakama kwinikwa machuku mavud, arumburilanga rusangu ra Nsalejetu patok wakad wom. Ndiy wayinkisha ukash wa kusal yilay ni yom yikwamushena mulong wa kwijikesh anch. mazu marumburilangau ma ranaken rend mading makin.
4 Antu a mu musumb aurika. Amwing asuta ku mutambu wa in Yuda chad akwau asuta ku mutambu wau atwimbuy a Yesu.
5 Chad antu a michid yikwau amwing, ni in Yuda amwing pamwing ni in kutakel au atonga kuyimesh atwimbuy a Yesu mar ni kuyas mayal.
6 Chateshau atwimbuy a Yesu mwamu. awiy achina, aya ku musumb wa Listre ni wa Derb mwi ngand ya Likawoniy, ni ku mangand makwau manyingumukina.
7 Kwinikwa awiy arumburila Rusangu Ruwamp.
0 Paul nend Barnabas akat kuya ku Listre ni ku Derb
8 Mu Listre mwading muntu wavadika chishet, katwishangap kwend.
9 Ndiy washakama kwinikwa mulong wa kutesh mazu malondangay Paul. Paul waman anch, muntu mwinou ukwet ritiy rakutwish kumwok, chawiy wamutala neeng,
10 chad wamulej nich dizu dikash anch: "Tumbuk! Iman!" Chad chishet wimana swa, wasambish kwendangan.
11 Yisak ya antu, pamanau chom chasalay Paul, awiy asambisha kubarok mazu piur mu rudim ra in Likawoniy anch: "Akish ikala kal mudi antu, ashirik kal pansh kudi etu!"
12 Awiy amupila Barnabas anch, Zeus, ndiy kamu mukish wau mujim. Chad amupila Paul anch, Herimes, ndiy kamu muruu wau akish au, mulong Paul wading mwin kutakel kulond.
13 Kuns kwa musumb kwading chikumbu cha kumwifukwil mukish Zeus. Mwin kupesh wa mukish winou waleta amakwal a ngomb ku chis akukasin yisalamb mwi nshing, mulong mwin kupesh nau antu asota kuyipesh atwimbuy a Yesu yakupesh.
14 Chateshay Barnabas nend Paul chom chelau kusal antu kudi awiy, apola maswin mau mulong alika chom chinech. Chad aya mau mukach mwa antu ni kubarok anch:
15 "Ov, mulong wak usadilanya chom chinech? Etu tudi kamu antu mudi en! Etu twezil kunoku mulong wa kukurumburilany Rusangu Ruwamp ra Yesu chakwel en ukarumukany kudiokal ku yom yiney yamwamu, chad wezany kudi Nzamb mwom. Ndiy kamu Nzamb watanga diur ni divu, ni karung, ni yom yawonsu yishichamu.
16 Pakur Nzamb witiya antu a michid yawonsu kusal mudi musotilau.
17 Pakwez machuku mawonsu ndiy wimekeshina ku yom yiwamp yasalay. Ndiy ukat kukunakishinany ruvul, ni kukwinkishany chirung cha kwangul, ukat kukwinkishany yakudia, ni kwizwish michim yen nich musangar."
18 Ap anch atwimbuy a Yesu alondap nchik mazu minam, amana kand mar ma kuyikangesh antu chakwel alika kuyipesh awiy yakupesh.
19 In Yuda amwing adiokala ku Antiosh wa ku Pisidiy, ni akwau adiokala ku Ikon. Awiy ayikakila antu ku mutambu wau, chad amwas Paul mayal, amukakil pol pa musumb mulong atonga anch wafa kal.
20 Pakwez in kwitiyij chamwombaumu, ndiy walanka, wachirik mu musumb. Chikwacha pamanch, ndiy nend Barnabas aya ku musumb wa Derb.
0 Paul nend Barnabas akat kuchirik ku Antiosh wa ku Siria
21 Paul nend Barnabas arumburila Rusangu Ruwamp mu musumb wa Derb, kwinikwa antu avud amwitiyija Yesu. Chad awiy achirika ku musumb wa Listre, ni wa Ikon, ni wa Antiosh wa ku Pisidiy.
22 Mu musumb ni musumb awiy ayikasikeshanga in kwitiyij ni kuyishindil kudandamen mu ritiy. Ayilejanga anch: "Chifanyidin etu awonsu kuman mar nakash mulong wa kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb."
23 Mu yisak yawonsu ya in Chikumbu cha Nzamb awiy atondamu amakurump. Mu kulembil kwau, ni mu kujil yakudia, ayipana awonsu mu makas ma Nsalejetu witiyijau.
24 Chasutau mwi ngand ya Pisidiy, awiy ashika mwi ngand ya Pamfiliy.
25 Kwinikwa awiy arumburila mazu ma Nzamb mu musumb wa Perij, chad ku musumb wa Atalia.
26 Adiokala kwinikwa mu waat wa mu karung, achirika ku Antiosh wa ku Siria. Kwawiy kwinikwa kwayipanau chakwel ranaken ra Nzamb riyilam, chakwel kand asal mudimu wawanyishau kal katat ou.
27 Chashikau ku Antiosh, ayikumangeja in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad ayilej yom yawonsu yasalay Nzamb kudi awiy. Ayilej kand mutapu watenchikay Nzamb chakwel antu a michid yikwau amwitiyij Yesu.
28 Chad ashakama kwinikwa pamwing nau in kwitiyij machuku mavud. Atwimbuy a Yesu, pamwing nau amakurump,
0 akumangedin mu Yerusalem
1 Antu amwing adiokala mwi ngand ya Yudeya, ez ku Antiosh, chad asambish kuyilej in kwitiyij anch: "Kiukutwishanyap kupand ching kamu anch akutwalany ku mukand mudi mufundilau mu Yijil ya Moses."
2 Paul nend Barnabas atadikijana nau nakash mulong wa chom chinech. Chawiy amutonda Paul nend Barnabas, pamwing ni antu akwau a mu Antiosh, chakwel aya ku Yerusalem kumanijan nau atwimbuy a Yesu nau amakurump mulong wa chom chinech.
3 In Chikumbu cha Nzamb ayikwasha mulong wa weny. Pasutau mwi ngand ya Fenisiy ni ya Samaria, ayileja antu mutapu wakarumukinau antu a michid yikwau kwez kudi Nzamb. Rusangu riner rayiletila in kwitiyij awonsu musangar nakash.
4 Chashikau ku Yerusalem, ayaka kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ni kudi atwimbuy a Yesu, ni kudi amakurump. Chad ayileja yom yawonsu yasalay Nzamb mulong wa mudimu wau.
5 Pakwey antu amwing a chisak cha Afaris ading akarumuka kal kwikal in kwitiyij, imana, alond anch: “Chifanyidin antu a michid yikwau akarumukina kal kwikal in kwitiyij niyau ayitwala ku mukand, ni kuyilej kand kuziyil ku Yijil ya Moses.”
6 Atwimbuy a Yesu ni amakurump ashakama pamwing chakwel ashinshik mulong winou.
7 Chambambau chisu chilemp, Pita wimana, walond anch: “Anamakwam in Kristu, en wijany nawamp anch, pakur Nzamb wantonda am mukach mwen mulong wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi antu a michid yikwau, chakwel niyau akutwish kutesh ni kumwitiyij Yesu.
8 Chawiy Nzamb, wija michim ya antu awonsu, wayitiya antu a michid yikwau kwikal in Kristu payinkishay Mwiku Utumbila, mudi kand mwatwinkishay etu.
9 Nzamb kakwetap kasolikany pakach petwetu ni awiy. Ndiy wayilikishina yitil mulong wa ritiy rau.
10 Chawiy katat, ov, mulong wak usotilany kumupak Nzamb? En usotilany kuyitwik in kwitiyij chisend chilimina chakanganyau kusend kudi angakiriletu ni yetu ayinetu.
11 Pakwez etu twitiyijin chakwel atupandish ku ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu, mudi kand awiy.”
12 Chisak cha antu awonsu aneneta kamu zong padingay Barnabas nend Paul ni kuyirumburil yilay ni yom yawonsu yikwamushena yasadilay Nzamb ku makas mau, mulong wa antu a michid yikwau.
13 Chapwishau kulond, Jakobu niyend walonda anch: “Anamakwam in Kristu, nteshany bil!
14 Simon waturumburilang mutapu wayivurikau antu a michid yikwau kudi Nzamb kapamp ka kusambish. Ndiy watondap antu amwing a pakach pau kwikal aend.
15 Mazu ma aruu a Nzamb malonda kand mutapu umwing mulong wa chom chinech. Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch:
16 ‘Chinawej ulondil anch: Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, am nikez kuchirik, mulong wa kuvuvuril want wa David. Nikez kutungiril yibumbur yau, ni kuukasikesh kand.
17 Chawiy antu akwau awonsu akez kwez kudi am, awiy kamu antu a michid yikwau awonsu inatazuka kwikal amam.
18 Mwamu mulondilay Chinawej, ndiy kamu washinshika yom yiney pakur.’ ”
19 Jakobu walonda kand anch: “Am nitongil anch, kichifanyidinap etu kuyinenganesh antu a michid yikwau akata kukarumuk kwez kudi Nzamb.
20 Pakwez chifanyidin etu kuyifundil mukand wa kuyilej anch, kangal adia yom yajenly ilau ku akish, ap kudia mbij ja nnam ujipinau wakad kukatil mulong wa kubudish mash, ap kudia mash min, ap kwimik
21 Mulong wa Yijil ya Moses ayitanga kal kudiokal pakur nakash mu yikumbu ya kulembil mu machuku mawonsu ma kwiswedish, chikwau kand, mazu ma Moses akat kumarumbu rilang ku mal mawonsu.”
0 Mukand utuminau kudi in kwitiyij a michid yikwau
22 Chad atwimbuy a Yesu, ni amakurump, pamwing nau in Chikumbu cha Nzamb awonsu, atonda antu amwing a mukach mwau chakwel ayituma ku Antiosh pamwing ni Paul nend Barnabas. Awiy amutonda Yuda, upidilau kand anch, Barisabas, nend Silas. Amakundj inay ading ayilimishin nakash kudi in kwitiyij.
23 Awiy ayituma nich mukand wafundau anch: “Yetu, atwimbuy a Yesu, ni amakurump, yetu kamu anamakwen mu Kristu, twakulangwishany en, anamakwetu in kwitiyij a michid yikwau ushichanya mu musumb wa Antiosh, ni mwi ngand ya Siria, ni ya Silisia.
24 Twateshil anch, antu amwing adiokala pakach petu akunenganeshinany ni kurumbangesh michim yen nich mazu mau. Pakwez etu kitwayilejap kusal mwamu, bwat.
25 Chawiy mwamu, etu twakumangen pamwing, twovijan etu awonsu mulong wa kuyitond in aruu itwakutuminanya ay. Awiy akwez pamwing nau akarukat netu Barnabas nend Paul,
26 awiy kamu ipanyina kal ku ubaj mulong wa kumusadil Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
27 Chawiy twamutum kal Yuda nend Silas, akwez akulejany ku kan yom yitwafundila ku mukand.
28 Mwiku Utumbila, pamwing ni yetwetu, twitiyin anch, kangal twakutwikany kand yisend yikwau yilimina ching kusu yijil yiney yijim anch:
29 Kangal wadiany yom yipeshilau kudi akish, kangal wadiany mash, kangal wadiany mbij ja nnam ujipinau wakad kukatul mulong wa kubudish mash, kangal wimikany dis, Ukez kusalany nawamp anch walikany kusal yom yiney Uladikangany, mwan.”
30 Chad ayituma aruu, aya ku Antiosh. Kwinikwa uwiy ayikumangeja chisak chawonsu cha in kwitiyij, ayinkisha mukand wezau nich.
31 Antu, chatangau mukand, ova musangar nakash mulong wa mazu madingamu ma kuyikasikesh.
32 Yuda nend Silas, awiy ayinau ading aruu a Nzamb, chad isamba nau chisu chilemp, ayikasikesha chakwel akutwish kujijaman.
33 Chikwasuta machuku, in kwitiyij ayichirisha nich chisambu kuya kudi antu ayituma.
34 Pakwez Silas watonda kushakam kwinikwa.
35 Paul nend Barnabas ashakama ku Antiosh machuku mavud. Abombakana nau antu akwau avud, chad awonsu ading ni kulejan ni kurumburil mazu ma Nsalejetu.
0 Paul nend Barnabas akat kwaurik
36 Chipasuta machuku minima, Paul wamuleja Barnabas anch: "Chifanyidin tusuturila mu ul ni ul mutwarumburila mazu ma Nsalejetu, chakwel tukashinshik mutapu ushichau mu ritiy."
37 Barnabas wasota kumusend Yohan Marko kuya nau.
38 Pakwez Paul watonga anch, kichiwapilap kumusend ndiy, mulong kadandamenap kuya nau djat ni kwisudiel kwa weny wau wa mudimu, pakwez wachirika, wayisha awiy ku Pamfiliy.
39 Chawiy atadikijana nakash, chad aurik. Barnabas wamusenda Marko, waya nend mu waat wa mu karung kushik ku Shipre.
40 Paul niyend wamutonda Silas, waya nend. In kwitiyij ayipana chakwel ranaken ra Nsalejetu riyilam.
41 Ndiy waya nend Silas, endangana mwi ngand ya Siria ni ya Silisia, mulong wa kuyikasikesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ndond ni ndond.
0 Timote ukat kuya nend Paul ni Silas
1 Paul waya ku musumb wa Derb ni wa Listre, kwinikwa kwawiy kwading kushichay mwin Kristu umwing, dijin diend Timote. Makwend wading mwin Yuda wakarumuka kwikal mwin Kristu, pakwez tatukwend wading mwin Grek.
2 In kwitiyij awonsu a mu Listre ni a mu Ikon ading ni kulond rusangu ruwamp ra Timote.
3 Paul wakata kumusend Timote kuya nend, chawiy wamutwala ku mukand. Wasala mwamu mulong in Yuda ading ashicha mu jindond jinija ading amwij tatukwend a Timote anch udi mwin Grek.
4 Pasutangau mu ul ni ul, ayilejanga in kwitiyij yijil yatenchikau kudi atwimbuy a Yesu ni kudi amakurump mu Yerusalem. Ayilejanga kuziyil ku yijil yiney.
5 Chawiy in Chikumbu cha Nzamb akasikana mu ritiy, avulijananga kand pichuku pichuku.
0 Paul ukat kuman chishimushimu ku Trowas
6 Asutila mwi ngand ya Frigi yinunganijadina ni ngand ya Galatia, mulong Mwiku Utumbila wayikangesha kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb mwi ngand ya Aziy.
7 Chashikau ku mwimbu wa ngand ya Misiy, awiy apakisha kwandam mwi ngand ya Bitiniy, pakwez Mwiku wa Yesu wayikangesha.
8 Awiy asuta zupu mwi ngand ya Misiy, chad aya djat ni ku Trowas.
9 Chikwajala uchuku wa dichuku dinidia, Paul wamana chishimushimu. Wamumana mwin Masedon wiminy ukat kumulembijek anch: "Ez ku Masedon mulong wa kutukwash!"
10 Chapwishay Paul kuman chishimushimu chinech, twirijeka mulong wa kuya ku Masedon, mulong twijika chakin anch, Nzamb watutazukang kutwal Rusangu Ruwamp kudi antu a kwinikwa.
0 Lidi ukat kumwitiyij Yesu
11 Ku Trowas kwawiy kutwandamina mu waat wa mu karung, chad twaya kamu salal ku ditung dia Samotras. Chikwacha, twaya ku Neyapolis.
12 Twadiokala kwinikwa, twaya ku Filip, wawiy musumb ujim wa ngand ya Masedon, mwading mushichau in Rom. Twashakama kwinikwa machuku makemp.
13 Chitwashika kwinikwa, chad Dichuku dia Kwiswedish twabudika mu musumb, twaya ku chikumu cha wit, kutwatonga anch, kudi ndond ya kulembil ya in Yuda. Twashakama, twambamb nau amband ading akumangedin kwinikwa.
14 Mband umwing wa mukach mwau watutesha, dijin diend Lidi wa ku musumb wa Tiatir. Ndiy wading mwin kulandish maswin masuzurikina kwa kujal, wading kand mwin kumwifukwil Nzamb. Nsalejetu wamwanzurila muchim mulong wa kutesh nich kashinsh ka yom yalonday Paul.
15 Chamubatishau ndiy, pamwing ni antu a mu chikumbu chend, ndiy watutazuka anch: "En wijany anch, am nidi mwin kwitiyij wakin wa Nsalejetu, chawiy ezany, ushakamany kwol kwam." Watushindila kuya, chad etu twitiya.
0 Akat kumutek Paul nend Silas mu rukan ku Filip
16 Dichuku dimwing pitwaya kwi ndond ya kulembil, twamusankana changadim muswik wading ukwet chilembil wamwinkishanga mutapu wa kubwak yikweza kurutu. Changadim winou wayipitishanga ansalejend nfalang jivud mulong wayibwakinanga antu.
17 Ndiy wamulondula Paul ni yetwetu, wading ni kutoy anch: “Antu inay adi atushalapol a Nzamb Upandakena Piur pa yawonsu! Awiy akat kukulejany en mulupu ukutwishanya kupand!”
18 Changadim winou watoyanga mwamu machuku mavud, djat ni pamusudishinay Paul ku muchim, chawiy Paul wakarumuka kwinyim, wamwel chilembil anch; “Mu dijin dia Yesu Kristu nakulej anch, mudiokala changadim winou!” Pawiy kamu pinipa chilembil wamudiokala.
19 Chamanau ansalejend anch, changadim kakutwishap kand kuyipitish nfalang, awiy amukwata Paul nend Silas, ayidadamijan, ayitwal mu dibur kudi amakurump a musumb.
20 Awiy ayishikija kudi amakurump au in Rom, ayilej anch: “Antu inay adi in Yuda, akat kurumbangesh musumb wetu.
21 Akat kulejan yaku yikata kujip yijil yetu. Etu tudi kwetu in Rom, kitukutwishap kwitiy yaku yiney ap kuyisadil.”
22 Chisak cha antu niyau asambisha kumubul Paul nend Silas. Chad amakurump apwola maswin ma Paul nend Silas, alejan kuyibul nfimbu.
23 Chayibulau nakash, ayitwal mu rukan. Amuleja kalam wa rukan kutek kafur ku chis chakwel kakutwishap kuchin.
24 Chateshay kalam mazu minam, ndiy wayandjika mu kapalakany ka mukach, chad wayitek mend mwi mpompu.
25 Chashikau mukach mwa uchuku, Paul nend Silas ading ni kulembil ni kuwang miminy ya kumutumbish nich Nzamb. Antu a rukan akwau ading ayiteshil.
26 Kukashimuk, kweza kunyikek kujim kwa divu, kwanyikesha rukan djat ni ku dishin dia chikumbu. Yiy yawonsu yanzurika kapamp kamwing, chawiy yom yawonsu yayikasolau antu a rukan yasuroka.
27 Kalam wa rukan walanka. Chamanay yis ya rukan yanzurikang kal, ndiy watonga anch, antu awonsu a rukan achinang kal. Chawiy ndiy wapurila mpak yend ya musamun, wela kwijip amwinend,
28 Pakwez Paul wabarika dizu piur anch: “Kangal wishesh amwiney! Etu awonsu tudi kwetu mwinomu!”
29 Kalam wa rukan watazuka anch: “Nletilany kasu!” Chad wandama mau, oku wazal lel wom, wasa manungun ku mend ma Paul ni Silas.
30 Chawiy ndiy wayibudisha pol, wayipul anch: “Ov, ansalejam, nisala nchik chakwel nipanda?”
31 Awiy amwakula anch: “Mwitiyija Nsalejetu Yesu, chad ey ni dijuku diey ukez kupandany.”
32 Awiy arumburila rusangu ra Nsalejetu kudi ndiy ni kudi antu awonsu adingay nau mu chikumbu chend.
33 Chisu chin cha uchuku kalam wayisenda, wayoyish yitat yau. Pawiy kamu pinipa amubatish ndiy ni antu awonsu a mu dijuku diend.
34 Chad ndiy wamusenda Paul nend Silas, wayitwal kwol kwend, wayinkish yakudia. Kalam ni dijuku diend izula nich musangar mulony katat amwitiyij kal Nzamb.
35 Chikwacha pamanch, amakurump au in Rom ayitumina amakurump au amasalay dizu anch: “Yilikishanyaku antu ay aya kwau.”
36 Chawiy kalam wamuleja Paul anch: “Amakurump atum kal dizu anch, akulikishanyaku ey nend Silas. Katat ukutwish kuyany kwen nich chisambu.”
37 Pakwez Paul wayileja amakurump au amasalay anch: “Atubudil mukach mwa antu wakad kuturumburish ap kutufish nich, chad atutek mu rukan. Katat asotil kutulikishaku ku ujindj. Kitukwitiyap, etu tudi in Rom! Chifanyidin amakurump au in Rom ayinau eza atulikishaku.”
38 Amakurump au amasalay ayileja amakurump au in Rom mazu malonday Paul. Chateshau anch Paul nend Silas adi in Rom, awiy akama nakash.
39 Chawiy aya ni kuyit dilikishin, ayibudisha mu rukan, chad ayilembijek chakwel adiokal mu musumb.
40 Paul nend Silas abudika mu rukan, chad aya ku chikumbu cha Lidi. Kwinikwa awiy akumangana nau in kwitiyij, ayilej mazu ma kuyikasikesh, chad aya kwau.
0 Akat kumuzengol Paul ni antu akwau ku Tesalonik
1 Paul nend Silas asutila mu musumb wa Amfipoli ni wa Apoloni, chad ashika ku musumb wa Tesalonik. Kwinikwa kwawiy kwading chikumbu cha kulembil cha in Yuda.
2 Mu Machuku masatu ma Kwiswedish, Paul wandamanga mu chikumbu cha kulembil mudi mwading chaku chend. Ndiy walondanga nau antu yom ya Mukand wa Nzamb.
3 Wayirumburilanga ni kuyighinshik anch, Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch, Kristu Uzizidilau Many ukez kuman mar ma rufu, chad ukez kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom. Paul wayileja anch: “Yesu win unikulejinany ou, ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.”
4 Antu amwing a_pakach pau itiya mazu malonday, chad ibomba nend Paul ni Silas. Amband amakurump a musumb avud, pamwing ni chisak chijim cha in Grek adinga kumwifukwil Nzamb, niyau ibomba nau.
5 Pakwez mulong wa chom chinech in Yuda ova mukau, chad akumangeja antu amwamu chakwel asala chisak cha in kanvundangesh. Awiy avundangesha musumb wawonsu, chad abuz chikumbu cha Jazon mulong wa kumukimb Paul nend Silas chakwel ayipana kudi antu.
6 Pakwez chakanganyau kuyiman, awiy amudadamijana Jazon pamwing nau in kwitiyij amwing, ayitwal kudi amakurump a musumb ni kubarok anch: “Antu inay aletil kal milong kwawonsu! Katat ashik kal kand mu musumb wetu.
7 Chad Jazon uyilamin mu chikumbu chend, Awiy awonsu akat kusal yom ya kujip yijil ya mwant wa in Rom, mulong akat kulond anch, kudi kand Mwant mukwau upidilau anch, Yesu.”
8 Mazu minam maleta kanvundangesh kudi amakurump a musumb ni ku chisak cha antu.
9 Amakus rump amuleja Jazon ni antu akwau kupan chizu cha nfalang chakwel ayilikishaku, chad chapanau ayitiya kuya.
0 Akat kumuzengol Paul ni antu akwau ku Berey
10 Chikwajala uchuku, in kwitiyij amutuma Paul nend Silas ku musumb wa Berey. Chashikau kwinikwa, aya mu chikumbu cha kulembil.
11 Kwinikwa antu ading akwet michim ya kutesh nakash kupandakanamu in Tesalonik. Ateshanga rusangu nich mushiku nakash, chad ading ni kwilej pichuku pichuku Mukand wa Nzamb chakwel ijika anch, yom yilondilay Paul yidi yakin.
12 Antu avud a pakach pau amwitiyija Yesu. Kwading kand amband amakurump a musumb avud itiyija pamwing ni amakundj avud au in Grek.
13 Pakwez in Yuda a ku Tesalonik chateshau anch, Paul ukat kurumburilang kand mazu ma Nzamb mu musumb wa Berey, awiy aya kwinikwa, chad asambish kuyisarumun antu chakwel aleta kanvundangesh.
14 Pawiy kamu pinipa, in kwitiyij amutwalaku Paul ku chau cha karung, Pakwez Silas nend Timote ashala ku Berey.
15 Antu amutwalaku Paul andama mu waat wa mu karung, aya nend djat ni ku Aten, Chad pachirikau ku Berey, eza nich mazu makanay Paul ma kumulej Silas nend Timote chakwel aya swa kudi ndiy.
0 Paul ukat kurumburilmazu ma Nzamb kudi in Aten
16 Padingay Paul umuchingedil Silas nend Timote ku Aten, muchim wend Wanenganana nakash mulong wamana musumb Wawonsu wizwil sens nich yirumbidij ya akish,
17 Chawiy ndiy walondanga nau in Yuda mu chikumbu cha kulembil, pamwing nau antu a michid yikwau ading ni kumwifukwil Nzamb, Walondanga kand pa dibur pichuku pichuku nau antu adinga ni kusut kwinikwa,
18 Alej a chisak cha Epikurien ni cha Stoyisien niyau atadikijana kand nend Paul. Amwing a pakach pau ipulijana anch: “Ov, mwin kalondol wakad manangu ou ukat kuchochok yom ik?” Antu akwau ayakula anch: “Ety tumen anch, ukat kuchochok ya akish au aeny.” Awiy alonda mwamu mulong Paul wading ni kurumburil rusan gu ra Yesu ni ra kuvumbuk kwend,
19 Chawiy amutwala Paul kudi in chisak cha in dirumburish dia musumb, chipidilau anch, Acropaj, alond anch: “Tusotil kujingunin nawamp malejan masu miulondila.
20 Mazu mamwing miukata kulond madi mazu masu kudi etu, katat tusoti kwov kurumburik kwau."
21 In Aten ni aeny awonsu ashicha mwinimwa adi akatil kushesh chisu chau mulong wa kulond ni kutesh yom yisu.
22 Paul wimana kurutu kwa chisak cha in dirumburish dia musumb, walond anch: “Nimen anch en, in Aten, mu mitapu yawonsu udiany in kwifukwil akish nakash.
23 Mulong pinendangananga mu musumb wen, namanang jindond jen jiukata kwifukwilany. Natanang chintamb pafundilau anch: 'Kudi Nzamb Wakad Kwijikan.' En ukat kumwifukwilany wakad kumwijikany, chawiy am nezil kukulejanyay Nzamb winou.
24 Nzamb watanga ngand ni yom yawonsu yidiamu, ndiy kamu Mwant wa diur ni divu, ndiy kashichap mu yikumbu yitungilau kudi antu.
25 Chikwau kand, ndiy kakwetap kuswir kwa yom yikumusadilau kudi antu, mulong ndiy amwinend ukata kupan kudi antu awonsu mwom, ni mwiku, ni yom yikwau yawonsu.
26 Pakusambish, Nzamb watanga muntu umwing, chad ku muntu umwing kwawiy kwadiokala michid yawonsu, chawiy Nzamb wayipalangesha mu mangand mawonsu. Padingay kand kal atanga yom yiney, ndiy watenchika chisu chikushakamau antu a mwi ndond ni ndond, watenchika kand mimbu ya jindond jikushakamau.
27 Ndiy wayitanga antu chakwel akez kumukimb, ap akez kumutan pakumusurabau. Chakin, Nzamb kadiap kulemp ni muntu mwawonsu.
28 Chidi mudi mwalonday muntu umwing anch: 'Ku ukash wend tukwet mwom, tukat kwend, tudiaku.' Antu amwing a pakach penen afundil miminy anch: 'Niyetu tudi kand anend.'
29 Chawiy anch tudi anend kitufanyidinap kutong anch, Nzamb ufanaken mudi chirumbidij chichidilau cha utad wa or, ap wa argent, ap mudi cha diyal disongilau ku winkalaweny wa muntu.
30 Nzamb kachindilap mivu yadingau antu wakad kumwijik, pakwez katat ndiy ukat kuyitazuk antu awonsu adia mu jindond jawonsu chakwel akarumuk ni kudiokal ku yitil yau.
31 Mulong ndiy watenchika kal dichuku dia kuyirumburish antu awonsu a pa mangand nich dirumburish ditentamina ku chikas cha muntu watonday kal. Ndiy wijikisha chijingidij kudi antu awonsu anch, yom yiney yidi yakin pamuvumbulay muntu mwinou kwikal kand mwom!"
32 Antu amwing, chamuteshau Paul ukat kulond mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa afu, awiy amuswingisha nakash, pakwez antu akwau amwela anch: "Tukez kukutesh kand kapamp kakwau mulong wa yom yiney."
33 Chawiy Paul wadiokala mu kukumangan kwau.
34 Antu amwing asuta ku mutambu wend, ikala in kwitiyij. Umwing wading Denis, mwin chisak cha in dirumburish dia musumb, mukwau wading mband, dijin diend Damaris Kwading kand antu akwau.
0 Paul ukat kuyirumburil in Korint Rusangu Ruwamp
1 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney Paul wadiokala ku Aten, waya ku musumb wa Korint.
2 Kwinikwa wamutanaku mwin Yuda, dijin diend Akila, wa mwi ngand ya Pont. Wading uchidi kwez kudiokal mwi ngand ya Itali, pamwing ni mukajend Prisil, mulong Kulod, mwant wa in Rom, wayopata in Yuda awonsu mu musumb wa Rom. Chawiy Paul waya ni kuyilangwish.
3 Ndiy washakama nau pamwing, wasalanga kand nau mudimu wa kuchim minkand, mulong awonsu asalanga mudimu wa mutapu umwing.
4 Machuku mawonsu ma Kwiswedish, Paul wandamanga mu chikumbu cha kulembil, wading ni kutadikijanang nau in Yuda ni in Grek, mulong wa kukarumun yitongijok yau chakwel ikal in kwitiyij.
5 Silas nend Timote adiokala mwi ngand ya Masedon, niyau ashika ku musumb wa Korint, chad Paul wipana chisu chawonsu mulong wa kurumburjl Tusangu ra Yesu kudi in Yuda. Wayirumburilanga kamu patok anch, Yesu, ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
6 Awiy alika mazu mend, amushing, chad Paul wakukumwona rufunfut ra ku yidjal yend mulong wa kuyifish nich, wayilej anch: "Anch en in Yuda washadikany, udi mulong wenen ayinen! Am kinikwetap kand mulong. Kudiokal katat am nikuya kwam kudi antu a michid yikwau."
7 Chawiy ndiy wayisha in Yuda, waya kushakam kwa muntu wa muchid ukwau, dijin diend Titius Justus. Wading muntu mwin kumwifukwil Nzamb. Chikumbu cha muntu mwinou chading piswimp ni chikumbu cha kulembil.
8 Mwin kutakel wa chikumbu cha kulembil, dijin diend Krisipus, wamwitiyija Nsalejetu pamwing ni dijuku diend diawonsu. In Korint akwau avud atesha rusangu ra Yesu, amwitiyij, chad ayibatish.
9 Dichuku dimwing uchuku, Nsalejetu Yesu wamulejina Paul mu chishimushimu anch: “Kangal wov kwey wom, pakwez dandamen kulond. Kangal waziy, bwat,
10 mulong am nidi ney. Kwikil muntu ukutwisha kukusal nayimp, mulong antu avud a mu musumb Winou adi amam.”
11 Chawiy Paul washakama kwinikwa muvu umwing ni chikunku, wayilejang antu mazu ma Nzamb.
12 Pikalay Galion nyikel wa in Rom mwi ngand ya Akey, in Yuda abombakana pamwing, amukwat Paul, chad amutwal ku dirumburish,
13 Awiy alonda anch: “Muntu mwinou ukat kupakish kukarumun yitongijok yau antu chakwel amwifukwil Nzamb mu mutapu wakad kulondul yijil!”
14 Paul wela kulondamu dizu, pakwez Galion wayileja in Yuda anch: "Anch muntu mwinou wasalang chom cha chisum, ap anch waletang mulong ujim, ing nelang kukuteshany en in Yuda.
15 Pakwez yom yiney yidi kwau ya kutadikijan mulong wa mazu, ni majin, ni yijil yen ayinen, chawiy chifanyidin en kupwishany mulong winou ayinen. Kinitiyinap kurumburish yom mudi yiney!"
16 Chad ndiy wayopata mu dirumburish.
17 Awiy awonsu amukwata Sosten, mwin kutakel wa chikumbu cha kulembil, amubudil kurutu kwa chikumbu cha kurumburishin. Pakwez Galion kabangakup, bwat.
0 Paul ukat kuchirik ku Antiosh
18 Paul washakama ku Korint nau in kwitiyij machuku mavud, chad wakanijana nau, wayisha. Ndiy wandama mu Waat wa mu karung, waya kwi ngand ya Siria Ppamwing nend Prisil ni Akila. Padingay kand kal atumbuk ku chau cha ku ul wa Sanisherey, ndiy wakila mutu mulong wa kuchip kwamuchipilay Nzamb.
19 Awiy ashika ku musumb wa Efes, kwinikwa Paul wamusha Prisil nend Akila, waya mu chikumbu cha kulembil mulong wa kulond nau in Yuda.
20 Antu amwipula kuwejaku machuku, pakwez ndiy kitiyap,
21 Chawiy pakanijanay nau, ndiy wayileja anch: “Anch Nzamb wakat, am nikez kuchirik kand kudij en.” Chad ndiy wandama mu waat wa mu karung, wadiokal ku Efes.
22 Padiokalay mu waat ku Sezarey, ndiy waya ku Yerusalem mulong wa kuyilangwish in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad waya ku Antiosh.
23 Chalalay machuku makemp kwinikwa, ndiy wadiokalaku, wendangana mwi ngand ya Galatia ni ya Frigi mulong wa kuyikasikesh in kwitiyij awonsu.
0 Apolo ukat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb ku Efes ni ku Korint
24 Mu machuku minima mwin Yuda umwing wa ku musumb wa Alekizandria, dijin diend Apolo, washika ku Efes. Ndiy wading muntu wija kulond nawamp, wading wij kand Mukand wa Nzamb nakash.
25 Ading amuleja kal malejan ma Nsalejetu, chad ndiy warumburilanga mazu ma Nzamb nich mushiku, walejananga kand yom yakin ya Yesu. Pakwez ndiy wading wij ching kusu dibatish dia Yohan.
26 Ndiy wasambisha kulond patok wakad wom mu chikumbu cha kulembil. Pamuteshau kudi Prisil ni Akila, awiy amutazuka kwol kwau, chad amurumburil kand nawamp yom yikwau ya rusot ra Nzamb.
27 Apolo watonga kuya kwi ngand ya Akey, chawiy in kwitiyij a mu Efes amukwasha, ayifundil in kwitiyij a ku Akey mukand chakwel amwaka nawamp. Chashikay kwinikwa, ndiy wayikwasha nakash antu ikala in kwitiyij mulong wa ranaken ra Nzamb.
28 Ndiy watadikijana nau in Yuda pakach pa antu, chad mulong wa mazu mend makash ndiy wamekesha kurumbuk kwa in Yuda. Chawiy wayishinshika nich Mukand wa Nzamb anch, Yesu ndiy kamu Kristu Uzizidilau Many.
0 Paul ukat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb ku Efes
1 Padingay Apolo ku Korint, Paul wendangana mwi ngand, chad washik ku Efes. Kwinikwa watanaku in kwilej amwing,
2 wayipul anch: “Ov, piwitiyijanya, watambulanya kal Mwiku Utumbila?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Kand kal tuteshap anch, kudi Mwiku Utumbila.”
3 Paul wayipula kand anch: “Anch mwamu, ing dibatish dia nany diwatambulanya?” Awiy amwakula anch: “Etu twatambula dibatish dia Yohan.”
4 Paul wayirumburila anch: “Dibatish dia Yohan diading kudi antu akarumuka kudiokal ku yitil yau. Yohan wayileja in Isarel anch: ‘Chifanyidin en kumwitiyij ndiy wezila kwinyim kwam, ndiy kamu Yesu.’ ”
5 Chateshau mazu minam, ayibatisha mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu.
6 Paul wayanzuka makas, chad Mwiku Utumbila wayishirikina. Awiy alonda mu jindim jindj, chad arumburila kand rusangu radiokala kudi Nzamb.
7 Ading mudi antu dikum ni aad.
8 Paul wandamanga mu chikumbu cha kulembil, mu angond asatu ndiy walondanga nau antu patok wakad wom. Wapakishanga kukarumun yitongijok yau chakwel itiya yom yakin ya Want wa Nzamb.
9 Pakwez kwading antu amwing a pakach pau akweta michim yichinchikina alika kwau kwitiyij. Awiy alonda yom yiyimp kurutu kwa chisak cha in chikumbu cha kulembil, mulong wa antu alondwila Njil ya Nsalejetu. Chawiy Paul wadiokala kwinikwa, chad wayisend in kwitiyij, waya nau mu shikol ya Tiranus. Kwinikwa walondanga nau pichuku pichuku.
10 Paul wasala mwamu mivu yaad, chawiy in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau awonsu ading ashicha mwi ngand ya Aziy atesha rusangu ra Nsalejetu.
0 Yom yapakishau an a Sikeva kusal
11 Paul wasala yilay ya kushimwok ku ukash wa Nzamb.
12 Asendanga yibwik ya mudimu ni yitambal ya Paul, chad ayibwik ayej, awiy ayerikanga ku misong yau, ni ayilembil ayidiokalanga.
13 Kwading in Yuda amwing atambitambang mulong wa kudiosh ayilembil. Awiy niyau apakisha kudioshil ayilembil mu dijin dia Yesu, ayileja ayilembil anch: “Mu dijin dia Yesu ukat kulejanay Paul, nakulejany kal anch: ‘Diokalany mu muntu mwinou.’ ”
14 An amakundj sambwad a mwin Yuda umwing wading mwin kupesh mujim, dijin diend Sikeva, awly asalanga mwamu.
15 Pakwez chilembil wayakula anch: “Am nimwij Yesu, nimwij kand Paul, ing en yen a nany?”
16 Chad ikundj wading ukweta chilembil wayimatikina, wayisumin, wayibul awonsu, wayisupwol yitat, ni kuyapwodil maswin. Awiy abudika mu chikumbu chend, achin kanzikis.
17 Jn Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau awonsu ading ashich mu Efes, pateshau rusangu riner, ova wom nakash. Chad aditumbisha dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu kupandakan.
18 In kwitiyij avud eza ni kwitiyin patok yom yasalijokau.
19 Antu avud a pakach pau in ulaj akumangeja mikand yau, chad ayosh patok kurutu kwa antu. Awiy achinda usey wa mikand yiney, wading wa nfalang tunan makum matan ja utad wa argent.
20 Chawiy dizu dia Nzamb diapalangana pakach pa antu nich usu, chad miril ni miril ya antu itiyija.
0 Antu akat kulet kanvundangesh ku Efes
21 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney Mwiku Utumbila wamutakela Paul chakwel asutil mwi ngand ya Masedon, ni ya Akey, aya ku Yerusalem. Paul walonda anch: “Anch nashik kwinikwa, chinfanyidin kand am kushik ku musumb wa Rom.”
22 Wayituma in kumukwash end aad Timote nend Erast kuya kwi ngand ya Masedon, pakwez amwinend washala mwi ngand ya Aziy.
23 Pawiy pa chisu chinicha, pabudika mulong ukash mu musumb wa Efes, mulong wa antu alondwila Njil ya Nsalejetu.
24 Kwading mwin kuchil utad wa argent, dijin diend Demetirius. Ndiy wachilanga yifanakesh yikemp ya chikumbu cha kumwifukwil mukish mband, dijin diend Aritemis. Mudimu winou wayipitisha antu a mudimu nfalang jivud.
25 Chawiy ndiy wayikumangeja in mudimu end awonsu, pamwing ni antu akwau ading ni kusal mudimu wa mutapu winou, wayilej anch: “Akwetu, en wijany anch, mapit metu mawonsu makat kudiokal ku mudimu winou.
26 En umenany, wovilany kand yom yikat kusalay win Paul ou. Ndiy ukat kuyilej antu anch, akish asadilau kudi antu kadiap akish akin. Ndiy wakarumwin kal yitongijok ya antu avud a mu Efes, ni a mwi ngand ya Aziy chakwel itiy anch, yom yilondilay yidi yakin.
27 Chom chinech chidi cha ubaj, chikujipesh mudimu, chikujipesh kand katumb ka chikumbu cha kwifukwil cha mukish mband mujim Aritemis. Chawiy katumb ka mukish kakez kupwa, ndiy kamu winou ukat kwifukwilau antu awonsu a mwi ngand ya Aziy ni a mangand mawonsu!”
28 Chateshau antu mazu minam, ajimana nakash, asambish kubarok anch: “Mukish Aritemis wa in Hfes, ndiy utumbila nakash!"
29 Kanvundangesh kapalangana mu musumb wawonsu, Ayirumbangan amukwata Gayus nend Aristarik, antu inay wad ading in Masedon endangay nend Paul. Ayidadamijana, ayitwal mu dibur dijim dia kusengen.
30 Paul wasota kwimnekesh mu chisak cha antu, pakwez in kwitiyij amukangesha,
31 In kutakel amwing a ngand ya Aziy ading arund nend niyau amutumina dizu anch: “Kangal waya mu dibur dia kusengen.”
32 Pa chisu chinicha chisak cha antu awonsu ading arumbanganang kal. Antu amwing akat kubarok mulong wa chom chinech, akwau akat kubarok mulong wa chom chikwau, avud pakach pau kijikap kwau chom chakumangenau.
33 Antu amwing amubachika Alekizandre kulond, mulong in Yuda ading amutekang kal kurutu. Chad wayinenetish antu nich chikas, chawiy wapakisha kuyilondilap in Yuda.
34 Pakwez chamanau antu anch, niyend udi kand mwin Yuda, awiy awonsu abaroka pamwing mulong wa chom chawiy chimwing. Adandamena kubarok yisu ya muten yaad anch: “Mukish Aritemis wa in Efes, ndiy utumbila nakash!”
35 Chad mwin kutakel umwing wa musumb wayinenetisha antu, walond anch: “En, anamakwam in Efes! Antu awonsu ij ‘anch, musumb wa Efes udi mudi kalam wa chikumbu cha kumwifukwil mukish mujim Aritemis, wawiy kand udia, mudi kalam wa diyal ditumbila diadiokala mwiur, diawa pansh.
36 Kwikil muntu ukutwisha kutadik yom yiney. Chawiy chifanyidin en kunenet, kangal wasalany chom wakad kutongijokany. .
37 En wayiletangany antu inay kunoku, pakwez awiy kiyangap kwau chom cha mu yikumbu ya akish ap kulond nayimp mulong wa mukish wetu mband.
38 Anch Demetirius nau in mudimu end asotil kumufund muntu, chiwamp, etu tukwet kal amakurump, tukwet kand machuku ma kurumburish milong. Awiy akutwish kumufund muntu kwinikwa.
39 Pakwez anch kudi chom chikwau chiusotilany, chifanyidin kuchitenchik mu kukumangan kwau amakurump a musumb mudi mudia yijil.
40 Mulong wa yom yiney yisutila ilel, udi ubaj kudi etu, akutwish kutufish nich anch tudi in kulet kanvundangesh. Kwikil mutapu wa kwiyingish, mulong kitukutwishap kurumburil mulong wak twasalanga chom chinech.”
41 Chapwishay kulond mwamu, ndiy wayipalangesha antu.
0 Paul ukat kuchirik kwi ngand ya Masedon ni ya Grek
1 Chikapwa kanvundangesh, Paul wayikumangeja in kwitiyij, wayikasikesh nich mazu. Chad waladikijana nau, wadiokal kwinikwa, waya kwi ngand ya Masedon.
2 Ndiy wendangana mwi ngand yiniya, mulong wa kuyikasikesh in kwitiyij nich mazu mavud. Chad waya kwi ngand ya Grek,
3 kwinikwa kwawiy kwashakamay angond asatu. Wel kwandam mu waat wa mu karung mulong wa kuya kwi ngand ya Siria, pakwez wijika mpung yimupungenau kudi in Yuda, Chawiy wakarumuna weny wend, wachirik mwi ngand ya Masedon.
4 Sopater, mwan ikundj wa Pirus wa ku Berey, wamutwalaku pamwing nend Aristarik nend Sekond wa ku Tesalonik, ni Gayus wa ku Derb, ni Tishik nend Trofim a kwi ngand ya Aziy, ni Timote.
5 Awiy atakelaku, chad atuchingel ku musumb wa Trowas.
6 Chiwapwa musambu wa mabot makad chivish, twandamina mu waat wa mu karung ku musumb wa Filip, twenda machuku matan, chad twayitan akwetu ku Trowas. Kwinikwa twashakamaku rubing rumwing.
0 Weny wa kwisudiel wa Paul ku Trowas
7 Pa dichuku dia kusambish dia rubing, urel twakumangana mulong wa kudia pamwing. Paul wayirumburila antu mazu ma Nzamb, walonda, londee djat ni mukach mwa uchuku, mulong wasota kuya pamanch.
8 Kwading mend ya kasu yivud mu kapalakany ka piur mutwading tukumangedin.
9 Nsand umwing, dijin diend Eutikus, wading ushich pa kapend. Padandamenay Paul kulond, Eutikus wasambisha kuzel tul, chad walala kamu tul twin, chawiy waturika kudiokal pa kapalakany ka kasatu ka piur. Pamuzambulau, wading wafang kal.
10 Pakwez Paul washirika, wamubwikam, walond anch: “Kangal wakamany, ndiy udi kwend mwom!”
11 Chawiy Paul wakandama kand piur, wadia nau in kwitiyij. Walonda nau chisu chilemp, djat ni pabudikina muten, chad ndiy waya.
12 Awiy amutwala nsand mwom kwol kwend, chom chinéch chapwisha ushon mu michim yau.
0 Paul ukat kudiokal ku Trowas, waya ku Milet
13 Etu twatakelaku kwandam mu waat wa mu karung mulong wa kuya ku musumb wa Asos, kwawiy kwinikwa kutwamusendila Paul. Mwamu mwatulejay kusal, mulong ndiy amwinend wasota kuya ra pansh.
14 Patutanay ku Asos, niyend wandama kand mu waat, twaya ku musumb wa Mitilen.
15 Twatumbuka kand nich waat, chikwacha, twashik pantaliken ni ditung dia Shios. Chikwacha kand, twashika ku ditung dia Samos. Twenda kand nich waat dichuku dimwing, chad twashik ku musumb wa Milet.
16 Paul watenchika kusut musumb wa Efes wakad kwiman, mulong kasotap kushesh chisu mwi ngand ya Aziy. Ndiy waswakeja kuya ku Yerusalem, chakwel ap wakashik kwinikwa pidiakad kal dichuku dia Pentekot kushik.
0 Mazu ma Paul ma kukanijan nau amakurump a ku Efes WT
17 Padingay Paul ku Milet, watuma dizu kudi amakurump av in Chikumbu cha Nzamb cha ku Efes chakwel eza asankanijan nend.
18 Chashikau, ndiy wayileja anch: “En wijany uh mutapu unashakama ni yenen chisu chawonsu, kudiokal dichuku dia kusambish dinashika mwi ngand ya Aziy.
19 Am, kashalapol wa Nsalejetu, nasala mudimu nich kwitudish ni mansoj mavud, tit yisu yawonsu yinamana mar, mulong wa jimpung jampunganau kudi in Yuda.
20 Pinading ni kukurumburilany mazu ma Nzamb ni kukulejany pakach pa antu ap mu yikumbu yen, nakulejanya yom yawonsu yikutwisha kukukwashany, kinashakup chom, bwat.
21 Nayibabesha in Yuda nau antu a michid yikwau wakad kasolikany, chakwel akarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau, eza kudi Nzamb ni kumwitiyij Nsalejetu Yesu.
22 Chawiy katat nikat kuziyil kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Niyil ku Yerusalem, kinijap yom yikwinshikena kwinikwa.
23 Nij ching kusu anch, Mwiku Utumbila ukat kwinbabesh anch, mu misumb yawonsu akwintek mu rukan ni kwinmesh mar.
24 Pakwez kinichingejinap anch mwom wam ukwet usey kudi am amwinam. Nisotil kusu kuwanyish chisend ni kupwish mudimu wanginkishau kudi Nsalejetu Yesu. Mudimu winou udi wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra ranaken ra Nzamb.
25 “Natambitambin kal pakach penen awonsu mulong wa kurumburil yom ya Want wa Nzamb. Chad katat nij anch, kwikil umwing wenen ukeza kwinman kand.
26 Chawiy nakulejany kal en awonsu ilel unou patok, anch umwing wenen washadik, am kinikwetap kwam mulong.
27 Nakulejanya yom yawonsu yatenchikay Nzamb kusal, kinashakup chom, bwat.
28 Chawiy katat ilamany ayinen, yilamany kand amikoku a Nzamb akwinkishanyau kulam kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Ikalany atufung a in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, awiy kamu ikadila kal aend mulong wa mash ma Mwanend.
29 Nij anch pinikudiokalaku, antu adia mudi atwingol aswejina akez kwandam mukach mwen, awiy kakez kuyovilap amikoku a Nzamb riy, bwat.
30 Mukach mwa chisak chen mukez kwikal antu amwing akez kulond yom ya makasu, mulong wa kuyirumbul in kwitiyij chakwel ayikakil ku mutambu wau.
31 Chawiy babalany, vurikany anch, am nakulejany en awonsu mivu yisatu, muten ni uchuku, nich mansoj mavud.
32 “Katat nakupanany kal mu makas ma Nzamb ni mu rusangu ra ranaken rend rukutwisha kukukasikeshany mu ritiy. Chawiy ukez kutambulany yiyukish yikat kupanay Nzamb kudi antwend ishitwila mu ritiy.
33 Kinovap kwam ris ra utad wa argent, ap ra utad wa or, ap ra yidjal ya muntu mukwau.
34 En ayinen wijany anch, am nading ni kusal mudimu nich makas mam mulong wa kuman yom yinading niswiridina amwinam, ni yading yiswiridinau akwetu nading nau.
35 Nakulejanya mitapu yawonsu chifanyidin kusal midimu yikash mudi munasala am, mulong wa kuyikwash aburedina. Vurikany mazu malonday Nsalejetu Yesu amwinend anch: ‘Chiyukish cha mwin kupan chipandakenamu cha mwin kutambul.’ ”
36 Chapwishay Paul kulond, ndiy wasa manungun pamwing nau awiy, chad walembil.
37 Awonsu adila, chad amubwikat Paul ni kumususu mulong wa kukanijan nend.
38 Awiy ova ushon nakash mulong ndiy walonda anch: “En kiukez kwinmananyap kand.” Chad amutwalaku djat ni ku waat.
0 Paul ukat kuya ku Yerusalem
1 Twakanijana nau, chad twatumbuk. Twenda kamu salal mu waat djat ni ku ditung dia Kos. Chikwacha, twashika ku ditung dia Rod, chad pitwadiokala ku Rod twashika ku ditung dia Patara.
2 Kwinikwa twatanaku waat wa mu karung wading uyil kwi ngand ya Fenisiy, chad niyetu twandama, twaya nau.
3 Twashika ndond yimwing yitwamena ditung dia Shipre, chad twadisutila ku mutambu wa kurul, twashik mwi ngand ya Siria. Twandama mu musumb wa Tir, mulong asota kudiosh yom mu waat.
4 Kwinikwa twatanaku in kwitiyij amwing, chad twashakama nau rubing rumwing. Awiy ayibabesha kudi Mwiku Utumbila, amulej Paul anch: “Kangal waya ku Yerusalem.”
5 Pakwez chimapwa machuku mitwashakama nau, twakanijana, chad twadandamena kandi kuya mu weny wetu. In kwitiyij awonsu, pamwing ni amband ni an, atubudishaku mu musumb, atutwalaku ku chau. Kwinikwa etu awonsu twasa manungun pansh, twalembila.
6 Twakanijana nau, chad twandama mu waat wa mu karung, niyau achirika kwol kwau.
7 Twadiokala Ku Tir, twaya ku musumb wa Pitolemey, kwawiy twapwishila weny wetu wa mu waat. Kwinikwa twayilangwisha in kwitiyij, chad twashakama nau dichuku dimwity,
8 Chikwacha, twatumbuka, twashik ku musumb wa Sevurey. Kwinikwa twashakama ku chikumbu cha Filip, mwin kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp. Ndiy wading umwing wa pakach pa antu sambwad atondau kwikal in kukwash atwimbuy a Yesu mu Yerusalem.
9 Ndiy wading ukwet an amband anying akad kal kwachik, niyau ading ni kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb.
10 Pitwadinga kwinikwa machuku makemp, Agabus, muruu wa Nzamb, wadiokala kwi ngand ya Yudeya, wez.
11 INdiy waseja piswimp ni yetwetu, chad wanon nshipu ya Paul, wikas ku mend ni ku makas, walond anch: “Mwiku Utumbila ulondil anch: ‘Muntu mwin nshipu yiney akez kumukas mutapu winou kudi in Yuda ku Yerusalem, chad akez kumupan mu makas ma antu a michid yikwau.’ ”
12 Pitwatesha mazu minam, etu, pamwing nau antu a ku Sezarey, twamwilembila Paul chakwel alika kuya ku Yerusalem.
13 Pakwez ndiy watwakula anch: ‘“Ukat kudilany ni kwinletil ushon mu muchim. Ov, mulong wak usadilanya mwamu? Am nitiyin kwinkas ku Yerusalem, nitiyin kand kufil kwinikwa mulong wa kumwambat Nsalejetu Yesu.”
14 Twakanganya kukarumun yitongijok yend, chad twalika, twalond anch: “Chifanyidin Nzamb asala kwend mudi musotilay.”
15 Chikwasuta machuku, twakasa yom yetu, twaya ku Yerusalem.
16 In kwilej amwing a ku Sezarey atutwalaku, atushikija ku chikumbu kutukushakama. Chading chikumbu cha Manason, mwin kwitiyij mukur wa ku Shipre.
0 Paul ukat kuya kumulangwish Jakobu
17 Pitwashika ku Yerusalem, in kwitiyij atwaka nich chisambu.
18 Chikwacha, Paul waya ni yetwetu kumulangwish Jakobu. Amakurump awonsu au in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ading kwinikwa.
19 Paul wayilangwisha, chad wayirumburil yom yawonsu yasalay Nzamb kudi antu a michid yikwau mulong wa mudimu wend.
20 Chateshau mazu minam, awly awonsu amushimana Nzamb, alond anch: “Mwanamakwetu Paul, ey umen tunan tuvud twa in Yuda ikadil kal in kwitiyij. Awiy awonsu akat kulam Yijil ya Moses nich mushiku.
21 Ayilejin kal anch, ey wading ni kuyilej in Yuda awonsu ashicha mu mangand ma antu a michid yikwau kulik kulam Yijil ya Moses. Wayilejin kand kulik kuyitwal anau ku mukand ni kulik kulam yaku yau in Yuda.
22 Chakin, antu inay akutesh anch, ey wezang kal, chad mwamu, ov, etu tukusal nchik?
23 Etu tutongil anch chifanyidin tusala mwamu. Kunoku kudi antu anying & machip kudi Nzamb.
24 Ey, yang nau chakwel usalany paniwihg yom yawonsu ya kwishitwish, ey ukuyifut usey wa yom yijiey Chad awiy akutwish kukil mitu yau. Mwamu antu awonsy akwijik anch, yom yawonsu yayilejinau mulong weyey kiyidiap yakin. Akwijik kand anch, niyey amwiney ukat kulam Yijil ya Moses.
25 Pakwez mulong wa antu a michid yikwau yikadil kal in kwitiyij, twayitumidin kal mukand anch: ‘Etu twarijekin kal anch kichifanyidinap en kudia yom yilambwilau kudi akish, ap kudia mash, ap kudia mbij ja nnam ujipinau wakad kukatul . mulong wa kubudish mash, ap kangal wimikany dis,’ ”
26 Chawiy Paul waya nau, chikwacha, awiy asala yom yawonsu ya kwishitwish pamwing. Chad waya mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wayilej in kupesh chisu chikuwanyina machuku ma kwishitwish, chakwel ez ayipeshil muntu ni muntu yakupesh yend.
0 Akat kumukwat Paul mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
27 Pakwez chimela machuku mau sambwad kuwanyin, in Yuda amwing adiokala kwi ngand ya Aziy amumana Paul mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Awiy asarumuna chisak chawonsu cha antu, chad amukwat.
28 Awiy abaroka anch: “En in Isarel, tukwashanyaku! Ndiy winou muntu ukata kutambitamb kwawonsu, ukat kuyilej antu awonsu mulong wa kuyifish nich in Isarel, ni Yijil ya Moses, ni Chikumbu cha Nzamb chinech. Katat ndiy wayandjik kal antu a michid yikwau mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, awiy ajondish kal ndond yiney yitumbila!”
29 Awiy alonda yom yiney mulong amumana Trofim wa ku Efes wading nend Paul mu musumb, chad atonga anch, Paul wamwandjik kal mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
30 Antu awonsu a mu musumb arumbangana, akumangana swa, amukwat Paul, chad amudadamijan, amubudisha pol pa Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Pawiy kamu pinipa apatola yis.
31 In kanvundangesh apakisha kumujip Paul, chad antu amwingt akamulejamu kalal wa amasalay a in Rom anch: “Antu awonsu a mu Yerusalem akat kulet kanvundangesh.”
32 Pawiy kamu pinipa kalal wayisenda amasalay amwing nau amakurump au, Waya mau, wandam mu chisak, chad antu chamumanau udi nau amasalay, awiy alika kumubul Paul.
33 Kalal wa amasalay waseja piswimp kudi Paul, wamukwat, chad walejan kumukas nich jimbwambu jaad. Chawiy wipula aneh: “Ov, muntu mwinou udi nany? Ov, yom ik yasalangay?"
34 Antu amwing a mu chisak abaroka mulong wa chom chimwing, akwau abaroka mulong wa chom chikwau, Mulong wa kurumbangan kwinoku, kalal wakanganya kujingunin chom chashika. Chawiy walejana kumutwal Paul mu dipat mudiau amasalay,
35 Amasalay aya nend nawamp kushik ku yikandamin, chad amuzambula, amusend mulong kanvundangesh kasweja nakash.
36 Awonsu amulondula panyim ni kubarok anch: "Mujipany!"
0 Paul ukat kwilondilap amwinend
37 Chelau amasalay kumwandjik Paul mu dipat, ndiy wamwipula kalal wau anch: “Ov, nikutwish kulondap dizu udi ey?” Kalal wamwakula anch: “Ov, komb ey ukutwish kulond rudim ra win Grek?
38 Ov, kiyeyap mwin Idjibit wasambisha chisak cha in kubwambwil amakurump a ngand machuku ma kwinyim, chad wayitwala amakundj tunan tunying mwi mpay kwikal in kujipan?”
39 Paul Serrelcile anch: “Am nidi mwin Yuda wa ku musumb wa Taris mwi ngand ya Silisia, nidi mwan a ngand wa musumb ujim. Nakwilembil, amboku, ngitiya niyilejap tu dizu.” ve
40 Chawiy kalal wamwitiya, chad Paul wimana pa chikandamin, wayinenetish antu nich chikas. Chanenetau, Paul wayileja mu rudim ra win Hebereu anch:
1 En anamakwam ni atatuku, nteshany. Katat nisotil a kwilondilap amwinam kurutu kwen!”
2 Chateshau anch ulondil mu rudim ra win Hebereu, awiy aneneta zong. Chad Paul wadandamena kulond anch:
3 “Am nidi mwin Yuda wa ku musumb wa Taris mwi ngand ya Silisia, pakwez nakudila mwin mu Yerusalem omu. Nading mwin kwilej wa Gamaliel. Nileja nawamp Yijil yau anshankuretu, nipana kudi Nzamb mudi muwipanyinanya niyen udiany pinap ilel.
4 Nayizengola antu in kulondul Njil ya Nsalejetu djat ni kuyishikij ku rufu. Nayikwatanga amakundj ni amband, nayitwal mu rukan.
5 Mwin kupesh mujim ni in dirumburish dijim akutwish kushinshik anch, nilondil chakin. Awiy anginkisha mikand yayifundilau anamakwetu in Yuda a ku musumb wa Damas. Chawiy naya kwinikwa mulong wa kuyikwat in kwitiyij ni kuyikas mu jimbwambu, chad nela kuyichirish kunoku ku Yerusalem chakwel ayileja kadimu.
0 Paul ukat kurumburil mutapu wakarumukay
6 “Pinading niyil, naseja piswimp ni ku musumb wa Damas, muten wading piswimp ni mukach, kukashimuk, mulayilay wadiokal mwiur, wangombamu.
7 Am nawa pansh, chad natesha dizu diangel anch: ‘Saul, Saul! Ov, mulong wak ey ukat kwinzengol am?’
8 Am namwipula anch: ‘Nsalejam, Ov, yey nany?’ Ndiy wangakula anch: ‘Yam Yesu wa ku Nazaret ukata kuzengol ey.’
9 Antu ading ni yamam amana mulayilay, pakwez kateshap dizu diendendiy wading ni kulond ni yamam.
10 Namwipula anch: “Ov, Nsalejam, chom ik chinfanyidina kusal?’ Chad Nsalejam wangakula anch: ‘Tumbuk, uya mu musumb wa Damas, mwinimwa akukulej yom yawonsu yakutenchikinay Nzamb kusal.
11 Nading mputames mulong wa mulayilay, chawiy akwetu inadinga nau ankwata ku chikas, antwal mu musumb wa Damas.
12 “Mu musumb winou mwading muntu, dijin diend Ananias, wading mwin kumwifukwil Nzamb, wading ulamin Yijil yetu, ading kand amulimishin kudi in Yuda awonsu a mu musumb winou.
13 Ndiy weza wangimanyin piswimp, wangel anch: ‘Mwanamakwam, man kand!’ Pawiy kamu pinipa namana, chad namumana Ananias.
14 Ndiy wanleja anch: ‘Nzamb wa anshankuretu wakutonda kal ey mulong wa kwijik rusot rend, mulong wa kumuman Kashalapol utentamina, ni kwov dizu diend dikulejinay amwinend.
15 Mulong ey ukez kwikal kaman wend wa kuyirumburil antu awonsu yom yiwamana ni yiwatesha.
16 Kangal walab kand. Tumbuk, akubatish, lembil chakwel Nsalejetu Yesu ukukulikishin yitil yey.’
0 Nzamb ukat kumutazuk Paul kuya kudi antu a michid yikwau
17 “Nachirika kand ku Yerusalem, chad pinading ni kulembil mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, namana chishimushimu.
18 Mu chishimushimu chinech namumana Nsalejetu Yesu, ukat kwinlej anch: “Swakal, diokal mu Yerusalem swa, mulong antu adia mwinomu kakwitiyap uman weyey ukulejana mulong wamam.’
19 Am namwakula anch: ‘Nsalejam, awiy ij kal nawamp mutapu unaya mu yikumbu ya kulembil mulong wa kuyikwat in kukwitiyij ey ni kuyibul.
20 Pamujipau Stefan, mwin kukwambat ey, niyam nading kwinikwa. Nayitiya antu amujipa, yam nalama kand atubwik au.’
21 Nsalejam wanleja kand anch: ‘Yang, mulong am nikez kukutum ey kulemp kudi antu a michid yikwau.’ ”
22 Ant amutesha Paul djat ni palonday mazu minam, Pakwez pinipa asambisha kubarok anch: “Mudioshany! Mujip any! Ndiy kafanyidinap kwikal mwom!”
23 Abaroka ni kuzwiyol yidjal yau, ni kwichil rufunfut mwiur,
24 Kalal wa amasalay wayileja amasalay kumwandjik Paul mu dipat, chad wayileja kand kumubul nich nfimbu chakwel ajingunin yom yibarokinau in Yuda mulong wendendiy.
25 Pakwez chamukasau kal chakwel amubul nfimbu, Paul wamwipula mukurump wading wiminy kwinikwa anch: "Ov, yijil yey yikwinkishin usu wa kumubul mwin Rom wakad kal kumufish nich?"
26 Chateshay mukurump mazu minam, waya kudi kalal, wamwipul anch: "Ov, usotil etu tusal nchik? Muntu mwinou udi mwin Rom!"
27 Chawiy kalal waya, wamwipul Paul anch: "Nleja, ov, ey udi mwin Rom?"
28 Kalal wamwela anch: "Am nafuta nfalang jivud mulong wa kwikal mwin Rom." Pakwez Paul wamwakula anch: "Am nidi mwin Rom mulong wa kuvadik"
29 Pawiy kamu pinipa antu ela kumwipul Paul adiokala, amusha. Chad kalal wa amasalay wova wom nakash pijikay anch, Paul udi mwin Rom, ndiy wadi wamukasang kal mu jimbwambu.
0 Akat kumutwal Paul ku dirumburish dijim
30 Kalal wa amasalay wasota kujingunin nawamp mulong umufundidilau Paul kudi in Yuda. Chawiy chikwacha, ndiy wamusurila Paul mu jimbwambu. Chad wayitazuka in kupesh ajim ni in dirumburish dijim awonsu kukumangan pamwing, wamulet Paul, wamwimik kurutu kwau.
1 Paul wayitala in dirumburish dijim neeng, wayel anch: “Anamakwam, in Isarel! Muchim wam kiwinfishilap nich mu mwom wam kurutu kwa Nzamb djat ni ilel unou.”
2 Mwin kupesh mujim ean Ha wading wiminy iswimp nend Paul anch: “Mubula ku kan!
3 Paul wamwakula anch: “Ey, mwin rubabek, chakin, Nzamb ukukubul niyey, udi mudi rubumbu rupanyinau mpemb! in ushich pinap mulong wa kwinrumburish am mudi mudia Be pakwez ey amwiney ukat kujip Yijil uyilejin antu ambul am!
4 Antu ading iminy piswimp nend Paul, amwel ay Ey ukat kumusaal mwin kupesh mujim wa Nzamb masaal!”
5 Paul wayakula anch: "Anamakwam, in Isarel, kinadiap nij anch udi mwin kupesh. Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: 'Kichifanyidinap kumulond mwin kutakel wa antwey chom chiyimp.'"
6 Chamanay Paul anch, mu chisak mudi Asadus ni Afaris, ndiy wabarika anch: "Anamakwam, in Isarel! Am niyam nidi Mufaris, mwan wau Afaris. Am akat kwinrumburish kunoku mulong wa ruchingej rinikweta anch, afu akez kuvumbuk, ikal kand aom!"
7 Chalonday Paul mwamu, Afaris ni Asadus asambisha kutadikijan, chad chisak chauroka,
8 mulong Asadus akat kulond anch, afu kakuvumbukap kwikal kand aom, kKitiyinap anh kuding aruu a mwiur, ap anch kuding miku. Pakwez Afiria what kwitiy anch, yom yiney yisatu yidi kwaku.
9 Masok mapandakana nakash, chad alej amwing a Yijil ading mu chisak cha Alarin imana piur, atadik nich usu anch: “Etu kitumenap chom chiyimp chisadilay muntu mwinou! Chakin, ap udi mwiku, ap muruu wa mwiur wamulejina chom!”
10 Matend mapandakana nakash, chad kalal wa amasalay wova wom anch, ap ez amuzanon Paul. Chawiy ndiy wayileja amasalay end kwandam mu chisak, chakwel amudiosh Paul mukach, amutwal mu dipat.
11 Uchuku wa dichuku dinidia Nsalejetu weza kudi Paul, wamwel anch: “Kangal wov kwey wom! Ey wamekesh kal uman wey mulong wamam kunoku mu Yerusalem, chawiy chifanyidin kand ey kumekesh uman winou ku musumb wa Rom.”
0 In Yuda akat kumupungan Paul
12 Chikwacha pamanch, in Yuda amwing akumangana mulong wa kumupungan Paul. Achipa anch: “Kitukutwishap kudia ap kuna chom ching kamu twamujip bil Paul.”
13 Kwading antu makum manying ni kusut akwata mpung yiney.
14 Chad aya kudi in kupesh ajim ni kudi amakurump, ayilej anch: “Etu twachipang kal anch, kitukudiap chom chi ng kamu twamujip Paul.
