15 Katat en ni in dirumburish dijim tumany dizu kudi kalal wa amasalay a Rom, chakwel amuleta Paul kudi en. Dimbanany mudi usotilany kujingunin yom yikwau mulong wendendiy. Pakwez etu tukumubatamen, tumujip pakadiay kal kushik kudi en.”
16 Pakwez mwipwend a Paul watesha mulong wa mpung yiney, chawiy waya ku dipat, wamulejamu Paul.
17 Chad Paul wamutazuka mukurump umwing wa amasalay, wamulej anch; “Mutwala nsangarum winou kudi kalal wen, nsangarum winou ukwet yom ya kumulej.”
18 Mukurump wa amasalay waya nend nsangarum kudi kalal, wamulej anch: “Muntu wa rukan, Paul, wantazukang, wanginkishay nsangarum winou nimuleta kudi ey, mulong ndiy ukwet yom ya kukulej.”
19 Kalal wamukwataku nsangarum ku chikas, waya nend ku ujindj, wamwipul anch: "Yom ik yiukweta ya kwinlej?"
20 Ndiy wamuleja anch: "Amakurump au in Yuda ovijanang kal anch akwipul ey diamashik umutwal Paul ku dirumburish dijim. Akudimban mudi asotil kujingunin yom yikwau mulong wendendiy.
21 Pakwez kangal wayitesh, mulong kudi antu makum manying ni kusut akumubatamena. Awiy achipang kal anch: 'Kitukudiap ap kuna ching kamu twamujip Paul." Awiy arijekung kal kusal chom chinech, chad achingedil kwakul kwey.”
22 Kalul wa amasalay wamwela nsangarum anch: “Kangal wamulejap muntu anch, wanlejangamu kal am.” Chad wamuleja nsangarum kuya kwend.
0 Akat kumutwal Paul kudi nyikel Felikis
23 Kalal wayitazuka amakurump aad au amasalay, wayilej anch: “Tenchikany amasalay yitot yaad chakwel akutwish kuya ku musumb wa Sezarey, pamwing ni amasalay makum sambwad akata kukandam pa atubar, ni amasalay yitot yaad akweta mirumbu. Yirijekany, atumbuk pa chisu cha chidivu uchuku winou.
24 Let kand atubar amwing kudi Paul, chawiy mushikijany nawamp kudi nyikel Felikis.”
25 Chad kalal wafunda mukand anch:
26 "Yam Kulod Lisias, nikulangwishina ey nyikel mujim Felikis.
27 In Yuda amukwatil muntu mwinou, edil kumujip. Am natesha anch, udi mwin Rom, chawiy naya nau amasalay am mulong wa kumukamunin.
28 Nasota kushinshik yom yamufundilau, chawiy naya nend ku dirumburish diau dijim. uf
29 Najingunina anch, ndiy kasadilap chom chiyimp cha kumujipin ap kumutek mu rukan. Amufundil mulong | wa yom yitadila yijil yau ayinau.
30 Chad anlej anch amupunganang kal mulong wa kumujip. Pawiy kamu pinipa pinatonganga kumutum kudi ey. Nayilejang in kumufund aleta milong yend kudi ey.”
31 Amasalay asala mudi mwayilejau kudi kalal. Awiy amusenda Paul uchuku winiwa, amutwal ku musumb wa Antipari.
32 Chikwacha, amasalay in kwend ra pansh achirika ku dipat, chad amasalay in kwendil pa atubar adandamena kuya nend Paul.
33 Awiy amushikija ku musumb wa Sezarey, apana mukand kudi nyikel, chad amushikij kand Paul mu makas mend.
34 Nyikel watanga mukand, chad wamwipul Paul ngand yidiokilay. Chateshay anch udiokil kwi ngand ya Silisia,
35 ndiy wamwel anch: “Nikez kukutesh pakushikau in kukufund.” Chad wayileja amasalay kumulamin Paul mu chikumbu cha nyikel chatungay Herod.
0 In Yuda akat kumufund Paul
1 Chikwasuta machuku matan, mwin kupesh WL Ananias, waya ku musumb wa Sezarey, pamwitig, Wu amakurump amwing, ni mwin kuyilondil milong, dijin diend Teritul. Awiy ashika kudi nyikel Felikis, chad amufunda Paul.
2 Chawiy amutazuka Paul, chad Teritul wasambisha kumufund anch: “Nsalejam! Mulong wa manangu mey, katat twashich chisu chilemp nich chisambu. Yom yivud yatentam mwi ngand yetu mulong wa kutakel kwey.
3 Tusotil kukujikitish ey nakash mu yisu yawonsu, ku jindond jawonsu mulong wa yom yiney,
4 Kinisotilap kushesh chisu chey, pakwez nakwilembil, amboku, wikalap nich muchim uwamp wa kutesh mazu metu makemp.
5 Etu tumen anch, muntu mwinou udi kamu mbwambwol, ndiy ukat kusarumun kanvundangesh pakach pa in Yuda mwi ngand yawonsu. Ndiy udi kand mwin kutakel wa chisak cha in Nazaret
6 Ndiy wapakishin kand kujondish Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad etu twamukwat. [Etu twarijekin mutapu wa kumurumburish mudi mudia Yijil yetu,
7 pakwez Lisias, kalal wa amasalay, weza, wichik pakach nich chisum, chad watwamukay mu makas.
8 Lisias watulejin etu, in kumufund, kwez kunoku kudi ey.]’Anch ey wamwipul muntu mwinou, niyey ukez kujingunin yom yawonsu yitumufundidila.”
9 In Yuda niyau amufunda, itiy anch yom yiney yawonsu yidi yakin.
0 Paul ukat kwilondilap kurutu kwa nyikel Felikis
10 Nyikel wamwinkisha Paul usu wa kulond, chad ndiy walonda anch: “Nij anch ey udi nkalansambu wa mivu yivud wa ngand yiney, chawiy nikwet musangar wa kwinlondilap amwinam kurutu kwey.
11 Ukutwish kujingunin amwiney anch, kwasut kal mudi machuku dikum ni maad pinayila am ni kumwifukwil Nzamb ku Yerusalem.
12 In Yuda kantanyinap am_ nikal kutadikijan ni muntu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Kantanyinap kand nikat kuyisarumun antu mu yikumbu ya kulembil, ap kw! ndond yikwau mu musumb.
13 Kakutwishap kwau kushinshik chakin yom yinfundidilau.
14 Pakwez am nitiyin kurutu kwey anch, nikat kumwifukwil Nzamb wa anshankuretu pinikata kulondul Njil yisu ya Nsalejetu yimenau awiy aneh yidi ya makasu. Pakwez nitiyin kand yom yawonsu yifundilau mu Yijil ya Moses, ni mu mikand ya aruu a Nzamb.
15 Am nikiat kuchingej anch, antu awamp ni antu ayimp akez kuvumbuk kwikal kand aom.
16 Nikat kwikasikesh machuku mawonsu kwikal nich kom kawamp kurutu kwa Nzamb ni kwa antu,
17 "Nalangel mivu yivud wakad kushik mu Yerusalem, chawly vezi! mulong wa kuyiletil in Yuda amwing milambu, ni kupan yakupesh kudi Nzamb.
18 Nading ni kusal yom singe pawiy pantanau awiy mu Chikumbu cha Nant Am nadi nishitwishin kal, kinasalap kwam kanvundangan.
19 Pakwez in Yuda amwing a mwi ngand ya Aziy adinga mwinimwa. Chawiy chifanyidin iyezinap ayinau kurutu kwey kwinfund anch akwet chom.
20 Ap chifanyidin antu inay akulej ey chom chiyimp chanfishau nich pantwalau ku dirumburish dijim.
21 Pakwez nabaroka kusu mulong wa chom chimwing pinamana kurutu kwau anch: ‘En wanrumburishany kal ilel unou mulong nitiyin anch, afu akez kuvumbuk kand ikal aom..” ’
22 Felikis wadi wij yom ya Njil ya Nsalejetu, chad wimika mulong, wayilej anch: “Pakushikay kalal Lisias, pawiy pinikeza kukatul mulong wen.”
23 Ndiy wamuleja mukurump wa amasalay kumulam Paul nawamp mu rukan ra mes, pakwez amwovila riy chakwel arund nend akwez ni kumuletil yom yikwetay nich kuswir.
0 Paul ukat kwambamb nend Felikis ni Drusila
24 Chipasuta machuku, Felikis weza nend mukajend Drusila, mband winou wading mwin Yuda. Ndiy wamutumesha Paul chakwel atesha yom yikulonday mulong wa ritiy’ mu Yesu Kristu.
25 Pakwez chalonday Paul mulong wa mwom utentamina, ni mutapu wa kwilam muntu amwinend, ni ya kushik kwa Dichuku dia Dirumburish dia Nzamb, Felikis wova wom, wamwel anch: “Katat yang kwey, nikez kukutazuk kand anch nikal nich chisu.”
26 Pa chisu chinicha ndiy wachingeja anch, Paul ukumukatul milamu nich nfalang, winou wawiy mulong wamutumeshinangay kwambamb nend.
27 Chipasuta mivu yaad Parisius Festus wikala nyikel pa ndond ya Felikis. Chawiy Felikis wasota kwiwapish kudi in Yuda, chad wamusha Paul mu rukan.
0 Paul ukat kwit dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom
1 Pashikay Festus kwasuta machuku masatu, chad wis wadiokala ku Sezarey, waya ku Yerusalem.
2 Kwinikwa in kupesh ajim ni in kutakel au in Yuda amufunda Paul. Awiy amulembijeka Festus
3 ayisangarish chakwel ndiy amulet Paul ku Yerusalem, Awiy ading amupunganang kal mulong wa kumujipin mwi njil.
4 Festus wayakula anch: “Paul udi mu rukan ku Sezarey, niyam amwinam nisotil kuchirik kwinikwa mu machuku makemp.
5 Chifanyidin in kutakel en kuya pamwing ni yamam ku Sezarey, chad akutwish kumufish nich kwinikwa anch ndiy wasala chom chiyimp.”
6 Festus washakama kand nau machuku chinan ap dikum, chad wachirik ku Sezarey. Chikwacha, ndiy washakama pa ndond yend ya kurumburishin, chad wamutumesh Paul.
7 Chashikay Paul, in Yuda adiokala ku Yerusalem amwombamu, chad asambish kumufund nich yom yivud yikash yakanganyangau ayinau kumushikijaku nich.
8 Pakwez Paul wilondilap amwinend anch: “Am kinisadilap kwam chom chiyimp cha kujip Yijil yau in Yuda, ap cha kuyipish Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ap kinilondilap kwam chom chiyimp kudi mwant wa in Rom, bwat.”
9 Pakwez Festus wasota kwiwapish kudi in Yuda, chawiy wamwipula Paul anch: “Oy, ey ukutwish kwitiy kuchirik ku Yerusalem, chakwel am nikakurumburishin kwinikwa mulong wa yom yiney?”
10 Paul wamwakula anch: “Am niminy kurutu kwa dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom, pawiy pinap pafanyidinau kwinrumburishin. Am kinisadilap chom chiyimp kudi in Yuda, mudi muwija kal ey amwiney.
11 Anch am najipin Yijil, ap anch nasadil chom chinifanyidina kufil, kinikutwishap kutadik kufa. Pakwez anch yom yinfundilau kiyidiap yakin, kwikil muntu ukutwisha kwimpan mu makas mau. Chawiy am nit kal dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom.”
12 Festus wambamba nau in kumuyul, chad wamwakul Paul anch: “Ey wit kal dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom, chawiy ukuya kwey kudi mwant wa in Rom.”
0 Akat kumutwal Paul kurutu kwa Mwant Agripa ni Berenise
13 Chipasuta machuku, Mwant Agripa ni nambaz wend Berenise aya ku Sezarey mulong wa kumwezishaku Festus.
14 Alala kwinikwa machuku, chad Festus wamurumburila mwant milong ya Paul anch: “Kunoku kudi muntu umwing washau mu rukan kudi Felikis.
15 Pinaya ku Yerusalem, in kupesh ajim au in Yuda ni amakurump au amufunda, chad angita am chakwel nimufisha nich.
16 Pakwez nayakula anch, etu in Rom kitukwetap chaku cha kumupan muntu ufundilau wakad kal kumurumburish mes ni mes nau in kumufund, chakwel niyend ukutwish kwilondilap amwinend ku yom yawonsu yimufundilau.
17 Tweza nau kunoku pamwing, chikwacha kinasutishap chisu, nashakama pa ndond ya kurumburishin, chad namutumesha Paul.
18 In kumufund eza, alond, pakwez kamufishap nich ku yom yiyimp ya chisum mudi munatonga.
19 Awiy ading ni kutadikijan nend kusu mulong wa yom yau ya kwifukwil, ni mulong wa muntu umwing wata kal, dijin diend Yesu. Pakwez Paul ukat kulond anch, ndiy udi kand mwom.
20 Kinamanap mutapu wa kushinshik yom yimey, chad namwipula Paul anch ndiy ukutwish kwitiy kuya ku Yerusalem chakwel akamurumburishin milong yiney kwinikwa.
21 Pakwey Paul wita dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom, wita kand ehakwel amulamin mu rukan djat ni pakukatwilay mwant milong yend. Chawiy nalejana kumulam mwamu djat ni pinikumena mutapu wa kumutum kudi mwant.”
22 Agripa wamuleja Festus anch: “Niyam nisotil kumuteshap bil muntu mwinou. Festus wamuleja anch: “Ukumutesh kwey diamashik.”
23 Chikwacha, Agripa ni nambaz wend Berenise eza nich katumb kajim, andam mu chikumbu chijim cha kukumangen. Ading nau amakurump ajim au amasalay, ni amakurump a musumb. Chad Festus wamutumesha Paul.
24 Festus walonda anch: “Mwant Agripa, ni yenen antu awonsu udiany pinap, en umumenany muntu mwinou upompatinau kudi in Yuda awonsu adia kunoku ni adia ku Yerusalem. Awiy amufunda kudi am, akat kubarokang anch: ‘Kichifanyidinap muntu mwinou kwikal kand mwom.’
25 Pakwez am kinamenap chom chiyimp chikufilay. Chawiy ndiy amwinend witil kuya hss dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom, chad am nitiya ka kumutum kwinikwa.
26 Pakwez am kinimenap chem cha kashinsh cha kufund kudi mwant wa in Rom. Chawiy namulet kal ndiy kurutu kwen, chom chijim namulet kal kurutu kweyey Mwant Agripa! Anch twapwish kumwipol ku milong yend, ap nikuman chom cha kumufundil mwant.
27 Mulong am nimen anch chidi chom chiyimp kumutum muntu wa rukan wakad kwovakesh patok milong yimufundidilau.
0 Paul ukat kwilondilap kurutu kwa Agripa
1 Agripa wamuleja Paul anch: “Nakwinkish kal usu wa Karlondilep Saino” Chawiy Paul wazambula chikas, wasambish kulond anch: ;
2 “Mwant Agripa! Ilel nayukang kal, mulong ea kwilondilap amwinam kurutu kwey milong yinfundilau ku ; in Yuda,
3 Chijim, ey wij kal nawamp yaku yawonsu ni nta jain Yuda. Chawiy nilemb, amboku, nakwitany anch ukutwish kwinteshany nich muchim ushimpina.
4 “In Yuda awonsu ij mutapu wa mwom wam kudiokal ku usand wam. Ij kand anch, nashakama pakusambish mwi ngand yam ya chivadik, chad kwinyim nashakama kand mu Yerusalem.
5 Anch awiy akatil kulet uman wakin, akutwish kushinshik anch, kudiokal pakusambish nading mu chisak chetu cha kwifukwil chikweta yijil yipandakena kuvul, chawiy kamu cha Afaris.
6 Katat niminy kunoku mu dirumburish mulong wa ruchingej rinikweta ra kushilamu kwashilayimu Nzamb kudi anshankuretu.
7 Ruchingej riner rawiy ruchingejinau kudi in michid yetu dikum ni yaad kurutambul pakatau kumwifukwil Nzamb muten ni uchuku. Rawiy ruchingej riner, A! Mwant Agripa, rinfundidilau am kudi in Yuda!
8 Ov, mulong wak en in Yuda ulikinany kwitiy anch, Nzamb ukat kuvumbul an kwikal kand aom?
9 “Chakin, am amwinam natonga anch, chifanyidin kuyal yom yawonsu ya kuyikangesh antu awonsu alondwila dijin din Yesu wa ku Nazaret.
10 Yiney yawiy yom yinasala mu Yerusalem. Natambula ulabu kudi in kupesh ajim mulong wa kuyitek antu avud a Nzamb mu rukan. Payifishangau nich kwa kuyijip, niyam nitiyanga.
11 Tupamp tuvud ku usu wam ayilejanga kadimu mu yikumbu ya kulembil, napakishanga kand kuyibachik nich usu chakwel atuna ritiy rau. Mulong nading ni kuyovil ujim nakash, natambitamba djat ni ku misumb ya aeny chakwel niyizengol.
0 Paul ukat kurumburil mutapu wakarumukay
12 “Mulong wa kusal yom yiney, wawiy unayila ku musumb wa Damas nich ulabu ni mikand yadiokala kudi in kupesh ajim.,
13 Mwant Agripa, pinading mwi njil, muten pakach, namana mulayilay uzutila kupandakanamu muten, wadiokala mwiur, wez wangombamu am pamwing ni antu inading nau.
14 Etu awonsu twawa pansh, chad am natesha dizu mu rudim rau in Hebereu diangel anch: ‘Saul, Saul! Ov, mulong.wak ey ukat kwinzengol am? Ey ukat kwimesh amwiney mar, udi mudi ngomb ukata kwipamp amwinend ku musomburik wa nsalejend.’
15 Am namwipula anch: ‘Nsalejam, ov, yey nany?’ Chad Nsalejam wangakula anch: ‘Yam Yesu, ukata kuzengol ey.
16 Pakwez tumbuk, iman. Namekanang kudi ey mulong wa kukutek kwikal kashalapol wam. Ukez kwikal kaman -wa kuyilej antu akwau mutapu wanmananga am. Ukez kuyilej kand yom yikwau yinikeza kukulej kurutu.
17 Am nikez kukukamunin ey ku makas ma in Yuda ni ma antu a michid yikwau kunikeza kukutum.
18 Chad ey ukez kuyiburil mes, ukez kuyidiosh ku mididim kuyilet ku kutok, ukuyidiosh kand ku ukash wa Sakudimban kuyilet kudi Nzamb, chakwel pakwingi tiyijau akez kutambul dilikishin dia yitil yau ni kushakam pamwing nau antu ishitwila mu ritly.’
0 Paul ukat kurumburil ya mudimu wend
19 “Chawiy, Mwant Agripa, naziyila ku chishimushime chinamana chadiokala mwiur.
20 Narumburila mazu ma Nzamb anch chifanyidin antu akarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau, eva kudi Nzamb, chad asala yom yiwamp ya kumekesh kukarumuk kwau, Narumburila mazu minam pakusambish mu musumb wa Damas, ni mu musumb wa Yerusalem, chad kwinyim nayirumburila kand antu a michid yikwau.
21 Yawiy yom yiney yankwatilou am kudi in Yuda mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad ela kwinjip.
22 Pakwez Nzamb wankwasha kushik djat ni ilel wnou, chawiy chiniminya pinap ni kulejan uman wam kudi antu ajim ni antu akemp mutapu umwing. Yom yinilondila yawiy yalejanau aruu a Nzamb ni Moses anch yikez kushik.
23 Awiy alejana anch: ‘Chifanyidin Kristu Uzizidilau Many kuman mar ni kufa, chad ez asambelaku kuvumbuk kwikal kand mwom, chakwel ndiy ukurumburil chimunyik cha kupand kudi in Yuda ni kudi antu a michid yikwau.’ ”
24 Padingay Paul kwilondilap amwinend mwamu, Festus wamubarikina anch: “Paul, ey uyedil rangul! Kwilej kwey nakash kwakuyedish kal rangul!”
25 Paul wamwakula anch: “Mwant Festus, am kiniyedilap rangul, bwat. Nikat kulond yom yakin yovakena.
26 Mwant Agripa! Nikutwish kukulej patok wakad wom, mulong ey wij kal yom yiney. Nij nawamp anch, ey wateshil kal yom yiney yawonsu, mulong chom chinech kichasutilap kulemp ap ku ujindj.
27 Ov, Mwant Agripa, ey ukat kwitiy mazu mau aruu a Nzamb? Nij nawamp anch, ey ukat kwitiy!”
28 Mwant Agripa wamwipul Paul anch: “Ov, mu kachisu kakemp mwamu utongil anch, ukutwish kwinkarumun kwikal mwin Kristu?”
29 Paul wamwakula anch: “Mu kachisu kakemp ap mu chisu chilemp, nikat kumulembil Nzamb anch, ey ni antu akwau awonsu anteshila ilel unou wikalany mudi munidia am, pakwez wikalany wakad jimbwambu mudi jinej!”
30 Chad mwant, ni nyikel, ni Berenise, ni antu akwau awonsu atumbuka.
31 Chabudikau, alejijana muntu ni mukwau anch: “Muntu mwinou kasadilap kwend chom cha kumujipin ap cha kumutek mu rukan.”
32 Mwant Agripa wamuleja Festus anch: “Muntu mwinou anch kitinap kuya ku dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom, ing twelang kumulikishaku.”
0 Akat kumutwal Paul ku Rom
1 Awiy atonda kututwal kwi ngand ya Itali mu waat wa mu karung. Chad amupana Paul ni antu amwing a rukan mu makas ma mukurump wa amasalay, dijin diend Julius. Wading mu chisak cha amasalay chipidilau anch, Chisak cha Amasalay a mwant wa in Rom.
2 Twandama mu waat wading udiokila ku musumb wa Adramit, wading piswimp ni kutumbuk kuya ku misumb ya ku chikumu cha karung mwi ngand ya Aziy, chad twatumbuka twaya. Twaya nend Aristarik, mwin ku Masedon wa ku musumb wa Tesalonik,
3 Chikwacha, wamwitiy kuya kuyilangwish arund nend chakwel akutwish kumukwash yom yawonsu yiswiridinay.
4 Twatumbuka kwinikwa mu waat, chad twasutina mutambu wa ditung dia Shipre kwadinga rinkind mukemp, mulong rinkind watupwepula nayimp.
5 Twaukina pakach pa karung mutambu wa ngand ya Silisia ni ya Pamfiliy, twashik ku musumb wa Mira mwi ngand ya Lisiy.
6 Kwinikwa mukurump wa amasalay wamana waat udiokila ku musumb wa Alekizandria wading uyil kwi ngand ya Itali, chawiy watwandjika mwinimwa.
7 Twaya mu waat pakemp pakemp machuku makemp, twamana mar nakash, pakwez twaseja piswimp ni ku musumb wa Sinid. Rinkind watukangesha etu kudandamen kuya mutambu winiwa, chad twasutila mutambu wa ditung dia Kret kwading rinkind mukemp, chad wasuta pa ndond pandamina mukank wa divu mu karung yipidilau anch, Salamone.
8 Twalamata ku chikumu ku chikumu, ap anch twamanap nchik mar nakash twashika ku chifumbu cha karung, chipidilau anch, Cha Kuchidijin Maat. Ndond yiniya kiyadingap kulemp ni ku ul wa Lasey.
9 Twashakama kwinikwa machuku mavud, djat ni pasambisha chirung cha rinkind wa ubaj mu waat wa mu karung, mulong dichuku dia kujil yakudia dia kuchakul yitil diading diasut kal. Chawiy Paul wayibabesha anch:
10 "En akwetu, nimen anch, weny wetu wa kudiokal kunoku ukez kwikal weny wa ubaj. Yom ya mu waat ni waat win yikusheshik, ap niyetu ayinetu tukusheshikany kand."
11 Pakwez mukurump wa amasalay watesha ching dizu dia mukurump wa waat ni dia mwin waat, kabangakup dizu dia Paul.
12 Ku chifumbu chinech kiyadingap ndond yiwamp ya kushakam pa chirung cha mashik. Chawiy antu avud a mu waat asota kuchirik kand mu karung chakwel tudandamen kuya, ap tukutwish kushik ku Fenikln chakwel tukashakam kwinikwa pa chirung cha mashik. Chifimbu cha Fenikis chidi ku ditung dia Kret, chitadil pakoeh pa kurand ni kurul, ni pakach pa kurul ni kwiyand.
0 Akat kusankan mambek mu karung
13 Rinkind mukemp wasambisha kudiokal mutambu wa kurul, chawiy in kwawish atongijoka anch, akutwish kusal mudi mwatenchikau. Azambula utad ulimina ukat kudjibulau mu mem mulong wa kukangesh waat kwend, chad asutila ku chikumu ku chikumu cha ditung dia Kret.
14 Pakwez mu chisu chikemp kweza rinkind mukash, upidilau anch, Rinkind wa Pakach pa Kwiyand ni Kwingangel, wadiokala mu ditung.
15 Rinkind wibula ku waat, chad kikwadingap mutapu wa kutadish dizur dia kurutu dia waat kwezila rinkind. Twalika kupakish kwawish, chad waat aupwepula.
16 Pitwasuta mutambu wa kurul wa kaditung kakemp ka Kauda, kwinikwa rinkind washalaku mukemp. Chad twarisha mulong wa kukas® waat ukemp wading ukasidinau kwinyim kwa waat wa mu karung.
17 In kwawish auzambula waat ukemp, aukasin piur pa waat wa mu karung nich moj. Awiy ova wom nakash anch, ap waat wa mu karung ukupatamen mu usukuril piswimp ni chikumu cha ngand ya Libi, chad ukulet ubaj. Mulong wa chom chinech alimuna diswin dikata kwendish waat, chawiy aulika waat kwend nich rinkind.
18 Rinkind mukash wadandamena kutubachik, chad chikwacha, asambisha kudiosh yom yasendau mu waat, ayidjibul mu karung.
19 Chikwacha kand, adjibula yom yimwing ya midimu ya waat.
20 Machuku mavud kitwamanap muten ap atutumbu, rinkind mukash wadandamena, chad kitwachingejap kand anch tukupand.
21 Antu ading mu waat ashakama machuku mavud wakad kudia, chad Paul wiman, wayilej anch: “En akwetu, chading chifanyidin kwinteshany pinakulejanya anch, kangal twadiokal ku ditung dia Kret, ing twelang kwiyep kusheshik kwinoku ni kushadik kwa yom.
22 Pakwez katat, nakwilembilany, ikasikeshany! Kwikil umwing wenen ukeza kushadik, ching kusu waat wawiy ukeza kujiy.
23 Nij yom yiney nawamp mulong muruu wa mwiur wezang kudi am uchuku. Udi muruu wa Nzamb wam unikata kwifukwil.
24 Muruu wanlejang anch: “Paul, kangal wov wom! Chifanyidin ey kuya kwiman kurutu kwa mwant wa in Rom. Nzamb udi muwamp, wakupandish kal ey pamwing ni antu awonsu udia nau mu waat.’
25 Chawiy katat, en akwetu, ikasikeshany! Mulong nichingejin anch, Nzamb ukez kusal yom yawonsu mudi mwanlejangay.
26 Pakwez rinkind ukez kututwal ku chikumu cha ditung dimwing.”
27 Mu machuku dikum ni manying rinkind mukash wading ni kututwal mu Karung Mediterane. Chawiy uchuku wa dichuku dinidia piswimp ni mukach mwa uchuku, in kwawish atonga anch, twashik kal ku chikumu.
28 Chad adjibula moj ukasidinau utad mulong wa kwilik nich kulep kwa mem. Amana anch, pansh padi ametre makum manying. Chipasuta chisu chikemp, ilika kand, chad aman anch, pansh pashal kal ametre makum masatu.
29 Awiy ova wom anch, waat ukwibul ku mayal, chawiy adjibula utad unying ulimina mu mem kwinyim kwa waat, mulong wa kuukangesh waat kwend, chad alembila ing kwachang swa.
30 In kwawish apakisha kuchin, ashirisha waat ukemp mu mem ku dizur dia kurutu dia waat.
31 Pakwez Paul wamuleja mukurump wa amasalay ni amasalay anch: “Anch in kwawish kashichap mu waat, kiukutwishanyap kupand.”
32 Chawiy amasalay akatula moj ya waat ukemp aulikishaku waya. ‘
33 Chikwikala piswimp ni kucha, Paul wayishindila antu awonsu kudia, .wayel anch: “Wading uchingedilany machuku dikum ni manying, mu chisu chinech chawonsu en kiwadilanyap chom.
34 Chawiy nakwilembilany, amboku, dianganyap chom, chamwamu kiukutwishanyap kupand. Kwikil umwing wenen ukushadika, ap kusu ruswich ra ku mutu wend.”
35 Chapwishay Paul kulond mwamu, wanona dibot, wamujikitish Nzamb, wadiumbol, wasambish kudia.
36 Antu awonsu ikasikesha, niyau asambisha kand kudia.
37 Etu awonsu mu waat twading yitot yaad ni makum sambwad ni antu musamban.
38 Chadiau antu awonsu yakudia, ikut, chad adjibula mu mem tidiku mwawonsu wasendau mu waat, mulong wa kupipej waat.
0 Waat ukat kujiy mu karung
39 Chikwacha pamanch, in kwawish amana chikumu, pakwez kijikap kwisu kudiau. Amana chikumu chikweta ndond yalalela ya usukuril, chad atong kupakish kutwalaku waat.
40 Chawiy akatula moj yilamina yikunku ya utad yilimina ya mutambu wa kurutu chakwel rinkind ukubachik waat kurutu, mwamu mwatadishau waat ku chikumu,
41 Pakwez waat wakwata pa usukuril wa pansh pa mem. Dizur dia kurutu dia waat diakwata pansh ti, chad chikunku cha kwinyim cha waat chasheshika nich mambek makash.
42 Amasalay ela kuyijip antu a rukan awonsu chakwel kangal isiy kuya ku chikumu mulong wa kuchin.
43 Pakwez mukurump wa amasalay wasota kumupandish Paul, chad wayikangesh amasalay kusal mwamu. Wayileja antu awonsu ija kwisiy idjibul mu mem, isiy, asambelaku kuya kwi mpat.
44 Antu akwau akushalap akwata ku mabay ap ku yikunku ya waat yadinga mu mem, alondul aya kwi mpat. Winou wawiy mutapu twashika etu awonsu kwi mpat nawamp.
0 Yom yamushikena Paul ku ditung dia Malit
1 Pitwatuntuka etu awonsu akash kwi mpat, twatesha anch, ditung dined adipidil anch, Malit.
2 Antu a kwinikwa atwaka nawamp. Kwasambisha kunak ruvul, kwading kand mashik, chad atupepil kasu, kwawiy kwatulangwishinau.
3 Paul wakumangeja nkuny, wajitek pa kasu. Chad nnak wabudika mwi nkuny mulong wa marungul ma kasu, wamutot Paul ku chikas, wamulamat.
4 Antu a ditung dined chamanau nnak umulamatin Paul ku chikas, alejijana muntu ni mukwau anch: “Chimeken anch muntu mwinou udi mwin kujipan, wapandang kal ku rufu ra mu karung, pakwez mukish tupidila anch, Dirumburish, kakumushap ndiy mwom.”
5 Pakwez Paul wamukusina nnak mu kasu, wakad kwov kusansan kwa ulemb.
6 Awiy ading achingedil anch ukunan, ap anch ukuwa pansh, wafa. Pakwez achingela chisu chilemp wakad kuman chom chiyimp chamushiken, chad akarumun yitongijok yau, alond anch: “Ndiy udi mukish!” uk
7 Piswimp ni ndond yiniya kwading yir ya Pubilius, mwant wa ditung dinidia. Ndiy watwaka nawamp kwol kwend machuku masatu.
8 Tatukwend wa Pubilius, wading ulel mu chikumbu, wayela musong wa mashik ni wa kusut mwivumu. Chad Paul wandama mu kapalakany mwadingay ulel, walembil, wamwanzuk makas, wamwok.
9 Chiyasuta yom yiney, ayej akwau awonsu a mu ditung eza, ayok kand.
10 Atulimisha, atwinkish yom yivud ya matangal, chad pitwandama mu waat atulongija yom yitwaswira ya mu weny.
0 Weny wa Paul wa kudiokal ku Malit kuya ku Rom
11 Chikwasuta angond asatu, twandama mu waat wa mu karung wadiokala ku musumb wa Alekizandria, upidilau anch, Akish Ampamb. Waat winou wachingela chirung cha mashik ku ditung dia Malit.
12 Twashika ku musumb wa Sirakuz, kwinikwa twajingilaku machuku masatu.
13 Twadiokala kwinikwa, twashik ku musumb wa Regio. Chikwacha, rinkind wasambisha kudiokal ku mutambu wa kurul, kwasuta kand machuku maad, chad twashik lel ku ul wa Puzol.
14 Twatanaku anamakwetu in Kristu, awiy atwita chakwel tushakam nau rubing rumwing. Chawiy mwamu twashika ku musumb wa Rom.
15 In Kristu a ku Rom atesha rusangu retwetu, chad eza kutusanken ku ul wa Chiku cha Apius, ni ku ul wa Yikumbi Yisatu ya Aeny. Paul, chayimanay, wamujikitisha Nzamb, chad wikasikesh.
16 Pitwashika ku Rom, amakurump amwinkisha Paul usu wa kwishakamin amwinend ni isalay umwing mwin kumulam.
0 Paul ukat kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb mu Rom
17 Chipasuta machuku masatu, Paul wayitazuka amakurump au in Yuda adinga mu Rom. Pakumanganau, ndiy wayela anch: “Anamakwam, in Isarel, am kinasalap chom chiyimp cha kuyipompat anamakwam, ap cha kujip yaku yitwatambula kudi anshankuretu. Pakwez antekin mu rukan ku Yerusalem, chad ampan mu makas ma in Rom.
18 Chapwishau kwingipol mulong wa yom yinasala, in Rom asota kwinlikishaku, mulong kamanap anch am nasala chom chiyimp cha kwinjipin.
19 Pakwez chalikau in Yuda chom chinech, am kinamanap kand chom cha kusal, chad nita dirumburish dia mwant wa in Rom. Kinikwetap kwam chom cha kuyifund nich anamakwam.
20 Wawiy mulong unakutazukinanganya kumanijan ni kwambamb ni yenen. Chakin, ankasin mu jimbwambu jinej mulong wa kumwambat ndiy udia ruchingej ra in Isarel.” "
21 Awiy amwakula anch: “Etu kitutambwilap mikand yidiokila kwi ngand ya Yudeya mulong weyey, ap kwikil mwanamakwetu wadiokila kwinikwa wez nich rusangu ap chom chiyimp mulong weyey, bwat.
22 Pakwez niyetu tusotil kutesh yitongijok yey, mulong twij nawamp anch, antu a mitambu yawonsu akat kulond nayimp mulong wa chisak chiulondwila ey.”
23 Chawiy ovijana nend Paul dichuku dia kukumangan, chad pa dichuku dinidia chisak chijim cha in Yuda eza kwi ndond kwadingay Paul. Kudiokal pamanch kushik djat ni uchuku, Paul wayirumburilanga rusangu rend ra Want wa Nzamb. Ndiy wasambishila ku Yijil ya Moses ni ku mazu mafundau aruu a Nzamb, chakwel apakisha kukarumun yitongijok yau mulong wa Yesu.
24 Antu amwing akarumuna yitongijok yau mulong wa mazu mend, pakwez antu akwau alika kwau kwitiyij.
25 Chawiy apalangana, akat kutadikijan pakach pau. Padingau kand kal aya, Paul wadi wayilejang kal chom chimwing anch: “Mwiku Utumbila wasala nawamp payilejinay anshankuren ku mazu malonday Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, anch:
26 “Yang, uyilej antu inay anch: Kutesh, ukez kuteshany kwen, pakwez kwijik, bwat. Kutal, ukez kutalany kwen, pakwez kushinshik, bwat,
27 mulong michim ya antu inay yichinchikin. Awiy ajikin matu mau, ajimin kand ku mes. Chamwamu ing elang kuman nich mes mau, ni kutesh nich matu mau, ni kwijik nich michim yau, chad akarumuk kudi am Nzamb chakwel niyoka.' "
28 Chad Paul wawejaku mazu makwau anch: "Chawiy ijikany anch, rusangu ra dipandish dia Nzamb arutwal kal kudi antu a michid yikwau. Awiy akez kurutesh!" [
29 Chapwishay Paul kulond mazu minam, in Yuda apalangana ni kutadikijan.]
30 Paul washakama mu chikumbu chafutinangay amwinend. Mwinimwa ndiy wayakang antu awonsu ezanga ni kumutal.
31 Ndiy warumburilanga mazu ma Want wa Nzamb, walejananga kand mulong wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. Wading ni kulond patok wakad wom ap wakad mwin kumukangesh.
1 Yam Paul, kashalapol wa Kristu Yesu, nifundila mukand winou kudi en. Nzamb wantonda kwikal kambuy wa Yesu, wantazuka kand mulong wa kulejan Rusangu rend Ruwamp.
2 Nzamb washilamu pakur kudi aruu end anch, kukez kushik Rusangu riner Ruwamp, mwamu mwafundau mu Mikand Yitumbila ya Nzamb.
3 Rusangu riner rilejen mulong wa Mwanend Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu, mudi mwatambulay mujimbu wa muntu, pavadikay mu a majuku ma David.
4 Pakwez ku mwiku wend amwinend wading utumbila, wawiy wamumekesha nich ukash ujim anch, ndiy wading kamu Mwan a Nzamb pamuvumbulau mu rufu kwikal kand mwom.
5 Mulong wa Yesu, Nzamb wanganakena am kwikal kambuy wa kumusadil Yesu, chakwel niyitazuk antu a michid yikwau yawonsu kumwitiyij ndiy ni kumuziyil.
6 Niyen in Rom udiany a pakach pa antu atazukinay Nzamb kwikal in Kristu.
7 Chawiy nafunda kal mukand kudi en in Rom awonsu udianya akarukat a Nzamb, yen kamu atazukay kwikal antwend a pa kampwil. Nikat kumulembil Nzamb Tatukwetu ni Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu chakwel akwanakenany ni kukwinkishany chisambu.
0 Kulembil kwa kumujikitish Nzamb
8 Pakusambish namujikitish Nzamb wam mu dijin dia Yeu Kristu. mulong wenen, mulong ritiy ren rovaken kal ku mangand mawonsu.
9 Am nikat kumusadil Nzamb nieh muchin wam wawonsu, nikat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Mwanend, Nzamb amwinend udi kaman wam, nikat kukuvurikany en yisu yawonsu mu kulembil kwam. 
10 Nikat kumwit Nzamb chakwel ku rusot rend angitiy am kwez katat kukutalanyaku en.
11 Mulong niswiridin nakash kukumananyaku, chakwel nikukukwashany kuman chiyukish chidiokila kudi Mwiku wa Nvamb, mulong wa kukukasikeshany.
12 Charumburik anch, et. awonsu tukwashijanany. Ritiy ramam rukukukwashany en, chad niyam ritiy renen rukwinkwash ain. 
13 Anamakwam mu Kristu, ijikany anch, narijekin kal weny tupamp tuvud wa kwez kukutalanyaku en, pakwez tupamp twawonsu nikat kukangany. Nikwet kuswir kwa kuyilet antu a pakach pen kumwitiyij Yesu, mudi munasala pakach pa antu a michid yikwau a jindond jikwau.
14 Mulong am nikwet chisend cha kuya kudi antu awonsu, kudi antu ababela ni kudi antu amwamu, kudi antu ilejina ni kudi antu akad kwilej.
15 Chawiy, mwamu nikwet impu ya kukurumburilany kand niyen in Rom Rusangu Ruwamp.
0 Ukash wa Rusangu Ruwamp
16 Rusangu Ruwamp kirinkwatishinap usany, mulong ridi ukash wa Nzamb wa kuyipandish antu awonsu amwitiyijina Yesu, pakusambish in Yuda, chad ni antu a michid yikwau kand.
17 Mulong Rusangu Ruwamp rikat kumekesh patok mutapu wa kutentam kwa Nzamb kuyisadilay antu kwikal atentamina. Chidi ching kusu ku ritiy kudiokal ku disambishil djat ni kwisudiel. Chidi kand mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu utentamina mu ritiy kudi Nzamb ukez kupand.”
0 Kufa nich kwa antu awonsu
18 Nzamb umekeshin anch, ku ujim wend ukez kuyirumburish antu mulong wa yitil ni kuyip kwawonsu kukat kusalau, awiy kamu antu akata kukangesh uyakin kwijikan.
19 Nzamb ukat kuyilej kadimu mulong yom yikutwishau antu kwijik ya Nzamb yidi kurutu kwau. Ndiy amwinend uyimekeshin patok.
20 Kudiokal patangay Nzamb ngand, mitapu yend yakad kumekan ku mes, charumburik anch, ukash wend wa chikupu ni wiNzamb wend, yamekana patok mu yom yatangay Nzamb. Chawiy mwamu antu kakwetap pa kwiyingishin!
21 Amwij Nzamb, pakwez kamutumbishinap ap kujikitish mudi muchifanyidina kudi ndiy. Pakwez yitongijok yau yikal kal usup ni michim yau yajal kal mididim bwi.
22 Akat kulond ayinau anch akwet manangu, pakwez adi kamu kwau ayisup.
23 Pa ndond ya kumwifukwil Nzamb wakading kufa, awiy akat kwifukwil yirumbidij yifanakena ni antu akata kufa, ap ni atujil, ap ni annam, ap ni yom yikata kwikak pansh.
24 Chawiy mulong antu adi kwau mwamu, Nzamb wayilika kusal yom yiyimp mudi mudia maku mayimp ma michim yau, akat kusalijan ayinau yom yitakanena ku mijimbu yau.
25 Akat kuswimpish uyakin wa Nzamb ku makasu. Akat kwifukwil yom yatangay Nzamb pa ndond ya kumwifukwil Sakatang amwinend, ndiy kamu ufanyidinau kushiman chikupu! Amen.
26 Mulong wa yom yiney, Nzamb wayilika kusal yom yitakanena ya maku mau mayimp. Niyau amband alik kulal nau amakundj mudi mutapu watenchikay Nzamb, chad alalijan ayinau, mband ni mband.
27 Chawiy chimwing, niyau amakundj alik kulal nau amband mudi mutapu watenchikay Nzamb, chad akat kwov kamu upwepu uyimp wa kulalijan ayinau, ikundj ni ikundj. Amakundj akat kusalijan ayinau yom ya usany, chawiy mulong wa yom yiney awiy akat kwiletil kadimu mudi muchifanyidina mulong wa yisalijok yau yiyimp.
28 Mulong antu alikin kumwijik Nzamb, chad Nzamb wayilikin mu manangu mau marumbangena chakwel asala yom yakad kufanyin kusal.
29 Awiy izulijadin nich mitapu yawonsu ya kuyip, ni yitil, ni ris, ni maku mayimp. Izulijadin kand nich mikau, ni kujipan, ni kubulijan, ni kudimban, ni rukuny. Adi in mboj,
30 ni in tufukej. Amukisin Nzamb, akat kupipej antu akwau, adi in kwibaz, akat kwishimek, akat kutenchik mitapu yikwau ya kusal kuyip. Akat kulik kuyiziyil anvajau.
31 Kakwetap kom kawamp, kakat kuwanyishap kushilamu kwau, kadimukinap, ap kuyovil antu akwau riy, bwat. 
32 Awiy ij chijil cha Nzamb chilondila anch, antu akata kusal yom yiney afanyidin kufa. Pakwez ap anch ijap nchik chom chinech, akat kudandamen yom yiney, chad akat kuyitiy kand antu akwau kusal mwamu.
0 Nzamb ukez kuyirumburish antu awonsu
1 Anch ey wayirumburish antu akwau, niyey kiukwetap pa kwiyingishin, anch yey nany ap nany. Mulong anch ey ukat kuyirumburish antu akwau, chad niyey ukat kusal yom yikat kusalau awiy, ukat kwifish nich ey amwiney. 
2 Iwij nawamp anch, Nzamb utentamin pakatay kuyirumburish antu akata kusal yom yiney.
3 Pakwez ey, muntu, ukata kusal yom yawiy yimwing yiukata kuyirumburishin akwen! Ov, ey utongil anch ukez kurezikaku ku dirumburish dia Nzamb?
4 Ap ey ukat kupipej kudimuk kwa Nzamb, ni kushimpish kwend kwa muchim mulong ndiy kakatap kurumburish in yitil swa, Ov, kiwijap kwey anch, Nzamb udimukin mulong wa kukup wit ey chakwel ukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yey?
5 Pakwez ey ukwet muchim ukash uchinchikina. Chawiy ey ukat kwiwejinaku amwiney kadimu ka dichuku dia ujim wa Nzamb, diawiy Dichuku dikeza kumekan dirumburish diend ditentamina.
6 Chawiy Nzamb ukez kumufut muntu mwawonsu mudi mwading yisalijok yend.
7 Nzamb ukez kupan mwom wa chikupu kudi antu akata kudandamen kusal yom yiwamp, ni kusurab uyaj, ni katumb, ni mwom wakad kupwang yidiokila kudi Nzamb.
8 Pakwez Nzamb ukez kuyijimen ni kuyiswejin antu akwau in ris akata kulik uyakin mulong wa kulondul yom yiyimp.
9 Mar ni ushon yikez kuyishiken antu awonsu akata kusal yom yiyimp, pakusambish kudi in Yuda, chad lel kudi antu a michid yikwau.
10 Pakwez Nzamb ukez kupan uyaj, ni katumb, ni chisambu kudi antu awonsu akata kusal yom yiwamp, pakusambish kudi in Yuda, chad lel kudi antu a michid yikwau,
11 Mulong Nzamb kakwetap kasolikany.
12 Antu a michid yikwau akata kusal yitil akad Yijil ya kukufish nich ey mwin Yuda wakad kuziyil, ap anch akutwalap ncehik ku mukand ap anch ukwetap nehik Yijil ya kufund mu Yijil ya Moses akata kusal yitil, akez kuyirumburishin ku Yijil yiney.
13 Nzamb kakat kuyiyingishap antu akata kutesh kusu kwau Yijil, pakwez ukat kuyiyingish antu akata kuziyil ku Yijil.
14 Antu a michid yikwau katambulap Yijil ya Moses, pakwez anch akat kusal mudi mulejenau mu Yijil yiney, awiy akat kumekesh anch, akwet yijil yau ayinau, ap anch kakwetap nchik Yijil ya Moses.
15 Mwamu akat kumekesh anch, yom yilondilau mu Yijil ya Moses ayifundil kal mu michim yau. Kom kau kakat kumekesh kand anch, yom yiney yidi yakin, mulong yitongijok yau yikat kuyifish nich yisu yimwing, pakwez yisu yikwau yikat kuyiyingish.
16 Mwamu muyikeza kwikal pa Dichuku dikez kurumburishau ujindj wa antu kudi Nzamb mu Yesu Kristu, mudi munikata kurumburil mu Rusangu Ruwamp.
0 In Yuda ni Yijil ya Moses
17 Ov, niyey nchik? Ey ukata kwijimbul anch: “Am nidi mwin Yuda.” Ukungamedil mu Yijil ya Moses ni kwibazin mwi Nzamb wey.
18 Ey wij yom yisotilay Nzamb ey kusal, Yijil yakulejin kal ey mutapu wa kutond yom yitentamina.
19 Ey ukat kwijimbul anch: “Nidi mwin kutakel wa amputames, nidi chimunyik cha antu akwau adia mu mididim,
20 nidi kand mulej wa antu akad manangu ni wa antu akad kal kwilej." Ey utongil kamu anch, mulong wa Yijil ukwet ronganyin rawonsu ni uyakin wawonsu.
21 Ey ukata kuyilej antu akwau, ov, mulong wak kiwilejinap ey amwiney? Ey ukata kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb anch: "Kichifanyidmnap kwiy," ov, mulong wak ey amwiney ukat kwiy?
22 Ey ukata kulond anch: "Kangal wimik dis," ov, mulong wak ey amwiney wimikin dis? Ey ukata kukis akish, ov, mulong wak ey amwiney ukat kwiy yom mu yikumbu yau akish.
23 Ey ukata kwibaz anch: "Nikwet yijil ya Nzamb," ov, mulong wak ey amwiney ukat kumupipej Nzamb pakach pa antu piukata kujip yijil yend?
24 Mukand wa Nzambulondil anch: "Antu a michid yikwau akat kusaal dijin dia Nzamb masaal mulong wenen in Yuda."
25 Anch ey waziyil ku Yijil ya Moses, kuya ku mukand kwey kukwet katumb. Pakwez anch ey walik kuziyil ku Yijil, udi kwey mudi kiwayap ku mukand.
26 Anch muntu wa muchid ukwau wakad kuya ku mukand waziyil ku Yijil ya Moses, ov, Nzamb kakumuchindap mudi muntu watwalau kal ku mukand?
27 Muntu wa muchid ukwau wakad kuya ku mukand wa mujimbu, pakwez ndiy ukat kuziyil ku Yijil ya Moses, ukez kukufish nich ey mwin Yuda wakad kuziyil, ap anch akutwalap nchik ku mukand ap anch ukwetap nchik Yijil ya kufund mu mukand.mukand.
28 Kichidiap mulong wa yom yimekena ku mes yikata kumekesh win Yuda wakin, ap mulong wa chijingidij cha kuya ku mukand wa mujimbu.
29 Pakwez mwin Yuda wakin udi mwin Yuda wa mu muchim, ni mukand wend udi wa mu muchim usadinau kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Kichidiap mulong wa Yijil ya Moses yifundilau, bwat. Mwin Yuda mwinou kakat kutambulap katumb ka antu, pakwez ukat kutambul katumb ka Nzamb.
1 Ov, mu win Yuda ukutanyinamu yom ik kupandakanamu antu a michid yikwau? Ov, kuya ku mukand kukwet katumb ik?
2 Kutanyinamu kudi kujim ku mitapu yawonsu! Chakusambish in Yuda inkishau mazu kudi Nzamb mulong wa kumalam.
3 Ov, tukulond nchik anch in Yuda amwing alik kulam win yakin wau? Ov, Nzamb niyend ukulik kulam win yakin wend washilayimu mulong wau awiy?
4 Chakin kamu, bwat! Nzamb udi wakin ap anch antu awonsu ikalap nchik in makasu. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Anch ey ukat kulond, antu awonsu akuman anch ey utentamin. Anch akurumburish, ey ukez kuying."
5 Pakwez anch kuyip kutukata kusal kwamekesh patok kutentam kwa Nzamb, tukulond nchik? Ov, komb Nzamb urumbukin pakat kutulejay kadimu? (Nilondil mudi mukat kulondau antu.)
6 Kitukutwishap kulond mwamu! Anch Nzamb katentaminap, ov, ukutwish nchik kuyirumburish antu awonsu pa mangand?
7 Pakwez anch makasu mamam mamekeshin patok uyakin wa Nzamb, chad makat kutumbish uyaj wend, ing, akwinfigh nich nchik mudi mwin yitil? 
8 Chawiy antu amwing akat kulond anch: "Chifanyidin etu tusala kuyip chakwel kubudik kuwap." Chakin, antu amwing akat kwinfish nich am anch nikat kulond mazu ma mutapu winou. Antu inay niyau akez kuyifish nich mudi muchifanyidina.
0 Kwikil muntu utentamina, ap kusu umwing
9 Chawiy tukulond nchik? Ov, etu in Yuda tuyisutilamu antu a michid yikwau kuwap? Kwamwamu, ap pakemp! Narumburilang kal anch, etu in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau tudi pamwing, etu awonsu atuyikedil kudi yitil.
10 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Kwikil muntu utentamina, ap kusu umwing,
11 kwikil muntu ukweta ronganyin ra kuwap. Kwikil muntu ukata kumusurab Nzamb.
12 Antu awonsu amwomba Nzamb nyim, awonsu ikala ayimp. Kwikil muntu ukata kusal kuwap ap kusu umwing.
13 Akwet tun tulemp, twanzurikina mudi nzay, jindim jau jikat kulond makasu ma rufu, milamu yau yikwet ulemb mudi wa nnak.
14 Tun twau twizwil nich mashing mayimp.
15 Akat kuswakal swa mulong wa kuyijip antu.
16 Kwawonsu kukat kuyau, akat kusha mar ni kusheshik.
17 Kijap kwau mutapu wa kulet chisambu,
18 kakat kumulimishap kwau Nzamb.”
19 Katat twij anch, yom yawonsu yilondilau mu Yijil ya Moses ayilondil kudi antu akata kulondul Yijil, mulong wa kukangesh kwiyingish kwa mitapu yawonsu ya antu, chakwel antu awonsu pa mangand ez ayirumburish kudi Nzamb.
20 Kuwanyish kwa Yijil kukutwishap kumwikadish muntu utentamina kurutu kwa Nzamb. Mudimu wa Yijil udi wa kumumekesh muntu anch udi mwin yitil.
0 Mutapu ukat kutuyingishau kudi Nzamb
21 Pakwez katat wakad kulondul Yijil ya Moses, Nzamb wamekesh kal mutapu wa kuyikadish antu kwikal atentamina kurutu kwend. Yijil yiney, pamwing ni aruu a Nzamb, alejana uman wau mulong wa chom chinech.
22 Nzamb ukat kuyikadish antu kwikal atentamina ku ritiy rau mu Yesu Kristu. Nzamb ukat kusal mwamu kudi antu awonsu amwitiyijina Kristu, mulong kwikil kushalijan pakach pau in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau.
23 Antu awonsu asala yitil, adi kwau kulemp nend Nzamb mwin kuyipandish.
24 Mulong wa kupan kwa riy kwa ranaken rend, Nzamb wayikadisha antu atentamina kurutu kwend. Ndiy wasala mwamu mu Kristu Yesu ukata kuyikwol ku yitil yau.
25 Nzamb wamupana ndiy kwikal yakupesh, chakwel ku mash mend ukwikal mwin kulikishin yitil ya antu awonsu amwitiyijina ndiy. Nzamb wasala mwamu mulon . kumekesh kutentam kwend, mulong mu kushimpish kwend kwa muchim ndiy kayilejap kadimu mulong wa yitil yasalangau pasak.
26 Pakwez katat Nzamb ukat kutal yitil ya antu mulon wa kumekesh kutentam kwend. Mwamu mumekeshinay Nzamb anch, amwinend utentamin, chad ndiy ukat kuyiyingish antu awonsu amwitiyijina Yesu.
27 Ov, kudi kand chom chitukwibazina? Bwat, kwamwamu chom! Ov, mulong wak? Ov, twibazin mulong tuziyidil ku Yijil? Bwat, twibazin mulong tumwitiyijin Yesu.
28 Mulon g etu twij nawamp antu akwiyingishin kudi Nzamb ku ritiy, pakwez kichidiap mulong wa kuziyil Yijil ya Moses.
29 Ov, Nzamb udi ching kusu Nzamb wa in Yuda? Ov, kadiap kwend Nzamb wa antu a michid yikwau? Chakin, ndiy udi kand Nzamb wa antu a michid yikwau.
30 Nzamb udi umwing, ndiy ukuyiyingisha in Yuda mulong wa ritiy. Ndiy ukuyiyingisha kand niyau antu a michid yikwau mulong wa ritiy rau.
31 Ov, chirumburikin anch, tukudjibul Yijil ya Moses mulong wa ritiy riner? Bwat, ap pakemp, pakwez etu tukat kulimish Yijil yiney.
0 Chilikej cha ritiy ra Aburaham
1 Ov, tukulond nchik mulong wa ngakiril wetu Aburaham? Ov, yom ik yamanay ndiy?
2 Anch Nzamb wamuyingisha Aburaham mulong wa yisalijok yend, komb Aburaham ukwet yom ya kwibaz nich. Pakwez kakutwishap kwibaz kurutu kwa Nzamb.
3 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Aburaham wamwitiyija Nzamb, chad Nzamb wamwitiya anch, utentamin mulong wa ritiy rend.”
4 Muntu ukata kusal mudimu akat kumufut difut diend. Difut dined kakat kudichindap mudi yom yimwinkishinau ya riy, pakwez chidi chom chifanyidinay kutambul.
5 Pakwez muntu uchingejina ritiy rend wakad kuchingej kwiyingishin ku yisalijok yend, anch muntu mwinou wamwitiyij Nzamb ukata kuyiyingish antu ayimp, chad Nzamb ukumwitiy anch, utentamin mulong wa ritiy rend.
6 David niyend walonda kand mwamu ya kuyuk kwa muntu witiyau kudi Nzamb anch, utentamin wakad kuchind yisalijok yend anch:
7 “Ayuk kwau antu alikishidinau kal kuyip kwau kudi Nzamb, awiy kamu ajimangeshilay kal yitil yau!
8 Wayuk kwend muntu wakad kuchindilau yitil yend kudi Mwant Nzamb!”
9 Ov, kuyuk kulondilay David kudi ching kusu kwa antu ayila ku mukand? Bwat! Kudi kand kuyuk kwa antu akad kuya ku mukand. Twalondang mazu ma mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Aburaham wamwitiyija Nzamb, chad Nzamb wamwitiya anch, Wlentamin mulong wa ritiy rend.”
10 Oy, chom chinech chamekana pa chisu ik? Ov, padingay Aburaham kand kal amutwal ku mukand anch padingay amutwadil kal ku mukand? Nzamb wamwitiya Aburaham anch, utentamin padingay Aburaham kand kal aya ku mukand,
11 Kwinyim kwa chom chinech amutwala Aburaham ku mukand, chad mukand winou wading chijingidij cha kushinshik anch, mulong wa ritiy rend, Nzamb wamwitiya anch, utentamin padingay kand kal aya ku mukand. Chawiy Aburaham udi ngakiril wa in kwitiyij awonsu akad kuya ku mukand, awiy kamu itiyinay Nzamb anch, atentamin.
12 Ndiy udi kand ngakiril wa antu ayila ku mukand, kichidiap kusu mulong wa kuya ku mukand, pakwez mulong ashich mu ritiy mudi mwashakamay ngakiril wetu Aburaham padingay kand kal aya ku mukand.
0 Nzamb ukat kumushilamu Aburaham mulong wa ritiy
13 Nzamb wamushilamu Aburaham ni a majuku mend anch, awiy akez kuswan mangand mawonsu. Kushilamu kwinoku kikwadingap mulong Aburaham waziyila Yijil ya Moses, bwat, pakwez kwading mulong Nzamb wamwitiya Aburaham anch, utentamin mulong wa ritiy rend.
14 Anch in kuziyil Yijil ya Moses awiy kusu afanyidina kutambul kushilamu kwinoku, komb ritiy ridi kwau chom chamwamu ni kushilamu kwa Nzamb kudi kwau kwakad usey.
15 Yijil ya Moses yikat kusarumun ujim wa Nzamb. Pakwez anch yijil kwamwamu, kwikil kand kwau kujip kwa yijil.
16 Chawiy kushilamu kwa Nzamb kwamekana mulong wa ritiy ra Aburaham, chakwel kushilamu kwadiokala ku ranaken ra Nzamb kukwikal kwa chikupu kudi a majuku mawonsu ma Aburaham makeza kwez. Kushilamu kwinoku kikudiap kusu kudi in kuziyil Yijil ya Moses, bwat, pakwez kudi kwa antu awonsu akweta ritiy mudi Aburaham. Mulong ndiy udi ngakiril Wa ritiy wetwetu awonsu.
17 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Am nakuteka kal ey kwikal ngakiril wa michid yivud.” Ndiy udi ngakiril wetu kurutu kwa Nzamb Witiyijay, ndiy kamu Nzamb ukata kupan mwom kudi afu, ukata kulond kand anch: “Yom yakad kal kwikalaku, yikalaku_katat.”
18 Aburaham witiyija nich ruchingej, ap anch kikwadingap chom cha kuchingej, chawiy mwamu ndiy wikala ngakiril wa michid yivud mudi mwamulejau kudi Nzamb anch: “Mwamu mumakeza kwikal a majuku mey makeza kwez.”
19 Pa chisu chinicha Aburaham wading piswimp ni kuwanyish mivu chitot ya kuvadik. Pakwez ritiy rend kiraziyap, ap anch watongap nehik anch “Nidi piswimp ni kufa, chikwau kand mukajam Sar udi mumb.”
20 Kashadishap ritiy rer, ap kwidjidjek mulong wa kushilamu kwamushilaumu kudi Nzamb, pakwez rit) ren rakasikana nakash, chad ndiy wamushimana Nzamb,
21 Ndiy wading Wy kamu chakin anch, Nzamb ukwet ukash wa kuwanyish kushilamu kwamushilayimu,
22 Chawiy mulong wa ritiy ra Aburaham alonda anch: "Nzamb wamwitiya anch, utentamin."
23 Mazu malondau anch: "Amwitiya anch, utentamin" kamafundap ching kusu mulong wendendiy amwinend, bwat.
24 Pakwez amafunda kand mulong wetwetu akwitiyay Nzamb anch, tutentamin, mulong twamwitiyij kal Nzamb wamuvumbula Yesu Nsalejetu kwikal kand mwom.
25 Amupana ku rufu mulong wa yitil yetu, Nzamb wamuvumbula kwikal kand mwom mulong wa kutuyingish kurutu kwa Nzamb.
0 Nzamb ukat kutuyingish ku ritiy
1 Katat atuyingishin kal ku ritiy, chad tukwet chisambu pakach petwetu nend Nzamb mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
2 Yesu watushikija ku ranaken ra Nzamb ritukweta katat mulong wa ritiy retu. Tukwet musangar mulong wa ruchingej retu ra kuman uyaj wa Nzamb.
3 Chikwau kand, tukat kusanger mu mar metu, mulong mar makat kulet usu wa kudandamen.
4 Chad usu wa kudandamen ukat kulet mutapu wa wuntu wakin, chawiy wuntu wakin ukat kulet ruchingej.
5 Ruchingej kirikat kutukwatishap usany, mulong Nzamb wizwishin michim yetu nich rukat rend ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila watwinkishay.
6 Chakin, pitwading etu tuziyil, Kristu watufila pa chisu chiwanyidina chatenchikay Nzamb.
7 Ching kamu pa chipatu chad waman lel muntu wamufil muntu mukwau utentamina. Chakin, ap muntu umwing ukutwish kwitiy kumufil muntu muwamp.
8 Pakwez Nzamb wamekesha mutapu utukatilay etu, pitwading etu akayitil Kristu watufila!
9 Mulong wa mash ma Kristu, etu atuyingishin kal kurutu kwa Nzamb, kupandakan, mwi ndiy tukez kwiyep ku ujim wa Nzamb!
10 Etu twading akankuny a Nzamb, pakwez mulong wa rufu ra Mwanend ratusankesha nend ndiy, kupandakan, anch watusankeshin kal, ukez kutupandishin kand ku mwom wa Mwanend!
11 Kwashal kand chom chikwau, tukat kusanger mwi Nzamb mulong wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ndiy kamu watusankeshina katat nend Nzamb.
0 Kushalijan kwa Adam nend Kristu
12 Yitil yandamina mu mangand ku muntu umwing, ndiy kamu Adam, chad yitil yend yaleta rufu. Chawiy rufu riner rashika kudi antu awonsu, mulong antu awonsu asala yitil.
13 Padingay Nzamb kand kal apana Yijil kudi Moses, yitil yading kal kwaku mu mangand. Pakwez piyadinga yijil kand kal yikala mu mangand, Nzamb kachindap yitil.
14 Pakwez kudiokal ku chisu cha Adam kushik ni ku chisu cha Moses ruf rayikela antu, ap anch kasalap nchik yitil ya kubwambwil diz dia Nzamb mudi mwasalay Adam. Adam wading chifanakesh cha muntu ukeza kwez.
15 Pakwez tuwiy aad ashalijadin, mulong chariy chapanay Nzamb chishalijadin ni yitil ya Adam. Chakin, antu avud afa mulong wa yitil ya muntu winiwa umwing. Pakwez kupandakan yom yiney, ranaken ra Nzamb pamwing ni chariy chend chezina ku ranaken ra muntu umwing, ndiy kamu Yesu Kristu. Chad ranaken ni chariy chiwanyidina kudi antu avud.
16 Yom yashika mulong wa chariy cha Nzamb chifanakenap nich yom yashika mulong wa yitil ya muntu umwing. Mulong wa chitil chend chimwing chaleta dirumburish ni kufa nich. Pakwez chariy cha Nzamb cheza kwinyim kwa yitil yivud chaleta kuying kwakin.
17 Chakin, rufu rayiyikela antu awonsu mulong wa chitil cha muntu winiwa umwing. Pakwez kupandakan, chom chamekana mulong wa yom yasalay muntu umwing, ndiy kamu Yesu Kristu! Kudi awonsu atambwila ranaken ruvud ni chariy cha kutentam kwa Nzamb, awiy inay akeza kuyikel mom yau mu Yesu Kristu.
18 Chawiy mudi chitil cha muntu umwing, Adam, chalet kufa nich kudi antu awonsu, chawiy chimwing kand, chisalijok chimwing chitentamina cha muntu umwing, Yesu Kristu, chalet kuying kukata kulet mwom kudi awonsu.
19 Mwamu kand, antu avud ikala in yitil mulong wa kubwambul kwa muntu umwing, chawiy chimwing kand, antu avud akez kwikal atentamina mulong wa kuziyil kwa muntu umwing.
20 Yijil ayiwejaku kwinyim mulong wa kuvudish yitil. Pakwez kwawonsu kwavula yitil, chawiy ranaken ra Nzamb ravula kupandakan.
21 Chawiy mudi yitil yayiyikela antu kuyitwal ku rufu, chawiy chimwing kand, ranaken ra Nzamb rukat kutuyikel ni kututenchik mulong wa kututwal ku mwom wa chikupu watenchikay Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu.
0 Tukwet mwom mulong wa Yesu Kristu
1 Ov, tukulondany nchik? Ov, chifanyidin etu kudandamen kusal yitil chakwel ranaken ra Nzamb ruvula?
2 Kwamwamu, ap pakemp! Kwovijan kwetu ni yitil kwafil kal. Ing, tukudandamen kand nchik kusal yitil?
3 Ov, kiwijanyap anch etu awonsu atubatisha mu umwing nend Kristu Yesu, chad atubatisha kand nend ku rufu mudi mwafay ndiy?
4 Chawiy ku dibatish dietu chidi mudi atujika nend, twading nend mu rufu, chakwel mudi chamuvumbulau Kristu kwikal kand mwom ku ukash wa uyaj wa,Tatuku, chawiy niyetu kand tukutwish kupand nich mwom usu.
5 Mulong anch twading nend mu umwing mu full mwafay, komb tukez kwikal kand nend mu umwing Wi kuvumbuk kwikal kand aom, mudi mwavumbukay ndiy kwikal kand mwom.
6 Twij nawamp anch, wuntu wetu wa pakur aupampil kal ku mutond uchikakena nend Kristu pamwing, chakwel wuntu wa yitil ukwikal wakad ukash. Chawiy mwamu kangal twikal kand aswik a yitil.
7 Mulong anch muntu wafia, amukwol kal, chad yitil kiyikumukwatap kand,
8 Chawiy anch twafa nend Kristu twitiyijin anch, tukez kupand kand nend ndiy,
9 Mulong twij anch, Kristu amuvumbula kwikal kand mwom, kakutwishap kand kufa. Rufu kirukutwishap kand kumuyikel.,
10 Ndiy wafa kapamp kamwing, chad yitil kiyamanap kand ukash wa kumupompat. Pakwez katat udi mwom, ushich mwom pamwing nend Nzamb.
11 Chawiy niyen kand ichingejany anch, kwovijan kwen ni yitil kwafil kal. Pakwez katat udiany aom, ushichany nend Nzamb pamwing ni Kristu Yesu.
12 Yitil kiyifanyidinap kand kuyikel mijimbu yen chakwel uziyilany ku maku mayimp ma mijimbu yen.
13 Ap kangal wapanany yid ya mijimbu yen kwikal yom ya kusal nich yitil, Pakwez ipanany ayinen kudi Nzamb mudi antu adiokila kal ku rufu kwikal aom. Panany yid ya mijimbu yen kudi Nzamb kwikal yom ya kusal nich yom yitentamina.
14 Kichifanyidinap yitil kukuyikelany kand, mulong en kiupandilanyap mulong wa yom yilondilau mu yijil, pakwez upandilany mulong wa ranaken ra Nzamb.
0 Aswik in kusal yom yitentamina
15 Chad tukulond nchik? Ov, tukusal yitil mulong katuyikedilap kudi yijil, pakwez mulong atuyikedil kudi ranaken ra Nzamb? Chakapul chaya mwa!
16 Wijany chakin, anch wipanany kumuziyil muntu, en wikalany kal aswik a muntu winiwa., Udiany aswik a yitil yikata kukutwalany ku rufu, ap udiany aswik a Nzamb ukata kukutwalany ku kutentam.
17 Pakwez chifanyidin kumujikitish Nzamb! Mulong chisu chimwinWen wadingany aswik a yitil, chad kwinyim waziyilany nich michim yen yawonsu ku malejan ma uyakin miwatambulanya
18 Akukwolanya kal ku yitil, chad wikalanya kal aswik in kusal yom yitentamina.
19 Nilondil yom yiney mu mazu mapipela mudi mudia yitongijok ya antu, mulong wa kuziy kwa wuntu wen. Pakur wipananya nakash kwikal aswik ku fhe ya kwimik dis ni ku yom yipandakena kuyip. Chawiy chimwing, katut ipanany kamu nakash kwikal aswik a yom yitentamina yikukutwalanya ku mwom utumbila.
20 Piwadianya aswik a yitil, en kiwabanganyakup kutentam, bwat.
21 Ov, watananyamu yom ik pa chisu chiwasalanganya kal yikali mu mangand, Nzamb kachindap yitil. yom yikukwatishinany usany katat? Disudiel dia yom yiniya didi rufu! 
22 Pakwez en akukwodilany kal kudiokal ku uswik wa yitil, chad katat udiany aswik a Nzamb. Chad katat ukutanyinanyamu mwom utumbila, chawiy kwinyim ukez kutambulany mwom wa chikupu.
23 Mulong difut dia yitil didi rufu, pakwez chariy cha Nzamb chidi mwom wa chikupu mutwibombidina mu umwing nend Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu.
0 Akat kwilikej Yijil ya Moses ni yijil ya kwatijan 
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, chakin, en awonsu wijany nawamp yom yinisotila kukulejany, mulong wijany kal yom ya Yijil ya Moses. Yijil yiney yikat kuyiyikel antu ching pachidiau aom.
2 Chilikej mudi mband udia ku uruu, yijil yimukasidin kudi nfumwend pachidiay nfumwend mwom. Pakwez anch nfumwend wafa, chad mband kamukasinap kand ku yijil yadia yimukasidinau kudi nfumwend.
3 Chawiy anch mband winou amwat kudi ikundj mukwau pachidiay nfumwend mwom, akez kumupil anch, mband wimikina dis. Pakwez anch nfumwend wafa, ndiy kamukasidinap kand ku yijil, kakwikalap mwin kwimik dis anch amwatap nchik kudi ikundj windj.
4 Chawiy en, anamakwam in Kristu, mulong wa rufu ra Kristu udiany mudi afu, Yijil ya Moses kiyikukasinanyap kand. Katat udiany ayen a Kristu, ndiy kamu Kristu wavumbuka kwikal kand mwom chakwel tukutwish kusal midimu yiwamp ya Nzamb.
5 Pitwadinga etu atukasidin ku yitil ya kuvadik nich mu wuntu wetu, Yijil yasarumuna maku ma yitil chakwel yisala midimu yau mu mijimbu yetu. Pa chisu chinicha twasala midimu yiyimp ya rufu.
6 Pakwez katat Nzamb watusuril kal ku Yijil yading yitukasina mudi antu a rukan. Kitumusadidilap Nzamb mu mutapu ukur wa yijil yafundau, pakwez tumusadidil mu mutapu usu wa Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Yijil yikat kulet yitil
7 Tulonda nchik katat? Ov, Yijil ya Moses yin yawiy yitil? Kwamwamu, ap pakemp! Pakwez Yijil yawiy yikata kwinrumburil mutapu udia yitil. Am kinelap kwijik anch, ris chom ik anch Yijil kiyanrumburilap anch: "Kangal wov ris."
8 Ku. Yijil yiney, yitil yamana mutapu wa kwimbachik kwov ris ra mitapu yawonsu. Mulong kwakad Yijil yitil yifil kwau.
9 Am amwinam pakusambish nading mwom wakad kwijik Yijil. Pakwez piyashika Yijil, chad yitil yasarumuka kamu,
10 chawiy am nafa. Yijil yading yifanyidin kwimpandish, pakwez yawiy yantwala ku rufu.
11 Mulong wa Yijil, yitil yamana mutapu wa kwindimb. Yitil yanjipa mulong wa Yijil.
12 Chawiy Yijil ya Moses iyinau yitumbil, ni malejan ma Nzamb niyau matumbil, yom yawonsu yiney yitentamin, yiwapil kand.
13 Ov, komb yom yiney yiwamp yanletila am rufu? Chakapul chaya mwa! Yitil yawiy yanletila rufu. Yitil yasadisha yom yiney yiwamp, chad yanletil rufu mulong wa kushinshik kamu mutapu uyidia yitil. Mulong wa Yijil, yitil yamekana patok anch, yidi yiyimp nakash kupandakan.
0 Kurish kudia mu muchim wa muntu
14 Twij nawamp anch, Yijil yikwet mudimu ku mwiku wa antu, pakwez am nidi muntu mwin kufa anlandisha kal mu uswik wa yitil.
15 Kinovilap nawamp yom yinisadila, mulong kinikat kusalap yom yinisotila kusal, pakwez yom yinikisina, yawiy yinikata kusal.
16 Anch nikat kusal yom yinakad am kukat, chad nitiy kal anch, komb Yijil yiwapil.
17 Chawiy kiyamap nikata kusal mwamu, pakwez yitil yidia mu muchim wam, yawiy yikata kwinsadish.
18 Nij nawamp anch, mu muchim wam mwikil kuwap, wuntu wam uziyil. Mulong ap anch nikwetap nchik rusot ra kusal yom yiwamp, kinikutwishap kuyisal.
19 Kinikat kusalap yom yiwamp yinisotila kusal, pakwez nikat kusal yom yiyimp yinakad kusot.
20 Anch nasal yom yinakad kusot kusal, chawiy kiyamap nisadila, pakwez yitil yidia mu muchim wam, yawiy yinsadishina.
21 Chawiy nimen anch, usu wa yom yiney yimeken kudi am. Pinikutonga anch, ing nasalang yom yiwamp, nikat kutwish kutond ching kusu kusal yom yiyimp.
22 Mu muchim wam nikat kusangar mulong wa yijil ya Nzamb.
23 Pakwez mu mujimbu wam mudi yom yikwau yikata kurish nich yom yinikatila nich manangu mam. Ukash wa yom yiney ya yitil yidia mu mujimbu wam yikat kwinkas mudi muntu wa rukan.
24 Yowo, nayindam! Ov, nany ukeza kwinkamunin ku mujimbu winou ukata kwintwal ku rufu?
25 Namujikitish Nzamb mulong wa Yesu Kristu ukeza kusal chom chinech. Chawiy nidi mwamu: Am amwinam ku manangu kusu kwawiy kunikutwisha kuziyil ku yijil ya Nzamb, pakwez ku wuntu wam nikat kusadil yijil ya yitil.
0 Mwom udiokila ku Mwiku wa Nzamb
1 Chawiy katat Nzamb kakuyifishap kand nich antu adia mu Yesu Kristu.
2 Mulong ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila ukata kutwinkish etu mwom mu Kristu Yesu wankwodil kal am ku usu wa uswik wa yitil ni wa rufu.
3 Nzamb wawanyisha kusal yom yawonsu yakanganyau kusal mu Yijil ya Moses. Yijil yiney yakanganya mulong wa kuziy kwa wuntu. Nzamb wamutuma Mwanend wa pa kampwil mulong wa kufish nich yitll vial mu wuntu wa antu. Mwanend weza nich mujimbu wa wnt ufanakena ni mujimbu wa antu akata kusal yitil, mulong Wa kujimangesh yitil.
4 Nzamb wasala mwamu chakwel yom yilentamina yitinau mu Yijil yikuwanyin kamu mu mom etwetu tukata kusal mudi musotilay Mwiku Utumbila, wakad usal mudi mudia maku mayimp ma wuntu.
5 Muntu mwawonsu ukato kusal mudi mudia rusot ra wuntu, ukat kutongijok ching kusu ku yom yikatilau kudi wuntu. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal mudi mudia rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila, ukat kutongijok ching kusu ku yom yikatilau kudi Mwiku Utumbila.
6 Anch yitongijok yikat kusal ching kusu mudi mudia rusot ra wuntu, yikulet rufu. Pakwez anch yitongijok yikat kusal ching kusu mudi mudia rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila, yikulet mwom wakin ni chisambu.
7 Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukweta yitongijok yikata kusal ching kusu mudi mudia yom yikatilau kudi wuntu, udi mukankuny wa Nzamb. Mulong ndiy kaziyidilap yijil ya Nzamb, chakin, kakutwishap kuyiziyil.
8 Antu awonsu akata kuziyil kusal ching kusu mudi mudia Tusot ra wuntu wau, kakutwishap kumusangarish Nzamb.
9 Pakwez anch Mwiku wa Nzamb ushich mu en, kiukusalanyap mudi mudia rusot ra wuntu wen, bwat, pakwez ukusalany mudi mudia rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila. Anch Mwiku wa Kristu kiudiap mu en, kiudianyap ayend.
10 Anch Kristu ushich mu en, Mwiku Utumbila ukez kukupandishany, ap anch mijimbu yen yafap nchik mulong wa yitil. Ndiy ukat kusal mwamu mulong Kristu wakwikadishanya kal atentamina kudi Nzamb.
11 Mwiku wa Nzamb wamuvumbula Yesu mu rufu kwikal kand mwom, anch Mwiku winou ushich mu en, ukez kupandish mijimbu yen ya kufa ap anch yafap nchik. Mwiku wend ushicha mu en ukusal mwamu.
12 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, kitufanyidinanyap kusal mudi mudia rusot ra wuntu.
13 Mulong anch wasalany mudi mudia rusot ra wuntu wen, ukez kuyindamany, wafany. Pakwez anch wajipany yisalijok yen ya yitil ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila, ukez kupandany.
14 Antu awonsu aziyidila kuyitakel kudi Mwiku wa Nzamb adi an a Nzamb.
15 Chawiy Mwiku watambulanya kiwadingap wa kukwikadishany aswik ap wa kukwovishany kand wom, bwat. Pakwez Mwiku Utumbila ukat kukwikadishany an a uswan a Nzamb. Chad ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila kwawiy kutukata kumutazukin Nzamb anch: “Tatuku! Tatukwam!”
16 Mwiku Utumbila ukat kulet uman ku mwiku wetwetu anch, etu tudi ana Nzamb.
17 Chawiy mulong tudi anend, etu tukez kutambul yiyukish yilaminay Nzamb yashilayimu kupan kudi antwend. Yiyukish yiney tukez kuyitambul pamwing nend Kristu. Mulong anch twaman mar metu mudi mwamanay Kristu mar mend, chad tukez kutambul uyaj pamwing nend ndiy.
0 Uyaj tukeza kutambul
18 Nij nawamp anch, mar metu makemp mitumena katat kimilikenap nich uyaj ujim ukez kutwinkishay Nzamb.
19 Yom yawonsu yatangay Nzamb yikat kuchingel nich impu nakash kuman anany akumekeshay Nzamb mudi anend.
20 Mulong yom yawonsu yatangay Nzamb ayifisha nich kwikal yakad usey. Kichadingap ku rusot ra yom iyinau, pakwez Nzamb amwinend watenchika mwamu. Chawiy ruchingej ridi kwaku
21 anch, dichuku dimwing yom yatangay Nzamb akez kuyikwol chakwel kangal yez yivund. Chad niyau yikez kutambul want ipau wa uyaj pamwing nau an a Nzamb.
22 Kushik ni ku chisu chinech twij anch, yom yawonsu yatangay Nzamb yikat kukimwok mudi mband ukweta misong ya kuval.
23 Pakwez kiyidiap ching kusu yom yatangay Nzamb, bwat, niyetu tukweta Mwiku Utumbila wapanay Nzamb mudi chom cha riy cha kusambish kudi etu, niyetu tukat kukimwok kand mu michim. Tukat kuchingel chisu chikutwikadishay Nzamb anend a uswan ni kutukwol kamu kwakabuj.
24 Nzamb watupandisha mulong wa ruchingej retu. Pakwez anch twaman yom yitwachingeja, kiridiap kand ruchingej rakin. Ov, nany ukata kuchingej yom yimenay nich mes?
25 Pakwez anch twachingej yom yitwakad kuman, tukat kuyichingel nich michim yishimpina mwivumu.
26 Chawiy chimwing kand, Mwiku Utumbila ukat kwez mulong wa kutukwash etu tuziyila. Mulong kitwijap kulembil mudi muchifanyidina, Mwiku Utumbila ukat kumulembijek Nzamb mulong wetwetu. Ndiy ukat kukimwok kwakad etu kutwish kurumburil nich mazu metu.
27 Mulong Nzamb ukat kuman yom yisotilau mu michim yau, ndiy wij kand rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila. Mwiku Utumbila ukat kumulembijek Nzamb mulong wa antwend in Kristu mudi mudia rusot ra Nzamb.
28 Twij nawamp anch, Nzamb ukat kumekesh kuwap ku yom yawonsu yiyishikedina awiy amukatila ndiy, awiy kamu atazukay mudi mudia rusot rend.
29 Awiy atonday Nzamb kudiokal ku disambishil, ndiy wayaurila chakwel akez kufanakan nend Mwanend, chad mwamu Mwanend ukwikal Mwan wa kusambish ukweta anamakwend avud.
30 Awiy atonday Nzamb kudiokal ku disambishil, ndiy wayitazuka. Chad awiy atazukay, ndiy wayiyingisha. Awiy ayingishay, ndiy wayinkishap uyaj wend.
0 Yesu Kristu ukat kulejan kujimb kwa rukat ra Nzamb
31 Chawiy ku yom yiney, tukulond nchik? Anch Nzamb udi ni yetwetu, ov, nany ukutwisha kutupompat?
32 Ndiy kamuchidijap Mwanend kapwokal, pakwez wamupana mulong wa kutufil etu! Ov, kakutwinkishap kand yom yawonsu pamwing nend ndiy?
33 Ov, nany ukutwisha kuyifund antu atonday Nzamb? Ndiy amwinend wayiyingisha.
34 Ov, nany ukutwisha kuyifish nich? Kristu Yesu, bwat. Ndiy wafa, pakwez tulonda anch, chakin, ndiy wavumbuka wikal kand mwom, katat ushich ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb. Ndiy ukat kumulembijek Nzamb mulong wetwetu.
35 Ov, chom ik chikutwisha kutwauril etu ku rukat ra Kristu? Kwikil chom ap kusu chimwing chikutwisha kutwauril ku rukat rend, ap mar, ap runeng, ap kuzengol, ap nzal, ap uzwendj, ap ubaj, ap rufu!
36 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Machuku mawonsu etu tudi mu ubaj wa kufa mulong wa kukwambat ey, antu akat kutudiul mudi mukat kudiulau amikoku atwadilau kwa kuyijipin."
37 Pakwez mu yom yiney yawonsu yikata kutushiken, etu tukat kupandakan nakash mulong wa ukash wa Kristu watukata.
38 Mulong am nij nawamp anch, kwikil chom chikutwisha kutwauril etu ku rukat rend, ap rufu, ap mwom, ap aruu a mwiur, ap ayilembil, ap ukash wa Sakudimban, ap yom yimekena, ap yom yikeza kumekan kurutu,
39 ap chom chidia piur pa ngand, ap chom chidia pansh pa mangand. Kwikil chom chimwing chatangay Nzamb chikutwisha kutwauril etu ku rukat ra Nzamb rutukweta mulong wa Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu.
0 Nzamb ni antwend atonday
1 Am nilondil yom yakin, kinilondilap makasu, am nidi wayen wa Kristu. Kom kam kayikedilau kudi Mwiku Utumbila kakat kwinlej anch, kinilondilap yom ya makasu. 
2 Am nikwet ushon nakash ni runeng rakad kupwang mu muchim wam,
3 Mulong am nikutwish kwitiy Nzamb kwinshing ni kwingauril kudi Kristu, mulong wa anamakwam a muchid wetu wa in Isarel,
4 Awiy in muchid wa in Isarel atonday Nzamb kwikal anend, wayinkishap uyaj wend. Ndiy wasuka nau manswik mavud, wayinkisha Yijil ya Moses. Awiy atambula kand kushilamu kuvud kwa Nzamb, ij mutapu wakin wa kwifukwil.
5 Awiy adi a majuku ma anshankuretu, niyend Kristu ku mutambu wa wuntu wend wading wa muchid wau, ndiy kamu udia piur pa yom yawonsu. Nzamb atumba kwend chikupu! Amen.
6 Kinilondilap anch kushilamu kwa Nzamb kwakanganya. Mulong antu a a majuku ma in Isarel awonsu kadiap in Isarel akin.
7 Chawiy chimwing, antu a a majuku ma Aburaham awonsu kadiap anend akin. Nzamb wamushilamu Aburaham anch: "Ching kusu an a a majuku ma Isak, awiy akwikala aney akin."
8 Charumburik anch, an avadikina ku rusot ra wuntu kadiap an a Nzamb. Pakwez an avadikina mudi mudia kushilamu kwa Nzamb, awiy adi an akin.
9 Mulong Nzamb wamushilamu Aburaham anch: "Pa chirung mudi chinech am nikez kuchirik kand, chad Sar ukez kuval mwan ikundj."
10 Chikwau kand, Rebeka wavala an amakundj aad nend ikundj umwing, ndiy kamu nshankur wetu Isak.
11 Nzamb wamutonda mwan ikundj umwing ku rusot rend. Wamutonda padingay kand kal avadik, kand kal asalap chom chiwamp ap chom chiyimp. Chawiy kutond kwa Nzamb kwading mudi mwading kutazuk kwend, kalondulap mudi mwading yisalijok yau.
12 Nzamb wamuleja Rebeka anch: "Mwan mukurump ukez kumusadil mwanikanch."
13 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Namutonda Jakob, pakwez namulika Esau."
14 Ov, tukulondany nchik? Ov, komb tukulond anch: "Nzamb katentaminap"? Chakapul chaya mwa!
15 Mulong Nzamb wamuleja Moses anch: "Am nikumwovil muntu mwawonsu riy mudi munisotila, nikumwanaken kand muntu mwawonsu mudi munisotila."
16 Chawiy anch Nzamb wamutond muntu, kichidiap mulong wa rusot ra muntu ap mulong wa yisalijok yend, pakwez chidi kusu ching ku riy ra Nzamb.
17 Mu Mukand wa Nzamb, Nzamb wamuleja mwant wa in Idjibit anch: "Nakuteka ey kwikal mwant mulong wa kumekeshin ukash wam mu ey, ni mulong wa kupalangesh dizu diam mu mangand mawonsu."
18 Chawiy Nzamb ukat kumwovil muntu riy mudi mudia rusot rend, ukat kuchinchikish kand muchim wa muntu mudi mudia rusot rend.
0 Nzamb ukat kwov ujim, ukat kwov kand riy
19 Ap muntu umwing wenen ukez kwingipul anch: “Anch chidi mwamu, ing, Nzamb ukutwish nchik kuyifish nich antu? Ov, nany ukutwisha kulik rusot ra Nzamb?"
20 Pakwez ey muntu wachad nany ukumwakula Nzamb? Ov, chom chaumbau chikutwish kumwipul wachiumba anch: "Ov, mulong wak wangumba am mwamu?"
21 Mwin kuumb ukutwish kusal nich kam yom yaad. Chom chimwing cha kusadil mudimu wa katumb, chom chikwau cha kusadil yom yawonsu.
22 Chawiy chimwing kand ku yom yasalay Nzamb. Ndiy wasota kumekesh ujim wend, ni kumekesh kand ukash wend. Pakwez washimpisha muchim nakash mulong wa antu ovilay ujim adinga piswimp ni kusheshik.
23 Ndiy wasota kand kumekesh kuwap kwa uyaj wend kudi etu ovilay riy, yetu kamu arijekay kudiokal ku disambishil chakwel tutambul uyaj wend.
24 Mulong etu tudi antu atazukay, amwing a pakach petu adi in Yuda, akwau adi in michid yikwau.
25 Mudi mulondilay Nzamb mu mukand wa Ozey anch: "Antu ading akad kwikal ayam, nikez kuyitazuk anch: 'Antwam.'' Muchid wading unakad kukat, nikez kuutazuk anch: 'Akarukat nam.'
26 Ku jindond jawonsu jakwelanyau anch: ‘Kiudianyap antwam,’ kwawiy kwinikwa kukez kukupilanyau anch: ‘Ana Nzamb mwom.’ ”
27 Niyend Isay walonda kand mulong wa in Isarel anch: "Ap anch in Isarel avulijanap nchik mudi usukuril wa mu karung, ching kusu akemp a pakach pau awiy akeza kupand.
28 Mulong Nzamb ukez kuwanyish dirumburish diend diawonsu swa pa mangand."
29 Mudi mwalonday Isay pakur anch: "Anch Nzamb Mwin Dikand katushilap a majuku mamwing, ing twela kwikal mudi antu a musumb wa Sodom, ap kwikal mudi antu a musumb wa Gomor."
0 Rusangu Ruwamp riyitadil kand in Isarel
30 Kurumburik kwa mazu metu kwawiy oku. In michid yikwau kapakishap kwikal antu atentamina kudi Nzamb, katat Nzamb wayikadish kal antu atentamina mulong wa ritiy rau.
31 Pakwez in Isarel apakisha kulondul yijil mulong wa kwikal antu atentamina kudi Nzamb, akanganya kuwanyish yijil yiniya.
32 Ov, mulong wak chakanganyau? Mulong awiy kachingejap ritiy, pakwez achingeja yisalijok yau. Chawiy mwamu awiy ipwakala kal ku diyal dia kwipwakal,
33 mudi mulondilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Tal, am natek kal mu Sion diyal dia kwipwakal antu, diawiy diyal dikeza kuyiwish. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukeza kumwitiyij Ndiy, kakez kwovap usany."
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil nakash anch, anamakwam in Isarel apanda. Am nikat kumulembil Nzamb mulong wa awiy!
2 Am nidi kaman wau, awiy akat kwipan nakash kudi Nzamb. Pakwez kijap mutapu uwamp wa kwipan.
3 Awiy kovilap kurumburik kwa mutapu ukat kuyikadishau antu atentamina kudi Nzamb. Chad apakisha kurijek mutapu wa kutentam kwau ayinau. Chawiy alika kuziyil ku mutapu ukat kutentamishau antu kudi Nzamb,
4 Mulong Kristu wapwishil kal ulabu wa Yijil ya Moses, chakwel muntu mwawanay ukumwitiyija ndiy akumuyingish kudj Nzamb.
0 Muntu mwawonsu ukumwitiyija Kristu ukupand
5 Moses walonda mulong wa kurumburil mutapu wa munty kwikal utentamina kudi Nzamb anch waziyil ku Yijil, Ndiy wafunda anch: “Muntu mwawonsu ukusala mudj mulejenau mu Yijil, chawiy Yijil yiney yikez kumupandish,”
6 Mukand wa Nzamb ukat kulejan mutapu wa muntu kwikal utentamina kudi Nzamb mulong wa rity anch: “Kangal walond mu muchim wey anch: “Ov, nany ukuya mwiur mulong wa kutushirishinay Kristu pansh?’
7 Ap kulond anch: ‘Oy, nany Kristu kwikal kand mwom?? ”
8 Charumburik anch: “Mazy malondilay Nzamb madi PiSwimp ni yeyey, ukutwishany kumitiy nich kan key ni kumatambul mu muchim wey,” Mazu minam mawiy mitukata kurumburil mulong wa ritiy.
9 Anch walond patok kudi antu anch: “Yesu udj Nsalejam,” chad witiy mu muchim Wey anch, Nzamb wamuvumbula mu rufu kwikal kand mwom, ey ukez kupand.
10 Mulong ku ritiy ridia mu muchim wa muntu, kwawiy kukez kumuyingishinau kudi Nzamb. Kulond ku kan patok kudi antu, kwawiy kukez kupandilay muntu.
11 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Muntu mwawonsu ukumwitiyija ndiy, kakez kwovap usany."
12 Chawiy kwikil kwauril kwa mutapu wa dipandish dia in Yuda ni dia in michid yikwau, mulong kudi ching kusu Nsalejetu umwing wa antu awonsu. Ndiy ukata kuyiyukish nakash antu awonsu akata kumutazuk.
13 Mudi mufundiiau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu Mwawonsu ukutazuka pa dijin dia Nsalejetu ukez kupand.”
14 Pakwez akutwish nchik kumutazuk anch kand kal amwitiyija? Ov, akumwitiyij nchik anch kand kal ateshap Tusangu rend? Oy, akutwish nchik kutesh anch kand kal muntu arumburilap Tusangu rend?
15 Ov, akutwish nchik kurumburil rusangu anch kayituminap in kurumburil? Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Kushik kwa in kulet jinsangu jiwamp chidi chom chiwamp nakash!”
16 Pakwez antu awonsu kand kal itiyija Rusangu Ruwamp Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, walonda anch: “Nsalejetu, ov, nany witiya rusangu ritwalejana?”
17 Ritiy rikat kudiokal ku yom yikat kuteshau, akat kutesh pakat kulondau in kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu.
18 Pakwez nipwil anch: "Ov, chakin, awiy kand kal atesha Rusangu riner?" Mwawiy kamu, ateshil kal! Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Mazu mau mapalangen kal pa mangand mawonsu. Mazu mau mashikin kal djat ni kwisudiel kwa mangand."
19 Nipwil kand kakwau anch: "Ov, in Isarel kovilap kwau kurumburik?" Moses wakula pakusambish, walond mazu malonday Nzamb anch: "Am nikez kukwovishany mukau kudi antu akad kwikal nich muchid. Nikez kukwovishany ujim kudi antu a muchid wakad manangu."
20 Chad Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, walonda patok wakad wom mazu malonday Nzamb anch: "Antana kudi antu akad kwinkimb. Nimekesha kudi antu akad kwau kwingipul."
21 Pakwez mulong wa in Isarel Nzamb ulondil anch: “Dichuku diawonsu diakabuj natandjeka makas mam kuyak antu ambwambwila akad kwinziyil.”
0 Nzamb wayovila in Isarel riy
1 Chawiy nipwil anch: “Ov, Nzamb wayilik kal antwend?” Kwamwamu, ap pakemp! Am amwinam nidi mwin Isarel, wa a majuku ma Aburaham, nidi mwin muchid wa Benjamin.
2 Nzamb kayilikinap antwend atonday kudiokal ku disambishil. En wijany mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb mazu malonday Elija, muruu wa Nzamb. Ndiy wamulembijeka Nzamb mulong wa kuyifish nich in Isarel anch:
3 “Nsalejam, awiy ayijipin kal aruu ey, abumodin kal kand yintamb yey ‘pansh. Yam kusu nishilap amwinam, chad niyam asotil kand kwinjip.”
4 Chad Nzamb wamwakula nchik? Ndiy wamwakula anch: “Am nilamining kal mulong wamam amwinam antu tunan sambwad akad kumwifukwil mukish Bal.”
5 Chawiy chimwing kand katat, kudi chisak chikemp cha antu atonday kal Nzamb mulong wa riy rend.
6 Nzamb ukat kutond antu mulong wa riy rend, kakat kuyitondap mulong wa yisalijok yau. Anch Nzamb watond antu mulong wa yisalijok yau, komb riy rend kiridiap rakin.
7 Ov, tulonda nchik? In Isarel katanap chom chasurabangau. Pakwez kwading chisak chikemp cha antu atonday Nzamb, awiy atana. Chawiy akwau ayichinchikisha michim.
8 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Nzamb wayichinchikisha michim yau. Katwishap kuman nich mes mau, ap kwov nich matu mau kushik djat ni ilel unou.”
9 Mwant David ulondil mu M ukand wa Nzamb anch: “Chifanyidin misambu yau yikala mudi mipit, ap mudi masu yiyikwat mu mend. Chifanyidin awa, chakwel ayilej kadimu!
10 Chifanyidin mes mau mikal rid, chakwel kakutwishap kuman. Chifanyidin Jinyim jiyifumbam mulong wa mar ma yisu yawonsu.”
11 Chawiy nipwil anch: “Ov, kwipwakal kwa in Yuda kwading kwa kuwa chikupu?” Chakapul chaya mwa! Dipandish diashika kudi in michid yikwau mulong wa yitil ya in Yuda chakwel ayovish in Yuda mukau.
12 Yitil ya in Yuda yaleta yiyukish yivud mu mangand, kuburen kwau kwa ritiy kwaleta yiyukish yivud kudi in michid yikwau. Anch chidi mwamu, yiyukish yikupandakan kuvul anch in Yuda awonsu itiy kutambul dipandish!
0 Dipandish diashik kudi in michid yikwau
13 Katat am nikat kulond kudi en in michid yikwau. Mulong am nidi kambuy wa Yesu, mwin kuya kudi in michid yikwau, nikat kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wa mudimu wam.
14 Nichingejin anch, ap nikusarumun mukau wa antu a muchid wam, chakwel Nzamb ukutwish kupandishap amwing.
15 Mulong chayombau nyim kudi Nzamb, in mangand akarumuka ez kudi Nzamb. Ov, chikez kwikal nchik pakez kuyitambulau awiy? Chawiy kukez kwikal mwom kudi awiy afa kal!
16 Anch muntu Wwalambul chikunku cha kusambish cha mutand wa dibot kudi Nzamb, washikij kal mutand wawonsu. Anch muntu walambul mij ya mutond kudi Nzamb, washikij kal ni mitiy yawonsu.
17 En in Isarel, udiany mudi mutond wa mpach wakunau, chad mitiy yimwing ayikatula kal. En in michid yikwau, udiany mudi mutiy wa mutond wa mpach wa mwisuku wanungau ku mutond wakatulau mitiy. En in michid mutiy wanungau ku dishin dia mutond wakunau.
18 Chawiy ey mwin muchid ukwau, kangal wadiul antu adioshau kudi Nzamb mudi mitiy yakatulau. Ov, ey ukutwish nchik kwibaz? Ey udi kwey mutiy, kiyeyap ukata kuyidish mij, pakwez mij yawly yikata kukudish ey.
19 Pakwez ey ukwakul anch: “Mwaning, pakwez mitiy yikwau ayikatula chakwel anung am pa ndond yau.”
20 Yiulondila yidi yakin. Awiy ayikatula mulong kitiyijap, chad ey ushich pa ndond yau mulong witiyija. Pakwez kangal wibaz mulong wa chom chinech! Chifanyidin ey kubabal.
21 Anch Nzamb kayovidilap in Yuda tly, awiy adia mudi mitiy ya mutond wakunau, ov, cy utongil nchik anch, ukez kukwovil ey riy?
22 Talany kudimuk kwa Nzamb ni kuswej kwend. Uyiswejidin antu akata kuwa mu yitil, pakwez udimukin kudi ey anch ey wadandamen nawamp mu kudimuk kwend. Pakwez anch bwat, Nzamb ukez kukukatul niyey mudi mutiy.
23 Anch in Yuda akarumuk, itiyij, akez kuyichirish pa ndond yadingau, mulong Nvamb ukutwish kuyinung kand.
24 En in michid yikwau, udiany mudi mitiy ya mutond wa mpach wa. mwisuku yakatulau, chad ayinung ku mutond windj wa mpach wakunau wakad iwau. In Yuda, awiy adi mudi mutond winou wa mpach wakunau. Chawiy chiswakel kudi Nzamb kuyinung mitiy yiney yakatulau kapamp kakwau ku mutond wau.
0 Nzamb uyovidin antu awonsu riy
25 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil kukulejany ujindj winou chakwel kangal wibazany nich manangu men. Chidi mwamu, kuchinchik kwa in Isarel kikudiap kwa chikupu, pakwez kukudandamen djat ni pakuwanyina kuvul kwa in michid yikwau kwez kudi Nzamb.
26 Chad Nzamb ukez kuyipandish in Isarel awonsu. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Mupandish ukez kudiokal ku musumb wa Sion, ndiy ukez kudiosh kuyip kwawonsu kwa a majuku makeza kwez ma Jakob.
27 Am nikez kusuk nau manswik minam, pinikeza kuyilikishin yitil yau.”
28 Mulong in Yuda alika kwau Rusangu Ruwamp, awiy adi antu akisinau kudi Nzamb mulong wa kukwambatany en. Pakwez mulong wa kutond kwa Nzamb, awiy adi antu akatilay mulong wa anshankurau.
29 Mulong Nzamb kakutwishap kutambul kand yiyukish ya kusal nich yapanay, ap kuswimpish yitongijok yend mulong wa antu atazukay.
30 Pakusambish en in michid yikwau, walikanya kumuziyil Nzamb. Pakwez katat en watambulany kal riy ra Nzamb mulong in Yuda alika kumuziyil.
31 Chawiy chimwing kand, mulong wa riy riwatambulanya en, in Yuda niyau alik kal katat kumuziyil Nzamb chakwel niyau akez kutambul riy ra Nzamb katat.
32 Mulong Nzamb wayikadisha antu awonsu mudi aswik mulong awiy alika kwau kumuziyil, chakwel ndiy ukutwish kuyovil antu awonsu riy.
0 Chifanyidin etu kumushiman Nzamb
33 Chakin, Nzamb ukat kumekesh ranaken rujim nakash! Ndiy ukwet manangu nakash ni ronganyin kupandakan! Ov, nany ukutwisha kwijik mutapu ukat kukatulay Nzamb milong? Ap nany ukutwisha kujingunin mutapu ukat kusalay yom?
34 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Ov, nany wija yitongijok ya Mwant Nzamb? Ov, nany ukutwisha kumuyul?
35 Ov, nany wapana chom kudi Nzamb chakwel Nzamb amuparish?”
36 Mulong ndiy watanga yom yawonsu, yom yawoney mulong wendendiy, ni yom yawonsu yidi kand jyend Chifanyidin tumushiman Nzamb chikupu! Amen.
0 Tufanyidin kumusadil Nzamb
1 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, mulong Nzamb watwovidil kal riy. rijim, nakwilembilany kal, ipanany ayinen kudi Nzamb kwikal mudi yakupesh yikweta mwom, yidia yitumbila ya kumusangarish ndiy. Mwamu muchifanyidina kumwifukwil Nzamb.
2 Kangal wifanakeshany ayinen nich yaku ya antu a mangand minam. Pakwez itiyvany Nzamb akukarumunany mu yom yawonsu ni kukwinkishany manan gu masu ni muchim usu. Mwamu ukutwishany kujingunin rusot ta Nzamb. Ndiy usotil yom yiwamp, yitentamina kamu, yikata kumusangarish.
3 Mulong wa chiyukish cha kusal nich changinkishay Nzamb ku ranaken rend, nikat kukulejany en awonsu anch, kangal wapandakeshany kwitong ayinen chamwamu. Pakwez itongany muntu ni muntu mudi mudia kujimb kwa ritiy ramwinkishau kudi Nzamb.
4 Mu mijimbu yetu mudi yid yivud, chad chid ni chid chikwet mudimu wach.
5 Chawiy chimwing, niyetu anch tudiap nchik antu avud, tudi mudi mujimbu umwing pamwing nend Kristu. Chawiy atunungin pamwing mudi yid yinungina ku mujimbu umwing. 
6 Chawiy tukwet yiyukish ya kusal nich yaurokina kudi muntu ni muntu. Tufanyidin kusal nich mudi mudia ranaken ratwinkishau kudi Nzamb. Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb, chifanyidin tusala nich mudi mudia kujimb kwa ritiy retu.
7 Anch twatambula chiyukish cha kuyikwash nich antu, chifanyidin tuyikwash. Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kulejan_ nich, chifanyidin tulejan.
8 Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kuyikasikesh nich antu akwau, chifanyidin tusala mwamu. Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kupan, chifanyidin tupan nich muchim uwamp. Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kwikal mwin kutakel, chifanyidin kutakel nich mushiku. Anch chiyukish chetu chidi cha kuyovil antu akwau riy, chifanyidin tusala mwamu nich musangar.
9 Chifanyidin rukat ren rikal ra kashinsh. Kisany yom yawonsu yiyimp, lamatany yom yawonsu yiwamp.
10 Katijanany amwing ni akwau mudi mufanyidinau akadivar kukatijan. Chifanyidin kukasikesh kulimishijan amwing ni akwau.
11 Salany mudimu nich mushiku, kangal wikalany nich usweral. Musadilany Nsalejen nich muchim wen wawonsu.
12 Sangarany mulong wa ruchingej ren, shimpishany michim yen mu mar, chad lembilany yisu yawonsu.
13 Yikwashany anamakwen in Kristu, akany aeny ku yikumbu yen.
