14 Mulembilany Nzamb mulong wa kuyiyukish antu akata kukuzengolany. Chakin, mulembilany mulong wa kuyiyukish, kangal mulong wa kuyiyindamish.
15 Sangarany pamwing nau antu asangera, ovany ushon pamwing nau antu ovila ushon.
16 Shakamany nawamp nau antu awonsu. Kangal wibazany, pakwez itiyany kusal midimu ya mitapu yawonsu mudi atushalapol.
17 Anch muntu wakusalany yom yiyimp, niyen kangal wamusadilany yom yiyimp. Pakishany kusal yom yikumanau antu awonsu anch, yidi yiwamp.
18 Salany nich usu wen wawonsu mulong wa kushakam nich chisambu nau antu awonsu.
19 Arund nam, kangal wafundakeshany, pakwez itiyany Nzamb kwikal mwin kufundakesh. Mudi mufundilau. mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Yam Nzamb nikeza kufundakesh, yam nikeza kulejan kadimu kudi antu akata kuyimesh akwau mar.”
20 Pakwez salany mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Anch mukankuny ney wovil nzal, ey mwinkisha yakudia, anch ndiy wovil impu, ey mwinkisha yakuna. Mulong anch wasal mwamu, wamukwatish kal usany nakash.”
21 Kangal witiy kuyip kukupandakan usu. Pakwez chifanyidin ey kusal yom yiwamp mulong wa kupandakan kuyip.
0 Chifanyidin antu kuziyil kudi in kutakel
1 Chifanyidin antu awonsu kuziyil kudi in kutakel, mulong kwikil ulabu wa kutakel nich wakad kudiokal kudi Nzamb. In kutakel awonsu ayiteka kudi Nzamb.
2 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kumubwambwil mwin kutakel ukat kubwambwil yom yatenchikay Nzamb. Antu awonsu akata kusal mwamu, akez kwiletil dirumburish ayinau.
3 Anch en ukatilany kushakam wakad wom wa in kutakel, salany yom yiwamp, pakwez likany kusal yom yiyimp. Chad mwin kutakel ukez kukushimanany.
4 Mwin kutakel udi kashalapol wa Nzamb, ndiy ukat kusal mudimu mulong wa kukukwash ey. Pakwez anch ey wasal yom yiyimp, chifanyidin kamwov ndiy wom, mulong ndiy ukwet usu wakin wa kukulej kadimu. Ndiy udi kashalapol wa Nzamb mulong wa kulejan kadimu ka Nzamb kudi antu in kusal yom yiyimp.
5 Chawiy mulong wa chom chinech, chifanyidin en kuziyil kudi in kutakel, kichidiap kusu mulong wa kwiyep ujim wa Nzamb, pakwez mwamu muyila michim yen.
6 Mulong winou wawiy ukat kulambwilanya kand yitad. In i kutakel adi atushalapol a Nzamb pakatau kuwanyishau midimu yiney.
7 Yifutany yom yawonsu yifanyidinau kuyifut. Yilambulany yitad ya mitapu ni mitapu. Yilimishany afanyidinau kulimish, yitumbishany afanyidinau kutumbish.
0 Mutapu wa kukatijan
8 Kangal wikalany nich chikal cha muntu, ching kusuchikal cha kukatijan, chirumburikin anch, chifanyidin kukatijan muntu ni mukwau. Muntu mwawonsu ukata kumukat mukwau wawanyisha kal Yijil ya Moses.
9 Yijil yilondil anch: "Kangal wimik dis, kangal wajipan, kangal wiy, kangal wov ris ku chom cha mukwen." Yijil yiney ni yikwau kand yikutwish kuwanyin kwikal chijil chimwing anch: "Yikatany akwen mudi muwikatilanya ayinen."
10 Muntu mwawonsu umukatila mukwau kakumusalap nayimp, mulong rukat rikat kuwanyish Yijil yawonsu ya Moses.
0 Chifanyidin kwirijek mulong Kristu ukuchirik
11 Chifanyidin kusalany mwamu, mulong wijany nawamp anch, chirung chinech chidi chijim kudi etu. Katat chisu cha kulank pa tul chawanyin kal, mulong chisu chikutupandishau kudi Nzamb chidi piswimp katat kupandakan chisu chitwamwitiyija Kristu.
12 Chidi mudi anch uchuku usotil kucha, muten usotil kubudik. Chifanyidin etu kulik kusal yom yikat kusalau antu mu mididim. Chifanyidin etu kudjal yom ya njit chakwel tukurish nich chisu cha muten.
13 Twikalany nich yaku yiwamp mudi antu ashicha mu chimunyik cha muten. Tulikany upwepu, ni kukwachik kwa maar, ni kwimik dis, ni maku mayimp ma mujimbu, ni kubulijan, ni mukau.
14 Djalany yaku yisu ya Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, kangal wisangarishany nich maku mayimp ma mijimbu yen, ap kutenchik mutapu wa kusal yom yiney.
0 Kangal wayifishany nich anamakwen in Kristu
1 Mwakany muntu uziyila muritiy, pakwez_ kangal watadikijanany mulong wa yitongijok yend.
2 Muntu yawonsu, pakwez muntu mukwau uziyila mu ritiy ukutwish kudia ching kusu yom ya kudim.
3 Muntu ukudia yom ya mitapu yawonsu, kangal wamupipej muntu wakad kutwish kudia. Chawiy chimwing, niyend ukata kudia ching kusu yom ya kudim, kangal wamufish nich muntu ukata kudia yom ya mitapu yawonsu, mulong Nzamb wamwakin kal.
4 Ov, ey wachad nany ukumufisha nich kashalapol wa muntu mukwau? Mwant wend amwinend ndiy ukutonda anch kashalapol wend usadil nawamp ap anch kasadilap nawamp. Chawiy ndiy ukez kwiman dang mulong Nsalejetu ukwet ukash wa kumukasikesh N
5 Antu amwing atongil anch, machuku mamwing makwet usey kupandakanamu makwau, chad antu akwau atongil anch, machuku mawonsu madi kwau mutapu umwing. Chifanyidin muntii Wi muntu kutenchik yitongijok mu muchim wend amwinend, 
6 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kulimish dichuku dimwing, kupandakan machuku makwau ukat kusal mwamu mulong wa kumutumbish Nsalejend. Muntu mwawonsu ukata kudia yakudia ya mitapu yawonsu ukat kusal mwamu mulong wa kumutumbish Nsalejend. Ndiy wamujikitish Nzamb mulong wa yakudia. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kudia yakudia ya mitapu yawonsu ukat kusal mwamu mulong wa kumutumbish Nsalejend. Niyend ukat kumujikitish Nzamb.
7 Kwikil umwing wa pakach petu udia mwant wa mwom wend amwinend, kwikil kand umwing wa pakach petu udia mwant wa rufu rend amwinend.
8 Anch tudi aom, tudi aom mulong wa Nsalejetu, anch twafa, tufil mulong wa Nsalejetu. Chawiy anch twapandap nehik, ap anch twafap nchik, tudi ayen a Nsalejetu.
9 Mulong Kristu wafa, chad wavumbuk wikal kand mwom chakwel ikala Nsalejau wa antu adia aom ni wa antu afa kal.
10 Pakwez ey, ov, mulong wak ukat kumufish nich mwanamakwey mwin Kristu? Niyey, ov, mulong wak ukat kumudiul mwanamakwey mwin Kristu? Mulong etu awonsu tukez kwiman kurutu kwa dirumburish dia Nzamb.
11 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb mazu malonday Nzamb anch: “Nashilamu anch mudi munidia am mwom, antu awonsu akez kwas manungun kurutu kwam, chad muntu ni muntu ukez kwingel am patok anch, am yam Nzamb.”
12 Muntu ni muntu ukez kwirumburilap amwinend kudi Nzamb mulong wa yom yawonsu yasalay.
0 Kangal wamuwish mwanamakwey mwin Kristu mu chitil
13 Chawiy tulikany kufishijan nich amwing ni akwau. Pakwez chifanyidin en kutondany anch: “Etu kitukusalap chom cha kumupwakesh mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu, ap kumuwishikish mu chitil.”
14 Mulong nibombil nend Nsalejam Yesu, nij nawamp anch, kwikil chom chijondila ichinach. Pakwez anch muntu watong anch, chom ech ap ech chijondil, chawiy chom chinech chikwikal chijondila kudi ndiy.
15 Anch wamuwishikish mwanamakwey mwin Kristu mu chitil mulong wa yom yiukata kudia, komb yaku yey kiyidiap kand ya rukat. Kangal yakudia yiukat kudia ey yamujiyish muntu wafilay Kristu!
16 Kangal wayisarumun antu kulond nayimp mulong wa yom yiutongila ey anch, yidi yiwamp.
17 Mulong Want wa Nzamb kiutadilap yom yakudia ni yakuna, pakwez utadil kutentam kwa muntu, ni chisambu, ni musangar ukat kuletay Mwiku Utumbila mu michim.
18 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kumusadil Kristu: mu mitapu yiney ukat kumusangarish Nzamb, chad antu akat kwitiy yom yisadilay.
19 Chawiy chifanyidin etu kukimb yisu yawonsu mutapu wa kulet chisambu ni kukasikeshijan muntu ni mukwau mu ritiy.
20 Kangal washesh mudimu wasalay Nzamb mulong ey utongil anch, ukutwish kudia yakudia ya mitapu yawonsu. Chakin ukutwish kudia yakudia ya mitapu yawonsu, pakwez chidi chiyimp kudia yakudia yikutwisha kumuwish mwanamakwey mwin Kristu mu chitii.
21 Chom chiwamp chidi kulik kudia mbij, ap kuna maar, ap kusal chom chikwau chikutwisha kumuwish mwanamakwey mwin Kristu mu chitil.
22 Ilama ku yitongijok yey ya yom yiney kudi ey amwiney ni kudi Nzamb. Wayuk muntu ukata kusal mudi mutongilay anch, chidi chiwamp, ndiy kakez kwifishap nich.
23 Pakwez anch muntu wadia chom nich kwidjidjek mu muchim, Nzamb wamufish kal nich, mulong wadiang wakad ritiy. Chisalijok chawonsu chakad kudiokal ku ritiy chidi chitil.
0 Chifanyidin kuyisangarish antu akwau
1 Chifanyidin etu tukasikena mu ritiy tuyikwash aziyila mu ritiy kusend yisend yau. Kangal twisangarish ching kusu ayinetu, bwat.
2 Pakwez etu awonsu tufanyidin muntu ni muntu kumusangarish mwanamakwend mwin Kristu mu yom yiwamp, mulong wa kumukasikesh kukul mu ritiy.
3 Mulong Kristu kisangarishap amwinend. Pakwez mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Masaal makusaalau ey kudi antu manwila am.”
4 Yom yawonsu yafundau pakur mu Mukand wa Nzamb ayifunda mulong wa kutulej etu. Afunda mwamu chakwel tukujamish ni kukasikesh mulong wa ruchingej rezila mu Mukand wa Nzamb.
5 Nzamb ndiy mwin kupan kujamish ni kukasikan. Nikat kulembil anch, ndiy ukukwinkishany yitongijok ya mutapu umwing pakach pen chakwel umwilakejany Kristu Yesu.
6 Chawiy mwamu en awonsu pamwing ukutwishany kumushiman Nzamb, Tatukwend wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, nich dizu dimwing.
0 In michid yikwau niyau akat kutesh Rusangu Ruwamp
7 Chawiy akijanany mutapu uwamp muntu ni muntu chakwel antu akumushiman Nzamb, mudi mwakwakanyau en kudi Kristu.
8 Mulong nakulejany anch, Kristu wikala kasha» lapol wa in Yuda mulong wa kumekesh anch Nzamb ukat kusal mudi mwashilayimu. Ndiy Kristu wawanyisha kushilamu kwayishilaumu anshankuretu kudi Nzamb.
9 Ndiy weza mulong wa kuyikwash kand in michid yikwau kumushiman Nzamb mulong wa riy rend. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Chawiy am nikez kukujikitish ey pakach pa in michid yikwau. Nikez kushiman dijin diey nich miminy.”
10 Afunda kand mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “En in michid yikwau, sangarany pamwing nau antu atonday Nzamb!”
11 Afunda kand mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “En in michid yikwau awonsu, mushimanany Nsalejetu, chifanyidin antu awonsu amushiman ndiy!”
12 Niyend Isay, muruu wa Nzamb, wafunda kand mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Mwan a mbut ya Yese ukez kwez, ndiy ukez kuyiyikel in michid yikwau awonsu. Awiy akez kumuchingej ndiy.”
13 Nzamb ndiy mwin kupan ruchingej. Nikat kumulembil akwinkishany chisambu ni musangar nakash kupandakan, mulong umwitiyijany ndiy. Chad mwamu ukwikalany nich ruchingej rujim nich ukash ukat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Paul ukat kufund yom patok
14 Anamakwam in Kristu, am amwinam nij patok anch, en udiany antu awamp nakash. Nij kand anch, ukwetany ronganyin nakash chakwel ukutwishany kulejijan muntu ni mukwau.
15 Pakwez mu mukand winou nikufundidilanyamu yom yimwing patok wakad wom, mulong wa kukuvurishany. Nafunda mwamu mulong wa ranaken ranginkishay Nzamb,
16 chakwel nikal kashalapol wa Kristu Yesu mulong wa kuyikwash in michid yikwau. Am nidi mudi mwin kupesh pa kusal mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp rudiokila kudi Nzamb. Nikat kusal mwamu_ chakwel in michid yikwau ikal mulambu uwanyidina kudi Nzamb, ikal antu adia zwang, atumbila mulong wa Mwiku Utumbila.
17 Mulong nibombil nend Kristu Yesu, am nikutwish kwibaz mulong nimusadidil Nzamb.
18 Nikulondaku kusu patok wakad wom ching yom yasalay Kristu mu am, chakwel niyikwash in michid yikwau kumuziyil Nzamb. Yom yiney nayisadila ku mazu, ni ku yisalijok,
19 ni ku yilay, ni ku yom yikwamushena ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila. Chawiy narumburilanga yom yawonsu ya Rusangu Ruwamp rulondila mulong wa Kristu pinatambitambanga kusambishil ku Yerusalem, djat ni kwi ngand ya Iliri.
20 Yisu yawonsu nading nich impu ya kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ching kusu mu jindond jakadau kal kuteshap rusangu ra Kristu. Nakata kusal mwamu chakwel kangal antu alond anch: “Ey watunga kal pa dishty diatungau antu akwau.”
21 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Antu akad kal kulejangap rusangu rend akez kuman, antu akad kal kuteshangap akez kwov kurumburik.”
0 Paul ukat kutenchik weny wa kuya ku Rom
22 Mulong wa midimu yiney nakanganya tupamp tuvud kwez kudi en.
23 Pakwez katat kinikwetap kand ndond ya kusal mudimu wam mwi ngand yiney. Chawiy mulong mivu yivud nading nikatil nakash kwez kudi en,
24 nichingejin kwez katat. Nikatil kumanijan ni yenen pinikusuta kuya ku Esipany. Pinikupwisha chisu chimwing mambamb ma musangar ni yenen, nisotil en winkwashanyaku mulong wa weny wa kuya ku Esipany.
25 Pakwez katat niyil ku Yerusalem mulong wa kuyitwadil antu a Nzamb adia kwinikwa yom ya kuyikwash.
26 Mulong in Kristu a ku Masedon, ni a ku Grek atonda kupan mulambu nich musangar mulong wa kuyikwash atuzwendj adia pakach pa antu a Nzamb a mu Yerusalem.
27 Awiy ayinau atonda kusal chom chinech. Pakwez chakin, chifanyidin awiy ayikwash atuzwendj inay. Anch in Yuda ayinkishap in michid yikwau yiyukish yatambulau mu michim yau kudi Nzamb, chifanyidin niyau in michid yikwau kuyikwash in Yuda nich yom yayiyukishau kudi Nzamb.
28 Pinikupwisha yom yiney, anch nayinkish nfalang jawonsu ja mulambu wapanau, chad nikutumbuk kuya ku Esipany. Nikusutil kwol kwen mulong wa kwambamb ni yenen.
29 Pinikweza kudi en, nij anch nikukuletilany chiyukish chijim chiwanyidina chidiokila kudi Kristu.
30 Anamakwam in Kristu, mulong wa ritiy ritukweta mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ni mulong wa rukat rikat kutwinkishay Mwiku Utumbila, nakulembijekany chakwel ubombakanany pamwing ni yamam kwinlembidil nich usu kudi Nzamb,
31 Nlembidilany chakwel nichidij kudi in Yudeya akad kwitiyij. Nlembilany kand chakwel antu a Nzamb a mu Yerusalem akutwish kutambul nich musangar mudimu unisadila mulong wa awiy.
32 Chawiy anch ridi rusot ra Nzamb, am nikushik kwol kwen nich musangar nakash chakwel nikutwish kwa mbambaku nen ni kwiswedish.
33 Nilembidil anch Nzamb ukata kupan chisambu ikal ni yenen awonsu. Amen.
0 Paul ukat kuyilangwish antu amwing a mu Rom
1 Nakwilembilany kumwak Febe nawamp, ndiy udi nambaz wetu mu Kristu. Ukat kusal mudimu mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb cha musumb wa Sanisherey.
2 Mwakany nawamp mu dijin dia Nsalejetu mudi mufanyidinau antu a Nzamb Kusal, Mukwashany yom yawonsu yikwetay nich kuswir, mulong ndiy amwinend wakwasha kal antu avud, wankwasha kand niyamam.
3 Namulangwish Prisil nend Akila, in mudimu nam mu Kristu Yesu.
4 Awiy ela kufa mulong wa kwingambat am. Am hayijikitish nakash, kiyamap kusu amwinam, pakwez ayijikilishin kand kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya in michid yikwau.
5 Nayilangwish kand in Chikumbu cha Nzamb akata kukumangen mu chikumbu chau. Namulangwish mukarukat nam Epeyinet, ndiy wading muntu wa kusambish kumwitiyij Kristu mwi ngand ya Aziy.
6 Namulangwish Mariy wakusadilanya mudimu nakash.
7 Namulangwish Andronikus ni Junias, awiy in Yuda adinga mu rukan pamwing ni yamam. Awiy adi atwimbuy a Yesu ading ijiken nakash, awiy amwitiyija Yesu pakusambish, pinadinga am kand kal nimwitiyij.
8 Namulangwish Ampilias, mukarukat nam mwi Nsalejetu.
9 Namulangwish Uriben, mwin mudimu pamwing ni yetwetu mu Kristu. Namulangwish kand murund nam Stachis.
10 Namulangwish Apel, ndiy wamekesha win yakin wa ritiy rend mu Kristu. Nayilangwish kand in dijuku dia Aristobul.
11 Namulangwish Herodion, mwanamakwam mwin Yuda. Nayilangwish kand anamakwam in Kristu a mu dijuku dia Narsis.
12 Namulangwish Trifen ni Trifoz, in mudimu a Nsalejetu. Namulangwish kand mukarukat nam Perisid, wasala mudimu ujim wa Nsalejetu.
13 Namulangwish Rufus, mwin mudimu mujim wa Nsalejetu. Namulangwish kand makwend, wanlama machuku mawonsu mudi mwanend.
14 Namulangwish Asinkirit, ni Filegon, ni Herimes, ni Patrobas, ni Herimas, pamwing nau anamakwetu in Kristu awonsu adiau nau.
15 Namulangwish Filolog, ni Juliy, ni Nerey, pamwing ni nambaz wend, ni Olimp, pamwing ni antu a Nzamb awonsu adiau nau.
16 Langwishijanany muntu ni mukwau nich kususujan kutumbila, in Yikumbu ya Nzamb yawonsu akulangwishany.
0 Malejan ma kwisudiel
17 Anamakwam in Kristu, yibabelany antu akata kwauril antu ni kuyipwakesh in kwitiyij. Awiy akat kuyipish kand malejan makin ma win Kristu wilejanya, chawiy aurikany nau.
18 Mulong akata kusal yom yiney kamusadidilap Kristu Nsalejetu, pakwez akat kusadil maku mau mayimp ma mujimbu. Akat kudimb michim ya antu akad kal kubabal ku yom yiney nich mazu mau mawamp ma rulemb.
19 Antu awonsu ateshil rusangu ra kuziyil kwen kudi Nsalejetu, chad mulong wa chom chinech am nikwet musangar mulong wenen. Pakwez nikatil en wikalany nich manangu nakash mulong wa kwijik kusal yom yiwamp, wakad kwijik manangu ma kusal yom yiyimp.
20 Chawiy Nzamb ukata kupan chisambu ukez kasticeh Hie wa Sakudimban swa ni kumutek kwishin kwa yidjatil yen. Nikat kulembil anch ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu rikala ni yenen.
21 Timote, mwin mudimu nam, ukulangwishinany. Niyau’ a Lusius, ni Jazon, ni Sosipater, anamakwetu in Yuda, akulangwishinany kand.
22 Niyam, Teritius, mwin kufund mukand winou wa Paul, nakulangwishany mu dijin dia Nsalejetu. "
23 Gayus, winlamina kwol kwend, ndiy kand ukweta chikumbu chikat kukumangenau in Kristu, wakulangwishany. Niyend Erast, mwin kulam chipau cha musumb, ni mwanamakwetu Kwaritus akulangwishany kand. [
24 Nakulembidilany anch ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu rikala ni yenen awonsu. Amen.]
0 Kulembil kwa kumushiman Nzamb
25 Chifanyidin etu kumushiman Nzamb! Ndiy ukutwisha kukwimikany dang mu ritiy ren, mudi mudia Rusangu Ruwamp rilondila mulong wa Yesu Kristu rinikata kurumburil. Mudi mudia kand yom yakin ya ujindj yimekena katat yadingau ayijindjikin pakur mivu nj minang.
26 Pakwez katat yom yiney yakin ayimekeshin kal patok mu mikand yafundau aruu a Nzamb. Chad ku dizu dia Nzamb wa chikupu, yom yiney yakin ayijikishin kal kudi in michid yawonsu chakwel niyau akutwish kumwitiyij Nzamb ni kumuziyil.
27 Chifanyidin etu kumushiman Nzamb, ndiy kusu ukweta manangu mawonsu. Tusalany mwamu mulong wa Yesu Kristu! Amen.
1 Yam Paul watazukau ku rusot ra Nzamb mulong wa kwikal kambuy wa Kristu Yesu. Yam nifundila mukand winou pamwing nend mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu, dijin diend Sosten.
2 Udi mukand unitumina kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ku musumb wa Korint, atazukau kwikal antu adia zwang mu Kristu Yesu. Awiy atazukau kwikal antu atumbila a Nzamb pamwing ni antu awonsu akata kumwifukwil Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu mu jindond jawonsu, ndiy kamu Nsalejau ni Nsalejetu kand.
3 Chifanyidin Nzamb Tatukwetu, pamwing ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, akwinkishany ranaken ni chisambu.
0 Yiyukish yitutambwila mu dijin dia Kristu
4 Yisu yawonsu am nikat kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wa ranaken rakwinkishanyay en mu dijin dia Kristu Yesu.
5 Chawiy mulong wa kubombakan nend Kristu, Nzamb wakwikadishanya kal ampich mu yom yawonsu ya Rusangu Ruwamp. Mwamu ukutwishany kurumburil yom yawonsu ya Rusangu riner ni kwonganyin kand yom yawonsu yidiamu.
6 Uman wa ritiy retu mu Kristu wandamin kal nakash mu michim yen.
7 Mwamu en watambwilany kal yiyukish yawonsu ya Nzamb piukat kuchingelanya kumekan kwa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
8 Ndiy ukez kukukasikeshany djat ni kwisudiel chakwel ukuyingany pa Dichuku dikurumburishay Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
9 Nzamb udi mwin yakin. Ndiy wakutazukanya en mulong wa kwibomb nend Mwanend Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu.
0 Kwaurok kwa in Chikumbu cha Nzamb
10 Anamakwam in Kristu, nakwilembilany mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu anch, ovijanany, kangal kwikal kwaurok pakach pen. Ikalany nich chitongijok chimwing ni rusot rumwing.
11 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, antu amwing a dijuku dia Klowe anlejin anch, kwinaku kudi matend pakach pen.
12 Charumburik anch, en ukat kulondany kwa kwaurok, ou anch: "Am nidi wayen wa Paul," mukwau anch: "Am nidi wayen wa Apolo," mukwau anch: "Am nidi wayen wa Pita," mukwau kand anch: "Am nidi wayen wa Kristu."
13 Ov, Kristu waurokin mu yikunku? Ov, Paul, ndiy wapampau ku mutond uchikakena mulong wenen? Ov, akubatishany mu dijin dia Paul?
14 Namujikitish Nzamb mulong kiyamap nakubatishany, ching kusu Krisipus ni Gayus, awiy nabatisha.
15 Chawiy kwikil muntu umwing ukutwisha kulond anch, amubatisha mu dijin diamam Paul.
16 A! Chakin, navurik kal anch namubatisha Stefanas ni dijuku diend, pakwez kinijap anch nabatisha kand muntu mukwau.
17 Kristu kantumap am kubatish antu, bwat, pakwez wantuma kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp. Narumburila Rusangu riner wakad kusadil manangu ma wuntu, chakwel kangal nishesha ukash wa rufu ra Kristu ku mutond uchikakena.
0 Kristu ukat kumekesh ukash ni manangu ma Nzamb
18 Mulong rusangu ra rufu ra Kristu ku mutond uchikakena ridi usup kudi antu ayila ku kujiy. Pakwez kudi etu tupandila rusangu riner ridi ukash wa Nzamb.
19 Mudi mulondilay Nzamb mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Nikez kushesh manangu ma in manangu, nikez kukarumun ronganyin ra muntu kwikal chom chamwamu."
20 Ov, katat mwin manangu ukulond kand ik? Ap muntu wilejina nakash, ukulond kand ik? Ap muntu wija kutadik nakash wa mu mangand minam, ukulond kand ik? Nzamb wamekesh kal patok anch, manangu ma mu mangand minam madi kwau usup!
21 Mulong ku manangu Nzamb warijeka chakwel antu kakutwishap kumwijik ndiy ku manangu mau ayinau. Pakwez Nzamb watenchika mutapu wa kupandish antu akumwitiyija Kristu mulong wa rusangu ritulejena etu rupidilau antu anch usup.
22 In Yuda asotil kuman yilay mulong wa kushinshik, chad in michid yikwau akat kusot manangu nakash.
23 Pakwez etu tukat kurumburil rusangu ra Kristu wapampau ku mutond uchikakena. Rusangu riner rikat kuyipwakesh in Yuda, chad ridi usup kudi in michid yikwau.
24 Pakwez antu atazukinau kudi Nzamb, awiy kamu in Yuda ni in michid yikwau, awiy amena anch, Kristu udi ukash wa Nzamb ni manangu ma Nzamb.
25 Mulong yom yimekena anch yidi usup wa Nzamb, yawiy yipandakenamu manangu ma wuntu. Chad yom yimekena anch yidi kuziy kwa Nzamb, yawiy yipandakenamu usu wa wuntu.
26 Anamakwam in Kristu, vurikany mutapu wakutazukanyau kudi Nzamb. Avud a pakach pen kadiap in manangu, avud kakwetap ukash, avud kadiap in majuku malimina.
27 Nzamb watonda antu atongilau antu anch adi ayisup, mulong wa kuyikwatish in manangu usany. Ndiy watonda kand antu atongilau antu a mu mangand anch aziyil, mulong wa kuyikwatish akweta ukash usany.
28 Nzamb watonda adiwilau ni kuyipipej kudi antu a pa mangand, atongilau anch adi antu amwamu. Nzamb wayitonda antu inay mulong wa kushesh yom yitongilau antu a pa mangand anch yilimin.
29 Mulong wa chom chinech, kwikil muntu ap kusu umwing ukutwisha kwibaz kurutu kwa Nzamb.
30 Mwom ukwetanya mu Kristu Yesu udiokil kudi Nzamb. Ndiy wamwikadisha Kristu kwikal manangu metu ni kutentam kwetu. Kristu watukwola ku yitil kwikal antu a Nzamb adia zwang
31 Chawiy mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwibaz, chifanyidin ibazina mu yom yawonsu yasalay Nsalejetu."
0 Rusangu ra Kristu wapampau ku mutond uchikakena
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, neza kudi en mulong wa kukurumburilany ujindj wa uyakin wa Nzamb. Kinalondap mazu majim ap nich mazu ma manangu ma wuntu.
2 Mulong pinadinga am ni yenen natonga kuvuramen yom yikwau yawonsu, navurika ching kusu Yesu Kristu. Kupandakan navurika Yesu Kristu wapampau ku mutond uchikakena.
3 Chawiy pinadinga ni yenen nading niziyil ni kuzalizal wom nakash.
4 Kurumburil kwam kwa dizu dia Nzamb ni malejan mam kiyadingap ya mazu ma rulemb ma manangu ma wuntu. Pakwez yom yinalonda yamekesha ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila.
5 Chawiy ritiy ren kiridiokilap ku manangu ma wuntu, pakwez ridiokil ku ukash wa Nzamb.
0 Manangu ma Nzamb
6 Chawiy nikat kulejan rusangu ra manangu kudi in Kristu akudila mu yom ya Nzamb. Pakwez kimadiap manangu ma antu a mangand minam, bwat, ap ma in kutakel a mangand minam, awiy kamu ayila kwau ku kusheshik.
7 Nilejen manangu ma ujindj wa Nzamb mayijindjikinau antu. Madi manangu matonday Nzamb mulong wa uyaj wetwetu padingay kand kal atanga, mangand.
8 Kwikil mwin kutakel umwing wa mangand minam wijika manangu minam. Mulong anch ijika manangu minam, ing kamupampap Nsalejetu wa uyaj ku mutond uchikakena.
9 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Nzamb wayitenchikina antu amukatila chom chakad kal kumekanangap ku mes, ap chakad kal kuteshap ku matu, ap chakad kutongijokangap mu michim.”
10 Pakwez Nzamb watujingunina ujindj wend kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Mulong Mwiku Utumbila ukat kusut kwawonsu, djat ni ku yom yijingamina nakash yatenchikay Nzamb.
11 Chawiy ching kusu mwiku wa muntu amwinend wawiy wija yom yawonsu ya muntu. Chawiy chimwing kand, Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb ndiy kusu wija yom yawonsu ya Nzamb.
12 Etu kitwatambulap mwiku wa mangand minam, pakwez twatambula Mwiku Utumbila udiokila kudi Nzamb, chakwel tukutwish kwijik yom yawonsu yiwamp yatwinkishay Nzamb.
13 Etu tukat kurumburil yom ya uyakin ya Nzamb kudi antu akweta Mwiku Utumbila. Kitulondilap nich mazu madiokila ku manangu ma wuntu, pakwez tulondil nich mazu madiokila ku manangu ma Mwiku Utumbila.
14 Muntu wakad Mwiku Utumbila kakutwishap kutambul yom yikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb, mulong yom yiney yimeken kudi ndiy mudi usup. Ndiy kakutwishap kwonganyin yom yiney, mulong akat kuyijingunin ching kudi Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb.
15 Muntu ukweta Mwiku Utumbila ukat kujingunin yom yawonsu, pakwez kwikil muntu mukwau ukutwisha kumwijik mudi mudiay.
16 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Ov, nany wijika chitongijok cha Nsalejetu? Ov, nany ukutwisha kumuyul?” Pakwez etu tukwet chitongijok cha Kristu.
0 Atushalapol a Nzamb
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, nikangeny kulond ni yenen mudi munikata kulond nau antu akweta Mwiku Utumbila. Chading chifanyidin kulond ni yenen mudi antu a mu mangand minam, ap mudi kudi an akad kal kukul mu ritiy mu Kristu.
2 Nakudishanya nich yom yiziyila mudi mayel, kinakudishanyap nich yakudia yikash, mulong wadiany kand kal uwanyinany. Ni katatap nchik kand kal uwanyinany,
3 mulong uchidiany nich yaku yiyimp ya antu a mangand. Anch ukat kwovijanany mukau ni matend pakach pen, ov, yom yiney kiyimekeshinap anch, ukwetany yaku ya antu a mangand?
4 Anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen walond anch: “Am nidi wayen wa Paul,” chad mukwau walond anch: “Am nidi wayen wa Apolo.” Ov, en kiusadilanyap mudi in mangand?
5 Apolo niyamam Paul tudi kusu kwetu atushalapol a Nzamb, yetu twakukwashany en kumwitiyij Yesu. Etu awonsu tukat kusal mudimu, muntu ni muntu mudi mwamwinkishau kudi Nsalejetu.
6 Am nakuna mbut, chad Apolo wichilap mem, pakwez Nzamb ndiy waminyisha mbut.
7 Kukun mbut ap kwichilap mem kichidiap chom chijim. Mudimu ujim udi wa Nzamb, ndiy ukata kukudish mbut.
8 Mwin kukun mbut ni mwin kwichilap mem, awonsu adi kwau mutapu umwing. Nzamb ukez kumufut muntu ni muntu mudi mudia mudimu wend.
9 Mulong etu tukat kusal mudimu wa Nzamb pamwing. Chawiy en udiany chir cha Nzamb. Udiany kand chikumbu chitungilay Nzamb.
10 Am nikat kusal nich ranaken ranginkishay Nzamb, am natunga dishin dia chikumbu mudi nkalaweny muwamp, chad muntu mukwau watungap. Pakwez chifanyidin muntu ni muntu kubabal mutapu utungilay.
11 Mulong kwikil dishin dikwau dikutwishay muntu kutung, ching kusu Yesu Kristu.
12 Antu amwing akez kutung pa dishin dined nich utad wa or, ap nich utad wa argent, ap nich mayal ma usey ukash, ap nich mabay, ap nich masuku, ap nich ntent.
13 Mudimu wa muntu ni muntu ukez kumekan pa Dichuku dikurumburishay Nesalejetu, Dichuku dinidia dikez kushik nich kasu, chad kasu kinak kakez kupak ni kumekesh patok usey wa mudimu wa muntu ni muntu.
14 Mudimu watungay muntu ni muntu pa dishin dined anch kiusheshikinap nich kasu, ndiy ukez kutambul difut kudi Nvamb,
15 Pakwez anch mudimu wa muntu washeshik mu kau, ndiy washadish kal difut diend. Chawiy ndiy amwinend akez kumupandish mudi muntu wiyepa kal ku kasu.
16 Ov, en kiwijanyap anch, udiany mudi Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb ushich mu en?
17 Chawiy anch muntu washesh Chikumbu cha Nzamb, Nzamb niyend ukez kumushesh muntu mwinou. Mulong Chikumbu cha Nzamb chitumbil, niyen ayinen udiany chikumbu chend.
18 Kangal muntu widimb amwinend. Anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen watong anch, udi mwin manangu ma mangand minam, chifanyidin ndiy ikala chisup chakwel ikala mwin manangu wa kashinsh.
19 Mulong manangu ma mangand minam madi usup ku mes ma Nzamb. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Ndiy ukat kuyikwat in manangu mu mupit wa manangu utilau ayinau.”
20 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil kand anch: “Chinawej wij anch, yitongijok ya in manangu yidi kwau yamwamu.”
21 Chawiy kangal muntu wibaz mulong wa antu, mulong yom yawonsu yidi yenen.
22 Paul, ni Apolo, ni Pita, ni mangand, ni mwom, ni rufu, ni yom ya katat, ap yom yikeza kwez, yawonsu yidi yenen.
23 Niyen udiany ayen a Kristu, niyend Kristu udi wa Nzamb.
0 Atwimbuy a Kristu
1 Chawiy chifanyidin en ututongijokany etu anch, tudi atushalapol a Kristu, tudi kand atulam a uyakin wa ujindj wa Nzamb.
2 Chom chijim, chifanyidin kashalapol kusal mudimu wa mwant wend nich win yakin.
3 Am kinakaminap kwinrumburish kudi en, ap mu dirumburish dia antu. Niyam kinikutwishap kwirumburish amwinam.
4 Kom kam kikanfishilap nich, bwat, pakwez ap mwamwap nchik kiniyingilap kwam nich mulong wa kom kam. Nsalejam Kristu, ndiy mwin kwinrumburish.
5 Chawiy kangal wamurumburishany muntu pichakad kal kuwanyin chisu chikuchirikay Nsalejetu Kristu. Ndiy ukeza kumekesh yom yijingamina mu mididim, ni kumekesh patok yitongijok yidia mu michim ya antu. Chawiy muntu ni muntu akez kumushiman kudi Nzamb mudi mudia midimu yend.
6 Anamakwam in Kristu, am amwinam nend Apolo tudi chilikej kudi en, chakwel ukutwishany kwilej kudi etu anch, kangal wapandakeshany pa yom yifundilau mu Mukand wa ‘Nzamb. Kangal wibazany ap kwikal nich kasolikany.
7 Ov, nany wakuteka ey kwikal mujim kuyipandakanamu akwen? Ov, Nzamb kindiyap wakwinkisha yom yiney yiukweta? Chawiy ing, ukutwish nchik kwibaz anch yom. yawonsu yiukweta yidi kwau yakwinkishau kudi Nzamb ya riy?
8 Ov, komb ukwetany yom yawonsu yiwanyidina? Watanyany! Ov, katat udiany ampich? Komb en udiany ant, pakwez etu kand kal twikal! Nikatil ing, wikalangany kamu chakin ant chakwel tuyikelany pamwing!
9 Mulong nitongil anch, Nzamb watuteka etu atwimbuy a Kristu kwikal antu akwisudiel kwa antu akwau, mudi antu afishilau nich kwa kuyijip. Twikal kal mudi antu akujipinau patok pa dibur kurutu kwa aruu a Nzamb ni kwa antu awonsu.
10 Etu tudi ayisup chakwel tumwambat Kristu, komb en ukwetany manangu mu Kristu? Etu tuziyil, pakwez komb en ukasikenany! Etu atudiwil, pakwez komb en akutumbishinany!
11 Kushik ni katat tukat kufa ni nzal ni impu, kitukwetap yidjal yiwanyidina. Akat kutubachok, kitukwetap pa kushakam.
12 Tukat kwisadilap ayinetu midimu ya kwikwash nich. Pakat kutusaalau masaal, etu tukat kuyiyukish. Pakat kutuzengolau, etu tukat kushimpish michim.
13 Pakat kutulondau nayimp, etu tukat kwakul nich mazu mawamp. Etu tumeken mudi dishit dia mangand, tudi mudi antu atakanena kupandakan antu awonsu!
14 Kinikufundidilanyap yom yiney mulong wa kukukwatishany usany, pakwez nifundil mulong wa kukukandany mudi anam inikatila.
15 Ap anch wikalanyap nchik nich alej tunan dikum mu yom ya Kristu, ukwetany kusu ching tatukwen umwing. Mulong am nikala kal tatukwen mu Yesu Kristu pinakurumburilanya Rusangu Ruwamp.
16 Chawiy nakwilembilany, ngilakejany am.
17 Mulong wa chom chinech nakutuminanyay kal Timote, udi mwanam mwi Nsalejetu, udi mwin yakin unikatila. Ndiy ukukuvurishany yaku yam ya mu Yesu Kristu, mudi munikata kuyilejan kwawonsu mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb,
18 Antu amwing a pakach pen akat kwibaz mulong atongil anch, am kinikwezap kukutalany.
19 Pakwez anch Nsalejetu wakat, am nikwez kudi en kukutalany. Chad am nikez kujingunin ukash wa antu inay akata kwibaz, kinikuteshap kusu mazu mau, bwat.
20 Mulong Want wa Nzamb kiudiap mu kulond, pakwez udi mu ukash.
21 Ov, en usotilany ik? Ov, neza nich nfimbu, anch neza nich muchim wa rukat ni kudimuk?
0 Paul ukat kuyifish nich in yaku yiyimp
1 Niteshil kwawonsu anch, pakach penen padi antu akweta chaku chiyimp cha usund. Chaku chiyimp chinech chakad kal kumekanangap kudi antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu, Alondil anch pakach pen padi muntu umwing ukata kwend ni mband wa tatukwend.
2 En, niyen ukat kwibazany! Chifanyidin en kudil nih wshon nakash mulong wa muntu mwinou. Chifanyidin en kumwopat muntu usadila chom chinech pakach pen.
3 Ap aneh nidiap nchik kulemp ni yenen ku mujimbu, pakwez ku mwiku wam nidi ni yenen pamwing. Chawiy namufish kal nieh muntu mwinou mudi nidi ni yenen pamwing.
4 Mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu, am namufish kal nich muntu ukata kusal chom chinech. Piukukumanganany, salany nich ukash wa Nsalejetu Yesu mudi nidi ni yenen pamwing.
5 Chifanyidin kumupan muntu mwinou mu makas ma Sakudimban chakwel mujimbu wend usheshik, Chawiy mwamu mupim ukez kupand pa Dichuku dikurumburishay Nsalejetu.
6 Kwibaz kwen kuwapilap! Ov, kiwijanyap anch, mwon ukemp ukat kutekau mu wung wa kusamp ukat kututwish dibot diawonsu?
7 Dioshany mwon ukur wa yitil, chad wikalany mudi wung usu wakadiau kal kutek mwon. Mulong amupeshil kal Kristu, ndiy kamu Mwan a Mukoku wa musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej.
8 Chawiy kangal etu twasalany musambu wa Kusut kwa Chinawej nich mwon ukur, wawiy mwon wa yitil ni kuyip. Pakwez tusalany musambu nich dibot diakad kutek mwon, diawiy dibot dia mwon wa zwang ni uyakin.
9 Mukand ukwau nakufundilanya, nakulejanya anch, kangal wovijanany nau antu in usund.
10 Kinilondilap mwamu mulong wa antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu akweta usund, akweta Tiss akata kwiy, ap akata kwifukwil akish. Anch usotilany kuyichin antu inay awonsu, chifanyidin ing wadiokalangany mu mangand.
11 Pakwez nalonda anch, kangal wovijanany nend muntu ukata kulond anch: “Nidi Mmwanamakwey mwin Kristu,” anch ndiy udi mwin usund, ap ukwet ris, ap ukat kwifukwil akish, ap ukat kusaalan masaal, ap udi mwin kukwachik maar, ap mwij. Kangal wovijanany nend ap kusu kudia nend muntu wa mutapu winou.
12 Mulong am kinikat kuyirumburishap antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu. Chifanyidin en kuyirumburish antu adia mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
13 Nzamb ndiy mwin kuyirumburish antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Mwopatany muntu muyimp mukach mwen.”
0 Mutapu wa kuyirumburish in Kristu
1 Anch umwing wenen ukwet mulong ni mwanamakwend mwin Kristu, kichifanyidinap kutwal mulong winou kudi antu akad kwikal in Kristu. Pakwez chifanyidin kutwal mulong Winou kudi antu a Nzamb.
2 Ov, en kiwijanyap anch, antu a Nzamb akez kuyirumburish antu a mangand minam? Chawiy anch en ukez kuyirumburishany antu a mangand minam, ov, en kiukutwishanyap kurumburish tumilong tukemp?
3 Ov, kiwijanyap anch, yetu tukeza kuyirumburish aruu a mwiur? Anch mwamu, chifanyidin kand kurumburish milong yitukweta mu mwom winou!
4 Anch milong yashik, en ukat kuyitwalany kudi antu akat kudiulau mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
5 Am nilondil yom yiney mulong wa kukukwatishany usany. Nij nawamp anch, kukutwish kwikal muntu umwing wa pakach pen ukweta manangu ma kurumburish milong ya pakach pa in Kristu.
6 Pakwez mwin Kristu ukata kumutwal mwin Kristu mukwau ku dirumburish, chad kwinikwa akat kuyirumburish kudi antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu!
7 Anch ukat kutwalijanany muntu ni mukwau ku dirumburish, kwinoku kudi kamu kuwa kwen kwa win Kristu. Ov, mulong wak kiushimpishinanyap muchim anch muntu wakusalany nayimp? Chom chiwamp kukwiyil yom yen kupandakan kumutwal mwanamakwey mwin Kristu ku dirumburish.
8 Pakwez en ayinen ukat kusalijanany nayimp, ukat kwiyijanany kand yom pakach pa anamakwen in Kristu.
9 Chakin, en wijany nawamp anch, antu akad kutentam kakutwishap kuswan mu Want wa Nzamb. Kangal widimbany, mulong antu in kusotijan, ap in kwifukwil akish, ap in kwimik dis, ap in usund wa amakundj ni amakundj, ap wa amband ni amband,
10 ap in kwiy, ap in ris, ap in kukwachik maar, ap in kusaalan masaal, ap ambwitan, antu a mitapu yiney kakutwishap kuswan mu Want wa Nzamb.
11 Antu amwing a pakach pen ading mwamu. Pakwez en akoyishinany kal ku yitil, akutokishinany kal kwikal antu ishitwila ‘a Nzamb adia zwang, akuyingishinany kal kudi Nzamb mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu ni ku Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb wetu.
0 Mijimbu yen yikal yitumbila kudi Nzamb
12 Amwing a pakach pen akutwish kulond anch: “Kwikil chom chikwinkangesha kusal yom yawonsu.” Chakin, mwawiy, pakwez yom yawonsu kiyikukukwashap. Niyam nikutwish kulond anch: “Kwikil chom chikwinkangesha kusal yom yawonsu.” Pakwez am kinikutwishap kwitiy kwikal muswik wa maku ma mujimbu.
13 Akwau akutwish kulond anch: “Yakudia ayisala mulong wa ditont, ni ditont adisala mulong wa yakudia.” Chakin, mwawiy, dichuku dimwing Nzamb ukez kushesh yawonsu mwaad way. Chawiy mujimbu kausalap mulong wa usund, pakwez ausala mulong wa kumusadil nich Nsalejetu, niyend Nsalejetu udi mwin kutakel wa mujimbu,
14 Nzamb wamuvumbula Nsalejetu kwikal kand mwom, chad ndiy ukutuvumbul kand kwikal aom ku ukash wend,
15 En wijany nawamp anch, mijimbu yen yidi yid ya mujimbu wa Kristu. Ov, nikutwish kunon chid chimwing cha mujimbu wa Kristu ni kuchisal nich chakwel chikal chid cha mband wa kusochik? Chakapul chaya mwa!
16 Komb en kKiwijanyap anch, ikundj anch walal nend mband wa kusochik wikal kal nend mujimbu umwing? Mu Mukand wa Nzamb afundil anch: “Antu aad akez kwikal mujimbu umwing.”
17 Pakwez muntu ukata kwibomb nend Nsalejetu ukez kwikal nend mwiku umwing.
18 Chinany chitil cha usund. Yitil yikwau yawonsu yikat kusalay muntu kiyitadilap ku mujimbu. Pakwez muntu mwin usund ukat kuyipish mujimbu wend wawonsu.
19 Ov, en kiwijanyap anch, mijimbu yen yidi Chikumbu cha Nzamb, mwawiy mushichay Mwiku Utumbila wapanay Nzamb? En kiudianyap ant ipen.
20 Akulandanya kal nich usey ukash. Chawiy mutumbishany Nzamb nich mijimbu yen.
0 Malejan ma Paul ma uruu wa in Kristu
1 Katat nikwakul ku yipul yiwafundilanya mu mukand wen. Chidi chom chiwamp kudi ikundj kushakam wakad kwatan.
2 Pakwez mulong wa yoziu ya usund chifanyidin ikundj mwawonsu kwat mband. Chawiy chimwing kand, mband mwawonsu ufanyidin kwachik ku uruu.
3 Chifanyidin ikundj asala mudimu wend mudi ikundj kudi mukajend, niyend mband asala mudimu wend mudi mband kudi_ nfumwend.
4 Mband kadiap mwant wa mujimbu wend amwinend, pakwez mujimbu wend udi wa nfumwend., Chawiy chimwing kand, niyend ikundj kadiap mwant wa mujimbu wend amwinend, pakwez mujimbu wend udi wa mukajend.
5 Kangal wakojijanany kusankan pamwing, ching kusu anch wovijanany kulik kusal chimwing mulong wa kwipanany mu kulembil. Chad kwinyim sankanijanany kand, chamwamu Sakudimban ukez kukwozany mulong ukuburenany usu wa kwilam.
6 Nilondil yom yiney wakad kukushindilany mulong wa kwatijan, pakwez nitiyin en usalany mwamu.
7 Chakin, nisotil ing antu awonsu ikalang mudi munidia am. Pakwez muntu ni muntu amwinkisha chiyukish chend amwinend cha kusal nich. Chiyukish chidiokil kudi Nzamb.
0 Muntu umwing watambula chiyukish cha mutapu umwing, muntu mukwau watambula chiyukish cha mutapu ukwau.
8 Katat niyilejin ajich ni adiaafu chidi kwau chiwamp awiy kushakam ayinau mudi munishicha am.
9 Pakwez anch awiy katwishilap kwilam ayinau, chifanyidin atijan kwau. Mulong chidi kwau chiwamp kwatijan kupandakan kwikal nich maku nakash.
10 Nikwet chijil kudi angachik nau angatan, chawiy cha Nsalejetu kichidiap chamam, mband udia ku uruu kangal walikijan nend nfumwend, bwat.
11 Pakwez anch wadiokal ku uruu, kangal kand wachik, ching anch wachirik kudi nfumwend. Chawiy chimwing, niyend ikundj kafanyidinap kulikijan nend mukajend.
12 Nikwet dizu dia kuyilej antu akwau, kadiap Nsalejetu ulondila, pakwez yam nilondila. Anch mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu ukwet mband wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristu, chad mband winou witiy kudandamen kushakam nend, kangal ikundj wamulik, bwat.
13 Chawiy chimwing kand, anch mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu ukwet nfumwend wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristu, chad ikundj winou witiy kudandamen kushakam nend, kangal mband wamulik, bwat.
14 Mulong ikundj wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristu udi muntu wa Nzamb, mulong wibombil kal nend mband mwin Kristu. Chawiy chimwing, mband wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristu udi muntu wa Nzamb, mulong wibombil kal nend ikund lj mwin Kristu. Anch chamwamu, an akuvalau akwikal akad kwijikan kudi Nzamb, pakwez mulong nvaj umwing udi mwin Kristu, anau adi an a Nzamb.
15 Chawiy anch ngachik ap ngatan wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristu usotil kumulik mwin Kristu mband ap ikundj, mwitiyany kwend asala mwamu. Mu chom mudi chinech ngachik ap ngatan mwin Kristu kamukasinap ku chijil cha uruu, mulong Nzamb watutazuka etu in Kristu kushakam mu chisambu.
16 Oy, ey mband mwin Kristu wij nchik anch ukez kumupandish nfumwey? Ap niyey ikundj mwin Kristu wij nchik anch ukez kumupandish mukajey? Muntu ni muntu ashakam mutapu wamutazukau kudi Nzamb
17 Chifanyidin muntu ni muntu ashakam mutapu wamwinkishau kudi Nsalejetu, wawiy kamu mutapu Wadingay pamutazukau kudi Nzamb. Chinech chawiy chijil cham nikata kulejan kwawonsu mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb.
18 Anch muntu ading amutwala kal ku mukand pa chisu chamutazukau kudi Nzamb, kangal wapakish kudiosh yijingidij ya mukand. Anch muntu wading wakad kal kuya ku mukand pa chisu chamutazukau kudi Nzamb, kafanyidinap kukimb kumutwal ku mukand.
19 Anch muntu amutwala ku mukand ap wakad kutwal ku mukand, kichikwetap usey. Chom chijim, chifanyidin muntu kuziyil ku yijil ya Nzamb.
20 Chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu kushakam mutapu wadingay pamutazukau kudi Nzamb.
21 Ov, cy wading muswik pakutazukau kudi Nzamb? Kangal wiyakamish kwey. Pakwez anch waman mutapu wa kwikwol kwikal mwant ipey, sal kwey mwamu.
22 Mulong anch muntu wading muswik pamutazukau kudi Nsalejetu, katat udi mwant ipend mwi Nsalejetu. Chawiy chimwing, anch muntu wading mwant ipend pamutazukau kudi Kristu, katat udi muswik wa Kristu.
23 Akulandanya kal nich usey ukash, chawiy kangal wikalany katat aswik au antu.
24 Anamakwam in Kristu, chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu kushakam nend Nzamb piswimp mudi mutapu wadingay pamutazukau kudi Nzamb.
0 Malejan ma Paul mulong wa ajich ni adiaafu
25 Katat mulong wau ajich, kinikwetap chijil chidiokila kudi Nsalejetu, pakwez nikat kukulejany yitongijok yamam mu uyakin unatambula ku riy ra Nsalejetu.
26 Mulong wa mar ma chirung chinech, nitongil anch, chidi kwau chiwamp kudi muntu ni muntu kushakam mudi mudiay.
27 Anch watil kal mband, kangal wamulik. Anch udi mujich, kangal wat mband.
28 Pakwez anch wamwat mband kiusadilap kwey chitil. Chawiy chimwing, anch changadim amwat kudi ikundj, niyend kasadilap kwend chitil. Pakwez antu atijadina akez kuman mar mu chirung chinech mu mwom yau, chawiy kinisotilap en umanany mar minam.
29 Anamakwam in Kristu, charumburik anch, chisu chakep kal. Kudiokal katat chifanyidin angatan kushakam mudi katenap kwau.
30 Chifanyidin antu adidila ikala mudi kakwetap ushon, antu asipina ikala mudi kakwetap musangar, antu akata kuland ikala mudi kakwetap chom.
31 Chifanyidin antu akata kusadil yom ya mangand minam ikala mudi kasadidilap kwau yom yiney. Mulong mangand minam mudi mumadia katat omu, kimakushakamap kwau chisu chilemp, bwat.
32 Am kinisotilap en wiyakamishany. Muntu udia mujich ukat kwiyakamish nich midimu ya Nsalejetu, ukat kukimb mutapu wa kumusangarish Nsalejetu.
33 Pakwez muntu watena ukat kwiyakamish nich midimu. ya mangand minam, ukat kukimb mutapu wa kumusangarish mukajend.
34 Ndiy udi muntu ukweta mwend kwimpat, mwend mu waat. Niyend mband wakad kwachik ku uruu, ap changadim wakad kal kwijik ikundj, ukat kwiyakamish nich mudimu wa Nsalejetu. Ndiy ukat kukimb mutapu wa kwikal utumbila ku mujimbu ni ku mupim wend. Pakwez mband wachikina ku uruu ukat kwiyakamish nich midimu ya mangand minam, ukat kukimb mutapu wa kumusangarish nfumwend.
35 Nilondil yom yiney yawonsu mulong wa kukukwashany en, kinisotilap kukukangeshany. Nisotil ing wikalangany nich mwom uwamp wa mutapu uwanyidina. Nisotil kand wipanany kamu nich michim yawonsu ku mudimu wa Nsalejetu.
36 Anch nsand utongil anch, kashichap nawamp ni changadim utondilay, chad maku ma kulal nend mamupandakedin, pakwez ndiy kand kal alalap nend, chifanyidin kumwat kamu changadim mudi musotilay. Chinech kichidiap kwau chitil.
37 Anch nsand wamutond changadim, chad watenchik mu muchim wend amwinend wakad kumushindil anch: “Kinikumwatap katat,” Anch ukutwish kulam rusot rend wakad kulal nend changadim, anch kand watongijok kumulam changadim mwamu, ndiy wasal kal nawamp.
38 Chawiy muntu ukumwata changadim watonday, ndiy wasal kal nawamp. Pakwez muntu walika kumwat changadim watonday, wasal kal nawamp kupandakan.
39 Mband wachikina ku uruu kadiap mwant ipend pachidiay nfumwend mwom. Pakwez anch nfumwend wafa, chad mband wikal kal mwant ipend, akutwish kumwat mudi musotilay, pakwez ching kudi mwin Kristu.
40 Pakwez mu yitongijok yamam, ndiy ukusangar nakash anch washakam wakad kwachik. Nitongil anch, mu yom yiney antakedil kudi Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb.
0 Mulong wa yakudia yipeshilau ku akish
1 Katat tutalany mulong wa mbij jipeshilau ku akish. Twij nawamp mudi muulondilany anch: “Etu awonsu tukwet ronganyin.” Ronganyin riner rikat kumuletil muntu kwibaz, pakwez rukat rikat kutukudish mu ritiy.
2 Muntu ukata kwitong anch: “Nij chom,” kand kal ijik mudi muchifanyidina kwiik.
3 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu umukatila Nzamb wijiken kudi ndiy.
4 Chawiy mulong wa mbij jipeshilau ku akish, twij nawamp anch, mukish chidi kwau chom chamwamu, pakwez kudi kusu ching Nzamb umwing.
5 Ap anch alondap nchik anch kudi akish mwiur ni pansh, chakin, awiy atongil anch: “Kudi akish avud ni ansalejetu avud.”
6 Pakwez kudi etu twitiyin anch, kudi kusu ching Nzamb umwing, Tatuku, Sakatang wa yom yawonsu, ndiy kamu utwinkishina mwom. Tukwet kand Nsalejetu umwing Yesu Kristu, kwi ndiy kwawiy kwatangilau yom yawonsu, kwawiy kand kutukwetidila mwom.
7 Pakwez antu awonsu kijap kwau chom chinech. Antu ijidila kal ku akish anch adia mbij jipeshilau ku akish, kom kau kaziy, chad atongijok anch, ijondish kal mulong wa yakudia_ yiney.
8 Yakudia kiyikutwishap kutuwapish kudi Nzamb. Yakudia kiyikutuyipishap anch twalik kuyidia, yakudia kiyikutuwapishap anch twayidiap nchik.
9 Chawiy, babalany, chakwel kangal want ipen wenen wayipwakesh antu akweta kom kaziyina.
10 Anch muntu uziyina mu kom wakuman ey ukweta ronganyin ukat kudia mu chikumbu cha mukish, ov, niyend kakwikalap nich muchim wa kudia yom yipeshilau ku akish?
11 Chawiy mwamu ronganyin renen ramujiyish kal muntu ukweta kom kaziyina, ndiy kamu mwanamakwetu wafilau kudi Kristu.
12 En ukat kusalany chitil kudi anamakwen piukata kusheshany kom kau kaziyina, mwamu_ ukat kusalany kand chitil kudi Kristu!
13 Chawiy anch yakudia yikutwish kumuwish mwanamakwam mwin Kristu mu chitil, kinikez kudiap kand mbij, chamwamu yam namuwisha kal mwanamakwam.
0 Paul ukat kulik kupit mulong wa ukambuy wa Yesu
1 Ov, am kinidiap mwant ipam? Oy, kinidiap kambuy wa Yesu? Ov, kinamumanap Nsalejetu Yesu? Ov, en kiudianyap in Kristu mulong wa mudimu unasala mwi Nsalejetu?
2 Ap anch antu akwau alikap nchik kwingitiy anch, nidi kambuy wa Yesu, nij anch chifanyidin en kwingitiyany! Mulong en udiany chijingidij cha ukambuy wam mwi Nsalejetu.
3 Nilondidilap amwinam kudi awiy akata kwinfish nich.
4 Ov, kitukutwishap kudia ni kuna mulong wa mudimu wetu?
5 Ov, etu kitukwetap usu, muntu ni muntu, wa kwat mband mwin Kristu kuya nend mu Maweny metu, mudi musadilau atwimbuy akwau a Yesu, ni anamakwend a Nsalejetu, ni Pita?
6 Nipwil kand, ov, Barnabas niyamam, yetu_kusu kwetu, tufanyidina kusal mudimu wa kwidish ayinetu?
7 Ov, isalay ik ukata kwifut amwinend? Ov, nany ukunyina mitond ya nviny wakad kudia mabuj mau? Ap nany ukata kulam amikoku wakad kuna mayel mau?
8 Kinilondilap yom yiney ching kusu ku manangu ma wuntu. Ov, Yijil ya Moses kiyilondilap kand chawiy chimwing?
9 Mulong afundil mu Yijil ya Moses anch: "Kangal wamukangesh ngomb wa mudimu kudia tidiku pa chisu chikat kumudjatay mulong wa kumuzungul." Ov, Nzamb ukat kutong kusu mulong wa angomb a mudimu palonday mazu minam?
10 Ov, kalondap mazu minam mulong wetwetu? Chakin, yom yiney ayifunda mulong wetwetu. Mwin kudim chir ufanyidin kudim nich ruchingej anch ukutambul chikunku chend cha yom ya kwangul. Niyend mwin kuzungul ufanyidin kuchingej anch ukutambul chikunku chend cha yom ya kwangul. kwangul.
11 Etu twakusa mbut ya Rusangu Ruwamp mukach mwen. Ov, chikwikal chom chiyimp anch etu twangulap mapit menen ma kukwash nich mijimbu yetu?
12 Anch antu akwau akwet mutapu wa kukwipulany en mapit ma kukwash nich mijimbu, ov, etu kituyipandakenap awiy mutapu wa kukwipulany en? Chakin, etu kitwakwipulanyap kwetu chom. Pakwez twitiya kal kuman mar ma mitapu yawonsu chakwel kangal twakangesh kupalangan kwa Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu.
13 En wijany nawamp anch, antu akata kusal mudimu mu Chikumbu cha Chinawej, akat kuyinkish kand yakudia yau ya mu Chikumbu cha Chinawej. Niyau akata kulambul yakupesh pa chintamb, akat kutambul chikunku. cha yakupesh.
14 Chawiy chimwing kand, Nsalejetu walejana anch, antu akata kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp afanyidin kutambul difut diau ku mudimu winou.
15 Pakwez am kinatambulap chom ap kusu chimwing cha difut diam, chikwau kand, kinifundilap mukand winou mulong wa kwit chom. Chidi chiwamp am kufa kupandakan kwinkangesh kwibaz kwam kwinoku kudi muntu mukwau!
16 Kinikwetap usu wa kwibaz mulong wa mudimu wam wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp. Chakin, chifanyidin am kusal mwamu mulong wa dizu dia Nsalejam. Nikuyindam anch nalik kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp!
17 Anch nasal mudimu winou mudi mudia rusot ram, ing, nelang kuchingej kutambul difut. Pakwez udi mudimu Nzamb wanginkishin kusal.
18 Chawiy, ov, difut didi chom ik? Difut diam didi musangar wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp chamwamu, wakad kutambul difut mudi mukutwishay kutambul mwin kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp.
19 Am nidi mwant ipam, kinidiap muswik. Ap mwamwap nchik am niyikadishin kal muswik wa antu awonsu, chakwel nipandakesh kumwisakil Kristu antu avud.
20 Pinisadila mudimu pakach pa in Yuda, nilamin yaku ya in Yuda chakwel niyipwit awiy. In Yuda afanyidin kulondul Yijil ya Moses, niyam nasala mudi nifanyidin kulondul Yijil ya Moses ap anch Yijil ya Moses kiyikwetap nchik ulabu kudi am. Nasala mwamu chakwel niyipwitin in Yijil ya Moses kudi Kristu.
21 Chawiy chimwing, pinikata kusal mudimu pakach pa in michid yikwau akad kwijik Yijil ya Moses, nilamin yaku ya in michid yikwau, chakwel niyipwita niyau. Kinilondilap anch nilikin kulondul yijil ya Nzamb, nilondil anch, am nidi mwin kulondul yijil ya Kristu.
22 Pinisadila pakach pa antu aziyina mu ritiy, nilamin yaku mudi niyam niziyin chakwel niyipwita kand niyau. Chawiy mu yom yewons am niyifana antu awonsu, chakwel niyipandishap amwiti ku midimu yam ya mitapu yawonsu.
23 Am nikat kusal yom yiney yawonsu mulong wa Rusangu Ruwamp chakwel nitambulap yiyukish yau.
24 En wijany kal ant akata kubambil mau, awonsu akuya pamwing, pakwez ching umwing ukutwisha kutambul difut. Chawiy ikasikeshany kulam mwom wa win Kristu chakwel niyen ukez kutambulany difut,
25 Mwin masengan mwawonsu ukat kwiyijidish mulong wa kukasikesh mujimbu. Awiy akat kusal mwamu mulong wa kutambul chijingidij cha kupandakan, chakad kushakam chisu chilemp. Pakwez etu in Kristu tukat kwikasikesh mu yaku yetu mulong wa kutambul chijingidij chikushakama chikupu.
26 Am nikat kubambil mau mes kurutu, matadil kwisudiel. Nidi kand mudi mwin kubulan yinkany, kinikat kubulap chamubudil.
27 Nikat kumesh mujimbu wam mar mulong winziyil, chakwel Nzamb kakutwishap kwindjibul kuns anch napwish kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi antu akwau.
0 Paul ukat kuyikangesh antu kwifukwil akish
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil en uvurikany yom yayishikena anshankuretu amulondula Moses. Awiy awonsu ayitakela kudi didj dia Nzamb, chakwel awonsu asuta nawamp mu Karung Usuz.
2 Mu didj ni mu karung ayibatisha chakwel abombakan nend Moses.
3 Awiy awonsu adia yakudia ya mutapu umwing ya mwiku yapanay Nzamb.
4 Awiy awonsu ana kand mem ma mutapu umwing ma mwiku mapanay Nzamb. Awiy ana mem madiokila ku diyal dia mwiku diapanay Nzamb diayilondula. Diyal dined ndiy Kristu,
5 Pakwez ap mwamwap nchik avud a pakach pau kamusangarishap Nzamb, chad mulong wa chom chinech wawiy wafilau mwi mpay.
6 Katat yom yiney yawonsu yikal kal yijingidij ya kutubabesh etu, chakwel kangal tusota yom yiyimp mudi mwasalau awiy.
7 Ap kangal twifukwilany akish mudi mwasalau antu amwing a pakach pau. Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch; “Antu ashakama ku musambu. Chad apandakesha kuna nakash, atumbuka kuja maj mayimp.”
8 Niyetu kangal twasal yitil ya usund mudi mwasalau antu amwing a pakach pau. Pasalau mwamu, antu tunan makum maad_ ni tusatu ayijipa pa dichuku dimwing.
9 Kangal etu twamuswidiosh Nsalejetu mudi mwasalau antu amwing a pakach pau. Pasalau mwamu, ayijipa kudi annak.
10 Kangal twinanany mudi mwasalau amwing a pakach pau. Pasalau mwamu, ayishesha kudi Muruu wa Mwiur wa Rufu.
11 Yom yiney yawonsu yashika kudi awiy mulong wa kwikal chijingidij kudi antu akwau, chad ayifunda mulong wa kutubabesh nich etu. Mulong etu tudi piswimp ni disudiel dia mangand.
12 Chawiy chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu utongila anch: "Niminy dang mu ritiy," ababal, chamwamu ukuwa.
13 Yoziu yikata kushik kudi en, yawiy kand yikata kushik kudi antu awonsu. Pakwez Nzamb udi mwin yakin, kakwitiyap yoziu kukupandakanany en. Piyikushika yoziu yiney ndiy ukukulejany mutapu wa kukwasanik chakwel ukupandakanany wakad kuwa.
14 Chawiy, arund nam akarukat, chinany kwifukwil akish.
15 Nikat kulond kudi en, antu ukwetanya manangu, irumbutilanyap ayinen mazu minilondila.
16 Tukat kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wa rupas ra chiyukish ra Mes ma Mwant, pitukata kunamu tukat kubombakan pamwing ni mash ma Kristu. Pitukata kuumbol dibot ni kudidia tukat kubombakan pamwing ni mujimbu wa Kristu.
17 Etu tudiany antu avud, pakwez tudi kwetu mujimbu umwing mulong tukat kwanganijan dibot dimwing.
18 Talany in Isarel, amwing a pakach pau akat kudia yakupesh yipeshilau pa chintamb, awiy akat kubombakan ni chintamb ku mudimu wa Nzamb.
19 Kinisotilap kulond anch, mukish chidi chom chakin, ap anch yakupesh yimupeshilau yidi yom yakin.
20 Nisotil kulond anch, antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu pakat kulambulau yakupesh yau, akat kuyipesh ayilembil, kakat kumupeshap Nzamb, bwat. Am kinikatilap en kwibombany nau ayilembil,
21 Kiukutwishanyap kwibomb nend Nsalejetu pakuna rupas ku Mes ma Mwant, chad wibombany kand nau ayilembil. Kiukutwishanyap kand kwibomb nend Nsalejetu pa kudia dibot ku Mes ma Mwant, chad wibombany kand nau ayilembil.
22 Anch twapakish kusal mwamu, ov, kitukumwovishap Nsalejetu mukau? Ov, etu tumupandakenamu ndiy usu?
0 Tusalany yom yawonsu mulong wa uyaj wa Nzamb
23 Amwing akat kulond anch: “Etu tukutwish kusal yom yawonsu_ yitusotila kusal.” Chakin, pakwez yom yawonsu kiyidiap yom ya kutukwash. Amwing akat kulond kand anch: yom yawonsu kiyikutukasikeshap ku ritiy.
24 Kangal wasot kusu ching kuwap kwey amwiney, pakwez sot kuwap kwau akwen,
25 Ukutwishany kudia mbij ja mitapu yawonsu yikat kulandishau mu chiku wakad kwidjidjek mu kom ken,
26 Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Mangand ni yom yawonsu yidiamu yidi yayen ya Nsalejetu,”
27 Anch muntu wakad kal kumwitiyij Kristy wakutazukany kudia yakudia kwol kwend, anch witiyany kuya, diangany yom yi mitapu yawonsu yikukwinkishanyay, wakad kwidjidjek mu kom ken.
28 Pakwez anch muntu wakulejany anch: “Mbij jinej ajipeshil ku akish,” chawiy kangal wadiany mbij jinej. Salany mwamu mulong wa kom ka muntu wakulejanganya yom yiney.
29 Kinilondilap mulong wa kom kenen ayinen, nilondil mulong wa kom ka muntu mwinou. Muntu umwing ukwipul anch: “Ov, mulong wak nikukanganya kusal mudi munisotila mulong wa muntu mukwau?
30 Anch am nadia, namujikitish Nzamb. Ov, muntu mukwau ukwinfish nich nchik mulong wa yom yinajikitishang kal kudi Nzamb?”
31 Chawiy yom yawonsu yiukusalanya, anch kudia ap anch kuna, salany yawonsu mulong wa kulet uyajy kudi Nzamb.
32 Shakamany nawamp, chakwel yom yiusadilany kangal yayisadikish antu akwau yitil, ap in Yuda, ap in michid yikwau, ap in Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
33 Salany mudi munikata ‘kusal am. Nikat kupakish kuyisangarish antu awonsu ku yisalijok yam, wakad kutong ching kusu mulong wa kuwap kwam amwinam, bwat. Nikat kutong mulong wa kuwap kwa antu awonsu chakwel niyau akutwish kupand.
1 Ngilakejany am mudi niyam munikata kumwilakej Kristu.
0 Mutapu ufanyidinay ikundj ni mband kurutu kwa Nsalejetu
2 Nakushimanany mulong yisu yawonsu en ukat kwinvurikany, ulaminany kand malejan minakulejanya.
3 Pakwez nikatil en wijikany nawamp anch, Kristu ndiy Mwant wa muntu mwawonsu, chad ikundj ndiy mwant wa mband, chawiy Nzamb ndiy Mwant wa Kristu.
4 Chawiy anch ikundj udjadil chom ku mutu pa chisu cha kulembil, ap pa kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb, ndiy wamukwatish kal Kristu usany.
5 Pakwez anch mband kadjadilap chom ku mutu wend pa chisu cha kulembil, ap pa kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb, ndiy wamukwatish kal ikundj usany. Chamwamu ukwikal mudi mband ukidilau kawewu.
6 Anch mband kadjadilap chom ku mutu, chiwapil ing wakambang nswich jend! Pakwez mulong chidi chom cha‘usany kudi mband kukil kawewu, chiwapil ing wadjalang chom ku mutu.
7 Ikundj kakwetap kuswir kwa kudjal chom ku mutu, mulong amutanga mu chifu cha Nzamb, chawiy ndiy ukat kumekesh uyaj wa Nzamb. Pakwez mband ndiy ukat kumekesh uyaj wa ikundj.
8 Mulong ikundj pamutangau kamudioshap kudi mband, pakwez mband pamutangau amudiosha kudi ikundj.
9 Chawiy ikundj kamutangap mulong wa mband, pakwez mband amutanga mulong wa ikundj.
10 Chawiy chiwapidilay mband kudjal chom ku mutu kwikal chijingidij cha kuziyil kudi ikundj, mulong wa aruu a mwiur.
11 Mulong ‘wa kubombakan kwetu mwi Nsalejetu, mband kadiap mwant ipend kudi ikundj, ap ikundj niyend kadiap mwant ipend kudi mband.
12 Mulong pamutangau mband amudiosha kudi ikundj, chawiy chimwing, niyend ikundj ukat kuvadik kudi mband. Nzamb ndiy Sakatang wa yom yawonsu.
13 Tondanyap ayinen, ov, chidi chiwamp kudi mband kulembil kudi Nzamb mukach mwa antu wakad kudjal chom ku mutu?
14 Mutapu wamutangau muntu utulejin anch, chidi chom cha usany kudi ikundj kulam nswich jilemp,
15 pakwez kudi mband kwikal nich nswich jilemp chidi chom cha ufun. Nswich jend jilemp amwinkishaj mulong wa kwikal chibwik cha ku mutu wend.
16 Anch muntu usotil kutadik mulong wa chom chinech, ufanyidin kwijik anch, etu ni Yikumbu ya Nzamb yikwau kitukwetap chaku chikwau cha kwifukwil.
0 Mes ma Nsalejetu Kristu
17 Katat ku malejan makwau minisotila kukulejanyamu, kinikukushimananyap, bwat, mulong mu kukumangan kwen ukat kusalany kuyip kupandakanamu kuwap.
18 Chom cha kusambish, anlejin anch, mu kukumangan kwen mudi yisak yaurokina. Nij anch mazu minam mawonsu kimadiap ma makasu, bwat.
19 Chifanyidin kwikal kwaurok, chakwel antu adia in Kristu akashinsh akutwish kumekan pakach pen.
20 Anch wakumanganany, kiyidiap yakudia ya Mes ma Nsalejetu Kristu yiukata kudiany.
21 Chawiy piukata kushakamany ku mes, muntu ni muntu ukat kuswakal kudia yakudia yend amwinend, chad antu amwing akat kushal ni nzal, akwau akwachikang kal nich maar.
22 Ov, kiukwetanyap yikumbu yen ayinen mwa kudil ni kunin? Ov, en usotilany kudiul Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni kuyikwatish aburedina yom usany? Ov, chom ik chinikulonda kudi en? Ov, nikutwish kukushimanany mulong wa chom chinech? Bwat, ap pakemp!
23 Nakulejanya malejan minatambula kudi Nsalejetu anch NsalejetuYesu, padingay kand kal amupan uchuku wa dichuku dinidia, ndiy wanona dibot,
24 wamujikitish Nzamb chad wadiumbol, walond anch: “Winou wawiy mujimbu wam Wwapansy kal mulong wenen. Diangany mulong wa kwinvurik am."
25 Chawiy chimwing, chapwishau kudia yakudia yau ndiy wanona kand rupas ra maar ma nviny, walond anch: nees aves manswik masu ma Nzamb, makasikeshau kal nie Lae mma aa yawonsu yiukunanya, nangany mulong
26 Piukudianya mabot ni piukunany nviny mu rupas riner ra Mes ma Mwant, en ukat kwijikeshany patok rufu ra Nealejetu djat ni pa kwezilay.
27 Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukatn kudia mabot ni kuna nviny mu rupas ya Mes ma Mwant iu mutapu wa kumukwatish Nsalejetu usany, muntu mwinou ukufa nich kwa chitil cha kuurumbukin mujimbu wa Nsalejetu ni mash mend.
28 Chawiy muntu ufanyidin pakusambish kwipak amwinend mu muchim, chad wadia lel mabot ni kuna nviny mu rupas ra Mes ma Mwant.
29 Mulong anch muntu wadia ni kuna yom ya Mes ma Mwant wakad kwijik kurumburik kwa mujimbu wa Nsalejetu, muntu mwinou wifish kal nich padilay ni kuna.
30 Wawiy mulong winou uyedilau antu avud a pakach pen, akwau aziyil ku mujimbu, ni akwau afil kal.
31 Anch twipak ayinetu pakusambish, kitukwandamap mu dirumburish dia Nzamb.
32 Pakwez akat kuturumburish ni kutulej kadimu kudi Nsalejetu, chakwel kangal atufisha nich pamwing nau antu akad ritiy.
33 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, piukukumanganany pamwing mulong wa kudia Mes ma Mwant, chifanyidin kuchingelijadilany.
34 Chawiy anch muntu wovil nzal, chifanyidin kudia bil kwol kwend, chakwel kangal akurumburishany kudi Nzamb piukukumanganany. Chad mulong wa yom yikwau yashilap, nikez kuyirijek pinikushika kwinaku.
0 Yiyukish ya kusal nich yipanyinay Mwiku Utumbila
1 Katat nikwakul ku yom yiwafundilanya mulong wa yiyukish ya kusal nich yikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila. Anamakwam in Kristu, nikatil en kwijik uyakin mulong wa yiyukish yiney.
2 Piwadinganya kand kal wikalany in Kristu, akukakanya ku usu, akutwalanya kuyifukwil akish akad kulondang.
3 Nikatil en wijikany kand anch, muntu mwawonsu utakedilau kudi Mwiku Utumbila, kakutwishap kulond anch: “Yesu ayindam!” Chikwau kand, muntu kakutwishap kulond anch: “Yesu udi Nsalejam,” ching anch amutakedil kudi Mwiku Utumbila.
4 Yiyukish ya kusal nich yishalijadin, pakwez Mwiku ukata kuyipan udi umwing.
5 Mitapu ya kumusadil Nsalejetu yishalijadin, pakwez Nsalejetu tukata kusadil udi umwing.
6 Midimu yishalijadin, pakwez Nzamb ukata kuyipan midimu yawonsu kudi antu udi umwing.
7 Anch Mwiku Utumbila udi mu muchim wa muntu, ndiy ukat kupan chiyukish cha kusal nich chikuyikwasha antu awonsu.
8 Mwiku Utumbila ukat kupan chiyukish cha kulond nich manangu, chad Mwiku, ndiy umwing, ukata kumwinkish muntu mukwau chiyukish cha kulond nich ronganyin.
9 Ndiy, Mwiku Utumbila umwing, ukat kupan ritiy rijim kudi muntu umwing, chad kudi muntu mukwau ukat kumwinkish ukash wa kwok nich ayej.
10 Mwiku Utumbila ukat kumwinkish muntu umwing chiyukish cha kusal nich yilay kudi muntu mukwau ukat kumwinkish chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb, kudi mukwau wamwinkish chiyukish cha kujingunin nich Mwiku Utumbila ni miku yikwau. Kudi mukwau wamwinkish chiyukish cha rudim ripipela ra kulond nich jindim jakad kwijikan, kudi mukwau wamwinkish chiyukish cha kurumburil nich jindim jakad kwijikan.
11 Yiyukish yiney ya kusal nich akat kuyipan yawonsu kudi Mwiku Utumbila umwing. Ukat kupan yiyukish yiney yawonsu kudi muntu ni muntu mudi mukatilay Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Etu awonsu tudi yid ya mujimbu umwing
12 Chawiy Kristu udi mudi mujimbu umwing ukweta yid yivud. Mujimbu winou udi kamu umwing, ap anch wikalap nehik nich yid yaurokina.
13 Etu in Kristu tudi antu a mitapu ni mitapu, amwing adi in Yuda, akwau adi in michid yikwau amwing adi aswik, akwau adi ant ipau. Pakwez etu awonsu atubatisha mu Mwiku Utumbila umwing chakwel twikal mujimbu umwing. Etu awonsu atwinkishin kal Mwiku Utumbila umwing mu michim yetu.
14 Mulong mujimbu kiukwetap kusu chid chimwing, pakwez ukwet yid yivud.
15 Mwend udi chid cha mujimbu ap anch walondap nchik anch: “Am kinidiap chikas, chawiy kinidiap chid cha mujimbu.”
16 Ditu didi kand chid cha mujimbu ap anch dialondap nchik anch: “Am kinidiap dis, chawiy kinidiap chid cha mujimbu.”
17 Anch mujimbu wawonsu udi kwau ching dis kusu, ov, ukutwish nchik kutesh? Anch mujimbu wawonsu udi kwau ching ditu kusu, ov, ukutwish nchik kwov didjimb?
18 Pakwez yom yiney yidi mwamu, chid ni chid chikwet ndond yach mu mujimbu mudi mwatenchikay Nzamb mu rusot rend.
19 Anch yid yiney yawonsu yading kwau chid chimwing, ov, mujimbu ukwikalaku nchik?
20 Chawiy mwamu yid yivud pakwez mujimbu udi kusu umwing.
21 Chawiy chikasiken mes kumel makas anch: “Kitukwetap kuswir kwenen!” Ap chikasiken mutu kuyel mend anch: “Kinikwetap kuswir kwenen!”
22 Pakwez kichidiap mwamu, etu tukwet kand kuswir kwa yid ya mujimbu yimekena anch yiziyil.
23 Yid yitutongila anch kituyibangilakup, yawiy tulamina nawamp kupandakanamu yikwau. Ni yid yikwau yitwakad kutwish kujimbul, yawiy yitukat kulam nich kalimish.
24 Yid yikwau ya ufun kiyikwetap kuswir kwa kalimish kinak. Pakwez Nzamb amwinend wayinunga yid yawonsu ku mu jimbu, chakwel yid yikweta katumb kakemp yikutambul katumb kajim.
25 Ndiy wasala mwamu chakwel kukwikalap kwaurok mu mujimbu, pakwez yid ya mitapu yawonsu yikez kulamijan chimwing ni chikwau.
26 Anch chid chimwing chaman mar, yid yawonsu yaman kal mar pamwing. Anch chid chimwing achitumbish, yid yawonsu yikusangar pamwing.
27 En awonsu pamwing udiany mujimbu wa Kristu, muntu ni muntu udi chid cha mujimbu wend.
28 Nzamb wateka antu ni antu mu jindond jau mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Antu a kusambish adi atwimbuy a Yesu, a kaad adi aruu a Nzamb, a kasatu adi alej. Chad ambakedinap adi in kusal yilay, chad pambaken in kwokan, nau in kukwash antu akwau, ni in kutakel, ni in kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan.
29 Antu awonsu kadiap atwimbuy a Yesu, ap aruu a Nzamb, ap alej. Muntu mwawonsu kakwetap ukash wa kusal yilay,
30 ap wa kuyok ayej, ap wa kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, ap wa kurumburil yom yilondilau.
31 Surabany yiyukish ya kusal nich yipandakena kuwap yikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila. Pakwez nakulejany kal mutapu wa mwom upandakenamu mitapu yawonsu kuwap.
0 Rukat ra mwin Kristu
1 Anch nalond mu jindim ja antu ap ja aruu a mwiur, pakwez anch kinikwetap rukat, am nidi mudi rupwambu rukweta masok, ap mudi rubemb rudjimina nakash.
2 Anch nikwet chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb, anch nikwet manangu, ap anch nikutwish kujingunin yom yawonsu ya ujindj, ap anch nikwet ritiy rujim ra kushemunin mikandu, pakwez anch kinikwetap rukat, nidi muntu wamwamu.
3 Anch napan yom yam yawonsu yinikweta kudi antu akwau, ap anch nipan amwinam chad angosh, pakwez anch kinikwetap rukat, yom yiney kiyikwinkwashap chom. ez
4 Rukat rikat kushimpish muchim, rudimukin kand. Rukat kirukwetap mukau, rukat kiribazilap, ap kwishimek.
5 Rukat kirukwetap dichim, ap kwitong, kirukwovangap ujim swa. Rukat kirukumulaminangap muntu kuyip.
6 Rukat kirukusangerangap mu kuyip, pakwez rikat kusanger mu uyakin.
7 Rukat kirukubangangakup milong, rukat rikat kutukasikesh yisu yawonsu kulam ritiy retu, ni ruchingej retu, nl kushimpish kwetu kwa muchim.
8 Chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb chikez kupwa, chiyukish cha kulond nich jindim jakad kwijikan, ni chiyukish cha ronganyin yikez kupwa, pakwez rukat rushiching chikupu.
9 Chiyukish chetu cha ronganyin kichiwanyidinap mulong kitwijap yomyawonsu, ni chiyukish chetu cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb kichiwanyidinap, mulong kitukutwishap kurumburil yom yawonsu.
10 Pakwez pichikeza kushik chom chiwanyidina kamu, yom yakad kuwanyin yikez kupwa.
11 Pinadinga mwanikanch, nading nikulond mudi mwanikanch, nading ni kutong mudi mwanikanch, nading nich yaku ya wanikanch. Pinakula kal nikal mukurump, nalik kulondul yaku ya wanikanch.
12 Katat tukat kuman yom ya Nzamb mudimuntu witadidila mu chintadil chiyimp, kitumenap yom yawonsu patok, bwat. Kurutu tukez kumanijan nend mpal ni mpal. Katat nimwij Nzamb pakemp, pakwez chisu chikeza kwez nikez kumwijik patok mudi mwingijay am.
13 Pakwez yom yiney yidi mwamu, ritiy, ni ruchingej, ni rukat, yom yiney yisatu yidandamedin. Pakwez chom chijim chipandakenamu yawonsu, rukat.
0 Yiyukish ya kusal nich yipanyinay Mwiku Utumbila
1 Surabany rukat, kimbany yiyukish ya kusal nich yikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila. Chom chijim, kimbany chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb.
2 Muntu ukata kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan kalondilap kudi antu, pakwez ulondil kudi Nzamb, mulong antu kamwovilap. Ndiy ukat kulond yom ya ujindj ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila.
3 Pakwez muntu ukata kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb ukat kulond kudi antu, mulong wa kuyikwash ni kuyikasikesh mu ritiy, ni kuyongoj.
4 Muntu ukata kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan ukat kwikasikesh amwinend mu ritiy, pakwez muntu ukata kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb ukat kukasikesh ritiy ra in Chikumbu cha Nzamb awonsu.
5 Nisotil en awonsu kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan. Pakwez kupandakan nisotil en kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb. Muntu ukata kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb ukwet usey kupandakanamu muntu ukata kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, elang anch kudi muntu ukutwisha kukarumun mazu, chakwel in Chikumbu cha Nzamb awonsu akutwish kukasikan kand mu ritiy.
6 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, ov, anch am nez kudi en nalond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, nikukukwashany mutapu ik? Kinikukwashanyap chom ching anch nakuletilany kujingunik kumekeshinay Nzamb, ap ronganyin, ap mazu ma Nzamb, ap malejan.
7 Chilikej anch, yozul yakad mwom kiyibudishinap yidjimin yovakena, ov, antu akutwish nchik kwijik muminy ubudilau?
8 Ap anch mpuny yabudish chidjimin chakad kwijikan, ov, nany ukwirijeka mulong wa kurish njit?
9 Chawiy chimwing ni yenen, anch ukat kulondany mu jindim jakad kwijikan, ov, nany ukwijika yom yiulondilany? Mazu men makuya kwau mu rinkind.
10 Mu mangand mudi jindim jivud, kwikil rumwing rakad kwikal nich kurumburik kwar.
11 Pakwez anch am kinijap kurumburik kwa rudim, nikwikal mudi mweny kudi mwin kulond, chad niyend mwin kulond ukwikal mweny kudi am.
12 Chawiy chimwing ni yenen, en ukat kukimbany yiyukish ya kweal nich yikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila, pakwez kupandakan, kimbany nakash mutapu wa kuyikasikesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb mu ritiy.
13 Chawiy muntu ukata kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan chifanyidin amulembil Nzamb, chakwel amwinkish chiyukish cha kurumburil nich yom yilondilay.
14 Mulong anch nalembil mu rudim rakad kwijikan, chakin, mwiku wam ukat kulembil, pakwez yitongijok yam kiyilembidilap.
15 Ov, nikusal nchik? Nikulembil nich mwiku wam, nikulembil kand nich yitonjijok yam. Nikuwang nich mwiku wam, nikuwang kand nich yitongijok yam.
16 Anch ukat kumujikitish Nzamb nich mwiku wey kusu, chad muntu mukwau wakad yiyukish ya kusal nich ya Mwiku Utumbila wez mu kukumangan. Ov, muntu mwinou ukutwish nchik kwakul anch: “Amen” ku kulembil kwey kwa kujikitish?
17 Ap anch kulembil kwey kwa kujikitish kudi kuwamp nakash, kukutwishap kumukwash muntu mukwau kukasikesh ritiy rend.
18 Am nikat kumujikitish Nzamb mulong nikat kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan kupandakanamu en awonsu.
19 Pak wez mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb nikatil kulond mazu matan movakena, chakwel makutwish kuyilej antu akwau, kupandakan kulond mazu tunan mu jindim jakad kwijikan.
20 Anamakwam in Kristu, kangal watongany mudi mukat kutongau anikanch. Ku mulong wa kuyip ikalany mudi anikanch akad kwijik yom yivud yiyimp, pakwez chifanyidin kutongijok mudi mukat kutongau amakurump.
21 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Chinawej ulondil anch: ‘Am nikez kulondil kudi antwam ku kan kwa antu akata kulond jindim jakad kwijikan. Am nikez kulondil ku milamu ya aeny, pakwez ap mwamwap nchik antwam kakez kwinteshap am.” ”
22 Chawiy chiyukish cha kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan chidi chijingidij kudi antu akad ritiy, pakwez kichidiap chijingidij kudi antu akweta ritiy. Chad chiyukish cha kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb chidi chijingidij kudi antu akweta ritiy, pakwez kichidiap chijingidij kudi antu akad ritiy.
23 Chawiy anch in Chikumbu cha Nzamb akumangan pamwing, awonsu akat kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, chad antu akad in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ap akad in Kristu andam, ov, kakulondap anch: “En uyedilany rangul?”
24 Pakwez anch antu inay awonsu akat kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb, chad muntu wakad mwin Kristu, ap wakad mwin Chikumbu cha N; wandam, ndiy ukwifish nich mulong wa yitil roe malondilau. Mazu mawonsu makuteshay makez kumurumbur ish.
25 Ujindj wawonsu wa mu muchim wend ukez kumeken patok, chad ndiy ukuzendjik mpal pansh mulong wa kumwifukwil Nzamb, chad walond anch: “Chakin, Nzamb udi ni yenen!”
0 Mutapu wa kwifukwil mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
26 Anamakwam in Kristu, yiney yawiy yom yinilondila. Anch wakumanganany pamwing mulong wa kwifukwil, chifanyidin muntu umwing kurijek muminy wa kuwang, mukwau warijek malejan, mukwau walet kujingunik kwamumekeshinau kudi Nzamb patok, mukwau walond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, mukwau warumburil yom yilondilau mu jindim jinej. Yom yiney yawonsu yifanyidin kuyikasikesh in Chikumbu cha Nzamb mu ritiy.
27 Anch usotilany kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan, chifanyidin antu aad ap asatu alond muntu ni muntu pa chisu chend. Chad chifanyidin muntu mukwau kukarumun yom yilondilau mu jindim jinej.
28 Pakwez anch kwikil muntu ukutwisha kukarumun jindim jinej, chifanyidin awiy anenet zong mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Chifanyidin awly alonda jindim jakad kwijikan kudi ayinau ni kumulej Nzamb.
29 Chifanyidin antu aad ap asatu akweta chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb alonda kwau chad chifanyidin antu akwau apaka mazu mau.
30 Pakwez anch Nzamb wamekesh kujingunik patok kudi muntu mukwau uspiana mwinimwa, chifanyidin muntu ulondila anenet zong.
31 En awonsu ukutwishany kurumburil mazu ma Nzamb, muntu umwing ni umwing, chakwel antu awonsu akutwish kwilej ni kuyikasikesh mu ritiy.
32 Muntu ukweta chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb ufanyidin kwilam pa kulond.
33 Mulong Nzamb kadiap Nzamb wa kanvundangesh pakwez udi Nzamb wa chisambu. Mudi muchidia kudi antu awonsu adia mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb,
34 chifanyidin amband anenet zong mu kukumangan. Kakwetap usu wa kulond, chifanyidin ikal mwishin mudi mudia Yijil ya Moses.
35 Anch awiy asotil kujingunin chom, chifanyidin ayipul anfumwau ku yikumbu. Mulong chidi chom cha usany kudi mband kulond mu kukumangan kwa Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
36 Oy, dizu dia Nzamb diasambishila kudi en? Ov, diashika ching kusu kudi en?
37 Anch muntu watong anch chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb, ap chiyukish chikwau chidiokila kudi Mwiku Utumbila, chifanyidin kwijik anch, yom yinifundila yidi ya malejan ma Nsalejetu.
38 Anch muntu kitiyinap yom yiney, kichifanyidinap kumubangaku.
39 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, surabany chiyukish cha kurumburil nich mazu ma Nzamb, pakwez kangal wayikangeshany antu kulond mu jindim jakad kwijikan.
40 Chifanyidin usalany yom yawonsu ni kuyirijek nawamp wakad kurumbangan.
0 Kristu wavumbuk wikal kand mwom
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil kukuvurishany mutapu nakurumburilanya Rusangu Ruwamp. En warutambulanya, urushichany nich dang mu ritly.
2 Anch warulamany nawamp dang, rikez kukupandishany, pakwez anch witiyijany kwen chamwamu, kiukez kupandanyap kwen.
3 Nakulejanya en yom yipandakena kujimb yinatambula anch, Kristu wafa mulong wa yitil yetu mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb.
4 Amujika, chad pa dichuku dia chisatu ndiy wavumbuka wikal kand mwom mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb.
5 Chad kwinyim kwa kuvumbuk, ndiy wamekana kudi Pita ni kudi atwimbuy awonsu dikum ni aad.
6 Chad wamekana kapamp kamwing kudi in kwitiyij yitot itan ni kusuta, antu inay avud achidi aom, akwau akemp afi kal.
7 Chad wamekana kudi Jakobu, chad wamekan kand kudi atwimbuy awonsu.
8 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney yawonsu, ndiy wamekana kudi am. Am nidi mudi mwan wavadika wakad kuwanyish angond a kuvadik.
9 Mulong am nidi mukemp nakash kupandakan atwimbuy a Yesu awonsu. Kiniwanyidinap kwimpil anch kambuy wa Yesu, mulong am nayizengola in Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
10 Pakwez mulong wa ranaken ra Nzamb am nidi mudi munidia, chad kanginkishap ranaken rend chamwamu. Chom chikwau, am nisadil mudimu nakash kupandakanamu atwimbuy akwau a Yesu, pakwez kiyamap nisadila mudimu winou, ranaken ra Nzamb rawiy rinsadishina mudimu winou.
11 Kwikil mulong anch yam nirumburila Rusangu Ruwamp kudi en, ap anch atwimbuy akwau a Yesu arumburila. Etu awonsu tukat kurumburil Rusangu, rawiy kamu Rusangu riwitiyijinanya.
0 Kuvumbuk kwetu kwikal kand aom
12 Katat etu tukat kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb anch, Kristu wavumbuka mu rufu, wikal kand mwom. Ov, amwing a pakach penen akutwish nchik kulond anch: “Afu kakuvumbukap kwikal kand aom?”
13 Chawiy anch kwikil kuvumbuk kwa afu kwikal kand aom, komb Kristu niyend kavumbukap kwend kwikal kand mwom.
14 Anch Kristu kavumbukap kwikal kand mwom, komb etu tukat kurumburil kwetu mazu ma Nzamb chamwamu, niyen kand ukat kwitiyijan
15 Chom chikwau chijim, komb etu tukat kulond yom ya makasu mulong wa Nzamb, mulong etu twalejana uman wetu anch, Nzamb wamuvumbula Kristu mu rufu kwikal mwom. Pakwez anch chidi chakin anch afu kakuvumbukap kwikal kand aom, komb kamuvumbulap kwend Kristu kwikal kand mwom.
16 Mulong anch afu kavumbukinap kwikal kand aom, niyend Kristu kamuvumbulap kwikal kand mwom.
17 Chawiy anch Kristu kamuvumbulap kwikal kand mwom, komb ritiy renen ridi kwau chamwamu, niyen ushadikinany kwen ni katat mu yitil yen.
18 Chad kand in Kristu afila mu ritiy niyau ashadika kwau.
19 Anch tumuchingejin Kristu ching kusu mulong wa mwom winou, chifanyidin antu atwovil etu riy kupandakan antu awonsu.
20 Pakwez, chakin kamu, Kristu wavumbuka ku rufu wikal kand mwom, chinech chidi chijingidij cha kushilamu anch, in Kristu afila kal niyau akez kuvumbuk mu rufu kwikal kand aom.
21 Mudi murashika rufu mu mangand mulong wa muntu umwing, chawiy kand chimwing, kuvumbuk kwa afu kwikal kand aom kwashik kal mulong wa muntu umwing.
22 Mudi mukat kufau antu awonsu mulong adiokala kudi Adam, chawiy kand chimwing, in Kristu awonsu akez kuvumbuk kwikal kand aom mulong wa Kristu.
23 Pakwez muntu ni muntu ukez kuvumbuk pa chisu chend. Kristu ndiy wa kusambish, chad aend awonsu akez kuvumbuk kwikal kand aom pakwezay kand.
24 Chad kukez kushik disudiel dia mangand, Kristu ukez kushesh kuyikel kwa mitapu yawonsu, ni ulabu wa mitapu yawonsu, ni ukash wa mitapu yawonsu. Chawiy ukez kupan Want kudi Nzamb Tatuku.
25 Mulong chifanyidin Kristu kuyikel djat ni pakuyipandakenau akankuny awonsu kudi Nzamb ni kuyitek mwishin mwa yidjatil ya Kristu.
26 Mukankuny wa kwisudiel ukez kusheshay udi rufu.
27 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: "Nzamb wateka yom yawonsu mwishin mwa yidjatil ya Kristu." Pakwez yovaken nawamp anch, palondauanch: "Yom yawonsu" kamujimbwilap Nzamb amwinend, ndiy kamu ukata kutek yom yawonsu mwishin mwa Kristu.
28 Pakez kutekau yom yawonsu mwishin mwa kuyikel kwa Kristu, chawiy Mwan amwinend ukez kwitek mwishin mwa Nzamb, ndiy kamu wateka yom yawonsu mwishin mwa Kristu. Chad mwamu Nzamb ukez kutakel yawonsu.
29 Ov, tukulond nchik ya antu akat kubatishau mu dijin dia afu? Ov, achingejin kuman yom ik? Anch chidi chakin anch, kakuvumbukangap kwikal kand aom, ov, mulong wak antu inay akat kuyibatish mu dijin dia afu?
30 Ov, mulong wak etu tudia mu ubaj yisu yawonsu?
31 Anamakwam in Kristu, am nikat kurezik Ku ruru pichuku pichuku! Nikat kulond yom yiney mulong nibazidin mu en ni mu Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu.
32 Ov, nikez kupit chom ik anch narish nau annam ayidiany mu Lifes mwinomu mulong wa rusot ra wuntu? Anch afu kakuvumbukap kwikal kand aom, chad chifanyidin etu kusal mudi mulondilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Tudiany, tunany, mulong diamashik tukufany kwetu.”
33 Kangal akudimbany. “Arund ayimp akat kuyipish yaku yiwamp.”
34 Tenchikany yitongijok yen, kangal wasalany kand yitil. Chidi chom cha usany kudi en pakukulejany anch, kudi antu amwing pakach pen kamwijap kwau Nzamb.
0 Mijimbu yisu ya antu akuvumbuka
35 Muntu umwing ukez kwipul anch: “Ov, afu akuvumbuk nchik kwikal kand aom? Ov, mujimbu wa mutapu ik ukwikalau nich?”
36 Ey, chisup ey! Anch wakun rubut mu divu, kirukutwishap kuminy ching anch rafa bil.
37 Ukat kukun rubut rin ra tidiku ap rubut rukwau, pakwez kiukukunangap mutond win, bwat.
38 Nzamb ukat kupan mujimbu wa rubut mudi mukatilay, ukat kupan ku rubut ni rubut mujimbu wau mudi murudia.
39 Kwikil mbij jifanakena nich jikwau, kudi mutapu umwing wa mbij ja antu, kudi mutapu wa mbij ja annam, kudi mutapu ukwau wa mbij ja atujil, kudi kand ukwau wa mbij ja ansh.
40 Kudi mijimbu ya yitang ya mwiur ni mijimbu ya yitang ya pansh. Chawiy kudi uyaj wa mijimbu ya yitang ya mwiur, kudi kand uyaj ukwau wa mijimbu ya yitang ya pansh.
41 Muten ukwet uyaj wend, ni ngond niyend ukwet uyaj wend, atutumbu niyau akwet uyaj wau. Katumbu umwing ukwet uyaj waurikina ni uyaj wa katumbu mukwau.
42 Mwamu muchikeza kwikal pakuvumbukau afu kwikal kand aom. Mujimbu ujikinau pansh ukat kuvund mudi rubut rukunyinau mu divu, pakwez anch mujimbu wavumbuk kiukez kufap kand.
43 Aujika mujimbu nich kudiuril, chad wavumbuk nich uyaj. Aujika nich kuziy, chad wavumbuk nich usu nakash.
44 Aujika mujimbu wa mbij, chad wavumbuk mujimbu wa mwiku. Anch kudi mujimbu wa mbij kudi kand mujimbu wa mwiku.
45 Mulong afundil mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu wa kusambish, Adam, wading chitang chikweta mwom.” Pakwez Adam wa kwisudiel udi Mwiku, ndiy kamu Kristu ukata kupan mwom.
46 Kiudiap mwiku wasambela kwez, pakwez mujimbu wawiy wasambela kwez, chad mwiku weza kwinyim.
47 Adam wa kusambish amuumba nich’ rufunfut ra pansh. Adam wa kaad wadiokala mwiur.
48 Antu awonsu adiokala ku divu afanaken nend muntu waumbau nich rufunfut ra pansh. Antu awonsu adiokala mwiur afanaken nend muntu wadiokala mwiur.
49 Mudi mutufanakena nend muntu waumbau nich rufunfut ra pansh, mwamu kand mutukeza kufanakan nend muntu wadiokala mwiur.
50 Anamakwam in Kristu, chirumburikin anch, mbij nj kiyikutwishap kwandam mu Want wa Nzamb. Mulon entities ukata kuvund kiukutwishap kwikal mwiku wakad kuvundang.
