51 Teshany, nikujinguninany ujindj winou. Etu awonsu kitukez kufap, pakwez Nzamb ukez kutukarumun
52 mu kachisu kakemp mudi kufet kwa dis, pakez kubulau mpuny ya disudiel dia mangand. Pakubulau mpuny, afu akuvumbuk nich mijimbu yisu yakad kand kuvund, chad etu awonsu akez kutukarumun.
53 Mulong mujimbu ukata kuvund, ufanyidin kudjal mujimbu wakad kand kuvund. Mujimbu ukata kufa, ufanyidin kudjal mujimbu wakad kand kufa.
54 Anch mujimbu ukata kuvund wadjal mujimbu wakad kand kuvund, ni mujimbu ukata kufa wadjal mujimbu wakad kand kufa, chad yom yifundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb yikez kushik anch: “Kupandakan kwamekan, rufu arushesh kal shat!”
55 Afunda kand anch: “A! Rufu, ukash wey wa kupandakan nich udi kwisu? A! Rufu, rumuny rey ra kujipan nich ridi kwisu?”
56 Chitil chawiy chidia rumuny rikat kujipanay nich rufu. Chad ukash wa chitil udi ku Yijil ya Moses.
57 Pakwez chifanyidin kumujikitish Nzamb. Ndiy ukata kutwinkish etu ukash wa kupandakan rufu mulong wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu!
58 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, ikasikeshany, wimanany dang mu ritiy, salany nich mushiku midimu ya Nsalejetu Yesu. ljikany anch, midimu yiukat kusalanya ya Nsalejetu Yesu kiyidiap yamwamu, bwat.
0 Milambu ya kuyikwash in Kristu akwau
1 Katat nikwakul yipul yiwafundilanya mu mukand wen, mulong wa milambu ya kuyikwash in Kristu a mu Yerusalem. Ufanyidinany kusal mudi munayileja in Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya ku Galatia kusal.
2 Chifanyidin dichuku dia rubing ni rubing muntu ni muntu ateka chikunku cha nfalang kuns mudi mudia kuvul kwa yom yapitilay. Jilamany nfalang djat ni pinikwezila, chakwel kangal wiswilany kusang kand nfalang pinikweza am.
3 Pinikushika am kwinaku, nikupan mikand ya kuya nich kudi antu ukutondanya, chad nikuyitum ku Yerusalem kutwal milambu yen.
4 Anch chifanyidin am kuya, awiy akuya ni yamam pamwing.
0 Yitongijok ya Paul mulong wa weny
5 Pinikweza kwol kwen, nikusutil ku Masedon, mulong nisotil kusutil mwi ngand yiniya.
6 Nikushakam chisu chilemp kwol kwen, ap chirung cha mashik chawonsu chikez kwimpwil kwinaku. Chad en ukutwish kwinkwashany kuya mu weny wam kwawonsu kunikusota kuya.
7 Mulong kinisotilap kusut mau, nichingejin kushakam nen chisu chiwanyidina anch Nsalejetu wakat.
8 Pakwez nichingejin kushakam kunoku ku musumb wa Efes djat ni pa dichuku dia musambu wa Pentekot.
9 Mulong chisu chawanyin kal kudi am cha kusal mudimu ujim kunoku, ap anch kwikalap nchik akankuny avud.
10 Pakushikay Timote kwol kwen, mwakany nawamp, mulong ndiy udi mwin mudimu wa Nsalejetu mudi kand am.
11 Kangal muntu wamudiul, pakwez chifanyidin kumukwash chakwel adandamen mu weny wend nich chisambu, mwamu ukutwish kuchirik kudi am. Mulong am nimuchingejin ndiy kuchirik pamwing nau anamakwetu in Kristu.
12 Katat nisotil kwakul mulong wa mwanamakwetu Apolo. Nikat kumushindil yisu yawonsu chakwel eza kwinaku akutalanyaku en, pamwing ni anamakwetu in Kristu akwau. Pakwez ndiy kasotilap kwez katat. Pakumanay chisu chiwamp ukez kwez.
0 Mazu ma kwisudiel
13 Babalany, imanany dang mu ritiy, jijamanany, ikalany akash.
14 Yom yawonsu yiukusalanya, chifanyidin kuyisadil mu rukat.
15 En wijany nawamp rusangu ra Stefanas ni dijuku diend. Awiy adi in Kristu asambelaku kukarumuk a kwi ngand ya Akey. Awiy ipana ayinau ku mudimu wa kuyikwash antu a Nzamb. Nakwilembilany, amboku, anamakwam in Kristu,
16 londulany antu a mutapu winou ni antu akwau akata kusal mudimu nich usu mudi awiy.
17 Nikwet musangar mulong wa kushik kwa Stefanas, ni kwa Fortunatus, ni kwa Akayikus, awiy aswinkana kal pa ndond penen mulong wa kwinkwash.
18 Awiy ansangarishina am mudi mwakusangarishanyau en. Chifanyidin kuyilimish antu a mutapu winou.
19 In Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya mwi ngand ya Aziy akulangwishinany. Akila ni Prisil nau in Chikumbu cha Nzamb akata kukumangen kwol kwau akutuminany kand kulangwish kujim mwi Nsalejetu.
20 Anamakwetu in Kristu awonsu akutuminany kand kulangwish. Langwishijanany muntu ni mukwau nich kususujan kutumbila.
21 Yam Paul nafunda kal kulangwish kwinoku nich chikas cham amwinam.
22 Anch muntu kamukatilap Nsalejetu, chifanyidin ayindam. Marana tha! Charumburik anch, chifanyidin Nsalejetu eza!
23 Ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu rikala nen.
24 Rukat ram rikala ni yenen awonsu mu Kristu Yesu.
1 Mukand winou udiokil kudi am Paul ni kudi mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu, dijin diend Timote. Am Paul antazuka ku rusot ra Nzamb kwikal kambuy wa Kristu Yesu! Twapan kulangwish kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a mu musumb wa Korint ni kudi antu a Nzamb awonsu adia mwi ngand ya Akey.
2 Nilembidil anch Nzamb Tatukwetu ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu akwinkishany ranaken ni chisambu.
0 Paul ukat kumujikitish Nzamb
3 Tumushimanany Nzamb Tatukwend a Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ndiy kamu mwin riy, ndiy Nzamb ukata kupan kwongoj kwawonsu!
4 Ndiy ukata kutwongoj mu mar metu mawonsu chakwel niyetu tukutwish kuyongoj antu akwau mu mar mau. Tukuyongoj nich kwongoj kwatwongojau nich niyetu kudi Nzamb.
5 Tumen mar makash mudi mamanay Kristu, chawiy mwamu akez kutwongoj kand nend Kristu pamwing.
6 Anch etu twaman mar chidi mulong wa kukwongojany en ni kukupandishany. Anch Nzamb watwongoja etu chidi mulong wa kukwongojany niyen, chakwel anch wamanany mar mudi mitumena etu ukutwishany kudandamen ni kushimpish michim.
7 Chawiy tukat kudandamen kukuchingejany en. Mulong twij nawamp anch, mudi chiumenany mar mudi etu akez kukwongojany kand mudi etu.
8 Anamakwetu in Kristu, tusotil en wijikany mar mitwamana mwi ngand ya Aziy.Mar minima mading mapandaken, kitwamanap kand anch tukupand.
9 Twatonga anch, atufish kal nich kwa kutujip, pakwez yom yiney yashika chakwel kangal twichingej ayinetu, pakwez tumuchingej Nzamb ukata kuvumbul afu kwikal kand aom.
10 Ndiy watukamunina ku ubaj ukash wa rufu, chad ukez kutukamunin kand kakwau kurutu. Tumuchingejin ndiy anch, ukutukamunin kand.
11 Chifanyidin en kutukwash mu kulembil kwen. Chawiy Nzamb ukez kwakul kulembil kwa antu avud kutuyukish etu, mwamu antu avud akez kumujikitish mulong wetwetu.
0 Paul ukat kukarumun weny wend
12 Etu tukat kwibaz anch kom ketu kakat kulet uman anch, twashakama nich mwom uwamp wa zwang mu mangand minam, kupandakan twashakama nawamp kand pakach penen. Twading ni uyakin udiokila kudi Nzamb, kichadingap ku manangu ma wuntu, pakwez chading ku ranaken ra Nzamb
13 Mu mikand yitukufundidilanya tufundilamu yom yiukutwishanya kutang ni kwov nawamp. Nichingejin anch, ukez kwovany yom yiney yawonsu patok,
14 mudi muwovilany kal pakusambish chikunku. Mwamu pa Dichuku dikurumburishau antu kudi Nsalejetu Yesu en ukez kwibazany mulong wetwetu, mudi kand etu mutwibazina mulong wenen,
15 Nading nichingejin anch, en in Korint ukwovany yitongijok yam nawamp nakash, chad natenchika weny wam wa kusambish wa kwez kudi en chakwel ukuyukany tupamp twaad.
16 Mulong natongijoka kusutil kwol kwen pa kuya kwi ngand ya Masedon, chad pa kuchirik nikusutil kand kwol kwen, chakwel ing en wankwashangany ku weny wam wa kuya kwi ngand ya Yudeya.
17 Ov, pinatenchika yom yiney nading nidjidjekin? Pinatenchika maweny mam, ov, nasala mudi muntu wa mangand minam ukutwisha kapamp kamwing yom yaad anch: "Mwaningng," ap anch: "Bwat?"
18 Mudi mudiay Nzamb mwin yakin, dizu dietu kudi en kidiadingap anch: "Mwaning," ap anch: "Bwat," kapamp kamwing.
19 Silas, ni Timote, niyamam amwinam twarumburila dizu dia Nzamb kudi en mulong wa Yesu Kristu, Mwan a Nzamb. Ndiy kadiap anch: "Mwaning," ni "Bwat," kapamp kamwing, pakwez ndiy udi ching kusu: "Mwaning wa Nzamb."
20 Ndiy udi "Mwaning" ku kushilamu kwawonsu kwa Nzamb. Chawiy tukata kulondil anch: "Amen" mu dijin diend mulong wa kulet uyaj kudi Nzamb.
21 Nzamb ndiy amwinend ukata kutukasikesh etu ni yenen pamwing mu Yesu Kristu, ndiy kand watutonda.
22 Ndiy kand watuteka chijingidij chend cha kumekesh anch tudi aend. Watwinkisha kand Mwiku Utumbila mu michim yetu kwikal chizu cha yom yikwau yawonsu yikutwinkishay kurutu.
23 Nisotil Nzamb kwikal kaman wam anch, nidimbenap kwam. Nalika kwez kudi en mulong nakwovilanya riy, chamwamu ing nela kukuswejinany en in Korint.
24 Etu kitusotilap kukushinyinany en mulong wa ritiy ren, bwat. Etu tukat kusal mudimu pamwing ni yenen chakwel wovany musangar, mulong twij nawamp anch, en wiminyany dang mu ritiy ren.
1 Chawiy kinitongilap kwez kudi en kukunenganeshany kand kakwau.
2 Mulong anch nakunenganeshany en, ov, nany ukwinsangarisha? Ching kamu en inanenganesha.
3 Wawiy mulong unakufundilanya mukand winiwa. Kinasotap kwez kudi en mulong anch namanijan ni yenen nikwov ushon nakash kudi en ufanyidinanya ing udiany in kwinsangarish am. Nij nawamp, anch nasangar niyen ukusangarany kand.
4 Nakufundilanya mukand nich muchim wa ushon, ni runeng nakash, ni mansoj ku més, Kinafundap mulong wa kukunenganeshany, pakwez mulong wa kumekesh rukat rujim rinikukatilany nich en.
0 Paul ukat kumulikishin muntu wamusala nayimp
5 Anch muntu umwing wasal yom yakunenganeshan, kanenganeshinap am amwinam, bwat, pakwez wakunenganeshany kal en awonsu, ap wayinenganesh kal amwing a pakach pen. Kinisotilap kujimbish mulong ukwetay muntu mwinou,
6 mulong antu avud a pakach pen amulejin kal kadimu mudi muchifanyidina.
7 Pakwez katat chifanyidin en kumulikishin ni kumwongoj chakwel kangal wov ushon nakash ap wez washadish ruchingej.
8 Chawiy nakulembijekany, mekeshany rukat kudi ndiy.
9 Nakufundilany mukand winiwa, mrulong wa kukupakany nijika anch uziyidilany ku yom yawonsu. 
10 Anch en wamulikishinany muntu, niyam nikumulikishin kand. Mulong anch kudi chom chakin cha kumulikishin, pamulik, ishin kal mulong wenen. Kristu Ndiy kaman wam.
11 Nisadil mwamu chakwel Sakudimban kakutwishap kutupandakan, mulong twij kal nawamp yom yitenchikinay.
0 Paul wanenganana padingay ku musumb wa Trowas
12 Pinashika ku musumb wa Trowas mulong wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu, namana anch, Nsalejam wanginkisha chisu chiwamp cha kusal mudimu.
13 Pakwez nanenganana nakash mulong kinamutanap mwanamakwetu Titus. Chawiy nayishadishap in musumb wa Trowas, naya kwam kwi ngand ya Masedon.
0 Tukat kupandakan mulong wa Kristu
14 Pakwez tumushimanany Nzamb mulong Kristu wapandakana ukash wawonsu wa yitil mulong wa ukash wa Nzamb. Chawiy niyetu in kumulondul, tukat kupandakan mulong wendendiy, Nzamb ukat kutusadish etu mulong wa kupalangesh Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu ku jindond Pdnpsccls mudi mukat kupalangana madjimb ma malash mawamp.
15 Mulong etu tudi mudi madjimb ma malash mawamp malambulay Kristu kudi Nzamb. Madjimb minam makat kupalangan pakach pa antu adia mwi njil ya kupand ni kudi akwau adia mwi njil ya kujiy.
16 Kudi antu adia mwi njil ya kujiy, madjimb minam madi ma rufu makata kujipan. Pakwez kudi antu adia mwi njil ya kupand, madjimb minam mawiy makata kulet mwom. Ov, nany uwanyidina kusal mudimu winou?
17 Etu kitudiap mudi antu akwau avud akata kwisak nich dizu dia Nzamb, pakwez etu tukat kulondil mu Kristu tudi antu akin, tudi kand antu atuminay Nzamb kusal mudimu winou.
0 Atushalapol a manswik masu
1 Pitukata kulond mwamu, ov, etu tukat kwibaz? Kitukwetap kuswir kwa mikand ya kutwijikish nich mudi antu akwau. Kitukwetap kuswir kwa mikand yidiokila kudi antu akwau mulong wa kutwijikish nich kudi en, ap mikand yidiokila kudi en ya kutwijikish nich kudi antu akwau.
2 En ayinen udiany mikand yetu ya kutwijikish nich. Mukand winou aufundil mu michim yetu chakwel antu awonsu akutwish kuwijik ni kuutang.
3 En umekeshinany patok anch, udiany mukand wafunday Kristu, chad etu twaupan. Mukand winou kaufundap nich mem ma mukand, pakwez waufunda nich Mwiku wa Nzamb mwom. Mukand winou kaufundap pa mayal, pakwez wafunda mu michim ya antu,
4 Tulondil yom yiney mulong tumuchingejin Nzamb mudi mwatulejay Kristu.
5 Kitukutwishap kufa mu kan anch, tuwanyidin kusal mudimu winou ayinetu. Nzamb ndiy ukata kutwinkish ukash wa kusal mudimu winou.
6 Ndiy watwinkisha ukash wa kwikal atushalapol a manswik masu. Manswik minam kimadiap yijil yafundau, pakwez.madi ma Mwiku Utumbila. Yijil ya Moses yafundau yikat kulet rufu, pakwez Mwiku Utumbila ukat kupan mwom.
7 Yijil ya Moses ayifunda pa mayal, dizu ni dizu, chad uyaj wa Nzamb wamekana pa chisu chinicha. Ap anch milayilay yamekana ku chifu cha Moses yayap nchik ni kujimangan, antu katwishap kumutal Moses ku chifu mulong wa kulay. Anch Yijil ya Moses yaleta rufu pa chirung chau, yashika nich uyaj ujim mwamu,
8 chawiy chirung cha mudimu wa Mwiku Utumbila chikez kwikal nich uyaj ujim kupandakan!
9 Anch Yijil ya Moses yaleta kufa nich yading ni uyaj, chawiy mudimu wa Mwiku Utumbila uletiia dipandish ukwet uyaj ujim kupandakan!
10 Tukutwish kulond anch, uyaj wa pasak wikal kal mudi chom chamwamu, mulong uyaj upandakena kujimb washik kal katat.
11 Yijil ya Moses yashakama chirung chikemp yading yikwet uyaj, pakwez Mwiku Utumbila ushicha chikupu ukwet uyaj upandakena kujimb!
12 Mulong tukwet ruchingej riner, tukat kulond yom patok wakad wom.
13 Etu kitudiap mudi Moses wabwika mpal nich chitambal, chakwel in Isarel kangal amana anch, komb uyaj uyil ni kupwa.
14 Pakwez manangu mau mading machinchikin. Kushik ni ilel unou, anch atang manswik makur chitambal chinech chishich kwau. Chikutwish kudiokal ching kusu ku ukash wa Kristu.
15 Ap ilel kand, yisu yawonsu yikat kutangau Yijil ya Moses, chitambal chikat kubwik manangu mau.
16 Pakwez anch muntu wakarumuk wez kudi Nsalejetu Kristu, chitambal achidiosh kal.
17 Mulong Nsalejetu ndiy Mwiku Utumbila, chawiy kwawonsu kudiay Mwiku Utumbila wa Nsalejetu kwawiy kwinikwa kudia want ipau.
18 Etu awonsu akad chitambal pa mes, tukat kutal uyaj wa Nsalejetu. Akat kutukarumun chakwel tufanakan nend Nsalejetu. Twasambisha nich uyaj ukemp, chad tukat kuya kand ku uyaj ujim. Winou wawiy mudimu uwanyishinay Nsalejetu, ndiy kamu Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Yiyukish ya Nzamb yishich mu antu
1 Twatambula mudimu winou ku riy ra Nzamb, chawiy kitukuziyap mu michim yetu.
2 Etu twalikin kal yaku yijingamina, yikwatishena usany, twalikin kal kand yom ya kwidimwish ni ya kurumbangesh dizu dia Nzamb. Pakwez tukat kulejan uyakin patok, mwamu mukat kutuyingishau kurutu kwa Nzamb kudi kom ka antu awonsu.
3 Pakwez anch Rusangu Ruwamp ritulejena arubwikin nich chitambal, arubwikin ching kusu kudi antu adia mwi njil ya kujiy.
4 Antu inay kakat kwitiyijap mulong manangu mau amabwikin kal kudi Sakudimban, ndiy kamu mukish uyikedila mangand minam. Ndiy uyikangeshina kuman chimunyik cha Rusangu Ruwamp ra uyaj wa Kristu, ndiy kamu ufanakena nend Nzamb.
5 Mulong etu kitukat kurumburilap rusangu retu ayinetu, pakwez tukat kurumburil rusangu ra Yesu Kristu, ndiy kamu Nsalejetu. Etu tudi atushalapol enen mulong wa kumwambat Yesu.
6 Nzamb walonda anch: "Chifanyidin chimunyik chimekan mu mididim!" Ndiy kamu Nzamb waleta chimunyik chend mu michim yetu, mulong wa kutwinkish kutok kwa ronganyin ra uyaj wa Nzamb umekena ku chifu cha Kristu.
7 Etu tukweta yiyukish yiney tudi mudi mannung ma kam, mulong wa kwijikish anch ukash upandakena ukash wawonsu udi wa Nzamb, kiudiap wetwetu.
8 Tukat kuman mar ma mitapu yawonsu, pakwez mar minam kimatusheshinap. Tukat kunenganan, pakwez kitushadishinap ruchingej, bwat.
9 Akat kutuzengol, pakwez Nzamb katulikinap, akat kutwasol pansh, pakwez katusheshinap shutit.
10 Machuku mawonsu etu tudi mu ubaj wa rufu mudi mwafay Yesu. Chawiy etu tudi aom. Chom chinech chimekeshina anch, niyend Kristu udi kand mwom mu etu.
11 Tudi aom, pakwez yisu yawonsu tudi mu ubaj wa rufu mulong wa kumwambat Yesu, chakwel mwom wa Yesu ukutwish kumekan mu mijimbu yetu ya kufa.
12 Charumburik anch, rufu rikat kuturishikish etu chakwel en wikalany nich mwom.
13 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Nitiyija, chawiy chinalonda." Etu niyetu tukwet mwiku winiwa wa ritiy, twitiyijin, chawiy chitulondila.
14 Twij anch, Nzamb wamuvumbula Nsalejetu Yesu ku rufu kwikal kand mwom. Twij kand anch, ndiy ukez kutuvumbul niyetu kwikal kand aom, mudi mwamuvumbulay Yesu, chad ukez kututwal ni yenen pamwing kushakam nend.
15 Yom yiney yawonsu yashik kal mulong wa kukwambatany en, chakwel anch ranaken ra Nzamb rashik kudi antu akwau avud, awiy akez kupandakesh kujikitish mulong wa uyaj wa Nzamb.
0 Mwin Kristu ukat kupand mulong wa ritiy
16 Mulong wa chom chinech michim yetu kiyiziyinap. Ap anch mijimbu yetu yayap nchik ni kusheshik, michim yetu yikat kupizurok pichuku pichuku.
17 Mar makemp mitukata kuman chisu chikemp makat kuturijek etu mulong wa kutambul uyaj wa chikupu ujim upandakena, wakad kutwish kwilikan nich yom yikwau.
18 Mulong etu kitukat kutalap ku yom yimekena ku mes, pakwez kutal ku yom yakad kumekan ku mes. Yom yimekena ku mes yikat kupwa swa, pakwez yom yakad kumekan ku mes yishiching chikupu.
1 Mijimbu yetu mutushicha yifanaken mudi minkand, twij anch minkand yiney anch yafa Nzamb ukutwinkish ndond ya kushakam. Chikwikal chikumbu chakad kutung nich makas ma antu chishichinga chikupu mwiur.
2 Katat tukat kwinan nakash mulong tuswiridin kudjal mijimbu yetu ya mwiur,
3 chakwel pa kudjal mijimbu yetu yiney kakututanap kanzikis.
4 Pituchidia aom mu minkand ya panap pansh, tukat kwinan nakash. Kichidiap mudi tusotil kudjol mijimbu yitudia nich, pakwez tusotil kudjal mijimbu yetu ya mwiur, chakwel mijimbu yetu yikata kufa yikwandam mu mwom wa chikupu.
5 Nzamb ndiy waturijekina chakwel twikala nich mwom winou. Ndiy kand watwinkisha Mwiku Utumbila kwikal chizu cha yom yikwau yawonsu yikutwinkishay kurutu.
6 Chawiy machuku mawonsu etu tukat kujijaman kamu. Twij pitushicha mu mijimbu yetu yiney, tudi kulemp ni ndond yetu ya kushakam nend Nsalejetu Yesu.
7 Mu mwom wetu winou tukat kupand mulong tumwitiyijin ndiy wakad kumanijan nend ku mes.
8 Tujijamen nakash, chad tusotil kudiokal mu mujimbu winou mulong wa kuya kushakam pamwing nend Nsalejetu Yesu.
9 Pakwez chom chijim, tusotila kumusangarish ndiy anch tudi mu mijimbu yiney ap anch twadiokalamup nchik.
10 Mulong etu awonsu tukez kwiman kurutu kwa Kristu chakwel akuturumburish kudi ndiy. Chad muntu ni muntu ukez kutambul kuwap ap kuyip mudi mwadinga yisalijok yend padingay mu mujimbu wend wa pansh.
0 Aruu a chisambu nend Nzamb mu Kristu
11 Twij nawamp mutapu wa kumulimish Nsalejetu Yesu, Wawiy mulong tukata kuyipwitil antu akwau. Nzamb utwij mawamp, chad nichingejin kand anch niyen mu michim yen utwijany kand.
12 Etu kitwibazinap kurutu kwen, pakwez tusotil kukurumburilany chakwel en ukutwishany kwibaz mulong wetwetu. Chawiy mwamu ukutwishany kuyakul antu akata kwibaz mulong wa yom yimekena ku mes, wakad kuchingej yom yidia mu muchim.
13 Anch turumbangen yitongijok, chidi mulong wa kumwambat Nzamb. Pakwez chakin, anch tukwet yitongijok yiwamp, chidi mulong wa kukwambatany en.
14 Rukat ra Kristu rawiy rituyikedila, mulong twij nawamp anch, muntu umwing wayifila antu awonsu, chawiy antu awonsu afa kal.
15 Ndiy wayifila antu awonsu chakwel awiy adia aom kakwikalap kand aom mulong wa ayinau kusu, pakwez mom yau yikwikal yendendiy wayifila, chad wavumbuk wikal kand mwom mulong wa kuyambat awiy.
16 Chawiy kudiokal katat kitukumutongap muntu mu mutapu wa wuntu wend. Ap anch pakusambish twamutonga Kristu mu mutapu wa wuntu wend, pakwez katat kitukumutongap kand mu mutapu winiwa.
17 Anch muntu udi mu Kristu, ndiy wikal kal chitang chisu. Mwom wend wa pakur wasutil kal, chad mwom usu washik kal.
18 Chom chinech chidiokil kudi Nzamb, ndiy kamu watuchakwisha etu nend ndiy mu Kristu. Ndiy kand watwinkisha mudimu wa kuyichakwish antu akwau nend ndiy.
19 Mulong Nzamb wachakula nau antu awonsu a pa mangand mu Kristu wakad kuyichindil yitil yau. Chad watwinkisha etu mudimu wa kulejan rusangu ra kuchakwish.
20 Chawiy etu panap tudi antimesh a Kristu, Nzamb amwinend ukat kukutazukinany en mu etu. Chawiy tukulembijekinany en mu dijin dia Kristu chakwel witiyany kuchakul nend Nzamb.
21 Kristu kasalap chitil, pakwez Nzamb wamwikadisha mudi mwin chitil mulong wa kutwambat etu, chakwel mwi ndiy tukutwish kwikal antu atentamina a Nzamb. Mudimu wa kambuy wa Yesu
1 Mulong etu tukat kusal mudimu pamwing nend Nzamb, twakulembijekany chakwel kangal washadishany ranaken ta Nzamb chamwamu
2 Nzamb ulondil mu mukand wend anch: “Pa chisu chiwanyidina, natesha kulembil kwey, Pa dichuku dia dipandish diey, nakukwasha.” Katat, talany, chisu chawanyin kal ilel, diawiy dichuku dia dipandish!
3 Kitusotilap muntu kudiul mudimu wetu, chawiy kitusotilap kuyipwakesh antu akwau.
4 Pakwez mu yom yawonsu tukat kumekesh anch, tudi atushalapol a Nzamb, tukat kushimpish michim mu mar, mu yakamish, ni mu kuzengol.
5 Atubula, atutek mu rukan, atusarumwin kanvundangesh, atusadisha midimu ya usu, twakangany kulal ap kudia.
6 Kwishitul kwetu, ni ronganyin retu, ni kushimpish michim yetu, ni kudimuk kwetu, ni ku Mwiku Utumbila, ni rukat retu rakin tukat kumekesh anch, tudi atushalapol a Nzamb.
7 Mudi kand kurumburil kwetu kwa uyakin ni ku ukash watwinkishay Nzamb. Tukwet kutentam kwikal ut wetu wa kurish mutambu ni mutambu.
8 Akat kutulimish, akat kutukwatish kand usany. Akat kutulond nayimp, akat kutulond nawamp. Akat kutwel anch akamakasu, pakwez etu tukat kulond uyakin.
9 Akat kutuman mudi antu akad kwijikan, pakwez antu awonsu atwij, ap mudi antu afila, pakwez talany, tudi aom. Akat kutumesh mar, pakwez katujipinap.
10 Akat kutwovish ushon, pakwez etu tukwet musangar yisu yawonsu, tumeken mudi atuzwendj, pakwez etu tukwet yom yawonsu.
11 En in Korint, tukulejinany patok, ni michim yetu yanzurikina nakash kudi en.
12 Kiyetwap tukukasidinany en michim, pakwez yen utukasidinany etu michim.
13 Tukatany mudi mutukukatilanya en, nikulejinany en mudi anam, anzurilany kand michim yen.
0 Kangal wabombakanany nau antu akad ritiy
14 Kangal wabombakanany nau antu akad ritiy. Ov, uyakin ukutwish nchik kwovijan nich kuyip? Ap, ov, chimunyik chikubombakan nchik nich mididim?
15 Ov, Kristu ukwovijan nchik nend Sakudimban, ap ov, mwin ritiy ukufanakan nchik nend muntu wakad ritiy?
16 Qv, Chikumbu cha Nzamb chikwovijan nchik nau akish? Mulong etu tudi Chikumbu cha Nzamb mwom, mudi mwalonday Nzamb amwinend anch: “Am nikez kushakam nau ni kwend kand nau. Nikez kwikal Nzamb wau, niyau akez kwikal antwam.”
17 Nzamb walonda kand anch: “Chawiy diokalany, aurikany nau. Kangal wapukunany ku yom yijondila, chad am nikez kukwakany.
18 Am nikez kwikal tatukwen, niyen ukwikalany anam amakundj ni anam amband, mwamu mulondilay Nzamb Mwin Dikand.”
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, tukwetany kushilamu kwinoku kuvud kwa Nzamb, chawiy chifanyidin etu kwishitwish ku yom yawonsu yikata kuyipish mijimbu ni mipim yetu. Chad twikalany kamu antu atumbila akata kumulimish Nzamb.
0 Paul ukwet musangar
2 Itwanzurilany michim yen. Etu kitwamurumbukinap muntu, kitwamuyipishap muntu, ap kumudimb muntu.
3 Kinilondilap chom chinech mulong wa kukufishany nich, nakulejanya kal pakur anch, tukukatilany, tudiany mu umwing machuku mawonsu mu mwom winou ap mu rufu.
4 Nikuchingejinany en nakash, nibazin mulong wenen. Anch twamanap nchik mar, nikwet ruchingej ni musangar nakash.
5 Pitwashika mwi ngand ya Masedon, kitwamanap chisu cha kwiswedish. Twamana mar yisu yawonsu, kwading matend mutambu ni mutambu, twading twovil wom nakash.
6 Pakwez Nzamb ukata kuyongoj antu aziyila ku michim, watwongoja pashikay Titus.
7 Kichadiap kusu mulong wa kushik kwend, pakwez mulong wa kwongoj kuwamwongojanya niyend. Ndiy watuleja kuswir kwen kujim kwa kumanijan ni yamam, watuleja kand ya ushon wen ukwetanya mulong wamam, ni ya mushiku ukwetanya wa kwinlondil. Chawiy katat nikwet musangar ujim nakash.
8 Mulong ap anch mukand unakufundilanya wakwovishanya ushon, am kinovilap ushon mulong wa mukand winiwa. Nova ushon ching pinijika anch, mukand winiwa wakwovishanya ushon chisu chikemp.
9 Pakwez katat nikwet musangar. Kinikwetap musangar mulong nakwovishanya en ushon, bwat, pakwez mulong ushon wen wakukarumunanya en kudiokal ku yitil yen. Ushon wen wadiokala kudi Nzamb, chawiy etu kitwakusalanyap chom chiyimp.
10 Mulong ushon udiokila kudi Nzamb ukat kumukarumun muntu kudiokal ku yitil yend, chad ukat kumutwal kumushikij ku dipandish wakad kwov kand runeng mulong wa kukarumuk kwend. Pakwez ushon udiokila ku wuntu wetu ukat kulet rufu.
11 Talany ushon udiokila kudi Nzamb wakuletilanya kal mushiku wa kushinshik yom, wakuletilanya rusot ra kwiyingish ayinen! Ushon wakuletilanya ujim, wakubabeshanya kand, wakuletilanya impu ya kwiman. Chad kwinyim wakuletilanya mushiku wa kuyilej antu ayimp kadimu! Mu yom yiney yawonsu en uyingilany kwen ku mulong winou.
12 Chawiy ap anch nakufundilanyap nchik mukand winiwa, kinafundap mulong wa muntu wasala nayimp. Pakwez naufunda mulong wa kukwijikishany en patok anch, Nzamb wij nawamp anch en utukatilany nakash.
13 Chawiy yom yiney yatwongoja. Twasangar mulong wa kwongoj kwetu, pakwez twasangar nakash kupandakan mulong Titus wading ukwet musangar nakash mulong wa mutapu wamwon gojanya!
14 Namuleja Titus anch, nibaza mulong wenen, chawiy en kiwankwatishanyap usany. Pakwez mudi mutwakulejanganya uyakin machuku mawonsu, chawiy kwibaz kwetu kudi Titus mulong wenen kwamekan kal anch, kwadi kwakin.
15 Rukat rend kudi en riyil ni kujimb pakatay kuvurik kuziyil kwenen awonsu, ni mutapu wamwakinany nich wom ni kuzalizal.
16 Nikwet musangar mulong nikuchingejinany en mu yom yawonsu.
0 Milambu yipanyinau kudi in Kristu
1 Anamakwetu in Kristu, tusotil kukwijikishany chom chasadilay Nzamb ku ranaken rend mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya mwi ngand ya Masedon.
2 Ap anch nayipakap nchik in Kristu, musangar wau wapandakana kujimb. Ap anch adingap nchik atuzwendj nakash, ikala in kupan chipandakena.
3 Am nidi kaman wau. Awiy apana mudi mudia usu wau, chad awejaku kand kupan ku rusot rau ayinau.
4 Atulembijeka chakwel apana yom ay kuyikwash antu a Nzamb adia mwi ngand ya Yudeya.
5 Yom yasalau yapandakana mutapu utwatonga! Chom cha kusambish, ipana ayinau kudi Nsalejetu Yesu, chad kwinyim mu rusot ra Nzamb ipana kand kudi etu.
6 Chawiy twamubachika Titus, mulong ndiy wading wasambisha kal kusal, chakwel ndiy adandamen ni kupwish mudimu winou wa rukat.
7 En udiany ampich mu yom yawonsu, mu ritiy ni mu kurumburil kwa dizu dia Nzamb, ni mu ronganyin, ni ku mushiku, ni mu rukat ren kudi etu. Chawiy chifanyidin en kupandakan mu kupan ku mudimu winou wa rukat.
8 Kinikutekidilanyap chijil, pakwez nikat kukulejany mushiku wa antu akwau wa kupan, mulong wa kukupakany anch rukat ren ridi ra kashinsh.
9 Mulong en wijany nawamp ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. Ap anch ndiy wadingap nchik mpich, wikala kazwendj mulong wa kukwambatany en chakwel ku uzwendj wend akupitishany en.
10 Chawiy nakuyulany kal ku mudimu winou anch: Pwishany katat yom yiwasambishanya kal muvu wasutila ou, En wadingany antu a kusambish kukat mudimu winou ni kuusal.
11 Pwishany mudimu winou nich mushiku wasambishanya nich, Upwishany nich yom yiukwetanya katat.
12 Anch wapanany nich muchim uwamp, Nzamb ukez kwitiy milambu yen mudi mudia yom yiukwetany wakad kuchind yom yiwakadiany nich.
13 Am kinilondilap anch, chifanyidin en kuman mar mulong wa kuyikwash antu akwau, bwat. Chifanyidin kupan mu chilik chimwing.
14 Pa chisu chinech en ukwetanya yom yivud yikwashany akweta yom yikemp, chakwel dichuku dikwau niyau anch apit yom yivud, akez kukukwashany en anch wikalany nich yom yikemp. Chifanyidin kupan mu chilik chimwing.
15 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu mwawonsu wakungula yom yivud kakwetap yom yipandakena kuvul, chad muntu mwawonsu wakungula yom yikemp kaburenap chom.”
0 Titus ni antu adingay nau
16 Twamujikitish Nzamb wamwinkisha Titus muchim wa mushiku mulong wa kukukwashany, mudi kand mwatwinkishay etu!
17 Titus witiya kumutum, pakwez mulong wa mushiku wend wa kukukwashany, ndiy ukwez kudi en mudi musotilay amwinend.
18 Twamutum kal mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu mukwau pamwing nend ndiy. Muntu mwinou wijiken kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb yawonsu mulong wa mutapu uwamp wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp.
19 Chikwau kand, muntu mwinou amutonda kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb, mulong wa kutambitamb pamwing ni yetwetu kwawonsu kutwaya ni kuwanyish kutwal mulambu winou. Twasala mudimu winou mulong wa kulet uyaj kudi Nsalejetu Yesu, ni mulong wa kumekesh rusot retu ra kuyikwash antu akwau.
20 Tukat kwiyep chakwel kangal atufisha nich mulong wa mutapu tulamina mulambu winou ujim.
21 Mulong tusotil kusal yom yitentamina ku mes ma Nsalejetu Yesu ni ku mes ma antu kand.
22 Chawiy tumutumin kand mwanamakwetu mukwau mwin Kristu wezil pamwing nau awiy. Twamupakil kal tupamp tuvud, chad twaman anch, yisu yawonsu ukwet mushiku wa kukwash. Ndiy ukuchingejinany en nakash, chad katat ukwet mushiku nakash kupandakan wa kukwash.
23 Titus udi mukwetu ukat kusal mudimu pamwing ni yamam mulong wa kukukwashany. Chad anamakwetu in Kristu akwau ezilay nau adi antu atuminau kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb mulong wa kulet uyaj kudi Kristu.
24 Mekeshany rukat ren kudi antu inay chakwel in Yikumbu ya Nzamb awonsu akwijik rukat riner, ni kwijik kand anch, komb kwibaz kwetu mulong wenen kudi kwakin.
0 Mulambu wa kuyikwash in Kristu akwau
1 Kinimenap anch chifanyidin nikufundilany mukand wa kurumburil mulambu utuminau kudi antu a Nzamb adia mwi ngand ya Yudeya.
2 Nij nawamp rusot ren ruwamp ra kukwash, chawiy nibazina kand mulong wenen kudi in ngand ya Masedon, nayilejin anch: “Anamakwetu in Kristu a kwi ngand ya Akey akatil kukwash, kusambish muvu wadiap ou.” Mushiku wenen wayikwashil antu avud a pakach pau kWIRW nich mushiku.
3 Katat nakutuminany kal anamakwetu in Kristu inay, chakwel kwibaz kwetu mulong wenen kangal kwikal chom chamwamu. Awiy ezil chakwel en ukutwishany kwirijek mudi munayileja in Masedon mulong wa yom yen ya milambu,
4 Chamwamu anch nez pamwing nau in Masedon, chad twakutanany en kand kal wirijekany, tukez kwov usany nakash pamwing ni yenen, mulong wa ruchingej retu rujim kudi en!
5 Chawiy nimen chidi chiwamp kuyitakejaku anamakwetu inay in Kristu kwez kudi en, chakwel urijekany nau mulambu mudi muwashilanyamu. Mwamu yom yawonsu akuyirijek pinakad kal am kushik, chakwel ukumekeshany anch, upanyinany nich’ muchim wakad kukubachikany nich usu.
6 Ijikany anch mwin kukun pakemp ukez kwangul kand pakemp, pakwez mwin kukun yivud ukez kwangul kand yivud.
7 Chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu kupan mudi mutongilay amwinend wakad kupan nich ushon ap kupan kwa kumubachik nich usu. Mulong Nzamb ukatil muntu ukata kupan nich musangar.
8 Nzamb ukwet ukash wa kukwinkishany yiyukish ya mitapu yawonsu yivud, chakwel ukwikalany nich yom yivud ya mitapu yawonsu yiwamp.
9 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu muwamp ukat kupan yom yivud kudi atuzwendj. Kudimuk kwend kukat kudandamen chikupu.”
10 Nzamb ukata kupan jimbut kudi in kudim, ukat kuyinkish kand yakudia. Ndiy ukukwinkishany kand en jimbut jawonsu jiukwetany nich kuswir. Ukez kujiminyish ni kuvudish nakash yakwangul yen mulong wa kupan kwen kwa kuyikwash antu akwau.
11 Ndiy ukukwikadishany ampich awanyidina, chakwel yisu yawons1 ukutwishany kupan yom yivud kudi antu akwau. Chad antu avud akez kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wa yom yiupanyinany yitukuyitwadila.
12 Ku mudimu winou ukat kusalanya, ukat kupanany yom yiswiridinau antu a Nzamb, Chawiy mudimu winou ukat kuvudish antu in kumujikitish Nzamb.
13 Mudimu winou ukat kumekesh mutapu udianya, chad antu avud akez kupan uyaj kudi Nzamb mulong wa mutapu uziyidilanya mu ritiy ren ku Rusangu ra Kristu, Akez kupan kand uyaj kudi Nzamb mulong en ukat kupanany yom kudi awiy ni kudi antu akwau awonsu.
14 Chawiy ku rukat rujim awiy akez kukulembidilany mulong wa ranaken rujim rakwinkishanyay Nzamb.
15 Chifanyidin etu kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wa kupan kwend kuwamp kwakad kutwish kurumburil kudi muntu.
0 Paul ukat kwilondilap mulong wa mudimu wend
1 Yam amwinam Paul, nikulembijekinany mudi mukat kulondau anch, am nitudishin anch nidi nj yenen piswimp, pakwez anch nidi Kulemp ni yenen_nidi muntu usWejina. Nakwilembilany nich kudimuk ni kuwap kwa Kristu,
2 pinikweza kudi en kangal wansarumunan y chakwel nikuswejinany. Mulong nij nawamp anch nikez kuyiswejin antu akata kulond anch, yaku yetu yikat kudiokal kwau ku rusot ra wuntu.
3 Chakin kamu, tudi antu, pakwez kitukat kurishap njit nich yom ya wuntu, bwat.
4 Mat metu ma njit kimadiap ma wuntu, pakwez madi mat ma ukash wa Nzamb makutwisha kushesh mapat makash. Etu tukat kushesh malejan ma makasu.
5 Tukat kushesh kand yom yikat kutekau in kwibaz mulong wa kukangesh antu kumwijik Nzamb. Tukat kukwat yitongijok yawonsu, kuyitek pamwing mudi mu winkwal chakwel yimuziyil Kristu.
6 Anch en wamekeshany anch uziyidilany kudi Nzamb ku yom yawonsu, chad etu tuwanyidin kwez kuyilej antu awonsu kadimu akata kusal yom wakad kuziyil.
7 En ukat kumanany yom yimekena ku mes. Anch muntu uchingejin anch udi mwin Kristu, chifanyidin ndiy kwijik anch, mudi mudiay ndiy mwin Kristu niyetu tudi kand in Kristu.
8 Kinikwetap usany ap anch napandakeshap nchik kwibaz pakemp mulong wa ulabu watwinkishay Nsalejetu Yesu. Ndiy watwinkisha ulabu winou mulong wa kukukasikeshany nich en, kiudiap mulong wa kukusheshany nich.
9 Kinisotilap en utongany anch, nikat kukwovishany wom nich mikand yam, bwat.
10 Antu amwing akat kulond anch: “Mikand ya Paul yidi yikash ya kuswej, pakwez anch udiany nend muntu mwin piswimp, ndiy uziyil, ukat kulondol mazu mamwamu!”
11 Chifanyidin muntu ukata kulond mwamu Wik anch, kwikil kwaurik ku yom yitukata kufund mu mukand pitudia kulemp ni yenen ni yom yitukata kusal pitudia Pamwing ni yenen.
12 Chakin, etu kitukutwishap kwiyilikesh ap kwifanikesh nau antu akata kwijimbish ayinau nakash. Ayisup inay akata kutenchik yilik ya mwom ayinau, chad akat kwilikijan nich.
13 Pakwez etu tukutwishap kupandakesh kwibaz kwetu. Nzamb ndiy wakatula mimbu ya midimu yetu, chawiy midimu yitwasala pakach penen yading mu mimbu yetu.
14 Chawiy kitwasutap mimbu yetu pitweza kudi en. Etu twasambelaku kudi en nich Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu.
15 Kitukat kumatikap mimbu yatekay Nzamb, ap kwibaz mulong wa midimu yasalau antu akwau ushad ukwau wa mimbu yetu. Pakwez tuchingejin anch, ritiy renen rikat kuya ni kujimb, chad etu tukez kusal mudimu upandakena kujimb pakach pen. Yisu yawonsu tulamin mimbu yatekay Nzamb.
16 Chad tukutwish kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ku mangand makwau madia kusut kwol Kwen, wakad etu kwibaz mulong wa midimu yasalau antu akwau mu jindond jikwau.
17 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Muntu mwawonsu usotila kwibaz, chifanyidin ibazina mu yom yawonsu yasalay Nsalejetu.”
18 Nzamb kakat kumwitiyap muntu kwibaz amwinend, pakwez ukat kumwitiy ching muntu ukwelay ndiy anch, usadil nawamp.
0 Paul nau atwimbuy a makasu
1 Akwetu, anch nidiap nchik chisup, ngitiyanyaku chisu chikemp! Chakin, ngitiyanyaku.
2 Am nikwovidilany en mukau, udi mukau udiokila kudi Nzamb. En udiany mudi mband ngachik wakad kal kumwijik ikundj. Ndiy kamu nashilamu kumwatish kudi ikundj umwing, ndiy Kristu.
3 Pakwez novil wom anch, ap manangu men akez kumayipish chakwel wez ulikany mushiku uwanyidina wa kwipan kudi Kristu, mudi mwamudimbau Eve nich kudimwok kuyimp kwa nnak.
4 Mulong en ukat kumwitiyany muntu mwawonsu ukata kwez kudi en kukulejany Yesu windj, wakad kwikal Yesu twakulejanya etu. Ukat kwitiyany kand mwiku ni rusangu rindj, yakad kwikal Mwiku Utumbila ni Rusangu Ruwamp twakulejanya!
5 Am kinitongilap anch nidi muntu mukemp kupandakan atwimbuy en utongilany anch, adi ajim kupandakan!
6 Chakin, nidi muntu wakad kwijik kulond nawamp pakach pa antu, pakwez kinidiap muntu wakad manangu. Twakwijikishanya chom chinech patok mu yisu yawonsu ni mu yom yawonsu.
7 Nakurumburilany Rusangu Ruwamp radiokila kudi Nzamb wakad en kwinfutany. Nishikumwisha amwinam chakwel en wikalany antu ajim. Pinasala mwamu, kinasalap chitil, bwat.
8 Pinadinga am ni kusal mudimu pakach pen, anfutanga kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb. Nading mudi kuyiy awiy mulong wa kukukwashany nich en.
9 Pinadinga ni yenen kinakwitanyap yom yinading nikwet nich kuswir, mulong yom yawonsu yinading niswiridina anamakwetu in Kristu adiokala mwi ngand ya Masedon, awiy ankwasha. Mwamu munalika kukutwikany chisend pakur ni kurutu, kinikez kukutwikanyap chisend, bwat.
10 Mudi mudia uyakin wa Kristu udia mu muchim wam, nashilamu anch, kwikil muntu ap umwing wa mwi ngand ya Akey ukeza kwinkangesh kwibaz kwinoku.
11 Ov, mulong wak unilondidila mwamu? Ov, mulong kinikukatilanyap? Nzamb wij anch, nikukatilany!
12 Nikudandamen kusal mudi munisadila katat, mulong wa kukangesh kwibaz kwa antu utongilany en anch, adi atwimbuy akin a Yesu. Awiy akat kufa mu kan anch, akat kusal mudimu mudi mutusadila etu.
13 Antu inay adi atwimbuy a makasu, akat kusal midimu ya makasu, chad akat kuyidimb antu anch: “Tudi atwimbuy a Kristu.”
14 Chom chinech kKichidiap chom cha kukashimuk, bwat. Mulong Sakudimban niyend ukutwish kwikarumun kumekan mudi muruu wa mwiur uletila chimunyik!
15 Chawiy kichidiap chom cha kushimwok anch atushalapol end akat kwikarumun kumekan mudi atushalapol a kutentam kwa Nzamb. Awiy akez kujiy mulong wa yisalijok yau yiyimp.
0 Paul ukat kuman mar mulong wa ukambuy
16 Nachirikinap kal kand, kangal muntu watong anch, am nidi chisup. Pakwez anch watongany anch am nidi chisup, ngitiyany kwam mwamu chakwel nibazaku pakemp.
17 Chakin, yom yinilondila ya kwibaz, nilondil mudi chisup.
18 Pakwez mulong antu avud akat kwibaz mulong wa rusot ra wuntu, niyam nisotil kusal kand mwamu.
19 En ayinen udiany in manangu nakash, chad ukat kwitiyany nich musangar yom yikat kulondau ayisup!
20 En ukat kunenetany akuzengolany lel mudi aswik, akwisakinany lel pa mitu, akudimbany lel ni kukupipejany, akat kukubulany mu matam.
21 Novil usany wa kulond anch, etu kitwadingap tujijamen, chawiy kitwasalap yom yiney! Pakwez anch muntu wibaz mulong wa chom, niyam nikwibaz kand mwamu. Nilondil mudi chisup.
22 Anch awliy adi in Hebereu, niyam nidi mwin Hebereu. Anch awiy adi in Isarel, niyam nidi mwin Isarel. Anch awiy adi a a majuku ma Aburaham, niyam kand nidi wa a majuku ma Aburaham.
23 Anch awiy adi atushalapol a Kristu, niyam nidi kashalapol muwamp wa Kristu kupandakanamu awiy. Am nilondil mudi muyej a rangul, pakwez chakin, am nasala midimu yivud kuyipandakanamu awiy. Nading mu rukan tupamp tuvud, ambula nfimbu tupamp tuvud, nading piswimp ni kukatuk mupim tupamp tuvud. Mu yom yiney yawonsu niyipandakenamu awiy.
24 Amakurump a in Yuda ambula nfimbu makum masatu ni chidivu tupamp tutan.
25 Amakurump a in Rom ambulanga nich misel tupamp tusatu, angasa mayal kapamp kamwing. Najiya nich waat wa mu karung tupamp tusatu, chad kapamp kamwing najingila mu mem dichuku diakabuj muten ni uchuku.
26 Mu maweny mam mavud nading mu ubaj mulong wa mawit, ni mulong wa ampongarik, ni mulong wa anama.kwam in Yuda, ni mulong wa antu a michid yikwau. Nading mu ubaj mu misumb, ni mu jimpay, ni mu karung. Nading kand mu ubaj mulong wa anamakwetu in Kristu a makasu.
27 Nasala midimu ya usu nakash, yisu yivud nakanganya kulal tul, nafa chipuku ni impu ya mem. Nakanganya tupamp tuvud kuman yakudia, ap ndond ya kulal, ap yidjal yiwanyidina.
28 Chad pa yom yiney yawonsu nading ni kunenganan nakash mulong wa Yikumbu ya Nzamb yawonsu.
29 Anch muntu umwing waziy, niyam nikat kuziy kand, anch muntu umwing wawa mu yitil, am nikat kunenganan nakash.
30 Anch nisotil kwibaz, nikwibaz kusu mulong wa yom yimekeshina kuziy kwam.
31 Nzamb, Tatukwend wa Nsalejetu Yesu, ndiy kamu ufanyidinau kushiman chikupu, ndiy wija anch kinidimbenap,
32 Pinadinga mu musumb wa Damas, nyikel watekay Mwant Aretas wateka atulam ku yis ya musumb mulong wa kwinkwat.
33 Pakwez antu akwau anteka mu musans, ansutishin mu dipan dia mpwembu ya musumb, chad anshirishin pansh, wawly mutapu unamukwasanika nyikel.
0 Yishimushimu ni yom yamujinguninau Paul kudi Yesu
1 Chifanyidin am kudandamen kwibaz, ap anch kichinkwashilap nchik chom. Pakwez katat nisotil kulond mulong wa yishimushimu ni yom yanjinguninau kudi Nsalejam Yesu.
2 Am nimwij mwin Kristu umwing ikundj kwasut kal katat mivu dikum ni yinying, amutwala mu diur dia chisatu. Kinijap anch amutwaia nich mujimbu ap anch amutwala mu chishimushimu, Nzamb amwinend ndiy wija.
3 Nij nawamp anch, ikundj winiwa amutwala djat ni mwiur mushichay Nzamb. Kinijap anch amutwala nich mujimbu ap anch amutwala mu chishimushimu, Nzamb amwinend ndiy wija.
4 Kwinikwa muntu mwinou watesha yom yakadiay muntu kutwish kulond ap kuyirumburil.
5 Chawiy am nikez kwibaz mulong wa muntu mwinou. Pakwez kinikez kwibazap mulong wamam amwinam, ching kusu mulong wa yom yimekeshina kuziy kwam.
6 Anch nisotil kwibaz, kinisupilap mulong nilondil uyakin. Pakwez nalik kwibaz mulong kinisotilap antu antongil am anch, nidi muntu mujim kusutaku yisalijok yam yikat kumanau ni mazu mam makat kuteshau.
7 Pakwez kwashika chom kudi am chankangesha kwibaz nakash, mulong wa kuvul kwa yom yanjinguninay Nsalejam. Chom chinech chading musong usansena mudi rubwambu ripampinau mu mujimbu wam. Musong winou wikala mudi muruu wa Sakudimban mulong wa kwinkangesh am kwibaz nakash.
8 Namulembila Nsalejetu Yesu tupamp tusatu anch: “Chiwamp kwindiosh musong winou.”
9 Nsalejam wangakula anch: “Ranaken ram ruwanyidin ku kuswir kwey kwawonsu, mulong ukash wam ujimbil nakash anch ey uziyil.” Chawiy am, Paul, nikwet musangar wa kwibaz mulong wa kuziy kwam chakwel ukash wa Kristu ukutwish kwinchidij.
10 Am nikwet musangar mulong wa kuziy kwam, nikat kusangar pakat kwindiulau, ni pinimena mar, ni pakat kwinzengolau, ni pakatau kwingakamish mulong wa kumwambat Kristu. Mulong anch niziyil, chad nikwet ukash wa Kristu.
0 Paul ukat kwiyakamish amwinend mulong wa in Korint
11 Am nikat kulond mudi chisup, pakwez yen wambachikanya kusal mwamu. Chifanyidin en winlimishany am, mulong anch nidiap nchik muntu wamwamu, antu utongilanya en anch adi atwimbuy ajim, kansutilamup am, bwat.
12 Yilay, ni yom yikwamushena, ni midimu ya usu ayisala pakach pen nich kushimpish kwa muchim, yom yiney yimekeshin patok anch, am nidi kamu kambuy wakin wa Kristu.
13 Ov, yom ik yinapana ku Yikumbu ya Nzamb yikwau yinalika am kukwinkishany en? Ching chom chimwing kusu, kinakutwikanyap en chisend cha kwinfut. Chawiy nlikishinany mulong wa kasolikany kinak.
14 Katat nirijekin mulong wa kwez kudi en kapamp ka chisatu, kinisotilap kukutwikany chisend, bwat. Am nikukatilany en, kinisotilap yom yen. Kichifanyidinap an kukimb yom ya kuyilam nich anvajau, pakwez chifanyidin anvaj kukimb yom ya kuyilam nich anau.
15 Am nikwet musangar wa kupan yom yawonsu yinikweta, ni kwipan kand am amwinam, mulong wa kukupandishany en. Ov, anch am nakukatany en nakash mwamu, komb en ukwinkatany kwen pakemp?
16 Etu awonsu twijany nawamp anch, kinakutwikanyap chisend mulong wamam, bwat. Ap muntu mukwau ukulond anch: “Paul udimwokin nayimp, watudimba kal nich makasu.”
17 Oy, nakudimbanya nchik? Ov, natanyinamu chom kudi en ku makas ma antu inatuma kudi en?
18 Am namwilembila Titus kwez kudi en, chad namutuma mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu umwing kwez nend. Ov, ukutwishany kulond anch: “Titus watanamu chom kudi etu?” Titus niyamam tukwet muchim umwing, ni yisalijok yimwing, ni yaku ya mutapu umwing.
19 Ap en ukat kutongany kudiokal pakur anch, etu tukat kusot kwiyingish ayinetu kurutu kwen, Kimwawiyap, bwat! Tukat kulond kurutu kwa Nzamb mudi mukatilay Kristu, Anamakwetu akarukat, yom yawonsu yitukata kusal, tukat kusal mulong wa kukukasikeshany en mu ritiy.
20 Am novil wom pinikweza kudi en ap nakutanany mutapu unakad kukat, ap en ukwimanany am mutapu wakadiany kukat. Novil wom ap nez natan matend, ni mukau, ni ujim, ni kwitong ayinen, ni masaal, ni mboj, ni kwibaz, ni kanvundangesh.
21 Novil wom pinikweza kapamp kakwau ap Nzamb wam ukez kwinkwatish usany mulong wenen. Nikez kudil mansoj mulong wa antu avud asala kal yitil, chad alik kwau kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau ya kwimik dis ni ya usund.
0 Malejan ma Paul ma kwisudiel kudi in Korint
1 Nirijekin kwez kudi en kapamp ka chisatu. Vurikany anch, mulong wawonsu afanyidin kuukatul nich uman Wa antu aad ap asatu.
2 Nayibabeshin antu asala yitil pakur ni antu akwau awonsu. Nayileja kal pineza weny wam wa kaad kudi en, pakwez katat nilondil kapamp kakwau anch: "Anch nez kand kapamp kakwau kudi en kinikumwovilap muntu riy, bwat."
3 En ukimbilany kushinshik anch Kristu ukat kulondil mu am. Ndiy kaziyilap pakatay kusal pakach pen, pakwez ukat kumekesh ukash wend pakach pen.
4 Chakin kamu, amupampa ku mutond uchikakena mulong wa kuziy, pakwez udi kand mwom ku ukash wa Nzamb. Etu tuziyil mwi ndiy, pakwez anch twez kutenchik milong ni yenen tukez kupand nend ndiy ku ukash wa Nzamb.
5 Ipakany ayinen, irumburishany ayinen, utalany anch ukwetany ritiy. Ov, kiwijanyap anch, Yesu Kristu udi mu en? Pakwez kakwikalap mu en anch wipakany wakad kuman ritiy!
6 Nichingejin anch wijany nawamp anch, niyetu twipakin ayinetu, chad twijik anch tukwet ritiy.
7 Tukat kumulembil Nzamb chakwel en kangal wasalany kuyip. Kichidiap mulong wa kumekesh anch etu twasadil kal nawamp, pakwez chidi mulong en usalany yom yitentamina, ap anch tumekenap nchik anch kitwasalap nawamp.
8 Mulong etu kitukutwishap kusal chom mulong wa kupompat uyakin wa Nzamb, pakwez tukat kusal mulong wa kulimish uyakin wend.
9 Etu tukwet musangar anch etu tuziyil, chad en udiany akash. Tukat kulembil anch en ukez kuwanyishany ritiy ren.
10 Nifundil mukand winou pinidia kulemp ni yenen, chakwel anch nez kudi en kinikwikalap nich kuswir kwa kukuswejinany nich ulabu wanginkishay Nsalejetu Yesu. Wawiy ulabu wanginkishay mulong wa kukukasikeshany nich en, kiudiap mulong wa kukusheshany nich.
11 Katat, anamakwam in Kristu, ushalanganyap! Tenchikany yaku yen, londulany chiyul cham, ovijanany muntu ni mukwau, shakamany mu chisambu. Chad Nzamb wa rukat ukata kupan chisambu chend ukwikal ni yenen.
12 Langwishijanany muntu ni mukwau nich kususujan kutumbila. Antu a Nzamb awonsu akulangwishany.
13 Ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ni rukat ra Nzamb, ni kubombakan kwa Mwiku Utumbila yishakam ni yenen awonsu.
1 Yam Paul, kambuy wa Yesu, nifundila mukand winou. Kantazukap kudi antu ap kichadingap ku usu wa muntu, pakwez kwading kutazuk kwa Yesu Kristu ni kwa Nzamb Tatuku, ndiy kamu wamuvumbula Yesu kwikal kand mwom.
2 Anamakwetu in Kristu adia kunoku twibombil pamwing ni yamam, mulong wa kukulangwishany en in Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya mwi ngand ya Galatia.
3 Nikat kumulembil Nzamb Tatukwetu ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu chakwel akwinkishany ranaken ni chisambu.
4 Kristu wipana amwinend mulong wa kutupandish ku yitil yetu, ni kutukamunin ku chirung chinech chiyimp. Ndiy wasala mwamu mulong wa kuziyil ku rusot ra Nzamb.
5 Chifanyidin tumushiman Nzamb chikupu mivu ni minang! Amen.
0 Rusangu Ruwamp ridi kusu ching rumwing
6 Nakushimwokany, mulong en wamwombany kal Nzamb nyim swa, ndiy wakutazukany ku ranaken ra Kristu. En ukat kwitiyany rusangu rukwau.
7 Chakin, kwikil rusangu ruwamp rukwau, pakwez nilondil mwamu mulong kudi antu amwing akat kukurumbangeshany. Akat kupakish kukarumun Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu.
8 Pakwez anch kudi muntu mukwau, ap etu, ap muruu wa mwiur wakurumburilany rusangu ruwamp raurikina ni Rusangu Ruwamp ritwakulejanya etu, chifanyidin ayindam.
9 Twakulejanya kapamp ka kusambish, katat twakulejany kal kand kapamp kakwau anch: "Anch muntu mukwau wakurumburilany rusangu ruwamp raurikina ni Rusangu Ruwamp ritwakulejanya etu, chifanyidin ayindam!"
10 Ov, yom yiney yimekeshin anch, nisotil antu antumbish? Bwat, am niswiridin Nzamb itiya anch, yom yinasadila yidi yiwamp. Ov, nisotil kuyisangarish antu? Anch nisotil kuyisangarish antu, ing kinidiap kwam kashalapol wa Kristu.
0 Mutapu wikalay Paul kambuy wa Yesu
11 Anamakwam in Kristu, nikatil en wijikany anch, Rusangu Ruwamp rinakulejanya kiridiokilap kudi antu.
12 Rusangu riner am kinaritambulap kudi muntu, kwikil muntu warinleja, bwat, pakwez udi Yesu Kristu amwinend wanjinguninar.
13 En wateshanya kal mutapu unasala pinadinga nilondwil kwifukwil kwa in Yuda. Nayizengola in Yikumbu ya Nzamb, nasota kamu kuyishesh.
14 Nading muntu mujim mu yom ya win Yuda kusutamu antu avud akweting mivu ya kuvadik mudi yamam. Nakankamana nich mushiku ku yom yatulejau kudi anshankuretu.
15 Pakwez Nzamb ku ranaken rend wantonda pinading kand kal nivadik, chad wantazuka kand mulong wa kumusadil ndiy.
16 Patonday kwinjinguninay Mwanend Yesu, chakwel nilejan Rusangu rend Ruwamp kudi antu a michid yikwau, kinipulap chiyul kudi muntu ap kusu umwing, bwat.
17 Chawiy chimwing kand, kinayap ku Yerusalem mulong wa kumanijan nau antu asambelaku kwikal atwimbuy a Kristu. Pakwez naya swa mwi ngand ya Arabi, chad nachirik kand ku musumb wa Damas.
18 Chipasuta mivu yisatu, naya ku Yerusalem mulong wa kumanijan nend Pita, nashakama nend machuku dikum ni matan.
19 Kinamanijanap nend kambuy mukwau wa Yesu, ching kusu Jakobu, ndiy kamu mwanamakwend a Nsalejetu.
20 Yom yinifundila yidi yakin, Nzamb wij anch kinilondilap makasu.
21 Kwinyim kwa yom yiney, naya ku jindond jidia mwi ngand ya Siria ni ya Silisia.
22 Mu chisu chinicha chawonsu in Kristu a mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya mwi ngand ya Yudeya kangijikap.
23 Awiy ijika kusu yom yalondangau antu akwau anch: "Muntu wading ni kutuzengol pakur, katat ukat kurumburil rusangu ra ritiy rapakishay kushesh!"
24 Chawiy amutumbisha Nzamb mulong wamam.
0 Atwimbuy akwau a Yesu akat kumwitiy Paul
1 Chipasuta mivu dikum ni yinying, nachirika ku Yerusalem pamwing nend Barnabas, twading kand nend Titus.
2 Naya mulong Nzamb wanjingunina chakwel am niya kwinikwa. Nakumangana ching kusu nau amakurump, chad nayirumburila Rusangu Ruwamp rinalejana kudi antu a michid yikwau. Kinasotap mudimu unasala pakur ni wa katat kusheshik chamwamu.
3 Titus, mukwetu twadinga nend, ap anch wadingap nchik mwin Grek, kamubachikap chakwel aya ku mukand.
4 Antu amwing adimbana mudi adi in Kristu, awiy inay asota kumutwal ku mukand. Antu inay andama mu chisak chetu mudi in kutentish, mulong wa kujingunin want ipetu utukweta mu Kristu Yesu. Awiy asota kutukas mu uswik wa Yijil ya Moses.
5 Pakwez mulong wa kulam uyakin wa Rusangu Ruwamp kudi en, etu kitwayiziyilap ap kapamp kamwing.
6 Kwading antu amekana anch adi in kutakel, nilondil mwamu mulong kudi am kwikil mulong anch awiy adi anany, ap anany. Nzamb kakat kurumburishap yom yimekena ku mes. In kutakel inay kawejakup chom ku yom yinarumburila.
7 Pa ndond pa kuwejaku chom, awiy amana anch, Nzamb wanginkisha mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi antu a michid yikwau, mudi mwamwinkishay Pita mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi in Yuda.
8 Mulong Nzamb wangikadisha am kambuy wa Yesu mulong wa kuya kudi antu a michid yikwau, mudi mwamwikadishay Pita kambuy wa Yesu mulong wa kuya kudi in Yuda.
9 Jakobu, ni Pita, ni Yohan, awiy amekana mudi in kutakel, awiy ijika anch, Nzamb wanginkisha mudimu winou ujim. Awiy atulangwisha Barnabas niyamam mu makas, mulong wa kwikal chijingidij anch tudi mu umwing ku mudimu. Etu twitiyina am ni Barnabas kuya kudi antu a michid yikwau, chad niyau akuya kudi in Yuda.
10 Awiy atwita ching kusu chom chimwing chakwel tuyivurikang atuzwendj, chinech chawiy chom chinasalanga nich mushiku.
0 Paul ukat kumukand Pita ku Antiosh
11 Pakwez pashikay Pita ku Antiosh, namukanda_patok pakach pa antu, mulong ndiy warumbuka,
12 Padingau antu atumay Jakobu kand kal ashik, Pita wading ni kudia pamwing nau antu a michid yikwau. Pakwez pashikau antu inay, Pita walika kudia nau antu a michid yikwau, mulong ndiy wova wom wa antu eza mulong awiy ading asotila kuyitwal antu a michid yikwau ku mukand,
13 Anamakwetu akwau in Yuda ading in Kristu, niyau asambisha kand kusal yom ya rubabek mudi mwasalay Pita. Barnabas niyend witiya kulondul yisalijok ya rubabek ya antu akwau.
14 Pinamana anch, awiy kasadilap yom yitentamina mudi mudia uyakin wa Rusangu Ruwamp, namwela Pita mukach mwa antu anch: “Ey udi mwin Yuda, pakwez wading ni kusal mudi muntu wa muchid ukwau, kiwadiap ni kusal mudi mwin Yuda, bwat. Ov, ukutwish nchik kuyibachik antu a michid yikwau kwikal mudi in Yuda?”
0 In Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau akupand mulong wa ritiy
15 Chakin, etu twavadika tudi in Yuda, kitudiap antu a michid yikwau akat kwelau anch akayitil.
16 Etu twijany nawamp anch, muntu kakumuyingishinap mulong ukat kulondul Yijil ya Moses, pakwez akumuyingish ching kusu mulong umwitiyijin Yesu Kristu. Niyetu tumwitiyijinany kand Yesu Kristu chakwel Nzamb atuyingish mulong wa ritiy retu mu Kristu, wakad kutuyin gish mulong tukat kulondul Yijil ya Moses. Nzamb kakumuyingishap muntu mulong ukat kulondul Yijil ya Moses.
17 Chawiy etu tukat kuchingej kwiyingish mulong twamwitiyijin kal Kristu, anch etu tudi kand kwetu akayitil, charumburik anch, ov, Kristu ukat kutusadish yitil? Chakapul chaya mwa!
18 Anch nachirikin kand kusal Yijil ya Moses yinajipa, chinech chinmekeshin anch, am nidi mukayitil.
19 Am nidi mudi muntu ufila, chawiy Yijil ya Moses kiyikwetap kand ulabu kudi am. Yijil iyinau yawiy yangikadisha am mwamu. Nafa ku Yijil chakwel nimusadil Nzamb, ampampa kal ku mutond uchikakena pamwing nend Kristu.
20 Kiyamap nidia mwom, pakwez Kristu ndiy udia mwom mu am. Mutapu wa mwom unikweta katat udi mwom unatambula mulong namwitiyija Mwan a Nzamb, ndiy kamu wankata am, chad wapana mwom wend mulong wa kwingambat am.
21 Am kinilikinap ranaken rapanay Nzamb kudi antu. Pakwez anch Nzamb ukutwish kumuyingish muntu mulong ukat kulondul Yijil ya Moses, komb Kristu wafa kwend chamwamu.
0 Kuziyil Yijil ya Moses ap kumwitiyij Yesu Kristu
1 En in Galatia, udiany ayisup! Ov, nany wakulaunanya? Am nakurumburilanya patok mutapu wamujipau Yesu Kristu ku mutond uchikakena!
2 Nlejany patok, ov, chading mulong wa kulam Yijil ya Moses kwawiy kuwatambwilanya Mwiku Utumbila, anch chading mulong wateshanya Rusangu Ruwamp, chad witiyijany?
3 Ov, en usupilany nchik mwamu? En wasambishanya mwom usu nich Mwiku Utumbila, ov, ukutwishany nchik kudandamen mu mom yen nich ukash wen ayinen?
4 Ov, yom yiwamananya yidi kwau yom yamwamu? Nij anch, yom yiney yikwet usey!
5 Nzamb wakwinkishanya Mwiku Utumbila, ukat kusal kand yilay pakach penen. Ov, ndiy ukat kusal mwamu mulong en ukat kulamany Yijil ya Moses, ap ndiy ukat kusal mwamu mulong en wateshanya Rusangu Ruwamp, chad witiyijany?
6 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Aburaham wamwitiyija Nzamb, chad mulong wa ritiy rend Nzamb wamuchinda anch, udi muntu utentamina."
7 Chawiy ukutwishany kuman patok anch, antu akweta ritiy, awiy kamu a majuku makin ma Aburaham.
8 Mukand wa Nzamb walejana kurutu anch, Nzamb ukez kuyiyingish antu a michid yikwau mulong wa ritiy rau. Walejana kand kurutu Rusangu Ruwamp kudi Aburaham anch: "Nzamb ukez kuyiyukishin antu a michid yikwau yawonsu kudi ey."
9 Chawiy antu akweta ritiy akez kuyuk pamwing nend Aburaham wakwetinga ritiy.
10 Antu awonsu achingejina kuziyil ku Yijil ya Moses akez kuyindam. Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: "Nzamb ukez kumuyindamish muntu mwawonsu wakad kudandamen kuziyil ku yom yawonsu yifundilau mu mukand wa Yijil ya Moses!"
11 Katat twij nawamp anch, kwikil muntu ukuyingila kurutu kwa Nzamb mulong wa kulam Yijil ya Moses. Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Muntu utentamina mu ritiy kudi Nzamb ukez kupand.”
12 Pakwez Yijil ya Moses kiyikamedinap ku ritiy. Chikwau kand, Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Muntu mwawonsu ukuwanyisha yom yawonsu yilondilau mu Yijil ya Moses ukez kupandilaku.”
13 Payindamay Kristu mulong wa kutwambat etu, pawiy patukamuninay ku kuyindam kwa Yijil ya Moses. Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Nzamb ukumuyindamish muntu mwawonsu ukujipinau ku mutond.”
14 Kristu wasala mwamu, chakwel chiyukish chamushilaumu Aburaham kudi Nzamb chikala kudi antu a michid yikwau mu Kristu Yesu, chakwel niyetu awonsu kand tukutwish kutambwil ku ritiy Mwiku Utumbila washilayimu Nzamb.
0 Kwaurik kwa Yijil ya Moses ni Kushilamu kwa Nzamb
15 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil kukulejany nich chilikej cha yom yikat kusalay muntu. Anch muntu kurutu kwa kufa wafund ap wakan dizu, kwikil muntu ukutwisha kudikarumun ap kuwejaku.
16 Nzamb wamushilangamu Aburaham ni mwanend. Mukand wa Nzamb kiulondilap anch: “An a a majuku mend,” ap antu avud, bwat, pakwez ulondil anch: “Mwanend umwing,” ndiy kamu Kristu.
17 Nilondil anch Yijil ya Moses yashika mivu yitot yinying ni makum masatu kwinyim kwa kushilamu kwamushilaumu Aburaham kudi Nzamb. Yijil yiney kiyadioshap ap kujip manswik masukay Nzamb.
18 Mulong anch muntu watambul yiyukish yashilayimu Nzamb mulong wa kulam Yijil ya Moses, ndiy katambwidilap ku kushilamu. Pakwez Nzamb wamwinkisha Aburaham chiyukish mulong wa kushilamu kwend.
19 Komb anch chidi mwamu, ov, Yijil ya Moses yikwet mudimu ik? Yijil ayiwejaku mulong wa kujingunin mutapu wa yitil. Chad yifanyidin kushakam djat ni pakushikinay mwan wa kushilamu wa Aburaham, ndiy kamu Kristu. Nzamb wapana Yijil yiney kudi aruu end, chad niyau ayipana kudi muntu umwing cha pakach, ndiy kamu Moses.
20 Pakwez kwikil kuswir kwa muntu cha pakach anch kudi kusu muntu umwing. Nzamb wawanyisha kushilamu kwend amwinend wakad kuswir kwa muntu cha pakach.
0 Mudimu wa Yijil ya Moses
21 Ov, chinech chirumburikin anch, Yijil ya Moses yikat kupompat kushilamu kwa Nzamb? Bwat! Ap pakemp! Anch kwadi yijil yikutwisha kumwikadish muntu mwom, komb muntu ukutwish kwikal uyingila mulong ulamin Yijil ya Moses.
22 Pakwez Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Antu a mu mangand mawonsu adi mu uswik wa yitil, chakwel chiyukish chashilayimu Nzamb kupan mulong wa ritiy mu Yesu Kristu, akutwish kupan kudi antu awonsu akumwitiyija."
23 Pakwez piradinga ritiy kand kal rishik, Yijil ya Moses yatulama tii mudi antu a rukan. Nzamb watutenchikina mwamu chakwel tutambul ritiy riner rikumekeshay patok.
24 Chawiy Yijil ya Moses yading kalam wetu djat ni pashikinay Kristu, chakwel tukutwish kuying kurutu kwa Nzamb mulong wa ritiy.
25 Katat chirung cha kumwitiyij Yesu Kristu chashik kal, chad Yijil kiyitulaminap kand.
26 En awonsu udiany an a Nzamb mu Kristu Yesu mulong wa ritiy.
27 Chawiy en awonsu abatishau mu Kristu, wadjadilany kal yaku yisu ya Kristu.
28 Ku ritiy mu Kristu kwikil kwavrik kwa in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau, ap kwa aswik ni ant ipau, ap kwa amakundj ni amband. En awonsu udiany mu umwing nend Kristu Yesu.
29 Anch en udiany ayen a Kristu, chawiy udiany a a majuku ma Aburaham, mwamu udiany answan a chiyukish chashilayimu Nzamb.
1 Nisotil kuwejaku kand anch, nswan anch uchidi mwanikanch udi kwend mudi muswik, ap anch uswan wawonsu wa tatukwend udiap nchik iwend.
2 Pakwez pachidiay nswan mwanikanch, anlijend akwet usu, djat kamu ni ku dichuku diatenchikay tatukwend.
3 Chawiy chimwing kand niyetu, pitwading anikanch mu yom ya Nzamb, twading mu uswik wa miku yiyimp yiyikedila yom yawonsu ya mangand.
4 Pakwez pichashika chisu chiwanyidina chatenchikay Nzamb, ndiy wamutuma Mwanend ikundj. Ndiy wavadika kudi mband, walama kand Yijil ya Moses
5 chakwel ayikamunina antu alamina Yijil ya Moses, mwamu etu tukutwish kwikal mudi an a uswan a Nzamb.
6 Mulong wa kushinshik anch en udiany an a Nzamb, ndiy watuma Mwiku Utumbila wa Mwanend mu michim yetu, kwawiy tukata kutazukin anch: "Tatuku! Tatukwam!"
7 Ku ukash wa Nzamb, kiudiap kand muswik pakwez udi mwan, mudi chiudia mwan udi kand nswan.
0 Paul ukat kwakam mulong wa ritiy ra in Galatia
8 Pakur kiwadinganyap umwijany Nzamb, en wadingany aswik a miku ya akish ading kwau akish amwamu.
9 Pakwez katat umwijany Nzamb, ap chifanyidin nilond anch katat Nzamb ukwijany en. Ov, mulong wak usotilany kuchirik kand ku miku yiney yiziyila yakad usey yading yikuyikedinany? Ov, mulong wak usotilany kwikal aswik au kapamp kakwau?
10 En ukat kulimishany machuku majim, ni angond, ni yirung, ni mivu.
11 Nakamin mulong wenen! Ap yom yawonsu yinasala pakach penen yidi kwau yamwamu.
12 Anamakwam in Kristu, nakwilembilany, dioshany ruchingej ku Yijil ya Moses mudi munisadila am. Niyam nidi mudi en, Ein kiwansalanyap chom chiyimp.
13 En wijany nawamp anch mulong nayela, pawiy pinamana chisu cha kukurumburilany Rusangu Ruwamp kapamp ka kusambish.
14 Ap anch mayej mam makumeshanyap nchik en mar, en kiwanlikanyap ap kwindiul, bwat. Pakwez en wangakanya mudi nading muruu wa Nzamb, ap mudi nading Kristu Yesu amwinend.
15 En wasangaranya nakash mulong wa yom yiwateshanya. Am nidi kaman wa musangar wen, anch chading chipipel, ing wazakulanya mes men, wanginkishany!
16 Ov, komb katat nikal kal mukankuny mulong nakulejanya uyakin?
17 Antu ayipishina Rusangu Ruwamp akata kukusangerany en, pakwez michim yau kiyiwapilap. Awiy akatil kukwaurilany en ni yamam chakwel niyen ukutwishany kuyisangarish kand.
18 Chidi chiwamp anch antu akat kukusangarishany mulong wa yom yiwamp, anch nidi ni yenen ap anch nidi kwamwamu.
19 Anam akemp, am nikat kwov kusansan mudi kwa mband udia pa ruching ra kuval mulong wa kukwambatany en, djat ni piukufanakananya nend Kristu!
20 Nikatil nakash kwikal ni yenen katat chakwel nikulejany nawamp mudi muchifanyidina, mulong kinijap kand chom cha kusal kudi en.
0 Chilikej cha Agar nend Sar
21 En ukatilany kulam Yijil ya Moses, nlejany nawamp, ov, ukat kuteshany nawamp yom yilondilau mu Yijil yiney?
22 Yijil ya Moses yilondil anch, Aburaham wavala an amakundj aad. Wavala mwan umwing nend mband muswik, wavala kand mwan mukwau nend mband mwant ipend.
23 Mwan wavalay nend mband muswik wavadika mudi mudia chaku cha wuntu. Pakwez mwan wavalay nend mband mwant ipend wavadika mulong wa kushilamu kwa Nzamb.
24 Nikurumburil rusangu riner nich chilikej anch, amband inay adi mudi manswik maad. Umwing udi mudi manswik masukau ku mukandu wa Sinay, ndiy Agar wavadila an mu uswik.
25 Agar udi mudi mukandu wa Sinay mwi ngand ya Arabi, ndiy udi kand mudi musumb wa Yerusalem wa katat, mulong ndiy udi mu uswik pamwing ni anend.
26 Pakwez Yerusalem wa mwiur udi mwant ipend, ndiy udia makwetu.
27 Mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: “Sangar kwey, ey mband mumb! Barok kwey, toy nich musangar, ey mband wakad kal kwovangap misong ya kuval! Mulong mband waliKau kal kudi ikundj ukez kuval an avud kupandakanamu mband udia nend nfumwend.”
28 Chawiy en, anamakwam in Kristu, katat udiany mudi Isak, udiany an ashilayimu Nzamb.
29 Mwan wavadika mudi mudia chaku cha wuntu wamuzengola mwan wavadika ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila. Chidi kamu mwamu chisu chinech.
30 Pakwez Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil nchik? Ulondil anch: "Mwopata mband muswik pamwing ni mwanend. Mulong mwan ikundj wa muswik kakez kuswanap uswan pamwing nend mwan ikundj wa mband mwant ipend."
31 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, etu kitudiap an a mband muswik, pakwez tudi an a mband mwant ipend.
0 Kangal wikalany kand aswik
1 Etu tudi ant ipetu mulong Kristu watukwodil kal! Imanany dang, kangal witiyany kwikal kand aswik.
2 Nteshany! Am Paul, nikat kukulejany anch, anch witiyany kukutwalany ku mukand, charumburik anch, komb yom yawonsu yasalay Kristu kudi en yidi kwau yamwamu.
3 Nikat kukubabeshany kand kapamp kakwau anch, muntu mwawonsu witiyina kumutwal ku mukand, ufanyidin kamu kuziyil ku Yijil yawonsu ya Moses.
4 En ukata kupakishany kwiyingish kudi Nzamb mulong wa kulam Yijil ya Moses, wiyaurilany kal kudi Kristu. En wadiokalany kal ku ranaken ra Nzamb.
5 Pakwez etu tuchingejin anch Nzamb ukez kutuyingish. Chawiy chom chituchingedina Mwiku Utumbila kusal mulong wa ritiy retu.
6 Mulong anch etu tudi mu umwing nend Kristu Yesu, kuya ku mukand ap kulik kuya ku mukand kukwelap chom. Chom chijim, ritiy rikal rakin mu rukat ra Nzamb.
7 En wasambishanya nawamp! Ov, nany wakukangeshanya en kuziyil ku uyakin?
8 Mwin kukubachikany en kadiap Nzamb wakutazukanya.
9 Akat kulond anch: "Mwon ukemp ukat kutekau mu wung wa kusamp ukat kututwish dibot diawonsu."
10 Am nichingejin mwi Nsalejetu Kristu mulong wenen, anch kiukutambulanyap kand yitongijok yikwau. Pakwez nichingejin anch muntu ukata kukurumbangeshany en, anch nany ap nany, akez kumulej kadimu kudi Nzamb.
11 Pakwez, anamakwam in Kristu, anch chidi chakin am nikat kurumburil anch chifanyidin kuya ku mukand, ov, ing, mulong wak ukat kwinzengodilau? Anch nikat kulond mwamu, chawiy mazu minikata kurumburil mulong wa mutond uchikakena wa Kristu kimakutwishap kulet mulong.
12 Am nikatil ing antu akata kulet kanrumbangesh pakach penen aya akitungul ayinau.
13 Anamakwam in Kristu, en akutazukany kal kwikal ant ipen. Pakwez kangal want ipen wen wikal mutapu wa maku mayimp ma mujimbu chakwel makuyikelany. Chom chijim, kwashijanany muntu ni mukwau mu rukat.
14 Mulong Yijil yawonsu ya Moses ayibombakeshidin mu chijil chimwing anch: "Mukata mukwen mudi muwikatila ey amwiney.'
15 Pakwez anch en wamekeshijanany mash ni kuzengolijanany mudi annam a yidiany, chawiy babalany, chamwamu ukez kujiyishijanany shutit.
0 Kwaurik kwa Mwiku Utumbila ni kwa yisalijok ya wuntu
16 Pakwez am nilondil anch, chifanyidin witiyany Mwiku Utumbila atakel mom yen, chawiy kangal waziyilany ku maku ma wuntu.
17 Mulong rusot ra wuntu rikat kupompat rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila, chawiy chimwing kand, rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila rikat kupompat rusot ra wuntu. Yom yiney mwaad wau yikisijadin, chad mwamu yikat kukukangeshany kusal mudi muusotilany.
18 Pakwez anch Mwiku Utumbila wakutakelany, en kiudianyap kand mu uswik wa Yijil ya Moses.
19 Chawiy yisalijok ya wuntu yimeken patok. Yom yiney yidi usund, ni kwimik dis, ni upwepu,
20 ni kwifukwil akish, ni ulaj, ni rukuny, ni matend, ni mukau, ni ujim, ni ris, ni kwaurok, ni kupompatijan,
21 ni kukisan, ni kukwachik maruvu, ni kwipep, ni yom yikwau yiyimp mudi yiney. Nakubabeshany kal mudi nakubabeshanya pakusambish anch, muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yiney kakez kuswanap Want wa Nzamb.
22 Pakwez Mwiku Utumbila ukat kumekesh rukat, ni musangar, ni chisambu, ni kushimpish kwa muchim, ni kudimuk, ni kuwap, ni win yakin,
23 ni kwitudish, ni kwilam. Yijil ya Moses kiyilondilap chom cha kupompat yom yiney.
24 Antu awonsu adia ayen a Kristu Yesu ajipin kal maku mayimp ma wuntu ni rusot rau ku mutond uchikakena.
25 Anch Mwiku Utumbila watwinkishin kal mwom, chifanyidin ndiy atakel mom yetu.
26 Kitufanyidinap kwibaz, ap kusarumunijan, ap kwovijadin ris.
0 In Kristu afanyidin kukwashijan
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen wawa mu yitil, chifanyidin en utakedilanyau kudi Mwiku Utumbila kuya ni kumupizurish nich michim yidimukina. Pakwez babalany en ayinen, chamwamu ap niyen akez kukwozany kand.
2 Kwashijanany, wambulijanany yisend muntu ni mukwau. Chad mwamu ukuwanyishany chijil cha Kristu.
3 Anch muntu witong anch, udi muntu mujim, komb udi kwend muntu wamwamu, ndiy ukat kwidimb amwinend.
4 Chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu kwirumburish amwinend. Anch yisalijok yend yidi yiwamp, ndiy ukutwish kwibaz amwinend wakad kwiyilikej ni yisalijok ya muntu mukwau.
5 Chawiy chifanyidin muntu ni muntu kusend chisend chend amwinend.
6 Muntu ulejinau mazu ma Nzamb ufanyidin kwanganijan yom yawonsu yiwamp yikwetay nend mwin kumulej.
7 Kangal kwidimbany ayinen, mulong kwikil muntu ukutwisha kumudimb Nzamb. Yikukunay muntu, yawiy yikez kwangulay.
8 Anch muntu wakun yom ya rusot ra wuntu, ndiy ukez kwangul kusheshik. Pakwez anch wakun yom ya rusot ra Mwiku Utumbila, ndiy ukez kwangul mwom wa chikupu.
9 Chawiy kangal twaziy kusal yom yiwamp, mulong pa chirung chiwanyidina tukez kwangul yom yiwamp.
10 Yisu yawonsu yitumena nawamp chifanyidin etu kusal nawamp kudi antu awonsu, pakwez kupandakan kudi anamakwetu in ritiy.
0 Mazu ma Paul ma kuyibabesh ni kulangwish
11 Talany, nifundil mamuny majim nich chikas cham amwinam.
12 Antu akata kukubachikany en mulong wa kuya ku mukand, awiy kamu antu asotila kwishimek nich yom yimekena ku mes. Akat kusal mwamu ching kusu mulong wa kuyikangesh antu kuyizengol mulong wa mutond uchikakena wa Kristu.
13 Mulong niyau akata kuya ku mukand ayinau kaziyidilap kwau ku Yijil ya Moses. Awiy akatil kwau kwibaz mulong en waziyilany kal kuya ku mukand.
14 Pakwez kudi am, chakapul chaya mwa! Nikutwish kwibaz ching kusu mulong wa mutond uchikakena wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. Mulong wa mutond winou uchikakena, yom ya mangand yimekena ku mes yafil kal kudi am, niyam nidi mudi muntu mufu ku yom yiney.
15 Kuya ku mukand ap kulik kuya ku mukand kukwelap chom. Pakwez chom chijim, muntu ikala chitang chisu.
16 Chifanyidin chisambu ni riy ra Nzamb yikala kudi antu awonsu akata kulam chijil chinech, awiy kamu in Isarel akin a Nzamb.
17 Kudiokal katat, kangal muntu wannenganesh kand, mulong nikwet yidur ku mujimbu wam yimekeshina anch, nambat kumusadil Yesu.
18 Anamakwam in Kristu, chifanyidin ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu rikala ni yenen. Amen.
1 Nzamb ku rusot rend wangikadisha am, Paul, kambuy wa Kristu Yesu. Nifundil kudi antu awonsu a Nzamb akweta win yakin mu Kristu Yesu, awiy kamu adia mu musumb wa Efes.
2 Chifanyidin ranaken ni chisambu yidiokila kudi Nzamb Tatukwetu ni kudi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu yikala ni yenen.
0 Nzamb ukat kuyukish michim ya antu adia mu Kristu
3 Tumushimanany Nzamb, Tatukwend wa Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu! Mulong ndiy ukat kuyukish michim yetwetu tudia mu Kristu nich yiyukish yawonsu yidiokila mwiur.
4 Padingay kand kal atanga ngand, Nzamb watutonda etu kwikal aend mu Kristu, chakwel tukwikal antu atumbila akad kufa nich kurutu kwend. Mulong wa rukat rend,
5 Nzamb wading watutonda kal kwikal anend mu Yesu Kristu mudi mudia rusot rend ruwamp.
6 Tumushimanany Nzamb mulong wa ranaken rend ra uyaj, rapanay kudi etu chamwamu mu Mwanend ukatilay.
7 Ndiy watuchakwishina ku mash ma Mwanend Kristu, mwamu mwatulikishinay yitil yetu. Ranaken ra Nzamb ridi rijim nakash,
8 chawiy ku ranaken riner rijim ndiy watwinkisha manangu mavud ni ronganyin rijim.
9 Nzamb watujingunina patok yom ya ujindj yatenchikay ku rusot rend, yawiy yom yawanyishay mu Kristu.
10 Nzamb ukez kupwish kusal yom yatenchikay pa chisu chiwanyidina, mulong ku rusot rend ukez kukumangej yitang yawonsu ya mwiur ni ya pansh, chad ukez kumutek Kristu kwikal Mwant.
11 Pakur Nzamb watutonda kal etu kwikal answan end, mudi mwading kutenchik kwend, ni kutond kwa rusot rend. Mwamu mukat kusalay yom yawonsu.
12 Chifanyidin etu, in Yuda, twasambela kuchingej mu Kristu, tushimanany uyaj wa Nzamb.
13 Niyen kand wikadilany kal antu a Nzamb piwateshanya rusangu ra uyakin, rawiy Rusangu Ruwamp rakuletilanya dipandish. En wamwitiyijinany kal Kristu, chad Nzamb wakwinkishany Mwiku Utumbila mudi mwashilayimu kwikal chijingidij anch udiany aend.
14 Mulong tukwet Mwiku Utumbila, tukwet chizu cha kushilamu kwa Nzamb djat ni pakupwishilay kutukwol. Chawiy chisu chitukeza kutambul uswan wetu. Chifanyidin kushiman uyaj wa Nzamb mulong wa yom yiney.
15 Mulong wa yom yiney yawonsu yasalay Nzamb, chawiy kudiokal pinateshila rusangu ra ritiy ren mwi Nsalejetu Yesu ni rusangu ra rukat ren kudi antu awonsu a Nzamb,
16 am kinalikap kumujikitish Nzamb mulong wenen. Nikat kukuvurikany mu kulembil kwam,
17 chakwel Nzamb wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ndiy kamu Nzamb Tatuku wa uyaj, ukukwinkishany Mwiku Utumbila. Chad niyend Mwiku Utumbila ukukwinkishany kand manangu ni kukujinguninanyay Nzamb chakwel ukutwishany kumwijik ndiy.
18 Nikat kulembil kudi Nzamb anch umanany patok mu michim yen, chakwel wijikany ruchingej ra kutazuk kwend ni kwijik mapit ma uyaj wa uswan wend washilayimu kupan kudi antu a Nzamb,
19 ukwijikany kand ukash wend upandakena kujimb udia mu etu, in kumwitiyij. Ukash winou udia mu etu diawiy dikand dipandakena kujimb
20 diamuvumbulay nich Kristu ku rufu kwikal kand mwom, diawiy kand diamushichikay nich ku chikas chend cha katatuku mwiur.
21 Kwinikwa Kristu udi piur pa in kutakel awonsu a mwiur, pa ayilabu awonsu, ni pa in ukash akwau awonsu, ni pa anyikel awonsu, ni pa majin mawonsu majimbwilau mu chirung chinech, ni mu chirung chikeza kwez.
22 Nzamb wateka yom yawonsu mwishin mwa yidjatil ya Kristu, wamuteka kand piur pa yom yawonsu, ni kwikal mwin kutakel wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
23 Chikumbu cha Nzamb Wwawiy mujimbu wa Kristu, Chikumbu cha Nzamb chikat kumuwanyish Kristu mudi chikat kuwanyishay ndiy yom yawonsu ku jindond jawonsu.
0 Mwom usu mu Kristu
1 Pakur en wadingany mudi antu afu mu michim yen, mulong wa kubwambul kwen ni mulong wa yitil yen.
2 Pa chisu chinicha en walondulanya yaku yiyimp ya in mangand, En wamuziyilanya mwin kutakel wa ayilembil ushicha pakach pa diur ni divu, ndiy kamu mwiku uyitakedila antu akata kumubwambwil Nzamb.
3 Niyetu awonsu twadinga mukach mwau, pakur etu awonsu twalondula maku metu ma wuntu, Twasangarisha mijimbu yetu ni yitongijok yetu. Twading kamu mwamu mu wuntu mudi mudiau antu awonsu. Chading chifanyidin kuturumburish ku ujim wa Nzamb.
4 Pakwez Nzamb watukata nich rukat rujim nakash, chad watwovil riy kupandakan,
5 chawiy pitwadinga etu mudi antu afu mulong wa yitil yetu, ndiy watwikadisha aom pamwing nend Kristu. Chakin, mulong wa ranaken ra Nzamb kwawiy kuwapandidilany!
6 Nzamb watuvumbula pamwing nend Kristu kutudiosh etu ku mwom wetu ukur. Watushichika nend mwiur chakwel tukez kuyikel nend.
7 Ndiy wasala mwamu, mulong wa kumekesh kudi antu a yirung yawonsu yikweza kurutu kujimb kwa mapit ma ranaken rend ku kudimuk kwend kwatumekeshinay mu Kristu Yesu.
8 Chawiy chidi ku ranaken ra Nzamb kwawiy kuwapandilanya mulong wa ritiy ren. Dipandish dined kidiezap ku usu wen ayinen, chidi kwau kupan kwa riy kwa Nzamb.
9 Kichidiap mulong wa yom yiwasalanya, bwat, chad kwikil muntu ukutwisha kwibaz.
10 Nzamb, ndiy watusala mudi mutudia katat, ndiy watutangirila mu Kristu Yesu chakwel tusala midimu yiwamp, yawiy midimu yaturijekinay Nzamb pakur chakwel tuyisala.
0 In kumwitiyij Kristu adi mu umwing
11 En antu wavadikany ku michid yikwau, vurikany mudi muwadinganya pakur. In Yuda ayila ku mukand akwelanganya en anch ayidim, mulong awiy ading akwet chijingidij cha kuya ku mukand.
12 Vurikany kand anch kiwadianyap umwijany Kristu. En wadingany aeny mulong kiwadianyap in Isarei, chawiy kiwadinganyamup mu manswik masukay Nzamb. En wadingany mu mangand wakad ruchingej, wakad kand Nzamb.
13 Pakwez en wadiany pakur kulemp nend Nzamb, katat udiany piswimp mu Kristu Yesu. Akusejishany kal piswimp mulong wa mash mend.
14 Mulong Kristu ndiy waleta chisambu chetu, watusankesha etu in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau kwikal mu umwing. Mulong wa rufu rend rawiy rabumuna rubumbu ra rukuny ratwaurila.
15 Ndiy wadiosha Yijil ya in Yuda pamwing ni yijidik yau ni malejan mau, mulong wa kutangiril mwi ndiy antu a muchid wa in Yuda ni antu a michid yikwau kwikal muchid umwing usu pa ndond ya yisak yaad, mwamu mwaletay chisambu.
16 Rufu ra Kristu ku mutond uchikakena radiosha rukuny rau rawonsu. Mulong wa mutond uchikakena, Kristu wayisankesha yisak yaad kwikal mujimbu umwing. Mwamu mwayichirishay yisak yawonsu kudi Nzamb.
17 Chawiy Kristu weza ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra chisambu kudi en, antu a michid yikwau wadinganya kulemp nend Nzamb, ni kudi in Yuda adinga piswimp nend Nzamb.
18 Mu Kristu etu awonsu in Yuda, ni antu a michid yikwau, akutukwash kudi Mwiku umwing Utumbila kwiman kurutu kwa Tatukwetu.
19 Chawiy katat en, antu a michid yikwau, kiudianyap kand aeny, pakwez udiany in ngand pamwing nau antu a Nzamb, udiany kand in dijuku dia Nzamb.
20 Niyen akutungilany kal pa dishin dia chikumbu, awiy kamu atwimbuy a Yesu nau aruu a Nzamb, chad Kristu Yesu amwinend ndiy diyal dijim diatekau pa dikonk.
21 Kristu ndiy ukata kunung chikumbu chawonsu ni kuchijimbish kwikal Chikumbu cha Nzamb chitumbila mwi Nsalejetu.
22 Mwi ndiy niyen akutungilany nau pamwing ku Chikumbu chinech chakwel chikala ndond ya kushakam ya Nzamb mu Mwiku Utumbila.
0 Midimu yasalay Paul kudi antu a michid yikwau
1 Mulong wa chom chinech nikat kulembil kudi Nzamb. Yam Paul nidia mu rukan mulong nikat kumusadil Kristu Yesu, ni mulong wa kukwambatany en, antu a michid yikwau.
2 Nij anch wateshilany kal anch, Nzamb wanginkisha mudimu ku ranaken rend mulong wa kukwambatany en.
3 Nzamb wanjingunina patok ujindj wend watenchikay, mudi munakufundilanya mu kamukand kakemp.
4 Anch watangany mukand winiwa ukwijikany yom yinajingunina patok ya ujindj wa Nzamb yawanyishay Kristu.
5 Pakur Nzamb kaujinguninap ujindj winou kudi antu, bwat, pakwez katat waujingunin kal mu Mwiku Utumbila kudi atwimbuy a Yesu atumbila ni kudi aruu a Nzamb.
6 Ujindj winou urumburikin anch, antu a michid yikwau niyau adi answan a yiyukish ya Nzamb, pamwing nau in Yuda. Adi kand yid ya mujimbu umwing, niyau akutwish kutambul kand kushilamu kwa Nzamb kwapanyinay mu Kristu Yesu. Yom yiney yimekedin mu Rusangu Ruwamp.
7 Nzamb wangikadisha kashalapol wa Rusangu Ruwamp ku ranaken rend. Chiyukish chinech cha kusal nich, Nzamb wanginkishina ku ukash wend watekay mu am.
8 Ap anch nidiap nchik mukemp wa kwisudiel kwa antu a Nzamb, ndiy wanginkisha ranaken ra kurumburil kudi antu a michid yikwau yiyukish yipandakena kuvul yitutambwila mu Kristu.
9 Wanginkisha kand mudimu wa kuyijikish antu awonsu patok yom ya ujindj yajindjikay Nzamb Sakatang wa yom yawonsu, kudiokal yirung yawonsu ya pakur.
10 Chawiy mu chirung chinech ku usu wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb, in kutakel awonsu ni in ukash awonsu adia mwiur akwijik manangu mapandakena kujimb ma Nzamb.
11 Nzamb wasala yom yiney mudi mwadinga kutenchik kwend kwa chikupu kwawanyishinay mu Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu.
12 Mwi ndiy tukutwish kuya kurutu kwa Nzamb wakad wom, tukuya nich ruchingej rujim mulong tumwitiyijin Kristu.
13 Nakwilembilany, amboku, kangal waziyany mulong am nimen mar ma kukwambatany en. Yom yiney yawonsu yidi mulong wa katumb kenen.
0 Rukat ra Kristu
14 Chawiy mulong wa chom chinech, chawiy chinasidina manungun pansh kurutu kwa Nzamb Tatuku, mulong wa kumulembil.
15 Ndiy ukata kupil dijin diakin ku dijuku diawonsu dia mwiur ni dia pansh.
16 Nikat kumulembil Nzamb chakwel ku mapit ma uyaj wend akwinkishany ukash mu Mwiku wend Utumbila, chakwel wikalany akash mu michim yen.
17 Nikat kulembil anch Kristu ashakam mu michim yen mulong wamwitiyijanya ndiy. Nalembil kand anch rukat rikala disambishil dia yisalijok yen yawonsu.
18 Chakwel en, pamwing nau antu awonsu a Nzamb, ukwikalany nich ukash wa kujingunin kujimb kwa rukat ra Kristu, mudi mudia kujimb kwar, ni kulep, ni kulep kwa kuya piur, ni kulep kwa kukurik pansh.
19 Ap anch kiutwishinanyap nchik kwijik rukat rawonsu ra Kristu, chakin chifanyidin en kwijikany rukat rend, chad mwamu ukez kwizulany nich mitapu yawonsu ya Nzamb.
20 Chifanyidin etu kupan uyaj kudi Nzamb, mulong ku ukash wend udia mu etu, ndiy ukutwish kusal yom yivud yipandakena yipul yetu ap yom yitutongila.
21 Uyaj wikala kudi Nzamb mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb ni mu Kristu Yesu mu yirung yawonsu, chikupu ni chikupu! Amen.
0 In Kristu ikala mu umwing mu mujimbu wa Kristu
1 Am muntu wa rukan, mulong nikat kumusadil Nsalejetu, nakulembijekany anch, ikalany nich mwom uwanyidina, mudi mwatenchikay Nzamb pakutazukanyay en.
2 Yisu yawonsu ikalany in kwitudish, ikalany in kudimuk ni in kushimpish muchim. Kwashijanany muntu ni mukwau mu rukat.
3 Ikasikeshany kwikal mu umwing wakwinkishanyau kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Ndiy ukata kukwinkishany chisambu chikukasinany en awonsu pamwing.
4 Etu tudi a mujimbu umwing, kudi Mwiku Utumbila ching kusu umwing, tukwet kand ruchingej rumwing kwawiy kwatutazukinay Nzamb.
5 Kudi kusu ching Nsalejetu umwing, kudi mutapu umwing wa kumwitiyij, kudi kand ching kusu dijin dimwing dia kutambwil dibatish.
6 Kudi Nzamb umwing, Tatuku wetwetu awonsu, ndiy utuyikedila etu awonsu. Ukat kusal mudimu wend mu etu awonsu, ushich kand mu etu awonsu.
7 Muntu ni muntu wa pakach petu watambula kal ranaken mudi mwading yiyukish ya kusal nich yapanay Kristu.
8 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: “Payay piur, ndiy wasenda ankwal avud, Wwapana kand yom ya matangal kudi antu.”
9 Chad kulond anch: “Ndiy waya piur” charumburik nchik? Charumburik anch, pakusambish ndiy wakurikina mwi ngand ya pansh.
10 Chawiy wakurikina mwi ngand ya pansh ndiy kand umwing waya kamu piur pa maur, chakwel ukutwish kwikal kwawonsu.
11 Ndiy wapana yiyukish ya kusal nich kudi antu. Amwing wayitonda kwikal atwimbuy a Yesu, akwau wayitonda kwikal aruu a Nzamb, akwau wayitonda kwikal in kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, akwau wayitonda kwikal apasteur, akwau wayitonda kwikal alej.
12 Ndiy wasala mwamu mulong wa kurijek antu mulong wa kusal mudimu wa Kristu, chakwel ayikasikesha in Kristu, awiy kamu mujimbu wa Kristu.
13 Asala mwamu djat ni pitukwikadila mu umwing mu ritiy ni mu kumwijik Mwan a Nzamb, ni pitukeza kwikal amakurump mu ritiy, kushik ku chilik chiwanyidina cha Kristu.
14 Chawiy kitukez kwikalap kand anikanch akusendolau kudi mambek, ap akupwepolau kudi rinkind kuya mutambu ni mutambu. Ndiy rinkind wa malejan ma antu in kudimban, akata kuyikak antu akwau ku kurumbuk mulong wa yom yitenchikinau ya makasu.
15 Pakwez etu tufanyidin kulond uyakin nich rukat. Tufanyidin kand kukul chakwel tufanakan nend Kristu mu mitapu yawonsu, ndiy udia mudi mutu wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
