16 Mwi ndiy yikunku yawonsu ya mujimbu yaurokina yinungin pamwing, chawiy mujimbu wawonsu wikasin pamwing nich yinungin yatenchikau. Chad chid ni chid chifanyidin kusal mudimu wach mudi muchifanyidina, chakwel mujimbu wawonsu ukutwish kukul ni kukasikan mu rukat.
0 Mwom usu mu Kristu
17 Chawiy nakushindilany mu dijin dia Nsalejetu anch, kangal wadandamenany kusal mudi mukat kusalau antu akad ritiy, awiy kamu akweta yitongijok yamwamu,
18 mulong manangu mau madi mu mididim. Awiy kakwetap uswan ku mwom ukat kupanay Nzamb, mulong kijap kwau chom, michim yau yichinchikin.
19 Awiy kakwovangap kand kwau usany. Ipanyin kusal ching kusu yom yiyimp, akat kusal mitapu yawonsu ya yom yitakanena nich maku mayimp.
20 Pakwez kiyawiyap yom yiney yiwilejanya mulong wa Kristu, bwat!
21 Chakin, en wateshilany kal rusangu rend, en in kumwitiyij akulejinany kal kand uyakin wa Yesu.
22 Chawiy chifanyidin en ulikany yaku yen yikur, mudjolany muntu mukur wavunda kal nich maku mayimp ma kudimban.
23 Chifanyidin michim yen ni manangu men kukarumuk kwikal yisu.
24 Chad mudjalany muntu musu watangau mudi mudiay Nzamb mu kutentam kwakin ni mu kutumb.
25 Chawiy likany makasu mawonsu! Chifanyidin muntu ni muntu kulond uyakin kudi mukwau mwin Kristu, mulong etu awonsu tudiany yid ya mujimbu wa Kristu.
26 Anch wajimanany, babalany, chakwel kangal ujim wakusadikish chitil. Kangal wajingany nich ujim dichuku diakabuj.
27 Kangal wamushilany Sakudimban chisu.
28 Chifanyidin muntu mwij alika kwiy, chad asambisha kusal mudimu wakin chakwel ikwasha amwinend ni kuyikwash kand aburedina.
29 Kangal mu tun twen mwabudik mazu mayimp, pakwez londany ching kusu mazu mawamp makutwisha kukasikesh antu kukul mu ritiy mudi muchifanyidina, ni kuyiyukish antu awonsu akumatesha.
30 Kangal wamunenganeshany Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb, mulong ndiy udi chizu kudi en anch, udiany antu ayen a Nzamb, djat ni ku dichuku dikez kuwanyishay dipandish dien.
31 Dioshany rukuny rawonsu, ni kuswej kwawonsu, ni ujim wawonsu. Kangal wabarokany, ap kusaalan masaal, likany kand kukisijan kwa mitapu yawonsu.
32 Pakwez ikalany antu adimukina, in kwanakenijan muntu ni mukwau, in kulikishijadin muntu ni mukwau mudi mwakulikishinanyau en kudi Nzamb mu Kristu.
0 Endilany mu kutok
1 Mwilakejany Nzamb mulong en udiany anend akatilay.
2 Chifanyidin en kwikal nich rukat mudi mwatukatau etu kudi Kristu. Wipana amwinend mulong wa kutwambat etu. Wikala mulambu wa kwosh wa res ruwamp, wikala kand yakupesh ya kumusangarish Nzamb.
3 En udiany antu a Nzamb, kichifanyidinap en kulond yom ya usund, ap ya kwijond, ap ya ris pakach pen.
4 Kiufanyidinanyap kulond yom ya usany, ap ya usup, ap yom ya winzikis pakach pen. Pakwez lembilany nich kujikitish kudi Nzamb.
5 Ijikany anch, mwin usund, ap mwin kwijond, ap ukweta ris nakash ridia mudi akish end, kakez kuswanap Want wa Kristu ni Nzamb.
6 Kangal en witiyany muntu akudimbany nich mazu mamwamu. Mulong wa yom yiney ujim wa Nzamb ukez kumekan kudi in kumubwambwil.
7 Chawiy kangal wibombany nau antu a mutapu winou.
8 Pakur en wadingany mu mididim, pakwez katat udiany mu kutok mwi Nsalejetu. Chawiy ikalany nich yaku yiwamp mudi antu adia mu kutok,
9 mulong kutok kukat kulet yom yiwamp ya mitapu yawonsu, ni kutentam, ni uyakin.
10 Ikasikeshany kushinshik yom yikata kumusangarish Nsalejetu.
11 Kangal wapukunany ku yisalijok yiyimp yikat kusalau antu mu mididim. Yijinguninany yisalijok yiney patok.
12 Chikwatishen usany pakulond patok yom yikat kusalau antu mu ujindj.
13 Pakuyijinguninau yisalijok yiney patok, yikwijikan patok mutapu wau.
14 Mulong yom yawonsu yimekeshinau patok yikal kal kutok. Mudi mukat kulondau anch: "Ey ulela, lank, vumbuk, diokal mu afu, chad Kristu ukez kukumunyikiņ."
15 Chawiy babalany ku yaku yen. Kangal wikalany nich yaku ya antu ayisup, pakwez ikalany antu ababela.
16 Chisu chiukwetanya katat salany yom yiwamp, mulong chirung chitudia chidi chirung chiyimp.
17 Kangal wikalany ayisup, pakwez ikasikeshany kushinshik rusot ra Nsalejetu Kristu.
18 Kangal wakwachikany ku maar, mulong makukushikijany ku kujiy, pakwez izulany nich Mwiku Utumbila.
19 Kasikeshijanany nich mazu ma kuseng, kasikeshijanany kand nich miminy ya win Kristu. Musengany Nsalejetu, muwangilany miminy ya kumushiman nich michim yen yawonsu.
20 Mu yisu yawonsu ni ku yom yawonsu mujikitishany Nzamb Tatukwetu, mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
0 Kushakam kwa mband ni ikundj mu uruu
21 Ikepishany muntu ni mukwau mulong wa kalimish kiukwetany mu Kristu.
22 En angachik, ikepishany kudi anfumwen mudi muwikepishinanya kudi Nsalejen Yesu.
23 Mulong ngatan udi mwant wa mukajend mudi mudiay Kristu Mwant wa in Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Ndiy Kristu amwinend udi Mupandish wa in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chad in Chikumbu cha Nzamb wawiy mujimbu wend.
24 Mudi mukat kwikepishau in Chikumbu cha Nzamb kudi Kristu, chawiy chimwing, angachik afanyidin kwikepish kudi anfumwau ku yom yawonsu.
25 En angatan, yikatany akajen mudi Kristu chayikatay in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wipana amwinend mulong wa kuyambat awiy.
26 Ndiy wasala chom chinech nich dizu diend, chapwishay kuyishitwish mu mem, mulong wa kuyishikij in Chikumbu cha Nzamb kudi Nzamb.
27 Mwamu ndiy ukutwish kuyikadish in Chikumbu cha Nzamb kwikal ayend mu uyaj wawonsu, ikala zwang wakad ulim mudi muntu wakad chitaj, ap mikwich, ap kapad.
28 Chifanyidin ngatan kumukat mukajend mudi muukatilay mujimbu wend amwinend. Muntu mwawonsu umukatila mukajend wikatil amwinend.
29 Mulong kwikil muntu ukisina mujimbu wend amwinend, pakwez ukat kuudish ni kuulam nawamp, mudi mukat kusalay Kristu kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb,
30 mulong etu awonsu tudi yid ya mujimbu wend.
31 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Wawiy winou mulong ukat kudiokilay ikundj kwa tatukwend ni makwend, chad wibomb nend mukajend, awiy aad akwikal muntu umwing."
32 Winou wawiy ujindj wakin udia mu mazu minam ma Mukand wa Nzamb. Am nimen anch, mazu minam mamutadil Kristu ni in Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
33 Pakwez mazu minam makutadilany kand en. Chifanyidin ngatan mwawonsu kumukat mukajend mudi mwikatilay amwinend. Chifanyidin niyend ngachik mwawonsu kumulimish nfumwend.
0 Kushakam kwau an ni anvajau
1 En an, chom chifanyidina kusal mwi Nsalejetu, ziyilany kudi anvajen, mwamu muchitentamina.
2 "Mulimisha tatukwey ni makwey", chinech chawiy chijil cha kusambish chawejauku ku kushilamu anch:
3 "Chakwel ushakam nawamp, ni kulal mivu yivud pa mangand."
4 Niyen atatuku, kangal wayisudishany anen ku michim. Pakwez yikandany ni kuyibabesh nich malejan ma win Kristu.
0 Kushakam kwau aswik ni ansalejau
5 En aswik, yiziyilany ansalejen a panap pansh nich wom ni kuzalizal nich muchim umwing. Yiziyilany mudi muukata kumuziyilany Kristu.
6 Kangal wasalany mwamu chisu chikutadilanyau chakwel uyisangarishany. Pakwez wanyishany rusot ra Nzamb nich muchim wen wawonsu, mulong udiany aswik a Kristu.
7 Salany mudimu wen wa uswik nich musangar, mudi ing umusadidilany Nsalejetu Kristu pa ndond ya kuyisadil antu kusu.
8 Muntu ni muntu ijika anch, muswik ap mwant ipend ukez kutambul kudi Nsalejend Kristu kuwap ku kuwap kwa yom yiwamp yikusalay.
9 En ansalejau au aswik, niyen shakamany nau aswik en mu chilik chimwing cha win Kristu. Likany kuyifunyin. Vurikany anch en nau aswik en ukwetany Nsalejen umwing udia mwiur. Ndiy ukez kuyirumburish antu awonsu wakad kasolikany
0 Yom yikat kupanay Nzamb ya kurish nich
10 Dizu dia kwipwishil, ikasikeshany mwi Nsalejetu, mu ukash wa dikand diend dipandakena kujimb.
11 Djalany yom yawonsu yikat kupanay Nzamb ya kurish nich njit, chakwel ukwimanany dang pakurish ni yom yawonsu yitenchikinay Sakudimban.
12 Mulong etu kiturishinap nau antu a mijimbu ya mbij, pakwez tukat kurish nau in kutakel, nau in ulabu, nau akish ayikedila pa mangand minam mu chirung chinech cha mididim, ni yizwepwepu yikweta ukash mwiur.
13 Chawiy nonany yom yawonsu yikat kupanay Nzamb ya kurish nich njit, chakwel anch dichuku diyimp diashik ukutwishany kumukangesh mukankuny nen. Chad anch warishany djat ni kwisudiel, ukez kudandamenany kwiman dang pa jindond jen.
14 Chawiy imanany dang. Ikasany uyakin mwi mbund kwikal mudi nshipu. Djalany kutentam kwikal mudi rukibu rikasinau pa ntul.
15 Djalany mushiku wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra chisambu ku mend yen kwikal mudi yisapat.
16 Djalany ritiy kwikal mudi rukibu ra ku chikas, mulong rukibu riner ukutwishany kujimish nich jinseu ja kasu jawonsu jikwasay Sakudimban.
17 Tambulany dipandish kwikal mudi chiful cha utad, udjalany ku mutu. Tambulany kand dizu dia Nzamb dikat kupanay Mwiku Utumbila kwikal mudi mpak yen ya musamun.
18 Salany yom yiney yawonsu mu kulembil, mwitany Nzamb kukukwashany. Lembilany yisu yawonsu mu Mwiku Utumbila. Mulong wa chom chinech, babalany, kangal wipanany mu makas ma mukankuny. Yilembidilany antu a Nzamb awonsu.
19 Chad nlembidilany kand niyam, chakwel Nzamb ukwinlej mazu ma kulond. Chawiy mwamu nikutwish kulond patok wakad wom mulong wa kuyijingunin antu ujindj wa Rusangu Ruwamp.
20 Am nidi ntimesh mulong wa kwambat Rusangu Ruwamp ap anch nidiap nchik mu rukan. Nlembidilany chakwel nikutwish kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp patok wakad wom mudi muchifanyidina.
0 Mazu ma Paul ma kwisudiel ni kulangwish
21 Mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu, Tishik, udi kashalapol wakin mu mudimu wa Nsalejetu, ndiy ukukulejany jinsangu jamam jawonsu chakwel ukwijikany mudi munidia.
22 Mulong wa chom chinech, chawiy chinimutumidina kudi en, mulong wa kukulejany mudi mutudia, ni mulong wa kukukasikeshany.
23 Nikat kulembil anch, Nzamb Tatuku ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu apana chisambu, ni rukat, pamwing ni ritiy kudi anamakwetu in Kristu awonsu.
24 Nilembidil anch, ranaken ra Nzamb rikala kudi antu awonsu amukatila Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu nich rukat rakad kupwang.
1 Yam Paul, ni Timote, atushalapol a Kristu Yesu, yetu tufundila mukand winou kudi en, antu a Nzamb udiany mu Kristu Yesu, yen kamu ushichany mu musumb wa Filip. Chawiy chimwing, tufundil kand kudi in kutakel a Chikumbu cha Nzamb, pamwing ni in kuyikwash.
2 Nikat kulembil anch, Nzamb Tatukwetu ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu akwinkishany ranaken ni chisambu.
0 Paul Weal kuyilembidil in Kristu a mu Filip
3 Nikat kumujikitish Nzamb wam yisu yawonsu pinikata kuvurik mulong wenen.
4 Machuku mawonsu pinikata kukulembidilany en awonsu, nikat kulembil nich musangar,
5 mulong kukwash kwen kuwankwashanya ku mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, kudiokal ku dichuku dia kusambish dinashika mu Filip djat ni katat.
6 Chawiy nij nawamp anch, Nzamb wasambisha mudimu uwamp mu en ukez kuuwanyish pa dichuku dikuchirikay Kristu Yesu.
7 Machuku mawonsu en. udiany mu muchim wam! Chawiy niyingil ku yitongijok yam mulong wenen. Niyen watambulanya ranaken ra Nzamb mudi am pinidia mu rukan katat. Chad kand ni pinadinga mwant ipam, nikat kulond mulong wa Rusangu Ruwamp ni kurukasikesh.
8 Chakin, Nzamb udi kaman wam nilondil yakin, nikukatilany en awonsu nich rukat ridiokila ku muchim wa Kristu Yesu amwinend.
9 Nikat kulembil anch, rukat ren rujimba kamu kakwau ni kakwau, pamwing ni dirumburish diakin ni runang,
10 chakwel ukutwishany kujingunin yom yipandakena kuwap. Chad ukez kwikalany antu adia zwang wakad kwez kukufishany nich pa dichuku dikuchirikay Kristu.
11 Chawiy mom yen yikwikal ching kusu nich yisalijok yiwamp yikupanay Yesu Kristu, mulong wa kulet uyaj ni kumushiman Nzamb.
0 Mwom wakin udi mu Kristu
12 Anamakwam in Kristu, nisotil en wijikany anch, mar manshikena am makwasha kupalangesh Rusangu Ruwamp.
13 Mulong wa chom chinech, atulam awonsu a chikumbu cha want ni antu akwau awonsu ij nawamp anch, am nidi mu rukan mulong wa kumwambat Kristu.
14 Anamakwetu in Kristu amwing awejaku kal kakwau ni kakwau ruchingej rau mwi Nsalejetu mulong am nidi mu rukan, chad awejaku kal kand kujijaman kwa kurumburil dizu dia Nzamb patok wakad wom.
15 Chakin, antu amwing akat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu mulong angovidil am mukau, chikwau, akwet kand michim ya ntad, pakwez antu akwau akat kurumburil rusangu riner nich michim yiwamp.
16 Inay asadil nich rukat mulong awiy ij nawamp anch, Nzamb wintekin am kunoku mulong wa kuchidij Rusangu Ruwamp.
17 Chad akwau inay akat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu mulong wa kwitong ayinau, kalondilap nich win yakin, pakwez awiy asotil kwau kusarumun chakwel anwejinaku mar makwau ma rukan.
18 Kichikwelap chom! Ap anch akat kulondap nchik nich rubab ku mes, ap anch alondil nich win yakin, chom chijim, akat kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu. Mulong wa Chom chinech am nisanger, chad nikez kudandamen kand kusangar.
19 Nij anch mulong wa kulembil kwen, ni mulong wa kukwash kwa Mwiku Utumbila wa Yesu Kristu, yom yiney yawonsu yikez kwikal dipandish diam.
20 Am nikat kuchingel nich ruchingej rujim anch, kinikez kwovap usany mulong wa chisend cham. Pakwez nichingejin anch katat, mudi kand machuku mawonsu ma kwinyim, nikez kumutumbish Kristu mu mwom.wam nich kujijaman kwakin, pinidia mwom katat, ap kand anch nafa.
21 Mwom wam ukwet usey mulong wa Kristu, chawiy anch_ nafa, akez kwinwejinaku yiyukish.
22 Pakwez anch mu mwom winou nikudandamen kusal midimu yiwamp, chawiy kinijap anch nikutond kushakam mwom ap anch nikutond kufa.
23 Akat kwimpwit mutambu ni mutambu. Nikatil kamu nakash kudiokal mu mwom winou, niya kudi Kristu, chinech chawiy chom chipandakena kuwap.
24 Pakwez chidi chom chipandakena kuwap am kwikal mwom mulong wa kukukwashany en.
25 Nij nawamp, anch nikwikal mwom nikudandamen kushakam ni yenen awonsu piswimp, chakwel nikukwashany en kukul ni kusanger mu ritiy ren.
26 Chawiy mwamu ukutwish kumutumbishany Kristu Yesu, mulong am nez kal kapamp kakwau kudi en.
27 Chawiy chom chijim, chifanyidin yaku yen yifanakan mudi mudia Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu. Chawiy anch nez kudi en, ap anch kinezilap, nisotil kutesh rusangu anch, en wiminyany dang mu yitongijok yimwing, chad nich muchim umwing ukat kurishany mu umwing mulong wa kujimbish ritiy rilejenau mu Rusangu Ruwamp.
28 Kangal wayovany ukankuny nen wom. Chinech chawiy chijingidij chidiokila kudi Nzamb anch, awiy akez kujiy, pakwez en ukez kupandany.
29 Nzamb wakwanakenany en mu Kristu, kichidiap kusu ching mulong wa kumwitiyij, pakwez mulong wa kuman kand mar ma kumwambat ndiy.
30 Katat niyen ukat kurishany mudi muwanmananya am nikat kurish pakur, mudi muuteshilany kand anch, nikat kurish ni katat.
0 Kristu udi mujim, udi kand mwin kwitudish
1 Ritiy ren mu Kristu rikukukasikeshany mu rukat, ni kwikasany pamwing mu Mwiku Utumbila nich kudimuk ni riy.
2 Ikalany mu kwovijan mulong wa kuwanyish musangar wam. Ikalany nich rukat rumwing, nich muchim umwing, surabany kwikal mu umwing.
3 Kangal wasalany yom mulong wa kwitong ayinen ap mulong wa kwibaz, pakwez ikepishany, muntu ni muntu amumana mukwau mudi udi muwamp kumupandakanamu.
4 Chifanyidin muntu ni muntu atala nawamp ku yom ya mwom wa mukwau, wakad kutal nawamp ching kusu ku yom ya mwom wend amwinend.
5 Ikalany nich muchim uwamp mudi mwadingay nich Kristu Yesu.
6 Kudiokal ku disambishil ndiy wading nich wiNzamb, pakwez karilap kwilikan pamwing nend Nzamb.
7 Ndiy washa ndond yend ku rukat rend amwinend, watambul ndond ya ukashalapol. Wafanakana mudi antu, chad wamekan mu chifu cha muntu.
8 Wikepisha, chad waziyil djat kamu ku rufu, rawiy rufu ra ku mutond uchikakena.
9 Mulong wa chom chinech, Nzamb wamujimbisha, wamutek piur pa yom yawonsu, wamupil kand dijin dipandakena majin mawonsu.
10 Chad mwamu awonsu a mwiur, ni a pansh, ni a kwishin kwa divu akwas manungun pansh, mulong wa kwifukwil dijin dia Yesu.
11 Chawiy awonsu akez kwitiyij anch, Yesu Kristu ndiy Nsalejau, chakwel awonsu akupan uyaj kudi Nzamb Tatuku.
0 Ikalany mudi chimunyik pakach pa antu
12 Chawiy, anamakwam in Kristu, en wanziyilanganya machuku mawonsu pinadinga pamwing ni yenen, pakwez chom chipandakena kujimb, nziyilany kand katat pinakad kwikal pamwing ni yenen. Ikalany nich kalimish kawonsu kudi Nzamb, chad ikasikeshany mulong wa kuwanyish dipandish dien,
13 mulong Nzamb ukat kusal machuku mawonsu mu en chakwel wikalany nich rusot, wikalany kand nich usu wa kusal mudi mudia kutenchik kwend.
14 Piukusalany yom yawonsu, salany wakad kwinan ap wakad kutadikijan
15 chakwel wikalany akad kufa nich, wikalany an a Nzamb adia zwang, akad kapad mukach mwa in matung ni akayitil a chirung chinech. En umekenany mudi chimunyik mukach mwa antu a mangand minam,
16 piukat kuyilejany rusangu ra mwom. Anch en wasalany mwamu, am nikutwish kwibazin mu en pa dichuku dikuchirikay Kristu. Chinech chimeken anch, komb mudimu unasala kiwadingap wamwamu, ap kinasheshap usu wam chamwamu.
17 Ap mash mam makez kudja, miwej ku yakupesh ya ritiy ren kudi Nzamb. Ap anch chidiap nchik mwamu, am nikusangar, nikez kusangar kand pamwing ni yenen awonsu.
18 Chawiy chimwing kamu, chifanyidin niyen kusangar, nsangarishany kand ni yam.
0 Weny wa Timote nend Epafrodit
19 Mwi Nsalejetu Yesu nichingejin kukutuminanyay Timo te swa, chakwel ukwinkasikesh nich jinsangu jikudiokala kud en.
20 Kinikwetap muntu mukwau nichingejina mwin kutal ku yom ya mwom wenen mudi am amwinam.
21 Antu awonsu akwau akat kutal ching kusu ku yom ya mwom wau ayinau, katadilap ku rusot ra Yesu Kristu, bwat.
22 En ayinen wijany kal mudi mudiay Timote muntu wa usey. Nasala nend mudimu mudi mukat kusalay mwan ni tatukwend mulong wa kwambat Rusangu Ruwamp.
23 Nichingejin kumutum kamu ndiy kudi en, pakwez nitala bil mutapu ukusuta milong yam.
24 Nichingejin mwi Nsalejetu anch, am amwinam nikwez kudi en swa.
25 Nimen anch chifanyidin nikutuminanyay Epafrodit, mwanamakwam mwin Kristu, twasalanga nend mudimu wa Kristu, ndiy kand twakwashijananga nend kurish mulong wa kuchidij Rusangu Ruwamp. Ndiy kamu watumanya kwinkwash am chisu chinading nich kuswir.
26 Ndiy ukwet kuswir kwa kukumanany en awonsu, chad ukat kwinan mulong wateshinany anch wading muyej.
27 Chakin,ndiy wayedil nakash, wadi piswimp ni kufa. Pakwez Nzamb wamwovidil riy, kamwovidilap kusu ndiy amwinend, pakwez wangovidil kand niyamam, chakwel kinikutwishap kwov ushon nakash.
28 Mulong wa chom chinech nikatil nakash kumutum kudi en chakwel piukumumanany ukusangarany nend. Chawiy mwamu ushon wamam ukukep.
29 Umwakany nich musangar ujim mudi mwanamakwetu mwi Nsalejetu. Chifanyidin kuyilimish antu awonsu a mutapu winou,
30 mulong ndiy wading mu ubaj wa rufu mulong wa kwambat mudimu wa Kristu. Ndiy wipana amwinend kwinkwash am pa ndond yenen.
0 Kutentam kwakin
1 Anamakwam in Kristu, mazu mam ma kwisudiel mawiy minam, sangerany mwi Nsalejetu. Kiniziyilap kukufundilany mazu minakufundilany kand kakwau. Madi mazu mafanyidina kudi en mulong wa kukuchidijany ku ubaj.
2 Babalany ni antu akata kusal nayimp, adi mudi atubu. Awiy akata kukasikesh mulong wa kutwalan ku mukand!
3 Ching etu, yetu kwetu, twaya ku mukand wakin, awiy bwat, mulong etu tukat kumwifukwil Nzamb ku ukash wa Mwiku wend Utumbila, mulong tukat kusanger kand mu Kristu Yesu. Kitukwetap ruchingej mu yom ya mujimbu.
4 Chakin, niyam amwinam nikutwish kwibaz kuchingej mu yom yiney ya mujimbu. Anch kudi muntu ukata kutong kuchingej ku yom ya mujimbu, pakwez kudi am lel chipandaken.
5 Antwala ku mukand pinawanyisha machuku chinan ma kuvadik, am nidi mwin Isarel wa muchid wa Benjamin, am nidi kamu mwin Hebereu, mwan wa mwin Hebereu. Mulong wa kulam Yijil ya in Yuda, am nading Mufaris.
6 Am nading nich mushiku nakash, chawiy nayizengola nakash in Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Anch en ukat kutongany mutapu wa muntu kwikal utentamina pa kuziyil Yijil ya Moses, kwikil chom chinakad am kusal.
7 Pakwez yom yawonsu yinadinga ni kusal pa kuziyil Yijil ya Moses chakwel nikala muntu mujim, katat nimen anch yom yiney yawonsu kiyikwetap usey mulong wa yom yasadilay Kristu kudi am.
8 Chakin, am nimen anch, yom yawonsu yidi yamwamu kamu, mulong wa usey ujim upandakena wa kumwijik Kristu Yesu Nsalejam. Mulong wa kumwambat ndiy am nashadishin kal yom yawonsu, niyimen anch yidi kwau dishit divundila, mulong nisotil kwikal wayen wa Kristu,
9 mulong kand wa kwibomb nend mu umwing. Am amwinam kinitentaminap mulong wa kuziyil Yijil ya Moses, pakwez katat am nitentamin mulong wa ritiy ram mu Kristu, kwawiy kutentam kudiokila kudi Nzamb mulong wa ritiy riner.
10 Nisotil kumwijik ching kusu ndiy Kristu, ni kwijik ukash wa kuvumbuk kwend mu mwom wam, pa kuman mar mudi mamanay ndiy, ni pa kufanakan nend mu rufu rend
11 nich ruchingej anch, niyam kand nikez kuvumbuk mu rufu kwikal kand mwom.
0 Kutazuk kwa Nzamb mu Kristu Yesu
12 Kinilondilap anch, natambwil kal yom yiney yawonsu ap anch niwanyidin mudi muchifanyidina, pakwez nikat kurish nich usu wam wawonsu chakwel niyitambul, mulong Kristu Yesu wankarumwin kal am kwikal iwend.
13 Anamakwam in Kristu, kinichingejinap anch natambwil kal yom yiney. Pakwez chom chimwing chijim chinisadila, nivuramen yom yawonsu ya kwinyim, chad nikasikesh nich usu wam wawonsu chakwel nitambul yom yezila kurutu.
14 Chawiy chiniyidila mau salal djat ni kwisudiel chakwel nitambul chom cha usey chikupanay Nzamb, kwawiy kamu kutazuk kwa Nzamb mu Kristu Yesu kwa kutambul mwom wa mwiur.
15 Chifanyidin etu awonsu twakudilany kal mu ritiy twikalany nich yitongijok ya mutapu winou. Chawiy anch kudi antu amwing a pakach pen akata kutong mutapu ukwau, Nzamb ukez kuyimekeshin patok.
16 Chom chijim tudandamenany kamu salal mwi njil yitwayila kal djat ni katat.
17 Anamakwam in Kristu, en awonsu ngilakejany am. Talany nawamp kudi antu akata kulondul yaku yiwamp mudi mutwakulejanya en.
18 Nakulejany kal tupamp tuvud, nakulejany kal kand katat nich mansoj ku mes anch, kudi antu avud yaku yau yikat kupipej usey wa rufu ra Kristu ku mutond uchikakena.
19 Antu inay ayindam kal, akez kujiy, mulong maku mayimp ma mijimbu yau mikal kal nzamb wau. Akat kwibazin mu yom yikwatishena usany, akat kutongijok ching kusu ku yom ya mangand minam.
20 Pakwez etu, kwol kwetu kudi mwiur, chad tukat kumuchingel Mupandish wetu nich musangar, ndiy kamu Yesu Kristu ukudiokala kwinikwa kwez pansh.
21 Ndiy ukez kukarumun mijimbu yetu yiziyila ya rufu kwikal mudi mujimbu wend wa uyaj. Ndiy ukez kusal yom yiney nich ukash ukutekay yom yawonsu kwikal mwishin mwa kuyikel kwend.
1 Chawiy en, anamakwam in Kristu, nikukatilany en nakash, nikwet impu ya kumanijan ni yenen. En ukat kwinsangarishany nakash, nikat kwibaz kand mulong wenen. Chawiy chifanyidin en, anamakwam in Kristu, wimanany dang mwamu mu mwom wen mwi Nsalejetu.
2 Nakulembijek ey, Evodiy, niyeyey, Sintik, ovijanany mudi anambaz mwi Nsalejetu.
3 Ey, murund nam mukarukat, nikatil ey uyikwash amband inay, mulong awiy asala kal mudimu ujim pamwing ni yamam wa kupalangesh Rusangu Ruwamp. Asala pamwing nend Klema ni antu awonsu akwau asala mudimu ni yamam, majin mau amafundil mu mukand wa mwom wa Nzamb.
4 Sangarany machuku mawonsu mwi Nsalejetu. Nilondil kand anch: "Sangarany!"
5 Mekeshany muchim wa kwitudish kudi antu awonsu. Nsalejetu ukat kwez swa.
6 Kangal wiyakamishany mulong wa chom. Pakwez mu yisu yawonsu mu kulembil kwen, ap pa kuyilembidil antu akwau nich kujikitish, mwijikishany Nzamb yom yawonsu umwitilanya.
7 Chad chisambu cha Nzamb chisutila ronganyin ra antu chikulam michim yen ni yitongijok yen mu Kristu Yesu.
8 Anamakwam in Kristu, mazu mam ma kwisudiel mawiy minam, izwishany manangu men nich yom yakin, ni yom ya katumb, ni yom yitentamina, ni yom yidia zwang, ni yom yikatishena, ni yom ya ranaken. Anch kudi yom yipandakena kuwap, anch kudi yom yifanyidinau antu kushiman, tongijokany ku yom yiney.
9 Salany yom yiwilejanya kudi am ni yiwatambulanya kudi am ku mazu mam ni ku yisalijok yam kand. Chad Nzamb ukata kutwinkish chisambu ukwikal ni yenen.
0 Paul ukat kuyijikitish in Filip
10 Nasanger nakash mwi Nsalejetu mulong en wankwashilany kand kapamp kakwau. Nij anch en winkatilany, pakwez kiumenanyap mutapu wa kumekesh rukat ren kudi am.
11 Kinilondilap yom yiney mulong wa kuswir kwa yom, mulong am nilejin kal mutapu wa kusangar nich yom yinikweta.
12 Nij nawamp mutapu wa uzwendj, nij kand nawamp mutapu wa wimpich. Nilejin kal kand mutapu wa kusangar yisu yawonsu mu mitapu yawonsu, anch nikutin, ap anch nidi nich nzal, ap anch nikwet yom yivud, ap anch niburedin.
13 Kristu ukat kwinginkish ukash uwanyidina wa kusal yom yawonsu.
14 Pakwez en wasadilany nawamp, wankwashilany mu mar mam.
15 En in Filip, wijany nawamp chisu chinasambisha kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp pinadiokala mwi ngand ya Masedon. Kwikil Chikumbu cha Nzamb chimwing chankwasha ku mudimu wa kutambul yom ni wa kupan, ching kusu en.
16 Pinadinga mu musumb wa Tesalonik en wantuminanya yom yinaswira tupamp ni tupamp.
17 Kinilondilap mulong wa kwit yom ya matangal, pakwez nisotil Nzamb akuwejinanyaku kand yom yikwau mulong wa yisalijok yen yiwamp.
18 Natambwil kal yom yiwanyidina ni yikwau yisutila piur. Katat nikwet yom yiwanyidina yiwamwinkishinanya Epafrodit kwinletil. Yom yiney yikala mulambu wa res ruwamp mudi yakupesh yiwanyidina kumusangarish Nzamb.
19 Chawiy Nzamb wam ukez kuwanyish kuswir kwen kwawonsu mudi mudia mapit mend ma uyaj mu Kristu Yesu.
20 Chifanyidin kupan uyaj kudi Nzamb Tatukwetu chikupu ni chikupu! Amen.
0 Kulangwish kwa Paul kwa kwisudiel
21 Yilangwishany antu awonsu a Nzamb mu Kristu Yesu. Anamakwetu in Kristu adia kunoku ni yamam akulangwishany.
22 Antu awonsu a Nzamb adia kunoku akulangwishany, kupandakan antu a mudimu mu chikumbu cha mwant wa in Rom.
23 Chifanyidin ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu rikala ni yenen awonsu.
1 Yam Paul, kambuy wa Kristu Yesu ku rusot ra Nzamb, nifundila mukand winou pamwing nend Timote, mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu.
2 Nifundil kudi en, antu a Nzamb ushichanya mu musumb wa Kolosay, yen anamakwetu in win yakin mu Kristu. Chifanyidin Nzamb Tatukwetu akwinkishany ranaken ni chisambu.
0 Kulembil kwa kujikitish
3 Tukat kumujikitish Nzamb, Tatukwend wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, machuku mawonsu pitukata kulembil mulong wenen.
4 Mulong twateshil kal rusangu ra ritiy ren mu Kristu Yesu, ni ya rukat riukwetany kudi antu awonsu a Nzamb.
5 Piwateshanya kapamp ka kusambish rusangu rakin, rawiy Rusangu Ruwamp, en wateshanya ya ruchingej rilejenau mu rusangu riner. Chawiy ritiy ren ni rukat ren yidiokil ku yom yiuchingejinany, yawiy yikulamidinanyau kudi Nzamb mwiur.
6 Rusangu Ruwamp rikat kudandamen kulet yiyukish. Rikat kupalangan mu mangand mawonsu, mudi murapalangana kand mukach mwenen, kudiokal dichuku dia kusambish diwonganyinanya ranaken ra Nzamb ni kushinshik uyakin wa ranaken riner.
7 En wilejinany rusangu ra ranaken ra Nzamb kudi Upaferas, mukarukat netu, udi mwin mudimu pamwing ni yetwetu. Ndiy udi kashalapol wakin wa Kristu ukat kukukwashany en pa ndond petwetu.
8 Ndiy watulejina etu rusangu ra rukat rakwinkishinanyau kudi Mwiku Utumbila.
9 Mulong wa chom chinech etu kituziyilap kukulembidilany en machuku mawonsu, kudiokal pitwatesha rusangu ren. Tukat kumwit Nzamb chakwel akwizwishany nich ronganyin ra rusot rend, pamwing nich manangu ni ronganyin yikat kupanay Mwiku wend Utumbila.
10 Chawiy lel mwamu en ukutwish kwikalany nich mwom uwamp mudi musotilay Nsalejetu, chad ukusalany machuku mawonsu yom yikatilay. Ukez kusalany yom yiwamp ya mitapu yawonsu, ukez kukulany kand mu kumwijik Nzamb.
11 Tukat kumulembil Nzamb chakwel akukasikeshany nakash ku dikand diend dia uyaj, chakwel ukutwishany kudandamen mu yom yawonsu nich kushimpish kwa muchim nich musangar.
12 Mujikitishany Nzamb Tatuku, ndiy wakurijekinany chakwel utambulanyap uswan wa want wend wa kutok uyishidilay antwend.
13 Ndiy watukamunina kutudiosh ku ukash wa want wa mididim, watushemunin mu Want wa Mwanend ukatishena.
14 Ndiy watukwola, watulikishin kand yitil yetu.
0 Mutapu wa Kristu ni midimu yend
15 Kristu udi chifu chimekena ku mes cha Nzamb wakad kumekan ku mes. Ndiy udi Mwan wa kusambish, ndiy upandakenamu yitang yawonsu.
16 Mulong mwi ndiy Nzamb watanga yom yawonsu yidia mwiur ni yidia pansh, yom yimekena ku mes, ni yakad kumekan, pamwing ni yishimushimu yikweta ukash yikata kuyikel nich ulabu ni dikand. Nzamb watangila yom yawonsu mwi ndiy ni mulong wendendiy.
17 Kristu wadingaku piyading yom yawonsu kand kal ayitang, chawiy yom yawonsu yinungijadil pamwing mwi ndiy.
18 Ndiy udi mutu wa mujimbu wend, chawiy Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Mwi ndiy mwawiy musambishidila mwom usu, ndiy udi Mwan wa kusambish wa Nzamb, ndiy wasambela kuvumbuk mu rufu kwikal kand mwom. Chakwel ndiy amwinend ukutwish kutambul ndond ya kusambish yidia piur pa yom yawonsu.
19 Mulong chamusangarisha Nzamb kutek wiNzamb wend wawonsu mu Mwanend.
20 Chawiy mu Mwanend Nzamb wayichakwisha yom yawonsu. Nzamb waleta chisambu ku mash ma Mwanend madjishilay ku mutond uchikakena, mwamu mwachirishay yom yawonsu ya pansh ni ya mwiur kudi ndiy amwinend.
21 Pakur en wamwombanya Nzamb nyim, wamukisanya mu yitongijok yen ni mu yisalijok yen yiyimp.
22 Pakwez katat, ku rufu ra Mwanend rafay ku mujimbu wa wuntu, Nzamb wakuchakwishinany kal nend ndiy, chakwel ukushikany atumbila kurutu kwend adia zwang akad kapad.
23 Pakwez chifanyidin en udandamenany kwiman dang mu ritiy, wakad kushemunik kudiokal ku ruchingej riwatambulanya piwateshanya Rusangu Ruwamp. Antu a mangand mawonsu ayirumburidil kal Rusangu Ruwamp, rawiy ringikadishina am, Paul, kashalapol.
0 Mudimu wa Paul mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb
24 Katat nikwet musangar wa mar minimena ma kukwambatany en. Mar minimena ku mujimbu wam nikat kuwanyish mar mitufanyidina etu kuman mudi mamanay Kristu mulong wa mujimbu wend, chawiy kamu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
25 Nzamb wangikadisha am kashalapol wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb, wanginkisha mudimu winou mulong wa kukukwashany en. Wanginkisha chisend cha kurumburil Rusangu rend patok,
26 rawiy rusangu rajindjikay kudi antu awonsu a mivu yawonsu ya pakur, pakwez katat warumekesh kal patok kudi antwend.
27 Nzamb utenchikin kuyijikish antwend mapit ni uyaj wa ujindj winou udia pakach pa antu a michid yikwau. Ujindj win wawiy winou, Kristu udi mu michim yen, rawiy riner ruchingej anch, ukutambulany uyaj wa Nzamb.
28 Chawiy chitukata kurumburil rusangu ra Kristu, tukat kuyibabesh antu awonsu ni kuyilej nich manangu mawonsu, chakwel muntu ni muntu ikala uwanyidina mu Kristu.
29 Mulong wa kuwanyish mudimu winou, nikat kurish nakash nich usu ni dikand diend dikata kusal mudimu ujim mu am.
1 Nisotil en wijikany mudimu ukash unisadila mulong wa kukukwashany en, ni in Laodisey, ni antu akwau awonsu akad kal kwinmanangap.
2 Nisotil ikasikesh mu ritiy mu michim yau, ni kwibomb pamwing mu rukat, ni kutambul wimpich wawonsu wa ronganyin rakin, ni kwijik ujindj wa Nzamb, ndiy kamu Kristu.
3 Mwi ndiy mwawiy mujingamina mapit mawonsu ma manangu ni ma ronganyin.
4 Chawiy chinakubabeshany chakwel kangal witiyany muntu akudimbany nich mazu ma rulemb.
5 Ap anch nidiap nchik kulemp ni yenen ku mujimbu, pakwez nidi ni yenen pamwing mu muchim. Nikwet musangar wa kukumanany en ukwetanya yaku yiwamp, ni kwiman dang mu ritiy ren mu Kristu.
0 Kristu ukat kupan mwom uwamp
6 En wamwitiyijanya kal Kristu Yesu kwikal Nsalejen, chawiy katat ikalany nich mwom uwamp mwi ndiy.
7 Andjikany mij mwi ndiy, tungany mom yen piur pend mudi pa dishin, ikasikeshany mu ritiy mudi mwakulejanyau. Chifanyidin kujikitishany nakash.
8 Chawiy babalany, chakwel kangal muntu wakukwatany mu mupit wa manangu ma antu ma kudimban makad usey. Yom yiney yikat kudiokal ku malejan makat kutambulau antu mu majuku ma angakau, ni ku miku yiyimp yikata kuyikel pa mangand, pakwez kiyikat kudiokalap kudi Kristu.
9 Mulong wiNzamb wawonsu ushich mu Kristu mu wuntu wend.
10 Chawiy en akwinkishinany kal mwom wakin mwi ndiy. Ndiy uyipandaken miku yawonsu yiyimp yikata kuyikel ni yikweta ulabu.
11 Mu Kristu akutwadilany kal ku mukand, kiudiap mukand ukat kutwalanau antu, pakwez udi mukand watwalay Kristu wa kukukwolany ku ukash wa mujimbu wa yitil.
12 Mulong pakubatishanyau, akujikanya pamwing nend Kristu. Chad mu dibatish akuvumbulany ku rufu kwikal kand aom, mulong en witiyijany kal ukash wakin wa Nzamb, ndiy kamu wamuvumbula Kristu ku rufu.
13 Pakur en wadiany antu afu mu michim mulong wa yitil yen, ni mulong kand wadiany antu a michid yikwau akad Yijil ya Moses. Pakwez katat Nzamb wakupandishany kal pamwing nend Kristu. Nzamb watulikishidin kal yitil yetu yawonsu.
14 Ndiy wadiosha yom yafundau ya kutufish nich ni yijil yau yatupompata, wayijimangesha yawonsu payipampay ku mutond uchikakena.
15 Ndiy wapwisha ukash wa miku yiyimp yiyikedila yikweta ulabu, ndiy wayidiula patok, payipandakanay ku mutond uchikakena.
16 Chawiy kangal witiyany muntu kukutekinany yijil mulong wa yom ya kudia, ap ya kuna, ap ya kulam machuku ma misambu, ap ya kulam musambu wa kwarik kwa ngond, ap ya machuku ma kwiswedish.
17 Yijil yiney yidi kusu mwizuzwimb wa yom yikweza kurutu. Pakwez wakin win udi Kristu.
18 Kudi antu akwau akata kufa mu kan anch adi antu awamp kupandakan antu akwau mulong akat kuman yishimushimu, akat kubachik antu akwau chakwel ikepish kwa makasu ni kwifukwil aruu a mwiur. Antu inay akat kwibaz chamwamu mulong wa yitongijok yau ya wuntu. Chawiy kangal witiyany antu a mutapu winou kukufishany nich, bwat,
19 mulong awiy alikin kumulamat Kristu udia mutu wa mujimbu, chawiy kamu Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Mu kulam kwa Kristu mujimbu wawonsu ukat kutambul yakudia, mwi ndiy mujimbu ukat kwinung nawamp nich yinungin ni mijir. Chad mujimbu ukat kukul mudi mudia rusot ra Nzamb.
0 Kufa ni kuvumbuk nend Kristu
20 En wafanya nend Kristu, chawiy mwamu akukwolany kal ku ukash wa miku yiyimp yiyikedila mu mangand minam. Ov, mulong wak ukwetany yaku yiyimp mudi antu a mangand? Ov, mulong wak ukat kuziyilany ku yijil yikata kulond anch:
21 "Kangal wakwataku," "Kangal wapakish ku kan," "Kangal wapukunaku"?
22 Yom yiney yawonsu yijimbwilau ey anch apwish nich midimu yikez kujiy. Mulong yiney yidi kwau yijil yitenchikinau antu nich malejan mau. yiney yidi kwau yijil yitenchikinau antu nich malejan mau.
23 Yom yiney yikat kumekan mudi yom ya manangu mulong akat kwifukwil mudi mudia rusot ra muntu, akat kwitudish kwa makasu, ni kuumesh mujimbu mar. Pakwez yom yiney kiyikwetap usu wa kukangesh maku mayimp ma mujimbu.
1 En akuvumbwilany kal ku rufu kwikal kand aom pamwing nend Kristu, chawiy sotany yom yakutenchikinanyay Nzamb mwiur, kushichay Kristu pa ditand diend ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb,
2 Tongijokangany ku yom yidia mwiur, kangal watongijokany ku yom yidia pansh.
3 Mulong en wafilany kal, chad mom yen ayijindjikin pamwing nend Kristu mwi Nzamb.
4 Mwom wen wakin udi Kristu, chad pakez kumekanay Kristu niyen ukez kumekanany nend pamwing mu uyaj wend.
0 Mwom ukur ni mwom usu
5 Chifanyidin kujip rusot ren ruyimp rikata kulondul yom ya mangand, mudi usund, ni kusotijan, ni upwepu, ni maku mayimp ma mujimbu, ni ris, mulong ris ridi mutapu wa kwifukwil akish.
6 Mulong wa yom mudi yiney, ujim wa Nzamb ukuyiwil antu awonsu akad kumuziyil ndiy.
7 Pakur yaku yen yading mwamu, piwading mwom wen auyikedil kudi yitil.
8 Pakwez katat djibulany yom yiney yawonsu, ujim, ni kuswej, ni kuyip. Kangal kusesan ap masaal yabudik mu kan mwen.
9 Kangal walondany yom ya makasu kudi muntu ni mukwau, mulong en wamudjodilany kal muntu mukur ni yaku yend,
10 chad wamudjadilany kal muntu musu. Muntu mwinou musu amutangil kudi Nzamb, ukat kumwikadishang kufanakan chifu chend, chakwel en ukez kumwijikany Nzamb mu yom yawonsu.
11 Mulong wa chom chinech, kwikil kand kwaurik kwa antu a michid yikwau nau in Yuda, ni kwa ayila ku mukand ni ayidim, ni kwa antu ilejina ni antu akad kwilej, ni kwa aswik ni ant ipau, pakwez Kristu ndiy kamu yom yawonsu, udi kamu mu yom yawonsu.
12 En udiany antu atondilay Nzamb, udiany antu atumbila akatilay. Chawiy djalany riy, ni kudimuk, ni kwishikumwish, ni kuwap, ni kushimpish kwa muchim.
13 Kwashijanany akasikena ni aziyila, anch muntu ukwet mulong ni mukwau chifanyidin kulikishijadin umwing ni mukwau, mudi mwakulikishinanyau en kudi Nsalejetu. Niyen salany kand mwamu.
14 Pa yom yiney yawonsu anzukeshanyap rukat, rawiy mwoj wa kukukasany mu umwing uwanyidina.
15 Chifanyidin chisambu cha Kristu chiyikel mu michim yen, mulong ku chisambu chinech kwawiy kwakutazukinanyau kwikal mujimbu umwing. Mujikitishangany Nzamb.
16 Chifanyidin mapit mawonsu ma Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu mashakam mu michim yen. Lejijanany ni kubabeshijanany umwing ni mukwau nich manangu mawonsu. Muwangilany Nzamb miminy ya kuseng, ni miminy ya win Kristu, ni miminy ya kumushiman, muwangilany nich kujikitish mu michim yen.
17 Yom yawonsu yiukusalany ni yiukulondany, yisadilany mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu, ni kupan kujikitish kudi Nzamb Tatuku mwi ndiy.
0 Yaku ya mwom usu
18 En amband angachik, muntu ni muntu amuziyila nfumwend, mwamu muchifanyidina kusal mwi Nsalejetu.
19 En amakundj angatan, muntu ni muntu amukata mukajend wakad kumuzazimwokin.
20 Niyen an, yiziyilany anvajen ku yom yawonsu, mulong chom chinech chikat kumusangarish Nsalejetu Yesu.
21 En atatuku, kangal wayiswidioshany anen, chamwamu akuziy mu michim yau.
22 En aswik, yiziyilany ansalejen a panap pansh ku yom yawonsu. Kangal wasalany mwamu mulong chikutadilanyau chakwel uyisangarishany, pakwez salany nich muchim umwing mudi antu akata kumulimish Nsalejetu.
23 Ku midimu yawonsu yiukusalany, salany nich mushiku mudi muukata kumusadilany Nsalejetu, wakad kutong anch, ukat kuyisadilany ching kusu antu.
24 Vurikany anch, Nsalejetu ukez kukwinkishany uswan kwikal difut dien diwamp, mulong Kristu ndiy Nsalejetu wakin ukata kusadilany.
25 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukusala nayimp akez kumufut mudi mudia kuyip kusadilay. Mulong Nzamb kakwetap kasolikany.
1 En ansalejau au aswik, yilamany aswik en nich kutentam ni wakad kudimban. Vurikany anch niyen ukwetany Nsalejen mwiur.
0 Malejan ma Paul
2 Dandamenany mu kulembil, babalany piukata kulembilany, mujikitishany kand Nzamb.
3 Piukulembilany, tuvurikany kand niyetu mu kulembil, chakwel Nzamb atwinkish chisu chiwamp cha kurumburil rusangu ra ujindj wa Kristu. Kurumburil rusangu riner wawiy mulong wintekidinau mu rukan.
4 Chawiy nlembidilany chakwel nikutwish kwovakesh rusangu riner patok mudi munifanyidina kusal.
5 Shakamany nich manangu nau antu akad kwikal in Kristu, sotany chisu cha kusal yom yiwamp.
6 Chifanyidin mazu men mikala ma kalimish yisu yawonsu, ambambany nawamp nau antu akwau, ijikany mutapu wa kuyakul antu awonsu nawamp.
0 Kulangwish kwa Paul kwa kwisudiel
7 Mwanamakwetu Tishik, mwin Kristu ukez kukulejany rusangu ramam. Ndiy udi muntu unikatila nakash, udi mwin mudimu wakin, udi kashalapol pamwing ni yamam mwi Nsalejetu.
8 Namutum kal swa kudi en mulong wa kukulejany jinsangu jetwetu, ni mulong kand wa kukukasikeshany.
9 Wezil nend Onezim, ndiy udi mwanamakwetu mwin Kristu wakin unikatila, udi mwanamakwen wa kwinaku. Awiy akukulejany yom yawonsu yisutila kunoku.
10 Aristarik, udia mu rukan pamwing ni yamam, wakulangwishany, niyend Marko, mwanamakwend wa Barnabas, wakulangwishany kand. Akulejinany kal anch chifanyidin kumwak Marko nawamp.
11 Niyend Joshua, upidilau anch, Justus, wakulangwishany. Awiy inay in Yuda asatu akarumukina kal kwikal in Kristu, akata kusal mudimu wa Want wa Nzamb pamwing ni yamam. Awiy akata kwinkasikesh am nakash.
12 Akulangwishinany kudi Epaferas, ndiy udi umwing wenen. Ndiy udi kashalapol wa Kristu Yesu ukata kukulembidilany yisu yawonsu chakwel ukwimanany dang. Mwamu ukwikalany antu awanyidina wakad kwidjidjek mu ritiy, in kuziyil ku rusot rawonsu ra Nzamb.
13 Am nikutwish kulet uman mulong wa mudimu wend ukash wasalay kudi en, ni kudi in Laodisey, ni kudi in Herapolis.
14 Luka, mwingang wetu unikatila, pamwing nend Demas akulangwishany.
15 Panany kulangwish kwam kudi anamakwetu in Kristu a ku Laodisey, ni kudi Nimfa, pamwing nau in Kristu akata kukumangen mu chikumbu chend.
16 Piukupwishanya kutang mukand winou, upanany kand akautang kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Laodisey. Niyen ukutangany kand mukand ukukutuminanyau kudi in Laodisey.
17 Mulejany Ariship anch: "Wanyish mudimu nawamp wakwinkishau ku mudimu wa Nsalejetu."
18 Yam Paul, nifundila kulangwish kwinoku nich chikas cham. Vurikany jimbwambu jinkasinau. Nilembidil anch ranaken ra Nzamb rikala ni yenen.
1 Yam Paul, ni Silas, nend Timote tufundila mukand winou kudi en, in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ku musumb wa Tesalonik. En udianya antu a Nzamb Tatuku ni a Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. Chifanyidin ranaken ra Nzamb ni chisambu yikala ni yenen.
0 Mwom ni ritiy ya in Tesalonik
2 Etu tukat kumujikitish Nzamb machuku mawonsu mulong wenen, tukat kudandamen kukuvurikany mu kulembil kwetu.
3 Pitukata kulembil kudi Nzamb Tatukwetu, tukat kuvurik mudimu wa ritiy ren, ni yom yiwasalanya mu rukat ni mu ruchingej rudimukina riukwetanya mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
4 Anamakwetu in Kristu, etu twij anch Nzamb wakukatanya, ndiy kand wakutondanya kwikal aend.
5 Mulong etu twakulejanya Rusangu Ruwamp, kitwalondap mazu mamwamu, bwat, pakwez twalonda nich ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila, nich kand kashinsh ka uyakin wa Rusangu riner. Wijany mutapu twashakama nawamp ni yenen mulong wa kukukwashany.
6 En watwilakejanya etu, wamwilakejany kand Nsalejetu. Ap anch wamananyap nchik mar mavud, en wakanya dizu dia Nzamb nich musangar upanyinay Mwiku Utumbila.
7 Chawiy katat niyen wikadilany kal chilikej kudi in kwitiyij a mwi ngand ya Masedon ni ya Akey.
8 Rusangu Ruwamp ra Nsalejetu rijiken mwi ngand ya Masedon ni ya Akey mulong wenen, pakwez rusangu ra ritiy ren mwi Nzamb rijiken kwawonsu. Etu kitukutwishap kwiswil kand kulond nakash.
9 Antu inay awonsu akat kulond mutapu watwakanya, ni mutapu wakarumukanya kudiokal ku akish chakwel umusadilany Nzamb wakin mwom,
10 ni kumuchingel Mwanend kudiokal mwiur. Mwanend, ndiy kamu Yesu, wavumbulay mu rufu kwikal kand mwom, ndiy ukata kutukamunin ku ujim wa Nzamb ukeza kwez.
0 Mudimu wasalay Paul ku Tesalonik
1 Anamakwetu in Kristu, en ayinen wijany nawamp anch, etu kitwezilap kudi en chamwamu, bwat.
2 En ayinen wijany nawamp anch, atumesha mar ni kutusaal masaal mu musumb wa Filip, pitwading kand kal tushika kudi en mu Tesalonik. Ap anch kwadingap nchik antu avud atupompata, Nzamb wetu watwinkisha kujijaman chakwel tukulejany en Rusangu Ruwamp ridiokila kudi ndiy.
3 Kurumburil kwetu kwa Rusangu Ruwamp kikudiap kwa makasu ap kwa muchim uyimp, ap kwa kuyidimb antu.
4 Mudi mutuchingejinau etu kudi Nzamb mulong wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, kitukat kulondap mulong wa kuyisangarish antu, pakwez tukat kulond mulong wa kumusangarish Nzamb ukata kupak michim yetu.
5 En wijany nawamp anch, kitwalondap nich mazu ma rulemb mulong wa ris ra yom. Chakin, Nzamb udi kaman wetu.
6 Kitwasotap katumb ka antu, ap kenen, ap ka antu akwau,
7 ap anch tukutwish kwitap nchik chom mulong tudi atwimbuy a Kristu, pakwez kitwitap. Pakwez twading twitudishin nakash mukach mwen mudi maku ulamina anend nawamp ku mayel.
8 Mulong twakukatanya nakash, twading tukwet musangar wa kukurumburilany Rusangu Ruwamp ridiokila kudi Nzamb. Twasangara kand kwipan ayinetu kudi en, mulong wadingany akarukat netu nakash!
9 Anamakwetu in Kristu, en uvurikinany nawamp anch, etu twasala mudimu ukash nakash! Twasala uchuku ni muten, mulong kitwasotap kukutwikany en chisend pitwakurumburilangany Rusangu Ruwamp ridiokila kudi Nzamb.
10 En pamwing ni Nzamb udiany atuman etwetu anch, mutapu twashakama ni yenen in Kristu wading utumbil, ni kutentam, ni wakad kutufish nich.
11 En wijany nawamp anch, twashakama ni yenen, muntu ni muntu, mudi mukat kushakamay tatuku nau anend.
12 Twakukasikeshanganya, twakwongojanganya, twakubachikanganya kwikal nich mwom ukata kumusangarish Nzamb, ndiy kamu ukata kukutazukany en kwandam mu Want wend ni kutambulap uyaj wend.
13 Talany chom chikwau chitukata kumujikitishin Nzamb yisu yawonsu. Pitwakulejanya dizu dia Nzamb, en waditeshanya, chad waditambulany. Kiwadiakanyap mudi dizu dia muntu, pakwez wadiakanya mudi dizu diakin dia Nzamb ukata kusal mudimu mu en, in kwitiyij.
14 Chawiy en, anamakwetu in Kristu, yom yiwamenanya en yawiy kand yom yamanau in Yikumbu ya Nzamb ya mwi ngand ya Yudeya, awiy kamu antu adia mu Kristu Yesu. En akuzengolanya kudi antu a ngand yen mudi mwayizengolau awiy kudi in Yuda,
15 awiy kamu amujipa Nsalejetu Yesu, ni aruu a Nzamb, awiy kand atuzengola niyetu. Awiy akat kumwovish Nzamb ujim, adi akankuny au antu awonsu!
16 Awiy atukangesha nich usu kurumburil kudi antu a michid yikwau rusangu ra kuyipandish. Chawiy mwamu awanyish kal yitil yau yasalangau machuku mawonsu. Pakwez katat ujim wa Nzamb wayishikedin!
0 Paul ukwet kuswir kwa kumanijan nau kakwau
17 Chawiy, anamakwetu in Kristu, etu twaurikanya ni yenen chisu chikemp. Twaurikanya ku mujimbu, pakwez ku muchim tudiany pamwing. Twasadil usu nakash wa kwez kukumanany, mulong twading nich impu nakash ya kumanijan ni yenen!
18 Twasota kuchirik kudi en. Am amwinam, Paul, napakisha tupamp tuvud kwez, pakwez Sakudimban watukangesha.
19 Chawiy yen kamu, kwikil antu akwau, en udiany ruchingej retu, ni musangar wetu, ni chijingidij chetu cha kupandakan. Chawiy chitukutwisha kwibazin kurutu kwa Nsalejetu Yesu pakuchirikay.
20 Chakin, etu tukat kwibaz ni kwov musangar mulong wenen!
1 Kitwatwishilap kuchingel, chawiy twatongila kushal ayinetu ku musumb wa Aten.
2 Chad twamutumin mwanamakwetu, Timote, mwin Kristu ukata kusal mudimu wa Nzamb pamwing ni yetwetu, wawiy mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra Kristu. Twamutumin mulong wa kukukwashany ni kukukasikeshany mu ritiy,
3 chakwel kangal umwing wenen wachirik kwinyim mulong wa kuzengol kuumenanya katat. En ayinen wijany nawamp anch, Nzamb witiya etu kuman mar ma kuzengol kwinoku.
4 Mulong pitwadinga etu pamwing ni yenen, twakulejanya kurutu anch, tukez kuman mar ma kutuzengol. Chawiy en wijany nawamp chakin anch yawiy yom yashikina.
5 Wawiy mulong namutumidina Timote kudi en. Kinatwishilap kuchingel, chawiy namutumin ndiy mulong wa kujingunin rusangu ra ritiy ren. Nova wom anch, ap Sakudimban wakwozany, chad midimu yetu yawonsu yasheshik.
6 Pakwez katat Timote wachirikin kudi etu, watulejin rusangu ruwamp ra ritiy ren ni ra rukat ren. Watulejin anch, en ukat kutuvurikany etu yisu yawonsu nich rukat. Watulejin kand anch, en ukwetany impu ya kumanijan ni yetwetu, mudi etu niyetu tukweta impu ya kumanijan ni yenen.
7 Chawiy mu mar metu ni mu kuzengol kwetu, rusangu ra ritiy renen, anamakwetu in Kristu, ratukasikesha.
8 Chad katat twapizurik kal mulong enwiminyany dang mu mwom wen mwi Nsalejetu.
9 Katat etu tukutwish kumujikitish Nzamb wetu mulong wenen. Tukat kumujikitish mulong wa musangar ujim tukweta kurutu kwend mulong wenen.
10 Muten ni uchuku tukat kudandamen kulembil nich mushiku chakwel tukutwish kumanijan ni yenen, mulong wa kuwanyish yom yiuburedinany mu ritiy ren.
11 Tukat kulembil anch Nzamb Tatukwetu amwinend, ni Nsalejetu Yesu, atutenchikin njil chakwel tweza kudi en!
12 Tukat kulembil anch, Nsalejetu ajimbish rukat ren ni kuruwejaku kakwau ni kakwau kudi muntu ni mukwau, ni kudi antu awonsu mudi mudia rukat ritukweta etu kudi en.
13 Tukat kulembil mwamu chakwel ndiy ukukasikesh michim yen, ukwikalany antu atumbila akad kufa nich kurutu kwa Nzamb Tatukwetu, pakuchirikay Nsalejetu Yesu pamwing nau antwend awonsu.
0 Mutapu wa mwom ukata kumusangarish Nzamb
1 Anamakwetu in Kristu, mazu metu ma kwisudiel anch, en wilejinany kal kudi etu mutapu wa mwom wa kumusangarish Nzamb. Wawiy mutapu ushichanya ni katat. Chawiy katat twakulembijekany ni kukubachikany mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu anch, dandamenany mwamu, wejanyaku kakwau ni kakwau.
2 En wijany nawamp malejan mitwakulejinanya madiokila kudi Nsalejetu Yesu.
3 Nzamb usotil en kwikal antu atumbila, wilamany kand ku usund.
4 Chifanyidin ikundj nı ikundj wa pakach pen kwikal ni mukajend, chad ashakam nend mu katumb ni mu kalimish,
5 wakad maku mayimp mudi mukat kusalau antu akad kumwijik Nzamb.
6 Chawiy mu chom chinech, kangal muntu wasal chom chiyimp kudi mwanamakwend mwin Kristu, ap kumudimb. Twakulejany kal nakash chom chinech, twakubabeshany kal kand anch, Nsalejetu ukez kulejan kadimu kudi awonsu akusala chitil chinech.
7 Nzamb katutazukap kwikal in usund, pakwez watutazuka kwikal antu atumbila.
8 Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukulika malejan minam kamulikinap muntu, bwat, pakwez wamulik kal Nzamb ukata kukwinkishany Mwiku wend Utumbila.
9 En kiukwetanyap kuswir kwa kukufundilany mulong wa kukatijan nau anamakwen in Kristu. En ayinen akulejinany kal kudi Nzamb mutapu wa kukatijan muntu ni mukwau.
10 Chakin, en uyikatilany anamakwen in Kristu awonsu adia mwi ngand ya Masedon. Pakwez anamakwetu in Kristu, twakulembijekany chakwel uwejanyaku kusal mwamu kakwau ni kakwau.
11 Kimbany mutapu wa kushakamany zong, kangal wichikany pa milong ya antu akwau, salany midimu chakwel wipitilanyap yom yifanyidina kwikwash nich, mudi mutwakulejanya.
12 Anch ukatilany kukulimishany kudi antu akwau akad kwikal in Kristu, kichifanyidinap kuswadil chom cha muntu.
0 Kuchirik kwa Nsalejetu
13 Anamakwetu in Kristu, tukatil en ushinshikany uyakin mulong wa antu afila kal, chakwel en kiukwovanyap ushon mudi mukat kwovau antu akad ruchingej.
14 Etu twitiyin anch Yesu wafa, chad wavumbuka wikal kand mwom. Chawiy chimwing kand, twitiyin anch, antu awonsu afa kal ading akweta ritiy mu Yesu, niyau Nzamb ukez kuyisend pamwing nend Yesu.
15 Malejan mitukulejinanya katat madi malejan ma Nsalejetu. Etu tukwikala aom pa dichuku dikuchirikay Nsalejetu, kitukez kusambelakup kuya kurutu kwa antu afa kal.
16 Kukez kwikal rubil, ni dizu dia muruu mujim wa mwiur, ni chidjimin cha mpuny ya Nzamb, chad Nsalejetu amwinend ukez kushirik kudiokal mwiur. Antu awonsu afa kal amwitiyija Kristu, awiy akez kusambelaku kuvumbuk kwikal kand aom.
17 Chad etu tudia aom pa chisu chinicha akez kutukumangej pamwing nau awiy mu madj, mulong wa kumusankan Nsalejetu pa rinzwizu. Mwamu mutukeza kushakam nend Nsalejetu pamwing chikupu.
18 Chawiy kasikeshijanany mu ritiy muntu ni mukwau nich mazu minam.
1 En, anamakwetu in Kristu, kiukwetanyap kuswir kwa kukufundilany mulong wa yisu ni yirung yikushika yom yiney.
2 Mulong en ayinen wijany nawamp anch, dichuku dikuchirikay Nsalejetu dikez kushik kwa kukashimuk mudi mukat kwezay mwij uchuku.
3 Pakez kulondau antu anch: "Tukwet chisambu ni kwikang," pawiy pinipa kamu kusheshik kukez kuyikashimwish, mudi misong yikata kumukashimwish mband ukweta divumu. Chad kwikil umwing ukeza kukwasanik.
4 Pakwez en, anamakwetu in Kristu, kiudianyap mu mididim chakwel dichuku dined dikukashimwishany mudi mwij.
5 En awonsu udiany antu ija yom ya kutok, ukat kwendilany mu muten. Kitudiap in kwendil mu uchuku, ap kushakam mu mididim.
6 Chawiy etu kitufanyidinap kulal tul mudi antu akwau, pakwez tufanyidin kuchish ku mes ni kubabal.
7 Uchuku wawiy ukat kulalau antu, uchuku wawiy kand ukat kukwachikau antu.
8 Pakwez etu tukat kwendil mu muten, chifanyidin etu kubabal. Chifanyidin kand etu kudjal ritiy ni rukat mudi rukibu rikasinau pa ntul. Tudjala kand ruchingej ra dipandish dietu mudi chiful cha utad.
9 Nzamb katutondap etu mulong wa kutujimen, bwat, pakwez watutonda mulong wa kutambul dipandish mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu. lluiolis wa Autaillbul dipandish mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
10 Kristu wafa mulong wa kutwambat etu chakwel tukutwish kushakam nend anch tudi aom, ap anch tudi afu pakuchirikay.
11 Chawiy kasikeshijanany mu ritiy muntu ni mukwau, kwashijanany kand mudi muukat kusalanya.
0 Malejan ma Paul ma kwisudiel ni kulangwish
12 Anamakwetu in Kristu, twakwilembilany chakwel uyilimishany adia pakach pen akata kukutakelany ni kukukandany mwi Nsalejetu.
13 Yilamany nich kalimish nakash ni rukat mulong wa midimu yau. Shakamany nich chisambu pakach pen.
14 Anamakwetu in Kristu, twakushindilany anch, yikandany in usweral, yikasikeshany akweta wom, yikwashany aziyila, shimpishany michim kudi antu awonsu.
15 En, babalany, chakwel kangal umwing wenen wachirish kuyip ku kuyip kudi mukwau, pakwez yisu yawonsu en sotany mutapu wa kusal kuwap pakach pen ni kudi antu awonsu.
16 Sangarany machuku mawonsu,
17 lembilany kwakad kulik,
18 mujikitishany Nzamb mu yom yawonsu, mulong riner rawiy rusot ra Nzamb kudi en mu Kristu Yesu.
19 Kangal wamukangeshany Mwiku Utumbila.
20 Kangal wadiulany mazu malondilau aruu a Nzamb.
21 Shinshikany yom yawonsu, ulamany yom yidia yiwamp,
22 pakwez likany kusal kuyip kwa mitapu yawonsu.
23 Tukat kulembil anch, Nzamb wa chisambu akwishitwishany nakash, alama nawamp miku yen, ni mipim yen, ni mijimbu yen wakad kufa nich, djat ni pakuchirikay Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
24 Ndiy ukutazukinany udi mwin yakin, ndiy ukuwanyish yom yiney.
25 Anamakwetu in Kristu, tulembidilany niyetu.
26 Anamakwetu in Kristu, langwishijanany en awonsu muntu ni mukwau nich kususujan kutumbila.
27 Nakushinshikany ku ulabu wa Nsalejetu, tangany mukand winou kudi anamakwetu in Kristu awonsu.
28 Chifanyidin ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu rikala ni yenen.
1 Yam Paul, ni Silas, nend Timote tufundila mukand winou kudi en, in Chikumbu cha Nzamb a ku musumb wa Tesalonik. En udiany antu a Nzamb Tatuku ni a Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
2 Chifanyidin Nzamb Tatukwetu ni Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu akwinkishany chisambu ni ranaken.
0 Dirumburish dichingedila kuchirik kwa Kristu
3 Anamakwetu in Kristu, chifanyidin etu kumujikitish Nzamb yisu yawonsu mulong wenen mudi muchifanyidina. Tukat kusal mwamu mulong ritiy ren rikat kuya ni kujimb nakash, ni rukat ren riukwetany kudi muntu ni mukwau rikat kuya ni kujimb kand pakach penen awonsu.
4 Chawiy tukat kwibaz mulong wenen mu Yikumbu ya Nzamb, mulong udandamedinany kwiman dang. Tukat kwibaz kand mulong wa ritiy riukwetanya mu kuzengol kwen ni mu mar miukata kumanany.
5 Yom yiney yawonsu yikat kushinshik anch, dirumburish dia Nzamb ditentamin, chad mwamu en ukez kwikalany antu awanyidina kwandam mu Want wend, umedinanya mar.
6 Nzamb ukez kuwanyish yom yitentamina, ndiy ukez kuyimesh mar awiy akumeshinanya en mar,
7 ukez kukwinkishany en umenanya mar kwiswedish, ukez kutwinkish kand niyetu. Ndiy ukez kusal mwamu pakez kumekanay Nsalejetu Yesu kudiokal mwiur, pamwing nau aruu end a mwiur akweta dikand.
8 Ukez kwezil mu kasu ka muzwizu mulong wa kulejan kadimu kudi antu akata kumulik Nzamb, ni kulik kuziyil ku Rusangu Ruwamp ra Nsalejetu Yesu.
9 Kadimu kakez kuyilejau kakez kwikal kusheshik kwa chikupu. Akez kuyauril kulemp ni Nsalejetu, akez kwikal kand kulemp ni dikand diend dia uyaj,
10 pakez kurumburishay pa Dichuku dinidia. Ukez kutambul uyaj kudi antwend awonsu ni katumb kudi antu awonsu amwitiyija. Niyen ukez kwikalanyaku, mulong en witiyijanya Rusangu Ruwamp ritwakulejanya.
11 Wawiy mulong tukata kukulembidilany machuku mawonsu. Tukat kumulembil Nzamb chakwel akwikadishany antu awanyidina kutambul mwom wakutazukinanyau. Tukat kulembil kand chakwel ku ukash wend akuwanyishinany yom yawonsu yiwamp yiusotilany, ni kuwanyish midimu yen ya ritiy.
12 Chad mwamu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu akez kuditumbishin mu en, niyen akez kukutumbishinany mwi ndiy ku ranaken ra Nzamb wetu, ni ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
0 Muyimp
1 Chawiy mulong wa kuchirik kwa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ni mulong wa kutukumangej etu pamwing chakwel tumusankan ndiy. Twakwilembilany, anamakwetu in Kristu,
2 kangal warumbanganany swa, ap kwiyakamish. Chakin, antu in kudimban akat kulond anch: "Dichuku dikurumburishay Nsalejetu diashik kal." Akwau akat kudimban anch, etu twalonda mwamu pitwabwaka, ap pitwarumburila Rusangu Ruwamp, ap anch twafunda yom yiney mu mukand.
3 Kangal witiyany muntu akudimbany ku mitapu yawonsu. Dichuku dined kidikushikap kal ching anch antu avud amubwambwil Nzamb kapamp ka kwisudiel, chad kand anch Muyimp wamekan, winou ndiy ukez kusheshau kudi Nzamb.
4 Ndiy ukez kupompat akish awonsu ni yom yikwau yawonsu yikat kwifukwilau antu, ukez kwizambwish kwitek amwinend piur pa yom yiney yawonsu. Chad ukez kutek ditand diend mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ni kwimekesh amwinend anch: "Yam kamu Nzamb!"
5 Ov, kiuvurikinanyap anch nakulejanya yom yiney yawonsu pinadinga pamwing ni yenen?
6 En wijany anch, kudi chom chikata kukangesh yom yiney kumekan katat, niyen uchijany chom chinech. Muyimp ukez kumekan pa chisu chend chiwanyidina.
7 Ukash wa Muyimp wa mu ujindj wasambishin kal mudimu, pakwez yom yikeza kwez kiyikumekanap kal ching anch ndiy ukata kuyikangesh yom yiney wadiokalaku.
8 Chad Muyimp ukez kumekan, pakwez pakuchirikay Nsalejetu Yesu, ndiy ukez kumujip Muyimp nich mwiku wa mu kan mwend ni kumushesh shutit nich uyaj ukwezay nich.
9 Pakwezay Muyimp, ukez kwikal nich ukash wa Sakudimban, chad ukez kusal yilay ya mitapu yawonsu ni yishimushimu ya makasu.
10 Ndiy ukez kudimban mitapu yawonsu antu akuya ku kujiy, akujiy kamu mulong alikin kwau kukat uyakin ukutwisha kuyipandish.
11 Chawiy Nzamb ukat kuyitumin ukash wa kurumbuk, chad ukash winou ukat kuyibachik kwitiy yom ya makasu.
12 Chawiy mwamu antu awonsu akad kwitiyij uyakin akata kusanger mu yitil yau, akez kuyifish nich.
0 Nzamb wakutondanya chakwel akupandishany
13 Tufanyidin kumujikitish Nzamb yisu yawonsu mulong wenen, anamakwetu in Kristu, yen antu akatilau kudi Nsalejetu. Nzamb wakutondanya kudiokal ku disambishil chakwel akupandishilany ku Mwiku Utumbila ukata kukwishitwishany, ni ku ritiy ren mu uyakin.
14 Nzamb wakutazukany kutambwil yom yiney ku Rusangu Ruwamp ritwakulejanya, chakwel niyen ukutwishany kutambulap uyaj wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
15 Chawiy, anamakwetu in Kristu, imanany dang, ulamany malejan mitwakulejanya ku kan, ap mitwafunda ku mukand wetu.
16 Tukat kumulembil Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu amwinend, ni Nzamb Tatukwetu watukata, chad watwinkish kujijaman kwa chikupu, ni ruchingej ruwamp ku ranaken rend.
17 Tulembil anch ndiy ukez kukwongojany ni kukasikesh michim yen mu yisalijok yawonsu yiwamp, ni mu mazu mawonsu mawamp.
0 Tulembidilany etu
1 Anamakwetu in Kristu, chom cha kwisudiel, tulembidilany chakwel dizu dia Nsalejetu dikupalangan swa, chakwel kand aditambul nich uyaj mudi muwaditambulanya en.
2 Tulembidilany kand chakwel Nzamb ukutukamunin kudi antu ayimp, in chisum, mulong kadiap antu awonsu akweta ritiy.
3 Pakwez Nsalejetu udi mwin yakin, ndiy ukez kukukasikeshany ni kukuchidijany ku kuyip.
4 Mulong wa Nsalejetu tukuchingejinany en, twij anch ukat kusalany, chad ukudandamenany kand kusal yom yitwakulejanya.
5 Tukat kulembil anch, Nsalejetu atakela michim yen ku kashinsh kakat kupanay, ni ku rukat ra Nzamb.
0 Chifanyidin muntu mwawonsu kusal mudimu
6 Anamakwetu in Kristu, twakushindilany en mu dijin dia Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu anch, aurikany nau anamakwetu in Kristu awonsu akweta mwom wa usweral, akad kulondul malejan mitwakulejanya.
7 En ayinen wijany nawamp mutapu ufanyidinany kutwilakej etu. Pitwadinga pakach penen, kitwadingap nich usweral.
8 Kitwadiap yakudia ya muntu mukwau wakad kufut, pakwez twasalanga mudimu ukash nakash uchuku ni muten, chakwel kitukumutwikap muntu umwing wa pakach pen chisend.
9 Chakin kamy, tukwet usu wa kwipul chom kudi en, pakwez kitwitap, bwat, mulong twasota kukulejany chilik chiwamp.
10 Chawiy pitwadinga etu pakach penen, twakulejanganya anch: "Muntu wakad kwend kusal mudimu, kafanyidinap kwend kudia."
11 Etu tuteshil anch, antu amwing a pakach pen akwet mwom wa usweral, chikwau kand, akat kwichik pa milong ya antu akwau, kakat kusalap mudimu.
12 Antu inay tuyishindidil ni kuyibachik mwi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu anch, afanyidin kusal mudimu zong, ikimbilap ayinau yakudia yau.
13 Anamakwetu in Kristu, kangal waziyang mu kusal yom yiwamp.
14 Anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen walik kuziyil ku mazu ma mukand wetu winou, mushinshikany muntu mwinou, chad aurikany nend chakwel ova usany.
15 Kangal wamulamany mudi mukankuny, bwat, pakwez mubabeshany mudi mwanamakwen mwin Kristu.
0 Mazu ma Paul ma kwisudiel
16 Katat nikat kulembil anch Nsalejetu, Mwin Chisambu, akwinkishany en chisambu mu yisu yawonsu ni ku yom yawonsu. Chifanyidin Nsalejetu ikala ni yenen awonsu.
17 Yam Paul, nifundila kulangwish kwinoku nich chikas cham. Chinech chawiy chijingidij cha mikand yamam yawonsu, mutapu unikata kufund.
18 Chifanyidin ranaken ra Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu rikala ni yenen awonsu.
1 Yam Paul, nidia kambuy wa Kristu Yesu ku ukash wa Nzamb Mupandish wetu ni wa Kristu Yesu, ndiy kamu ruchingej retu.
2 Nifundil mukand winou kudi Timote, mwanam wa kashinsh mu ritiy. Nikat kulembil anch Nzamb Tatuku ni Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu akwinkish ranaken, ni riy, ni chisambu.
0 Babal ku malejan ma makasu
3 Nisotil ey kushakam mu musumb wa Efes, mudi munakushindila pinasuta kuya kwi ngand ya Masedon. Chifanyidin ey kuyikand antu adia kwinikwa akata kulejan malejan ma makasu.
4 Yikanda alika kukat yishimu yamwamu, alika kand majin ma majuku ma anshankur makad kutwish kuchind. Yom yiney yikat kuletish ntad, kiyikat kukwashap kutenchik kwa Nzamb kwa dipandish kukata kwijikinau ku ritiy.
5 Kutenchik kwa Nzamb chidi kumekesh rukat ridiokila ku muchim wa zwang, ni ku kom kawamp, ni ku ritiy rakin.
6 Antu amwing apumbukin kal mwi njil yiney, chad aya kulemp, andam mwi ntad ja usup.
7 Awiy akatil kwikal alej a yijil ya Nzamb, pakwez kovilap yom yilondilau ayinau ap yom yirumburilau nich usu.
8 Etu twij nawamp anch, Yijil ya Moses yidi yiwamp anch ayisadil mudi muchifanyidina.
9 Chawiy twijany kand nawamp anch, Nzamb katekap yijil mulong wa antu atentamina, pakwez wateka yijil mulong wa antu akata kujip yijil ni in kubwambwil, ni in kumulik Nzamb, ni akayitil, ni antu akad katumb ka Nzamb, ni antu akata kudiul yom yakin, ni antu akata kujip atatukwau ap amakwau, ni in kujipan,
10 ni in usund, ni in usund wa amakundj, ni in kupit antu akwau, ni in makasu, ni in kutwambilan makasu, ni kusal yom yawonsu yikwau yakad kulondul malejan makin.
11 Malejan minam makat kudiokal ku Rusangu Ruwamp ra uyaj ranginkishau am kudi Nzamb muwamp kuyirumburil antu.
0 Kujikitish mulong wa riy ra Nzamb
12 Namujikitish Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu, ndiy wanginkisha usu wa kusal mudimu. Namujikitish mulong ndiy wanmana am anch niwanyidin, chad wantek ku mudimu wend,
13 ap anch pakur namusaalap nchik masaal ni kumuzengol ni kumudiul. Pakwez Nzamb wangovila riy mulong kinadingap nikwet ritiy, kinijikap kwam yom yinasalanga.
14 Chad Nsalejetu wanganakena kupandakan, wanginkisha ritiy ni rukat yimekena mu Kristu Yesu.
15 Dizu dined didi diakin, difanyidinau antu awonsu kuditiy ni kuditambul anch: "Kristu Yesu weza pa mangand mulong wa kuyipandish akayitil." Am yam mukayitil muyimp kupandakanamu awonsu.
16 Pakwez Nzamb wangovila am riy. Wasala mwamu chakwel Kristu Yesu amekeshin mu am muyimp kupandakan kushimpish kwend kwa muchim kwawonsu. Chawiy mwamu am nikal kal chilik kudi antu akeza kumwitiyij ndiy kurutu ni kutambul mwom wa chikupu.
17 Kudi Mwant wa chikupu, wakad kufang, wakad kumekanang ku mes, ndiy kusu kwend Nzamb, chifanyidin uyaj ni katumb yikala kudi ndiy chikupu mivu ni minang! Amen.
18 Timote, mwanam, am nakwinkish kal ey malejan minam mudi mwadinga mazu ma aruu a Nzamb malondau pakur mulong weyey. Lam mazu minam chakwel ukutwish kurish njit yiwamp,
19 ni kulam ritiy rey nich kom kawamp. Antu amwing alika kubangaku kom kau, chad ritiy rau rajiya.
20 Pakach pa antu inay padi Himeney nend Alekizandre, nayipanyin kal mu makas ma Sakudimban chakwel ayileja kulik kumusaal Nzamb masaal.
0 Malejan ma mutapu wa kwifukwil
1 Chawiy nikat kukushindil anch, in Kristu afanyidin kulembil kudi Nzamb, amwita ndiy yom, ayilembil antu akwau, ni kumujikitsh mulong wa antu awonsu.
2 Chifanyidin ayilembidil ant ni antu awonsu akata kutakel, chakwel tukutwish kushakam zong mu chisambu nich mwom utumbila ni yaku ya zwang.
3 Chinech chawiy chom chiwamp chikata kumusangarish Nzamb Mupandish wetu.
4 Ndiy usotila antu awonsu apanda ni kwijik uyakin.
5 Mulong kudi kusu ching Nzamb umwing, ni mwin kutusankesh etu nend Nzamb udi kusu ching umwing, ndiy kamu Kristu Yesu wikala muntu.
6 Ndiy wipana amwinend mulong wa kuyikwol antu awonsu. Nzamb wijikisha chom chinech kudi antu pa chisu chiwanyidina.
7 Chawiy chom chantekilau am kwikal kambuy wa Yesu, ni kwikal kand mwin kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ra ritiy ni ra uyakin kudi antu a michid yikwau. Nilondil yakin, kinilondilap makasu.
8 Chawiy am nisotil amakundj atumbila alembil mu jindond awonsu, azambwil piur makas mau wakad ujim ap kutadikijan.
9 Nisotil amband niyau adjala maswin mawanyidina nawamp wakad kwishimek. Kangal arijek nswich jau, ap kudjal yileng ya utad wa or, ap usang, ap maswin makweta usey ukash.
10 Pakwez irijek nich yisalijok yiwamp, mudi muchifanyidina kudi amband akata kwijimbul anch, amwitiyijina Nzamb.
11 Pa chisu cha kwilej, amband afanyidin kushakam zong ni kwitudish.
12 Am kinitiyinap amband kulejan ap kwikal in kuyitakel amakundj, chifanyidin awiy ashakam zong.
13 Mulong asambelaku kumutang Adam, chad Ev amutanga kwinyim.
14 Mulong kand nnak kamudimbap Adam, pakwez wamudimba Ev, ndiy kamu wajipa chijil cha Nzamb.
15 Pakwez amband akez kupand mulong wa kuval an, ching anch adandamen kand mu ritiy ni mu rukat, ni mu kwikal nich mwom utumbila ni mu kwipesh.
0 In kutakel a in Chikumbu cha Nzamb
1 Dizu dined didi diakin anch: "Anch muntu usotil kwikal mukurump wa kutakel Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ndiy usotil mudimu uwamp."
2 Chifanyidin mukurump winou kwikal muntu wa yaku ya zwang wakad kumufish nich, ikal mwin mband umwing, kangal wikal mwin ris, ikal mwin kwilam, ikal muntu ulimishinau, ikal mwin kwak aeny, ikal mulej muwamp.
3 Kangal mukurump winou wikal mwin kukwachik mar, ap mwin chisum, pakwez ikal muntu udimukina wakad matend ap ris ra nfalang.
4 Chifanyidin ndiy kulam dijuku diend nawamp, ayilej anend kumuziyil ni kumulimish mu yom yawonsu.
5 Ov, anch muntu katwishilap kulam dijuku diend amwinend, ing, ukutwish nchik kuyilam in Chikumbu cha Nzamb?
6 Kangal ndiy wikal muntu musu mu ritiy, chamwamu ukez kwitutul nich kwibaz, chad akez kumufish nich mudi mwamufishau nich Sakudimban.
7 Chifanyidin ndiy ikala muntu ulimishinau kudi antu akad kwikal in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, chamwamu akez kumufish nich, chad mwamu ukuwa mu mupit wa Sakudimban.
0 In kukwash a Chikumbu cha Nzamb
8 In kukwash a Chikumbu cha Nźamb niyau afanyidin kwikal antu a kashinsh, kangal ikal in ndim jaad, ap in kukwachik maar, ap in ris ra nfalang.
9 Afanyidin kudandamen mu uyakin ujinguninau ku ritiy nich kom kawamp.
10 Chifanyidin ayipaka bil pakusambish, chad anch kayifishilap nich asala lel mudimu wa win kukwash wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
11 Chifanyidin niyau amband ikala a kashinsh akad mboj, kangal ikal in ris, pakwez ikal in yakin mu yom yawonsu.
12 Chifanyidin in kukwash a Chikumbu cha Nzamb kwikal amakundj atina mband umwing, umwing. Afanyidin ikal amakundj ija kulam anau ni majuku mau nawamp.
13 In kukwash anch asal mudimu wau nawamp akwikal nich ndond ya kalimish pakach pa antu, chad akutwish kulond patok wakad wom ya ritiy rikwetau mu Kristu Yesu.
0 Ujindj ujim wa ritiy retu
14 Nikufundidil yom yiney nich ruchingej anch, nikwez kudi ey swa.
15 Pakwez anch am nalab, ey ukutwish kwijik mutapu ufanyidinay muntu kwikal mu chisak cha Nzamb, charumburik anch, in Chikumbu cha Nzamb mwom. Ndiy udi dinguj ni kwa kwikamen kwa uyakin.
16 Chakin, ujindj wa ritiy retu udi ujim nakash: Ndiy wikala nich mujimbu wa muntu, amuyingisha kudi Mwiku Utumbila, aruu a mwiur amumana. Arumburila rusangu rend ku michid yikwau, amwitiyija mu mangand mawonsu, amutwala mwiur nich uyaj.
0 Alej a makasu
1 Mwiku Utumbila ulondil patok anch: "Mu yirung ya kwisudiel antu amwing akez kulik ritiy rau. Akez kuziyil ku miku ya kudimban ni kubangaku malejan ma ayilembil."
2 Malejan minam makez kupalangan ku matungu ma in makasu, osha kal kom kau ayinau.
3 Antu inay akat kuyikangesh antu kwatijan, akat kuyijidik antu kudia yom yimwing. Pakwez Nzamb watanga yom yiney, chakwel in kwitiyij ijika uyakin akutwish kuyidia anch amujikitish bil Nzamb.
4 Mulong yom yawonsu yatangay Nzamb yidi yiwamp, kwikil chom chikulikau, pakwez chifanyidin kutambul yom yawonsu nich kujikitish kudi Nzamb.
5 Chawiy mwamu dizu dia Nzamb ni kulembil yikat kwishitwish yom yiney.
0 Kashalapol muwamp wa Kristu Yesu
6 Anch ey walejan malejan minam kudi anamakwetu in Kristu, ey ukez kwikal kashalapol muwamp wa Kristu Yesu. Mwamu ukez kwidish amwiney nich mazu ma ritiy ni malejan makin miwalondula.
7 Pakwez yishimu ya usup yakad kwilikan nich ritiy, yidjibula. Dandamen kwilej yom ya mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb.
8 Masengan ma mujimbu makwet usey ku chom chimwing, pakwez mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb ukwet usey ku yom yawonsu. Mulong ku mwom winou kudi kushilamu kwa mwom wa katat ni kwa mwom ukeza kwez.
9 Dizu dined didi diakin, difanyidinau antu awonsu kuditambul ni kuditiy.
10 Chinech chawiy chitukata kusadil mudimu ukash ni kurish mulong tumuchingejin Nzamb mwom, ndiy kamu Mupandish wa antu awonsu, kupandakan wa antu amwitiyijina.
11 Yijikisha antu yom yiney ni kuyishinshik.
12 Kangal muntu kukudiul mulong chiudia nsand, pakwez ikal chilik chiwamp kudi in kwitiyij ku kulond kwey, ni ku yisalijok yey, ni ku rukat rey, ni ku ritiy rey, ni ku kwilam kwey zwang.
13 Ipana ku kutang Mukand wa Nzamb pakach pa antu, ni ku kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, ni ku kulejan djat ni pinikweza.
14 Kangal wadiul chiyukish cha kusal nich chidia mu ey, chakwinkishau ku kubwak kwa aruu a Nzamb pakwanzukau makas kudi amakurump.
15 Sal yom yiney nich muchim wey wawonsu, ipanamu nakash chakwel kukul kwey kukumekan ku mes kwa antu awonsu.
16 Babal ey amwiney, babal kand ku malejan mey. Dandamen mu yom yiney, mulong anch ey wasal mwamu ukez kwipandish ey amwiney pamwing nau antu akuteshila.
0 Mutapu wa kuyilam in kwitiyij
1 Kangal wamukand ikundj mukurump kwa kumuswejin, pakwez muleja mudi tatukwey. Yilama ansand mudi anamakwey,
2 yilama amband amakurump mudi amakwey, yilama kand ayangadim mudi anambaz ey, nich muchim wa zwang.
3 Yilimisha adiaafu akad kwa kwikamen.
4 Pakwez mwadiamufu ukweta an ap ijukur, awiy inay afanyidina kwilej pakusambish mutapu wa kumekesh ritiy rau mu dijuku diau. Anch asal mwamu akat kuyikwash anvajau mudi mwayikwashau awiy. Chakin, chom chinech chidi chiwamp ku mes kwa Nzamb.
5 Mwadiamufu udia kamu chakin wakad mwin kumukwash, wamuchingejin kal Nzamb, ukat kudandamen kulembil ni kwit kukwash kwend muten ni uchuku.
6 Pakwez mwadiamufu ukweta ris ra kwisangarish winou wafil kal, ap anch udiap nchik mwom.
7 Yileja yom yiney chakwel kangal muntu waman pa kuyifishin nich.
8 Pakwez anch muntu walik kuyilam anamakwend, kupandakan anch walik kulam dijuku diend dia pa kampwil, muntu mwinou washadishin kal ritiy rend. Ndiy udi muntu muyimp kupandakanamu muntu wakad kwitiyij.
9 Mwadiamufu akumuchindil mu chisak cha adiaafu ching anch ukwet mivu ya kuvadik makum musamban ni kuya piur. Chikwau kand, chifanyidin ndiy kwikal mband watau kudi ikundj umwing,
10 wijau kand anch, wading ni kusal midimu yiwamp. Ufanyidin kwikal mband walila anend nawamp, wading ni kuyak aeny, wading ni kwoyish mend ya antu a Nzamb, wading ni kuyikwash ayimanamar, wading ni kusal midimu yiwamp ya mitapu yawonsu.
11 Kangal wachindil mu chisak cha adiaafu amband akad kal kuwanyish mivu ya kuvadik makum musamban. Mulong anch maku mau ma mujimbu mayibachik ku kwachikiril, chad akat kumwomb Kristu nyim.
12 Mwamu akez kufa nich, mulong ajip kal kushilamu kwau kwa kusambish kwashilaumu nend Kristu.
13 Kupandakan, akat kwikal nich yaku ya kushesh yisu yau, mulong wa kukakat ku chikumbu ni chikumbu. Pakwez chom chiyimp nakash, akat kwikal in mboj, ni kwichik pa milong yayen, ni kulondol yom yakad kufanyin awiy kulond.
14 Chawiy am nisotil adiaafu akad kal kuwanyish mivu makum musamban achika kwau, avala an, alama yikumbu yau nawamp. Mwamu mukankuny kakumanap ndond ya kutulond nayimp.
15 Mulong adiaafu amwing apumbukin kal, asha njil yakin, chad amulondul Sakudimban.
16 Pakwez anch mband umwing mwin kwitiyij ukwet adiaafu mu dijuku diau, chifanyidin ndiy kuyilam, wakad kupan chisend kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb. Chawiy mwamu, in Chikumbu cha Nzamb akutwish kuyilam adiaafu akad kwa kwikamen.
17 In kutakel a Chikumbu cha Nzamb akata kusal mudimu uwamp, amenau anch awanyidin. Inay afanyidin kutambul difut tupamp twaad, kupandakan akata kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ap akata kulejan.
18 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: "Kangal wamukangesh ngomb kudia tidiku pa chisu chikat kumudjatay mulong wa kumuzungul," ulondil kand anch: "Mwin mudimu ufanyidin kutambul difut diend."
19 Kangal wabangaku yom yikumufundau mwin kutakel wa in Chikumbu cha Nzamb, ching anch kudi atuman aad ap asatu.
20 Anch antu akat kusal yitil, yikandila pakach pa antu awonsu chakwel antu akwau akwov wom wa kusal yitil.
21 Nakushindil nakash kurutu kwa Nzamb, ni kwa Kristu Yesu, ni kwa aruu a mwiur atonday Nzamb anch, ziyil ku malejan minam wakad kwikamen ku mutambu umwing ap kwikal nich kasolikany ku yom yawonsu yiukusala.
22 Kangal waswakal kumwanzuk muntu makas mulong wa kumwinkish mudimu wa Nsalejetu. Kangal wamulondulap mwin kusal yitil. Ey amwiney ilama kamu kwey zwang.
23 Kangal kuna ching kusu mem, bwat, pakwez nangap maar ma nviny makemp mulong wa kukwash ditont diey, ni mulong kand wa kuyelol kwey.
24 Yitil ya antu amwing yikat kumekan swa patok pakadiau kal kuyirumburish. Pakwez yitil ya antu akwau yikat kulab pa kumekan.
25 Chawiy chimwing kand, midimu yiwamp yikat kumekan patok, pakwez ap anch kiyidiap nchik patok, kakutwishap kuyijindjik.
1 Chifanyidin aswik awonsu ayilimish ansalejau nakash, chakwel kangal muntu wasaalan masaal ku dijin dia Nzamb ap ku malejan metu.
2 Aswik akweta ansalejau in Kristu, kangal alik kuyilimish mulong awiy adi anamakwau in Kristu. Pakwez ayisadila mudimu uwamp kupandakan, mulong akupitina ku mudimu wau adi anamakwau in Kristu ayikatila.
0 Malejan ma makasu ni mapit makin
0 Yiney yawiy yom yiufanyidina kulejan ni kushindil.
3 Anch muntu walejan malejan makwau makad kwilikan nich mazu makin ma Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu, ni malejan ma mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb,
4 muntu mwinou ukat kwitutul, kijap kwend chom. Udi mwin matend nakash ni ntad. Kwinoku kwawiy kukata kudiokal ris, ni ntad, ni masaal, ni kuyitongil antu akwau yom yiyimp,
5 ni matend makad kupwang ma antu arumbangena akad kwijik uyakin. Awiy akata kutong anch, mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb udi kwau mutapu wa kupit.
6 Chakin, mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb ukat kulet mapit mavud kudi muntu ukata kusangar nich yom yikwetay.
7 Mulong etu kitwaletap chom mu mangand, chawiy chimwing kand, kitukusendap chom.
8 Chawiy chifanyidin etu kusangar anch tukwet yakudia ni yidjal.
9 Pakwez antu asotila kwikal ampich akat kuwa mu yoziu, ni kufa mu mupit wa maku mayimp ma usup, makata kuyishikij antu ku kujiy ni ku kushadik.
10 Mulong rukat ra nfalang diawiy disambishil dia yom yawonsu yiyimp. Pakwandamamu, antu amwing apumbukin kal kulemp ni ritiy rau. Michim yau yikat kutem nich yakamish yivud.
0 Malejan ma amwinend Paul
11 Pakwez ey, muntu wa Nzamb, chin yom yiney yawonsu. Surab kutentam, ni mwom wa kumulondul Nzamb, ni ritiy, ni rukat, ni kudandamen, ni kudimuk.
12 Rish kurish kuwamp kwa ritiy chakwel wez utambul mwom wa chikupu. Wawiy wakutazukinau piwitiyina ku ritiy rey kurutu kwa atuman avud.
13 Kurutu kwa Nzamb ukata kupan mwom ku yom yawonsu, ni kurutu kwa Kristu Yesu, ndiy kamu walejana uman uwamp wa ritiy kurutu kwa Pons Pilat, nakushindil anch,
14 ziyil ku malejan, malama zwang wakad muntu kutwish kumases, djat ni pakuchirikinay Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu.
15 Ndiy ukez kumekan pa chisu chiwanyidina ku ukash wa Nzamb Umwing uyukila, Mwant wa ant, Nsalejau wa ansalejau.
16 Ndiy kusu wa mivu ni minang, ushicha mu chimunyik chakad muntu kutwish kusej piswimp. Kwikil muntu wamumanap kal ku mes ap kwikil muntu ukutwisha kumuman. Chifanyidin katumb kikala kudi ndiy ni dikand dia chikupu! Amen.
17 Yileja ampich a mu mangand minam, kangal ibaz, ap kuchingej mu mapit mau, pakwez amuchingej Nzamb ukata kutwinkish yom yawonsu ya kutusangarish.
18 Yileja asala yom yiwamp, ni kwikal ampich mu midimu yiwamp. Ikala in makas monikina, in kuyikwashap akwau mapit mau.
19 Mwamu akurijek yipau yau yikeza kwikal dishin diwamp ku chirung chikeza kwez. Chawiy mwamu akez kutambul mwom udia wakin.
20 A! Timote, lam bang yom yakwinkishau. Chin misamb yiyimp ni ntad jikat kwelau anch, yidi yom yakin.
21 Mulong antu amwing akata kwitiy yom yiney anch yidi yom ya manangu, chad akat kupumbuk, ashadish ritiy rau. Chifanyidin ranaken ra Nzamb rikala ni yenen awonsu.
1 Yam Paul, nidia kambuy wa Kristu ku rusot ra Nzamb, mudi mudia kushilamu kwa Nzamb kwa kupan mwom mu Kristu Yesu.
2 Nifundil mukand winou kudi ey, Timote, mwanam mukarukat. Nikat kulembil anch, Nzamb Tatuku ni Kristu Yesu Nsalejetu akwinkish ranaken, ni riy, ni chisambu.
0 Paul ukat kumujikitish Nzamb ni kumukasikesh Timote
3 Am nikat kumusadil Nzamb nich kom ka zwang, mudi mwamusadilau anshankuram. Nikat kumujikitish Nzamb pinikata kukuvurik ey muten ni uchuku mu kulembil kwam.
4 Pinikata kuvurik mansoj mey, nikwet impu nakash ya kumanijan ney chakwel nisangar nakash.
5 Nikat kuvurik ritiy rey ra kashinsh. Rawiy ritiy radingay nich ngakey Loyis ni makwey Yunis. Chawiy katat nij anch, niyey ukwet kand ritiy riner.
6 Chawiy chinakuvurisha anch, ikasikesha kulam chiyukish cha kusal nich chakwinkishay Nzamb pinakwanzuka makas.
7 Mulong Nzamb katwinkishap muchim wa kubwatanan, bwat, pakwez watwinkisha Mwiku Utumbila wa ukash, ni rukat, ni mutapu wa kwilam muntu amwinend.
8 Kangal wov usany wa kulejan uman wa Nsalejetu, ap kangal wov usany wamam, mulong nidi muntu wa rukan mulong wa kumwambat Kristu. Chifanyidin niyey umana mar mulong wa kwambat Rusangu Ruwamp mu ruchingej ra usu ukat kukwinkishay Nzamb.
9 Ndiy watupandisha, chad watutazuk kand nich kutazuk kutumbila. Katutazukap mulong wa midimu yitwasala kal, pakwez ku kutenchik kwa ranaken rend amwinend. Ranaken riner ratwinkishinay mu Kristu Yesu kudiokal ku disambishil.
10 Yom yiney Nzamb wayijingunin kal katat kudi etu pamekanay Mupandish wetu Kristu Yesu. Kristu wapwisha ukash wa rufu, chad waleta mwom wakin ni mwom wa chikupu mu Rusangu Ruwamp.
11 Nzamb wanginkisha mudimu wa kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp, wanginkisha kand ukambuy wa Kristu ni ulej.
12 Wawiy mulong unimedina mar. Pakwez kinikwetap usany mulong wa yom yiney, mulong nimwij nawamp unitiyijina, chad nichingejin anch, ndiy ukwet ukash wa kulam yom yawonsu yanginkishay, djat ni ku Dichuku dikez kuyirumburishau antu kudi Nzamb.
13 Lam dang mazu minakuleja, ikasikesha mu ritiy ni mu rukat yitukweta mu Kristu Yesu.
14 Lam nawamp malejan makwinkishinau kudi Mwiku Utumbila ushicha mu etu.
15 Ey wij anch, antu awonsu a mwi ngand ya Aziy angombila kal am nyim, pakach pau padi Fijel nend Herimojen.
16 Nikat kulembil anch, Nsalejetu adiovil dijuku dia Onezifor riy, mulong ndiy wankasikesha tupamp tuvud. Ndiy kovap usany wa jimbwambu jinkasinau am mu rukan.
17 Pa dichuku diashikay mu musumb wa Rom, wankimba nakash djat ni pantanay.
18 Nikat kulembil anch, Nsalejetu ukez kumwovil riy pa Dichuku dikurumburishau antu kudi Nzamb. Ey wij nawamp midimu yawonsu yansadilay ku musumb wa Efes.
0 Isalay wakin wa Kristu Yesu
1 Chawiy ey, mwanam, ikasikesha mu ranaken ridia mu Kristu Yesu.
2 Yom yiwileja kudi am kurutu kwa atuman avud, niyey yilejana kudi amakundj akin akutwisha niyau kuyilejan kudi antu akwau.
3 Chifanyidin niyey kwitiy kuman mar mudi isalay muwamp wa Kristu Yesu.
4 Muntu usadila mudimu wa usalay ukatil kumusangarish mukurump wamwandjika ku mudimu, chawiy ndiy kakubangakup kand milong ya mwom wakad wa usalay.
5 Muntu mwin kubambil mu masengan ma mau ukutwish kutambul difut dia kupandakan ching anch walam yijil ya masengan minam.
6 Mwin kudim wasala mudimu nich usu nakash, chifanyidin ndiy kutambul chikunku cha kusambish cha yakwangul.
7 Tongijok ku yom yinakuleja, mulong Nsalejetu ukez kukwinkish ukash wa kuyonganyin yawonsu.
8 Vurik Yesu Kristu wavumbulau ku rufu wikal kand mwom, ndiy wading wa a majuku ma David, mudi muyidia mu Rusangu Ruwanp rinikulejina.
9 Nimen mar ma kulejan Rusangu Ruwamp, rinkasidinau mu jimbwambu mudi mpopol. Pakwez dizu dia Nzamb kadikasinap mu jimbwambu.
10 Chawiy chinitiyidila mar mawonsu mulong wa antu atonday Nzamb, chakwel niyau atambula dipandish didia mu Yesu Kristu nich uyaj wa chikupu.
11 Dizu dined didi diakin anch: "Anch twafil kal nend, tukez kupand kand nend ndiy.
12 Anch twadandamen kuman nend mar, tukez kuyikel kand pamwing nend ndiy. Anch twamwomb nyim, niyend ukez kutwomb nyim.
13 Anch etu kitudiap in yakin, ndiy udi mwin yakin, mulong ndiy kakutwishap kwitun amwinend."
0 Mwin mudimu witiyinay Nzamb
14 Yivurisha antu awonsu, yishindila kurutu kwa Nzamb chakwel alika kutadikijan mulong wa mazu. Ntad jinej kijikwashilap chom, pakwez jikat kuyiyipish antu akata kujitesh.
