12 Anamakwam in Kristu, chom chijim, kangal wachipilany ku diur, ap ku divu, ap ku chom chikwau cha mitapu yawonsu. Chifanyidin anch walondany anch: "Inge," ikala ching kusu inge, ap anch walondany anch: "Bwat," ikala ching kusu bwat. Chamwamu akez kukufishany nich.
13 Ov, pakach pen padi muntu umena mar? Chifanyidin muntu mwinou alembil. Ov, pakach pen padi muntu wovila musangar? Chifanyidin muntu mwinou awanga miminy ya kumushiman Nzamb.
14 Ov, pakach pen padi muntu uyedila? Chifanyidin muntu mwinou ayitazuk amakurump a Chikumbu cha Nzamb, amulembidil ni kumupan many mu dijin dia Nsalejetu.
15 Kulembil kwinoku anch kwikal kwa ritiy, ukumwok muyej. Nsalejetu ukez kumulangwish, chad anch wasala yitil, akez kumulikishin.
16 Itiyinany yitil yen muntu ni muntu kudi mukwau. Lembilijadilany muntu ni mukwau chakwel akwokany. Kulembil kwa muntu utentamina kukwet ukash wa kusal chom.
17 Elija wading muntu mudi etu. Ndiy walembila nich mushiku chakwel ruvul kangal wanak, chawiy ruvul kanakap mwi ngand yiniya mu mivu yisatu ni angond musamban.
18 Chad ndiy walembila kand kapamp kakwau, ruvul wanaka, chawiy divu diabudisha yakudia.
19 Anamakwam in Kristu, anch muntu umwing wa pakach pen walik uyakin, waya kulemp, chad muntu mukwau wamuchirish,
20 vurikany chom chinech, muntu ukumukarumuna mukayitil kumudiosh mu kurumbuk kwend, ukez kupandish mwom wa mukayitil ku rufu, chad Nzamb ukez kumulikishin miril ya yitil yend.
1 Yam Pita, kambuy wa Yesu Kristu, nifundila mukand winou kudi antu atonday Nzamb, aya mu ukatu, apalangena mu yibar ya ngand ya Pont, ni ya Galatia, ni ya Kapados, ni ya Aziy, ni ya Bitiniy.
2 En akutondany kal pakur mudi mwading rusot ra Nzamb Tatukwetu. Ndiy wakushitwishanya en kudi Mwiku wend Utumbila chakwel umuziyilany Yesu Kristu, ni kwikal antu adia zwang mulong wa mash mend. Nilembidil anch ranaken ni chisambu yivulijan kudi en. Ruchingej ra kashinsh
3 Tumujikitishany Nzamb Tatukwend wa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu! Ku riy rend rijim twavadika kapamp kakwau mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa Yesu Kristu kwikal kand mwom. Mulong wa chom chinech tukwet ruchingej rujim ra kashinsh.
4 Tuchingejin uswan wakad kuvund, ap kuyip, ap kusheshik, ulaminau mwiur kudi Nzamb mulong wenen.
5 En akulaminany km dikand dia Nzamb, mulong wa ritiy ra dipandish dikez Imekeshau pa chisu cha kwisudiel.
6 Sangarany mulong wa yom yiney ap anch wamananyap nchik mar ma mitapu ni mitapu mu chisu chikemp.
7 Chifanyidin mar minam mamekesh anch ritiy ren ridi rakin. Ritiy ren rikwet usey kupandakanamu utad wa or ukutwisha kusheshik. Ap mwamwap nchik, utad wa or akat kupakish mu kasu. Chad kwinyim ritiy ren rikulet kushiman, ni uyaj, ni katumb pa dichuku dikumekanay Yesu Kristu.
8 En umukatilany ndiy wakad kal en kumumananyap ku mes, en umwitiyijinany, ap anch kiumumenanyap. Chawiy en ukat kuzangijalany nich musangar ujim wa uyaj, wakad kutwish kurumburil nich mazu ma antu.
9 En ukat kutambulany difut dia ritiy ren, diawiy dipandish dia mipim yen.
10 Aruu a Nzamb asuraba ni kwipurol mulong wa dipandish dined, awiy abwaka mulong wa ranaken rashilayimu Nzamb kupan kudi en.
11 Awiy akasikesha mulong wa kujingunin chisu ik ni chirung ik chikeza kuwanyin yom yilejenay Mwiku wa Kristu. Mwiku winou wading ushich mu awiy wayilejanga kurutu mar makez kumanay Kristu, ni uyaj ukez kwambakenap.
12 Nzamb wayijingunina aruu end anch kisadidilap ayinau, pakwez akusadilanya en, parurumburilangau rusangu riuteshilanya kudi in kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp ku ukash wa Mwiku Utumbila watumau kudiokal mwiur. Yom yiney niyau aruu a mwiur akat kuyishinshik. Chifanyidin kwikal nich mwom utumbila
13 Tenchikany manangu men mulong wa kusal chom, babalany, chad tekany ruchingej ren rawonsu ku ranaken riukutambulany pakumekanay Yesu Kristu.
14 Ikalany mudi an amuziyidina Nzamb, kangal walondulany maku mayimp ma mujimbu, mudi muwadinganya pakur, piwadinganya kand kal wijikany yom ya Nzamb.
15 Mudi mudiay wakutazukanya utumbil, niyen ikalany atumbila mu yaku yen yawonsu.
16 Mulong afundil mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Ikalany antu atumbila, mulong am nidi utumbila."
17 En ukat kumupilany Nzamb anch: "Tatuku," ndiy kamu ukata kuyirumburish antu awonsu, muntu ni muntu, mudi mudia yisalijok yend wakad kasolikany. Chawiy chisu chawonsu chiudiany pa mangand, mwovany ndiy wom.
18 En wijany anch akukwolanya ku yaku yamwamu yiwaswananya ya anshankuren. Kakukwolanyap nich yom yikata kushadish usey mudi utad wa argent, ap wa or,
19 pakwez en akukwolanya nich mash ma Kristu makweta usey ukash. Ndiy wading mudi mwan a mukoku wa kupesh wakad kapad ap chitaj.
20 Pimadinga mangand kand kal amatang, Nzamb wamutonda Kristu, warijeka kand yom yikez kumanay, chad wamumekesha mu chirung chinech cha kwisudiel mulong wenen.
21 Mu Yesu en umwitiyijinany Nzamb wamuvumbula ndiy mu rufu kwikal kand mwom, wamwinkish uyaj. Chawiy mwamu ritiy ren ni ruchingej ren yawonsu yimutadil Nzamb.
22 Katat mulong en waziyilany kal ku uyakin, wishitwishany kal ayinen, chad ukatijadinany nau anamakwen in Kristu. Chawiy katijanany nich rukat rakin nich michim yen yawonsu.
23 Pakwez en wavadikinany kal asu, kichidiap kudi atatuku akata kufa, pakwez kwi mbut yakad kufang. Wavadikinany ku ranaken ra dizu dia Nzamb dikweta mwom, dishichinga chikupu.
24 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Antu awonsu adi mudi masuku, ni uyaj wau wawonsu udi mudi yisalamb ya mwisuku. Masuku makat kuum, yisalamb yikat kuruk,
25 pakwez dizu dia Nsalejetu dishiching chikupu." Dizu dined rawiy Rusangu Ruwamp rakurumburilanyau en. Nsalejetu udi diyal dikweta mwom
1 Chawiy djibulany rukuny rawonsu, ni kudimban kwawonsu, ni rubabek, ni mukau, ni matungu.
2 Ikalany nich impu yikash ya yom ya Nzamb yidia zwang, mudi an achidia kwamu akweta impu ya mayel, chakwel yikutwish kukukudishany ni kukupandishany.
3 En wamupakinany kal ni kushinshik chakin Nsalejetu udi muwamp.
4 Chawiy sejany kudi Nsalejetu Yesu, ndiy diyal dikweta mwom diadjibulau kudi antu mudi chom chamwamu, pakwez Nzamb waditonda kwikal diyal dia usey ukash.
5 Niyen ikalany mudi mayal makweta mwom, itiyany akutungany nich Chikumbu cha Nzamb chikat kutungay Mwiku Utumbila. Mwinimwa en ukwikalany chisak cha in kupesh akata kulambul mu Yesu Kristu yakupesh yimusangarishina Nzamb ya yom yikat kutekay Mwiku Utumbila mu michim yen.
6 Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: "Talany, natek kal mu Sion diyal dijim dia pa dikonk dinatonda dia usey ukash. Muntu mwawonsu ukumwitiyija ndiy kakez kwovap usany."
7 Kudi en umwitiyijinanya ndiy, chakin, ndiy ukwet usey ukash. Pakwez kudi awiy akad kumwitiyij, mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Diyal diadjibulau in kutung mudi chom chamwamu, komb diawiy dikala kal diyal dia usey dia pa dikonk."
8 Afundil kand mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Dined diawiy diyal dikata kuyipwakesh antu, diawiy dikata kuyiwish." Awiy awa mulong alika kwitiy dizu dia Nzamb. Mwamu mwayitenchikinau kudi Nzamb.
9 Pakwez en udiany muchid watonday Nzamb, udiany chisak cha in kupesh a Mwant Nzamb, udiany muchid utumbila, udiany kand antu a Nzamb a pa kampwil. Ndiy wakutondanya en chakwel ukutwishany kurumburil yisalijok yikwamushena ya Nzamb, ndiy kamu wakutazukanya en kudiokal mu mididim, wandamany mu chimunyik chend chikwamushena.
10 Pakur en wadiany antu amwamu, pakwez katat en udiany antu a Nzamb. Pakur en kiwijikanyap riy ra Nzamb, pakwez katat Nzamb wakwovilany kal riy. Ikalany atushalapol a Nzamb
11 Akarukat, en udianya mudi angez ap mudi aeny mu mangand minam, nikat kukushindilany anch, likany maku men mayimp ma mujimbu makata kurish njit ni mupim.
12 Ikalany nich yaku yiwamp pakach pa antu a michid yikwau, chakwel pakez kukufundanyau anch udiany antu ayimp, awiy ayinau akez kuman yisalijok yen yiwamp, chad akumushiman Nzamb pa Dichuku dikwezay ni kuyirumburish antu.
13 Ziyilany kudi in kutakel awonsu a antu, mulong wa kumwambat Nsalejetu. Ziyilany kudi mwant mujim wa ngand,
14 ni kudi anyikel atuminay mulong wa kuyilej antu asadila nayimp kadimu, ni mulong wa kuyibaz antu asadila nawamp.
15 Mulong Nzamb ukatil en usalany yisalijok yiwamp ya kunenetish nich mazu mamwamu ma antu ayisup.
16 Ikalany nich mwom wa mutapu wa antu akwodilau kal, chawiy kangal wasadilany want ipen wen kwikal chom cha kujindjik nich kuyip kwen, pakwez ipanany kamu kwikal atushalapol a Nzamb.
17 Yilimishany antu awonsu, yikatany anamakwen in Kristu, mwovany Nzamb wom, mulimishany kand mwant mujim wa ngand. Mu mar tumwilakej Kristu
18 En udiany atushalapol, yiziyilany ansalejen ni kuyilimish mudi muchifanyidina. Salany mwamu kudi ansalejen adimukina ni adia awamp, pakwez salany kand mwamu kudi ansalejen isumina.
19 Pakwez chidi kwau chiwamp kwitiy kuman mar ma yom yiwakad kufany nich anch en wasalany mwamu mulong wa kumuziyil Nzamb.
20 Ov, chom ik chikukukwashanya anch akubulany mulong wa yom yiyimp yiwasalangany? Pakwez anch en wasalany yom yiwamp, akumeshany mar, chad en washimpishany muchim, chinech chidi chom chiwamp ku mes kwa Nzamb.
21 Chawiy chom chinech chakutazukinanyau kudi Nzamb, mulong Kristu amwinend wamana mar mulong wa kukwambatany en. Ndiy wakushilanya chilikej chakwel ulondulany yom yasalay.
22 Ndiy kasalap chitil, mu kan mwend kadimbanap.
23 Pamusaalau masaal, ndiy kayichirishinap. Pamumeshau mar, ndiy kayifunyinap amumesha mar, pakwez ndiy wamuchingeja Nzamb Nkalansambu utentamina.
24 Kristu amwinend wasenda yitil yetu mu mujimbu wend pa mutond uchikakena, chakwel kwovijan kwetu ni yitil kukufa, chad etu tukupand twikal nich mwom utentamina. En wayerikinany kal mulong chamutapolau ndiy yitat wakwambatany en.
25 En wadiany mudi amikoku ashadikina kal, pakwez katat Nzamb wakuchirishinany kal chakwel umulondulany Kafung, ndiy kand Kalam wa mipim yen. Kushakam kwa mband ni ikundj mu uruu
1 Chawiy chimwing niyen amband, yiziyilany anfumwen, ap anch amwing a pakach pau kitiyinap nchik dizu dia Nzamb, ukutwishany kuyipwitany ku ritiy pakumanau yisalijok yen yiwamp. En kiukwikalanyap nich kuswir kwa kulond dizu,
2 mulong awiy akez kuman yaku yen ya zwang ni kalimish ken.
3 Kangal wapandakeshany kwiriyek nich nswich, ap nich yileng ya usey ukash, ap nich maswin ma usey ukash.
4 Pakwez ufun wen wikal wa mukach mwa muchim, wawiy ufun wakad kusikang pasutap nchik mivu. Wawiy muchim udimukina wa kwitudish, muchim winou ukwet usey upandakena kujimb kurutu kwa Nzamb.
5 Mwamu amband a pakur ading atumbila, amuchingejanga Nzamb, iriyekanga, chad kand ading ayiziyidil anfumwau.
6 Mwamu mwadingay Sar, ndiy wamuziyila Aburaham, wamutazukanga anch: "Nsalejam." Katat en udiany anend amband, anch wasalany yom yitentamina, wakad kwov wom wa chom ap kusu chimwing.
7 Chawiy chimwing niyen amakundj, shakamany nawamp nau akajen, yilimishany mulong awiy kakwetap usu mudi amakundj. Yilimishany kand mulong niyau adi answan a mwom pamwing ni yenen. Salany mwamu chakwel kangal kwikal chom cha kukangesh kulembil kwen. Kuman mar mulong wa kusal yom yitentamina
8 Chom cha kwisudiel, en awonsu ikalany nich chitongijok chimwing, bombakanany mu kuwap ap mu mar, katijanany mudi an a divumu dimwing. Ikalany in kudimuk ni in kwitudish. ·
9 Kangal wafundakeshany kuyip ku kuyip, ap masaal ku masaal, pakwez yiyukishany akusadilanya nayimp, mulong chawiy chom chakutazukinanyau kudi Nzamb chakwel niyen ukutambulany chiyukish.
10 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Muntu mwawonsu ukatila kusanger mwom uwamp, ni kwikal nich machuku mawamp, chifanyidin ndiy kulik kulond nayimp, ap kudimban makasu.
11 Chifanyidin ndiy kukarumuk kudiokal ku kuyip, chad asala yom yitentamina, adandamen kand kusurab chisambu.
12 Mulong mes ma Nsalejetu mayitadil in kutentam, ni matu mend makat kutesh kulembil kwau. Pakwez Nsalejetu ukat kuyipompat in kusal nayimp."
13 Ov, nany ukukumeshany mar anch en ukwetany mushiku wa kusal yom yitentamina?
14 Pakwez anch akumeshanyap nchik en mar mulong wa kutentam, wayukany kwen! Kangal wayovany wom, ap kwiyakamish.
15 Pakwez mutumbishany Kristu mu michim yen, ndiy kwend Nsalejen. Machuku mawonsu ikalany awanyidina kumwakul muntu mwawonsu ukukwipulany kurumburil mulong wa ruchingej riukwetany mu michim yen.
16 Chawiy salany mwamu nich kudimuk ni kalimish. Lamany kom ken kadia zwang, chakwel awonsu akukutungunany matungu ni kukusalany masaal mulong wa yaku yen yiwamp ya win Kristu, akwov usany wa mazu mau.
17 Mulong anch ridi rusot ra Nzamb, chidi chom chiwamp anch akumeshany mar mulong wa kusal yom yitentamina, kupandakan anch akumeshany mar mulong wa kusal yom yiyimp.
18 Mulong Kristu wafa mulong wa yitil ya antu, ndiy kamu muntu utentamina wafa kapamp kamwing wakad kand kuswir kwa kufa kapamp kakwau mulong wa akayitil, chakwel atushikij kudi Nzamb. Antu ajipa mujimbu wend wa mbij, pakwez Nzamb wamupandisha mu mwiku wend.
19 Chawiy ku Mwiku winou ndiy waya ni kurumburil Rusangu Ruwamp kudi afu ashicha mwi ndond ya afu.
20 Charumburik anch, afu inay pakur kamuziyilap Nzamb pa chisu chachingelay nich muchim ushimpila mu chirung cha Nowa, papampay waat ujim. Mu waat winiwa mwandama chisak chikemp cha antu chinan, awiy kusu apanda pasutau pa mabeb ma mem.
21 Mem minam chidi chijingidij cha dibatish dikata kukupandishany en katat. Dibatish dined kididiap mulong wa kwoyish majir ma mujimbu, pakwez didi mulong wa kwit kudi Nzamb kom kadia zwang. Nzamb ukat kukupandishany mulong wa kuvumbuk kwa Yesu Kristu wikala kand mwom.
22 Ndiy waya mwiur, ushich ku chikas cha katatuku cha Nzamb, ndiy kand uyiyikedila aruu a mwiur awonsu, ni in ulabu, ni in ukash awonsu a mwiur. Mwom usu
1 Chawiy mulong Kristu wamana mar ku mujimbu, chifanyidin niyen wikasikeshany kwikal nich chitongijok cha mutapu umwing mudi chendendiy. Mulong muntu mwawonsu ukata kuman mar ku mujimbu wadiokal kal ku yitil.
2 Kudiokal katat djat ni kwisudiel kwa machuku mend makushakamay pa mangand, ndiy ufanyidin kusadil rusot ra Nzamb, wakad kusadil kand maku mayimp ma wuntu.
3 En wawanyishinany kal chisu cha kusal yitil mudi mukat kusalau antu a michid yikwau. Wasalany kal usund, walondulanya maku mayimp ma mujimbu, wapandakeshany kukwachik ku maar, wibombany mu yisak ya kuna maar, chad wasalany yitil ya usany, chad wifukwilany kand akish atakanena.
4 Katat antu a michid yikwau akat kushimwok mulong en kiwibombilanyap kand nau kusal yom yipandakena kuyip, chawiy mwamu akat kukusaalany masaal.
5 Pakwez awiy akez kwilondilap ayinau kudi Nzamb mulong wa yaku yau. Ndiy ukez kuyirumburish aom ni afu wakad kulab.
6 Mulong wa chom chinech, chawiy chalejenay Kristu Rusangu Ruwamp kudi afu, chakwel anch ayirumburishap nchik padingau aom mudi mukat kuyirumburishau antu awonsu, awiy akutwish kwikal aom mu Mwiku Utumbila mudi mudiay Nzamb mwom. Kulam nawamp yiyukish ya kusal nich yikat kupanay Nzamb
7 Disudiel dia yom yawonsu didi piswimp, chawiy ilamany ayinen, babalany, chakwel ukutwishany kulembil.
8 Kupandakan yom yawonsu, dandamenany nich rukat, mulong anch wakatijanany ukulikany kusal yitil kudi muntu ni muntu.
9 Akijanany amwing ni akwau wakad kwinan.
10 Muntu mwawonsu wa pakach pen watambula kudi Nzamb yiyukish ya kusal nich, chawiy chifanyidin muntu ni muntu kusadil yiyukish yiney mulong wa kukwashijan nich.
11 Muntu mwawonsu watambula dizu diwamp dia kulond, arumburil kwend mazu ma Nzamb. Niyend watambula mutapu wa kusal mudimu wa kukwashan, asala nich usu umwinkishinau kudi Nzamb, chakwel mu yom yawonsu antu akumushiman Nzamb mu Yesu Kristu, ndiy mwin uyaj ni mwin kuyikel wa mivu ni minang. Amen. Mar makat kumanau in Kristu
12 Akarukat, kangal wamanany anch chidi chom cheny cha kushimwok pakupakau ritiy ren mu ruteng ra kasu, mudi mukat kupakau utad wa or.
13 Pakwez sangarany mulong en ukat kumanany mar mudi mwamanay Kristu mar, chakwel en ukutwishany kuzangijal ni kusangar pakumekeshau uyaj wend.
14 Wayukany kwen pakukusaalolanyau masaal mulong wa dijin dia Kristu, mulong Mwiku wa uyaj, ndiy Mwiku wa Nzamb ushich mu en.
15 Pakwez anch muntu umwing wa pakach penen waman mar, kichifanyidinap mikal mar mulong udi mwin kujipan, ap mwij, ap mwin kusal nayimp, ap mwin kwichik pa milong yayen.
16 Anch umwing wa pakach penen waman mar mulong udi mwin Kristu, kangal wov usany, pakwez chifanyidin amushiman Nzamb ku dijin dined.
17 Chisu chashik kal chikuyirumburishau antu kudi Nzamb, pakusambish ukuyirumburish antu a chikumbu chend. Chawiy anch waturumburish etu pakusambish, ov, disudiel dia antu akad kwitiyij Rusangu Ruwamp ra Nzamb dikwikal nchik?
18 Mudi mufundilau mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch: "Anch antu atentamina ayipandish kwa mar makash, ov, chikwikal nchik kudi akayitil in kumubwambwil Nzamb?"
19 Chawiy anch antu akat kuman mar mudi mudia rusot ra Nzamb, chifanyidin awiy asala yom yitentamina ni kwipan ayinau kudi Sakatang, Mwin Yakin. Yisak ya amikoku a Nzamb
1 Chawiy katat nikat kuyishindil amakurump a Chikumbu cha Nzamb adia pakach pen. Niyam nidi mukurump, nidi kand kaman wa mar mamanay Kristu, chad nikez kuswan uyaj ukez kujinguninau.
2 Yilamany yisak ya amikoku a Nzamb akwinkishanyau, kangal wasalany mulong wakukushindilany, pakwez salany mudi mudia rusot ra Nzamb. Kangal wasalany kusu mulong wa kupit nfalang, pakwez salany nich mushiku.
3 Kangal wayikelany nich usu antu iulaminanya, pakwez ikalany chilik chiwamp kudi yisak ya amikoku a Nzamb.
4 Chad pakez kumekanay Mwant wa Atufung, en ukez kutambulany chibangul cha uyaj chakad kusikang.
5 Chawiy chimwing kand, niyen ansangarum, yiziyilany amakurump. En awonsu, djalany kwitudish, mulong Mukand wa Nzamb ulondil anch: "Nzamb uyipompatin in kwibaz, pakwez ukat kuyanaken in kwitudish."
6 Itudishany kwishin kwa chikas cha dikand cha Nzamb, chakwel ndiy ukukuzambulany pa chisu chatenchikay.
7 Letany yakamish yen yawonsu kudi ndiy, mulong ukat kukulamany.
8 Ilamany ayinen, babalany! Mukankuny nen, Sakudimban, ukat kuzomb mudi ntamb wonyina ukata kukimb nany ukudiay.
9 Imanany dang mu ritiy, rishany nend, ijikany anch anamakwen in Kristu apalangena mu mangand akat kuman kand niyau mar ma mutapu umwing.
10 Pakwez piukumananya mar chisu chikemp, Nzamb wa ranaken rawonsu, wakutazukanya kwandam mu uyaj wa chikupu wa Kristu, ukez kukupizurishany, ni kukukasikeshany, ni kukwimikany dang.
11 Kudi Nzamb kwikala kuyikel kwa mivu ni minang! Amen. Kulangwish kwa Pita kwa kwisudiel
12 Silas wankwash kal kukufundilany mukand winou wiswimp. Ndiy udi mwanamakwam mwin Kristu wakin, nimuchingejin. Nisotil kukukasikeshany ni kukulejany uman wamam anch, riner rawiy ranaken rakin ra Nzamb. Imanany dang mu ranaken riner.
13 In Chikumbu cha Nzamb a mu Babilon, atonday Nzamb mudi en, akulangwishany, pamwing ni Marko, mwanam ikundj mu ritiy.
14 Langwishijanany muntu ni mukwau nich kususujan kwa rukat. Nikat kulembil anch, chisambu chikal ni yenen awonsu udiany mu Kristu!
1 Yam Simon Pita, kashalapol ni kambuy wa Yesu Kristu, nifundila mukand winou kudi antu atambula kal ritiy ra usey ukash mudi retwetu, mulong wa kutentam kwa Nzamb ni kwa Mupandish wetu Yesu Kristu.
2 Nikat kulembil anch, ranaken ni chisambu yivulijan kudi en mulong umwonganyinany Nzamb ni Nsalejetu Yesu. Nzamb ukat kutond antu ni kuyitazuk
3 Nzamb, ku ukash wend wa wiNzamb, watwinkisha yom yawonsu yituswiridina chakwel twikala nich mwom utumbila. Ndiy watwijikishay, watutazuka kwandam mu uyaj ni mu kuwap kwend.
4 Mulong wa yom yiney ndiy watwinkisha kushilamu kwend kujim nakash kwa usey ukash. Ku kushilamu kwinoku ukutwishany kwiyep kuyip kudia mu mangand kudiokila ku maku mayimp ma mujimbu, chad mwamu en ukutwishany kwandam mu wiNzamb wend.
5 Mulong wa chom chinech, ikasikeshany chakwel uwejanyaku ku ritiy ren yaku yidia zwang, ni ku yaku yidia zwang uwejanyaku ronganyin,
6 ni ku ronganyin uwejanyaku mutapu wa kwilam ayinen, ni ku mutapu wa kwilam ayinen uwejanyaku kudandamen, ni ku kudandamen uwejanyaku mwom utumbila.
7 Chad ku mwom wen utumbila uwejanyaku rukat ra anamakwen in Kristu, ni ku rukat riner uwejanyaku kand rukat ra antu awonsu.
8 En umwonganyidinanya Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu anch ukwetany yom yiney yivud yikukukwashany kusal mudimu wa Nzamb wakad usweral.
9 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu wakad kwikal nich yom yiney yawonsu kamenap kwend kulemp, udi mudi mputames. Ndiy wavuramena kal anch, amwishitwisha kal ku yitil yend ya pakur.
10 Chawiy anamakwam in Kristu, wejanyaku mushiku wen nakash, chakwel ukushinshikany nawamp kutazuk kwakutazukanyau ni kutond kwakutondanyau kudi Nzamb. Anch wasalany mwamu kiukez kuwanyap mu yitil.
11 Chad akez kukwakany nawamp mu Want wa chikupu wa Nsalejetu, ndiy kamu Mupandish wetu Yesu Kristu.
12 Ap anch wijanyap nchik yom yiney, ap anch wiminyanyap nchik dang mu uyakin watambulanya, am nikez kudandamen kukuvurishany kand machuku mawonsu.
13 Pakwez nitongil anch, pinichidia kamu mwom panap pansh, chidi chom chiwamp kukubabeshangany nich yivurikish yiney.
14 Nij nawamp anch, katat nidi piswimp ni kudjol mujimbu wam wa mbij, mudi mwingijikishinau kudi Nsalejam Yesu Kristu.
15 Nikasikeshin kukulejany yom yiney, chakwel pinikudiokala en ukutwishany kuvurikangany yom yiney machuku mawonsu. Atuman a uyaj wa Kristu 18
16 Etu kitwalondulap yishimu yatenchikau antu pitwakulejanya rusangu ra kushik kwa Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu nich dikand. Pakwez etu tudi atuman akin a katumb kend.
17 Mulong ndiy watambula katumb ni uyaj kudi Nzamb Tatuku, pidiashika dizu diadiokala ku Uyaj wa Katumb wa Nzamb, dialonda anch: "Winou ndiy Mwanam ukatishena, am nikat kusangar mulong wendendiy!"
18 Etu ayinetu twatesha dizu dined pidiadiokala mwiur, chisu chitwadinga nend ndiy pa mukandu utumbila.
19 Katat etu tushinshikin nakash anch, mazu malejanau aruu a Nzamb madi kamu makin. Chifanyidin en ubabalany ku mazu minam mudi muukata kubabalany ku chimunyik chikata kumunyik mwi ndond ya mididim, djat ni pa Dichuku dikurumburishau antu kudi Nzamb, chad Kristu ukez kumunyik mu michim yen mudi mwizikuch.
20 Chom chijim, ijikany nawamp anch kwikil kubwak kwa mu Mukand wa Nzamb kudiokila ku yitongijok ya muntu amwinend.
21 Mulong kwikil kubwak kwadiokala kusu ku rusot ra muntu, pakwez aruu a Nzamb alondanga mazu madiokalanga kudi Nzamb payitakelangau kudi Mwiku Utumbila. Alej a makasu
1 Pasak kwamekana alej a makasu pakach pa antu, mudi mukez kumekanau kand pakach penen. Awiy akez ķusambish mu ujindj malejan ma makasu ma kusheshan, akez kumwitun Nsalejau wayikwola, mwamu mukez kwijiyishau ayinau kwakad kulab.
2 Antu avud akez kulondul yaku yau ya usund, chad mulong wa yisalijok yau antu akwau akez kudiwol njil ya uyakin.
3 Mulong wa ris rau ra kupit, akez kukwiyany nfalang pakukulejanyau yishimu ya makasu yirijekinau ayinau. Kudiokal pakur ayifish kal nich, Mwin Kuyishesh kakulabap mudi muntu ulela tul!
4 Nzamb kayovilap aruu a mwiur riy pasalau yitil, pakwez ndiy wayidjibwila mu Dijiy dia Kasu mushichau akukas mu mididim, mulong wa kuchingel Dichuku dia Dirumburish.
5 Nzamb kayovilap antu a pakur riy, pasheshay mangand ma in kumubwambwil nich mabeb ma mem, pakwez ndiy wamupandisha Nowa mwin kurumburil yom yitentamina, pamwing nau antu akwau sambwad.
6 Nzamb wayifisha nich in musumb wa Sodom ni wa Gomor payoshay shat nich kasu, mulong wa kulejan chilik chikeza kushik kudi antu in kumubwambwil ndiy,
7 pakwez ndiy wamukamunina Lot, muntu utentamina, wanenganananga mulong wa usund wa antu ayimp.
8 Pichuku pichuku muntu mwinou utentamina wanenganananga mu muchim wend, mulong wa yisalijok ya antu inay yamanangay ni yateshangay.
9 Anch chidi mwamu, komb Nsalejetu Nzamb wij mutapu wa kuyikamunin mu mar antwend atumbila, ni kuyilamin antu ayimp Dichuku diau dia Dirumburish dia kuyilej kadimu.
10 Kupandakan, ukez kulejan kadimu kudi antu akata kulondul maku mayimp ma mijimbu yau ayinau ni kubwambwil ku ulabu wa Nzamb. Alej inay a makasu inakulejinanya adi in dichim, akat kwibaz, kayilimishinap in uyaj a mwiur, pakwez akat kuyisaal masaal.
11 Chawiy aruu a mwiur, ap anch akwetap nchik usu ni ukash kuyipandakanamu alej a makasu, awiy kafundenap nich masaal aruu akwau awa kal, payifundilau kurutu kwa Nsalejetu.
12 Pakwez alej inay akat kulondul yaku ya wuntu, mudi annam a mwisuku atangau mulong wa kuyikwat ni kuyijip. Akat kusaalan masaal ku yom yawonsu yakadau kwijik. Akez kuyishesh kand mudi annam a mwisuku.
13 Akez kuyifundakeshin kuyip mudi kuyip kwasalangau. Akat kwisangarish nich maku mayimp ma mujimbu, makat kusadilau patok mukach mwa muten. Awiy adi in kukwatishan usany ni dises pakat kusalau yom yiney pa chisu chiukat kudiany nau yakudia ya misambu.
14 Mes mau mizwil sens nich upwepu, kakat kuziyap kwau kusal yitil. Akat kuyoz antu aziyila, akat kwijidish kand michim yau nich ris ra mapit. Awiy akwet riyind kudi Nzamb.
15 Alika kwau njil yitentamina, chad apumbuk, alondul yaku ya Balam, mwan ikundj wa Beyor, wakata kupitil mu kuyip.
16 Pakwez amupupa kudi chimbur mulong wa kuyip kwend. Nnam wakad kulondang walonda nich dizu dia muntu, mwamu mwakangeshay usup wa muruu wa Nzamb.
17 Antu inay adi mudi misul yauma kal mem, adi kand mudi madj makat kupwepulau kudi rinkind. Nzamb uyilamidin ndond ya mididim yipandakena kujal.
18 Awiy akat kulond yom yamwamu ya kwibaz. Akat kuta mupit nich maku mayimp ma mujimbu mulong wa kuyikwat antu asambisha kal kwiyiyep in kushakam mu kurumbuk.
19 Awiy akat kushilamu kuyinkish antu want ipau, pakwez ayinau adi aswik a yaku yikeza kuyishesh. Mulong muntu ni muntu udi muswik wa chom chamuyikela kal.
20 Anch antu iyepina kal ku yaku yiyimp ya mangand mulong amwijikin kal Nsalejetu, ndiy kamu Mupandish wetu Yesu Kristu, chad anch yaku ya mangand yayikwat kand ni kuyipandakan, kwisudiel mulong wau ukwikal uyimp kupandakan wa kusambish.
21 Chela kwikal chiwamp anch kijikap kwau njil yitentamina, kupandakan kuyijik njil yiney, chad awiy omb nyim ku malejan matumbila mayilejau.
22 Yom yayishikena yimekeshin patok yom yafundau mu jinswir anch: "Kabu ukat kuchirikin ku yirik yend." Chikwau kand anch: "Chibond woyishangau kal ukat kuchirik kand kakwau kwisamp mu yisampisamp.' Kushilamu kwa kuchirik kwa Nsalejetu
1 Arund nam, winou wawiy mukand wa kaad unikufundidilanya. Mu mikand yiney yawonsu yaad nikuvurishinany chakwel wikalany nich mutapu uwamp wa kutong.
2 Nisotil ing wavurikangany mazu malondau pasak kudi aruu a Nzamb atumbila, ni chijil chapanay Nsalejetu, ndiy kamu Mupandish wetu chakulejanyau en kudi atwimbuy end.
3 Chom cha kusambish, ijikany anch mu machuku ma kwisudiel kukez kumekan in kukudiwolany en, awiy adi antu atakedilau kudi maku mau mayimp ma mujimbu.
4 Chad akez kwipul anch: "Ndiy washilamu kuchirik, ov, kimwawiyap? Ov, katat udi kwisu? Kudiokal pafilau angaketu, yom yawonsu yidi kwau mudi muyading kudiokal patangau mangand!"
5 Awiy akatil kuvuramen anch, pakur ku dizu dia Nzamb maur mamekana, ni divu adidiosha ku mem, adiumba kand nich mem.
6 Ku mem kand, ku mabeb majim, mawiy majiyisha mangand ma pakur.
7 Chawiy maur ni divu, mangand ma katat, ayilamidin kand ku dizu dia Nzamb chakwel yez yisheshik nich kasu. Ayilamin mulong wa kuchingel Dichuku dikurumburishay Nzamb ni kuyishesh antu amubwambwidila ndiy.
8 Pakwez arund nam, kangal wavuramenany chom chinech chimwing! Kudi Nsalejetu Nzamb dichuku dimwing didi mudi mivu kanan, chad mivu kanan yidi mudi dichuku dimwing.
9 Nsalejetu kalabilap mulong wa kuwanyish kushilamu kwend mudi mukat kutongau antu amwing. Ndiy ukat kukushimpishinany muchim, mulong ndiy kasotilap muntu ap umwing kusheshik, pakwez usotil antu awonsu kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yau.
10 Pakwez Dichuku dikez kurumburishay Chinawej dikez kuyikashimwish antu mudi mukat kwezay mwij. Pa Dichuku dinidia maur makez kushadik nich chidjimin chijim cha wom. Yom yawonsu ya mwiur yikweta yimunyik yikez kwengurik nich kasu, chad divu ni yom yawonsu yidiamu yikez kutem.
11 Mulong yom yiney yawonsu yikez kusheshik mutapu winou, ov, en ukwikalany antu a mutapu ik? Chifanyidin en kwikalany nich mwom utumbila, wikalany kand in kudandamen kudi Nzamb,
12 piuchingedilany Dichuku dikurumburishay Nzamb. Chifanyidin en usalany usu chakwel Dichuku dined dishika swa. Dichuku dinidia diawiy dikeza kutem maur, ni yom yawonsu ya mwiur yikweta yimunyik yikez kwengurik nich kasu.
13 Pakwez etu tukat kuchingej maur masu ni mangand masu mudi mwashilayimu Nzamb. Chad kwinikwa kwawiy kukeza kwikal kutentam.
14 Chawiy, arund nam, piuchingedilany Dichuku dined, salany usu wa kwikal zwang wakad kufa nich kurutu kwa Nzamb, ikalany nich chisambu pakach penen nend ndiy.
15 Ijikany kushimpish kwa muchim kwa Nsalejetu chidi mulong wa kuyipandish antu, mudi mwakufundilanyau kudi murund netu Paul nich manangu mamwinkishau kudi Nzamb.
16 Mwamu mulondilay mu mikand yend yawonsu, pafunday mulong wa chom chinech. Mu mikand yend mudi yom yimwing yikasiken kwov kurumburik, chad antu akad kwijik chom ni in kuyipish akat kuyipish yom yiney, mudi mukat kuyipishau kand yom yikwau ya mu Mikand ya Nzamb. Mwamu mukat kwisarumwinau ayinau kusheshik kwau.
17 Arund nam, en wijikinany kal yom yiney, chawiy babalany, kangal akupumbulany nich kanrumbangesh ka antu ayimp, chakwel ushadishany ndond yen yiwiminyanya dang.
18 Pakwez dandamenany kuya kurutu mu ranaken ni mu kumwijik kand Nsalejetu, ndiy kamu Mupandish wetu Yesu Kristu. Chifanyidin antu apana uyaj kudi ndiy katat ni chikupu. Amen.
0 Dizu dia mwom
1 Tukufundidilany mulong wa Dizu dia mwom diadingaku kudiokal ku disambishil dia yom yawonsu. Etu twaditesha, twadimana nich mes metu, twaditala, chad twadikwata kand nich makas metu.
2 Piwamekana mwom winou, etu twaumana, tulejen kand uman wa chom chinech, chawiy turumburila kudi en mulong wa mwom wa chikupu wadinga kudi Nzamb Tatuku, wawiy kand wamekeshay kudi etu.
3 Chom chitwamana ni chitwatesha chawiy tukurumburidilany niyen chakwel wikalany mu umwing ni yetwetu, mulong etu tudi mu umwing nend Nzamb Tatuku ni Mwanend Yesu Kristu.
4 Tukufundidilany chom chinech chakwel musangar wetu ukwikal uwanyidina. Nzamb udi kutok
5 Riner rawiy rusangu ritwatesha kudi Yesu Kristu, rawiy kand riturumburila kudi en anch, Nzamb udi kutok, mwi ndiy mwikiling mididim ap kusu pakemp.
6 Anch twafa mu kan twalond anch, tudi nend ndiy mu umwing, chad etu tukat kwendilang kand mu yaku ya mididim, tukat kulond makasu, kitukat kusalap uyakin.
7 Pakwez anch twendil mu yaku ya kutok mudi mudiay Nzamb amwinend mu kutok, chad tudi mu umwing nau akwetu, muntu ni mukwau, chawiy mash ma rufu ra Mwanend Yesu matutokisha ku yitil yetu yawonsu.
8 Anch twalond anch, kitudiap akayitil, tukat kwidimb ayinetu, kitukwetap uyakin wa Nzamb mu michim yetu.
9 Pakwez anch twitiyin yitil yetu kudi Nzamb, ndiy utentamina, ukuwanyish kushilamu kwend, chawiy ndiy ukutulikishin yitil yetu, chad ukutokish kand michim yetu ku kuyip kwawonsu.
10 Anch twafa mu kan, twalond anch kand kal tusalap yitil, mwamu tukat kumumekesh ndiy anch udi mwin makasu, chawiy mazu mend kimashichap mu michim yetu. Kristu ndiy mwin kutukwash
1 Anam, akarukat mu Yesu, nikufundidilany yom yiney chakwel kangal wez wasalany yitil. Pakwez anch muntu wasal chitil tukwet kal mwin kutulondilap, ndiy kamu Yesu Kristu, utentamina, udia piswimp nend Tatuku Nzamb.
2 Mulong Yesu Kristu udi yakupesh ya kulikishin yitil yetu yawonsu. Chawiy kiyidiap kusu yitil yetwetu ayinetu, pakwez ukulikishin kand yitil ya antu awonsu a pa mangand.
3 Anch twaziyil ku yijil ya Nzamb, mwamu tukutwish kushinshik anch tumwij Nzamb.
4 Anch muntu walond anch: "Nimwij Nzamb," pakwez ndiy walik kuziyil ku yijil yend, muntu mwinou udi mwin makasu, kakwetap uyakin mu muchim wend.
5 Pakwez anch muntu waziyil ku mazu ma Nzamb, chakin rukat ra Nzamb ruwanyidin mu muchim wend. Mulong wa chom chinech tukutwish kushinshik anch tubombaken nend Yesu mu umwing.
6 Muntu mwawonsu ukulonda anch, nibombaken nend ndiy, chifanyidin muntu mwinou kwikal nich yaku ya mutapu umwing mudi yakwetingay Yesu. Chijil chisu
7 Arund nam, kinikufundidilanyap chijil chisu, pakwez chidi chijil chikur chiwateshanya kal kudiokal ku disambishil. Chijil chinech chikur ridi rusangu riwateshanya kal pakur.
8 Pakwez chidi chijil chisu chinikufundidilanya. Uyakin wa chijil chinech umekedin mu mwom wa Kristu ni mu mwom wenen, mulong chirung cha mididim chiyil ni kupwa, chad kutok kwakin kwasambishang kal kumunyik.
9 Muntu ukata kufa mu kan walond anch: "Am nishich mu kutok," chad ndiy umukisin mwanamakwend mwin Kristu, muntu mwinou uchidi kand kwend mu mididim ni katat.
10 Muntu umukatila mwanamakwend mwin Kristu, muntu mwinou ushich mu kutok, chawiy kwikil chom mu muchim wend chikutwisha kumuwish mu yitil.
11 Pakwez muntu umukisina mwanamakwend mwin Kristu, muntu mwinou ushich mu mididim ni katat, ukat kwendil mu yaku ya mididim. Ndiy kijap kwisu kuyilay mulong mididim yimujadishin pa mes.
12 Anam akarukat, nikufundidilany mulong Nzamb wakulikishinanya kal yitil yen djat ni katat mulong wa yom yasalay Kristu.
13 Nikufundidilany en atatuku, mulong en umwijany ndiy wadingaku kudiokal ku disambishil djat ni katat. Nikufundidilany en ansangarum, mulong en wamupandakananya kal Sakudimban.
14 Nikufundidilany en anam akarukat, mulong en umwijany kal Nzamb Tatuku. Nikufundidilany en atatuku, mulong en umwijany ndiy wadingaku kudiokal ku disambishil djat ni katat. Nikufundidilany en ansangarum, mulong en ukwetany usu, chawiy mazu ma Nzamb mashich mu michim yen, chad en udiany in kumupandakan Sakudimban. Ingn
15 Kangal wakatany mangand ap yom yau yidiamu. Anch muntu wakat mangand, rukat ra Nzamb Tatuku kirishichap mu muchim wend.
16 Mulong yom yawonsu yidia mu mangand, charumburik anch, maku mayimp ma akayitil, ni ris ra yom yikat kumanau nich mes mau, ni kwibaz kwa yom yikwetau ni kwa yom yisadilau, yom yiney yawonsu kiyidiokilap kudi Nzamb Tatuku, pakwez yidiokil ku mangand.
17 Mangand mayil ni kujiy pamwing ni yom yawonsu yikwetau nich antu ris, pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal rusot ra Nzamb ukez kupand chikupu. Mwin kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu
18 Anam akarukat, chisu cha kwisudiel chidi piswimp, chawiy chisu chikushikay mwin kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu mudi muwateshanya. Mulong wa chom chinech twijik kal nawamp anch, komb chisu cha kwisudiel chashik kal, mulong in kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu amekanang kal avud.
19 Antu inay adiokala mu chisak chetu, pakwez kadingap kwau mu umwing ni yetwetu. Anch awiy ading mu umwing ni yetwetu, ing adandamedin kand pamwing ni yetwetu. Pakwez awiy adiokil kal chakwel chimekan patok anch, kadiap mu umwing ni yetwetu.
20 Pakwez en watambwilany kal Mwiku Utumbila wakwinkishanyau kudi Kristu Utumbila. En awonsu wijany kal uyakin.
21 Kinikufundidilanyap anch, mulong en kiwijanyap uyakin, bwat, pakwez nikufundidilany mulong en wijany kal uyakin, mulong kwikil makasu makutwisha kudiokal ku uyakin.
22 Ov, nany mwin makasu? Mwin makasu udi muntu mwawonsu ulikina kumwitiy Yesu anch, udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many. Muntu mwinou udi mwin kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu, ndiy kand ulikina kumwitiyij Nzamb Tatuku ap kumwitiyij Mwan.
23 Muntu mwawonsu ulikina kumwitiyij Mwan, kadiap kwend mu umwing nend Nzamb Tatuku. Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukumwitiyija Mwan, muntu mwinou udi kand mu umwing nend Nzamb Tatuku.
24 Chom chijim, chifanyidin rusangu riwateshanya kudiokal ku disambishil rushakam mu michim yen. Anch rusangu riwateshanya kudiokal ku disambishil rishich mu michim yen, niyen kand ukudandamenany kushakam mu umwing nend Mwan ni Nzamb Tatuku.
25 Kwawiy kwinoku kushilamu kwatushilayimu Kristu kwa kutwinkish mwom wa chikupu.
26 Nikufundidilany yom yiney mulong wa awiy akata kupakish kukupumbulany.
27 Pakwez en, Kristu wakwinkishany kal Mwiku wend Utumbila. Pashichay Mwiku wend Utumbila mu michim yen, kiukwetanyap kuswir kwa kukulejany chom kudi muntu. Chawiy Mwiku wend Utumbila ukat kukulejany yom yawonsu, yom yikulejinanyay yidi yakin, yakad ya makasu. Chawiy mwamu, ziyilany ku malejan ma Mwiku wend Utumbila, dandamenany mu umwing nend Kristu.
28 Chakin, anam akarukat, dandamenany mu umwing nend Kristu, chakwel tukwikal nich ruchingej pakumekanay, wakad kwov usany pa Dichuku dikushikay.
29 En wijany nawamp anch Kristu utentamin, chawiy ijikany kand anch muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yitentamina, ndiy wavadik kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb. An a Nzamb
1 Talany mutapu wa rukat rujim ratukatay Tatuku chakwel atupil anch, an a Nzamb! Chakin, mwamu tudia kamu! Mulong wa chom chinech, in mangand katwijap kwau mulong kand kal amwijik Nzamb.
2 Akarukat nam, katat tudi an a Nzamb, pakwez kand kal tushinshik nawamp mutapu tukeza kwikal. Pakwez chom chimwing chitwija chawiy chinech, pakez kumekanay Kristu tukez kufanakan nend ndiy, mulong tukez kumuman mudi mudiay.
3 Muntu mwawonsu umuchingejina Kristu, mwamu wilamin zwang mudi mudiay Kristu zwang.
4 Muntu mwawonsu ukusala chitil wajip kal chijil cha Nzamb, mulong kusal chitil kwawiy kujip chijil.
5 Pakwez en wijany anch, Yesu weza mulong wa kudiosh yitil yetu, chawiy mwi ndiy mwikiling chitil.
6 Muntu mwawonsu udia mu umwing nend Kristu kakusalap kand yitil. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal kand yitil kamumenap Yesu, ap kumwijik.
7 Anam akarukat, kangal witiyany antu akupumbulany! Muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yitentamina, niyend amwinend utentamin, mudi mutentaminay Yesu Kristu.
8 Muntu mwawonsu ukata kudandamen kusal yitil, amutakedin kudi Sakudimban, mulong Sakudimban ukat kusal yitil kudiokal ku disambishil. Mwan a Nzamb weza mulong wa kushesh midimu ya Sakudimban.
9 Muntu mwawonsu wavadikina kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb kakusalap kand chitil, mulong Nzamb wamwinkishin kal mwom usu kwikal mudi rubut. Kakutwishap kand kusal yitil mulong wavadikin kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb.
10 Mwamu tukutwish kujingunin patok an a Nzamb ni an a Sakudimban. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kusal yom yitentamina kadiap mwan a Nzamb, chawiy chimwing kand, ni muntu mwawonsu wakad kumukat mwanamakwend. Kukatijan muntu ni mukwau
11 Riner rawiy rusangu riwateshanya kal kudiokal ku disambishil anch: "Chifanyidin tukatijanangany muntu ni mukwau."
12 Kitufanyidinap kwikal mudi Kain watakelau kudi Sakudimban, chad wamujip mwanamakwend Abel. Ov, mulong ik wamujipinay? Mulong yisalijok ya Kain yading yiyimp, pakwez yisalijok ya mwanamakwend yading yitentamina.
13 Anamakwam, kangal washimwokany anch in mangand akukisany.
14 Mulong tuyikatil anamakwetu twij nawamp anch, kitudiap kand afu, pakwez katat tudi aom. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kumukat mukwau uchidi mufu ni katat.
15 Muntu mwawonsu umukisina mwanamakwend udi kabaaj mwin kujipan, chawiy en wijany nawamp anch, kabaaj mwin kujipan kakwetap mwom wa chikupu.
16 Kwinoku kwawiy kutwijikidina kurumburik kwa rukat anch, Yesu Kristu wapana mwom wend mulong wa kutwambat etu. Chawiy niyetu tufanyidin kupan mom yetu mulong wa kuyambat anamakwetu!
17 Anch muntu ukwet mapit ma mangand minam, chad ndiy umumen mwanamakwend uburedin chom, pakwez ndiy walik kumwovil riy, ov, rukat ra Nzamb rikwikal nchik mu muchim wend?
18 Anam akarukat, kichifanyidinap rukat retu rikal kusu ra kulond mazu mawamp, pakwez rufanyidin kwikal rukat rakin rimekedina mu yisalijok yetu yiwamp. Ruchingej ra kusej piswimp kudi Nzamb
19 Mulong wa chom chinech tukutwish kwijik anch tudi in yakin, tukutwish kand kupimish michim yetu kurutu kwa Nzamb.
20 Mulong anch michim yetu yatufish nich, Nzamb udi mujim kupandakanamu michim yetu, ndiy wij kand yom yawonsu.
21 Akarukat nam, anch kom ketu katufishilap nich, tukwikal nich ruchingej ra kusej piswimp kudi Nzamb.
22 Chad anch twit chom kudi ndiy tukutambul, mulong tuziyidil yijil yend, tukat kusal kand yom ya kumusangarish ndiy.
23 Chijil chend chawiy ech anch, chifanyidin tumwitiyijany Mwanend Yesu Kristu, chifanyidin kand tukatijanany muntu ni mukwau mudi mwatulejay Kristu.
24 Muntu mwawonsu uziyidina ku yijil ya Nzamb udi mu umwing nendendiy, niyend Nzamb udi mu umwing nend muntu. Twij nawamp anch, Nzamb udi mu umwing ni yetwetu mulong wa Mwiku Utumbila watwinkishay. Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb ni mwiku wa Sakudimban
1 Akarukat nam, kangal wayitiyany antu awonsu afila mu kan anch, akwet Mwiku Utumbila. Pakwez yipakany bil, ushinshikany anch, chakin, mwiku ukwetau udiokil kudi Nzamb. Mulong aruu a makasu avud apalangen kal mu mangand.
2 Talany mutapu ukutwishany kujingunin Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb. Muntu mwawonsu ukutwisha kwitiy anch, Yesu Kristu wikala nich mujimbu wa muntu, chakin, muntu ukwitiya mwamu ukwet Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb.
3 Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukulika kwitiy anch, Yesu Kristu wikala nich mujimbu wa muntu, chakin, muntu ukulika kwitiy mwamu kakwetap Mwiku Utumbila wa Nzamb. Muntu mwinou ukwet mwiku wa mwin kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu. En wateshany kal anch, mwiku winou ukwez, ni katat washikin kal mu mangand.
4 Anam akarukat, en udiany ayen a Nzamb. En wayipandakenanyamu kal aruu a makasu, mulong Mwiku Utumbila udia mu michim yenen ukwet ukash kumupandakanamu mwiku wa Sakudimban ushicha mu michim ya in mangand.
5 Aruu a makasu akat kulond yom ya mangand mulong awiy adi in mangand, chad in mangand akat kuyitesh.
6 Etu tudi antu ayen a Nzamb, muntu mwawonsu umwija Nzamb ukat kututesh. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu wakad kwikal wa Nzamb kakat kututeshap. Winou wawiy mutapu tukata kujingunin Mwiku Utumbila wa uyakin, ni mwiku wa makasu. Nzamb udi rukat
7 Akarukat nam, chifanyidin etu kudandamen kukatijan muntu ni mukwau, mulong rukat ridiokil kudi Nzamb. Muntu mwawonsu ukatena udi mwan a Nzamb, umwij kand Nzamb.
8 Muntu mwawonsu wakad kukatan kamwijap Nzamb, mulong Nzamb udi rukat.
9 Talany mutapu watulejay Nzamb rukat rend, ndiy wamutuma Mwanend kapwokal mu mangand chakwel etu tutambul mwom wa chikupu kudi ndiy.
10 Kurumburik kwa rukat rakin kwawiy oku, kiyetup twamukata Nzamb, pakwez ndiy watukata etu, chad wamutuma Mwanend kwikal yakupesh ya kulikishin yitil yetu yawonsu.
11 Akarukat nam, anch mwamu mwatukatay Nzamb, komb niyetu tufanyidin kukatijan muntu ni mukwau.
12 Kwikil muntu wamumanap kal Nzamb, pakwez anch etu twakatijanany muntu ni mukwau, komb tudiany mu umwing nend Nzamb, ni rukat rend ridia mu michim yetu rawanyin kal.
13 Talany mutapu twijany anch, tudiany mu umwing nend Nzamb, niyend Nzamb udi mu umwing ni yetwetu, chidi mulong ndiy watwinkisha Mwiku wend Utumbila.
14 Chawiy niyetu twamana, chad tulejen uman wetu anch, Nzamb Tatuku wamutuma Mwanend mulong wa kwikal Mupandish wa antu awonsu a pa mangand.
15 Anch muntu witiy anch, Yesu udi Mwan a Nzamb, komb Nzamb udi mu umwing nend muntu mwinou, niyend udi mu umwing nend Nzamb.
16 Chawiy mwamu etu twij nawamp, chakin, tuchingejin nakash rukat ritukatilingay Nzamb. Nzamb udi rukat. Muntu mwawonsu udandamedina mu rukat, muntu mwinou udi mu umwing nend Nzamb, niyend Nzamb udi mu umwing nendendiy.
17 Anch rukat ra Nzamb ruwanyidin mu michim yetu, chad mwamu tukez kwikal nich ruchingej pa Dichuku dikez kurumburishay Nzamb, mulong. mwom wetu wa pa mangand minam ufanaken ni mwom wa Yesu Kristu.
18 Mu rukat mwikiling wom. Rukat ruwanyidina rikat kwopat wom, chakin, wom ukat kwez mulong wa kadimu kakweza.Chawiy muntu mwawonsu ukweta wom kakwetap rukat ruwanyidina.
19 Etu tukwet rukat mulong Nzamb watukata etu pakusambish.
20 Anch muntu walond anch: "Am nimukatil Nzamb," chad umukisin mwanamakwend, muntu mwinou udi mukamakasu. Mulong anch muntu kamukatilap mwanamakwend umenay ku mes, kakutwishap kumukat Nzamb wakad kumekan ku mes.
21 Talany chijil chatwinkishay Kristu, anch muntu mwawonsu umukatila Nzamb, ufanyidin kand kumukat mwanamakwend. Kupandakan kwetu kwa yom ya mangand
1 Muntu mwawonsu witiyina anch, Yesu udi Kristu Uzizidilau Many, muntu mwinou wavadikin kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb. Muntu mwawonsu umukatila tatuku umukatil kand mwan wavalay.
2 Talany mutapu twijany anch tuyikatil an a Nzamb, chidi mulong tumukatil Nzamb ni kuziyil ku yijil yend.
3 Anch chakin, tumukatil Nzamb, tuziyidil kand ku yijil yend. Chawiy yijil yend kiyikasikenap nakash kudi etu,
4 mulong muntu mwawonsu wavadikina kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb udi mwin kupandakan wa yom ya mangand. Chawiy etu tukat kupandakan yom ya mangand nich ritiy retu mu Kristu.
5 Ov, nany ukutwisha kupandakan yom ya mangand? Ching kusu muntu witiyina anch, Yesu udi Mwan a Nzamb. Uman walejanau mulong wa Yesu Kristu
6 Yesu Kristu winou ndiy kamu weza, ndiy weza ku dibatish dia mem ni ku mash ma rufu rend. Ndiy kezap kusu ku mem, pakwez weza ku mem ni ku mash. Chad Mwiku Utumbila ukat kulejan uman wend anch, yom yiney yidi yakin, mulong Mwiku Utumbila ukat kulejan ching kusu yom ya uyakin.
7 Kudi atuman asatu.
8 Atuman inay adi Mwiku Utumbila, ni mem, ni mash, chad awonsu asatu akat kulejan uman wa mutapu umwing.
9 Etu tukat kwitiy uman ukat kulejanau antu, pakwez uman ukat kulejanay Nzamb upandaken, mulong winou wawiy uman walejanay Nzamb, walejana uman mulong wa Mwanend.
10 Muntu mwawonsu umwitiyijina Mwan a Nzamb, muntu mwinou ukwet uman winou mu muchim wend. Muntu mwawonsu wakad kwitiy uman winou, muntu mwinou wamumekesh kal Nzamb anch udi mwin makasu, mulong kitiyinap uman walejanay Nzamb mulong wa Mwanend.
11 Uman winou utulejin anch, Nzamb watwinkisha mwom wa chikupu, chad mwom winou utwinkishidinau mu Mwanend.
12 Muntu mwawonsu udia mu umwing nend Mwan a Nzamb, muntu mwinou ukwet mwom. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu wakad kwikal mu umwing nend Mwan a Nzamb, muntu mwinou kakwetap mwom winou. Mwom wa chikupu
13 Nifundil yom yiney kudi en umwitiyijinanya Mwan a Nzamb, chakwel ushinshikany anch ukwetany mwom wa chikupu.
14 Chawiy katat ruchingej ritukweta kudi Nzamb rawiy riner, anch twamwit chom, chad tumwit mudi mudia rusot rend, ndiy ukututesh.
15 Twij nawamp anch, ndiy ukat kututesh ku yom yawonsu tukata kumwit, twij kand anch, tukat kutambul yom yawonsu tukata kumwit.
16 Anch wamuman mwanamakwey mwin Kristu ukat kusal chitil chakad kumushikij ku rufu, chifanyidin kumulembidil, J chad Nzamb ukumupandish. Chidi chiwamp kusal mwamu mulong wa awiy asadila yitil yakad kushikijan ku rufu. Pakwez kudi chitil chimwing chikata kushikijan ku rufu, chad am kinilondilap kulembil mulong wa chitil chinech.
17 Chisalijok chawonsu chiyimp chidi chitil, pakwez kudi yitil yakad kushikijan ku rufu.
18 Etu twij nawamp anch, muntu mwawonsu wavadikina kal kwikal muntu musu ku rusot ra Nzamb kakudandamenap kand kusal yitil, pakwez Mwan a Nzamb ukumuchidij, chad Sakudimban kakutwishap kumusal nayimp.
19 Etu twij kand nawamp anch, tudi ayen a Nzamb, ap mwamwap nchik yom yikwau yawonsu ya mu mangand ayitakedil kudi Sakudimban.
20 Etu twij anch, Mwan a Nzamb weza, ndiy kand watwinkisha ronganyin chakwel tukumwijik nich Nzamb wakin. Tudi nend Nzamb mu umwing, tudi kand mu umwing nend Mwanend Yesu Kristu. Ndiy udi Nzamb wakin, mwin kupan mwom wa chikupu.
21 Anam akarukat, iyepany, yichinany akish.
1 Yam mukurump Yohan, nifundila mukand winou kudi ey, mband watondau kudi Nzamb, pamwing ni aney, nikukatilany kwakin. Kiyamap kusu amwinam nikukatilanya, pakwez kand antu awonsu ija uyakin akukatilany kand.
2 Tukukatilany mulong wa uyakin utukweta mu michim yetu, wawiy uyakin tukwikala nich chikupu.
3 Nikat kulembil anch ranaken, ni riy, ni chisambu yidiokila kudi Nzamb Tatuku ni kudi Yesu Kristu, Mwan a Tatuku, yikala ni yetwetu mu uyakin ni mu rukat. Uyakin ni rukat
4 Nikwet musangar nakash pakutesh anch, aney amwing adandamedin mu uyakin, mudi mwatulejau kudi Tatuku Nzamb.
5 Mband mukarukat, nikwet chom cha kukulej ey. Kinikufundidilap chijil chisu, pakwez nikat kukuvurish chijil chitwatambula kudiokal ku disambishil anch, chifanyidin etu kukatijan muntu ni mukwau.
6 Tal kurumburik kwa rukat rin kwawiy oku, chifanyidin kudandamen kuziyil yijil ya Nzamb. Chijil chend chiwatesha kudiokal ku disambishil chilejen anch, chifanyidin kudandamen mu rukat.
7 In kudimban avud apalangedin kal mu mangand, awiy kitiyinap anch, Yesu Kristu wikala muntu. Chawiy muntu mwawonsu wakad kwitiy mwamu udi mukamakasu, udi kand mwin kwitek pa ndond ya Kristu.
8 Babalany, chakwel kangal midimu yiwasalanya yisheshik chamwamu. Babalany kand, chakwel en wez utambulany difut dien diawonsu dia midimu yen.
9 Muntu mwawonsu ukupumbuka wakad kudandamen mu malejan ma Kristu, muntu mwinou kadiap kwend mu umwing nend Nzamb. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukudandamena mu malejan ma Kristu, muntu mwinou udi mu umwing nend Nzamb Tatuku ni Mwanend.
10 Chawiy anch muntu wez kudi en wakad kukuletilany malejan minam, kangal wamwakany mu chikumbu chen, ap kumulangwish.
11 Muntu mwawonsu ukumwaka muntu wa mutapu winou, wibomb kal nend mu midimu yiyimp. Mazu ma Yohan ma kwisudiel
12 Am nikwet yom yivud ya kukulejany, pakwez kinisotilap kuyifund pa diyij dia mukand, mulong nichingejin kwez kudi en chakwel tukwambambany pamwing ni yamam amwinam. Mwamu musangar wetu ukuwanyin.
13 An a nambaz wey watondau kudi Nzamb akulangwishin.
1 Yam mukurump Yohan, nifundila mukand winou kudi ey, mukarukat nam, Gayus, nikukatil kwakin.
2 Mukarukat nam, nikat kulembil anch yom yawonsu yikala yiwamp kudi ey, nikat kulembil kand anch ushakam nawamp ku mujimbu mudi muushicha muchim wey nawamp.
3 Nasanger nakash mulong anamakwetu in Kristu ashikena kunoku anlejin mutapu ujijamena mu uyakin. Anlejin kand mutapu udandamedina mu uyakin.
4 Kwikil chom chikwau chinsangarishina mudi pinateshina anch anam adandamedin mu uyakin. Win yakin wa Gayus
5 Mukarukat nam, ey ukat kudandamen kuyikwash anamakwetu in Kristu nich muchim wa win yakin, ap anch ikalap nchik aeny.
6 Awiy alejana mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb kunoku mulong wa rukat reyey. Nakwilembil ey anch yikwasha chakwel adandamen weny wau nawamp mudi mudia rusot ra Nzamb.
7 Aya mulong wa kusal mudimu mu dijin dia Kristu, wakad kutambul ukwash udiokila kudi antu akad kal kwikal in Kristu.
8 Chawiy etu in Kristu tufanyidin kuyak antu inay nawamp, chakwel tukubombakan nau mu mudimu wa uyakin wa Nzamb. Yaku ya Dioteref ni ya Demetirius
9 Nafunda mukand wiswimp ku Chikumbu cha Nzamb, pakwez Dioteref, ukatila kwikal mukurump wau, walika kutubangaku.
10 Chawiy anch nashik kwinaku, nikez kumekesh patok yisalijok yend, ndiy ukat kupalangesh mboj mulong wetwetu nich mazu mayimp. Chad kasangerap ching kusu nich yom yiney, bwat, pakwez ulikin kand kuyak anamakwetu in Kristu akwau. Chikwau kand, ndiy ukat kuyikangesh antu akwau asotila kuyak, chad wayopat mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb.
11 Mukarukat nam, kangal wilakej yom yiyimp, pakwez ilakej yom yiwamp. Muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yiwamp udi wayen wa Nzamb. Pakwez muntu mwawonsu ukata kusal yom yiyimp kand kal amwijik Nzamb.
12 Antu awonsu akat kulejan uman uwamp mulong wa Demetirius, ni yaku yend ya uyakin yikat kushimun kand uman wend. Niyetu tukat kushimun uman wend, chad en wijany anch, yom yitulondila yidi yakin. Mazu ma Yohan ma kwisudiel
13 Am nikwet yom yivud ya kukulej, pakwez kinisotilap kuyifund pa diyij dia mukand.
14 Nichingejin kukuman swa, chad tukwambamb pamwing ni yamam.
15 Nikat kulembil anch chisambu chikala kudi ey. Arund ney awonsu akulangwish. Niyey yilangwisha arund netu awonsu, muntu ni muntu.
1 Yam Jud, kashalapol wa Yesu Kristu, nidi kand mwanchend wa Jakobu. Nifundil mukand winou kudi antu awonsu atazukau kudi Nzamb, awiy kand akatilay Nzamb, achidijinau kudi Yesu Kristu.
2 Nikulembidilany anch riy, ni chisambu, ni rukat yivulijan kudi en. Alej a makasu
3 Akarukat, nading nikwet impu ya kukufundilany mukand wa kukurumburilany mulong wa dipandish ditukwetanya etu awonsu pamwing. Pakwez namen anch, ing, nakufundilangany, chakwel nikukasikeshany urishinany ritiy rapanay Nzamb kapamp kamwing chikupu kudi antwend.
4 Mulong antu amwing akad kumubangaku Nzamb andamin kal mu ujindj pakach pen. Antu inay akat kurumbangesh rusangu ra ranaken ra Nzamb wetu, chakwel iyingish nich mulong wa yaku yau ya usund. Awiy alikin kumwitiyij Yesu Kristu, Mwant wetu umwing, ndiy kand Nsalejetu. Kudiokal pakur afunda kal mu Mukand wa Nzamb anch, akez kuyifish nich antu inay.
5 Ap anch wijanyap kal nchik yom yiney nawamp, nisotil kukuvurishany mudi mwayikamuninay Nsalejetu antwend in Isarel mu Idjibit, pakwez kwinyim ndiy wayijiyisha antu awonsu a mukach mwau alika kwitiy mazu mend.
6 Vurikany aruu a mwiur alika kwau kulimish pasudiedila ndond ya ulabu wau, chawiy alika kushakam pa ndond yau. Nzamb uyilamidin mwi ndond ya mididim, ayikasin nich jimbwambu jishicha chikupu, chad akat kuchingel dirumburish diau pa Dichuku dikurumburishay Nzamb.
7 Vurikany anch, in musumb wa Sodom ni wa Gomor, pamwing ni in mal mayinyingumukina, niyau kand ipana ku yitil ya usund, ni ku usund wa mitapu yakad kufanyin antu kusal. Ayileja awiy kadimu ka kasu kakad kujimang, chilik cha antu inay chikuyibabesh kand antu awonsu.
8 Mutapu umwing, antu inay awiy amwing akat kuman yishimushimu yikata kuyibachik kusal yitil ya usund yikata kuyipish mijimbu yau. Awiy akat kudiul ulabu wa Nzamb ni kuyisaal masaal in uyaj a mwiur.
9 Pakwez Mikayel, ap anch wadingap nchik mukurump wa aruu a mwiur, kamanap mutapu wa kusal mwamu. Patadikijanay nend Sakudimban mulong wa kutambul mujimbu wa mujimb Moses, ndiy kamanap mutapu wa kumusaal Sakudimban masaal, pakwez wamwela anch: "Chifanyidin Nzamb akuleja kadimu!"
10 Pakwez antu inay akat kusaalan masaal ku yom yawonsu yikangenyau kwov kurumburik. Chad yom yijau ku wuntu wau ya usup mudi yijau annam, yom yiney yikat kuyijiyish.
11 Riyind kudi awiy! Alondula yaku ya Kain. Awiy ipana ku kurumbuk mudi mwarumbukay Balam mulong wa kupit mapit. Awiy akez kujiy mudi mwajiyay Kore, mulong adi in kubwambul mudi mwabwambulay ndiy.
12 Akat kuyipish misambu yen ya rukat nich yaku yau yijondila wakad usany. Awiy akat kwitong ayinau, adi mudi madj mamwamu makad kunakish ruvul. Adi mudi mitond yakad kusong mabuj pa chirung chau, adi kand mudi mitond yabwitilau kal. Chakin, afil kal kamu shutit.
13 Awiy afanaken mudi mambek maswejina ma karung, chad yisalijok yau ya usany yikat kumekan mudi mafuril mijondila. Adi mudi atutumbu apumbukina, asha jinjil jau, chawiy Nzamb uyilamidin ndond ya kuyitek ya chikupu yikweta mididim yipandakena kujal.
14 Enok wading muntu wa dijuku dia sambwad kudiokal ku Adam, ndiy wayibwakina antu inay anch: "Teshany, Chinawej ukez kwez nau aruu end a mwiur atumbila tunan ni tunan.
15 Ukwez chakwel ayirumburish antu awonsu, mulong wa kuyifish nich in kumubwambwil ndiy mulong wa yisalijok yau yiyimp, ni mulong wa mazu ma dichim wakad kalimish mamulondau ndiy!"
16 Antu inay akat kununganijan, akat kufundijan muntu ni mukwau. Akat kwisangarish ayinau nich maku mau mayimp. Awiy akat kwibaz nakash, chad akat kulond mazu ma rilemb kudi antu mulong achingejin kutambul chom. Malejan ma kwisudiel ni kubabesh
17 Pakwez en, akarukat nam, vurikany mazu makulejanyau kudi atwimbuy a Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu pasak.
18 Awiy akulejanya anch: "Mu machuku ma kwisudiel kukez kwikal antu in kukusipany en, awiy kamu antu akata kwisangarish ayinau nich maku mau mayimp."
19 Antu inay awiy akata kulet kwaurok, ayiyikedil kudi rusot ra wuntu, kakwetap kwau Mwiku Utumbila.
20 Pakwez en, akarukat nam, kulany mu ritiy ren ritumbila nakash. Piukulembilany, londulany kuyikel kwa Mwiku Utumbila.
21 Ilamany mu rukat ra Nzamb, piuchingedilany dichuku dikukwinkishanyau mwom wa chikupu kudi Nsalejetu Yesu Kristu ku riy rend.
22 Iyovilany in kwidjidjek riy.
23 Yipandishany, yilapulany mu kasu. Antu akwau iyovilany riy, pakwez ovany wom, kisany yidjal yau yijondila kal mulong wa yitil ya maku ma mijimbu yau. Kulembil kwa kushiman
24 Kudi ndiy ukutwisha kukulamany wakad kuwa, ndiy ukutwisha kand kukulamany wakad kapad, ukukushikijany nich musangar ujim mu uyaj wend,
25 ndiy kamu Nzamb umwing, Mupandish wetu mu Yesu Kristu Nsalejetu, chifanyidin kwikala uyaj, ni kujimb, ni dikand, ni ulabu, kudiokal ku mivu ni minang, ni katat, ni chikupu! Amen.
0 Yom Yamujinguninau Yohan kudi Yesu
1 Mu mukand winou mudi yom yajinguninay Yesu Kristu. Nzamb wamuleja Yesu yom yikushika mu chisu chikemp, chakwel ndiy ukuyijingunin atushalapol end. Kristu watuma muruu wend wa mwiur kudi kashalapol wend Yohan chakwel amwijikisha.
2 Winou wawiy uman walejanay Yohan mulong wa yom yawonsu yamanay ya Tusangu ra Nzamb ni ya yom ya uyakin yamujinguninau kudi Yesu Kristu.
3 Wayuk muntu ukata kutang mazu ma mukand winou, ayuk kand antu ateshina mazu ma muruu wa Nzamb mafundilau mu mukand winou, ni kumalam mu michim yau nich kashinsh, mulong chisu cha kumekan kwa yom yiney chashik kal piswimp. Yohan ukat kuyilangwish in Yikumbu ya Nzamb sambwad
4 Yam Yohan nifundila mukand Winou mulong wa kuyilangwish in Yikumbu ya Nzamb sambwad adia mwi ngand ya Aziy. Nilembidil anch ranaken ni chisambu yikala ni yenen. Yom yiney yidiokil kudi Nzamb udiaku, ndiy kand wadiaku, ndiy kand ukwikalaku. Yidiokil kand kudi aruu a mwiur sambwad iminya kurutu kwa ditand dia Nzamb.
5 Yidiokil kand kudi Yesu Kristu, kaman wakin, Mwan ikundj wa kusambish wa Nzamb, ndiy wasambela kuvumbuk mu rufu kwikal kand mwom, ndiy kand Mwant mujim wa ant a pa mangand. Kristu utukatil, ku mash mend watukamunina ku yitil yetu.
6 Ndiy watwikadisha ant a in kupesh mulong wa kumusadil Tatukwend Nzamb. Chifanyidin uyaj ni dikand yikala kudi Yesu Kristu chikupu ni chikupu! Amen.
7 Talany, ukat kwez mu madj! Antu awonsu akez kumuman, niyau amupampa akez kumuman kand. Antu awonsu a Pa mangand akez kumudil. Mwamu muchikeza kwikal! Amen!
8 Nsalejetu Nzamb ulondil anch: “Am yam disambishil ni yam kand disudiel,” ndiy udiaku, ndiy kand wadiaku, ndiy kand ukwikalaku, ndiy kamu Mwin Dikand Diawonsu. Yohan ukat kumuman Kristu mu chishimushimu
9 Yam Yohan, mwanamakwen mwin Kristu, nidia mu umwing Mi yenen mu mar mamenau antu adia mu Want wend, tudi kand mu umwing wa kudandamen nich muchim ushimpina. Antwala kal mu winkwal mu ditung dipidilau anch, Patimos, mulong narumburila dizu dia Nzamb ni uyakin yanjinguninay Yesu.
10 Pa dichuku dia Nsalejetu, pawiy panwilau kudi Mwiku Utumbila, chad natesha kwinyim kwam dizu dia piur difanaken mudi chidjimin cha mpuny.
11 Dizu dined diading ni kulond anch: “Yom yiukumana yifunda mu mukand, chad tum mukand winou kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb sambwad ku musumb wa Efes, ni wa Simirin, ni wa Perigam, ni wa Tiatir, ni wa Sarides, ni wa Filadelifiy, ni wa Laodisey.”
12 Nakarumuka kwinyim kutal nany winlondishina, chad namana mend ya kasu sambwad ya utad wa or.
13 Pakach pa mend ya kasu namanap chifanakesh cha muntu udjit nkandj mulemp djat ni ku yidjatil, udjit kand nshipu ya utad wa or mwi ntul.
14 Nswich jend jading jitok too mudi unyevu utok, ap mudi ndand. Mes mend mading mazazin mudi kasu.
15 Mend yend yading yilayin mudi utad wa bronze wa kwenguril, chad aupal. Dizu diend diading didjimin mudi mpol. yijim ya mem mavud.
16 Wading ukwatil atutumbu sambwad mu chikas chend cha katatuku, mu kan mwend mwabudika mpak ya musamun yikweta jimwemu mitambu yaad. Chifu chend chading ni kuzut mudi muten wa pakach.
17 Pinamumana, nawila ku mend yend mudi nafa kal. Ndiy wanganzuka chikas chend cha katatuku, wangel anch: “Kangal wov kwey wom! Yam disambishil, yam kand disudiel.
18 Am nidi mwom! Nading nafa kal, pakwez katat, tak, nidi mwom chikupu ni chikupu! Nikwet anfungul a rufu ni a ndond ya afu.
19 Chawiy fund yom yiwamananga, ni yom yidiaku katat, ni yom yikushika kurutu.
20 Nikukujingunin ey ujindj wa atutumbu sambwad adia mu chikas cham cha katatuku, ni wa mend ya kasu sambwad ya utad wa or. Atutumbu sambwad adi aruu a mwiur a Yikumbu ya Nzamb sambwad, chad mend ya kasu sambwad yidi Yikumbu ya Nzamb yiniya sambwad. Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Efes
1 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Efes anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy ukweta atutumbu sambwad mu chikas chend cha katatuku, ndiy kand ukata kwendil mukach mwa mend ya kasu sambwad ya utad wa or.
2 Nij yisalijok yey yawonsu, nij kand mudimu wasadila ukash, ni kushimpish kwey kwa muchim. Nij nawamp anch, ey ukutwishap kwitiy kuyilam antu ayimp mukach mwen. Ey wayipakin kal antu awonsu akata kufa mu kan anch, adi atwimbuy a Yesu, pakwez kadiap kwau, chad wayijingunin kal anch, adi kwau in makasu.
3 Ey washimpishin muchim wey, wamana mar mulong wamam, chad udandamedin kamu.
4 Pakwez tal, chom chinikufishina nich chawiy ech. Ey kiwinkatilap kand mudi pakusambish.
5 Tongijok, wawidil kal kulemp! Karumuk, diokal ku yitil yey, chad usala kand mudi muwasala pakusambish. Anch walik kukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yey, am nikwez kudi ey, chad nikudiosh mwend wey wa kasu pa ndond pau.
6 Pakwez chom chiwamp chinikatila kudi ey chawiy ech. Ey ukisin yisalijok ya in Nikol mudi munikisina kand am. ;
7 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb! “Mwawonsu ukupandakana nikez kumwinkish usu wa kudia mabuj ma mutond wa mwom udia mu chir cha Nzamb. Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Simirin
8 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Simirin anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy udia disambishil ni disudiel, ndiy wafa, wavumbuk wikal kand mwom.
9 Nij mar mey ob ULWELLU Woy, panwes. uu nw VY tapaware aay mee yous ya matungu yikat kukulondau kudi in kufa mu kan anch: ‘Tudi in Yuda.’» Awiy kadiap kwau in Yuda, adi in chisak cha Sakudimban.
10 Kangal wov wom wa mar masotila kushik swa kudi ey. Nikulejin patok anch, Sakudimban ukutek amwing pakach pen mu rukan mulong wa kukupakany. Ndiy ukez kukuzengolany machuku dikum. Ikal mwin yakin, ap anch wafap nchik, chawiy am nikez kukwinkish chibangul cha mwom.
11 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb. “Mwawonsu ukupandakana kakez kumanap mar ku rufu ra kaad. Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Perigam
12 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Perigam anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy ukweta mpak ya musamun yikweta jimwemu mitambu yaad.
13 Nij ndond yiushicha ey, pawiy padia ditand dia Sakudimban. Ap anch chikalap nchik mwamu, ey udandamedin kulam dijin diam. Ey kiulikinap kwingitiyij am, ap pa chisu cha Antipas, kaman wam wakin, wajipinau mu musumb ushicha ey, ndond yishichay kand Sakudimban.
14 Pakwez tal, yom yinikufishina nich yawiy yiney. Antu amwing a pakach pen akat kulondul malejan ma Balam. Ndiy wamuyula Balak chakwel ayipumbul in Isarel kusal yitil ya kudia yom yapeshau ku akish, ni yitil ya usund.
15 Chikwau kand, ukwet antu akwau pakach pen akat kulondul malejan ma in Nikol.
16 Chawiy karumuk udiokal ku yitil yey! Chamwamu nikwez kudi ey mu chisu chikemp, chad nikuyirishikish antu inay nich mpak ya musamun yidia mu kan mwam.
17 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb. “Am nikez kupan yakudia yipidilau anch, ‘Mana, kudi mwawonsu ukupandakana. Nikez kumwinkish kand diyal ditok pafundilau dijin disu, diakad kwijikan kudi muntu mukwau, ching kusu kudi muntu ukuditambula! Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Tiatir
18 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Tiatir anch: “Minam mawiy mazu ma Mwan a Nzamb ukweta mes mazazina mudi kasu, ukweta kand yidjatil yifanakena mudi utad wa bronze wa kupal.
19 Nij yisalijok yey yawonsu, mii rukat rey, ni ritiy rey. Nij kand kuziyil kwey ku mudimu, ni kudandamen kwey, katat ey usadil yom yivud kupandakan ya kusambish.
20 Pakwez yom yinikufishina nich yawiy yiney. Witiyin kumulam Jezabel mukach mwen, mband ufila mu kan anch udi muruu wa Nzamb. Ndiy ukat kuyipumbul atushalapol am nich malejan mend chakwel andam mu yitil ya usund, ni ya kudia yom yapeshau ku akish.
21 Namwinkishin kal chisu cha kukarumuk kudiokal mu yitil yend ya usund, pakwez ndiy kakatilap kwend kutesh.
22 Chawiy nikez kumudjibul mband mu ulal wa mayej, niyau amakundj enday nend akez kuman mar ma mayej nakash. Nikez kulik kuyimesh mar ching anch awiy akarumuk kudiokal mu yitil yau ya usund yasalau nend Jezabel.
23 Am nikez kuyijip anend. Chad in Yikumbu ya Nzamb awonsu akez kwijik anch, yam nikata kwijik yitongijok ni rusot yidia mu muchim wa muntu ni muntu. Nikez kumufut muntu ni muntu mudi mudia yisalijok yend.
24 “Pakwez kudi en, antu akwau a Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Tiatir wakadiany kal kulondul malejan mayimp ma mband winou, ap wakadiany kal kujingunin ujindj uyimp wa Sakudimban, nilondil anch, kinikez kukuwejinanyakup chisend chikwau.
25 Chom chijim, yom yakin yiukwetanya yilamany bang, djat ni pinikushikina.
26 Mwin kupandakan, ndiy kamu ukuziyila rusot ram djat ni kwisudiel, nikez kumwinkish ulabu wa kutakel michid.
27 Ndiy ukez kuyikel nich mukombu wa utad ujal, ukez kuyibuz mudi ansab a kam,
28 mudi kand munatambula am ulabu kudi Tatukwam. Nikez kumwinkish kand katumbu wa mwizikuch.
29 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb! Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Sarides
1 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Sarides anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy ukweta aruu a mwiur sambwad a Nzamb ni atutumbu sambwad. Nij yisalijok yey. Nij kand antu akwau atongila anch, ey udi mwom, pakwez chakin, ey wafil kal kwey!
2 Lank, wikasikesh, ulama yom yakin yiukweta piyakad kal kufa, mulong yisalijok yey kand kal yiwanyin ku mes ma Nzamb wam.
3 Chawiy vurik malejan makulejau ni yom yiwatesha. Ziyil ku malejan minam, chad karumuk, udiokal ku yitil yey. Anch walik kulank, am nikwez kukukashimwish mudi mukat kwezay mwij pa chisu chiwakad ey kwijik.
4 Pakwez ey ukwet antu amwing a mu chisak cha in Sarides akad kwikisish yidjal yau. Awiy akez kudjal yidjal yitok, chad akez kwend ni yamam pamwing mulong awiy adi antu awanyidina.
5 Muntu mwawonsu ukupandakana, niyend ukez kudjal kand yidjal yitok mudi awiy. Am kinikez kujimangeshap dijin diend mu mukand wa mwom, pakwez nikez kumujimbul kudi Tatukwam ni kudi aruu end a mwiur anch: ‘Winou udi wamam.’ :
6 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb! Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Filadelifiy
7 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Filadelifiy anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy utumbila, ndiy kand mwin yakin, ndiy ukweta nfungul ya Mwant David. Anch ndiy wanzuril, kwikil ukutwisha kupat, ap anch ndiy wapat, kwikil ukutwisha kwanzuril.
8 Nij yisalijok yey. Tal, nakwanzuridil kal chis, kwikil muntu ukutwisha kuchipat. Nij kand anch, ey ukwet ching ukash ukemp, pakwez ap mwamwap nchik, ey walama dizu diam, kiwatunap dijin diam.
9 Tal, antu amwing akat kufa mu kan anch, adi in Yuda, pakwez kadiap kwau in Yuda. Kadiap kwau in Yuda, bwat, adi in makasu, adi in chisak cha Sakudimban. Am nikuyilet, awila ku mend kwey, chad awly akwijik anch, komb am nikukatiling ey.
10 Ey walamin kal dizu diam nich kudandamen, chawiy niyam nikez kukuchidij pa chirung cha mar makeza kwez kudi antu awonsu a pa mangand, mulong wa kuyipak.
11 Nikat kwez swa. Lam bang yom yakin yiukweta, chakwel kangal muntu wakwamuk chibangul chey cha kupandakan.
12 Muntu ukypandakana nikez kumutek kwikal dinguj mu Chikumbu cha Nzamb wam, chad ndiy kakez kubudikap mu Chikumbu chinicha. Nikez kufund pa mujimbu wend dijin dia Nzamb wam, ni dijin dia musumb wa Nzamb wam. Musumb winou, ndiy kamu Yerusalem musu, ukeza kushirik kudiokal mwiur mwa Nzamb wam. Nikez kumufund kand dijin diam disu.
13 “Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb. ’ Mukand kudi in Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Laodisey
14 “Mufundila muruu wa mwiur wa Chikumbu cha Nzamb ku Laodisey anch: “Minam mawiy mazu mendendiy upidilau anch, Amen, ndiy kand udia kaman wakin wa yom yakin, ndiy mwin kutakel wa yitang yawonsu ya Nzamb.
15 Nij yisalijok yey. Ey kiudiap utalel ap uswanyina. Am nikatil ing wadi utalela ap ing wadi uswanyina!
16 Pakwez mulong ey udi kalengidij, kiutalelap, chad kand kiuswanyinap, am nikez kukuchil kamu mudi mat.
17 Ey ulondil anch: ‘Am nidi mpich. Nikwet mapit mavud, kiniswiridinap chom.’ Pakwez ey kiwijap anch, udi ntany, ni chimana mar, udi kazwazu, kanzikis, ni mputames.
18 Nikat kukuyul anch, land kudi am utad wa.or wa zwang wengurilau kal mu kasu chakwel wikala mpich. Ulanda kand yidjal yitok, udjal, chakwel upwish usany wa winzikis wey. Land kand mwon wa mes chakwel umana.
19 Am nikat kuyipup ni kuyikand antu awonsu inikatina. Chawiy ikal nich mushiku, ukarumuk kudiokal ku yitil yey.
20 Tal, niminy ku chis, nikat kukokal. Anch muntu watesh dizu diam, chad wanzaril ku chis, am nikwandam ni kudia nend, niyend ukudia ni yamam.
21 Muntu. mwawonsu ukupandakana nikumwinkish usu wa kushakam pamwing ni yamam pa ditand diam, mudi munapandakana niyam, chad nashakama pa ditand dia Tatukwam.
22 Mwawonsu ukweta matu ma kutesh, atesha kwend yom yilondilay Mwiku Utumbila kudi in Yikumbu ya Nzamb.” Mutapu wa kwifukwil kwa mwiur
1 Chiyapwa yom yiney, namana chis chanzurik mwiur. Dizu dinatesha pakusambish diading ni kudjim mudi mpuny dianleja kand anch: “Kandam weza kunoku, chad nikez kukulej yom yikushika kwinyim kwa yom yiney.”
2 Kukashimuk, Mwiku Utumbila wanwila, chad namana ditand mwiur. Pa ditand dinidia pading pashich muntu.
3 Ndiy wading pa ditand wamekana mudi diyal dia usey dilayina dia mem ma matamb, ap mudi diyal dia usey disuzina nakash. Ditand ading adiombilamu kudi nkongal ufanakena mudi diyal dia usey dia imem ma matamb.
4 Ditand dined ading adinyingumukin kudi matand makwau makum maad ni manying, chad pa matand minam pading pashich amakurump makum maad ni anying. Ading adjit yidjal yitok, adjit kand yibangul ya utad wa or ku mitu yau.
5 Ku ditand kwabudika milayilay, ni yidjimin ya nzaj, ni mazu. Kurutu kwa ditand kwading mend ya kasu sambwad yading kulabuk mizwizu ya kasu. Mend yiney ading aruu a mwiur sambwad a Nzamb.
6 Chikwau kand, kurutu kwa ditand kwading chom chimeken mudi karung wa matalital, chikat kulay mudi diyal dipayila. Mutambu ni mutambu wa ditand ading adiombilamu kudi yitang yinying yikweta mwom, yading kand yibambil mes mujimbu wawonsu kurutu ni kwinyim.
7 Chitang cha kusambish chikweta mwom chading chifanaken mudi ntambu, chitang cha kaad chading chifanaken mudi musamb a ngomb ikwal, chitang cha kasatu chading chikwet chifu chifanaken mudi muntu, chad chitang cha kanying chading chifanaken mudi mbur utwikina.
8 Chitang ni chitang chikweta mwom chading chikwet jimpur musamban, chading chibambil mes mujimbu wawonsu mukach ni pol. Yitang yiney yawanganga muten ni uchuku anch: “Utumbila, utumbila, utumbila udi Nsalejetu Nzamb Mwin Dikand Diawonsu, ndiy wadingaku, ndiy kand udiaku, ndiy kand ukeza kwikalaku.”
9 Yitang yinying yikweta mwom yikat kuwang miminy ya uyaj, ni ya katumb, ni ya kumushiman ndiy ushicha pa ditand, ndiy kand ukweta mwom wa chikupu ni chikupu. Yisu yawonsu pawangangau mwamu,
10 amakurump makum maad ni anying ading ni kumuzengamin ndiy ushicha pa ditand, amwifukwilanga ndiy ukweta mwom wa chikupu ni chikupu. Ading ni kutul yibangul yau kurutu kwa ditand, alond anch:
11 “A! Nsalejetu, Nzamb wetu! Ey yey uwanyidina kutambul uyaj, ni katumb, ni ukash. Mulong yey watanga yom yawonsu, ni yom yawonsu yidiaku yishich mulong wa rusot rey.” Mwan a Mukoku ni mukand wa kuvung
1 Chad namana mukand wa kuvung mu chikas cha katatuk chendendiy ushicha pa ditand: Mukand winou ading aufundil mutambu ni mutambu, ading aujikin nich yijingidij sambwad.
2 Namana muruu wa mwiur ukweta dikand wabarika nich dizu dikash anch: “Ov, nany uwanyidina kudiosh yijingidij yiney chakwel avunguril mukand winou?”
3 Pakwez kwikil ap umwing mwiur, ap pa mangand, ap kwishin kwa divu ukutwisha kuvunguril mikand, ap kuutal mukach.
4 Nadila nakash, mulong kwikil ap umwing uwanyidina kuvunguril mukand ap kuutal mukach.
5 Chad mukurump umwing wa chisak cha amakurump wangela anch: “Kangal wadil! Tal! Ntambu wa muchid wa Yuda, ndiy kamu wa mbut ya David. Ntambu winou ndiy wapandakana ukutwisha kudiosh yijingidij sambwad ni kuvunguril mukand.”
6 Chad namana Mwan a Mukoku wiminy mukach mwa ditand, amwombilamu kudi yitang yinying yikweta mwom pamwing nau amakurump. Mwan a Mukoku wading umeken mudi amujipang kal. Wading ukwet misengu sambwad ni mes sambwad, yiney yading aruu a mwiur sambwad a Nzamb, atumangay mu mangand mawonsu.
7 Mwan a Mukoku wasejaku, watambul mukand wa kuvung wadinga mu chikas cha katatuku chendendiy wadinga ushich pa ditand.
8 Patambulay mukand wa kuvung, yitang yinying yikweta mwom ni amakurump makum maad ni anying, awonsu asa manungun pansh kurutu kwa Mwan a Mukoku. Umwing ni umwing wading ukwet kadiad ni jimpas ja utad wa or jizwil nich malash, chad malash minima kwawiy kulembil kwa antu a Nzamb.
9 Awiy ading ni kuwang muminy usu anch: "Ey uwanyidin kutambul mukand wa kuvung ni kudiosh yijingidij yau. Mulong ey akujipa, chad ku mash mey ey wayikwola antu kwikal antu a Nzamb. Wayikwolap antu amwing a michid yawonsu, ni antu a jindim jawonsu, ni a majuku mawonsu, ni a mangand mawonsu.
10 Ndiy wayikadisha kwikal want wa in kupesh mulong wa kumusadil Nzamb, chad awiy akez kuyikel pa mangand."
11 Chad natala kand, natesha dipumb dia aruu avud a mwiur, ading tunan ni tunan, tutikit ni tutikit. Awiy ading ombilamu ditand, ni yitang yikweta mwom, pamwing nau amakurump.
12 Chad ading ni kuwang anch: "Mwan a Mukoku wajipau, ndiy uwanyidina kutambul ukash, ni dipit, ni manangu, ni usu, ni katumb, ni uyaj, ni kushiman!"
13 Natesha kand yitang yawonsu ya mwiur, ni ya pa mangand, ni ya kwishin kwa divu, ni ya mu karung, yawiy kamu yitang yawonsu yidiaku. Awiy ading ni kuwang anch: "Kudi ndiy ushicha pa ditand, ni kudi Mwan a Mukoku, chifanyidin kwikala kushiman, ni katumb, ni uyaj, ni dikand chikupu ni chikupu!"
14 Yitang yinying yikweta mwom yakula anch: "Amen!" Chad amakurump awonsu asa manungun pansh ni kwifukwil. Yijingidij ya mukand
1 Namana padioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha kusambish cha yijingidij sambwad, chad natesha dizu dia chitang chimwing cha yitang yinying yikweta mwom diabarika mudi chidjimin cha nzaj anch: "Ez kunoku!"
2 Chawiy natala, chad naman kabar mutok. Mwin kukandamap wading ukwet ut wa nseu, amwinkisha chibangul, chad waya mudi mwin kupandakan uyila ni kupandakan.
3 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha kaad, natesha chitang cha kaad cha yitang yinying yikweta mwom walond anch: "Ez kunoku!"
4 Chad kabar mukwau musuz nakash wabudik. Mwin kukandamap amwinkisha ukash wa kudiosh chisambu pa mangand, chakwel antu ajipijanang. Chawiy amwinkisha mpak ya musamun yijim.
5 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha kasatu, natesha chitang cha kasatu cha yitang yinying yikweta mwom walond anch: "Ez kunoku!" Natala, chad naman kabar mujal. Mwin kukandamap wading ukwet chilik cha kulim mu chikas chend.
6 Natesha mudi dizu didiokil mukach mwa yitang yinying yikweta mwom, dialond anch: "Kilo umwing wa tidiku diawiy difut dia mudimu wa dichuku diakabuj, akilo asatu a masangu diawiy difut dia mudimu wa dichuku diakabuj. Chawiy kangal wayipish many ni maar ma nviny."
7 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha kanying, natesha dizu dia chitang cha kanying cha yitang yinying yikweta mwom walond anch: "Ez kunoku!"
8 Natala, chad naman kabar utokirikina, mwin kukandamap dijin diend Rufu. Mukwau, dijin diend Ndond ya Afu, wamulondula kwinyim. Ayinkisha ulabu wa kujip antu a chikunku chimwing cha yikunku yinying ya mangand. Akuyijip nich mpak ya musamun, ni kamungun, ni misong, ni annam a yidiany adia mu mangand.
9 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha katan, namana mwishin mwa chintamb mipim ya antu ajipau mulong awiy arumburilanga dizu dia Nzamb ni kulejan uman wau.
10 Awiy abaroka nich dizu dijim anch: "Nsalejetu Sakatang, utumbila ni mwin yakin, ov, chisu ik chiukuyirumburisha antu a mangand ni kuyifundakeshin mash metu?"
11 Ayinkisha umwing ni umwing nkandj mulemp mutok, chad ayilej kuchingel chisu chikemp, kushik djat ni pakuwanyishinau kuvul kwa anamakwau ni atushalapol akwau akez kujipau mudi mwayijipau awiy.
12 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha musamban, kwading kunyikek kujim kwa ngand. Muten wajala bwi mudi diswin dijal, chad ngond wasuza geng mudi mash.
13 Atutumbu apaloka pansh pa mangand, mudi mabuj ma nfung marukina ku mutond anch amanyikesh kudi rinkind mukash.
14 Diur diadiokala, divungol mudi mukand wa kuvung, chad mikandu yawonsu ni matung mawonsu ayishemunona kuyidiosh pa jindond jau.
15 Chawiy ant a pa mangand, ni in kutakel, ni atulal a njit, ni ampich, ni in dikand, pamwing ni antu akwau awonsu, aswik ap ant ipau, ajingama mu mandam ni mu mayal ma mikandu.
16 Ayileja mikandu ni mayal anch: “Tuwilany, tujindjikany ku mes mendendiy ushicha pa ditand, ni ku ujim wa Mwan a Mukoku!
17 Mulong dichuku dijim dia ujim wau diashikang kal, ov, nany ukutwisha kushal mwom?” In Isarel 144.000
1 Chiyasuta yom yiney, namana aruu a mwiur anying iminy ku makonk manying ma mangand, chakwel amukangesh rinkind munying kupepet pa mangand, ap pa karung, ap pa mitond.
2 Chad namana muruu mukwau wa mwiur, udiokil ku mutambu wa kwingangel, ukwet chijingidij cha Nzamb mwom, Wabarika nich dizu dikash kudi aruu akwau a mwiur inkishau ukash kudi Nzamb wa kuyipish mangand ni karung, wayilej anch:
3 “Kangal wayipishany bil mangand, ap karung, ap mitond, ching anch twapwish kutek chijingidij pa jimpal jau atushalapol a Nzamb wetu.”
4 Natesha kuvul kwa antu awonsu atekau chijingidij cha Nzamb, ading tunan chitot ni makum manying ni tunying a mu michid yawonsu ya in Isarel.
5 Ku muchid wa in Yuda kwading antu tunan dikum ni twaad atekau chijingidij, ku muchid wa in Ruben kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Gad kwading tunan dikum ni twaad,
6 ku muchid wa in Azer kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Nefitali kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Manase kwading tunan dikum ni twaad,
7 ku muchid wa in Simeyon kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Levi kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Isakar kwading tunan dikum ni twaad,
8 ku muchid wa in Zabulon kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, ku muchid wa in Josef kwading tunan dikum ni twaad, chad ku muchid wa in Benjamin kwading tunan dikum ni twaad. Runtu ruvud kurutu kwa ditand
9 Chiyasuta yom yiney, natala, chad naman runtu ruvud rakad kutwish kuchind kudi muntu. Antu inay adiokala ku mangand mawonsu, ni ku michid yawonsu, ni ku antu awonsu, ni ku jindim jawonsu. Ading iminy kurutu kwa ditand ni kwa Mwan a Mukoku. Ading adjit ankandj alemp atok, chad alamin malal ma mabu mu makas mau.
10 Awiy abaroka nich dizu dikash anch: “Dipandish dietu didiokil kudi Nzamb wetu ushicha pa ditand, ni kudi Mwan a Mukoku!”
11 Aruu a mwiur awonsu ading ombilamu ditand bwalakan, pamwing ni amakurump ni yitang yinying yikweta mwom. Awonsu awa pansh swa kabwikam, chad amwifukwila Nzamb.
12 Alonda anch: “Amen! Kushiman, ni uyaj, ni manangu, ni kujikitish, ni katumb, ni dikand, ni ukash yikala kudi Nzamb wetu chikupu ni chikupu! Amen!”
13 Umwing wa amakurump wangipula anch: “Ov, antu in adjita ankandj alemp atok, ay anany? Chad adiokil kwisu?”
14 Namwakula anch: “Mwant, yey wija.” Ndiy wangela kand anch: “Adi antu adiokila mu mar makash mapandakena. Awiy atutin kal ankandj au ni kuyitokish mu mash ma Mwan a Mukoku.
15 Mulong awiy asadil kal mwamu, chawiy chimanyidinau kurutu kwa ditand dia Nzamb. Akat kwmusadil ndiy muten ni uchuku mu Chikumbu chend. Ndiy wshicha pa ditand ukez kushakam nau ni kuyichidij.
16 Awiy kakez kwovap nzal ap impu. Kakez kwovap kand kuswan kwa muten, ap kwa chirungul cha mutapu ukwau,
17 mulong Mwan a Mukoku udia mukach mwa ditand ukez kwikal kafung wau. Ndiy ukez kuyitwal ku misul ya mem ma mwom. Chad Nzamb ukez kuyikuswol mansoj ku mes mau.” Chijingidj cha sambwad
1 Chadioshay Mwan a Mukoku chijingidij cha sambwad, mwiur mwading kamu zong mudi chikunku chimwing cha chisu.
2 Chad namana aruu a mwiur sambwad akata kwiman kurutu kwa Nzamb, pawiy pinipa ayinkisha jimpuny sambwad.
3 Muruu wa mwiur mukwau weza wiman ku chintamb, wading ukwet dilong dia utad wa or dia kwoshil diseng dia malash. Amwinkisha diseng divud dia malash dia kulambul pamwing ni kulembil kwa antu awonsu a Nzamb. Wayilambula pa chintamb cha or chading kurutu kwa ditand.
4 Mish ya diseng dia malash, pamwing ni kulembil kwa antu a Nzamb, yading mu chikas cha muruu wa mwiur wading wiminy kurutu kwa Nzamb, yakakumuka yaya piur.
5 Chad muruu wa mwiur wanona dilong dia kwoshil diseng dia malash, wadizwish nich kasu kadinga pa chintamb. Chad wadidjibul pa mangand, kwikala yidjimin ya nzaj, ni mazu, ni milayilay, ni kunyikek kwa mangand. Jimpuny :
6 Chad aruu a mwiur sambwad irijeka mulong wa kubul jimpuny sambwad jading jikwetau.
7 Muruu wa mwiur wa kusambish wabula mpuny yend, chad kweza mayal ma ruvul ni kasu kabombakena nich mash, yawonsu ayidjibwila pa mangand. Chikunku chimwing cha yisatu cha mangand chatema shat, ni chikunku chimwing cha yisatu cha mitond chatema shat, ni masuku mawonsu matalela matema kand shat.
